Matthew1:1 Lokwalo lwa losika lwa ga Jesu Jeresete morwa Dafite, morwa Aberahame." 
Matthew1:2 Aberahame a tsala Isake; Isake a tsala Jakobe; Jakobe a tsala Juta le bomonnawe; 
Matthew1:3 Juta le Tamare ba tsala Perese le Sera; Perese a tsala Heserone; Heserone a tsala Rame; 
Matthew1:4 Rame a tsala Aminatabe; Aminatabe a tsala Našone; Našone a tsala Salemone; 
Matthew1:5 Salemone le Rahabe ba tsala Boase; Boase le Ruthe ba tsala Obete; 
Matthew1:6 Obete a tsala Jese; Jese a tsala Dafite kgosi. Dafite le mosadi yo o kileng a ne e le mogatsa Uria, ba tsala Solomone;" 
Matthew1:7 Solomone a tsala Rehoboame; Rehoboame a tsala Abija; Abija a tsala Asa; 
Matthew1:8 Asa a tsala Jehošafate; Jehošafate a tsala Jorame; Jorame a tsala Usia; 
Matthew1:9 Usia a tsala Jothame; Jothame a tsala Ahase; Ahase a tsala Hesekia; 
Matthew1:10 Hesekia a tsala Manase; Manase a tsala Amone; Amone a tsala Josia; 
Matthew1:11 Josia a tsala Jekonia le bomonnawe, ka lobaka lwa go isiwa kwa Babilone." 
Matthew1:12 E rile morago ga go isiwa kwa Babilone, Jekonia a tsala Salathiele; Salathiele a tsala Serubabele;" 
Matthew1:13 Serubabele a tsala Abiute; Abiute a tsala Eliakime; 
Matthew1:14 Eliakime a tsala Asore; Asore a tsala Satoke; Satoke a tsala Akime; Akime a tsala Eliute; 
Matthew1:15 Eliute a tsala Eleasare; Eleasare a tsala Mathane; Mathane a tsala Jakobe; 
Matthew1:16 Jakobe a tsala Josefe, monna wa ga Maria, yo o belegeng Jesu yo o bidiwang Keresete." 
Matthew1:17 Jalo ditshika tsotlhe, go simolola ka Aberahame go tla go fitlha mo go Dafite, ke ditshika di le 14; go tswa mo go Dafite go tla go fitlha mo lobakeng lwa go isiwa kwa Babilone, ke ditshika di le 14; le go tswa mo lobakeng lwa go isiwa kwa Babilone go tla go fitlha mo go Keresete, ke ditshika di le 14." 
Matthew1:18 Jaana go tsalwa ga Jesu Keresete ga nna jaana: E rile Maria mmaagwe a sena go beelelwa ke Josefe, ba ise ba kopane, a fitlhelwa a ithwele ga Mowa o o Boitshepo." 
Matthew1:19 Mme Josefe monna wa gagwe, ka a le mosiami, mme a sa rate go mo senola, go mo tlhabisa ditlhong, a nna le mogopolo wa go mo tlhalela mo sephiring." 
Matthew1:20 Mme ya re a akanya jalo, bonang, moengele wa Morena a bonala kwa go ene ka toro, a re: “Josefe morwa Dafite, se boife go tsaya Maria mosadi wa gago, gonne go ithwala ga gagwe ke ga Mowa o o Boitshepo." 
Matthew1:21 O tlaa bona ngwana wa mosimane; mme o tlaa mo raya leina o re, Jesu; gonne ke ene yo o tlaa gololang batho ba gagwe mo dibeng tsa bone.”" 
Matthew1:22 Jaana gotlhe mo go dirafetse, gore go dirafale se se kileng sa buiwa ke Morena ka moperofeti fa a re:" 
Matthew1:23 “Bonang, kgarebane e tlaa ithwala, mme e tlaa bona ngwana wa mosimane, mme ba tlaa mo raya leina ba re, Imanuele,” ke gore: “Modimo o mo go rona” fa go phuthololwa." 
Matthew1:24 Mme Josefe a tsoga mo borokong, a dira jaaka moengele wa Morena a mo laile, a tsaya mosadi wa gagwe;" 
Matthew1:25 mme a se ka a mo itse, ga tsamaya a bona ngwana wa mosimane pele, mme a mo raya leina a re, Jesu." 
Matthew2:1 Jaana e rile Jesu a tsalelwa mo Bethelehema wa Jutea, mo metlheng ya kgosi Herote, bonang, banna ba ba botlhale ba ba tswang botlhabatsatsi ba fitlha mo Jerusalema ba re:" 
Matthew2:2 “O fa kae yo o tsetsweng, Kgosi ya Bajuta? Gonne re bonye naledi ya gagwe re le kwa botlhabatsatsi, mme re tsile go mo obamela.”" 
Matthew2:3 E rile kgosi Herote a utlwa jalo a fuduega, le motse otlhe wa Jerusalema nae." 
Matthew2:4 Mme a phutha baperesiti ba bagolo botlhe, le bakwaledi ba batho, a ba botsa kwa go tulweng Keresete o tlaa tsalelwa teng." 
Matthew2:5 Ba mo raya ba re: “Mo Bethelehema wa Jutea; gonne go kwadilwe jalo ke moperofeti a re: 
Matthew2:6 ‘Wena Bethelehema, lefatshe la Juta, ga o mmotlana gope mo magosaneng a Juta; gonne mo go wena go tlaa tswa molaodi, yo o tlaa nnang modisa wa batho ba me Baiseraele.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Foo Herote a biletsa banna ba ba botlhale bao kwa thoko, a tlhotlhomisa go tlhaloganya mo go bone lobaka lo naledi e bonetseng ka lone." 
Matthew2:8 Mme a ba roma kwa Bethelehema a re: “Yang lo tlhotlhomise sentle ka ga ngwanyana yo; e re lo sena go mmona, lo tle go nkitsise, gore le nna ke ye go mo obamela.”" 
Matthew2:9 Bone ya re ba sena go utlwa kgosi ba tsamaya; mme bonang, naledi e ba e bonyeng ba le kwa botlhabatsatsi, ya ba etelela pele, ya tsamaya ya fitlha ya ema e okame golo fa ngwanyana o leng teng." 
Matthew2:10 Ba re ba bona naledi ba itumela ka boitumelo jo bogolo thata. 
Matthew2:11 Ba fitlha ba tsena mo ntlong, ba bona ngwanyana a na le Maria mmaagwe; ba wela fa fatshe ba mo obamela; mme ba ntsha mahumo a bone, ba mo ntshetsa dineo: gouta, le malao a lebano le mura." 
Matthew2:12 Mme e ne ya re ka ba tlhagisitswe ke Modimo ka toro, gore ba se ka ba boela kwa go Herote, ba tsaya tsela e sele ba ya lefatsheng la ga bone." 
Matthew2:13 Jaana e rile ba sena go tsamaya, bonang, moengele wa Morena a bonala kwa go Josefe ka toro a re: “Tloga o tseye ngwanyana le mmaagwe, o tshabele kwa Egepeto, o bo o nne teng go tle go tsamaye ke go itsise; gonne Herote o tlaa batla ngwanyana go mmolaya.”" 
Matthew2:14 Mme a tloga a tsaya ngwanyana le mmaagwe bosigo, a ya Egepeto;" 
Matthew2:15 Mme a nna teng, ga tsamaya Herote a swa; gore go dirafale se se builweng ke Morena ka moperofeti a re: “Ke biditse morwaake a le kwa Egepeto.”" 
Matthew2:16 Foo Herote, o rile a lemoga fa a sotlilwe ke banna ba ba botlhale bao, a gakala thata, mme a roma batho, a bolaya tshimane yotlhe ya Bethelehema, le ya tikologo yotlhe ya teng, go simolola ka ba ba dinyaga pedi le bomonnaa bone, ka fa motlheng o o o tlhotlhomisitseng, a tlhaloganya mo go ba ba botlhale ka one." 
Matthew2:17 Foo ga dirala se se kileng sa buiwa ke moperofeti Jeremia a re: 
Matthew2:18 “Lentswe la utlwala mo Rama, selelo le khutsafalo e kgolo, e le Ragele a lelela bana ba gagwe; mme a gana go gomodiwa, ka gobo ba seyo.”" 
Matthew2:19 E rile Herote a sena go swa, bonang, moengele wa Morena a bonala kwa go Josefe ka toro, kwa Egepeto, a re:" 
Matthew2:20 “Tloga o tseye ngwanyana le mmaagwe, o ye lefatsheng la Iseraele; gonne ba ba kileng ba batla go mmolaya ba sule.”" 
Matthew2:21 Mme a tloga a tsaya ngwanyana le mmaagwe, a tla mo lefatsheng la Iseraele." 
Matthew2:22 E rile a utlwa fa Arekelao a busa mo Jutea, mo boemong jwa ga Herote rraagwe, a boifa go ya teng; mme ya re ka a tlhagisitswe ke Modimo ka toro, a ngongwaelela kwa dintlheng tsa Galilea." 
Matthew2:23 A fitlha a aga mo motseng o go tweng Nasaretha; gore go dirafale se se kileng sa buiwa ke baperofeti, fa a tlaa bidiwa Monasara." 
Matthew3:1 E rile mo metlheng eo ga tla Johane Mokolobetsi, a rera mo nageng ya Jutea a re:" 
Matthew3:2 “Ikwatlhayeng, gonne bogosi jwa legodimo bo atametse.”" 
Matthew3:3 Gonne yo, ke ene yo Isaia moperofeti o ne a bua ka ga gagwe, a re: “Lentswe la mongwe yo o kuang mo nageng a re: Baakanyang mmila wa Morena, siamisang ditsela tsa gagwe.”" 
Matthew3:4 Jaana Johane ene, diaparo tsa gagwe e ne e le tsa bobowa jwa kamela, le moitlamo wa letlalo mo lothekeng lwa gagwe; dijo tsa gagwe e le tsie le dinotshe tsa naga." 
Matthew3:5 Foo ga tswela kwa go ene Jerusalema, le lefatshe lotlhe la Jutea, le mo tikologong yotlhe ya Joretane;" 
Matthew3:6 mme ba kolobediwa ke ene mo nokeng ya Joretane, ba ipolela dibe tsa bone." 
Matthew3:7 Mme e rile a bona Bafarisai ba le bantsi le Basadukai ba tla kolobetsong ya gagwe, a ba raya a re: “Lotsalo lwa dinoga ke lona, lo tlhagisitswe e mang go tshaba bogale jo bo tlang?" 
Matthew3:8 Ke gona ungwang maungo a a tshwanetseng boikwatlhao. 
Matthew3:9 Lo se ka lwa gopola lwa ithaya lwa re: ‘Re na le Aberahame ke ene rraetsho;’ gonne ke a lo raya, Modimo o nonofile go tsosetsa Aberahame bana ka maje a." 
Matthew3:10 Le jaana fela selepe se tsepilwe mo metsweng ya ditlhare; ke gone setlhare sengwe le sengwe se se sa ungweng loungo lo lo molemo, se a rengwa, se latlhelwa mo molelong." 
Matthew3:11 Nna le gale ke lo kolobeletsa boikwatlhao ka metsi; mme yo o tlang morago ga me o nonofile bogolo go nna, yo ditlhako tsa gagwe ke sa tshwanelang go di mo tsholela, ene o tlaa lo kolobetsa ka Mowa o o Boitshepo le ka molelo;" 
Matthew3:12 yo loselo lwa gagwe o lo tshotseng ka seatla, mme o tlaa olosetsa ruri mo segotlong sa gagwe; mabele a gagwe o tlaa a phuthela mo polokelong ya gagwe; mme mmoko o tlaa o tshuba ka molelo o o sa ka keng wa tingwa.”" 
Matthew3:13 Foo Jesu a tswa kwa Galilea, a tla kwa Joretane kwa go Johane, a tla go kolobediwa ke ene." 
Matthew3:14 Mme Johane a rata go mo itsa, a re: “Ke tshwanetse ka bo ke kolobediwa ke wena, mme a o tla mo go nna?”" 
Matthew3:15 Mme Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Mma go nne jalo gompieno; gonne go re tshwanetse go dirafatsa tshiamo yotlhe jalo.” Foo a mo leseletsa. 
Matthew3:16 Jesu o rile a sena go kolobediwa, a tlhamalala a tlhatloga a tswa fa metsing; mme bonang, magodimo a mo atlhamologela, mme a bona Mowa wa Modimo o fologa jaaka lephoi o fologela mo go ene;" 
Matthew3:17 mme bonang, lentswe la tswa mo magodimong la re: “Yo ke morwaake yo o rategang, yo ke itumelang thata mo go ene.”" 
Matthew4:1 Foo Jesu a gogelwa ke Mowa kwa nageng, a ya go raelwa ke diabolo." 
Matthew4:2 E rile a sena go ikitsa go ja ka malatsi a le 40, le masigo a le 40, morago a tloga a bolawa ke tlala." 
Matthew4:3 Mme moraedi a tla a mo raya a re: “A e re fa o le Morwa Modimo, o laole maje a, o re a fetoge dinkgwe.”" 
Matthew4:4 Mme ene a fetola a re: “Go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘Motho ga a tshele ka senkgwe se le sosi, fa e se ka lefoko lengwe le lengwe le le tswang mo molomong wa Modimo.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Foo diabolo a mo isa mo motseng o o boitshepo; a mmaya mo setlhoeng sa tempele. 
Matthew4:6 A mo raya a re: “A e re fa o le Morwa Modimo, o itatlhele kwa tlase, gonne go kwadilwe ga twe: “ ‘O tlaa laela baengele ba gagwe ka ga gago; mme ba tlaa go legelela ka diatla tsa bone, e se re kgotsa lonao lwa gago lwa sugakanngwa ke lentswe.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Go bile go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘O se ka wa leka Morena Modimo wa gago.’ ” 
Matthew4:8 Gape diabolo a mo isa kwa thabeng e e godileng thata, a mmontsha magosi otlhe a lefatshe, le kgalalelo ya one." 
Matthew4:9 Mme a mo raya a re: “Dilo tsotlhe tse ke tlaa di go naya, fa o ka wela fa fatshe wa nkobamela.”" 
Matthew4:10 Foo Jesu a mo raya a re: “Tloga o ye koo Satane! Gonne go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘O obamele Morena Modimo wa gago, ke ene esi yo o tlaa mo direlang.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Foo diabolo a mo tlogela; mme baengele ba tla ba mo direla. 
Matthew4:12 Jaana e rile a utlwa fa Johane a golegilwe, a ngongwaelela kwa Galilea." 
Matthew4:13 A tswa mo Nasaretha, a tla a aga mo Kaperenaume o o fa lewatleng, mo molelwaneng wa Sebulone le Nafetali;" 
Matthew4:14 gore go tle go dirale se se kileng sa buiwa ke moperofeti Isaia a re: 
Matthew4:15 “Lefatshe la Sebulone, le lefatshe la Nafetali, bolebana le lewatle, moseja ga Joretane, Galilea wa merafe," 
Matthew4:16 batho ba ba neng ba dutse mo lefifing, ba bona lesedi le legolo, le ba ba neng ba dutse mo lefatsheng le le mo moriting wa loso, lesedi la ba tlhabela.”" 
Matthew4:17 E sa le ka lobaka loo Jesu a simolola go rera, le go re: “Ikwatlhaeng, gonne bogosi jwa legodimo bo atametse.”" 
Matthew4:18 Ya re a tsamayatsamaya fa lewatleng la Galilea, a fitlhela banna ba le babedi, e le bana ba monna, e bong Simone yo o bidiwang Petere, le Anterea monnawe, ba konopela lotloa mo lewatleng, ka e ne e le batshwari ba ditlhapi." 
Matthew4:19 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ntshalang morago, mme ke tlaa lo dira batshwara batho.”" 
Matthew4:20 Mme ba akofa ba tlogela ditloa tsa bone, ba mo sala morago." 
Matthew4:21 Ya re a tswa foo, a fitlhela ba bangwe ba le babedi, e le bana ba monna, e bong Jakobe morwa Sebete, le Johane monnawe, ba na le Sebete rraabo mo mokorong, ba tlhamaganya ditloa tsa bone; mme a ba bitsa." 
Matthew4:22 Ba akofa ba tlogela mokoro le rraabo, ba mo sala morago." 
Matthew4:23 Mme Jesu a tsamayatsamaya le lefatshe lotlhe la Galilea, a etla a ruta mo matlong a thuto a bone, a rera Mafoko a a Molemo a bogosi, a fodisa malwetse mangwe le mangwe otlhe, le dipobolo dingwe le dingwe tsotlhe mo bathong." 
Matthew4:24 Mme tumo ya gagwe ya utlwala mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Siria; mme ba isa kwa go ene botlhe ba ba bobolang, ba tshwerwe ke malwetse mangwe le mangwe, le ditlhokofatso, le ba ba tsenyweng ke mewa e e maswe, ba ba karalalang le ba ba teteselang; mme a ba fodisa." 
Matthew4:25 Matshutitshuti a mantsi a batho a mo sala morago, a a tswang kwa Galilea, le kwa Dikapolise, le kwa Jerusalema, le kwa Jutea le kwa moseja ga Joretane." 
Matthew5:1 Jesu e rile ka a bone matshutitshuti a batho, a tlhatlogela mo thabeng; ya re a sena go dula fa fatshe barutwa ba gagwe ba tla kwa go ene," 
Matthew5:2 mme a tswa molomo, a ba ruta a re:" 
Matthew5:3 “Go sego ba ba humanegileng mo moweng; gonne bogosi jwa legodimo ke jwa bone. 
Matthew5:4 Go sego ba ba lelang; gonne ba tlaa gomodiwa. 
Matthew5:5 Go sego ba ba pelonomi; gonne ba tlaa rua lefatshe. 
Matthew5:6 Go sego ba ba bolawang ke tlala le lenyora ka ntlha ya tshiamo; gonne ba tlaa kgorisiwa. 
Matthew5:7 Go sego ba ba kutlwelobotlhoko; gonne ba tlaa utlwelwa botlhoko. 
Matthew5:8 Go sego ba ba pelo di itshekileng; gonne ba tlaa bona Modimo. 
Matthew5:9 Go sego ba ba letlanyang; gonne ba tlaa bidiwa bomorwa Modimo. 
Matthew5:10 Go sego ba ba bogiseditsweng tshiamo; gonne bogosi jwa legodimo ke jwa bone. 
Matthew5:11 “Lo a bo lo le sego fa batho ba lo kgoba, ba lo bogisa, ba lo pateletsa bosula bongwe le bongwe ka ntlha ya me." 
Matthew5:12 Itumeleng lo bo lo ipele thata; gonne tuelo ya lona e kgolo kwa legodimong; gonne ba bogisitse fela jalo baperofeti ba ba neng ba le pele ga lona. 
Matthew5:13 “Ke lona letswai la lefatshe; mme fa letswai le senyegile molodi, ana le ka lokwa ka eng? Ga le tlhole le na le gope, fa e se go latlhelwa kwa ntle, le go gatakwa ke batho fela." 
Matthew5:14 “Ke lona lesedi la lefatshe. Motse o o beilweng mo godimo ga thaba ga o ka ke wa fitlhega. 
Matthew5:15 Le gone batho ga ba ke ba tshuba lobone go tla ba lo huhumetsa tlase ga seelo, mme ba lo tlhoma mo setlhomong fela; lo phatsimele botlhe ba ba mo ntlong." 
Matthew5:16 Fela jalo, a lesedi la lona le phatsime fa pele ga batho gore ba bone ditiro tsa lona tse di molemo, mme ba galaletse Rraeno yo o kwa legodimong." 
Matthew5:17 “Lo se ka lwa itlhoma gore ke tsile go senya molao le fa e le baperofeti; ga ke a tla go senya, fa e se go tlhomamisa fela." 
Matthew5:18 Gonne ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Go tsamaya legodimo le feta le lefatshe, ga go ketla go feta tlhasenyana epe, le fa e le lonakanyana lope fela mo molaong, dilo tsotlhe di tle di tsamaye di dirafale pele." 
Matthew5:19 Ke gone, le fa e le mangmang yo o tlaa tlolang mongwe o mmotlanyana wa melao e, a ba a ruta batho jalo, o tlaa bidiwa mmotlanyana mo bogosing jwa legodimo; mme le fa e le mangmang yo o tlaa e dirang, a ba a e ruta batho, ene o tlaa bidiwa mogolo mo bogosing jwa legodimo." 
Matthew5:20 Gonne ke lo raye ke re, fa tshiamo ya lona e sa gaise tshiamo ya bakwadi le ya Bafarisai, ga lo ketla lo tsena gope mo bogosing jwa legodimo." 
Matthew5:21 “Lo utlwile fa go reilwe ba bogologolo ga twe: ‘O se ka wa bolaya motho; mme le fa e le mang yo o bolayang o tla bo a na le go sekisiwa;’ 
Matthew5:22 mme nna ke lo raya ke re, mongwe le mongwe yo o galefelang wa ga gabo ka bomo, o tlaa bo a na le go sekisiwa; mme le fa e le mang yo o tlaa rayang wa ga gabo a re: ‘Selo fela,’ o tlaa bo a na le go ya tshekong; le fa e le mang yo o tlaa reng, ‘Seeleele ke wena,’ o tlaa bo a lebanywe ke molete wa molelo." 
Matthew5:23 Ke gone, fa o isa neo ya gago o le fa sebesong, mme e re o le foo o bo o gakologelwa fa wa gaeno a na le sengwe nao," 
Matthew5:24 tlogela neo ya gago teng fa pele ga sebeso, o ye o letlane le wa gaeno pele, foo o itse go tla o isa neo ya gago." 
Matthew5:25 “O akofe o dumalane le moganetsi wa gago o sa ntse o na nae mo tseleng; e se re kgotsa moganetsi a go neela moatlhodi, mme moatlhodi a go neela leotlana, mme wa latlhelwa mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Matthew5:26 Ammaaruri ke go raya ke re: Ga o ketla o tswa teng gope o ise o lefe ledinyana la bofelo pele. 
Matthew5:27 “Lo utlwile fa go tulwe: ‘O se ka wa dira boaka.’ 
Matthew5:28 Nna ke lo raya ke re: Mongwe le mongwe yo o lebang mosadi fela ka go mo eletsa, o setse a dirile boaka nae mo pelong." 
Matthew5:29 Fa leitlho la gago le go kgopisa, o le gonye, o le latlhe; gonne go ka nna molemo mo go wena fa nama nngwe ya gago e ka senyega, e seng mmele otlhe wa gago go latlhelwa mo moleteng." 
Matthew5:30 Fa seatla sa gago se segolo se go kgopisa, o se kgaole, o se latlhe; gonne go ka nna molemo mo go wena fa nama nngwe ya gago e ka senyega, e seng mmele otlhe wa gago go latlhelwa mo moleteng." 
Matthew5:31 “Le gone go ne go tulwe: ‘Le fa e le mang yo o tlhalang mosadi wa gagwe, a mo neye lokwalo lwa go mo tlhala.’" 
Matthew5:32 Mme nna ke lo raya ke re: Mongwe le mongwe yo o tlhalang mosadi wa gagwe, fa e se ka ntlha ya boaka, o mo dira seaka; mme le fa e le mang yo o tlaa mo nyalang a sena go tlhalwa o dira boaka." 
Matthew5:33 “Gape lo utlwile fa go reilwe ba bogologolo ga twe: ‘O se ka wa ikana ka go aka, mme o tlhomamisetse Morena go ikana ga gago;’" 
Matthew5:34 mme nna ke lo raya ke re: Se ikaneng ka gope, le fa e le ka legodimo, ka e le setulo sa Modimo sa bogosi;" 
Matthew5:35 le fa e le ka lefatshe, ka e le sebeo sa one sa dinao; le fa e le ka Jerusalema, ka e le motse wa Kgosi e kgolo." 
Matthew5:36 Le gone o se ka wa ikana ka tlhogo ya gago, ka o sa ka ke wa dira thiri e le nngwe fela go nna tshweu kgotsa ntsho." 
Matthew5:37 Go bua ga lona fa e le ‘Ee’, e nne ‘Ee’; fa e le ‘Nnyaa’, e nne ‘Nnyaa’; gonne se se fetang mo, se tswa mo bosuleng." 
Matthew5:38 “Lo utlwile fa go tulwe: ‘A leitlho le tswelwe ke leitlho, le leino ke leino.’" 
Matthew5:39 Nna ke lo raya ke re: Se ganeleng le motho yo o bosula; mme yo o go fapholang ka fa lesameng le legolo, mo neele le le lengwe." 
Matthew5:40 Fa motho mongwe a rata a ka bo a go isa tshekong, mme a go tseela morepo, o mme a tseye kobo ya gago le yone." 
Matthew5:41 Le fa e le mang yo o go patikelang go tsamaya sebaka sa kilometara e le nngwe fela, ya nae di le pedi." 
Matthew5:42 Naya ene yo o go lopang, le yo o ratang go adima mo go wena, o se ka wa mo fularela fela." 
Matthew5:43 “Lo utlwile fa go tulwe: Rata wa gaeno, mme o ile mmaba wa gago;" 
Matthew5:44 mme nna ke lo raya ke re: Ratang baba ba lona, lo rapelele ba ba lo bogisang;" 
Matthew5:45 gore lo nne bana ba Rraeno yo o kwa legodimong; gonne ene o tlhabisetsa ba ba molemo le ba ba bosula letsatsi la gagwe, a nesetse basiami le basiamolodi pula." 
Matthew5:46 Fa e le fano lo rata ba ba lo ratang, e bo e le gore lo na le tuelo efe? Bakgethisi le bone a ga ba dire jalo?" 
Matthew5:47 Le gone fa lo dumedisa bagalona ba le bosi, e bo e le gore lo dirang bogolo go ba bangwe? Baditšhaba le bone a ga ba dire jalo?" 
Matthew5:48 Ke gone lo tlaa nnang boitekanelo, jaaka Rraeno yo o kwa legodimong a le boitekanelo." 
Matthew6:1 “Lo itise gore lo se dire tshiamo ya lona fa pele ga batho go bonwa ke bone, gonne fa lo dira jalo ga lo na tuelo kwa go Rraeno yo o kwa legodimong." 
Matthew6:2 “Ke gone e re fa o ntsha dikatso, o se ka wa letsa lonaka fa pele ga gago, jaaka baitimokanyi ba tle ba dire mo matlong a thuto, le mo mebileng, gore ba nne le tlotlego mo bathong. Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Tuelo ya bone ba setse ba e amogetse." 
Matthew6:3 Mme wena e re fa o ntsha dikatso, a seatla sa gago sa molema se se ka sa itse se seatla sa gago se segolo se se dirang," 
Matthew6:4 gore go ntsha dikatso ga gago go nne mo sephiring, mme Rraago yo o bonang mo sephiring o tlaa go duela." 
Matthew6:5 “Mme e re fa lo rapela lo se ka lwa nna jaaka baitimokanyi; gonne bone ba rata go rapela ba eme mo matlong a thuto, le fa makopanelong a mebila gore ba bonwe ke batho. Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Tuelo ya bone ba e amogetse." 
Matthew6:6 Mme wena, e re fa o rapela, o tsene mo ntlwaneng ya gago e e kwa teng, o re o sena go tswala, o rapele Rraago yo o mo sephiring, mme Rraago yo o bonang mo sephiring o tlaa go duela." 
Matthew6:7 “Fa lo rapela, lo se ka lwa boaboela fela jaaka Baditšhaba ba tle ba dire; gonne ba gopola gore ba tlaa utlwiwa ka ntlha ya go bue bobe ga bone." 
Matthew6:8 Ke gone se nneng jaaka bone; gonne Rraeno o itse dilo tse lo di tlhokang lo ise lo di mo lope. 
Matthew6:9 Ke gone lo rapele lo re: “Rraetsho yo o kwa legodimong, leina la gago a le itshepisiwe." 
Matthew6:10 Bogosi jwa gago a bo tle. Go rata ga gago a go dirwe mo lefatsheng jaaka kwa legodimong. 
Matthew6:11 Re neye gompieno sejo sa rona sa letsatsi. 
Matthew6:12 Mme o re itshwarele melato ya rona, jaaka le rona re itshwarela ba ba molato le rona." 
Matthew6:13 O se ka wa re isa mo thaelong, mme o re golole mo go yo o bosula. (Gonne bogosi ke jwa gago, le thata, le kgalalelo, ka bosenabokhutlo. Amen.)" 
Matthew6:14 “Gonne fa lo itshwarela batho ditlolo tsa bone, Rraeno wa legodimo le ene o tlaa lo itshwarela le lona." 
Matthew6:15 Fa lo sa itshwarele batho ditlolo tsa bone, Rraeno le ene ga a ketla a itshwarela ditlolo tsa lona." 
Matthew6:16 “Le gone gape, e re fa lo ikitsa go ja, lo se ka lwa itlhontsha difatlhogo jaaka baitimokanyi; ka gobo bone ba itlhontsha difatlhogo, gore ba bonwe ke batho jaaka ba ikiditse go ja. Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Tuelo ya bone ba setse ba e amogetse." 
Matthew6:17 Mme wena, e re fa o ikitsa go ja, o itlotse tlhogo, o tlhape mo sefatlhogong;" 
Matthew6:18 gore o se bonwe ke batho fa o ikiditse go ja, fa e se ke Rraago yo o mo sephiring; mme Rraago yo o bonang mo sephiring o tlaa go duela." 
Matthew6:19 “Se iphutheleng dikhumo mo lefatsheng, kwa motoutwana o senyang teng le morodu, le kwa magodu a thubelang go utswa teng." 
Matthew6:20 Iphutheleng dikhumo kwa legodimong, kwa motoutwana o sa senyeng teng le fa e le morodu, le kwa magodu a sa phunyeng le fa e le go utswa teng;" 
Matthew6:21 gonne kwa khumo ya gago e leng teng, pelo ya gago le yone e tlaa nna fela teng." 
Matthew6:22 “Leitlho ke lobone lwa mmele; ke gone e a re fa leitlho la gago le bona sentle, mmele otlhe wa gago o tlale lesedi." 
Matthew6:23 Mme e a re fa leitlho la gago le le bosula, mmele otlhe wa gago o tlale lefifi. Ke gone e a re fa lesedi le le mo go wena e le lefifi, ana lefifi leo le legolo jang!" 
Matthew6:24 “Ga go na motho ope yo o ka direlang barena ba le babedi; ka a tlaa ila yo mongwe, mme a rate yo mongwe; gongwe a ngaparele yo mongwe, mme a nyatse yo mongwe. Ga lo ka ke lwa direla Modimo le Dikhumo." 
Matthew6:25 “Ke gone ke lo rayang ke re: Se tlhobaeleleng botshelo jwa lona lwa re ‘Re tlaa ja eng, re tlaa nwa eng?’ Le fa e le ka ga mmele lwa re: ‘Re tlaa apara eng?’ Botshelo a ga bo gaise dijo, le mmele a ga o gaise diaparo?" 
Matthew6:26 Lebang dinonyane tsa loapi, jaaka di sa jale le gone di sa robe, le fa e le go rorela mo mabolokelong; mme Rraeno wa legodimo o a di otla. Lona a ga lo tlhwatlhwa e kgolo thata bogolo go tsone?" 
Matthew6:27 Ke ofe wa lona yo o ka ikokeletsang boleele jwa letsogo le le lengwe fela ka go itlhobaelela bobe? 
Matthew6:28 “Lo itlhobaelelelang diaparo? Akanyang dithunya tsa masoma a naga, ka fa di golang ka teng: ga di dire, ga di otlhe." 
Matthew6:29 Le fa go ntse jalo ke a lo raya, le e leng ene Solomone mo kgalalelong yotlhe ya gagwe, o ne a sa kgabe jaaka sengwe sa tsone tseo." 
Matthew6:30 Fa Modimo o apesa jalo bojang jwa naga jo gompieno bo emeng, mme e re ka moso bo latlhelwe mo pesetsong, a ga o ketla o apesa lona bogolo jang, lona ba tumelo e potlana?" 
Matthew6:31 “Ke gone se itlhobaeleleng lwa re: ‘Re tlaa ja eng?’ Kgotsa, ‘Re tlaa nwa eng?’ Kgotsa, ‘Re tlaa apara eng?’" 
Matthew6:32 Gonne Baditšhaba ba batla tsone dilo tsotlhe tseo; gonne Rraeno wa legodimo o a itse fa lo tlhoka dilo tse tsotlhe. 
Matthew6:33 Mme batlang pele bogosi jwa gagwe le tshiamo ya gagwe; mme dilo tsotlhe tse lo tlaa di okelediwa. 
Matthew6:34 Ke gone se tlhobaeleleng moso: gonne moso o tlaa itlhobaelela ka osi. Letsatsi lengwe le lengwe le lekanywe ke bosula jwa lone. 
Matthew7:1 “Lo se ka lwa sekisa, gore lo se sekisiwe." 
Matthew7:2 Gonne tshekiso e lo sekisang ka yone, lo tlaa sekisiwa ka yone; le selekanyo se lo lekanyang ka sone, lo tlaa lekanyediwa ka sone." 
Matthew7:3 O lebelang selabe se se mo leitlhong la wa gaeno, mme o sa tlhokomele mosipuri o o mo leitlhong le e leng la gago?" 
Matthew7:4 Kgotsa o tlaa raya wa gaeno jang o re: ‘Mma ke ntshe selabe se se mo leitlhong la gago;’ mme bona, mosipuri ke oo o mo leitlhong la gago?" 
Matthew7:5 Moitimokanyi ke wena, ntsha mosipuri o o mo leitlhong la gago pele; foo o tlaa bona sentle go ntsha selabe se se mo leitlhong la wa gaeno." 
Matthew7:6 “Lo se ka lwa naya dintša se se itshepileng, le gone lo se ka lwa latlhela diperela tsa lona fa pele ga dikolobe, gore e se re kgotsa tsa di gataka ka ditlhako, mme tsa menoga tsa gagola lona." 
Matthew7:7 “Lopang, mme lo tlaa newa; batlang, mme lo tlaa bona; kgwanyakgwanyang, mme lo tlaa bulelwa." 
Matthew7:8 Gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o lopang o a amogela; le yo o batlang o a bona; mme go bulelwe yo o kgwanyakgwanyang. 
Matthew7:9 Kgotsa go na le monna ofe mo go lona yo e ka reng fa morwawe a mo lopa senkgwe, a mo naya lentswe?" 
Matthew7:10 Kgotsa fa a lopa tlhapi, a mo naya noga?" 
Matthew7:11 Ke gone fa e le gore lona ba lo leng bosula, lo itse go naya bana ba lona dineo tse di molemo, bogolo jang Rraeno yo o kwa legodimong o tlaa naya ba ba mo lopang dilo tse di molemo?" 
Matthew7:12 “Ke gone tsotlhe tse lo ratang batho ba di lo direla, le lona lo ba direleng fela jalo; gonne mo ke molao le baperofeti." 
Matthew7:13 “Tsenang ka kgoro e e pitlaganyeng; gonne kgoro e atlhame, tsela le yone e kgolo e e isang tshenyegong, le ba ba tsenang ka yone ba bantsi." 
Matthew7:14 Gonne kgoro e pitlaganye, tsela le yone e e isang botshelong e tshesane, mme ba ba e bonang ga ba bantsi." 
Matthew7:15 “Lo itise mo baperofeting ba e seng bone, ba ba tlang mo go lona ba apere jaaka dinku, mme mo teng e le diphiri tse di garolakang." 
Matthew7:16 Lo tlaa ba itse ka maungo a bone. A batho ba tle ba hule loungo lwa mofine mo manganeng, kgotsa difeige mo masitlwaneng?" 
Matthew7:17 Fela jalo setlhare sengwe le sengwe se se molemo se ungwa loungo lo lo molemo; mme setlhare se se bosula se ungwa loungo lo lo bosula. 
Matthew7:18 Setlhare se se molemo ga se ka ke sa ungwa loungo lo lo bosula, le gone setlhare se se bosula ga se ka ke sa ungwa loungo lo lo molemo." 
Matthew7:19 Setlhare sengwe le sengwe se se sa ungweng loungo lo lo molemo se a rengwa, se latlhelwe mo molelong." 
Matthew7:20 Ke gone lo tlaa ba itse ka loungo lwa bone. 
Matthew7:21 “Ga se go re mongwe le mongwe yo o nthayang a re: ‘Morena, Morena,’ o tlaa tsena mo bogosing jwa legodimo; fa e se yo o dirang go rata ga Rre yo o kwa legodimong." 
Matthew7:22 E tlaa re mo letsatsing leo batho ba le bantsi ba tlaa nthaya ba re: ‘Morena, Morena, a ga re a ka ra rera mo ineng la gago, ra ba ra kgoromeletsa ntle mewa e e maswe ka leina la gago, ra dira ditiro di le dintsi tse di nonofileng ka leina la gago?’" 
Matthew7:23 E dira gone ke tlaa ba ipolelelang ke re: ‘Ga ke ise nke ke lo itse gope, tlogang fa go nna, lona ba lo dirang tshiamololo.’" 
Matthew7:24 “Ke gone mongwe le mongwe yo o utlwang mafoko a a me, a ba a a dira, o tlaa tshwantshiwa le monna yo o botlhale, yo o agileng ntlo ya gagwe mo lefikeng." 
Matthew7:25 Mme pula ya fologa, merwalela ya tla, le diphefo tsa foka, tsa itaaka ntlo eo, mme e se ka ya wa, ka gobo e ne e thaetswe mo lefikeng." 
Matthew7:26 “Mme mongwe le mongwe yo o utlwang mafoko a a me, mme a sa a dire, o tlaa tshwantshiwa le monna wa seeleele, yo o agileng ntlo ya gagwe mo mošaweng." 
Matthew7:27 Mme pula ya fologa, merwalela ya tla, le diphefo tsa foka, tsa itaaka ntlo eo, mme ya wa; mme go wa ga yone ga nna gogolo.”" 
Matthew7:28 Ga dirala, e rile Jesu a sena go wetsa mafoko a, batho ba gakgamalela thuto ya gagwe," 
Matthew7:29 ka a ba ruta jaaka yo o nang le thata, e seng jaaka bakwadi ba bone." 
Matthew8:1 E rile a sena go fologa mo thabeng, matshutitshuti a magolo a batho a mo sala morago." 
Matthew8:2 Mme bonang, ga tla molepero mo go ene, a mo obamela a re, “Morena, fa o rata, o na le thata ya go nntlafatsa.”" 
Matthew8:3 Jesu a otlolola seatla sa gagwe, a mo ama a re: “Ke a rata, o ntlafale.” Mme bolepero jwa gagwe jwa akofa jwa ntlafala." 
Matthew8:4 Mme Jesu a mo raya a re: “O bone o se ka wa bolelela ope; tsamaya fela, o ye go itshupetsa moperesiti, o bo o ise tshupelo e Moše o e laotseng, gore e nne tshupo mo go bone.”" 
Matthew8:5 E rile a sena go tsena mo Kaperenaume, ga tla mo go ene molaodi wa mophato, a mo rapela," 
Matthew8:6 a re: “Morena, motlhanka wa me o letse fa fatshe kwa ntlong, o lwala botlhoko jwa teteselo, mme o tlhokofetse thata.”" 
Matthew8:7 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ke tlaa ya ke mo fodisa.” 
Matthew8:8 Mme molaodi a mo fetola a re: “Morena, go a rona fa o ka tla go tsena tlase ga ditlhomeso tsa ntlo ya me; bua lefoko lengwe fela, mme motlhanka wa me o tlaa fola." 
Matthew8:9 Gonne le nna ke monna yo ke mo taolong, ke bile ke na le batlhabani ba ba mo taolong, ke bile ke na le batlhabani ba ba mo taolong ya me; mme ke raya yo ke re: ‘Tsamaya,’ mme a tsamaye; le yo mongwe ke re: ‘Ntlo,’ mme a tle; le motlhanka wa me ke re: ‘Dira se,’ mme a se dire.”" 
Matthew8:10 Jesu ya re a utlwa, a gakgamala, a raya ba ba mo setseng morago a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, ga ke ise nke ke bone tumelo e e kanakana, nnyaa, le fa e le mo go Iseraele." 
Matthew8:11 Ke lo raya ke re: Batho ba le bantsi ba tlaa tswa kwa botlhabatsatsi le kwa bophirimatsatsi, mme ba tlaa dula le Aberahame, le Isake, le Jakobe mo bogosing jwa legodimo;" 
Matthew8:12 mme bana ba bogosi ba tlaa lelekelwa kwa lefifing le le kwa ntle; go tlaa nna selelo le go huranya meno teng.” 
Matthew8:13 Mme Jesu a raya molaodi wa mophato a re: “Tsamaya, fela jaaka o dumetse, a go go dirafelele jalo.” Mme motlhanka a fola fela ka lone lobaka loo." 
Matthew8:14 E rile Jesu a sena go tsena mo ntlong ya ga Petere, a fitlhela mogwagadia Petere wa mosadi, a lwala botlhoko jwa letshoroma." 
Matthew8:15 Mme a mo ama seatla, mme letshoroma la mo tlogela; mme mosadi a tsoga a mo direla." 
Matthew8:16 E rile go le maitseboa ba lere kwa go ene batho ba le bantsi ba ba tsenyweng ke badimo; mme a kgoromeletsa mewa eo kwa ntle ka lefoko fela, a ba a fodisa botlhe ba ba lwalang;" 
Matthew8:17 gore go dirafale sone se se kileng sa buiwa ke moperofeti Isaia a re: “Ene ka esi o itseetse diemera tsa rona, a rwala matlhoko a rona.”" 
Matthew8:18 Jaana, Jesu o rile a bona matshutitshuti a magolo a batho a mo dikanyeditse, a laola gore go tshelelwe kwa moseja." 
Matthew8:19 Mme ga tla mokwadi mongwe mo go ene, a mo raya a re: “Moruti, ke tlaa go sala morago gongwe le gongwe kwa o yang teng.”" 
Matthew8:20 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Diphokoje di na le mesima, dinonyane tsa loapi di na le ditlhaga; mme Morwa Motho ene ga a na fa o ka bayang tlhogo ya gagwe teng.”" 
Matthew8:21 Yo mongwe wa barutwa a mo raya a re: “Morena, ntesa pele ke ye go fitlha rre.”" 
Matthew8:22 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ntshala morago fela; o tlogele baswi gore ba fitlhe baswi ba bone.” 
Matthew8:23 E rile a sena go tsena mo mokorong, barutwa ba gagwe ba tsena nae." 
Matthew8:24 Ya re ka tshoganetso ga tsoga ledimo le legolo la phefo mo lewatleng, makhubu a ba a tla a thubegela mo godimo ga mokoro; mme ene a bo a robetse." 
Matthew8:25 Ba ya mo go ene ba mo tsosa ba re: “Boloka, Morena; re a nyelela.”" 
Matthew8:26 Mme a ba raya a re: “Lo boifelang, ba tumelo e potlana ke lona?” Foo a tsoga a kgalemela diphefo le lewatle; mme ga nna tuulalo e kgolo." 
Matthew8:27 Mme banna bao ba gakgamala ba re: “Ana monna yo ke motho yo o ntseng jang, fa e bo ne ne diphefo le tsone di mo utlwa jaana le lewatle?”" 
Matthew8:28 E rile a sena go fitlha kwa moseja mo lefatsheng la Bagatare, a rakana le batho ba le babedi ba ba tsenyweng ke mewa e e maswe ba tswa mo diphupung, ba le bogale thata, mme ga bo go se na ope yo o ka fetang ka tsela eo." 
Matthew8:29 Mme ba ba goa ba re: “Re dirang ka wena, wena Morwa Modimo? A o tsile go re tlhokofatsa e ise e nne motlha?”" 
Matthew8:30 Jaana fa kgakala nabo ga bo go le serapa se segolo sa dikolobe se fula. 
Matthew8:31 Mewa e e maswe e mo rapela thata e re: “Fa o re kgoromeletsa ntle, re romele mo serapeng sa dikolobe.”" 
Matthew8:32 Mme a e raya a re: “Yang,” mme ya tswa ya ya ya tsena mo dikolobeng; mme bonang, serapa sotlhe sa kgokologela ka mapawa mo lewatleng, sa swela mo metsing." 
Matthew8:33 Badisa ba tsone ba tshaba, ba ya ba tsena mo motseng, ba bolela gotlhe, le ka fa go dirafaletseng ba ba neng ba tsenywe ke mewa e e maswe ka teng." 
Matthew8:34 Foo motse otlhe wa tswa wa ya go kgatlhantsha Jesu; mme ba re ba mmona, ba mo rapela thata gore a tsamaye a tswe mo melelwaneng ya bone." 
Matthew9:1 A tsena mo mokorong, a kgabaganya letsha, a tla go fitlha mo motseng wa ga gabo." 
Matthew9:2 Foo ba lere mo go ene monna mongwe yo o lwalang bolwetse jwa teteselo, a tshotswe ka bolao. Jesu ka a bona tumelo ya bone, a raya yo o teteselang a re: “Ngwana, nametsega, dibe tsa gago o di itshwaretswe.”" 
Matthew9:3 Mme bangwe ba bakwadi ba ithaya ba re: “Monna yo o a tlhapatsa.” 
Matthew9:4 Jesu ka a itse megopolo ya bone a re: “Lo gopolelang bosula mo dipelong tsa lona? 
Matthew9:5 Mo go ka nnang bofefo ke gofe, fa go ka twe: ‘Dibe tsa gago o di itshwaretswe;’ le fa go ka twe: ‘Tsoga o tsamaye’?" 
Matthew9:6 Mme gore lo itse fa Morwa Motho a na le thata mo lefatsheng go itshwarela dibe,” - foo a raya yo o teteselang a re: “Tsoga o tseye bolao jwa gago o ye kwa ntlong ya gago.”" 
Matthew9:7 Mme a tsoga a ya kwa ntlong ya gagwe. 
Matthew9:8 E rile batho ba bantsintsi ba bona jalo, ba boifa, ba galaletsa Modimo o o neileng batho thata e e ntseng jalo." 
Matthew9:9 Mme Jesu ya re a feta a tswa foo, a bona monna yo o bidiwang Mathaio, a dutse fa go kgethelwang teng; a mo raya a re: “Ntshala morago.” Mme a ema a mo sala morago." 
Matthew9:10 Ga dirala, ya re a dutse a ja mo ntlong, bonang, bakgethisi ba le bantsi le baleofi ba le bantsi ba tla ba dula le Jesu le barutwa ba gagwe." 
Matthew9:11 E rile Bafarisai ba bona jalo, ba raya barutwa ba gagwe ba re: “Kana moruti wa lona o jelang le bakgethisi le baleofi?”" 
Matthew9:12 Ya re a go utlwa a re: “Ba ba itekanetseng ga ba dire ngaka sepe, fa e se ba ba lwalang fela." 
Matthew9:13 Tsamayang lo ithute gore le a reng lefoko le: ‘Ke eletsa boutlwelobotlhoko e seng setlhabelo;’ gonne ga ke a tla go bitsa basiami, fa e se baleofi fela.”" 
Matthew9:14 Foo ga tla kwa go ene barutwa ba ga Johane ba re: “Ana rona le Bafarisai re tle re ikeletseng go ja gantsi, mme barutwa ba gago ga ba ikitse go ja?”" 
Matthew9:15 Jesu a ba raya a re: “A bagwe ba ka lela fa monyadi a sa ntse a na nabo? Metlha e tlaa tla e monyadi o tlaa tlosiwang mo go bone ka yone, ke gone ba tlaa ikitsang go ja." 
Matthew9:16 “Ga go ope yo o bitielang seaparo se se onetseng ka sebata se se kweletlanyeng, se le magwata; gonne se se kabong se se bitiela, se tlaa se garola, mme kgagogo ya gale e oketsege." 
Matthew9:17 Le gone batho ga ba ke ba thela bojalwa jwa mofine jo boša mo mefalong e e onetseng; gonne mefalo e tlaa phanyega, bojalwa jwa mofine bo tshologe, le mefalo e senyege; mme ba tle ba thele bojalwa jwa mofine jo boša mo mefalong e meša, mme go bolokege gotlhe.”" 
Matthew9:18 Ya re a sa ntse a bua dilo tse nabo, bonang ga tla molaodi mongwe, a mo obamela a re: “Morwadiake ke gone o swang fela jaana, a ko o tle o mmeye seatla, mme o tlaa tshela.”" 
Matthew9:19 Jesu a ema a mo sala morago, barutwa ba gagwe le bone ba ya nae." 
Matthew9:20 Mme bonang, mosadi mongwe yo o sa leng a tshologa madi ka dinyaga di le 12, a tla fa morago ga gagwe, a ama makantsa a seaparo sa gagwe;" 
Matthew9:21 gonne a ithaya a re: “Fa nka ama fela seaparo sa gagwe, ke tlaa fola.”" 
Matthew9:22 Mme Jesu a retologa a mmona a re: “Morwadiaka, nametsega, tumelo ya gago e go fodisitse.” Mme mosadi o sa le a fodisiwa fela ka lobaka loo." 
Matthew9:23 E rile Jesu a tsena mo ntlong ya molaodi, mme a bona ba ba letsang ditlhaka, le lekoko la batho le tsositse modumo," 
Matthew9:24 a ba raya a re: “Thibogang, gonne morweetsana ga a a swa, o robetse.” Ba mo tshega ka tshotlo." 
Matthew9:25 Ya re lekoko la batho le sena go ntshiwa, a tsena a tshwara morweetsana ka seatla; mme morweetsana a tsoga." 
Matthew9:26 Mme tumo ya gone mo ya tswa, ya utlwala mo lefatsheng leo lotlhe fela." 
Matthew9:27 E rile Jesu a feta a tswa foo, banna ba le babedi ba ba difofu ba mo sala morago, ba goa ba re: “Morwa Dafite, re utlwele botlhoko!”" 
Matthew9:28 Ya re a sena go fitlha mo ntlong, difofu tsa tla kwa go ene; mme Jesu a di raya a re: “A lo a dumela fa ke nonofile go dira selo se?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Ee, Morena.”" 
Matthew9:29 Foo a ama matlho a bone a re: “A go lo dirafalele ka fa tumelong ya lona.” 
Matthew9:30 Matlho a bone a buduloga. Mme Jesu a ba laya thata a re: “Lo bone, gore golo mo go se ka ga itsiwe ke ope.”" 
Matthew9:31 Mme ba tswa, ba utlwatsa tumo ya gagwe mo lefatsheng leo lotlhe fela." 
Matthew9:32 E rile ba tswa, bonang, ga leriwe mo go ene monna mongwe wa semumu, a tsenywe ke mowa o o maswe." 
Matthew9:33 Ya re mowa o o maswe a sena go kgoromelediwa ntle, semumu sa bua; mme batho ba bantsintsi ba gakgamala ba re: “Ga go ise go ke go bonwe jalo gope mo go Baiseraele.”" 
Matthew9:34 Mme Bafarisai bone ba re: “O kgoromeletsa mewa e e bosula ntle ka kgosana ya mewa e e busula.” 
Matthew9:35 Mme Jesu a tlhatlologanya metse le metsana yotlhe, a eta a ruta mo matlong a bone a thuto, a rera Mafoko a a Molemo a bogosi, a fodisa dipobolo dingwe le dingwe tsotlhe, le malwetse mangwe le mangwe otlhe fela." 
Matthew9:36 Ya re a bona matshutitshuti a batho, a ba tlhomogela pelo, ka ba patikegile ba gasagasame jaaka dinku tse di se nang modisa." 
Matthew9:37 Foo a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Thobo e kgolo ruri, mme barobi ba a tlhaela." 
Matthew9:38 Ke gone, rapelang Morena wa thobo, gore a rome barobi mo thobong ya gagwe.”" 
Matthew10:1 A ipiletsa barutwa ba gagwe ba ba 12, a ba naya thata mo meweng e e maswe, go e kgoromeletsa ntle, le go fodisa dipobolo dingwe le dingwe tsotlhe, le malwetse mangwe le mangwe otlhe fela." 
Matthew10:2 Jaana maina a baaposetole ba ba 12 ke a: Wa ntlha ke Simone yo o bidiwang Petere, le Anterea monnawe; Jakobe morwa Sebete, le Johane monnawe;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipo, le Baretholomea; Thomase, le Mathaio wa mokgethisi; Jakobe morwa Alefaio, le Thataeo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simone wa Mokanana, le Jutase Isekariote, yo e leng ene o mo okileng." 
Matthew10:5 Ba ba 12 ba, Jesu a ba roma, mme a ba laya a re: “Lo se ka lwa tsamaya mo tseleng epe ya Baditšhaba, le fa e le mo motseng ope wa Basamaria, lo se ka lwa tsena mo go ona." 
Matthew10:6 Bogolo lo yeng kwa dinkung tse di timetseng tsa ntlo ya Iseraele. 
Matthew10:7 Lo ete lo rera lo re: ‘Bogosi jwa legodimo bo atametse.’ 
Matthew10:8 Fodisang babobodi, tsosang baswi, ntlafatsang balepero, kgoromeletsang mewa e e maswe ntle. Lo amogetse fela, nayang fela." 
Matthew10:9 Se tseyeng gouta le fa e le selefera, le fa e le kgotlho mo pataneng tsa lona tsa madi;" 
Matthew10:10 le fa e le kuana ya loeto, le fa e le dikobo di le pedi, le fa e le ditlhako, le fa e le tsamma; gonne modiri o tshwanetswe ke sejo sa gagwe." 
Matthew10:11 “Le fa e ka ne e le motse ofe, le fa e le motsana o lo tsenang mo go one, lo senke yo o tshwanetseng teng; mme lo nne foo, go tle go tsamaye lo tswe teng." 
Matthew10:12 E re lo tsena mo ntlong lo e dumedise. 
Matthew10:13 Fa ntlo eo e le yone e tshwanetseng, a kagiso ya lona e tle mo go yone; mme fa e le e e sa tshwanelang, a kagiso ya lona e boele mo go lona." 
Matthew10:14 Mme le fa e le bomang ba ba se ketlang ba lo tshola, le fa e le go reetsa mafoko a lona, e re lo tswa mo ntlong eo, kgotsa mo motseng oo, lo itlhotlhore ditlhole mo dinaong tsa lona." 
Matthew10:15 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: E tlaa re mo motlheng wa tsheko, go tlaa nna botoka ka ga lefatshe la Sotoma le Gomora bogolo go motse oo." 
Matthew10:16 “Bonang, ke lo roma jaaka dinku mo gare ga diphiri; ke gone lo nneng botlhale jaaka dinoga, le bori jaaka maphoi." 
Matthew10:17 Lo itise mo bathong; gonne ba tlaa lo neela ditshekong, ba tlaa lo seola mo matlong a bone a thuto." 
Matthew10:18 Ee, lo tlaa isiwa fa pele ga balaodi le dikgosi ka ntlha ya me, go tla lo nna tshupo mo go bone le mo go Baditšhaba." 
Matthew10:19 Mme e re mogang ba lo neelang mo ditshekong, lo se ka lwa tlhobaelela gore lo tlaa bua jang, le gore lo tlaa bua eng; gonne lo tlaa newa mo lobakeng loo fela se lo tlaa se buang." 
Matthew10:20 Gonne e bo e se lona ba lo buang, mme e le Mowa wa ga Rraeno o o buang mo go lona." 
Matthew10:21 “Motho o tlaa neela morwa rraagwe mo losong, le rramotho ngwana wa gagwe; bana ba tlaa tsogologela batsadi ba bone, ba ba bolaya." 
Matthew10:22 Lo tlaa ilwa ke batho botlhe ka ntlha ya leina la me; mme yo o itshokelang bokhutlong, ene o tlaa bolokwa." 
Matthew10:23 E re ba lo bogisa mo motseng o, lo tshabele mo go o o tlhomaganyeng nao, gonne ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Lo tlaa re lo ise lo wetse go ralala metse ya Iseraele, Morwa Motho a ba a bile a tsile." 
Matthew10:24 “Morutwa ga a mogolo go feta moruti wa gagwe, le motlhanka ga a mogolo go feta morena wa gagwe." 
Matthew10:25 Go lekanye morutwa fa a ntse jaaka moruti wa gagwe, le motlhanka fa a ntse jaaka morena wa gagwe. Fa ba reile mong wa ntlo ba re, Beelesebube, bogolo jang ba tlaa raya ba ntlo ya gagwe jalo." 
Matthew10:26 “Ke gone se ba boifeng, gonne ga go na sepe se se bipilweng, se se se ketlang se senolwa, le fa e le se se lobilweng se se se ketlang se itsege." 
Matthew10:27 Se ke se lo bolelelang mo lefifing, lo se bolele mo leseding; le se lo se sebediwang, lo se kakanye mo godimo ga matlo." 
Matthew10:28 Le gone lo se ka lwa boifa ba ba bolayang mmele, mme ba sa nonofa go bolaya mowa; bogolo lo boife ene yo o nonofileng go senya mowa le mmele mo moleteng." 
Matthew10:29 Dithaga di le pedi a ga di rekwe ka bontlhanngwe jwa peni? Mme epe ya tsone ga e ke e wela fa fatshe kwa ntle ga Rraeno. 
Matthew10:30 Mme le e leng meriri tota, ya ditlhogo tsa lona, e badilwe yotlhe fela." 
Matthew10:31 Ke gone se boifeng; gonne lo tlhwatlhwa e kgolo bogolo go ya dithaga di le dintsi. 
Matthew10:32 “Ke gone mongwe le mongwe yo o tlaa impolelang fa pele ga batho, le nna ke tlaa mo ipolela fa pele ga Rre yo o kwa legodimong." 
Matthew10:33 Mme le fa e le mang yo o tlaa intatolang fa pele ga batho, le nna ke tlaa mo itatola fa pele ga Rre yo o kwa legodimong." 
Matthew10:34 “Lo se ka lwa gopola gore ke tsile go lere kagiso mo lefatsheng; ga ke a tla go lere kagiso, fa e se tšhaka fela." 
Matthew10:35 Gonne ke tsile go lotlhanya monna le rraagwe, motsetsana le mmaagwe le ngwetsi le matsalaagwe;" 
Matthew10:36 le baba ba motho e tlaa nna bone ba ntlo ya gagwe. 
Matthew10:37 “Yo o ratang rraagwe kgotsa mmaagwe bogolo go nna, ga a ntshwanela; le yo o ratang morwawe kgotsa morwadie bogolo go nna, ga a ntshwanela." 
Matthew10:38 Le yo o sa tseyeng mokgoro wa gagwe a ntshala morago, ga a ntshwanela." 
Matthew10:39 Yo o bolokang botshelo jwa gagwe, bo tlaa mo latlhegela; mme yo o latlhegelwang ke botshelo jwa gagwe ka ntlha ya me, o tlaa bo boloka." 
Matthew10:40 “Yo o tsholang lona o tshola nna, le yo o tsholang nna, o tshola ene yo o nthomileng." 
Matthew10:41 Yo o tsholang moperofeti ka leina la moperofeti, o tlaa bona tuelo ya moperofeti; le yo o tsholang mosiami ka leina la mosiami, o tlaa bona tuelo ya mosiami." 
Matthew10:42 Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa nayang mongwe wa babotlana ba, le fa e ka bo e le metsi a a tsididi fela ka senwelo, ka leina la me, ammaaruri ke a lo raya, ga a ketla a latlhegelwa ke tuelo ya gagwe ka gope.”" 
Matthew11:1 Ga dirala, e rile Jesu a sena go wetsa go laya barutwa ba gagwe ba ba 12, a tloga a tswa gone a ya go ruta le go rera mo metseng ya bone." 
Matthew11:2 Jaana e rile Johane a le mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, mme a utlwa ditiro tsa ga Keresete, a roma barutwa ba gagwe," 
Matthew11:3 a mo raya a re: “A ke wena yo o tlang kgotsa a ke re lebelele o sela?” 
Matthew11:4 Mme Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Tsamayang, lo ye lo bolelele Johane dilo tse lo di utlwang, le tse lo di bonang:" 
Matthew11:5 Difofu di a bona, batlhotsi ba a tsamaya, balepero ba a ntlafadiwa, babosusu ba a utlwa, baswi ba a tsosiwa, le bahumanegi ba rerelwa Mafoko a a Molemo." 
Matthew11:6 Go sego yo o sa fitlheleng sepe mo go nna se se mo kgopisang.” 
Matthew11:7 Ya re bao ba tsamaya, Jesu a simolola go bua le matshutitshuti a batho ka ga Johane a re: “Kana lo ne lo tswela kwa nageng lo ya go bona eng? A e ne e le lotlhaka lo lo tshikinngwang ke phefo?" 
Matthew11:8 Mme lo ne lo tswa lo ya go bona eng? A e ne e le monna yo o apereng diaparo tse di boleta? Bonang, ba ba apereng tse di boleta ba mo matlong a dikgosi." 
Matthew11:9 Mme lo ne lo tswelang? A e ne e le go bona moperofeti? Ee, ke a lo raya, e bile e le yo mogolo bogolo go feta moperofeti." 
Matthew11:10 Yo ke ene go kwadilweng ka ga gagwe ga twe: ‘Bonang, ke roma morongwa wa me fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gago, yo o tlaa go baakanyetsang tsela ya gago.’" 
Matthew11:11 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya ka re: Mo go ba ba tsetsweng ke basadi ga go a tsoga ope yo mogolo go feta Johane Mokolobetsi; le fa go ntse jalo, yo o leng mmotlana mo bogosing jwa legodimo o mogolo bogolo go ene." 
Matthew11:12 Mme e sa le ka lobaka lwa ga Johane Mokolobetsi le gompieno, bogosi jwa legodimo bo ntse bo tlhaselwa, mme batlhasedi ba bo gapa ka thata." 
Matthew11:13 Gonne baperofeti botlhe le molao, ba ne ba ntse ba ruta, Johane a ba a tsamaya a tla." 
Matthew11:14 Mme fa lo rata go amogela se, ka re: Ke ene Elija yo o bileng a tla." 
Matthew11:15 Yo o nang le ditsebe go utlwa a a utlwe. 
Matthew11:16 “Ke tlaa tshwantsha losika lo ka eng? Lo tshwana le banyana ba ba dutseng mo mananeng a motse, ba bitsanya le bankana ba bone ba re:" 
Matthew11:17 ‘Re ne ra lo leletsa ditlhaka, mme ga lo a ka lwa bina; ra kurueletsa godimo, mme ga lo a ka lwa lela.’" 
Matthew11:18 Gonne Johane o tsile a sa je, a sa nwe, mme ba re: ‘O na le mowa o o maswe.’" 
Matthew11:19 Morwa Motho a tla a ja, a nwa, mme ba re: ‘Bonang, motho yo tshikhiri, monwi wa bojalwa jwa mofine, tsala ya bakgethisi le ya baleofi.’ Mme botlhale bo atlholelwa ke ditiro tsa gagwe.”" 
Matthew11:20 Foo a simolola go kgoba metse e bontsi jwa ditiro tsa gagwe tsa nonofo di dirilweng mo go yone, ka e se ka ya ikwatlhaya a re:" 
Matthew11:21 “A bo go latlhega wena Korasine! Go latlhega wena Bethesaita! Gonne fa ditiro tsa nonofo tse di dirilweng mo go lona di ka bo di dirilwe mo Ture le Sitone, ba ka bo ba sa bolo go ikwatlhaya, ba apere letsela la kgetse le melora." 
Matthew11:22 Le fa go ntse jalo ke a lo raya: E tlaa re mo motlheng wa tsheko, go tlaa nna botoka ka ga metse ya Ture le Sitone, bogolo go lona." 
Matthew11:23 Mme wena, Kaperenaume, a o tlaa golediwa kwa legodimong? O tlaa fologela mo Bobipong; gonne fa ditiro tsa nonofo tse di dirilweng mo go wena di ka bo di dirilwe mo Sotoma, o ka bo o sa ntse o eme le gompieno." 
Matthew11:24 Le fa go ntse jalo, ke a lo raya: E tlaa re mo motlheng wa tsheko, go tlaa nna botoka ka ga lefatshe la Sotoma, bogolo go wena.”" 
Matthew11:25 E rile ka lobaka loo Jesu a bua a re: “Ke a go leboga Rara, Morena wa legodimo le lefatshe, ka dilo tse o di lobetse ba ba botlhale le ba ba tlhaloganyang, mme wa di senolela banyana ba bannye." 
Matthew11:26 Ee, Rra; gonne go ne go le kgatlhego gore go nne jalo mo matlhong a gago." 
Matthew11:27 “Dilo tsotlhe ke di neetswe ke Rre; mme ga go ope yo o itseng Morwa fa e se Rara, le gone ga go ope yo o itseng Rara, fa e se Morwa le mongwe le mongwe yo Morwa o ratang go mo mo senolela." 
Matthew11:28 “Tlang kwano go nna lotlhe ba lo lapileng, ba lo imelwang, mme ke tlaa lo lapolosa." 
Matthew11:29 Ipeleseng jokwe ya me, lo ithute ga me; gonne ke bonolo le boingotlo mo pelong, mme lo tlaa bonela mewa ya lona tapologo." 
Matthew11:30 Gonne jokwe ya me e bonolo, le morwalo wa me o motlhofo.”" 
Matthew12:1 E rile ka lobaka loo Jesu a ralala masimo a mabele go le letsatsi la Sabata; barutwa ba gagwe ba bo ba bolailwe ke tlala, mme ba simolola go roba diako tsa mabele ba a ja." 
Matthew12:2 Ya re Bafarisai ba bona jalo, ba mo raya ba re: “Bona, barutwa ba gago ba dira se se sa letlelelwang go dirwa ka Sabata.”" 
Matthew12:3 Mme ene a ba raya a re: “A ga lo ise lo bale ka ga se Dafite o se dirileng, jale ka a bolailwe ke tlala, le ba o ne a na nabo;" 
Matthew12:4 ka fa o tsenyeng mo ntlong ya Modimo ka teng, a ja dinkgwe tsa tshupelo, tse di sa letlelelwang go jewa ke ene, le fa e le ke ba o nang nabo, fa e se ke baperesiti ba le bosi fela?" 
Matthew12:5 Kgotsa a go lo ise lo ko lo bale mo molaong, ka fa baperesiti ba tleng ba itshepolole Sabata ka teng mo tempeleng ka letsatsi la Sabata, mme ba bo ba se na molato?" 
Matthew12:6 Mme nna ke a lo raya ka re: Mongwe yo o leng mogolo go feta tempele o fano. 
Matthew12:7 Fa lo ka bo lo tlhalogantse gore lefoko le a reng fa le re: ‘Ke eletsa boutlwelobotlhoko e seng setlhabelo,’ lo ko lo se ka lwa sekisa ba ba se nang molato." 
Matthew12:8 Gonne Morwa Motho ke morena wa Sabata.” 
Matthew12:9 A tloga a tswa teng a tsena mo ntlong ya bone ya thuto. 
Matthew12:10 Ga bo go le monna mongwe teng yo seatla sa gagwe se omeletseng. Ba mmotsa ba re: “A go letleletswe go fodisa ka letsatsi la Sabata?” Mme ya bo e le gore ba tle ba mo neye molato. 
Matthew12:11 A ba raya a re: “E ka nna motho ofe mo go lona, yo e ka reng a na le nku e le nngwe fela, mme fa yone e wetse mo mokoleng ka letsatsi la Sabata, yo o sa ka keng a e tshwara a e ntsha?" 
Matthew12:12 Ke gone motho o tlhwatlhwa kgolo jang go gaisa nku! Ke gone go letleletswe go dira molemo ka letsatsi la Sabata.” 
Matthew12:13 Foo a raya monna yoo a re: “Otlolola seatla sa gago.” A se otlolola; sa fola sentle sa ba sa nna jaaka se sengwe. 
Matthew12:14 Bafarisai ba tswela kwa ntle, ba gakololana ka fa ba ka mmolayang ka teng." 
Matthew12:15 Jesu, ya re ka a lemoga, a tswa ka go ngongwaela; mme batho ba le bantsi ba mo sala morago; a ba fodisa botlhe fela." 
Matthew12:16 A ba laya a re, ba se ka ba mo utlwatsa;" 
Matthew12:17 gore go tle go dirale se se builweng ke moperofeti Isaia a re: 
Matthew12:18 “Bonang motlhanka wa me yo ke mo itshenketseng; moratwi wa me yo mowa wa me o kgatlhegang thata mo go ene; ke tlaa baya Mowa wa me mo go ene, mme o tlaa bolelela Baditšhaba katlholo." 
Matthew12:19 Ga a ketla a ganela, le fa e le go goa; ga go ope yo o tlaa utlwang lentswe la gagwe mo mebileng." 
Matthew12:20 Lotlhaka lo lo phitshegileng ga a ketla a lo roba, le lodi lo lo kuang mosi ga a ketla a lo tima, go tle go tsamaye a ntshetse katlholo phenyong." 
Matthew12:21 Baditšhaba ba tlaa solofela mo leineng la gagwe.” 
Matthew12:22 Foo ga leriwe kwa go ene mongwe yo o tsenyweng ke mowa o o maswe, a le sefofu, a bile a le semumu; mme a mo fodisa, monna wa semumu a ba a tla a bua, a ba a bona." 
Matthew12:23 Mme batho ba ba matshutitshuti ba gakgamala botlhe ba re: “Yo, a ke ene morwa Dafite?”" 
Matthew12:24 E rile Bafarisai ba utlwa, ba re: “Monna yo ga a kgoromeletse mewa e e maswe ntle, fa e se ka Beelesebube kgosana ya mewa e e maswe.”" 
Matthew12:25 Mme ka a itse megopolo ya bone, a ba raya a re: “Bogosi bongwe le bongwe jo bo ikgaogantseng bo a swafala; le motse mongwe le mongwe, le fa e le ntlo e e ikgaogantseng ga e ka ke ya ema;" 
Matthew12:26 Fa Satane a kgoromeletsa Satane ntle, o tlaa bo a ikgaogantse; mme bogosi jwa gagwe bo tlaa ema jang?" 
Matthew12:27 Mme nna, e ka re fa e le gore ke kgoromeletsa mewa e e maswe ntle ka Beelesebube, bomorwaa lona bone ba ba kgoromeletsa ntle ka mang? Ke gone bone ba tlaa nnang baatlhodi ba lona." 
Matthew12:28 E ka re fa e le gore ke kgoromeletsa mewa e e maswe ntle ka Mowa wa Modimo, e tlaa bo jalo bogosi jwa Modimo bo tsile mo go lona." 
Matthew12:29 “Kgotsa motho o ka tsena jang mo ntlong ya monna yo o thata, a thopa dilo tsa gagwe, fa a se ka a golega monna yo o thata pele? Ke gone o ka thopang ntlo ya gagwe." 
Matthew12:30 “Yo o sa emang le nna o tlhabana le nna; le yo o sa phutheng le nna o a falatsa. 
Matthew12:31 Ke gone ke lo rayang ke re: Batho ba tlaa itshwarelwa dibe tsotlhe le tlhapatso; mme tlhapatso e e tlhapatsang Mowa, ga e ketla e itshwarelwa." 
Matthew12:32 Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa buang lefoko le le nyatsang Morwa Motho, o tlaa go itshwarelwa; mme le fa e le mang yo o tlaa buang lefoko le le nyatsang Mowa o o Boitshepo, ga a ketla a go itshwarelwa, le fa e le mo lefatsheng leno, le fa e le mo go le le tlang." 
Matthew12:33 “Dirang setlhare se nne molemo, le loungo lwa sone lo nne molemo; kgotsa dirang setlhare se nne bosula, le loungo lwa sone lo nne bosula; gonne setlhare se itsiwe ka loungo lwa sone." 
Matthew12:34 Lotsalo lwa dinoga ke lona; lo ka bua jang dilo tse di molemo lo le bosula? Gonne molomo o bua se se tswang mo botlalong jwa pelo. 
Matthew12:35 Monna yo o molemo o ntsha dilo tse di molemo mo lohumong lwa gagwe lo lo molemo; motho yo o bosula le ene o ntsha dilo tse di bosula mo lohumong lwa gagwe lo lo bosula. 
Matthew12:36 “Mme ke lo raya ke re: Lefoko lengwe le lengwe la boithamako le batho ba tlaa le buang, ba tlaa le bodiwa mo motlheng wa tsheko." 
Matthew12:37 Gonne o tlaa atlholelwa ka mafoko a gago, le ka mafoko a gago o tlaa sekisiwa.”" 
Matthew12:38 Foo bangwe ba bakwadi le Bafarisai ba mo fetola ba re: “Moruti, re rata go bona sesupo sengwe mo go wena.”" 
Matthew12:39 Mme ene a ba fetola ka go re: “Losika lo lo bosula le lwa boaka, lo batla sesupo; ga lo ketla lo newa sesupo sepe, fa e se sesupo sa moperofeti Jona." 
Matthew12:40 Jaaka Jona a kile a nna mo mpeng ya leruarua ka malatsi a le mararo le masigo a le mararo; Morwa Motho le ene o tlaa nna mo pelong ya lefatshe ka malatsi a le mararo le masigo a le mararo. 
Matthew12:41 Banna ba Ninefe ba tlaa ema mo tshekong, ba ema le losika lo, ba lo sekisa; ka gobo bone ba ikwatlhaile ka thero ya ga Jona; mme bonang yo mogolo go feta Jona o fano." 
Matthew12:42 Mohumagadi kgosi ya Borwa o tlaa ema mo tshekong, a ema le losika lo a lo sekisa; ka gobo ene o ne a tswa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe, a tla go utlwa botlhale jwa ga Solomone; mme bonang, yo mogolo go feta Solomone o fano." 
Matthew12:43 “Mowa o o maswe o a re o dule mo mothong, o ye o ralale dikaka o batla boikhutso, mme o se ke o bo bone." 
Matthew12:44 Foo o itheye o re: ‘Ke tlaa ba ke boela kwa ntlong ya me e ke duleng mo go yone’; mme o re o tsile o fitlhele e se na motho ope, e feetswe, e baakantswe." 
Matthew12:45 Jaana o ye o itseele mewa e sele e supa, e e o gaisang ka bosula, mme e tsene e age teng; mme go fele go befile mo mothong yo go feta ga ntlha. Go tlaa nna jalo fela le losika lo, lo lo bosula.”" 
Matthew12:46 Ya re a sa ntse a bua le batho ba bantsintsi, bonang, mmaagwe le bomonnawe ba bo ba emetse kwa thoko, ba eletsa go bua nae." 
Matthew12:47 Mongwe a mo raya a re: “Bona, mmaago le bomonnao ba eme kwa ntle, ba eletsa go bua nao.”" 
Matthew12:48 Mme a fetola yo o mmoleletseng a re: “Mme ke mang? Le bonnake ke bomang?” 
Matthew12:49 A otlolola letsogo a supa barutwa a re: “Bonang mme le bonnake. 
Matthew12:50 Gonne le fa e le mang yo o tlaa dirang go rata ga Rre yo o kwa legodimong, ke ene nnake, le kgaitsadiake, le mme.”" 
Matthew13:1 E rile ka letsatsi leo Jesu a tswa mo ntlong, a ya a dula fa lewatleng." 
Matthew13:2 Ga phuthegela kwa go ene matshutitshuti a magolo a batho, a ba a tla a tsena mo mokorong a dula teng; mme bontsi jotlhe jwa batho jwa ema fa thoko ga lewatle." 
Matthew13:3 Mme a bua nabo dilo di le dintsi ka ditshwantsho a re: “Bonang, mojadi o kile a tswa a ya go jala." 
Matthew13:4 Ya re a ntse a jala ditlhaka dingwe tsa wela fa tseleng, mme dinonyane tsa tla tsa di sela." 
Matthew13:5 Tse dingwe tsa wela fa go leng matlapa, fa mmu o leng mosesane teng, mme tsa akofa tsa tlhaba ka di se mo mmung o o boteng." 
Matthew13:6 E rile letsatsi le sena go gotela, tsa ša; mme ereka di se na medi, tsa omelela fela." 
Matthew13:7 Tse dingwe tsa wela mo mitlweng; mme mitlwa ya gola, ya di hupetsa;" 
Matthew13:8 tse dingwe tsa wela mo mmung o o molemo, tsa ungwa, dingwe tsa nna lekgolo, tse dingwe tsa nna 60, tse dingwe 30." 
Matthew13:9 “Yo o nang le ditsebe (go utlwa), a a utlwe.”" 
Matthew13:10 Mme barutwa ba tla, ba mo raya ba re: “Ana o buelang nabo ka ditshwantsho?”" 
Matthew13:11 A ba fetola a re: “Lona lo neilwe go itse masaitsiweng a bogosi jwa legodimo; mme bone ga ba a go newa. 
Matthew13:12 Gonne yo o nang le sengwe o tlaa newa, mme o tlaa nna le letlotlo; mme yo o se nang sepe o tlaa tseelwa le se o nang naso." 
Matthew13:13 Ke gone ka fa ke buang nabo ka ditshwantsho ka teng; ka gobo le fa ba lebile, ga ba bone, le fa ba reeditse, ga ba utlwe, le gone ga ba tlhaloganye." 
Matthew13:14 Polelelopele ya ga Isaia e ba dirafaletse e e rileng: “ ‘Go utlwa lo tlaa nna lo utlwa, mme ga lo ketla lo tlhaloganya gope, le go leba lo tlaa nna lo leba, mme ga lo ketla lo bona gope;" 
Matthew13:15 gonne dipelo tsa batho ba di thatafaditse, ba kabetse ditsebe, ba ipuduladitse matlho; e se re kgotsa ba lemoga ka matlho, ba utlwa ka ditsebe, ba tlhaloganya ka pelo, mme ba sokologa gape, mme ka ba fodisa.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Matlho a lona a sego gonne a a bona; le ditsebe tsa lona gonne di a utlwa. 
Matthew13:17 Gonne ammaaruri ke a lo raya, baperofeti ba le bantsi le basiami ba eleditse go bona dilo tse lo di bonang, mme ga ba a ka ba di bona; le go utlwa dilo tse lo di utlwang mme ga ba ka ba di utlwa." 
Matthew13:18 “Ke gone, utlwang setshwantsho sa mojadi." 
Matthew13:19 E a re fa mongwe a utlwa lefoko la bogosi, a sa le tlhaloganye, foo yo o bosula a tle a phamole se se jadilweng mo pelong ya gagwe. Yo ke ene wa peo e e jaletsweng fa tseleng." 
Matthew13:20 Wa peo e e jadilweng fa go leng matlapa, ke yo o utlwang lefoko mme a akofe a le tshole ka boitumelo;" 
Matthew13:21 le fa go ntse jalo ga a na modi mo go ene, o tle a eme ka lobakanyana fela; mme e re mogang go tsogang patiko kgotsa pogiso ka ntlha ya lefoko, a akofe a kgopiwe." 
Matthew13:22 Wa peo e e jadilweng mo mitlweng ke yo o utlwang lefoko; mme go bapalwa ke lefatshe le tsietso ya mahumo, di hupetse lefoko mme a ungologe." 
Matthew13:23 Mme wa peo e e jadilweng mo mmung o o molemo ke yo o utlwang lefoko a ba a le tlhaloganye; ke ene ruri yo o ungwang, mme go ungwa ga gagwe gongwe go nne lekgolo, gongwe go nne 60, mo gongwe 30.”" 
Matthew13:24 A ba beela pele setshwantsho se sengwe a re: “Bogosi jwa legodimo bo tshwantshiwa le motho yo o kileng a jala peo e e molemo mo tshimong ya gagwe; 
Matthew13:25 mme ya re go sa robetswe, mmaba wa gagwe a tla a jala mohoka le one mo mabeleng, mme a tsamaya." 
Matthew13:26 E rile mogwang o gola, mabele a tsala, mohoka le one wa bonala." 
Matthew13:27 Batlhanka ba mong wa tshimo ba tla ba mo raya ba re: ‘Morena, a go o a jala peo e e molemo mo tshimong ya gago, mme jaanong e bile e tshotse mohoka kae?’" 
Matthew13:28 A ba raya, a re: ‘Ke mmaba yo o dirileng jalo.’ Batlhanka ba re: ‘Fa e le jalo, a o rata ra ya ra o phutha?’" 
Matthew13:29 Mme a re: ‘Nnyaa; e se re kgotsa fa lo phutha mohoka, lwa o khumolela le mabele." 
Matthew13:30 Lesang, lo mme go gole mmogo go ya thobong; e tlaa re mo motlheng wa thobo ke tlaa raya barobi ke re: Phuthang mohoka pele, lo o bofe dingata go tla lo o fisa, mme mabele lo a phuthele mo bobolokelong jwa me.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 A ba beela pele setshwantsho se sengwe a re: “Bogosi jwa legodimo bo tshwana le tlhaka ya peo ya mosetara, e motho o e tsereng, mme a e jala mo tshimong ya gagwe;" 
Matthew13:32 ke peo e potlana ruri mo dipeong tsotlhe; mme e re e sena go gola e be e feta merogo, e nne setlhare, dinonyane tsa loapi di be di tle di age mo dikaleng tsa sone.”" 
Matthew13:33 A ba bolelela setshwantsho se sengwe a re: “Bogosi jwa legodimo bo tshwana le sebediso se mosadi o se tsereng, a se tsenya mo dielong di le tharo tsa boupe, jwa ba jwa tla jwa bela jotlhe fela.”" 
Matthew13:34 Dilo tse tsotlhe Jesu a di bua le matshutitshuti a batho ka ditshwantsho; ga a ka a bua sepe nabo fa se se ka ditshwantsho fela," 
Matthew13:35 gore go dirafale se se kileng sa buiwa ke moperofeti, a re: “Ke tlaa tumolola molomo wa me ka ditshwantsho; ke tlaa kakanya dilo tse di sa leng di lojwa ka go thaiwa ga lefatshe.”" 
Matthew13:36 Foo Jesu a tlogela matshutitshuti a batho, a tsena mo ntlong; mme barutwa ba gagwe ba tla kwa go ene ba re: “Re phuthololele setshwantsho sa mohoka mo tshimong.”" 
Matthew13:37 A ba fetola a re: “Mojadi wa peo e e molemo ke Morwa Motho; 
Matthew13:38 tshimo ke lefatshe; peo e e molemo yone ke bana ba bogosi; mme mohoka ke bana ba yo o bosula; 
Matthew13:39 mmaba yo o ba jadileng ke diabolo; thobo ke bokhutlo jwa lefatshe; barobi ke baengele. 
Matthew13:40 Ke gone jaaka mohoka o phuthwa, o fisiwa ka molelo; go tlaa nna fela jalo mo bokhutlong jwa lefatshe." 
Matthew13:41 Morwa Motho o tlaa roma baengele ba gagwe, mme ba tlaa tlhopha mo bogosing jwa gagwe dilo tsotlhe tse di kgopisang, le ba ba ikepang;" 
Matthew13:42 mme ba tlaa ba latlhela mo bokepisong jwa molelo; go tlaa nna selelo le phuranyo ya meno teng. 
Matthew13:43 Foo basiami ba tlaa betlama jaaka letsatsi mo bogosing jwa ga Rraabo. Yo o nang le ditsebe a a utlwe. 
Matthew13:44 “Bogosi jwa legodimo bo tshwana le khumo e e fitlhegileng mo nageng; e motho o ne a e bona, mme a e loba; mme ka boitumelo jwa gone, a ya a bapatsa tsotlhe tse o nang natso, a reka naga eo." 
Matthew13:45 “Gape bogosi jwa legodimo bo tshwana le moreki yo o batlang diperela tse dintle. 
Matthew13:46 Ya re a sena go bona nngwe e e tlhwatlhwa kgolo, a ya a bapatsa tsotlhe tse o nang natso a e reka." 
Matthew13:47 “Gape bogosi jwa legodimo bo tshwana le lotloa lo lo digetsweng mo lewatleng, mme lwa gogoba ga ditshika tsotlhe tsa ditlhapi;" 
Matthew13:48 lo e rileng lo sena go tlala ba lo gogela fa thoko; ba dula ba tlhophela tse di monate mo megopeng, mme tse di bosula ba di latlha." 
Matthew13:49 Go tlaa nna fela jalo mo bokhutlong jwa lefatshe; baengele ba tlaa tswa, ba tlhaola ba ba bosula mo go ba ba siameng," 
Matthew13:50 ba ba latlhela mo bokepisong jwa molelo; go tlaa nna selelo le phuranyo ya meno teng. 
Matthew13:51 “A dilo tse tsotlhe lo di tlhalogantse?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Ee.” 
Matthew13:52 A ba raya a re: “Ke gone he mokwadi mongwe le mongwe, yo o rutilweng sentle ka ga bogosi jwa legodimo, o tshwana le mong wa ntlo, yo o ntshang dilo tse dintšha le tse dikgologolo mo lohumong lwa gagwe.”" 
Matthew13:53 Ga dirala, e rile Jesu a sena go wetsa ditshwantsho tse, a tloga a tswa teng." 
Matthew13:54 Ya re a fitlha mo lefatsheng la ga gabo, a ba ruta mo ntlong ya bone ya thuto, ba ba ba gakgamala ba re: “Monna yo o tshotse botlhale jo le ditiro tse tsa nonofo kae?" 
Matthew13:55 A yo ga se morwa mmetli wa dikgong? A mmaagwe ga se Maria? Le bomonnawe a ga se boJakobe, le Josefe, le Simone le Jutase?" 
Matthew13:56 Le bokgaitsadie a ga re na nabo botlhe? Ana monna yo o a ba a tshotse kae dilo tsotlhe tse?” 
Matthew13:57 Mme ba kgopega ka ga gagwe, mme Jesu a ba raya a re: “Moperofeti ga a ke a tlhoka tlotlo, fa e se mo lefatsheng la ga gabo, le mo ntlong ya gagwe.”" 
Matthew13:58 Mme a se ka a dira ditiro di le dintsi tsa nonofo teng, ka ntlha ya go tlhoka go dumela ga bone." 
Matthew14:1 E rile ka lobaka loo molaodi Herote a utlwela tumedi ka ga Jesu. 
Matthew14:2 Mme a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Yo ke Johane Mokolobetsi; o tsogile mo baswing; ke gone ka fa dinonofo tse, di dirang mo go ene ka teng.”" 
Matthew14:3 Gonne Herote o ne a tshwere Johane, a mo golega, a mo tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo ka ntlha ya ga Herodiase, mosadi wa ga Filipo morwa rraagwe." 
Matthew14:4 Gonne Johane o ne a mo reile a re: “Ga o a letlelelwa go nna nae.” 
Matthew14:5 Mme a eletsa go mmolaya, mme a boifa batho, ka ba ne ba mo kaya fa e le moperofeti." 
Matthew14:6 E rile go fitlha letsatsi la botsalo jwa ga Herote, morwadia Herodiase a bina mo modirong, mme a kgatlha Herote." 
Matthew14:7 Foo a mo solofetsa ka ikano a re, se o tlaa se mo lopang o tlaa se mo naya fela." 
Matthew14:8 Ene ka a laetswe ke mmaagwe a re: “Nnaya fela fano tlhogo ya ga Johane Mokolobetsi ka mogotšana jaana.” 
Matthew14:9 Kgosi ya hutsafala; le fa go ntse jalo ya laola gore a e newe, ka ntlha ya maikano a yone, le ka ntlha ya ba ba jang nayo." 
Matthew14:10 Mme a roma batho, ba ya ba kgaola Johane tlhogo mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Matthew14:11 Tlhogo ya gagwe ya leriwe ka mogotšana, ya newa morweetsana; ene a e isa kwa go mmaagwe." 
Matthew14:12 Mme barutwana ba gagwe ba ya ba tsaya setoto, ba mo fitlha; mme ba ya ba bolelela Jesu." 
Matthew14:13 Jaana e rile Jesu a utlwa, a tloga teng ka mokoro a ngongwaelela kwa thoko, felong fa go se nang batho; mme batho ba ba matshutitshuti ba re ba utlwa, ba mo latela ba tsamaya ka dinao, ba tswa mo metseng." 
Matthew14:14 A tswa, a bona bontsintsi jo bogolo jwa batho mme a ba tlhomogela pelo, a fodisa balwetse ba bone." 
Matthew14:15 Ya re go nna maitseboa barutwa ba gagwe ba tla mo go ene ba re: “Golo fa ke naga fela, le lobaka lo setse lo fetile; phatlalatsa batho, gore ba ye mo metsaneng go ithekela dijo.”" 
Matthew14:16 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ga ba na go tsamaya; ba feng ba je.” 
Matthew14:17 Ba mo raya ba re: “Fano ga re na sepe fa e se dinkgwe di le tlhano, le ditlhapi di le pedi fela.”" 
Matthew14:18 A re: “Di lereng kwano go nna.” 
Matthew14:19 Mme a laola ba ba matshutitshuti go nna mo bojannyeng, a tsaya dinkgwe tse tlhano le ditlhapi tse pedi, a lelalela legodimong, a di segofatsa, a di ngathoganya, mme dinkgwe a di neela barutwa, barutwa ba di abela batho." 
Matthew14:20 Mme ba ja botlhe ba kgora; mme ba sela dikabetla tse di setseng, ya nna diroto tse di tletseng di le 12." 
Matthew14:21 Ba ba jeleng e ka ne e le banna ba le 5 000, go sa balwe basadi le banyana." 
Matthew14:22 A akofa a laola barutwa go tsena mo mokorong, ba mo etelelela pele kwa moseja, ene a sa ntse a phatlalatsa batho." 
Matthew14:23 Ya re a sena go phatlalatsa batho, a tlhatlogela mo thabeng kwa thoko, a ya go rapela; mme ya re go nna maabanyane a bo a le teng a le esi." 
Matthew14:24 Mokoro one wa bo o setse o le fa gare ga lewatle, o kgarakgatshiwa ke makhubu a metsi; gonne ba tlhabaganye le phefo." 
Matthew14:25 Ya re bosigo, ka lobaka lwa tebelo ya bone, a ya kwa go bone a tsamaya ka dinao mo godimo ga lewatle." 
Matthew14:26 Barutwa ba re ba mmona a tsamaya ka dinao mo godimo ga lewatle, ba fuduega ba re: “Ke sedimo;” mme ba goisiwa ke poifo." 
Matthew14:27 Mme Jesu a akofa a bua nabo a re: “Nametsegang; ke nna; se boifeng.” 
Matthew14:28 Petere a mo fetola a re: “Morena, fa e le wena, nthaya, o re ke ye koo go wena mo godimo ga metsi.”" 
Matthew14:29 Mme a re: “Ntlo.” Petere a fologa mo mokorong, a tsamaya mo godimo ga metsi, a re o ya kwa go Jesu." 
Matthew14:30 Mme ya re a utlwa phefo e le thata, a boifa; mme ya re a simolola go nwela a goa a re: “Morena, mpoloka.”" 
Matthew14:31 Ka bofefo Jesu a otlolola letsogo, a mo tshwara, a mo raya a re: “Ao! Wena yo o tumelo e e potlana, o ne o belaelelang?”" 
Matthew14:32 Ya re ba sena go pagama mo mokorong phefo ya kokobela. 
Matthew14:33 Mme ba ba mo mokorong ba mo obamela ba re: “Ammaaruri o Morena Modimo.” 
Matthew14:34 E rile ba sena go kgabaganya, ba fitlha mo lefatsheng la Genesarete." 
Matthew14:35 Ya re batho ba felo foo ba mo lemoga, ba roma mo tikologong yotlhe ya lefatshe leo, ba tlisa kwa go ene botlhe ba ba lwalang." 
Matthew14:36 Ba mo rapela, gore a mme ba ke ba ame le fa e ka bo e le makantsa a seaparo sa gagwe; mme ba ba mo amileng ba fodisiwa botlhe fela." 
Matthew15:1 Foo ga tla Bafarisai le bakwadi ba ba tswang Jerusalema, ba tla kwa go Jesu ba re:" 
Matthew15:2 “Ke go reng fa barutwa ba gago ba tlola mekgwa ya ba bogologolo? Gonne fa ba ja dijo ga ba ke ba tlhapa diatla.” 
Matthew15:3 Mme a ba fetola a re: “Ke go reng fa le lona lo tlola molao wa Modimo ka ntlha ya mekgwe ya lona? 
Matthew15:4 Gonne Modimo o rile: ‘Tlotla rraago le mmaago,’ gape: ‘Yo o buang bosula ka ga rraagwe, le fa e le mmaagwe a a swe ruri.’" 
Matthew15:5 Mme lona lwa re: ‘Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa rayang rraagwe, le fa e le mmaagwe a re: Se o ka bong o thusiwa ke nna ka sone, se abetswe Modimo;’" 
Matthew15:6 a sa tlotle rraagwe le fa e le mmaagwe. Lo bo lo dirolotse lefoko la Modimo ka ntlha ya mekgwa ya lona. 
Matthew15:7 Baitimokanyi ke lona, Isaia o boletse sentle ka ga lona a re:" 
Matthew15:8 ‘Tšhaba e, e ntlotla ka dipounama; mme dipelo tsa bone di kgakala le nna." 
Matthew15:9 Ba nkobamelela lefela, ka e a tle e re ba ruta, dithuto tsa bone e be e le dipolelo tsa batho fela.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 A ipiletsa batho ba le bantsi, a ba raya a re: “Utlwang, lo tlhaloganye:" 
Matthew15:11 Se se tsenang ka molomo, ga se sone se se itshekololang motho; mme se se tswang ka molomo, ke sone se se itshekololang motho.”" 
Matthew15:12 Foo ga tla barutwa, ba mo raya ba re: “A o a itse fa e rile Bafarisai ba utlwa lefoko le, ba kgotšwa?”" 
Matthew15:13 A ba fetola a re: “Setlhatshana sengwe le sengwe se Rre wa legodimo o sa se tlhomang, se tlaa kumolwa ka medi." 
Matthew15:14 Ba leseng; ke bagogi ba ba foufetseng. Fa sefofu se goga sefofu, di tlaa wela mmogo mo kgatamping.”" 
Matthew15:15 Mme Petere a mo fetola a re: “Re ranolele setshwantsho se.” 
Matthew15:16 Mme a re: “A le lona le gompieno lo sa ntse lo tlhoka tlhaloganyo? 
Matthew15:17 A ga lo lemoge gore tsotlhe tse di tsenang ka molomo di fetela mo mpeng, mme di ye go latlhelwa kwa ntle?" 
Matthew15:18 Mme dilo tse di tswang ka molomo di tswa mo pelong; mme tsone tseo di itshekolola motho. 
Matthew15:19 Gonne mo pelong go tswa megopolo e e bosula, le dipolao, le dikgokafalo, le boaka, bogodu, le pateletso le dikgalo." 
Matthew15:20 Dilo tse ke tsone tse di itshekololang motho; go ja ka diatla tse di sa tlhapiwang ga go ke go itshekolola motho.” 
Matthew15:21 Jesu a tloga a tswa teng, a ngongwaelela kwa dintlheng tsa Ture le Sitone." 
Matthew15:22 Mme bonang, mosadi wa Mokanana a tswa melelwaneng eo, a goa a re: “Nkutlwela botlhoko, Morena, Morwa Dafite; morwadiake o tshwenngwa thata ke mowa o o maswe.”" 
Matthew15:23 Mme a se ka a mo fetola ka lefoko lepe. Barutwa ba gagwe ba tla ba mo rapela ba re: “Mo reye a tsamaye, gonne o re tlhaeletsa kwa morago.”" 
Matthew15:24 Mme a ba fetola a re: “Ga ke a rongwa fa e se kwa dinkung tse di timetseng tsa ntlo ya Iseraele.” 
Matthew15:25 Mosadi a tla a mo obamela a re: “Morena, a ko o nthuse.”" 
Matthew15:26 Mme a mo fetola a re: “Ga go a tshwanela fa go ka tsewa dijo tsa bana, tsa latlhelwa dintša.”" 
Matthew15:27 Mme a re: “Ee, Morena; gonne le e leng dintša di tle di je matlhotlhora a a wang mo lomating lwa bojelo lwa beng ba tsone.”" 
Matthew15:28 Foo Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Ija, mosadi! Tumelo ya gago e kgolo, a go go dirafalele ka fa o ratang ka teng.” Morwadie o sa le a fodisiwa fela ka lobaka loo." 
Matthew15:29 Jesu a tloga a tswa teng, a tla fa gaufi le lewatle la Galilea; mme a tlhatlogela mo thabeng, a dula teng." 
Matthew15:30 Ga tla kwa go ene matshutitshuti a magolo a batho, ba na le ba ba tlhotsang, le difofu, le dimumu, le digole le ba bangwe ba le bantsi, ba ba baya fa fatshe fa dinaong tsa gagwe, mme a ba fodisa." 
Matthew15:31 Bontsi jwa batho jwa ba jwa tla jwa gakgamala, ka ba bona dimumu di bua, digole di itekanetse, batlhotsi ba tsamaya, le difofu di bona; mme ba galaletsa Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Matthew15:32 Jesu a ipiletsa barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Ke tlhomogela batho ba bantsi ba pelo, ka jaana ba setse ba tlhotse le nna malatsi a le mararo, mme ba se na se ba se jang; ga ke rate go ba phatlalatsa ka tlala, e se re gongwe ba dimelela mo tseleng.”" 
Matthew15:33 Barutwa ba mo raya ba re: “Fano mo nageng fela re tlaa bo re bonye kae dinkgwe tse di lekanyeng go kgorisa bontsi jo bo kanakana?” 
Matthew15:34 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Lo na le dinkgwe di le kae?” Ba re di supa le ditlhapi di se kae. 
Matthew15:35 Mme a laola gore batho ba dule fa fatshe; 
Matthew15:36 mme a tsaya dinkgwe tse supa, le ditlhapi, a leboga, a di ngathoganya, a di neela barutwa, mme barutwa ba di abela batho." 
Matthew15:37 Ba a ja botlhe fela, ba kgora; ba ba ba sela dikabetla tse di setseng, ya nna diroto di supa di tletse." 
Matthew15:38 Ba ba jeleng e ne e le banna ba ba dikete tse nne, go sa balwe basadi le banyana." 
Matthew15:39 Mme a phatlalatsa matshutitshuti a batho, a tsena mo mokorong, a ya a fitlha mo melelwaneng ya Magetane." 
Matthew16:1 Bafarisai le Basadukai ba tla, ba mo lopa gore a ba supetse sesupo se se tswang legodimong, mme ba bo ba mo lalela." 
Matthew16:2 Mme a ba fetola a re: “E a re fa go le maitseboa, lo a tle lo re: ‘Go tlaa tsoga go sele; ka legodimo le le lehibidu.’" 
Matthew16:3 E re ka moso lo re: ‘Go tlaa tsoga go sele; ka legodimo le le lehibidu le bontsho.’ Lo itse go lemoga ponalo ya legodimo; mme lo palelwa ke go re metlha e kaela kae 
Matthew16:4 Losika lo lo bosula, le lwa boaka, lo batla sesupo; mme ga lo ketla lo newa sesupo sepe, fa e se sesupo sa ga Jona.” Mme a ba tlogela a tsamaya." 
Matthew16:5 Barutwa ba fitlha kwa moseja, mme ba bo ba lebetse go tsaya dinkgwe." 
Matthew16:6 Mme Jesu a ba raya a re: “Tlhokomelang, lo bo lo itise mo sebedisong sa Bafarisai le Basadukai.”" 
Matthew16:7 Mme ba tseisanya kgang ba re: “Ke ka gobo re se ka ra tsaya senkgwe.” 
Matthew16:8 Jesu ka a lemoga a re: “Lona ba tumelonyana, lo tseisanyeditseng kgang ka gobo lo se na dinkgwe?" 
Matthew16:9 A ga lo ise lo lemogo, le fa e le go gakologelwa dinkgwe tse tlhano, tsa ba ba 5 000, le bokae jwa diroto tse lo seletseng mo go tsone?" 
Matthew16:10 Le fa e le dinkgwe tse di supang tsa ba 4 000, le bokae jwa diroto tse lo seletseng mo go tsone?" 
Matthew16:11 Ana go ntse jang lo sa lemoge fa ke ne ke sa bue le lona ka ga dinkgwe? Mme e le gore lo itise mo sebedisong sa Bafarisai le Basadukai.” 
Matthew16:12 Foo ba tlhaloganya fa a sa ba tlhagise ka ga sebediso sa senkgwe, mme e le ka ga thuto ya Bafarisai le Basadukai." 
Matthew16:13 Jaana e rile Jesu a fitlha mo dintlheng tsa Kaesarea Filipi, a botsa barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Ana batho ba tle ba re nna Morwa Motho ke mang?”" 
Matthew16:14 Ba re: “Bangwe ba re: Johane Mokolobetsi; ba bangwe ba re: Elija; le ba bangwe ba re: Jeremia, kgotsa mongwe wa baperofeti.”" 
Matthew16:15 A ba raya a re: “Me lona lwa re nna ke mang?” 
Matthew16:16 Simone Petere a mo fetola a re: “O Keresete, Morwa Modimo o o tshedileng.”" 
Matthew16:17 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “O sego, Simone morwa Jona; gonne ga o a go senolelwa ke nama le madi, fa e se ke Rre yo o kwa legodimong." 
Matthew16:18 Le nna ke go raya ke re: O Petere, mme ke tlaa aga phuthego ya me mo lefikeng le; mme dinonofo tsa Bobipo ga di ketla di e fenya." 
Matthew16:19 Ke tlaa go neela dikopololo tsa bogosi jwa legodimo; se o tlaa se bofang mo lefatsheng, se tlaa bo se bofilwe kwa legodimong; mme se o tlaa se bofololang mo lefatsheng, se tlaa bo se bofolotswe kwa legodimong.”" 
Matthew16:20 Foo a laya barutwa gore ba se ka ba bolelela ope fa e le ene Keresete. 
Matthew16:21 Go simolola ka lobaka loo, Jesu a nna a tlhaloganyetsa barutwa ba gagwe fa a na le go ya kwa Jerusalema, le go bogisiwa dilo di le dintsi ke bagolwane le baperesiti ba bagolo le bakwadi, le go bolawa, le go ba a tsosiwa ka letsatsi la boraro." 
Matthew16:22 Mme Petere a mo isa fa thoko, a simolola go mo omanya a re: “A go nne kgakala nao, Morena; mo ga go ketla go go dirafalela gope.”" 
Matthew16:23 Mme ene a retologa, a raya Petere a re: “Tloga fa pele ga me Satane; gonne o sekgopi mo go nna; ka gobo ga o tlhokomele dilo tsa Modimo, fa e se dilo tsa batho fela.”" 
Matthew16:24 Foo Jesu a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Fa motho le fa e le mang a rata go ntshala morago, a a iitatole, mme a a tseye mokgoro wa gagwe a itse go ntshala morago." 
Matthew16:25 Gonne le fa e le mang yo o ratang a ka bo a boloka botshelo jwa gagwe, bo tlaa mo latlhegela; mme yo o latlhegelwang ke botshelo jwa gagwe, ka ntlha ya me, o tlaa bo bona." 
Matthew16:26 Gonne motho o tlaa bo a ka thusega eng, le fa a ka fenya lefatshe lotlhe, mme a latlha botshelo jwa gagwe? Kgotsa, se motho o ka se ntshang a se baya mo boemong jwa botshelo jwa gagwe ke eng?" 
Matthew16:27 Gonne Morwa Motho o tlaa tla ka kgalalelo ya ga Rraagwe, a na le baengele ba gagwe; e dira gone o tlaa duelang mongwe le mongwe ka fa ditirong tsa gagwe." 
Matthew16:28 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Go bangwe ba bone ba ba emeng fa, ba ba se ketlang ba utlwa loso gope, go tsamaya ba bona Morwa Motho a tla mo bogosing jwa gagwe pele.”" 
Matthew17:1 E rile malatsi a le marataro a sena go feta, Jesu a tseela Petere, Jakobe le Johane monnawe, kwa thoko, a ba tlhatlosetsa mo thabeng e e godileng." 
Matthew17:2 Mme a ya a fetoga ponalo fa pele ga bone; sefatlhogo sa gagwe sa phatsima jaaka letsatsi, le diaparo tsa gagwe tsa nna ditshweu jaaka lesedi." 
Matthew17:3 Mme ga bonala kwa go bone Moše le Elija, ba bua mmogo nae." 
Matthew17:4 Mme Petere a raya Jesu a re: “Morena, go molemo go rona go nna fa; fa o rata, ke tlaa dira metlaagana e le meraro fano; mongwe e nne wa gago, o mongwe e nne wa ga Moše, o mongwe e nne wa ga Elija.”" 
Matthew17:5 Ya re a sa ntse a bua, leru le le sedifetseng la ba tshutifalela; mme bonang, lentswe la tswa mo lerung la re: “Yo ke morwaake yo rategang, yo ke kgatlhegang thata mo go ene; lo utlweng ene.”" 
Matthew17:6 E rile barutwa ba le utlwa, ba wela fa fatshe ka difatlhogo, ba boifa segolo." 
Matthew17:7 Mme Jesu a tla a ba ama a re: “Tsogang lo eme, se boifeng.”" 
Matthew17:8 Ya re ba tsholetsa matlho, ba se ka ba bona ope fa e se Jesu a le esi fela." 
Matthew17:9 Ya re ba fologa mo thabeng, Jesu a ba laola a re: “Lo se ka lwa bolelela ope ponalo e lo e bonyeng, Morwa Motho a ba a tle a tsoge mo losong pele.”" 
Matthew17:10 Mme barutwa ba gagwe ba mmotsa, ba re: “Ke go reng fa bakwadi ba re Elija o na le go tla pele?”" 
Matthew17:11 A ba fetola a re: “Ruri Elija o etla, mme o tlaa tsosolosa dilo tsotlhe." 
Matthew17:12 Ke lo raya ke re: Le jaana Elija o setse a tsile, mme ga ba a ka ba mo itse, ba ne ba mo direla ka fa ba ratang ka teng. Morwa Motho le ene o tlaa bogisiwa ke bone fela jalo.”" 
Matthew17:13 Ke gone barutwa ba tlhaloganya fa a bua nabo ka ga Johane Mokolobetsi. 
Matthew17:14 E rile ba sena go fitlha kwa bontsing jwa batho, ga tla monna mongwe kwa go ene, a mo khubamela a re:" 
Matthew17:15 “Morena, utlwela morwaake botlhoko; gonne o tle a nne a karalale, mme o utlwa botlhoko thata; gonne o tle a wele mo molelong le mo metsing gantsi." 
Matthew17:16 Ke ne ka mo lere mo barutweng ba gago, mme ba retelelwa ke go mo fodisa.”" 
Matthew17:17 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Losika lo lo sa dumeleng, lo lo kgopo ke lona, ke tlaa nna le lona goleele go le kae? Ke tlaa lo itshokela goleele go le kae? Mo lereng kwano go nna.”" 
Matthew17:18 Mme Jesu a kgalemela mowa o o maswe, mme wa tswa mo go ene; mosimane o sa le a fodisiwa fela ka lobaka loo." 
Matthew17:19 Foo barutwa ba tla mo go Jesu kwa thoko ba re: “E ne e le ka go reng fa rona re sa nonofa go o kgoromeletsa ntle?” 
Matthew17:20 Mme a ba raya a re: “E ne e le ka ntlha ya bobotlana jwa tumelo ya lona; gonne ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Fa lo na le tumelo e e kanang ka tlhaka ya peo ya mosetara, lo ka raya thaba e lwa re: ‘Tloga fa, o hudugele fale;’ mme e tlaa huduga; mme ga go ketla go nna le sepe se se tlaa lo retelelang.(" 
Matthew17:21 Mme losika lo, ga lo tswe gope fa e se ka thapelo, le ka go ikitsa go ja.)”" 
Matthew17:22 Ya re ba sa ntse ba tlhotse kwa Galilea, Jesu a ba raya a re: “Morwa Motho o tloga a neelwa mo diatleng tsa batho;" 
Matthew17:23 mme ba tlaa mmolaya, mme e tlaa re ka letsatsi la boraro o tlaa tsosiwa.” Mme ba hutsafala segolo thata." 
Matthew17:24 E rile ba sena go fitlha mo Kaperenaume, ba ba amogelang lekgetho la tempele ba tla mo go Petere ba re: “A moruti wa lona ga a ntshe lekgetho la tempele?”"
