Matthew17:25 A re: “Ee, o a le ntsha.” Ya re a tsena mo ntlong, Jesu a mo raka ka go bua, a re: “Simone o gopola jang? Ana dikgosi tsa lefatshe di amogela sehuba, kgotsa lekgetho mo go bomang? A ke mo go bomorwaa tsone, kgotsa mo baennyeng?”" 
Matthew17:26 Mme ya re a re: “Mo baennyeng,” Jesu a re: “Fa e le jalo bomorwaa tsone ba gololosegile." 
Matthew17:27 Le fa go ntse jalo, a re se ba kgopise; ya lewatleng, o konopele kobe, o tseye tlhapi e e tlhatlogang pele; mme o tlaa re o sena go e atlhamolosa molomo, o tlaa fitlhela ledi la bošeleng ba ba bošeleng ba ba 8; tsaya lone leo, o le ba neye, e le la me nao.”" 
Matthew18:1 E rile ka lone lobaka loo barutwa ba tla mo go Jesu ba re: “Ana yo e leng ene mogolo bogolo mo bogosing jwa legodimo e a bo e le mang?” 
Matthew18:2 Mme a ipiletsa ngwanyana, a mmaya fa gare ga bone." 
Matthew18:3 Mme a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, fa lo sa sokologe, lwa nna jaaka banyana, ga lo ketla lo tsena mo bogosing jwa legodimo ka gope." 
Matthew18:4 Ke gone le fa e le mang yo o tlaa ingotlang jaaka ngwanyana yo, ke ene yo o leng mogolo bogolo mo bogosing jwa legodimo." 
Matthew18:5 Mme le fa e le mang yo o tsholang ngwanyana mongwe yo o ntseng jalo, ka leina la me, o tshola nna." 
Matthew18:6 “Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa kgopisang mongwe wa ba babotlana ba ba dumelang mo go nna, go ka nna molemo mo go ene fa lolwala lo logolo lo ka gokelelwa mo thamong ya gagwe, a ba a thabuediwa mo matenyeng a lewatle." 
Matthew18:7 A bo go latlhega lefatshe ka ntlha ya dikgopi! Gonne dikgopi di na le go tla fela, mme go bo go latlhega motho yo sekgopi se tlang ka ene." 
Matthew18:8 “Fa seatla sa gago, kgotsa lonao lwa gago di go kgopisa, o di kgaole o di latlhe; gonne go ka nna molemo mo go wena go tsena mo botshelong o le segole kgotsa setlhotsa, bogolo go go latlhelwa mo molelong o o sa khutleng o le diatla tsoo pedi kgotsa dinao tsoo pedi." 
Matthew18:9 Fa leitlho la gago le go kgopisa, o le gonye o le latlhe; gonne go ka nna molemo mo go wena go tsena mo botshelong o le moitlho, bogolo go go latlhelwa mo moleteng wa molelo o le matlho oo mabedi." 
Matthew18:10 “Lo bone, gore lo se nyatse ope wa ba babotlana ba; gonne ke a lo raya ka re, kwa legodimong baengele ba bone ba lebile ka metlha yotlhe sefatlhogo sa ga Rre yo o kwa legodimong." 
Matthew18:11 (Gonne Morwa Motho o tsile go boloka se se latlhegileng.) 
Matthew18:12 “Lo gopola jang? Fa motho mongwe a na le dinku di le lekgolo, mme fa nngwe ya tsone e timetse, a ga a tlogele tse di 99, mme a ya kwa dithabeng, a batla e e timetseng?" 
Matthew18:13 Mme e tlaa re fa go dirala a ya a e bona, ruri ke a lo raya, o itumelela yone bogolo go tse 99 tse di se kang tsa timela." 
Matthew18:14 Fela jalo ga se go rata ga Rraeno yo o kwa legodimong, gore mongwe wa ba babotlana ba, a nyelele." 
Matthew18:15 “Fa wa gaeno a go leofetse, ya o mo kaele molato wa gagwe lo le babedi fela; e tlaa re fa a go utlwile o tlaa bo o gapile wa gaeno." 
Matthew18:16 Mme fa a gana go utlwa, a go ye mongwe fela, le fa e le ba le babedi nao, gore lefoko lengwe le lengwe le tlhomamisiwe ka melomo ya basupi ba le babedi, le fa e le ba le bararo." 
Matthew18:17 Mme fa a gana go utlwa bone, ya o bolelele phuthego; mme fa a gana go utlwa le yone phuthego, mo go wena o mo kaye jaaka moditšhaba fela, le mokgethisi." 
Matthew18:18 “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Le fa e ka ne e le dilo dife tse lo di bofang mo lefatsheng, di tlaa bo di bofilwe kwa legodimong; le gone le fa e ka ne e le dilo dife tse lo tlaa di bofololang mo lefatsheng, di tlaa bo di bofolotswe kwa legodimong." 
Matthew18:19 Gape, ke a lo raya: E tlaa re fa ba le babedi ba lona ba dumalanye mo lefatsheng ka ga sengwe fela se ba tlaa se lopang, ba tlaa se direlwa ke Rre yo o kwa legodimong." 
Matthew18:20 Gonne kwa ba le babedi kgotsa ba le bararo ba phuthegileng gone, ka leina la me, foo nna ke gone mo gare ga bone.”" 
Matthew18:21 Foo ga tla Petere a mo raya a re: “Morena, kana wa gaetsho o ka nteofela gakae, mme ke ntse ke mo itshwarela; a ke gasupa?”" 
Matthew18:22 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ga ke go reye ke re e nne gasupa; ka re, e nne ga 70 gasupa." 
Matthew18:23 Ke gone bogosi jwa legodimo bo tshwantshiwang le kgosi nngwe, e e neng e rata go gopola melato e e e neetseng batlhanka ba yone." 
Matthew18:24 E rile e simolola go gopola, ga tlisiwa kwa go yone mongwe yo o molato nayo diponto di le makgolo a lekgolo." 
Matthew18:25 Mme e rile ka a se na se o lefang ka sone, morena wa gagwe a laola gore a rekisiwe, le mosadi wa gagwe le bana, le dilo tsotlhe tsa gagwe, gore tefo e dirafale." 
Matthew18:26 Ke gone motlhanka a wela fa fatshe a mo obamela a re: ‘Morena, a ko o nne pelotelele le nna, mme ke tlaa go lefela gotlhe fela.’" 
Matthew18:27 Mme morena wa motlhanka yoo, ka a tlhomoga pelo, a mo golola, a mo itshwarela molato oo." 
Matthew18:28 “Motlhanka yoo a tswa, mme a fitlhela mongwe wa batlhanka ka ene, yo o molato nae diponto di le some; a mo tshwara a mo tlhaba dikutso a re: ‘Lefa molato wa gago.’" 
Matthew18:29 Jalo motlhanka ka ene a wela fa fatshe a mo rapela a re: ‘A ko o nne pelotelele le nna, mme ke tlaa go lefela.’" 
Matthew18:30 Mme a gana; a ya a mo latlhela mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, a tla a tsamaye a lefe molato." 
Matthew18:31 Jalo ya re batlhanka ka ene ba bona se se dirilweng, ba utlwa botlhoko thata, ba ya ba bolelela morena wa bone gotlhe mo go dirilweng." 
Matthew18:32 Foo morena wa gagwe a mo ipiletsa, a mo raya a re: ‘Motlhanka wa molotsana ke wena, ke go itshwaretse molato ole otlhe fela, ka go bo o ne o o inthapeletse." 
Matthew18:33 Le wena a e ne e se tshwanelo ya gago go utlwela motlhanka ka wena botlhoko, fela jaaka le nna ke go utlwetse botlhoko?’" 
Matthew18:34 Mme morena wa gagwe a šakgala, a mo neela batlhokofatsi, a tla a tsamaye a lefe molato otlhe fela." 
Matthew18:35 “Fela jalo, Rre wa legodimo o tlaa direla lona, fa lo sa itshwarelane, mongwe le mongwe wa ga gabo ka dipelo tsa lona.”" 
Matthew19:1 Ga dirala e rile Jesu a sena go wetsa mafoko a, a huduga kwa Galilea, a tla mo melelwaneng ya Jutea, kwa moseja ga Joretane;" 
Matthew19:2 mme batho ba ba matshutitshuti a magolo ba mo sala morago; mme a ba fodisa teng. 
Matthew19:3 Ga tla Bafarisai kwa go ene, ba mo lalela, ba re: “A go letleletswe monna go tlhala mosadi wa gagwe ka ntlha ya sengwe le sengwe?”" 
Matthew19:4 Mme a ba fetola a re: “A ga lo ise lo ke lo bale fa yo o ba dirileng mo tshimologong a ba dirile nona le tshadi," 
Matthew19:5 a ba a re: ‘Ke gone ka moo, motho o tlaa tlogelang rraagwe le mmaagwe, a ngaparela mosadi wa gagwe; mme bobedi jo bo tlaa nna nama e le nngwe fela?’" 
Matthew19:6 Jalo ba bo ba sa tlhole ba le babedi, mme ke nama e le nngwe fela. Ke gone se se kopantsweng ke Modimo, a se se kgaoganngwe ke motho.”" 
Matthew19:7 Ba mo raya ba re: “Mme e le foo Moše a ba a reng, fa a laola gore go ntshiwe lokwalo lwa tlhalo, mme go tlhalwe mosadi?”" 
Matthew19:8 A ba raya a re: “Moše a lo leseletsa go tlhala basadi ba lona ka ntlha ya bothata jwa dipelo tsa lona; mme go tswa kwa tshimologong ga go a nna jalo. 
Matthew19:9 Le nna ke lo raya ke re: Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa tlhalang mosadi wa gagwe, fa e se ka ntlha ya boaka, mme a nyala yo mongwe, o dira boaka; le yo o mo nyalang a sena go tlhalwa, o dira boaka.”" 
Matthew19:10 Barutwa ba mo raya ba re: “Fa monna a ntse jalo le mosadi wa gagwe, go bo go se molemo go nyala.”" 
Matthew19:11 Mme a ba raya a re: “Batho botlhe ga ba ka ke ba tshola lefoko le, fa e se ba ba go neetsweng." 
Matthew19:12 Gonne go na le banna ba baopa, ba ba sa leng ba tsalwa jalo, ba sa tswa sebopelong sa bommaabo; go bile go na le baopa ba ba opafaditsweng ke batho; mme go na le baopa ba ba ikopafaditseng, ka ntlha ya bogosi jwa legodimo. Yo o nonofileng go go tshola, a a go tshole.”" 
Matthew19:13 Foo ga tlisiwa banyana kwa go ene, gore a ba beye diatla, mme a rapele; mme barutwa ba ba kgalemela." 
Matthew19:14 Mme Jesu a re: “Lesang banyana, se ba itseng go tla kwa go nna, gonne bogosi jwa legodimo ke jwa ba ba ntseng jaolo.”" 
Matthew19:15 Mme a ba baya diatla; mme a tloga a tswa teng. 
Matthew19:16 Mme bonang, mongwe a tla kwa go ene a re: “Moruti, ana, ke direng se se molemo, gore ke bone botshelo jo bo sa khutleng?”" 
Matthew19:17 Mme a mo raya a re: “O mpoletsang ka ga se se molemo? Go mongwe fela yo o molemo; mme fa o rata go tsena mo botshelong, tshegetsa ditaolo.”" 
Matthew19:18 A mo raya a re: “Dife?” Jesu a re: “O se ka wa bolaya motho, o se ka wa dira boaka, o se ka wa utswa, o se ka wa supa maaka;" 
Matthew19:19 tlotla rraago le mmaago, gape, o rate wa gaeno jaaka o ithata.”" 
Matthew19:20 Mme lekau la mo raya la re: “Dilo tsolthe tse ke di tlhokometse; ke sa tlhoka eng?” 
Matthew19:21 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Fa o rata go itekanela, ya o rekise tse o nang natso, o abele bahumanegi, mme o tlaa dirana le khumo kwa legodimong; mme o tle o ntshale morago.”" 
Matthew19:22 Ya re lekau le utlwa lefoko leo, la tsamaya ka bohutsana; gonne e ne e le motho yo o dithuo dikgolo." 
Matthew19:23 Jesu a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Go tlaa thatafalela mohumi go tsena mo bogosing jwa legodimo. 
Matthew19:24 Ke bile ke lo raya ke re: Go ka nna bofefo kamela go tsena ka letshofa la lomao, bogolo go mohumi go tsena mo bogosing jwa Modimo.”" 
Matthew19:25 Ya re barutwa ba utlwa, ba gakgamala thata, ba re: “Fa e le jalo go a bo go ka bolokwa mang?”" 
Matthew19:26 Mme Jesu a ba leba, a ba raya a re: “Mo bathong golo mo, go retetse; mme mo Modimong dilo tsotlhe di ka dirafala.”" 
Matthew19:27 Foo Petere a mo fetola a re: “Bona, rona re tlogetse gotlhe, mme re go setse morago; mme ka re, rona re a bo re tlaa bona eng?”" 
Matthew19:28 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya ka re: Lona ba lo ntshetseng morago, e tlaa re mo Bošafatsong jwa dilo tsotlhe, fa Morwa Motho a dula mo setulong sa gagwe sa bogosi sa kgalalelo, le lona lo tlaa dula mo ditulong tsa bogosi di le 12, lo atlhola ditso tse 12 tsa Iseraele." 
Matthew19:29 Mme mongwe le mongwe yo o tlogetseng matlo, le fa e le bomorwa rraagwe, le fa e le bokgaitsadie, le fa e le rraagwe, le fa e le mmaagwe, (le fa e le mosadi,) le fa e le bana, le fa e le masimo, ka ntlha ya leina la me, o tlaa amogela galekgolo, mme o tlaa rua botshelo jo bo sa khutleng." 
Matthew19:30 Ba le bantsi ba tlaa nna ba morago, ba e neng e le ba pele; mme ba e neng e le ba pele, ba tlaa nna ba morago." 
Matthew20:1 “Gonne bogosi jwa legodimo bo tshwana le motho yo o leng mong wa ntlo, yo o phaketseng a ya go thapela tshimo ya gagwe ya mafine badiri ka tuelo." 
Matthew20:2 Ya re a sena go dumalana le badiri fa a tlaa ba naya thušeleng ka letsatsi, a ba isa mo tshimong ya gagwe ya mafine." 
Matthew20:3 O tlogile a tswa, e ka ne e le ka nako ya boraro, mme a fitlhela ba bangwe ba eme mo patlelong ya borekelo, ba sa dire sepe." 
Matthew20:4 Le bone a ba raya a re: ‘Le lona yang mo tshimong ya mafine, mme se se siameng ke tlaa se lo naya.’ Mme ba ya." 
Matthew20:5 A ba a tswa gape, e ka ne e le ka nako ya borataro, le ka ya bofera o le mongwe, a dira fela jalo." 
Matthew20:6 E rile e ka ne e le ka nako ya 11 a tswa, a fitlhela ba bangwe ba eme fela; mme a ba raya a re: ‘Lo emetseng fano motshegare otlhe lo sa dire sepe?’" 
Matthew20:7 Ba mo raya ba re: ‘Ke ka gobo re sa thapiwa ke ope.’ A ba raya a re: ‘Le lona yang mo tshimong ya mafine.’ 
Matthew20:8 “Ya re go tsena maitseboa, morena wa tshimo a raya molebedi wa gagwe a re: ‘Bitsa badiri, o ba neye maduo a bone; o simolole ka ba morago go ya kwa go ba pele.’" 
Matthew20:9 Mme ya re go tla bone ba nako e e ka neng e le ya 11, mongwe le mongwe a amogela thušeleng." 
Matthew20:10 Ya re ba pele ba tla ba itlhoma ba tlaa amogela bogolo; mme le bone mongwe le mongwe a amogela thušeleng fela jalo. 
Matthew20:11 Mme ba re ba a amogela ba ngongoregela mong wa ntlo," 
Matthew20:12 ba re: ‘Ba ba morago ba dirile ka nako e le nngwe fela, mme o ba lekantse le rona, ba re itshoketseng letsapa la motshegare le mogote o o fisang.’" 
Matthew20:13 “Mme a fetola mongwe wa bone a re: ‘Tsala, ga ke go siamololele; a ga o a dumalana le nna ka thušeleng?" 
Matthew20:14 Tsaya se e leng sa gago o tsamaye; go rata ga me ke go naya yo wa morago fela jaaka le wena ke go neile. 
Matthew20:15 A ga ke na tshiamo ya go dira ka selo sa me ka fa ke ratang ka teng? Kgotsa a leitlho la gago le ntilotse, ka gobo nna ke molemo?’" 
Matthew20:16 “Jalo ba morago ba tlaa nna ba pele, le ba pele ba nne ba morago.”" 
Matthew20:17 Ya re Jesu a tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema, a tseela barutwa ba ba 12 kwa thoko, mme ba le mo tseleng a ba raya a re:" 
Matthew20:18 “Bonang, re tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema; mme Morwa Motho o tlaa neelwa baperesiti ba bagolo le bakwadi; mme ba tlaa atlhola gore a swe;" 
Matthew20:19 ba tlaa mo neela Baditšhaba go sotlwa, le go seolwa, le go bapolwa; mme e tlaa re ka letsatsi la boraro o tlaa tsosiwa.”" 
Matthew20:20 Foo ga tla kwa go ene mma bomorwa Sebete, a na le bomorwawe, a mo obamela, a mo lopa selo sengwe." 
Matthew20:21 Mme Jesu a mo raya a re: “O eletsa eng?” A mo raya a re: “Laola gore bomorwaake ba babedi ba, ba dule, mongwe ka fa tsogong la gago le legolo, yo mongwe ka fa go la molema, mo bogosing jwa gago.”" 
Matthew20:22 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Ga lo itse se lo se lopang. A lo nonofile go nwa senwelo se ke tlogang ke se nwa?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Re nonofile.” 
Matthew20:23 A ba raya a re: “Senwelo sa me ruri lo tlaa se nwa; mme go dula ka fa tsogong la me le legolo, le ka fa tsogong la me la molema, ga se ga me go go aba, mme ke ga bone ba ba go baakanyeditsweng ke Rre.”" 
Matthew20:24 Ya re ba ba some ba utlwa, ba gakalela bakaulengwe bao." 
Matthew20:25 Mme Jesu a ba ipiletsa a re: “Lo a itse fa balaodi ba Baditšhaba ba le bogoma mo go bone, le bagolo ba bone ba gagamatsa taolo mo go bone." 
Matthew20:26 Ga go ketla go nna jalo mo go lona; mme le fa e le mang yo o ratang go tla a nna mogolo mo go lona, a a nne modiredi wa lona;" 
Matthew20:27 le gone le fa e le mang yo o ratang go nna wa pele mo go lona, a a nne motlhanka wa lona;" 
Matthew20:28 fela jaaka Morwa Motho a ne a sa tla go direlwa, mme e le go direla, le go ntsha botshelo jwa gagwe go nna thekololo ya batho ba le bantsi.”" 
Matthew20:29 E rile ba tswa mo Jeriko, bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho jwa mo sala morago." 
Matthew20:30 Mme banna ba le babedi ba ba foufetseng ba bo ba dutse fa tseleng, mme ba re ba utlwa fa Jesu a feta, mme ba goa ba re: “Morena Morwa Dafite, re utlwele botlhoko!”" 
Matthew20:31 Mme batho ba bantsi ba ba kgalemela, ba re ba didimale; mme ba goa bogolo ba re: “Re utlwele botlhoko, Morwa Dafite!”" 
Matthew20:32 Mme Jesu a ema, a ba bitsa a re: “Lo rata ka lo direla eng?”" 
Matthew20:33 Ba mo raya ba re: “Morena, ra re: ‘A matlho a rona a foufololwe.’ ”" 
Matthew20:34 Mme Jesu, ka a tlhomoga pelo, a ama matlho a bone, mme ba akofa ba bona, mme ba mo sala morago." 
Matthew21:1 E rile ba atamela Jerusalema, ba fitlha kwa Bethefage, fa Thoteng ya Lotlhware; foo Jesu a roma barutwa ba le babedi," 
Matthew21:2 a ba raya a re: “Yang mo motsaneng o lo lebaganyeng nao, mme lo tlaa akofa lo fitlhela esela e golegilwe, e na le eselana ya yone; di gololeng, lo tle natso kwano go nna." 
Matthew21:3 Mme fa mongwe a bua sengwe le lona, lo re: ‘Morena o a di batla;’ mme o tlaa akofa a di lesa.”" 
Matthew21:4 Jaana golo mo, go dirilwe, gore go dirafale se se kileng sa buiwa ke moperofeti a re:" 
Matthew21:5 “Bolelelang Morwadia Sione, lo re: ‘Bona, Kgosi ya gago e tla kwa go wena, e le pelonolo, e pagame esela, le eselana, ngwana wa esela.’ ”" 
Matthew21:6 Barutwa ba ya ba dira fela jaaka Jesu a ba laotse. 
Matthew21:7 Ba lere esela le eselana, ba baya diaparo tsa bone mo go tsone; mme a nna mo go tsone." 
Matthew21:8 Bogolo jwa bontsi jwa batho jwa ala diaparo tsa jone mo tseleng; ba bangwe ba kgaola dikala tsa ditlhare, ba di ala mo tseleng." 
Matthew21:9 Batho ba bantsi ba ba mo eteletseng pele, le ba ba mo setseng morago, ba duduetsa, ba re: “Hosana, Morwa Dafite; go bakwe yo o tlang ka leina la Morena; Hosana mo bogodimodimong.”" 
Matthew21:10 E rile a sena go fitlha mo Jerusalema, motse otlhe wa fuduega wa re: “Yo e a bo e le mang?”" 
Matthew21:11 Mme matshutitshuti a batho a re: “Yo ke ene moperofeti, Jesu yo o tswang kwa Nasaretha wa Galilea.”" 
Matthew21:12 Mme Jesu a tsena mo tempeleng ya Modimo, mme a leleka botlhe ba ba rekisang le ba ba rekang mo tempeleng, a pitikolola dimati tsa ba ba ananyang madi, le ditulo tsa ba ba rekisang maphoi." 
Matthew21:13 A ba raya a re: “Go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘Ntlo ya me e tlaa bidiwa Ntlo ya thapelelo’; mme lona lo e ntshitse mongobo wa dinokwane.” 
Matthew21:14 Difofu le ba ba tlhotsang ba tla kwa go ene mo tempeleng; mme a ba fodisa. 
Matthew21:15 Mme ya re baperesiti ba bagolo le bakwadi ba bona dilo tse di gakgamatsang tse o di dirang, le banyana ba duduetsa ba re: “Hosana, Morwa Dafite,” ba šakgala." 
Matthew21:16 Ba mo raya ba re: “A o a utlwa se ba se buang ba?” Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ee, a ga lo ise lo ke lo bale fa go reng: ‘O lekantse pako ka a a tswang melomong ya banyana, le ba ba anyang?’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 Mme a ba tlogela, a tswa mo motseng a tswela kwa Bethania, mme a lala teng." 
Matthew21:18 Jaana ya re go le ka moso, fa a boela kwa motseng, a tshwarwa ke tlala." 
Matthew21:19 Mme ya re a bona setlhare sa mofeige se le fa tseleng se le sosi, a ya kwa go sone, mme a se ka a fitlhela sepe mo go sone, fa e se matlhare fela; mme a se raya a re: “A go se tlhole go bonwa loungo mo go wena, go tloga fano go ya bosakhutleng.” Ka bonako fela setlhare sa mofeige sa omelelela ruri." 
Matthew21:20 Ya re barutwa ba bona, ba gakgamala ba re: “Kana setlhare sa mofeige se omeleletse ruri ka bonako jang?”" 
Matthew21:21 Mme Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Fa lo na le tumelo, lo sa belaele, lo tlaa dira, e seng mo go diretsweng setlhare se sa mofeige go le gosi, mme le fa lo ka raya thaba e, lwa re: ‘Manologa, o thabuegele mo lewatleng!’ Go tlaa dirala." 
Matthew21:22 Le gone dilo tsotlhe tse lo di lopang mo thapelong, ka go dumela, lo tlaa di amogela.”" 
Matthew21:23 E rile a sena go tsena mo tempeleng, baperesiti ba bagolo le bagolwane ba tla kwa go ene ka a ruta, ba re: “Ana dilo tse, o di dira ka taolo efe? E mang yo o go neileng taolo e?”" 
Matthew21:24 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Le nna ke tlaa lo botsa lefoko lengwe, le e tlaa reng fa lo ka le mpolelela, le nna ke lo bolelele taolo e ke dirang dilo tse ka yone." 
Matthew21:25 Ana kolobetso ya ga Johane e ne e tswa kae? A e ne e tswa legodimong kgotsa mo bathong?” Mme ba tseisanya kgang, ba re: “E tlaa re fa re re: ‘E tswa legodimong,’ a re reye a re: ‘Lo ne lo sa mo dumeleleng?’" 
Matthew21:26 Fa re re: ‘E tswa mo bathong,’ re bo re boifa batho; gonne botlhe ba kaya Johane fa e le moperofeti.”" 
Matthew21:27 Mme ba fetola Jesu, ba re: “Ga re itse.” Le ene a ba raya a re: “Le nna ga ke lo bolelele taolo e ke dirang dilo tse ka yone." 
Matthew21:28 “Lo gopolang? Monna mongwe o ne a na le bomorwawe ba le babedi. Mme a tla mo go wa ntlha a re: ‘Morwaaka, ya o dire mo tshimong ya me ya mafine gompieno.’" 
Matthew21:29 Mme a mo fetola a re: ‘Ke a gana;’ mme morago a ikwatlhaya, a ya." 
Matthew21:30 Mme a tla mo go wa bobedi, a bua jalo. Ene a fetola a re: ‘Ke a ya morena;’ mme a se ka a ya." 
Matthew21:31 Ke ofe wa babedi yo o dirileng go rata ga rraagwe?” Ba re: “Wa ntlha.” Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, Bakgethisi le diaka ba a lo feta, ba tsena pele ga lona mo bogosing jwa legodimo." 
Matthew21:32 Gonne Johane o ne a tla kwa go lona ka tsela ya tshiamo; mme ga lo a ka lwa mo dumela; mme bakgethisi le diaka bone ba mo dumela; mme lona ga e a ka ya re lo bona, le fa e le go sala lo ikwatlhaya morago, gore lo mo dumele, ga lo a ka lwa go dira." 
Matthew21:33 “Utlwang setshwantsho se sengwe: Go kile ga ne go le mong wa ntlo, a tlhomile tshimo ya mafine, a e agelela ka logora, a epa bogatelo jwa bojalwa jwa mofine mo go yone, a aga sefata sa baleti, mme tshimo a e neela badira masimo ba ba e thapang ka tuelo; mme a etela kwa lefatsheng le sele." 
Matthew21:34 E rile motlha wa maungo o atamela, a roma batlhanka ba gagwe kwa go bone badira masimo, gore ba ye go tsaya maungo a gagwe." 
Matthew21:35 Mme badira masimo ba tshwara batlhanka ba gagwe, ba betsa mongwe, ba bolaya yo mongwe, yo mongwe ba mo kgobotletsa ka maje." 
Matthew21:36 A ba a tloga a roma batlhanka ba bangwe ba le bantsi bogolo go ba pele; le bone ba ba direla fela jalo. 
Matthew21:37 Kwa morago a roma morwawe kwa go bone a re: ‘Ba tlaa sisimoga morwaake.’ 
Matthew21:38 Ya re badira masimo ba bona morwawe, ba raana ba re: ‘Yo, ke moruaboswa; ntlong, re mmolayeng, re gape boswa jwa gagwe.’" 
Matthew21:39 Mme ba mo tshwara, ba mo latlhela kwa ntle ga tshimo ya mafine, ba mmolaya." 
Matthew21:40 “Ke gone e tlaa reng morena wa tshimo ya mafine a tla, o tlaa ba dirang badira masimo bao?”" 
Matthew21:41 Ba mo raya ba re: “Batho bao ba ba se nang pelo, o tlaa ba senya ka botlhokapelo, mme o tlaa neela ba sele tshimo ya gagwe, ba ba tlaa mo nayang maungo mo metlheng ya one.”" 
Matthew21:42 Jesu a ba raya a re: “A go lo ise lo ke lo bale mo dikwalong, fa go tweng: “ ‘Lentswe le baagi ba le ganneng, e bile ke lone le le dirilweng lentswe la kgokgotsho. Golo mo go dirilwe ke Morena, mme go a gakgamatsa mo matlhong a rona’?" 
Matthew21:43 “Ke gone ke lo raya ke re: Bogosi jwa Modimo lo tlaa bo tlosediwa, bo tlaa newa morafe o o tla ntshang maungo a lona." 
Matthew21:44 Yo o welang mo lentsweng le, o tlaa thubaganngwa; mme yo le mo welang, le tlaa mo phatlalatsa jaaka lorole.”" 
Matthew21:45 Ya re baperesiti le Bafarisai ba utlwa ditshwantsho tsa gagwe ba lemoga fa a bua ka ga bone. 
Matthew21:46 Mme ya re ba leka go mo tshwara, ba boifa batho, gonne ba mo kaya fa e le moperofeti." 
Matthew22:1 Jesu a ba fetola, a fela a bua nabo gape ka ditshwantsho, a re:" 
Matthew22:2 “Bogosi jwa legodimo bo tshwantshiwa le kgosi nngwe e e kileng ya direla morwa yone modiro wa nyalo. 
Matthew22:3 Ya roma batlhanka ba yone go bitsa ba ba kileng ba lalelediwa modiro wa nyalo, mme ba nna ba gana go ya." 
Matthew22:4 Gape a roma batlhanka ba bangwe a re: ‘Rayang ba ba laleditsweng lo re: Bonang, ke baakantse modiro wa me; dipholo tsa me le tse di nonneng di tlhabilwe, dilo tsotlhe di baakantswe; tlang modirong wa nyalo.’" 
Matthew22:5 Ba tlhokomologa, ba itsamaela fela, mongwe a ya morakeng wa gagwe, yo mongwe papading ya gagwe." 
Matthew22:6 Ba ba setseng ba tshwara batlhanka ba yone, ba ba diraka mo go tlhabisang ditlhong, ba ba bolaya." 
Matthew22:7 Mme kgosi ya nna bogale; ya tloga ya bolotsa dintwa tsa yone, ya senya babolai, ya fisa motse wa bone." 
Matthew22:8 Foo ya raya batlhanka ba yone ya re: ‘Nyalo yone e baakantswe, mme ba ba neng ba e laleleditswe ba ne ba sa tshwanela." 
Matthew22:9 Ke gone yang kwa marakanelong a ditsela, mme botlhe ba lo tlaa ba fitlhelang, lo ba reye lo re ba tle modirong wa nyalo.’" 
Matthew22:10 Batlhanka bao ba tswela kwa ditseleng, ba phutha botlhe ba ba ba fitlhelang, ba ba bosula le ba ba molemo; mme ba ba laleditsweng ba tlala ka ntlo ya modiro." 
Matthew22:11 “E rile kgosi e tsena e tla go bona balalediwa, ya bona motho teng yo o sa aparang seaparo sa nyalo." 
Matthew22:12 Mme ya mo raya ya re: ‘Tsala, o tsenye jang fano o se na seaparo sa nyalo?’ Mme a tlhoka se o se buang." 
Matthew22:13 Foo kgosi ya raya batlhanka ya re: ‘Mmofeng mabogo le maoto lo mo latlhele kwa ntle, kwa lefifing le le kwa ntlentle; go tlaa nna selelo le phuranyo ya meno gone.’" 
Matthew22:14 “Gonne ba ba biditsweng ba bantsi, mme ba ba itshenketweng ba babotlana.”" 
Matthew22:15 Foo ga tla Bafarisai, ba gakololana ka fa ba ka mo tshwarang mo puong ya gagwe ka teng." 
Matthew22:16 Ba roma kwa go ene barutwa ba bone ba na le Baherote ba re: “Moruti, re a itse fa o le boammaaruri, o ruta batho tsela ya Modimo ka boammaaruri, o sa tlhokomele ope; gonne ga o re bomangmang jwa ga ope sepe." 
Matthew22:17 Ke gone re bolelele gore o gopola eng? A go siame go kgethela Kaesare, kgotsa nnyaa?”" 
Matthew22:18 Jesu a lemoga bolotsana jwa bone a re: “Lo ntalelelang, baitimokanyi ke lona?" 
Matthew22:19 Ntshupetsang ledi la lekgetho.” Ba lere thušeleng kwa go ene. 
Matthew22:20 Mme a ba raya a re: “Setshwantsho se, le sekwalo se, ke tsa ga mang?”" 
Matthew22:21 Ba mo raya ba re: “Tsa ga Kaesare.” Foo a ba raya a re: “Ke gone ntshetsang Kaesare dilo tse e leng tsa ga Kaesare; lo bo lo ntshetse Modimo tse e leng tsa Modimo.” 
Matthew22:22 Ya re ba utlwa jalo ba gakgamala, ba mo tlogela, ba tsamaya." 
Matthew22:23 Ya re ka tsatsi leo fela ga tla kwa go ene Basadukai, ba ba reng ga go na tsogo ya baswi. Ba mmotsa," 
Matthew22:24 ba re: “Moruti, Moše o rile, fa motho a swa, a se na bana, a morwa rraagwe a nyale mosadi wa gagwe, a tsosetse morwa rraagwe losika." 
Matthew22:25 Jaana go kile ga ne go le banna basupa mo go rona, e le bana ba monna, mme wa ntlha a nyala, a ba a swa; ka a se na ngwana a tlogelela monnawe mosadi wa gagwe." 
Matthew22:26 Ga nna fela jalo le wa bobedi, le wa boraro, go ya kwa go wa bosupa." 
Matthew22:27 Morago ga bone botlhe mosadi le ene a swa. 
Matthew22:28 Mme e tlaa re mo go tsogeng ga baswi, o tlaa nna mosadi wa ga mang mo go bone boo basupa, gonne ba ne ba nna nae botlhe fela?”" 
Matthew22:29 Mme Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Lo a timela ka lo sa itse dikwalo, le fa e le nonofo ya Modimo," 
Matthew22:30 gonne e tlaa re mo go tsogeng ga baswi ba bo ba sa nyale, le fa e le go neelwa nyalo, mme ba bo ba ntse jaaka baengele kwa legodimong." 
Matthew22:31 Ka ga go tsoga ga baswi, a ga lo ise lo bale se se kileng sa buiwa le lona ke Modimo, wa re:" 
Matthew22:32 ‘Ke nna Modimo wa ga Aberahame, Modimo wa ga Isake, Modimo wa ga Jakobe?’ Modimo ga se Modimo wa baswi, fa e se wa batshedi fela.”" 
Matthew22:33 Mme ya re matshutitshuti a batho a utlwa, a gakgamadiwa ke thuto ya gagwe." 
Matthew22:34 Bafarisai ba re ba utlwa fa a tlhokisitse Basadukai puo, ba phuthega mmogo." 
Matthew22:35 Mongwe wa bone, e le mophutholodi wa molao, a mmotsa ka go mo lalela," 
Matthew22:36 a re: “Moruti, taolo e kgolo mo molaong ke efe?”" 
Matthew22:37 Mme a mo raya a re: “ ‘O rate Morena Modimo wa gago ka pelo yotlhe ya gago, le ka mowa otlhe wa gago, le ka tlhaloganyo yotlhe ya gago.’" 
Matthew22:38 E ke yone taolo e kgolo le ya ntlha. 
Matthew22:39 E nngwe ya bobedi e e tshwanang nayo ke e: ‘O rate wa gaeno jaaka o ithata.’ 
Matthew22:40 Mo ditaolong tse pedi tse, go tshegeletswe molao otlhe le baperofeti mo go tsone.”" 
Matthew22:41 Jaana e rile Bafarisai ba sa ntse ba phuthegile, Jesu a ba botsa," 
Matthew22:42 a re: “Lo gopola eng ka ga Keresete! Ke morwa mang?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Ke morwa Dafite.” 
Matthew22:43 A ba raya a re: “Fa e le jalo, Dafite o bua ka Mowa a mmitsa Morena jang? A re:" 
Matthew22:44 “ ‘Morena o ne a raya Morena wa me a re: Dula ka fa letsogong la me le legolo, go tle go tsamaye ke beye baba ba gago tlase ga dinao tsa gago.’" 
Matthew22:45 “Fa e bo ne ne Dafite a mmitsa Morena, o ntse morwawe jang?”" 
Matthew22:46 Mme ga bo go se ope yo o nonofileng go mo fetola ka lefoko lepe; le gone e sa le ka letsatsi leo ba tshaba go tlhola ba mmotsa dipotso dipe. 
Matthew23:1 Foo Jesu a bua le matshutitshuti a batho, le barutwa ba gagwe," 
Matthew23:2 a re: “Bakwadi le Bafarisai ba dutse mo setulong sa ga Moše. 
Matthew23:3 Ke gone tsotlhe tse ba di lo rayang, lo di dire, lo di tlhokomele; mme lo se ka lwa dira ka fa ditirong tsa bone; gonne ba tle ba bue, mme ba se ke ba dire." 
Matthew23:4 Ee, ba tle ba bofe merwalo e e bokete, e e botlhoko go rwalwa, mme ba e beye mo magetleng a batho; mme bone ka bosi ga ba ke ba e tshikinya, le fa e le ka monwana wa bone." 
Matthew23:5 Ditiro tsotlhe tsa bone ba di dira gore di bonwe ke batho, ba atlhamolose difelaketere tsa bone, ba golole makantsa a diaparo tsa bone." 
Matthew23:6 Ba rate bonno jo bo kwa pele mo medirong, le ditulo tse di kwa pele mo matlong a thuto;" 
Matthew23:7 le ditumediso mo marekelong, le go bidiwa ke batho, ba re: ‘Rabi.’" 
Matthew23:8 Mme lona, lo se ka lwa bidiwa Rabi, gonne Moruti wa lona o mongwe fela, mme lona lotlhe lo bomorwa Rraalona." 
Matthew23:9 Lo se ka lwa bitsa ope rraeno mo lefatsheng; gonne Rraeno o mongwe fela yo o kwa legodimong. 
Matthew23:10 Le gone lo se ka lwa bidiwa Beng, gonne Mong wa lona o mongwe fela, e bong Keresete." 
Matthew23:11 Yo o leng mogolo bogolo mo go lona o tlaa nna modiredi wa lona. 
Matthew23:12 Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa ikgodisang, o tlaa ngotlafadiwa; mme yo o ingotlafatsang o tlaa godisiwa." 
Matthew23:13 “A bo go latlhega lona bakwadi le Bafarisai, baitimokanyi! Gonne lo tswaletse batho bogosi jwa legodimo; gonne, lona ga lo tsene, le ba ba reng ba a tsena, ga lo ba letlelele go tsena." 
Matthew23:14 A bo go latlhega lona bakwadi le Bafarisai, baitimokanyi! Lo suputsa matlo a batlholagadi, mme ya re lo ntse lo dira jalo lo golole merapelo e le seipato fela. Ke gone lo tlaa bonang tshekiso e kgolo bogolo." 
Matthew23:15 “A bo go latlhega lona bakwadi le Bafarisai, baitimokanyi! Gonne lo dikologa lewatle le lefatshe, gore lo tle lo ikgapele motho a le mongwe fela wa tšhaba; mme e re a sena go fetolwa jalo, lo mo ntshe ngwana wa molete wa molelo, yo o bileng a gaisa lona sebedi." 
Matthew23:16 “A bo go latlhega lona bagogi ba lo foufetseng, ba lo reng: ‘Le fa e le mang yo o ikanang ka tempele ga se sepe; mme le fa e le mang yo o ikanang ka gouta ya tempele, o golegilwe ke go ikana ga gagwe.’" 
Matthew23:17 Masilo le difofu ke lona; se segolo ke eng? A gouta, kgotsa tempele, e e leng yone e e itshepisitseng gouta?" 
Matthew23:18 Gape, lo a tle lo re: ‘Le fa e le mang yo o ikanang ka sebeso o a bo a se molato; mme le fa e le mang yo o ikanang ka tshupelo e e mo go sone o golegilwe ke go ikana ga gagwe.’" 
Matthew23:19 Difofu ke lona; se segolo ke eng? A tshupelo, kgotsa sebeso se se itshepisang tshupelo?" 
Matthew23:20 Ke gone yo o ikanang ka sebeso, o ikana ka sone, le ka dilo tsotlhe tse di mo go sone." 
Matthew23:21 Le yo o ikanang ka tempele, o ikana ka yone le ka one o o agileng mo go yone." 
Matthew23:22 Le yo o ikanang ka legodimo, o ikana ka setulo sa Modimo sa bogosi, le ka one o o dutseng mo go sone." 
Matthew23:23 “A bo go latlhega lona bakwadi le Bafarisai, baitimokanyi! Lo tle lo kgethe sa bosome sa ditlhatshana tsa rothwe le thoma le mosukujwane, mme lo tlogetse dilo tsa molao tse di boima bogolo di sa dirwa, e bong tshiamiso le kutlwelobotlhoko, le boikanngo; tse lo ne lo tshwanetse go di dira, le tse dingwe lo sa di lese di sa dirwa." 
Matthew23:24 Bagogi ba ba foufetseng ke lona, lo tlhotlha lo ntsha montsana, mme kamela lo e metse fela." 
Matthew23:25 “A bo go latlhega lona bakwadi le Bafarisai, baitimokanyi! Gonne lo a tle lo tlhatswe bokafantle jwa senwelo le sejana, mme mo teng go bo go tletse tse di tswang patikong le tlhapelong." 
Matthew23:26 Mofarisai wa sefofu ke wena, tlhatswa pele bokafateng jwa senwelo le sejana, gore bokafantle jwa sone le jone bo nne bontle." 
Matthew23:27 “A bo go latlhega lona bakwadi le Bafarisai, baitimokanyi! Gonne lo tshwana le diphupu tse di sweufaditsweng, tse di bonalang di le dintle ka fa ntle, mme mo teng di tletse marapo a baswi, le boitshekologo jotlhe fela." 
Matthew23:28 Fela jalo le lona, ka fa ntle lo bonala mo bathong jaaka e ketse lo siame, mme mo teng lo bo lo tletse boitimokanyo, le boikepo." 
Matthew23:29 “A bo go latlhega lona bakwadi le Bafarisai, baitimokanyi! Gonne lo aga diphupu tsa baperofeti, lo kgabisa difikantswe tsa basiami," 
Matthew23:30 mme lo re: ‘Fa re ka bo re ne re le teng mo metlheng ya borraetsho, re ka bo re se ka ra dumalana nabo mo go bolayeng baperofeti.’" 
Matthew23:31 Jalo lo bo lo itshupa fa lo le bana ba batho ba ba bolaileng baperofeti. 
Matthew23:32 Ke gone tlaleletsang borraeno seelo sa molato wa bone! 
Matthew23:33 Dinoga ke lona, le lotsalo lwa dišaušawane, lo tlaa falola jang mo tshekisong ya molete?" 
Matthew23:34 Ke gone bonang, ke roma baperofeti, le babotlhale le bakwadi, kwa go lona. Bangwe ba bone lo tlaa ba bolaya lo ba bapola; bangwe ba bone lo tlaa ba seola mo matlong a lona a thuto, lo ba bogisa go tswa motseng go ya motseng o mongwe," 
Matthew23:35 gore go wele mo go lona molato otlhe wa madi a basiami a a tsholotsweng mo lefatsheng, go simolola ka madi a ga Abele mosiami, go tla mading a ga Sakaria morwa Barakia, yo lo mmolaetseng fa gare ga felo ga boitshepo le sebeso." 
Matthew23:36 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Dilo tsotlhe tse di tlaa wela losika lo. 
Matthew23:37 “Jerusalema we! Jerusalema we! Yo o bolayang baperofeti, a kgobotletse ba ba romilweng kwa go ene! Ke ratile gantsintsi jang go phutha bana ba gago, fela jaaka koko e tle e phuthe mamphorwana a yone mo diphukeng tsa yone, mme lo ganne!" 
Matthew23:38 Bonang, ntlo ya lona lo e tlogeletswe e ropefetse fela." 
Matthew23:39 Gonne ke a lo raya: Ga lo ketla lo tlhola lo mpona, go tle go tsamaye lo re: ‘A go bakwe ene yo o tlang mo leineng la Morena.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Jesu a tswa mo tempeleng, mme a re o itsamaela fela; barutwa ba gagwe ba tla kwa go ene, go mo supetsa dikago tsa tempele." 
Matthew24:2 Mme a ba fetola a re: “A ga lo bone dilo tsotlhe tse? Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Ga go ketla go lesiwa lentswe lepe fa, le tlhatlhaganye le le lengwe, le le se ketlang le digwa.”" 
Matthew24:3 Mme e rile a dutse mo Thoteng ya Lotlhware, barutwa ba gagwe ba ya kwa go ene kwa thoko, ba re: “Re bolelele gore dilo tse di tlaa dirafala leng? Sesupo e tlaa nna eng sa go tla ga gago, le sa bokhutlo jwa lefatshe?”" 
Matthew24:4 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Lo itise gore ope a se ka a lo timetsa. 
Matthew24:5 Gonne batho ba le bantsi ba tlaa tla ka leina la me ba re: ‘Ke nna Keresete;’ mme ba tlaa timetsa batho ba le bantsi. 
Matthew24:6 Mme lo tlaa utlwela dintwa, le medumo ya dintwa; lo bone gore lo se ka lwa kgoberega, gonne dilo tse di na le go dirafala; mme e bo e ise e nne bokhutlo." 
Matthew24:7 Gonne morafe o tlaa tsogologela morafe, le bogosi bo tsogologele bogosi; go tlaa nna meswele, le dithoromo tsa lefatshe mo mafelong mangwe le mangwe." 
Matthew24:8 Dilo tsotlhe tse, ke tshimologo ya botlhoko jwa pelega." 
Matthew24:9 “Ke gone ba tlaa lo tsenyang mo dipitlaganong, ba lo bolaya, mme lo tlaa ilwa ke merafe yotlhe, ka ntlha ya leina la me." 
Matthew24:10 Foo ba le bantsi ba tlaa kgopiwa, ba tlaa okana ba ilana." 
Matthew24:11 Baperofeti ba le bantsi ba e seng bone ba tlaa tsoga, mme ba tlaa timetsa batho ba le bantsi." 
Matthew24:12 E tlaa re ka boikepo bo tlaa bo bo ntsifetse, lorato lwa bontsi bogolo lo tlaa tsidifala." 
Matthew24:13 Mme yo o itshokelang bokhutlong, ene yoo o tlaa bolokwa." 
Matthew24:14 Mafoko a a Molemo a, a bogosi, a tlaa rerwa mo lefatsheng lotlhe, go nna tshupo mo merafeng yotlhe; foo ke gone bokhutlo bo tlaa tlang." 
Matthew24:15 “Ke gone e tlaa reng lo bona se se makgapha a a swafatsang, se se boletsweng ke moperofeti Daniele, se eme mo felong ga boitshepo, a yo o balang a tlhaloganye." 
Matthew24:16 Foo ba ba mo Jutea ba tshabele kwa dithabeng; 
Matthew24:17 yo o mo godimo ga ntlo, a a se fologele go ntsha dilwana tse di mo ntlong ya gagwe." 
Matthew24:18 Le ene yo o kwa mosimo, a se ka a boela go tsaya kobo ya gagwe." 
Matthew24:19 A bo go tlaa bo go latlhega ba ba imana, le ba ba amusang mo metlheng eo!" 
Matthew24:20 Mme lo rapele gore tshabo ya lona e se ka ya nna mariga, le fa e le ka letsatsi la Sabata;" 
Matthew24:21 gonne go tlaa nna sepitla se segolo mo metlheng eo, se se iseng se ke se nne, e sa le ka tshimologo ya lefatshe go tla nakong eno; nnyaa, le gone go se ketla go tlhola go nna jalo gope." 
Matthew24:22 Mme fa e ka bo metlha eo e se ka ya khutshwafadiwa, e ka bo ne ne fano motho ope a se nka a bolokwa; mme e tlaa re ka ntlha ya baitshenkedwi metlha eo e tlaa khutshwafadiwa." 
Matthew24:23 “Foo e tlaa re fa mongwe a lo raya a re: ‘Bonang, Keresete ke yo, kgotsa, ke yole,’ lo se ka lwa dumela." 
Matthew24:24 Gonne go tlaa tsoga boKeresete ba e seng bone, le baperofeti ba e seng bone, mme ba tlaa bonatsa ditshupo tse dikgolo, le dikgakgamatso; gore fa go ka nna jalo, ba timetse le ba e leng baitshenkedwi ka bosi." 
Matthew24:25 Bonang, ke lo boletletse go sa le gale." 
Matthew24:26 “Ke gone fa ba lo raya ba re: ‘Bonang, o kwa nageng,’ lo se ka lwa tswa. Fa ba re: ‘Bonang, o mo matlwaneng a a kwa teng,’ lo se ka lwa dumela." 
Matthew24:27 Gonne jaaka logadima lo tle lo gadime kwa botlhabatsatsi, mme lo bonale fela le kwa bophirimatsatsi; go tla ga Morwa Motho go tlaa nna fela jalo." 
Matthew24:28 “Gongwe le gongwe kwa setoto se leng teng, manong a tle a phuthegele teng." 
Matthew24:29 “Mme gautshwane, morago ga sepitla sa metlha eo, letsatsi le tlaa fifala, kgwedi le yone ga e ketla e ntsha lesedi la yone, dinaledi di tlaa wa kwa legodimong, le dinonofo tsa magodimo di tlaa reketlisiwa." 
Matthew24:30 Ke gone go tlaa bonalang sesupo sa Morwa Motho kwa legodimong. Foo ditšhaba tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tlaa hutsafala, mme di tlaa bona Morwa Motho a tla ka maru a legodimo, ka nonofo le ka kgalalelo e kgolo." 
Matthew24:31 O tlaa roma baengele ba gagwe ka tumo e kgolo ya lonaka, mme ba tlaa phutha baitshenkedwi ba gagwe kwa diphefong tsoo nne, go tswa sekhutlong sengwe sa legodimo go ya go se sengwe." 
Matthew24:32 “Jaana ithuteng ka setlhare sa mofeige setshwantsho sa sone: E re fa kala ya sone e setse e le nana, e kukunya makakaba, lo bo lo itse fa selemo se atametse." 
Matthew24:33 Le lona fela jalo, e tlaa re lo bona dilo tsotlhe tse, lo bo lo itse fa a le gaufi, a le fela fa mejakong." 
Matthew24:34 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Losika lo ga lo ketla lo feta go tle go tsamaye dilo tsotlhe tse di dirafale pele. 
Matthew24:35 Legodimo le tlaa feta le lefatshe, mme mafoko a me ga a ketla a feta." 
Matthew24:36 “Ka ga letsatsi leo le nako eo, ga go itse ope, le fa e le baengele ba legodimo, le fa e le morwa, fa e se Rara a le esi fela." 
Matthew24:37 Jaaka metlha ya ga Noa e ne e ntse, go tla ga Morwa Motho go tlaa nna fela jalo." 
Matthew24:38 Gonne jaaka go ne ga nna mo metlheng eo ya pele ga morwalela, ba ne ba ja, ba nwa, ba nyala, ba newa nyalong, go tla go fitlha mo tsatsing le Noa o tsenyeng mo ntlong e e kokobalang ka lone." 
Matthew24:39 Ba sa itse, morwalela wa ba wa tla wa ba tlosa botlhe; go tla ga Morwa Motho le gone go tlaa nna fela jalo." 
Matthew24:40 Foo banna ba le babedi ba tlaa bo ba le mo nageng; mongwe o tlaa tsewa, yo mongwe a tlogelwe;" 
Matthew24:41 basadi ba le babedi ba tlaa bo ba sila; mongwe o tlaa tsewa, yo mongwe a tlogelwe." 
Matthew24:42 “Ke gone disang, gonne ga lo itse letsatsi le Morena wa lona o tlaa tlang ka lone." 
Matthew24:43 Mme mo lo a go itse gore fa mong wa ntlo a ka bo a itsile nako ya bosigo e legodu le tlaa tlang ka yone, o ka bo a disitse, mme o ka bo a se ka a leseletsa ntlo ya gagwe ya phunngwa." 
Matthew24:44 Ke gone, le lona nnang fela lo iketleeditse, gonne Morwa Motho o tlaa tla ka nako e lo sa mo solofeleng ka yone." 
Matthew24:45 “Ana, motlhanka yo o boikanngo le yo o botlhale e a bo e le mang, yo morena wa gagwe o mo tlhomileng go laola ba ntlo ya gagwe, go ba abela dijo ka dipaka tse e leng tsone?" 
Matthew24:46 Go sego motlhanka yo e tlaa reng morena wa gagwe a tla a mo fitlhele a ntse a dira jalo. 
Matthew24:47 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, o tlaa mo tlhoma molaodi wa dilo tsotlhe tse o nang natso." 
Matthew24:48 Mme e tlaa re fa motlhanka yoo, yo o busula, a ka ithaya mo pelong ya gagwe a re: ‘Morena wa me o diegile;’" 
Matthew24:49 mme a simolola go betsa batlhanka ka ene, mme a ja, a nwa le matagwa," 
Matthew24:50 morena wa motlhanka yo o tlaa tla ka letsatsi le o sa mo lebeleleng ka lone, le ka nako e o sa e itseng." 
Matthew24:51 Mme o tlaa mo seola mo gogolo, a ba a mo laolela bonno le baitimokanyi; go tlaa nna selelo le khuranyo ya meno teng." 
Matthew25:1 “Foo bogosi jwa legodimo bo tlaa tshwantshiwa le makgarebane a a lesome, a a kileng a tsaya dipone tsa one, a tswa a ya go kgatlhantsha monyadi." 
Matthew25:2 A matlhano a one a bo a le dieleele, mme a matlhano a le botlhale." 
Matthew25:3 Gonne a a dieleele, e rile a tsaya dipone tsa one, a se ka a tsaya le lookwane." 
Matthew25:4 Mme a a botlhale, e rile a tsaya dipone tsa one, a ba a tsaya lookwane ka digwana tsa one." 
Matthew25:5 Jaana ya re monyadi a sa ntse a diegile, makgarebane a otsela otlhe, a robala." 
Matthew25:6 “Mme ya re bosigogare ga kuiwa ga twe: ‘Bonang, monyadi ke yo! Tswang lo ye go mo kgatlhantsha.’" 
Matthew25:7 Foo makgarebane ao a tsoga otlhe, a baakanya dipone tsa one." 
Matthew25:8 Mme a a dieleele a raya a a botlhale a re: ‘Re tsheleleng lookwane lwa lona, gonne dipone tsa rona di a tima.’" 
Matthew25:9 Mme a a botlhale a ba fetola a re: ‘Go ka tla ga se ka ga lekana rona le lona; bogolo yang kwa go ba ba rekisang, lo ithekele.’" 
Matthew25:10 Mme ya re a sa ntse a ile go reka, monyadi a tla; mme a a iketleeditseng a tsena nae mo modirong wa nyalo; mme mojako wa tswalwa." 
Matthew25:11 “Morago ga tla makgarebane a mangwe a re: ‘Morena, Morena, re bulele.’" 
Matthew25:12 Mme a ba fetola a re: ‘Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, ga ke lo itse.’" 
Matthew25:13 “Ke gone disang, gonne ga lo itse letsatsi le fa e le nako!" 
Matthew25:14 “Gonne go tshwana jaaka monna yo e rileng a etela kwa lefatsheng le sele, a bitsa batlhanka ba gagwe, a ba neela dilo tsa gagwe." 
Matthew25:15 Mongwe a mo neela ditalente di le tlhano, yo mongwe di le pedi, yo mongwe e le nngwe fela; mongwe le mongwe a neelwa ka fa nonofong ya gagwe; mme a itse go tloga a ya loetong lwa gagwe." 
Matthew25:16 Ka bonako fela yo o amogetseng ditalente tse tlhano a ya a bapala ka tsone, mme a bona ditalente tse dingwe di le tlhano." 
Matthew25:17 Le yo o amogetseng di le pedi fela jalo, a ya a bona tse dingwe di le pedi." 
Matthew25:18 Mme yo o amogetseng e le nngwe fela, a ya a e epela mo mmung, a fitlha madi a morena wa gagwe." 
Matthew25:19 “Jaana ya re morago go sena go feta lobaka lo loleele, morena wa batlhanka bao a tla, mme a gopola melato nabo e o e ba neetseng." 
Matthew25:20 Yo o ne a amogetse ditalente tse tlhano a tla a bile a tshotse ditalente tse dingwe di le tlhano, a re: ‘Morena, o ne o nneetse ditalente di le tlhano, bona, ke bile ke bapetse ditalente tse dingwe tse tlhano.’" 
Matthew25:21 Morena wa gagwe a mo raya a re: ‘O dirile sentle, motlhanka yo o molemo le boikanngo; o ntse o le boikanngo mo dilong tse dipotlana, ke tlaa go laodisa dilo di le dintsi; tsena mo boitumelong jwa morena wa gago.’" 
Matthew25:22 “Le ene yo o ne a amogetse ditalente tse pedi, a tla a re: ‘Morena, o ne o nneetse ditalente di le pedi; bona, ke bile ke bapetse ditalente tse dingwe di le pedi.’" 
Matthew25:23 Morena wa gagwe a mo raya a re: ‘O dirile sentle motlhanka yo o molemo le boikanngo; o ntse o le boikanngo mo dilong tse dipotlana; ke tlaa go laodisa dilo di le dintsi; tsena mo boitumelong jwa morena wa gago.’ 
Matthew25:24 “Le yo o ne a amogetse e le nngwe fela, a tla a re: ‘Morena, ke go itsile fa o le monna yo o pelo e thata, ka o tle o robe kwa o se kang wa jala teng, o bo o sele kwa o se kang wa gasa gone;" 
Matthew25:25 mme ka boifa, ka ya ka fitlha talente ya gago mo mmung; bona, o na le se e leng sa gago ke se.’" 
Matthew25:26 “Mme morena wa gagwe a mo fetola a re: ‘Motlhanka yo o bosula le botshwakga ke wena, o itsile fa ke tle ke robe kwa ke se kang ka jala teng, ke be ke sele kwa ke se kang ka gasa teng;" 
Matthew25:27 ke gone o ne o tshwanetse go isa madi a me kwa baatising ba one; e ne e tlaa re ke tla, ke fitlhele a oketsegile." 
Matthew25:28 Ke gone mo tseeleng talente eo, lo e neye yo o nang le ditalente tse some." 
Matthew25:29 Gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o nang le sengwe o tlaa newa, mme o tlaa nna le letlotlo; mme yo o se nang sepe, le se o nang naso o tlaa se tseelwa." 
Matthew25:30 Motlhanka yo o se nang molemo, lo mo kgoromeletse kwa lefifing le le kwa ntlentle: go tlaa nna selelo le phuranyo ya meno teng.’" 
Matthew25:31 “E tlaa re Morwa Motho a tla ka kgalalelo ya gagwe, a na le baengele botlhe, foo o tlaa dula mo setulong sa gagwe sa bogosi sa kgalalelo." 
Matthew25:32 Merafe yotlhe e tlaa phuthelwa fa pele ga gagwe. Mme o tlaa ba kgaoganya, bangwe mo go ba bangwe, jaaka modisa a tle a kgaoganye dinku le dipodi;" 
Matthew25:33 dinku o tlaa di baya ka fa letsogong le legolo, mme dipodi ka fa go la molema." 
Matthew25:34 Foo Kgosi e tlaa raya ba ba ka fa tsogong la yone le legolo, e re: ‘Tlang, lona basegofadiwa ba ga Rre, ruang bogosi jo lo bo baakanyeditsweng e sa le ka tlholego ya lefatshe." 
Matthew25:35 Gonne ke ne ka tshwarwa ke tlala, lwa mpha dijo; ka nyorwa, lwa nnosa; ka nna moeng, mme lwa ntshola;" 
Matthew25:36 ke ne ke sa apara, lwa nkapesa; ka lwala, lwa ntekola; ka nna mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, mme lwa tla kwa go nna.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Foo basiami ba tlaa mo fetola ba re: ‘Ana Morena re kile ra go bona leng o tshwerwe ke tlala, mme ra go jesa, kgotsa o nyorilwe, ra go nosa?" 
Matthew25:38 Re go bonye leng o le moeng ra go tshola, gongwe o sa apara ra go apesa?" 
Matthew25:39 Re go bonye leng o lwala, kgotsa o le mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, mme ra ya kwa go wena?’" 
Matthew25:40 Mme kgosi e tlaa ba fetola e ba raya e re: ‘Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: E re ka lo go diretse mongwe wa bonnake ba babotlana ba, lo go diretse nna.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Foo e tlaa raya le bone ba ba ka fa letsogong la yone la molema e re: ‘Tlogang fa go nna, bahutsegi ke lona, lo yeng molelong o o sa khutleng, o o baakanyeditsweng diabolo le baengele ba gagwe." 
Matthew25:42 Gonne ke ne ka tshwarwa ke tlala, mme ga lo a ka lwa mpha dijo; ka nyorwa, mme lwa se ka lwa nnosa;" 
Matthew25:43 ka nna moeng, mme lwa se ka lwa ntshola; ke sa apara, mme lwa se ka lwa nkapesa; ka lwala, ka ba ka nna mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, mme ga lo a ka lwa ntirela.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Foo le bone ba tlaa mo fetola ba re: ‘Morena re kile ra go bona leng o tshwerwe ke tlala, kgotsa lenyora, kgotsa o le moeng, kgotsa o sa apara, kgotsa o lwala, kgotsa o le mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, mme ra se ka ra go direla?’" 
Matthew25:45 Foo o tlaa ba fetola a re: ‘Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, e re ka lo se ka lwa go direla mongwe wa ba babotlana ba, le nna ga lo a ka lwa go ntirela.’" 
Matthew25:46 Mme bao ba tlaa ya mo petsong e e sa khutleng; mme basiami ba tlaa ya mo botshelong jo bo sa khutleng.” 
Matthew26:1 Ga dirala, e rile Jesu a sena go wetsa dithuto tsotlhe tse, a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re:" 
Matthew26:2 “Lo a itse fa e tlaa re malatsi a le mabedi a sena go feta, go bo go tla modiro wa Tlolaganyo; mme Morwa Motho o tlaa bo a neelwa go bapolwa.”" 
Matthew26:3 Foo ditlhogo tsa baperesiti, le bagolwane ba batho, ba phuthegela kwa kgotleng ya moperesiti yo mogolo, yo o ne a bidiwa Kaiafase;" 
Matthew26:4 mme ba gakololana mmogo gore ba tshware Jesu ka maano, ba mmolaye." 
Matthew26:5 Mme ba re: “E seng go le modiro, go ka tla ga tsoga pheretlhego mo bathong.”" 
Matthew26:6 Jaana e rile Jesu a le mo Bethania, mo ntlong ya ga Simone wa molepero," 
Matthew26:7 ga tla mosadi kwa go ene, a tshotse sedibelwana sa alebasetara, se na le setlolo se se thata bobe go rekwa, mme a se thela mo tlhogong ya gagwe, ka a dutse a ja." 
Matthew26:8 E rile barutwa ba bona jalo, ba gakatsega ba re: “Ana tshenyo e ke ya go reng?" 
Matthew26:9 Gonne setlolo se, se ka bo se ne se rekisitswe, sa bona madi a le mantsi, mme a newa bahumanegi.”" 
Matthew26:10 Jesu ka a ba lemoga, a ba raya a re: “Ana lo tshwenyetsang mosadi? Gonne o dirile tiro e e molemo mo go nna." 
Matthew26:11 Gonne bahumanegi lo na nabo ka metlha yotlhe; mme nna ga ke nne le lona ka metlha yotlhe. 
Matthew26:12 Gonne o rile ka a gorometsa setlolo se mo mmeleng wa me, a bo a dira jalo go mpaakanyetsa phitlho." 
Matthew26:13 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Gongwe le gongwe mo lefatsheng lotlhe fela, kwa Mafoko a, a a Molemo, a tlaa rerwang teng, le sone se mosadi yo o se dirileng se tlaa bolelwa teng, gore e nne segopodiso ka ga gagwe.”" 
Matthew26:14 Foo mongwe wa ba ba 12, yo o bidiwang Jutase Isekariote, a ya ditlhogong tsa baperesiti," 
Matthew26:15 a re: “Lo tlaa nnaya eng, ke tle ke mo lo neele?” Mme ba mo lekanyetsa dipapetlana tsa selefera di le 30." 
Matthew26:16 Go tswa fa lobakeng loo a senka ka fa o ka mo ba neelang ka teng. 
Matthew26:17 Jaana e rile ka letsatsi la ntlha la senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang, barutwa ba tla kwa go Jesu ba re: “O rata ra ya go go baakanyetsa kae, gore o jele Tlolaganyo teng?”" 
Matthew26:18 Mme a re: “Yang kwa motseng, kwa go molebe, lo mo reye lo re: ‘Moruti a re: Lobaka lwa me lo setse lo atametse; ke tlaa jela Tlolaganyo kwa ntlong ya gago le barutwa ba me.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Barutwa ba dira jaaka Jesu a ba kaetse; mme ba baakanya Tlolaganyo. 
Matthew26:20 Jaana ya re go le ka maabanyane a bo a dutse a ja le barutwa ba ba 12. 
Matthew26:21 Mme ya re ba ja, a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya: Mongwe wa lona o tlaa nkoka.”" 
Matthew26:22 Mme ba hutsafala thata, ba simolola go mo raya mongwe le mongwe ba re: “A ke nna, Morena?”" 
Matthew26:23 A ba fetola a re: “Yo o tsenyang seatla sa gagwe mo sejaneng le nna, ke ene yo o tlaa nkokang." 
Matthew26:24 Morwa Motho o tsamaya fela jaaka go kwadilwe ka ga gagwe; mme go bo go latlhega monna yo Morwa Motho o okwang ke ene! Go ka bo go le molemo mo monneng yoo fa a ka bo a se ka a tsalwa.” 
Matthew26:25 Mme Jutase yo o mo okang, a mo fetola a re: “A ke nna, Moruti?” A mo raya a re: “O boletse.”" 
Matthew26:26 Ya re ba sa ja, Jesu a tsaya senkgwe, a se segofatsa, a se ngathoganya; a se naya barutwa a re: “Tsayang lo je; se ke mmele wa me.”" 
Matthew26:27 Mme a tsaya senwelo, a leboga, a se ba naya a re: “Nwang lotlhe ga sone;" 
Matthew26:28 gonne se ke madi a me a kgolagano e ntšha, a a tshololelwang ba le bantsi go tla ba itshwarelwa dibe." 
Matthew26:29 Ke a lo raya: Ga nketla ke tlhola ke nwa loungo lo lwa mofine, go tle go tsamaye go fitlhe letsatsi le ke tlaa lo nwang lo le loša le lona ka lone, mo bogosing jwa ga Rre.”" 
Matthew26:30 E rile ba sena go opela sefela, ba tswa ba ya kwa Thoteng ya Lotlhware." 
Matthew26:31 Foo Jesu a ba raya a re: “Lona lotlhe lo tlaa kgotšwa ka ga me sigong jono; gonne go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘Ke tlaa itaya modisa, mme dinku tsa letsomane di tlaa falalediwa koo.’" 
Matthew26:32 Mme e tlaa re ke sena go tsosiwa, ke tlaa lo etelelela pele kwa Galilea.”" 
Matthew26:33 Petere a fetola a re: “Le fa botlhe ba ka kgotšwa ka ga gago, nna ga nketla ke kgotšwa gope.”" 
Matthew26:34 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke a go raya ka re: Sigong jono fela, koko e tona e ise e lele, o tlaa bo o intatotse gararo.”" 
Matthew26:35 Petere a mo raya a re: “Le fa nka bo ke na le go swa nao, le fa go ntse jalo ga nketla ke go itatola.” Le barutwa botlhe ba bua fela jalo." 
Matthew26:36 Foo Jesu a tla nabo kwa felong fa go tweng Gethesemane, mme a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Lona lo dule fa, ka nna ke ya fale, ke ya go rapela.”" 
Matthew26:37 Mme a tsaya Petere le bomorwa Sebete boo babedi a ya nabo, mme a simolola go hutsafala le go huduega mo go botlhoko." 
Matthew26:38 Foo a ba raya a re: “Mowa wa me o hutsafetse thata, e le mo go isang losong fela; nnang fa, lo lebelele le nna.”" 
Matthew26:39 Mme a ya fa pelenyana, a wela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe, a rapela a re: “Rra we, fa go ka nna jalo, a senwelo se, se mphete, le fa go ntse jalo, e seng ka fa go rateng ga me, e leng ka fa go rateng ga gago.”" 
Matthew26:40 A tla barutweng, a ba fitlhela ba robetse, mme a raya Petere, a re: “Ao! A lo ne lo sa ka ke lwa lebelela le nna ka lobakanyana fela?" 
Matthew26:41 Lebelelang, lo rapele, gore lo se tsene mo thaelong; mowa one o tlhaga, mme nama e bokoa.”" 
Matthew26:42 Gape a tsamaya lwa bobedi, a rapela, a re: “Rra we, fa senwelo se, se sa ka ke sa feta fa ke sa se nwe, a go rata ga gago go dirafale.”" 
Matthew26:43 A ba a tla gape a ba fitlhela ba robetse, gonne matlho a bone a ne a bokaletse." 
Matthew26:44 Mme a ba tlogela gape, a tsamaya, a rapela lwa boraro, a fela a ntse a bua mafoko ao fela." 
Matthew26:45 Foo a tla barutweng, a ba raya a re: “Lo nne lo robale jaanong, lo ikhutse; bonang, nako e atametse, Morwa Motho o oketswe mo diatleng tsa baleofi." 
Matthew26:46 Tsogang re tsamayeng; bonang, yo o nkokang o gaufi.”" 
Matthew26:47 Ya re a sa ntse a bua, bonang Jutase, mongwe wa ba ba 12, a tla, a na le bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho ba tshotse ditšhaka le melamu, ba tswa ditlhogong tsa baperesiti le bagolwane ba batho." 
Matthew26:48 Jaana mooki o ne a ba neile sekao sa go re: “Le fa e le mang yo ke tlaa mo atlang, ke ene, lo tshwareng ene.”" 
Matthew26:49 Mme a siamela kwa go Jesu a re: “Dumela, Moruti,” mme a mo atla." 
Matthew26:50 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Tsala, dira se o tsileng go se dira.” Foo ba tla, ba tsenya Jesu diatla, ba mo tshwara." 
Matthew26:51 Mme bonang, mongwe wa ba ba nang le Jesu, a ntsha letsogo la gagwe, a somola tšhaka, a rema motlhanka wa moperesiti ya mogolo, a mo kgaola tsebe." 
Matthew26:52 Foo Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ba o somele tšhaka ya gago mo bonnong jwa yone; gonne botlhe ba ba tsayang tšhaka ba tlaa nyelela ka tšhaka. 
Matthew26:53 Kgotsa a o a itlhoma, ke sa ka ke ka rapela Rre, mme e re fela jaana a rome bogolo go mephato e le 12 ya baengele go nthusa?" 
Matthew26:54 Foo dikwalo di ne di tlaa dirala jang, ka di re: Go tshwanetse ga nna jaana?”" 
Matthew26:55 Ya re ka lobaka loo Jesu a raya matshutitshuti a batho a re: “A lo tsile jaaka e kete lo tshologetse senokwane ka ditšhaka le melamu go ntshwara? Ke ntse ka nna ka dula ka malatsi otlhe mo tempeleng, ke ruta, lo se ka lwa ntshwara." 
Matthew26:56 Gotlhe mo go dirafetse gore dikwalo tsa baperofeti di dirale.” Foo barutwa botlhe ba mo tlogela, ba tshaba." 
Matthew26:57 Ba ba tshwereng Jesu ba mo gogela kwa goo rra Kaiafase, moperesiti yo mogolo, kwa bakwadi le bagolwane ba phuthegetseng teng." 
Matthew26:58 Mme Petere a mo latela a saletse kgakala, a ya kwa kgotleng ya moperesiti yo mogolo, a tsena, a dula le maotlana, gore a bone bokhutlo." 
Matthew26:59 Jaana ditlhogo tsa baperesiti, le lekgotla lotlhe, ba batla tshupo ya kako ka ga Jesu, gore ba mmolaye." 
Matthew26:60 Mme ba se ka ba e bona, le fa go ne go tsile bapateletsi ba le bantsi. Kwa morago ga tla ba le babedi," 
Matthew26:61 ba re: “Monna yo, o rile: ‘Ke nonofile go senya tempele ya Modimo, le go ba ke e aga ka malatsi a le mararo.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Mme moperesiti yo mogolo a ema, a mo raya a re: “A ga o fetole ka sepe? Ke eng se bao ba supang ka ga gago?”" 
Matthew26:63 Mme a nna a didimala fela. Moperesiti yo mogolo a mo raya a re: “Ke a go ikanisa ka Modimo o o tshedileng, ka re: O re bolelele gore a o ene Keresete, Morwa Modimo?”" 
Matthew26:64 Jesu a mo raya a re: “O boletse; le fa go ntse jalo ke a lo raya, kwa pele lo tlaa bona Morwa Motho a dutse ka fa letsogong le legolo la nonofo, mme a tla ka maru a legodimo.”" 
Matthew26:65 Foo moperesiti a ikgagola diaparo a re: “O buile tlhapatso; re sa ntse re dirang ka basupi? Bonang, jaanong lo utlwile go tlhapatsa ga gagwe; lo gopola jang?”" 
Matthew26:66 Ba mo fetola ka go re: “O tshwanetse go swa.” 
Matthew26:67 Foo ba mo kgwela mathe mo sefatlhogong, ba mo tlhanya; ba bangwe ba mo phaila ka diatla ba re:" 
Matthew26:68 “Re perofesetse Keresete ke wena, o batotswe e mang?”" 
Matthew26:69 Jaana Petere a bo a dutse ka fa ntle mo lolwapeng; mme lelata la ya kwa go ene, la re: “Le wena o ne o na le Jesu wa Mogalilea.”" 
Matthew26:70 Mme a itatola fa pele ga bone botlhe a re: “Ga ke itse se o se buang.” 
Matthew26:71 E rile a tswetse kwa kgorwaneng, lelata le lengwe la mmona, la raya ba ba teng, la re: “Monna yo le ene, o ne a na le Jesu wa Monasara.”" 
Matthew26:72 Mme gape a itatola ka ikano a re: “Ga ke mo itse, monna yoo.”" 
Matthew26:73 Ya re kgantele ba ba emeng teng ba tla ba raya Petere ba re: “Ruri o mongwe wa bone le wena; gonne loleme lwa gago lo a go supa.” 
Matthew26:74 Foo a simolola go rogaka le go ikana a re: “Ga ke mo itse monna yoo.” Mme koko e tona ya tloga ya lela. 
Matthew26:75 Mme Petere a gakologelwa lefoko le Jesu o le buileng a re: “E tlaa re koko e tona e ise e lele, o tlaa bo o intatotse gararo.” Mme a tswela kwa ntle, a lela mo go botlhoko." 
Matthew27:1 Jaana e rile bosa bo sele, ditlhogo tsotlhe tsa baperesiti le bagolwane ba batho, ba gakololana ka ga Jesu, go mmolaya." 
Matthew27:2 Mme ba mo golega, ba mo tsaya, ba ya go mo neela Pilato molaodi." 
Matthew27:3 Foo Jutase yo o mo okileng, o rile a bona fa Jesu a sekisitswe, a ikwatlhaya, a busetsa dipapetlana tsa selefera tse di 30 kwa ditlhogong tsa baperesiti le bagolwane." 
Matthew27:4 A re: “Ke leofile, ka ke okile motho yo o se nang molato.” Mme bone ba re: “Ana moo re go dirang? Moo ke dibonwa ke wena.”" 
Matthew27:5 Mme a piriganyetsa dipapetlana tsa selefera fa fatshe mo felong ga boitshepo, a tsamaya; a ya a ipeta." 
Matthew27:6 Ditlhogo tsa baperesiti tsa tsaya dipapetlana tsa selefera, ba re: “Ga go a siama go di tsenya mo letloleng la dikhumo la tempele, ka e le tlhwatlhwa ya madi a motho.”" 
Matthew27:7 Ba gakololana, ba reka ka tsone sebata sa lefatshe sa mmopi wa dipitsa, go fitlha baeng mo go lone." 
Matthew27:8 Ke gone sebata sa lefatshe seo sa bidiwa ga twe: “Lefatshe la madi a motho”, nako e sa le eno." 
Matthew27:9 Foo ga dirala se se kileng sa buiwa ke moperofeti Jeremia, fa a re: “Ba tsaya dipapetlana tsa selefera tse di 30, e le tlhwatlhwa ya yo o sekasekilweng; yo bangwe ba bana ba Iseraele ba mo sekaseketseng tlhwatlhwa." 
Matthew27:10 Ba di ntshetsa sebata sa lefatshe sa mmopi wa dipitsa, jaaka Morena a nketetse.”" 
Matthew27:11 Jaana Jesu a ema fa pele ga molaodi; mme molaodi a mmotsa a re: “A o Kgosi ya Bajuta?” Mme a re: “Ke nna yone.” 
Matthew27:12 Ya re a newa molato ke ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bagolwane, a se ka a fetola ka lepe." 
Matthew27:13 Foo Pilato a mo raya a re: “A ga o utlwe dilo tse dintsi tse ba di supang ka ga gago?” 
Matthew27:14 A se ka a mo fetola ka lepe, le fa e le ka lefoko le le lengwe fela; molaodi a ba a tla a gakgamala thata." 
Matthew27:15 Jaana e ne e tle e re ka lobaka lwa modiro, molaodi a tle a gololele batho mogolegwi mongwe yo ba mo ratang." 
Matthew27:16 Ya re lobaka loo ba bo ba na le mogolegwi yo o tumileng, go twe, Barabase." 
Matthew27:17 Ke gone e rileng ba phuthegile, Pilato a ba raya a re: “Lo rata ka lo gololela mang? Barabase kgotsa Jesu yo go tweng Keresete?”" 
Matthew27:18 Gonne o ne a itse fa ba mo neetse tshekong ka kilo. 
Matthew27:19 Ya re Pilato a sa ntse a le mo sennong sa tshekelo, mosadi wa gagwe a roma kwa go ene a re: “O se ka wa dira sepe ka monna yo o siameng yoo, gonne ke bogile dilo di le dintsi gompieno mo torong ka ntlha ya gagwe.”" 
Matthew27:20 Jaana ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bagolwane ba bo ba tlhotlheletsa matshutitshuti a batho gore ba lope Barabase, mme ba bolaye Jesu." 
Matthew27:21 Molaodi a ba fetola a re: “Lo rata ka lo gololela ofe mo bobeding jo?” Ba re: “Barabase.” 
Matthew27:22 Pilato a ba raya a re: “Mme foo, Jesu yo o bidiwang Keresete ke tlaa mo reng?” Botlhe fela ba re: “A a bapolwe.”" 
Matthew27:23 A re: “Ka ntlha yang? O dirile bosula bofe?” Ba tshelela lošalaba godimo thata ba re: “A a bapolwe.” 
Matthew27:24 Jalo e rile Pilato a bona fa a sa fenye sepe, mme bogolo go bile go tsoga pheretlhego, a tsaya metsi, a tlhapa diatla fa pele ga batho ba bantsi, a re: “Ga ke na molato mo mading a monna yo o siameng yo; a go bone lona koo.”" 
Matthew27:25 Batho botlhe ba fetola ba re: “Madi a gagwe a a nne mo go rona, le mo baneng ba rona.”" 
Matthew27:26 Foo a ba gololela Barabase; mme Jesu ene a mo seola, a ba a mo neela go bapolwa." 
Matthew27:27 Foo batlhabani ba molaodi ba isa Jesu kwa kgotleng ya molaodi, ba phuthela mophato otlhe kwa go ene." 
Matthew27:28 Ba mo swatola diaparo, ba mo apesa kobo e khibidu." 
Matthew27:29 Ba loga serwalo sa mitlwa, ba se mo rwesa mo tlhogong, ba tsenya lotlhaka mo seatleng sa gagwe se se siameng; ba khubama fa pele ga gagwe, ba mo sotla ba re: “Dumela Kgosi ya Bajuta!”" 
Matthew27:30 Ba mo kgwela mathe, ba tsaya lotlhaka, ba mo gatla mo tlhogong." 
Matthew27:31 Ya re ba sena go mo sotla, ba mo apola kobo, ba mo apesa diaparo tsa gagwe, ba mo gogela koo, ba ya go mmapola." 
Matthew27:32 Ya re ba tswela kwa ntle, ba fitlhela monna mongwe wa Kurene, go twe Simone; mme ene ba mo patikela go tsamaya nabo, gore a sikare mokgoro wa gagwe." 
Matthew27:33 E rile ba sena go fitlha felong fa go tweng Golegotha, ke go re, “Felo ga logata”," 
Matthew27:34 ba re ba mo nosa bojalwa jwa mofine jo bo tlhakantsweng le santlhokwe; ya re a sena go bo leka ka legano a gana go bo nwa. 
Matthew27:35 E rile ba sena go mmapola, ba kgaogana diaparo tsa gagwe ba di laola ka bola." 
Matthew27:36 Ba dula, ba mo lebelela teng." 
Matthew27:37 Fa godimo ga tlhogo ya gagwe ba pega lokwalo lo lo supang molato wa gagwe, lwa re: “YO, KE KGOSI YA BAJUTA”." 
Matthew27:38 Foo ga bapolwa nae dinokwane di le pedi, sengwe ka fa letsogong la gagwe le legolo, se sengwe ka fa go la molema." 
Matthew27:39 Mme ba ba fetang ba mo kgala, ba tshikinya ditlhogo tsa bone," 
Matthew27:40 ba re: “Wena yo o senyang tempele, o ba o e aga ka malatsi a le mararo, ipoloke; fa o le Morwa Modimo, fologa mo mokgorong.”" 
Matthew27:41 Ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bone, ba na le bakwadi le bagolwane, ba mo sotla fela jalo, ba re:" 
Matthew27:42 “O ntse a nna a boloka ba bangwe; o retelelwa ke go ipoloka ka esi. Ke ene Kgosi ya Iseraele; a a ke a fologe jaana mo mokgorong, mme re tlaa mo dumela." 
Matthew27:43 O ikantse Modimo; a o ko o mo golole jaanong, fa o mo eletsa, ka a rile: ‘Ke Morwa Modimo.’ ”" 
Matthew27:44 Dinokwane le tsone tse di bapotsweng nae, tsa latlhela dikgobo tse di ntseng jalo mo go ene." 
Matthew27:45 Jaana go tswa nakong ya motshegare o mogolo go ya nakong ya boraro maitseboa, lefifi la khurumetsa lefatshe lotlhe." 
Matthew27:46 Ya re e ka ne e le ka nako ya boraro maitseboa, Jesu a goa ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Eli, Eli, lama sabakathani?” Ke go re: “Modimo wa me, Modimo wa me, o ntatlhetseng?”" 
Matthew27:47 Bangwe ba ba emeng teng ya re ba utlwa, ba re: “Monna yo, o bitsa Elija.”" 
Matthew27:48 Mongwe wa bone a akofa a siana a tsaya ngami, a e ina mo bojalweng jo bo botšarara, a e tlhomela ka lotlhaka, a re o a mo nosa." 
Matthew27:49 Ba bangwe ba re: “Lesa; re bone gore a Elija o tlaa tla go mo golola.” 
Matthew27:50 Mme Jesu a ba a goa gape ka lentswe le legolo, mme a neela mowa." 
Matthew27:51 Mme bonang, sesiro sa tempele sa gagoga ka bogare, go simolola kwa godimo go ya kwa tlase; le lefatshe la roroma; le mafika a phatloga;" 
Matthew27:52 le diphupu tsa atlhamologa; le mebele e le mentsi ya baitshepi ba ba neng ba robetse ya tsosiwa. 
Matthew27:53 Ba tswa mo diphupung morago ga go tsoga ga gagwe, ba tsena mo motseng o o boitshepo, ba bonwa ke batho ba le bantsi." 
Matthew27:54 Mme jaana, molaodi wa mophato le ba o lebeletseng Jesu nabo, ba re ba bona thoromo ya lefatshe, le dilo tse di dirafetseng, ba boifa thata, ba re: “Ruri yo e ne e le Morwa Modimo.”" 
Matthew27:55 Le basadi ba le bantsi ba bo ba le teng ba lebile ba le kgakala, e le ba ba setseng Jesu morago ba mo direla, ba tswa Galilea." 
Matthew27:56 Mo go bone ga bo go le Maria Magetalene, le Maria mma boJakobe le Josese, le mma bomorwa Sebete." 
Matthew27:57 E rile go le maitseboa ga tla monna mongwe wa mohumi, yo go tweng, Josefe wa Arimathea, yo le ene ka esi e ne e le morutwa wa ga Jesu." 
Matthew27:58 Monna yo, a ya kwa go Pilato, a lopa setoto sa ga Jesu. Mme Pilato a laola gore a se neelwe." 
Matthew27:59 Josefe a tsaya setoto a se phuthela ka letsela le lentle la leloba," 
Matthew27:60 a se baya mo phupung e e leng ya gagwe e ntšha, e o ne a e gabile mo lefikeng; mme a pitikela lentswe le legolo mo molomong wa phupu, a tsamaya." 
Matthew27:61 Maria Magetalene a bo a le teng, le Maria yo mongwe, ba dutse go lebagana le phupu." 
Matthew27:62 Jaana ya re ka moso, e le letsatsi le le rulaganang le letsatsi la Iketleetso, ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le Bafarisai ba phuthegela kwa go Pilato," 
Matthew27:63 ba re: “Morena, re gakologetswe fa e rile leferefere leo le sa ntse le tshedile, la re: ‘Morago ga malatsi a le mararo ke tlaa ba ke tsoga.’" 
Matthew27:64 Ke gone laola gore phupu e disiwe thata, go ya go fitlha mo letsatsing la boraro, e ka tla ya re gongwe barutwa ba gagwe ba ya go mo utswa, mme ba raya batho ba re: ‘O tsogile mo losong;’ mme timetso ya tla ya bifa bogolo go ya ntlha.”" 
Matthew27:65 Pilato a ba raya a re: “Lo na le lekoko la badisa, tsamayang lo ye go disa ka fa lo itseng ka teng.”" 
Matthew27:66 Jalo ba tsamaya, ba ya go disa phupu, ba kana lentswe, le lekoko la badisa ba bo ba na nabo." 
Matthew28:1 Jaana e rile letsatsi la Sabata le setse le fetile, bosigo boo sa jwa letsatsi la ntlha la beke, ga tla Maria Magetalene le Maria yo mongwe, ba tla go bona phupu." 
Matthew28:2 Mme bonang, ga nna thoromo e kgolo ya lefatshe; gonne moengele wa Morena a fologa kwa legodimong, a tla a pitikololela lentswe kwa thoko, mme a dula mo go lone." 
Matthew28:3 Ponalo ya gagwe ya bo e ntse jaaka logadima, diaparo tsa gagwe di le ditshweu jaaka kapoko." 
Matthew28:4 Mme balebedi ya re ka ba mmoifa, ba roroma thata, ba ba ba nna jaaka ba ba suleng." 
Matthew28:5 Mme moengele a bua, a raya basadi a re: “Lo se boifeng; gonne ke a itse fa lo batla Jesu yo o ne a bapotswe." 
Matthew28:6 Ga a yo fa; gonne o tsogile, fela jaaka a ne a bua. Tlang lo bone felo fa Morena o ne a letse teng." 
Matthew28:7 Mme lo itlhaganele, lo ye go raya barutwa ba gagwe lo re: ‘O tsogile mo baswing; mme bonang, o lo etelela pele kwa Galilea; lo tlaa mmona teng;’ lo bo lo bone, ke lo boleletse.”" 
Matthew28:8 Ba itlhaganela ba tswa fa phupung ka poifo le ka boitumelo jo bogolo, ba siana ba ya go itsise barutwa ba gagwe." 
Matthew28:9 Mme bonang, Jesu a kgatlhana nabo, a re: “Dumelang.” Mme ba tla ba tshwara dinao tsa gagwe, ba mo obamela." 
Matthew28:10 Foo Jesu a ba raya a re: “Se boifeng; yang go raya bana ba ga Rre, lo re, ba ye Galilea mme ba tlaa mpona teng.”" 
Matthew28:11 Mme jaana, ya re ba sa ntse ba tsamaya, bonang, bangwe ba lekoko la badisa ba ya mo motseng, ba bolelela ditlhogo tsa baperesiti dilo tsotlhe tse di dirafetseng." 
Matthew28:12 Mme e rile ba sena go phuthega le bagolwane, ba gakololanye, ba naya batlhabani madi a le mantsi thata," 
Matthew28:13 ba re: “Lo tle lo re: ‘Barutwa ba gagwe ba tsile bosigo ba mo utswa re robetse.’ 
Matthew28:14 E tlaa re fa selo se se ka fitlha mo ditsebeng tsa molaodi, ene re tlaa mo kgona, le lona re lo sireletse.”" 
Matthew28:15 Jalo ba amogela madi, ba dira jaaka ba rutilwe; mme polelo e, ya tumisiwa mo Bajuteng, le gompieno e sa ntse e le teng." 
Matthew28:16 Barutwa ba ba 11 ba tloga ba ya kwa Galilea, kwa thabeng e Jesu o e ba kaetseng." 
Matthew28:17 Mme e rile ba mmona, ba mo obamela; bangwe ba belaela." 
Matthew28:18 Mme Jesu a tla kwa go bone, a bua nabo a re: “Taolo yotlhe ke e neilwe kwa legodimong le mo lefatsheng." 
Matthew28:19 Ke gone tsamayang, lo dire merafe yotlhe barutwa, lo ba kolobetse mo ineng la Rara, le la Morwa, le la Morwa o o Boitshepo." 
Matthew28:20 Lo ba rute go tlhokomela dilo tsotlhe tse ke di lo laoletseng; mme bonang, ke bo ke ntse ke na le lona ka metlha yotlhe, go ya bokhutlong jwa metlha.”" 
Mark1:1 Tshimologo ya Mafoko a a Molemo a ga Jesu Keresete, Morwa Modimo." 
Mark1:2 Fela jaaka go kwadilwe mo go Isaia moperofeti ga twe: “Bonang, ke roma morongwa wa me fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gago, yo o tlaa baakanyang tsela ya gago." 
Mark1:3 Lentswe la mongwe yo o kuang mo nageng, a re: ‘Baakanyang mmila wa Morena, Siamisang ditsela tsa gagwe!’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Johane a tla, ene yo o neng a kolobetsa kwa nageng, a ba a rera kolobetso ya boikwatlhao jwa go itshwarela dibe." 
Mark1:5 Mme ga tshologela kwa go ene ba lefatshe lotlhe la Jutea, le botlhe ba Jerusalema; ba kolobediwa ke ene mo nokeng ya Joretane, ba ipolela dibe tsa bone." 
Mark1:6 Mme Johane, diaparo tsa gagwe e ne e le tsa boboa jwa kamela, a bile a itlamile ka moitlamo wa letlalo mo lothekeng lwa gagwe, mme a ja tsie le dinotshe tsa naga." 
Mark1:7 Mme a rera a re: “Morago ga me go tla mongwe yo o nonofileng bogolo go nna, yo kgole ya setlhako sa gagwe ke sa tshwanelang go inama ke e hunolola." 
Mark1:8 Nna ke lo kolobetsa ka metsi; mme ene o tlaa lo kolobetsa ka Mowa o o Boitshepo.” 
Mark1:9 Mme ya re mo metlheng eo, Jesu a tswa Nasaretha wa Galilea, mme a kolobediwa ke Johane mo Joretane." 
Mark1:10 Mme ya re fela a tlhatloga mo metsing, a bona magodimo a fatogile, le Mowa o ntse jaaka lephoi o fologela mo go ene." 
Mark1:11 Mme lentswe la tswa mo magodimong la re: “O morwaake yo o rategang, ke itumela thata mo go wena.”" 
Mark1:12 Mme Mowa wa akofa wa mo kgokgweeletsa kwa nageng. 
Mark1:13 Mme a nna mo nageng malatsi a le 40 a raelwa ke Satane; a nna teng le diphologolo; mme baengele ba mo direla. 
Mark1:14 Jaana e rile Johane a sena go golegwa, Jesu a tla mo Galilea, a rera Mafoko a a Molemo a Modimo," 
Mark1:15 a re: “Lobaka lo fitlhile, e bile bogosi jwa Modimo bo atametse; ikwatlhayeng, lo dumele Mafoko a a Molemo.”" 
Mark1:16 Ya re a tsamaya fa lewatleng la Galilea, a bona Simone le monnawe Anterea ba konopela lotloa mo lewatleng; gonne ba ne ba le batshwari ba ditlhapi." 
Mark1:17 Mme Jesu a ba raya a re: “Tlang lo ntshale morago, mme ke tlaa lo dira go tla lo nna batshwari ba batho.”" 
Mark1:18 Ba akofa ba tlogela ditloa, ba mo sala morago." 
Mark1:19 Ya re a ya fa pelenyana, a bona Jakobe morwa Sebete, le Johane monnawe, ba le bone ba bileng ba le mo mokorong ba tlhamaganya ditloa." 
Mark1:20 A akofa a ba bitsa; mme ba tlogela Sebete rraabo mo mokorong, le batlhanka ba ba thapilweng ka tuelo, mme ba mo sala morago." 
Mark1:21 Ba ya ba fitlha mo Kaperenaume; mme ka letsatsi la Sabata a tsena mo ntlong ya thuto, mme a ruta." 
Mark1:22 Mme batho ba gakgamadiwa ke thuto ya gagwe; gonne o ne a ba ruta jaaka mongwe yo o nang le taolo, e seng jaaka bakwadi." 
Mark1:23 Mme ga tshoganwa ka go bile go le monna mongwe mo ntlong ya bone ya thuto, a na le mowa o o maswe;" 
Mark1:24 mme a goa, a re: “Re dirang ka wena, wena Jesu wa Nasaretha? A o tsile go re senya? Ke a go itse yo o leng ene, o Moitshepi wa Modimo.”" 
Mark1:25 Mme Jesu a o kgalemela a re: “Didimala, mme o tswe mo go ene!”" 
Mark1:26 Mowa o o maswe wa tswa mo go ene o mo fafamosa, o goa ka lentswe le legolo." 
Mark1:27 Ba gakgamala botlhe, ba ba ba tla ba botsanya ba re: “Ana selo se ke eng? A thuto e ntšha! O laola ka thata le e leng mewa e e maswe, mme e mo utlwe.”" 
Mark1:28 Mme tumedi ya gagwe ya akofa ya ya le lefatshe lotlhe la Galilea le mo tikologong ya lone. 
Mark1:29 E rile fela ba sena go tswa mo ntlong ya thuto, ba ya go tsena mo ntlong ya ga Simone le Anterea, ba na le Jakobe le Johane." 
Mark1:30 Jaana mogwagadia Simone, wa mosadi, a bo a bobola botlhoko jwa letshoroma; mme ba akofa ba mo mmolelela." 
Mark1:31 Mme a tla a mo tshwara ka seatla, a mo kakatlolola; mme letshoroma la mo tlogela, mme mosadi a ba direla." 
Mark1:32 E rile go le maitseboa letsatsi le kotlomela, ba lere kwa go ene botlhe ba ba bobolang, le ba ba tsenyweng ke mewa e e bosula." 
Mark1:33 Motse otlhe wa bo o phuthegile o kokoanye fa mojakong. 
Mark1:34 Mme a fodisa batho ba le bantsi ba ba lwalang malwetse a le mantsi, a kgoromeletsa ntle mewa e e bosula e le mentsi; mme a se ka a leseletsa mewa e e bosula go bua, ka gobo e ne e mo itse." 
Mark1:35 Ya re ka moso ka makuku a mantsho, a tsoga, a tswa, a ya kwa nageng mo bojosing, mme a rapela teng." 
Mark1:36 Mme Simone le ba o nang nabo ba mo latela. 
Mark1:37 Ba mo fitlhela, ba mo raya ba re: “Batho botlhe ba a go batla.”" 
Mark1:38 Ene a ba raya a re: “A re yeng go sele, re ye metseng e mengwe e e kwa pele, gore ke tle ke rere Mafoko a a Molemo le gone mo go yone; gonne ke sone se ke tswetseng go se dira.”" 
Mark1:39 Mme a tsamaya le lefatshe lotlhe la Galilea, a etla a tsena mo matlong a bone a thuto, a rera, a kgoromeletsa mewa e e bosula ntle." 
Mark1:40 Ga tla molepero kwa go ene, a mo khubamela; a mo raya a re: “Fa o rata o na le thata ya go mphepafatsa.”" 
Mark1:41 Ya re ka a tlhomoga pelo, a otlolola letsogo, a mo ama, a mo raya a re: “Ke a rata, phepafadiwa.”" 
Mark1:42 Mme lepero la mo tlogela ka bofefo, a ba a phepafala." 
Mark1:43 A mo laya thata, a akofa a mo tsamaisa," 
Mark1:44 a mo raya a re: “Bona, o se ka wa bolelela ope sepe, mme o tsamaye fela, o ye go itshupetsa moperesiti, o isetse go phepafadiwa ga gago tshupelo ka dilo tse Moše o di laotseng go nna tshupo mo go bone.”" 
Mark1:45 Mme ene a tswa, a simolola go kakanya thata, le go utlwatsa tiro e mo ntlheng tsotlhe, Jesu a ba a tla a retelelwa ke go tsena mo motseng ka go bonwa, mme a nna kwa ntle mo mafelong a a kwa bojosing; ba mo tshologela ba tswa ntlheng tsotlhe fela." 
Mark2:1 E rile malatsi mangwe a sena go feta, a tsena gape mo Kaperenaume; mme ga utlwiwa fa a le mo gae." 
Mark2:2 Batho ba le bantsi ba ne ba phuthegile, ga ba ga tla ga tlhokafala fa ba emang teng, le fa e le fa mojakong, mme a bua lefoko nabo." 
Mark2:3 Bangwe ba tla ba lere mo go ene monna yo o bobolang bolwetse jwa teteselo, a rwelwe ke batho ba le bane." 
Mark2:4 E rile ka ba retelelwa ke go mo atamela ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa batho, ba tlhomesolola ntlo bolebana nae; ya re ba sena go phunya, ba folosa yo o bobolang bolwetse jwa teteselo ka bolao jo o letseng mo go jone." 
Mark2:5 Mme Jesu ka a bona tumelo ya bone, a raya yo o bobolang bolwetse jwa teteselo, a re: “Morwaaka, dibe tsa gago o di itshwaretswe.”" 
Mark2:6 Mme ga bo go dutse bangwe ba bakwadi teng, ba akanya mo pelong tsa bone ba re:" 
Mark2:7 “Monna yo o buelang jaana? O a tlhapatsa. E mang yo o ka itshwarelang dibe, fa e se a le mongwe fela, e bong Modimo?”" 
Mark2:8 Ya re fela ka bonako, ka Jesu a lemoga mo moweng wa gagwe fa ba akanya jalo mo teng ga bone, a ba raya a re: “Ana lo akanyeletsang dilo tse mo dipelong tsa lona?" 
Mark2:9 Mo go ka nnang bofefo ke gofe, a e ka nna go raya motho yo o bobolang bolwetse jwa teteselo, go re: ‘Dibe tsa gago o di itshwaretswe;’ kgotsa go re: ‘Tsoga, o tseye bolao jwa gago, o tsamaye’?" 
Mark2:10 Mme gore lo itse fa Morwa Motho a na le thata mo lefatsheng go itshwarela dibe,” a raya yo o bobolang bolwetse jwa teteselo, a re:" 
Mark2:11 “Ke a go raya, Tsoga o tseye bolao jwa gago, o ye kwa ntlong ya gago.”" 
Mark2:12 Mme a tsoga, a tsaya bolao jwa gagwe fela ka bonako, a tswa fa pele ga bone botlhe; ba ba ba gakgamala botlhe, ba galaletsa Modimo ba re: “Ga re ise re ke re bone mo go ntseng jaana gope.”" 
Mark2:13 A ba a tswa a ya fa lewatleng gape; mme bontsi jotlhe jwa batho jwa nna jwa ya kwa go ene, mme a ba ruta." 
Mark2:14 Mme ya re a feta, a bona Lefi morwa Alefaio a dutse fa go kgethelwang gona, mme o mo raya a re: “Ntshala morago.” Mme a nanoga a mo sala morago." 
Mark2:15 Ga dirala gore, e re a dutse a ja mo ntlong ya ga Lefi, bakgethisi ba le bantsi le baleofi ba bo ba na le Jesu le barutwa ba gagwe, gonne ba ne ba mo setse morago ka bontsi." 
Mark2:16 Mme bakwadi ba Bafarisai ba re ba bona fa a a ja le baleofi le bakgethisi, ba raya barutwa ba gagwe ba re: “O ja a a nwa le bakgethisi le baleofi.”" 
Mark2:17 Ya re Jesu a utlwa a ba raya a re: “Ba ba itekanetseng ga ba dire ngaka sepe, fa e se ba ba lwalang fela; ga ke a tlela go bitsa basiami, fa e se baleofi fela.”" 
Mark2:18 Barutwa ba ga Johane le Bafarisai ba bo ba ikiditse dijo; mme ba tla ba mo raya ba re: “Ana fa e bo ne ne barutwa ba ga Johane le barutwa ba Bafarisai ba ikitsa go ja, mme barutwa ba gago ba sa ikitse go ja, ke ka ntlha yang?”" 
Mark2:19 Jesu a ba raya a re: “A bagwe ba ka ikitsa go ja monyadi a sa ntse a na nabo? E a re monyadi a sa ntse a na nabo, boo ba sa ka ke ba ikitsa go ja." 
Mark2:20 Mme metlha e tlaa tla e monyadi o tlaa tlosiwang mo go bone ka yone; foo ba tlaa ikitsa go ja mo motlheng oo. 
Mark2:21 “Ga go na ope yo o ka rokelelang sebata se se kweletlanyeng mo seaparong se se onetseng, ka gobo fa se se bitiela, se tlaa se garola, se seša se garole se segologolo, mme kgagogo e keketsege." 
Mark2:22 Le gone ga go na ope yo o thelang bojalwa jwa mofine jo boša mo mefalong e e onetseng; gonne bojalwa jwa mofine bo tlaa phanya mefalo, mme bojalwa jwa mofine bo senyege, mefalo le yone; mme ba tle ba thele bojalwa jwa mofine jo boša mo mefalong e meša.”" 
Mark2:23 Ga dirala ya re a ralala masimo a mabele go le letsatsi la Sabata, mme barutwa ba re ba tsamaya ba simolola go roba diako tsa mabele." 
Mark2:24 Mme Bafarisai ba mo raya ba re: “Bona, e a re go le letsatsi la Sabata ba bo ba direlang se se sa letlelelwang?”" 
Mark2:25 Mme a ba raya a re: “A ga lo ise lo ke lo bale gope ka fa Dafite o kileng a dira ka teng, jale ka a tlhoka, mme a bolailwe ke tlala, ene le ba o neng a na nabo?" 
Mark2:26 Jaaka a ne a tsena mo ntlong ya Modimo, Abiathare e le moperesiti yo mogolo, mme a ja dinkgwe tsa tshupelo, e le tse di sa tshwanelang go jewa fa e se ke baperesiti fela, mme a ba a fa le ba o nang nabo?”" 
Mark2:27 A ba raya a re: “Sabata o diretswe motho, motho ga a a direlwa Sabata;" 
Mark2:28 jalo Morwa Motho ke Morena le wa Sabata.” 
Mark3:1 Motlha mongwe a ba a tsena gape mo ntlong ya thuto; mme ga bo go le monna mongwe gone yo o seatla se omeletseng. 
Mark3:2 Mme ba mo lepa gore a o tlaa mo fodisa ka letsatsi la Sabata; gore ba tle ba mo neye molato. 
Mark3:3 Mme a raya monna yo o seatla se omeletseng a re: “Ema fa gare fa.” 
Mark3:4 A ba raya a re: “A go letleletswe go dira molemo ka letsatsi la Sabata, kgotsa go dira bosula, go boloka botshelo, kgotsa go bolaya?” Mme ba didimala fela." 
Mark3:5 Ya re a sena go ba kobakoba ka bogale, ka a tlhokofadiwa ke go thatafala ga dipelo tsa bone, a raya monna yoo a re: “Otlolola seatla sa gago.” Mme a se otlolola; mme seatla sa gagwe sa fola." 
Mark3:6 Bafarisai ba tswa, ba akofa ba ya ba gakololana le Baherote ka fa ba ka mo senyang ka teng." 
Mark3:7 Mme Jesu a ngongwaelela kwa lewatleng a na le barutwa ba gagwe; mme bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho ba ba tswang Galilea jwa mo sala morago, le ba ba tswang Jutea." 
Mark3:8 Le kwa Jerusalema, le kwa Idumea, le kwa moseja ga Joretane, le kwa tikologong ya Ture le Sitone, e le bontsi jo bogolo, ka ba utlwa dilo tse dikgolo tse o di dirang, ba tla kwa go ene." 
Mark3:9 Mme a bua le barutwa ba gagwe gore mokorwana o mo emele, ka ntlha ya bontsi jo bo betaganyeng, e se re kgotsa ba mo pitlaganya." 
Mark3:10 O ne a fodisitse batho ba le bantsi; ga ba ga tla ga re botlhe ba ba nang le dipetso ba mo kgotlhaganyetsa, gore ba mo ame." 
Mark3:11 Le mewa e e maswe e ne e tle e re e mmona, e wele fa pele ga gagwe, e goe e re: “O Morwa Modimo.”" 
Mark3:12 Mme a e laya thata a re, e se ka ya mo utlwatsa." 
Mark3:13 A tlhatlogela mo thabeng, a ipiletsa bone ba ene ka esi o ba ratang, mme ba ya kwa go ene." 
Mark3:14 A tlhaola ba le 12 gore ba nne nae, gore a tle a ba rome ba ye go rera Mafoko a a Molemo," 
Mark3:15 le gore ba nne le thata ya go kgoromeletsa mewa e e bosula ntle. Mme ke ba: 
Mark3:16 Simone a mo okeletsa leina a re, Petere;" 
Mark3:17 le Jakobe morwa Sebete, le Johane monnawe Jakobe, bone a ba okeletsa leina a re, “Boaneregese”, ke go re: “Bomorwa tumo ya maru”;" 
Mark3:18 le Anterea, le Filipo, le Baretholomea, le Mathaio, le Thomase, le Jakobe morwa Alefaio, le Thataeo, le Simone wa Mokanana," 
Mark3:19 le Jutase Isekariota, yo e leng ene o mo okileng." 
Mark3:20 A tla mo gae. Bontsi jwa batho jwa kgobokana gape, ba ba ba tla ba retelelwa le ke go ja." 
Mark3:21 E rile ditsala tsa gagwe di utlwa, tsa ya go mo tshwara, gonne di ne di re: “O a tsenwa.”" 
Mark3:22 Le bakwadi ba ba fologileng kwa Jerusalema ba re: “O na le Beelesebube.” Gape ba re: “O kgoromeletsa ntle mewa e e maswe ka kgosana ya mewa e e maswe.” 
Mark3:23 Mme a ba ipiletsa, a bua nabo ka ditshwantsho, a re: “Satane o ka kgoromeletsa Satane ntle jang?" 
Mark3:24 Fa bogosi bo ikgaogantse, bogosi joo ga bo ka ke jwa ema." 
Mark3:25 Ntlo le yone fa e ikgaogantse, ntlo eo ga e ketla e nonofa go ema." 
Mark3:26 Fa Satane a itsogologetse, a kgaoganye, ga a ka ke a ema, mme o na le bokhutlo." 
Mark3:27 “Ga go na ope yo o ka tsenang mo ntlong ya monna yo o thata, a thopa dilo tsa gagwe, fa a se ka a golega monna yo o thata pele; foo o ka thopa ntlo ya gagwe."
