Mark3:28 “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, dibe tsotlhe tsa bomorwa batho ba tlaa di itshwarelwa, le ditlhapatso tse ba tlhapatsang ka tsone, le fa e ka bo e le dife." 
Mark3:29 Mme le fa e le mang yo o tlhapatsang Mowa o o Boitshepo, ga a na go itshwarelwa gope, o molato wa boleo jo bo se nang bokhutlo.”" 
Mark3:30 Ya bo e le ka gobo ba rile, Jesu o na le mowa o o maswe." 
Mark3:31 Mme ga tla mmaagwe le bomonnawe; ya re ba eme kwa thoko, ba roma kwa go ene, ba mmitsa." 
Mark3:32 Bontsi jwa batho jwa bo bo dutse bo mo dikanyeditse; mme ba mo raya ba re: “Bona, mmaago le bomonnao ba emetse kwa thoko ba a go batla.”" 
Mark3:33 Ene a ba fetola a re: “Mme e mang le bonnake ke bomang?” 
Mark3:34 A kobakoba ba ba dutseng ba mo dikanyeditse a re: “Bonang, mme le bonnake ke ba!" 
Mark3:35 Gonne le fa e le mang yo o tlaa dirang go rata ga Modimo, ene ke nnake le kgaitsadiake, le mme.”" 
Mark4:1 Gape a simolola go ruta fa lewatleng. Ga bo go phuthegetse kwa go ene bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho, a ba a tla a tsena mo mokorong, a dula mo lewatleng; mme bontsi jotlhe jwa bo bo ikamile lewatle, bo le mo lefatsheng." 
Mark4:2 Mme a ba ruta dilo di le dintsi ka ditshwantsho. Mo thutong ya gagwe a ba raya a re: 
Mark4:3 “Reetsang. Bonang, mojadi o kile a tswa a ya go jala." 
Mark4:4 Mme ga dirala, ya re a ntse a jala, ditlhaka dingwe tsa wela fa tseleng, mme dinonyane tsa tla, tsa di sela." 
Mark4:5 Tse dingwe tsa wela fa go leng matlapa, fa go leng mmu o mosesane teng; mme tsa akofa tsa tlhaba, ka di se mo mmung o o boteng;" 
Mark4:6 mme e rile letsatsi le sena go gotela, tsa ša, mme ka di se na medi tsa omelela fela." 
Mark4:7 Tse dingwe tsa wela mo mitlweng, mme mitlwa ya gola, ya di hupetsa, mme di se ka tsa ungwa sepe." 
Mark4:8 Tse dingwe tsa wela mo mmung o o molemo, tsa ungwa ka di gola di ata; tsa tsala, tsa nna 30, le 60, le 100.”" 
Mark4:9 Mme a re: “Yo o nang le ditsebe go utlwa, a a utlwe.”" 
Mark4:10 Mme e rile a le esi, ba ba fa go ene ba na le ba ba 12, ba mmotsa ka ga ditshwantsho." 
Mark4:11 Mme a ba raya a re: “Lona lo neilwe bosaitsiweng jwa bogosi jwa Modimo, mme bone ba ba kwa ntle, dilo tsotlhe ba di direlwa ka ditshwantsho," 
Mark4:12 gore ka go bona ba bone, mme ba se ka ba lemoga; le ka go utlwa ba utlwe, mme ba se ka ba tlhaloganya, e se re kgotsa ba sokologa, mme ba go itshwarelwa.”" 
Mark4:13 A ba raya a re: “A ga lo itse setshwantsho se? Mme lo tlaa itse jang ditshwantsho tsotlhe? 
Mark4:14 Mojadi o jala lefoko. 
Mark4:15 Ba ke bone ba ba fa tseleng, kwa lefoko le jalwang teng. Mme e a re ba sena go utlwa, Satane a akofe a tle, a tlose lefoko le le jadilweng mo go bone." 
Mark4:16 Jalo le bone ba ba jadilweng fa go matlapa, ke ba e a reng ba sena go utlwa lefoko, ba akofe ba le tshole ka boitumelo;" 
Mark4:17 mme ga ba na modi mo go bone ka bosi, ba tle ba eme ka lobakanyana fela; e re mogang go tsogang patikego, kgotsa pogiso, ka ntlha ya lefoko, ba akofe ba kgopiwe." 
Mark4:18 Ba bangwe ke ba ba jadilweng mo mitlweng; bao ke ba ba utlwileng lefoko; 
Mark4:19 mme go bapalwa ke lefatshe, le tsietso ya mahumo, le dithato tsa dilo tse dingwe, di hupetse lefoko, mme ba ungologe." 
Mark4:20 Mme ba ke ba ba jadilweng mo mmung o o molemo; ba utlwa lefoko, ba le tshole, ba ungwe 30, le 60, le 100.”" 
Mark4:21 A ba raya a re: “A lobone lo tle lo tlisiwe gore lo huhumediwe tlase ga seelo, kgotsa ka fa tlase ga bolao? A ga se gore lo tlhongwe mo setlhomong?" 
Mark4:22 Gonne ga go a subiwa sepe, fa e se gore se tle se senolwe, le gone ga go a ka ga lobiwa sepe, fa e se gore se tle se tswele mo leseding." 
Mark4:23 Fa motho le fa e le mang a na le ditsebe go utlwa, a utlwe.”" 
Mark4:24 A ba raya a re: “Lo tlhokomele se lo se utlwang; selekanyo se lo lekanyang ka sone, lo tlaa lekanyediwa ka sone fela; mme lo tlaa okelediwa." 
Mark4:25 Gonne yo o nang le sengwe, ene o tlaa newa; mme yo o se nang sepe, le se o nang naso o tlaa se tseelwa.”" 
Mark4:26 Mme a re: “Bogosi jwa Modimo bo ntse jaana, bo ntse jaaka fa motho a ka bo a latlhela peo mo mmung;" 
Mark4:27 mme a robale, a tsoge bosigo le motshegare, mme peo e ka mela, ya gola, ene a sa itse ka fa e golang ka teng." 
Mark4:28 Lefatshe le a ikungwisa ka losi; e re pele go tswe mogwang; foo go tswe seako, morago mabele a a tletseng mo seakong." 
Mark4:29 Mme ya re fa mabele a budule, motho a akofe a tsenye thipa, ka gobo go roba go fitlhile.”" 
Mark4:30 Mme a re: “Ana re tlaa tshwantsha bogosi jwa Modimo jang? Kgotsa re tlaa bo kaya ka setshwantsho sefe? 
Mark4:31 Bo tshwana le tlhaka ya peo ya mosetara, e e a reng e jadilwe mo mmung, le fa e le potlana mo dipeong tsotlhe tse di mo lefatsheng." 
Mark4:32 Le fa go ntse jalo fa e jadilwe, e tlhoge e gole, e be e fete merogo yotlhe, e ntshe dikala tse dikgolo; go bo go tle go tle dinonyane tsa loapi, di bone go kwaya mo moriting wa sone.”" 
Mark4:33 A bua lefoko nabo ka ditshwantsho di le dintsi tse di ntseng jaana, go ya ka fa ba nonofileng go le utlwa ka teng." 
Mark4:34 Mme a se ka a bua nabo fa e se ka ditshwantsho; mme e ne e tle e re fa ba le bosi, a rarabololele barutwa ba gagwe dilo tsotlhe." 
Mark4:35 Ya re ka letsatsi leo, go le maitseboa, a ba raya a re: “A re tsheleleng kwa moseja.”" 
Mark4:36 Mme ba tlogela bontsi jwa batho, ba mo tsaya, a ya nabo mo mokorong fela jaaka a ntse. A bo a patilwe ke mekoro e mengwe." 
Mark4:37 Mme ga tsoga matsubutsubu a matona a phefo, mme makhubu a metsi a tlolela mo mokorong; mokoro wa ba wa rata go tlala." 
Mark4:38 Mme ene a bo a le kwa moseong ga mokoro, a robetse mo mosamong; mme ba mo tsosa, ba mo raya ba re: “Moruti, a ga o re sepe fa re nyelela?”" 
Mark4:39 Mme a tsoga, a kgalemela phefo, a raya lewatle a re: “Kgaotsa, o sisibale!” Mme phefo ya khutla, ga ba ga nna tuulalo e kgolo." 
Mark4:40 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ana lo boifelang? A ga lo ise lo nne le tumelo?” 
Mark4:41 Mme ba boifa thatathata ba re: “Ana motho yo e a bo e le mang, fa e bo ne ne phefo e mo utlwa le lewatle jaana?”" 
Mark5:1 Ba fitlha kwa moseja ga lewatle, mo lefatsheng la Bagerasa." 
Mark5:2 Ya re a sena go tswa mo mokorong, a akofa a kgatlhana le monna mongwe yo o nang le mowa o o maswe, a tswa mo diphupung;" 
Mark5:3 yo boago jwa gagwe bo leng mo diphupung; mme ga bo go se ope yo o ka tlholang a mo golega, nnyaa, le fa e le ka ketane;" 
Mark5:4 gonne o ne a kile a golegwa gantsi ka mefiri le diketane, mme diketane a di komaganye, le mefiri a e thubaganye. Go ne go se ope yo o nonofileng go mo kgwabofatsa." 
Mark5:5 Ka gale le gale, bosigo le motshegare, a le mo diphupung le mo dithabeng, a bo a ntse a goa, a itshegaka ka maje." 
Mark5:6 Mme ya re a bona Jesu a sa le kgakala, a taboga, a ya a mo obamela." 
Mark5:7 A goa ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Ke dirang ka wena, Jesu Morwa Modimo Mogodimodimo? Ke go ikanisa ka Modimo, o se ka wa ntlhokofatsa.”" 
Mark5:8 Ka gobo o ne a o reile a re: “Tswa mo monneng yo, mowa o o maswe ke wena!”" 
Mark5:9 Mme a mmotsa a re: “Leina la gago ga twe o mang?” A fetola a re: “Leina la me ke Mophato, gonne re bantsi.”" 
Mark5:10 Mme a mo rapela thata gore a se ka a e leleka mo lefatsheng leo. 
Mark5:11 Jaana ka fa mofapheng wa thaba ga bo go le serapa se segolo sa dikolobe, di fula." 
Mark5:12 Mme ya mo rapela ya re: “Mma re ye mo dikolobeng gore re tsene mo go tsone.” 
Mark5:13 Mme a e leseletsa. Mewa e e maswe ya tswa, ya tsena mo dikolobeng; mme serapa sa kgokologela ka mapawa mo lewatleng, e ka ne e le di le 2 000; mme tsa betwa ke lewatle." 
Mark5:14 Ba ba di disitseng ba tshaba, ba ya ba bolela mo motseng, le mo lefatsheng. Batho ba ya go bona gore se se diretseng ke eng?" 
Mark5:15 Mme ba tla mo go Jesu, ba fitlhela ene yo o neng a tsenywe ke mewa e e maswe a bile a dutse a apere, a ikutlwa sentle, e bong ene yo o neng a na le mophato; mme ba boifa." 
Mark5:16 Ba ba bonyeng ka matlho ba ba kakanyetsa ka fa go dirafaletseng ene yo o ne a tsenywe ke mewa e e maswe ka teng, le ka ga dikolobe." 
Mark5:17 Ba simolola go mo rapela gore a tswe mo lefatsheng la bone. 
Mark5:18 Mme ya re a tsena mo mokorong, yo o neng e tsenywe ke mewa e e maswe a mo rapela gore a nne nae." 
Mark5:19 Mme a se ka a mo leseletsa, a mo raya a re: “Ya kwa gaeno kwa ditsaleng tsa gago, o ba bolelele dilo tse dikgolo tse Morena o di go diretseng, le jaaka a go tlhomogetse pelo.”" 
Mark5:20 Mme a tsamaya, a ya a simolola go utlwatsa mo Dekapolise dilo tse dikgolo tse Jesu o di mo diretseng; mme batho botlhe ba gakgamala." 
Mark5:21 E rile Jesu a sena go ba a tshelela kwa moseja o mongwe ka mokoro, bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho jwa phuthegela kwa go ene, a le fa lewatleng." 
Mark5:22 Mme ga tla mongwe wa balaodi ba ntlo ya thuto, go twe Jairo; mme ya re a mmona a wela fa dinaong tsa gagwe." 
Mark5:23 A mo rapela thata a re: “Morwadiake wa ngwanyana o fela mo losong, ke a go rapela, o tlo o tle, o beye diatla tsa gago mo go ene gore a fodisiwe, a tshele.”" 
Mark5:24 Jesu a ya nae; batho le bone ba le bantsi ba mo sala morago, ba mo kgotlhaganyetsa." 
Mark5:25 Mme mosadi yo o sa leng a lwala ka go tshologa madi ka dinyaga di le 12," 
Mark5:26 mme a bogile dilo di le dintsi ka dingaka di le dintsi, a bile a fedisitse dilo tsotlhe tsa gagwe, mme a sa bone thusego epe, bogolo bolwetse bo golela pele fela," 
Mark5:27 ya re ka a utlwa ka ga Jesu, a tla a tsena mo bontsing fa morago, a ama seaparo sa gagwe," 
Mark5:28 gonne o ne a re: “Fa nka ama le fa e ka bo e le diaparo tsa gagwe fela, ke tlaa fola.”" 
Mark5:29 Mme ka bonako go elela ga madi mo go ene ga khutla; a ikutlwa mo mmeleng wa gagwe fa a fodisitswe mo petsong ya gagwe. 
Mark5:30 Ka bonako, ka Jesu a itemoga fa thata e dule mo go ene, a retologa mo kgotlhaganyong a re: “Yo o amileng diaparo tsa me e mang?”" 
Mark5:31 Barutwa ba gagwe ba mo raya ba re: “O a bona fa bontsi bo go kgotlhaganyeditse, mme wa re o amilwe e mang?”" 
Mark5:32 Mme a ba kobakoba go bona ene yo o dirileng selo se. 
Mark5:33 Mme mosadi ka a ikitse se se dirilweng mo go ene, a boifa a roroma, a tla a wela fa pele ga gagwe, a mmolelela boammaaruri jotlhe fela." 
Mark5:34 Mme a mo raya a re: “Morwadiaka, tumelo ya gago e go fodisitse; tsamaya ka kagiso, o fole mo petsong ya gago.”" 
Mark5:35 Ya re a sa ntse a bua, bangwe ba tla, ba tswa kwa ntlong ya molaodi wa ntlo ya thuto, ba re: “Morwadio o sule, ana o sa ntse o lapisetsang moruti?”" 
Mark5:36 Mme Jesu, a tlhokomologa lefoko le le buiweng, a raya molaodi wa ntlo ya thuto a re: “O se ka wa boifa, dumela fela.”" 
Mark5:37 Mme a se ka a leseletsa ope go ya nae, fa e se Petere, le Jakobe le Johane monnawe Jakobe." 
Mark5:38 Ba fitlha kwa ntlong ya molaodi wa ntlo ya thuto; mme a fitlhela go le khuduego, batho ba le bantsi ba lela, ba kurueletsa godimo." 
Mark5:39 Ya re a sena go tsena a ba raya a re: “Lo direlang khuduego jaana, lo lela? Ngwana ga a a swa, o robetse.”" 
Mark5:40 Mme ba mo tshega ka tshotlo. Ene ya re a sena go ba ntshetsa botlhe kwa ntle, a tsaya rrangwana le mmaagwe, le bone ba o nang nabo, a tsena kwa ngwana o leng teng." 
Mark5:41 A tshwara ngwana ka seatla, a mo raya a re: “Talitha kumi,” ke go re fa go phuthololwa: “Morweetsana ke a go raya, tsoga.”" 
Mark5:42 Ka bonako morweetsana a tsoga, a tsamaya ka dinao, gonne o ne a le dinyaga di le some le bobedi. Ba gakgamala ka kgakgamalo e kgolo." 
Mark5:43 Mme a ba laya thata gore go se itse ope selo se; mme a laola gore a fiwe dijo. 
Mark6:1 Mme a tswa teng, a tla mo lefatsheng la ga gabo; le barutwa ba gagwe ba ya nae." 
Mark6:2 E rile go tla Sabata, a simolola go ruta mo ntlong ya thuto. Mme batho ba le bantsi ba re ba mo utlwa ba gakgamala ba re: “Monna yo, o tshotse kae dilo tse? Gape, botlhale jo bo neilweng monna yo, ke jo bo ntseng jang? Le ditiro tsa nonofo tse di ntseng jaana, tse di dirwang ka diatla tsa gagwe di kaya eng?" 
Mark6:3 A ga se ene mmetli wa dikgong, morwa Maria, mogoloa boJakobe, le Josefe, le Jutase, le Simone? Le bokgaitsadie a ga se bone ba re nang nabo fa?” Mme ba kgopega mo go ene." 
Mark6:4 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Moperofeti ga a ke a tlhoka tlotlo, fa e se mo lefatsheng la ga gabo, le mo losikeng lwabo, le mo ntlong ya gagwe.”" 
Mark6:5 O ne a sa ka ke a dira tiro epe ya nonofo teng, fa e se gore o ne a baya diatla tsa gagwe mo balwetsing ba se kae, mme a ba fodisa." 
Mark6:6 Mme a gakgamalela go tlhoka go dumela ga bone. A nna a tsamaya le metsana. A e dikologa a ruta. 
Mark6:7 A ipiletsa ba ba 12, a simolola go ba roma ka bobedi le bobedi; a ba naya thata ya go laola mewa e e maswe;" 
Mark6:8 a ba laya gore ba se ka ba tseela loeto lwa bone sepe, fa e se tsamma fela; a re, ba se ka ba tsaya senkgwe, le fa e le kuane, le fa e le madi mo meitlamong ya bone;" 
Mark6:9 a re, ba rwale ditlhako, mme ba se ka ba apara dikobo di le pedi." 
Mark6:10 A ba a ba raya a re: “Gongwe le gongwe kwa lo tsenang mo teng, lo nne teng foo go tsamaya lo tswa teng." 
Mark6:11 Mme gongwe le gongwe kwa lo sa tsholwang teng, mme ba gana go lo utlwa, lo re lo tswa teng, lo itlhotlhore lorole lolo fa tlase ga dinao tsa lona, go nna tshupo ka ga bone.”" 
Mark6:12 Ba bolola ba ya ba rera gore batho ba ikwatlhaye. 
Mark6:13 Ba kgoromeletsa mewa e e maswe le e mentsi ntle, le batho ba le bantsi ba ba lwalang, ba ba tlotsa lookwane, ba ba fodisa." 
Mark6:14 Mme kgosi Herote a utlwa, gonne leina la ga Jesu le ne le setse le itsege; mme a re: “Johane Mokolobetsi o tsogile mo losong, ke gone dinonofo tse, di dirang mo go ene.”" 
Mark6:15 Bangwe ba re: “Ke Elija,” ba bangwe ba re: “Ke moperofeti fela; o ntse jaaka mongwe wa baperofeti.”" 
Mark6:16 Mme Herote ene o rile a utlwa a re: “Ke Johane yo ke mo kgaotseng tlhogo, o tsogile.”" 
Mark6:17 Gonne Herote ka esi o ne a bo a kile a roma batho ba ya go tshwara Johane, a mo golega a mo tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo ka ntlha ya ga Herotiase mosadi wa ga Filipo monnawe, ka a mo nyetse." 
Mark6:18 Gonne Johane o na a reile Herote a re: “Ga o a letlelelwa go nyala mosadi wa ga monnao.” 
Mark6:19 Mme Herotiase a itira mmaba wa gagwe, a eletsa go mmolaya; mme a retelelwa," 
Mark6:20 ka gobo Herote a boifa Johane, a itse fa e le motho yo o siameng, a le boitshepo, mme a mo dibela. Mme e ne e tle e re a mo utlwa a akabale thata, a mo utlwe ka boitumelo." 
Mark6:21 Mme e rile go fitlha letsatsi le le laotsweng, la go tlotla botsalo jwa ga Herote, a direla dikala tsa gagwe, le beng ba mephato, le magosana a Galilea modiro;" 
Mark6:22 mme ya re morwadia Herotiase ka esi a tsena, a bina, a kgatlha Herote le ba ba dutseng nae ba a ja; mme kgosi ya raya morweetsana ya re: “Ntopa fela se o se ratang, mme ke tlaa se go naya.”" 
Mark6:23 A ba a mo ikanela a re: “Se o tlaa se ntopang fela, ke tlaa se go naya, le fa e ka nna bontlhanngwe jwa bogosi jwa me.”" 
Mark6:24 Mme a tswa, a ya a raya mmaagwe a re: “Ke tlaa lopa eng?” Ene a re: “Lopa tlhogo ya ga Johane Mokolobetsi.”" 
Mark6:25 Mme a itlhaganelela kwa kgosing, a lopa a re: “Ke rata gore o nneye tlhogo ya ga Johane Mokolobetsi fela jaanong jaana ka mogotšana.”" 
Mark6:26 Mme kgosi ya hutsafala thata; le fa go ntse jalo e se ka ya gana, ka ntlha ya maikano a yone, le ka ntlha ya ba ba dutseng ba ja nayo." 
Mark6:27 Mme kgosi ya akofa ya roma leotlana la yone, ya laola gore tlhogo ya gagwe e tlisiwe; mme la ya la mo kgaola tlhogo a le mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Mark6:28 La tlisa tlhogo ya gagwe ka mogotšana, la e naya morweetsana; mme morweetsana a e naya mmaagwe." 
Mark6:29 Ya re barutwa ba gagwe ba utlwa, ba ya ba tsaya setoto sa gagwe, ba se boloka mo letswing." 
Mark6:30 Baaposetole ba phuthegela kwa go Jesu; ba mmolelela dilo tsotlhe tse ba di dirileng, le tse ba di rutileng." 
Mark6:31 Mme a ba raya a re: “Tlang lona lo le losi, re tsweleng kwa thoko kwa felong fa go se nang batho, mme lo itapolose ka lobakanyana.” Gonne go ne go le batho ba le bantsi ba ba tlholang ba boaboa, ba bile ba ba tlhokisa lobaka le fa e le lwa go ja." 
Mark6:32 Ba tsamaya ka mokoro ba ya kwa thoko kwa felong fa go se nang batho. 
Mark6:33 Mme batho ba ba bona ba tsamaya, mme ba le bantsi ba bo ba ba itse, mme ba tabogela teng mmogo, ba tswa mo metseng yotlhe, mme ba ba raka." 
Mark6:34 Mme a tswa, a fitlhela bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho, mme a ba tlhomogela pelo, ka ba ntse jaaka dinku tse di se nang modisa; mme a simolola go ba ruta dilo di le dintsi." 
Mark6:35 Ya re letsatsi le setse le fetile, barutwa ba gagwe ba ya mo go ene, ba re: “Felo fano ke gare ga naga fela, le letsatsi le setse le fetile;" 
Mark6:36 ba phatlalatse gore ba ye kwa go nang le batho, le mo metsaneng mo tikologong, ba ithekele dijonyana.”" 
Mark6:37 A ba fetola a re: “Lona ba neyeng go ja.” Ba mo raya ba re: “A ke re ye go reka dinkgwe ka diponto di le 20, re ba neye ba je?”" 
Mark6:38 A ba raya a re: “Lo na le dinkgwe di le kae? Yang go bona.” Mme ya re ba sena go itse, ba re: “Di tlhano le ditlhapi di le pedi.”" 
Mark6:39 Mme a ba laola gore batho botlhe ba dule mo bojannyeng jo botala, ka masomo." 
Mark6:40 Ba dula ba rulaganye ka makgolo, le ka bomasome a le matlhano." 
Mark6:41 Mme a tsaya dinkgwe tse tlhano, le ditlhapi tse pedi, a lelalela legodimong, a leboga, mme a ngathoganya dinkgwe; jaana a di neela barutwa go di baya fa pele ga batho; le tsone ditlhapi tse pedi a di ba abela botlhe." 
Mark6:42 Ba ja botlhe, ba kgora." 
Mark6:43 Mme ba sela dikabetla, tsa tlatsa diroto di le 12, le ga tsone ditlhapi." 
Mark6:44 Mme ba ba jeleng dinkgwe e ne e ka ne e le banna ba le 5 000. 
Mark6:45 Mme a akofa a patelela barutwa ba gagwe go tsena mo mokorong, le go tsamaela pele kwa moseja, kwa Bethesaita, ene ka esi a sa ntse a phatlalatsa batho." 
Mark6:46 Ya re a sena go dumedisanya nabo, a tlhatlogela mo thabeng, a ya go rapela." 
Mark6:47 Ya re ka lotlatlana mokoro wa bo o le fa gare ga lewatle, mme ene a bo a le esi kwa lefatsheng." 
Mark6:48 Mme ka a ba bona ba sugegile ka go fudua mokoro ka bothata, ka gobo ba tlhabaganye le phefo, a ya kwa go bone ka lobaka e ka ne e le lwa tebelo ya bone ya bosigo, a tsamaya mo godimo ga lewatle; mme ya ne e kete o a ba feta." 
Mark6:49 Mme bone ya re ba mmona a tsamaya mo godimo ga lewatle, ba gopola gore ke sedimo, mme ba goa;" 
Mark6:50 ka ba ne ba mmona botlhe, mme ba fuduega. Mme a akofa a bua nabo a re: “Nametsegang; ke nna, se boifeng.”" 
Mark6:51 A palamela kwa go bone mo mokorong; mme phefo ya khutla; mme ba gakgamala, ba ja kgakge fela." 
Mark6:52 Gonne ba se ka ba tlhaloganya ka ga dinkgwe, le dipelo tsa bone di ne di kgwaraletse." 
Mark6:53 E rile ba sena go tshela ba fitlha kwa lefatsheng, kwa Genesarete, ba gokela mokoro fa losing." 
Mark6:54 Ya re ba sena go tswa mo mokorong, batho ba akofa ba mo lemoga." 
Mark6:55 Mme ba taboga le lefatshe leo jotlhe mo tikologong, ba simolola go rwala balwetsi ka malao, ba ba mo latisa kwa ba mo utlwalelang teng." 
Mark6:56 Gongwe le gongwe kwa o tsenang teng, mo metsaneng, kgotsa mo metseng, kgotsa mo nageng fela, ba baya balwetsi mo dipatlelong tsa borekelo, ba mo rapela gore ba ke ba ame le fa e ka bo e le makantsa a seaparo sa gagwe; mme botlhe ba ba mo amileng ba fola." 
Mark7:1 Motlha mongwe ga phuthegela kwa go ene Bafarisai, le bangwe ba bakwadi, ba tswa Jerusalema." 
Mark7:2 Mme ba bo ba kile ba bona fa barutwa bangwe ba gagwe ba tle ba je dijo ka diatla tse di leswe, ke go re, tse di sa tlhapisiwang." 
Mark7:3 Gonne Bafarisai le Bajuta botlhe, fa ba sa tlhape mo diatleng le mo mabogong, ga ba ke ba ja; mme boo ba tshegeditse mekgwa ya bagologolo." 
Mark7:4 Fa ba tswa kwa borekelong, ga ba ke ba a ja fa ba sa tlhape pele; go bile go na le dilo di le dintsi tse ba tshwanetseng go di tshegetsa, jaaka go tlhatswa dinwelo, dipitsana le dijana tsa kgotlho, (le disekamelo.)" 
Mark7:5 Bafarisai le bakwadi ba mmotsa ba re: “Ana barutwa ba gago ga ba tsamaeleng ka fa mekgweng ya bagologolo, ba ja fela senkgwe sa bone ka diatla tse di leswe?”" 
Mark7:6 A ba raya a re: “Isaia o boletse sentle ka ga lona baitimokanyi, jaaka go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘Ba tšhaba e, ba ntlotla ka dipounama tsa bone, mme dipelo tsa bone di le kgakala le nna." 
Mark7:7 Ba nkobamelela lefela, ka ba ruta ka dithuto tse e leng melao ya batho fela.’" 
Mark7:8 “Lo tlogela taolo ya Modimo, lo tshegeditse mekgwa ya batho fela.”" 
Mark7:9 A ba raya a re: “Lo ganela ruri taolo ya Modimo, gore lo tshegetse mekgwa ya lona." 
Mark7:10 Gonne Moše o rile: ‘Tlotla rraago le mmaago;’ gape a re: ‘Yo o buang bosula ka ga rraagwe kgotsa mmaagwe, ruri a a swe.’" 
Mark7:11 Lona lo a tle lo re: ‘Fa motho a raya rraagwe kgotsa mmaagwe a re: Se o ka bong o thusiwa ke nna ka sone e bile ke Korebana, ke go re, Se abetswe Modimo;" 
Mark7:12 lo bo lo sa tlhole lo mo leseletsa go direla rraagwe kgotsa mmaagwe sepe;’ 
Mark7:13 mme lo dira lefoko la Modimo lolea fela ka mekgwa ya lona e lo e bolelang, le dilo tse dintsi tse di ntseng jalo lo a di dira.”" 
Mark7:14 A ba a ipiletsa bontsi jwa batho gape a re: “Ntheetsang lotlhe, lo tlhaloganye!" 
Mark7:15 Ga go na sepe se se kwa ntle ga motho se se ka reng se tsena mo go ene sa mo itshekolola; dilo tse di tswang mo mothong ke tsone tse di itshekololang motho. 
Mark7:16 (Fa mongwe a na le ditsebe go utlwa, a a utlwe.)”" 
Mark7:17 E rile a sena go tsena mo ntlong, a tlogetse bontsi jwa batho, barutwa ba gagwe ba mmotsa ka ga setshwantsho seo." 
Mark7:18 Mme a ba raya a re: “A le lona lo ntse jaana lo se na tlhaloganyo? A ga lo lemoge gore, se se kwa ntle ga motho, fa se tsena mo go ene, ga se ka ke sa mo itshekolola;" 
Mark7:19 gonne ga se tsene mo pelong, fa e se mo mpeng fela, mme se ye go tswela kwa ntle?” Mme moo, a go bua, e le go itshekisa dijo tsotlhe." 
Mark7:20 A ba a re: “Se se tswang mo teng ga motho, ke sone se se itshekololang motho." 
Mark7:21 Gonne mo teng, mo dipelong tsa batho, go tswa megopolo e e bosula, le dikgokafalo, le bogodu le dipolao," 
Mark7:22 le boaka, le bopelotshetlha, le boikepo, le tsietso, le bopepe, le leitlho le le bosula, le kgalo, le bopelompe, le bosilo;" 
Mark7:23 dilo tse tsotlhe tse di bosula di tswa mo teng, mme di itshekolole motho.”" 
Mark7:24 Mme a tswa teng, a tsamaya a ya mo melelwaneng ya Ture le Sitone. Mme a tsena mo ntlong nngwe, mme a bo a sa rate ga itse ope; mme ga retela fa a ka lojwa." 
Mark7:25 Ka bonako mosadi mongwe yo ngwana wa gagwe wa mosetsanyana o nang le mowa o o maswe, ya re a mo utlwela, a tla a wela fa dinaong tsa gagwe." 
Mark7:26 Jaana mosadi yo ya bo e le Mogerika, wa tšhaba ya Serofonike. Mme a mo rapela thata gore a kgoromeletse ntle mowa o o maswe mo go morwadie." 
Mark7:27 Mme a mo raya a re: “A bana ba kgore pele; gonne, ga go a tshwanela go tsaya dijo tsa bana, le go di latlhela dintša.”" 
Mark7:28 Mosadi a mo fetola a re: “Ee, Morena, le e leng tsone dintša, di le ka fa tlase ga lomati lwa bojelo, di ja matlhotlhora a bana.”" 
Mark7:29 Mme ene a mo raya a re: “Ka lefoko leo tsamaya fela; mowa o o maswe o dule mo go morwadio.” 
Mark7:30 Mme a tsamaya a ya ga gagwe, mme a fitlhela ngwana a beilwe mo bolaong, mme mowa o o maswe o dule mo go ene." 
Mark7:31 Gape a tswa mo melelwaneng ya Ture, a ralala Sitone a ya a fitlha kwa lewatleng la Galilea, a raletse melelwane ya Dekapolise." 
Mark7:32 Ba lere kwa go ene monna mongwe yo o bosusu, yo o kwakwaetsang; mme ba mo rapela thata gore a mmeye seatla." 
Mark7:33 Mme a mo ntsha mo bontsing a mo isa fa thoko, a tsenya menwana ya gagwe mo ditsebeng tsa gagwe, a kgwa mathe, a ba a ama loleme lwa gagwe;" 
Mark7:34 a lelalela legodimong, a fegelwa, a mo raya a re: “Efatha,” ke go re: “Kabologa.”" 
Mark7:35 Ditsebe tsa gagwe tsa kabologa, le thapo ya loleme lwa gagwe ya hunologa, a itse go bua sentle." 
Mark7:36 A ba laya gore ba se ka ba bolelela ope; mme fela jaaka a ba laile thata, bone ba ya ba bolela bogolo thata." 
Mark7:37 Ba gakgamala mo go feteletseng ba re: “O dirile dilo tsotlhe sentle; o dira gore ba ba bosusu ba utlwe, le ba ba dimumu ba bue.”" 
Mark8:1 E ne ya re mo metlheng eo, go bile go le bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho, mme ba se na se ba se jang, a ipiletsa barutwa ba gagwe, a ba raya a re:" 
Mark8:2 “Ke tlhomogela batho ba bantsi ba pelo, gonne go fetile malatsi a le mararo ba ntse ba tlhotse le nna, mme ba se na se ba se jang?" 
Mark8:3 E tlaa re fa ke ba tsamaisetsa kwa magaeng a bone ka tlala, ba tlaa dimelela mo tseleng, ka ba bangwe ba bile ba tswa kgakala.”" 
Mark8:4 Barutwa ba gagwe ba mo fetola ba re: “Ana dinkgwe tse di ka lekanang go kgorisa batho ba di tlaa bo di tswa kae fano, mo gare ga naga fela?”" 
Mark8:5 A ba botsa a re: “Lo na le dinkgwe di le kae?” Ba re: “Di supa.” 
Mark8:6 A laola batho ba bantsi go dula fa fatshe, mme a tsaya dinkgwe tse supa, mme ya re a sena go leboga a di ngathoganya, a di neela barutwa gore ba di beye fa pele ga batho; mme ba di baya fa pele ga batho ba bantsi." 
Mark8:7 Ba bo ba na le ditlhatswana di se kae, ya re a sena go di segofatsa, a laola gore le tsone di bewe fa pele ga bone." 
Mark8:8 Ba ja, ba kgora; mme ba sela dikabetla tse di setseng, ba tlatsa diroto di supa." 
Mark8:9 Ba bo ba ka ne ba le 4 000; mme a ba tsamaisa. 
Mark8:10 Mme a akofa a tsena mo mokorong le barutwa ba gagwe, a tla mo dintlheng tsa Dalemanutha." 
Mark8:11 Mme Bafarisai ba tswa, ba simolola go tatalalana nae, ba batla sesupo mo go ene se se tswang legodimong, ba mo lalela." 
Mark8:12 Mme a fegelwa thata mo moweng a re: “Ana losika lo, lo batlelang sesupo? Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, losika lo ga lo ketla lo newa sesupo sepe.”" 
Mark8:13 Mme a ba tlogela, a tsena mo mokorong, a boela kwa moseja." 
Mark8:14 Ba lebala go tshola mofago, le mo mokorong ba bo ba se na sepe fa e se senkgwe se le sengwe fela." 
Mark8:15 Mme a ba laya a re: “Lo tlhokomele, lo itise mo sebedisong sa Bafarisai, le mo sebedisong sa ga Herote.”" 
Mark8:16 Ba tseisanya kgang ba re: “Ke ka go bo re se na senkgwe.” 
Mark8:17 Jesu ka a go lemoga a re: “Lo tseisanyetsang kgang ka go bo lo se na senkgwe? A ga lo ise lo lemoge, le fa e le go tlhaloganya? A dipelo tsa lona di kgwaraletse fela?" 
Mark8:18 Lo re lo na le matlho, a ga lo bone? Lo re lo na le ditsebe, a ga lo utlwe? A ga lo gakologelwe?" 
Mark8:19 E rile ke ngathoganyetsa ba ba 5 000 dinkgwe tse tlhano, lo ne lwa tlatsa diroto di le kae ka dikabetla tse lo di setseng?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Di le 12.”" 
Mark8:20 “Ya re mo dinkgweng tse di supang tsa ba ba 4 000, lo ne lwa tlatsa diroto di le kae ka dikabetla tse lo di setseng?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Di supa.”" 
Mark8:21 A ba raya a re: “A lo sa ntse lo ise lo tlhaloganye?” 
Mark8:22 Ba tla ba fitlha mo Bethesaita. Mme ba tlisa kwa go ene monna wa sefofu, ba mo rapela thata gore a mo ame." 
Mark8:23 Mme a tshwara monna wa sefofu ka seatla, a mo gogela kwa ntle ga motsana; ya re a sena go mo kgwela mathe mo matlhong le go mmaya diatla, a mmotsa a re: “A o bona sengwe?”" 
Mark8:24 A lelala a re: “Ke bona batho; ke ba bona e kete ditlhare, ba a tsamaya.”" 
Mark8:25 Foo a mmaya diatla gape mo matlhong, mme a leba ka tlhomamo, a fodisiwa, a bona dilo tsotlhe sentle fela." 
Mark8:26 Mme a mo tsamaisetsa kwa ga gagwe kwa gae a re: “O se ka wa tsena le fa e le mo motsaneng o.” 
Mark8:27 Mme Jesu a tswela kwa metsaneng ya Kaesarea Filipi, a na le barutwa ba gagwe. Ya re mo tseleng a botsa barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Ana batho ba tle ba re nna ke mang?”" 
Mark8:28 Ba mo raya ba re: “Johane Mokolobetsi; bangwe ba re: Elija; mme ba bangwe ba re: mongwe wa baperofeti.” 
Mark8:29 A ba botsa a re: “Mme lona lwa re ke mang?” Petere a mo fetola a re: “O ene Keresete.” 
Mark8:30 Mme a ba laya go re ba se bolelele ope ka ga gagwe. 
Mark8:31 A simolola go ba ruta fa Morwa Motho a na le go bogisiwa dilo di le dintsi, le go ganwa ke bagolwane, le ke ditlhogo tsa baperesiti, le ke bakwadi, le gone fa a tlaa bolawa, mme morago ga malatsi a le mararo a tlaa ba a tsoga." 
Mark8:32 Lefoko le a le buela kwa ntle fela. Mme Petere a mo tsaya, a simolola go mo omanya." 
Mark8:33 Mme ene a retologa, ya re a bona barutwa ba gagwe, a omanya Petere a re: “Tloga fa pele ga me, Satane, gonne ga o tlhokomele dilo tse e leng tsa Modimo, fa e se tsa batho fela.”" 
Mark8:34 A ipiletsa bontsi jwa batho, ba na le barutwa ba gagwe, a ba raya a re: “Fa motho mongwe le fa e le mang a rata go ntshala morago, a a iitatole, a tseye mokgoro wa gagwe, a itse go ntshala morago," 
Mark8:35 gonne le fa e le mang yo o ratang a ka bo a boloka botshelo jwa gagwe, bo tlaa mo latlhegela; mme le fa e le mang yo o latlhegela; mme le fa e le mang yo o latlhegelwang ke botshelo jwa gagwe ka ntlha ya me, le ka ntlha ya Mafoko a a Molemo, o tlaa bo boloka." 
Mark8:36 Gonne go ka thusa motho eng, fa a fenya lefatshe lotlhe, mme a latlha botshelo jwa gagwe?" 
Mark8:37 Motho o ka ntsha eng, a se baya mo boemong jwa botshelo jwa gagwe?" 
Mark8:38 Gonne le fa e le mang yo o tlaa ntlhabelwang ke ditlhong, le mafoko a me a a tlhabelwa ke ditlhong, mo losikeng lo lwa boaka le boleo, Morwa Motho le ene o tlaa mo tlhabelwa ke ditlhong, mogang o tlang ka kgalalelo ya ga rraagwe, a na le baengele ba ba boitshepo.”" 
Mark9:1 A ba raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, go na le bangwe mo go ba ba emeng fa, ba ba se ketlang ba utlwa loso gope, ba ise ba bone bogosi jwa Modimo bo tla ka nonofo pele.”" 
Mark9:2 Ya re malatsi a le marataro a sena go feta, Jesu a tsaya Petere, le Jakobe, le Johane, a tlhatlogela nabo mo thabeng e e godileng, kwa thoko ba le bosi; mme a ya a fetoga ponalo fa pele ga bone;" 
Mark9:3 diaparo tsa gagwe tsa tsabakela, tsa nna bosweu thata; mo go se nang mosweufatsi ope mo lefatsheng yo o ka di sweufatsang jalo." 
Mark9:4 Mme ga bonala kwa go bone Elija a na le Moše; mme ba ba ba bua le Jesu. 
Mark9:5 Petere a bua a raya Jesu a re: “Moruti, go molemo go rona go nna fa; o mme re dire metlaagana e le meraro: mongwe e nne wa gago, mongwe e nne wa ga Moše, o mongwe e nne wa ga Elija.”" 
Mark9:6 Gonne a sa itse se o ka se buang, ka ba ne ba boifa thata." 
Mark9:7 Mme ga tla leru la ba tshutifalela; mme ga tswa lentswe mo lerung la re: “Yo ke Morwaake yo o rategang, utlwang ene.”" 
Mark9:8 Ka tshoganetso ba leba ka fa le ka fa, mme ba se ka ba tlhola ba bona ope, fa e se go ipona ba le bosi fela le Jesu." 
Mark9:9 Ya re ba fologa mo thabeng, a ba laya gore ba se bolelele ope dilo tse ba di bonyeng, fa e se mo lobakeng lo Morwa Motho o tlaa bong a setse a tsogile mo losong ka lone." 
Mark9:10 Ba tshegetsa lefoko leo, ba botsanya gore, go ba go tsoga mo baswing go ka ne go kaya eng?" 
Mark9:11 Mme ba mmotsa, ba re: “Bakwadi ba reng fa ba re, Elija o na le go tla pele?”" 
Mark9:12 A ba raya a re: “Ruri Elija o tla pele, mme o tsosolosa dilo tsotlhe. Go kwadilwe jang ka ga Morwa Motho fa a tlaa boga dilo di le dintsi, a ba a nyadiwa?" 
Mark9:13 Ke a lo raya ka re, Elija o setse a tsile, mme ba bile ba mo diretse jaaka ba rata, fela jaaka go kwadilwe ka ga gagwe.”" 
Mark9:14 Ya re ba tla mo barutweng, ba fitlhela bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho bo ba dikanyeditse, le bakwadi ba tatalalanye nabo." 
Mark9:15 Fela ka bonako ya re batho ba bantsi botlhe ba mmona, ba gakgamala thata, ba tabogela kwa go ene, ba mo dumedisa." 
Mark9:16 Mme a ba botsa a re: “Lo tatalanetseng nabo?” 
Mark9:17 Mongwe wa bontsi a mo fetola a re: “Moruti, ke lerile morwaake kwa go wena; o na le mowa wa semumu." 
Mark9:18 Gongwe le gongwe kwa o mo tshwarang teng, o mo piriganyetsa fa fatshe; mme a phoke mafulo, a phuranye meno, a kwatlalale. Mme ke buile le barutwa ba gago gore ba o kgoromeletse ntle, mme ba palelwa.”" 
Mark9:19 A bua nabo a re: “Ao! a losika lo lo se nang tumelo ke lona, ke tlaa nna le lona goleele go le kae? Ke tlaa lo itshokela goleele go le kae? Mo lereng kwano go nna.”" 
Mark9:20 Ba mo isa kwa go ene; mme ya re a mmona ka bonako mowa wa mo tsibiketsa mo go botlhoko; mme a wela fa fatshe a bidikama, a phoka mafulo." 
Mark9:21 Mme a botsa rraagwe a re: “Go fetile lobaka lo lokae, golo mo go sena go tlaa mo go ene?” Mme a re: “E sa le ka bonyana jwa gagwe." 
Mark9:22 Gantsintsi o mo digetse mo molelong le mo metsing go mo senya; mme fa o nonofile go dira sengwe, o re tlhomogele pelo, o re thuse.”" 
Mark9:23 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Wa re: ‘Fa o nonofile!’ Aitse dilo tsotlhe di ka diralela yo o dumelang.” 
Mark9:24 Foo rra ngwana a goa a re: “Ke a dumela; thusa go tlhoka go dumela ga me.” 
Mark9:25 Ya re Jesu a bona fa bontsi jwa batho bo tabogela mmogo teng, a kgalemela mowa o o maswe a re: “Wena mowa wa semumu, o o bosusu, ke a go laola, tswa mo go ene, mme o se ka wa tlhola o tsena mo go ene.”" 
Mark9:26 Ya re o sena go goa, le go mo tsibiketsa thata, wa tswa, mme ngwana a nna jaaka moswi fela; bontsi jwa batho jwa ba jwa tla jwa re: “O sule.”" 
Mark9:27 Mme Jesu a mo tshwara ka seatla, a mo kakatlolola, mme a ema." 
Mark9:28 Ya re a sena go tsena mo ntlong, barutwa ba gagwe ba mmoletsa kwa thoko, ba re: “Re ne re sa nonofa ka ntlha yang go o kgoromeletsa ntle?”" 
Mark9:29 A ba raya a re: “O o ntseng jaana ga o ka ke wa tswa ka sepe, fa e se ka thapelo, (le ka go ikitsa go ja).”" 
Mark9:30 Mme a tswa teng, a ya a ralala lefatshe la Galilea; mme a bo a rata ga se ka ga itse ope." 
Mark9:31 Gonne a ruta barutwa ba gagwe, a ba raya a re: “Morwa Motho o neetswe mo diatleng tsa batho, mme ba tlaa mmolaya; mme o tlaa re a sena go bolawa, go fete malatsi a le mararo, mme a ba a tsoge gape.”" 
Mark9:32 Mme ba se ka ba tlhaologanya lefoko leo, mme ba boifa go mmotsa." 
Mark9:33 Ba fitlha mo Kaperenaume; mme a re a le mo ntlong, a ba botsa a re: “Lo ne lo ganetsanya eng mo tseleng?”" 
Mark9:34 Ba didimala fela, gonne ba ne ba ganetsantse mo tseleng kgang ya go re, yo mogolo ke mang?" 
Mark9:35 Mme a dula, a bitsa ba ba 12; a ba raya a re: “Fa motho mongwe le fa e le mang a rata go nna wa kwa pele, a ene a nne wa moragorago, a ba a nne modiredi wa botlhe.”" 
Mark9:36 Mme a tsaya ngwanyana, a mmaya fa gare ga bone; a mo tsaya mo mabogong a gagwe; a ba raya a re:" 
Mark9:37 “Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa tsholang mongwe wa banyana ba ba ntseng jaana, ka leina la me, o tshola nna; le gone le fa e le mang yo o tsholang nna, ga a tshole nna, o tshola ene yo o nthomileng.”" 
Mark9:38 Johane a mo raya a re: “Moruti re bonye mongwe a kgoromeletsa mewa e e maswe ntle ka leina la gago; mme ra mo itsa, ka gobo a sa re sale morago.”" 
Mark9:39 Mme Jesu a re: “Lo se ka lwa mo itsa; gonne ga go na motho ope yo o ka reng a dira tiro ya nonofo, ka leina la me, a ba a ka bua bosula ka ga me ka bofefo." 
Mark9:40 Gonne yo o sa tlhabaneng le rona, o ntlheng ya rona." 
Mark9:41 Gonne le fa e le mang yo o tlaa lo nosang metsi ka senwelo, ka gobo lo le ba ga Keresete, ammaaruri ke a lo raya, ga a ketla a tlhoka tuelo ya gagwe gope." 
Mark9:42 “Mme le fa e le mang yo o tlaa kgopang mongwe wa ba babotlana ba, ba ba dumelang mo go nna, go ka nna molemo bogolo mo go ene fa lolwala lo logolo lo ka gokelelwa mo thamong ya gagwe, mme a thabuediwa mo lewatleng." 
Mark9:43 Fa seatla sa gago se go kgopa, o se kgaole; go ka nna molemo mo go wena go tsena mo botshelong o le segole, bogolo go go tsena o le diatla tsoo pedi mo moleteng, mo molelong o o sa ka keng wa tingwa;" 
Mark9:44 (kwa seboko sa bone se sa sweng teng, le kwa molelo o sa tingweng teng.)" 
Mark9:45 Mme fa lonao lwa gago lo go kgopa, o lo kgaole; go ka nna molemo mo go wena go tsena mo botshelong o le setlhotsa, bogolo go go latlhelwa o le dinao tsoo pedi mo moleteng." 
Mark9:46 (Kwa seboko sa bone se sa sweng teng le kwa molelo o sa tingweng teng.) 
Mark9:47 Fa leitlho la gago le go kgopa, o le gonye; go ka nna molemo mo go wena go tsena mo bogosing jwa Modimo o le moitlho, bogolo go go latlhelwa o le matlho mabedi mo moleteng." 
Mark9:48 Kwa seboko sa bone se sa sweng teng, le kwa molelo o sa tingweng teng." 
Mark9:49 “Gonne mongwe le mongwe o tlaa lokwa ka molelo, (le setlhabelo sengwe le sengwe se tlaa lokwa ka letswai.)" 
Mark9:50 “Letswai le molemo; mme fa letswai le senyegile molodi, le tlaa lokwa ka eng? Nnang le letswai mo go lona, mme lo agisanye.”" 
Mark10:1 A tloga teng, a tla mo melelwaneng ya Jutea le moseja ga Joretane; mme matshutitshuti a batho a phuthegela kwa go ene gape, mme a ba ruta gape jaaka a tlwaetse." 
Mark10:2 Ga tla Bafarisai kwa go ene, ba mmotsa ba re: “A monna o letleletswe go tlhala mosadi wa gagwe?” Mme ba bo ba mo lalela." 
Mark10:3 A ba fetola a re: “Moše o lo laotse a reng?” 
Mark10:4 Ba re: “Moše o ne a re leseletsa go kwala lokwalo lwa tlhalo, le go tlhala mosadi.”" 
Mark10:5 Mme Jesu a ba raya a re: “Moše o ne a lo kwalela taolo e ka ntlha ya bothata jwa dipelo tsa lona. 
Mark10:6 E sa le ka tshimologo ya tlholego, go twe: ‘O ba bopile nona le tshadi.’" 
Mark10:7 ‘Ke gone ka moo monna o tlaa tlogelang rraagwe le mmaagwe, a ngaparela mosadi wa gagwe;" 
Mark10:8 mme bobedi jo bo tlaa nna nama e le nngwe fela; jalo ba bo ba sa tlhole ba le babedi, ke nama e le nngwe fela.’" 
Mark10:9 Ke gone, a motho a se kgaoganye tse Modimo o di kopantseng.”" 
Mark10:10 Ya re mo ntlong barutwa ba mmotsa gape ka ga selo se. 
Mark10:11 A ba raya a re: “Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa tlhalang mosadi wa gagwe, a nyala o sele, o a mo akafalela;" 
Mark10:12 mme fa mosadi ka esi a tlhala monna wa gagwe, a nyalwa ke o sele, o dira boaka.”" 
Mark10:13 Ba lere banyana kwa go ene gore a ba ame, mme barutwa ba ba kgalemela." 
Mark10:14 Ya re Jesu a bona jalo, a gakatsega thata, a ba raya a re: “Lesang banyana ba tle kwa go nna, lo se ka lwa ba itsa, gonne bogosi jwa Modimo ke jwa ba ba ntseng jalo." 
Mark10:15 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, le fa e le mang yo o se ketlang a tshola bogosi jwa Modimo jaaka ngwanyana, ga a ketla a tsena mo go jone gope.”" 
Mark10:16 Mme a ba tsaya mo mabogong a gagwe, a ba segofatsa, ka go ba baya diatla." 
Mark10:17 Ya re a sa tsamaela pele mo tseleng, ga tabogela mongwe kwa go ene, a mo khubamela ka mangole, a mmotsa a re: “Moruti yo o molemo, ke tlaa dirang gore ke rue botshelo jo bo sa khutleng?”" 
Mark10:18 Jesu a mo raya a re: “O mpiletsang molemo? Ga go ope yo o molemo, fa e se a le mongwe fela, e bong Modimo." 
Mark10:19 Ditaolo o a di itse tse di reng: ‘O se ka wa bolaya motho, o se ka wa dira boaka, o se ka wa utswa, o se ka wa supa tshupo ya kako, o se ka wa tsietsa, tlotla rraago le mmaago.’ ”" 
Mark10:20 Mme a mo raya a re: “Moruti, dilo tse tsotlhe fela ke sa le ke di tlhokomela go tloga bokaung jwa me.”" 
Mark10:21 Mme Jesu a mo leba, a mo rata, mme a mo raya a re: “O tlhoka selo se le sengwe fela: Ya go rekisa tsotlhe tse o nang natso, o abele bahumanegi, mme o tlaa nna le khumo kwa legodimong; o bo o tle o ntshale morago.”" 
Mark10:22 Mme a bifa sefatlhogo ka lefoko leo, a tsamaya ka bohutsana, gonne e ne e le motho yo o dithuo dintsi." 
Mark10:23 Mme Jesu a lebaleba ka fa le ka fa, a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Kana ba ba nang le mahumo ba tlaa tsena mo bogosing jwa Modimo ka pitlagano jang!”" 
Mark10:24 Barutwa ba gakgamalela mafoko a gagwe. Jesu a ba fetola gape, a re: “Kana go thata jang mo go ba ba ikantseng nahumo go tsena mo bogosing jwa Modimo!" 
Mark10:25 Go ka nna bofefo kamela go tsena ka letshoba la lomao, bogolo go mohumi go tsena mo bogosing jwa Modimo.”" 
Mark10:26 Ba gakgamala thatathata, ba mo raya ba re: “Fa e le jalo go bo go ka bolokwa mang?”" 
Mark10:27 Jesu a ba leba a re: “Mo bathong go retetse, mme e seng mo Modimong, gonne mo Modimong dilo tsotlhe di ka dirafala.”" 
Mark10:28 Petere a simolola go mo raya a re: “Bona, rona re tlogetse gotlhe, mme re go setse morago.”" 
Mark10:29 Jesu a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, ga go motho ope yo o tlogetseng ntlo, kgotsa bomorwa rraagwe, kgotsa bokgaitsadie, kgotsa mmaagwe, kgotsa rraagwe, kgotsa bana, kgotsa masimo, ka ntlha ya me, le ka ntlha ya Mafoko a a Molemo," 
Mark10:30 yo o se ketlang a bona ga lekgolo, le jaana mo lobakeng lono, e bong matlo, le bomorwa rraagwe, le bokgaitsadie, le bommaagwe, le bana, le masimo, di na le dipogiso; mme mo lefatsheng le le tlang o tlaa bona botshelo jo bo sa khutleng." 
Mark10:31 Bantsi ba e neng e le ba pele ba tlaa nna ba morago; le ba morago ba nne ba kwa pele.” 
Mark10:32 Ba bo ba le mo tseleng ba tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema; Jesu a ba eteletse pele; mme ba bo ba tseanye; le ba ba setseng morago ba boifa. Mme a tsaya gape ba ba 12, a simolola go ba bolelela dilo tse di tlaa mo dirafalelang." 
Mark10:33 A re: “Bonang, re ya kwa Jerusalema; mme Morwa Motho o tlaa neelwa ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bakwadi, mme ba tlaa mo sekisa gore a swe, ba tlaa mo neela Baditšhaba," 
Mark10:34 ba tlaa mo sotla, ba mo kgwela mathe, ba mo seola, ba mmolaya; mme e tlaa re malatsi a le mararo a sena go feta, o tlaa ba a tsoga.”" 
Mark10:35 Ga mo atamela Jakobe le Johane, bomorwa Sebete, ba re: “Moruti re rata wa re direla ka fa re tlaa go lopang ka teng.”" 
Mark10:36 A ba raya a re: “Lo rata ke ka bo ke lo direlang?” 
Mark10:37 Ba mo raya ba re: “O mme re dule, mongwe ka fa tsogong la gago le legolo, yo mongwe ka fa tsogong la gago la molema, mo kgalalelong ya gago.”" 
Mark10:38 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ga lo itse se lo se lopang. A lo nonofile go nwa senwelo se ke se nwang, kgotsa go kolobediwa ka kolobetso e ke kolobediwang ka yone?”" 
Mark10:39 Ba mo raya ba re: “Re nonofile.” Jesu a ba raya a re: “Senwelo se ke se nwang, lona lo tlaa se nwa; lo ba lo kolobediwa ka kolobetso e ke kolobediwang ka yone." 
Mark10:40 Mme go dula ka fa tsogong la me le legolo, le ka fa go la molema, ga se ga me go go naya; go tlaa newa bone ba ba go baakanyeditsweng.”" 
Mark10:41 Ya re ba ba some ba utlwa, ba simolola go gakalela boJakobe le Johane." 
Mark10:42 Mme Jesu a ba ipiletsa, a ba raya a re: “Lo a itse fa ba ba kaiwang balaodi mo go Baditšhaba ba le bogoma mo go bone; le bagolo ba bone ba a ba laola." 
Mark10:43 Go se ka ga nna jalo mo go lona; le fa e le mang yo o ratang a ka bo a le mogolo mo go lona, a a nne modiredi wa lona." 
Mark10:44 Le gone yo o ratang a ka bo a le wa kwa pele mo go lona, a a nne motlhanka wa botlhe." 
Mark10:45 Gonne ruri Morwa Motho ga a a ka a tla go direlwa, mme e le go direla, le go ntsha botshelo jwa gagwe, gore e nne serekololo sa batho ba le bantsi.”" 
Mark10:46 Ba fitlha kwa Jeriko; mme ya re a tswa mo Jeriko, a na le barutwa ba gagwe, le bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho, Baretimaeo morwa Timaeo, mokopi wa sefofu, a bo a dutse fa thoko ga tsela." 
Mark10:47 Ya re a utlwa fa e le Jesu wa Nasaretha, a simolola go goa a re: “Jesu morwa Dafite, nkutlwela botlhoko!”" 
Mark10:48 Mme batho ba le bantsi ba mo kgalemela, ba re a didimale, mme a goa bogolo bogolo a re: “Morwa Dafite, nkutlwela botlhoko.”" 
Mark10:49 Mme Jesu a ema a re: “Mmitseng,” mme ba bitsa monna wa sefofu, ba mo raya ba re: “Nametsega tlhe, nanoga o a go bitsa.”" 
Mark10:50 Ene a latlha seaparo sa gagwe, a tlola, a tla kwa go Jesu." 
Mark10:51 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “O rata ka go direlang?” Monna wa sefofu a mo raya a re: “Moruti, a nke ke amogele pono ya me.”" 
Mark10:52 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Tsamaya, tumelo ya gago e go fodisitse.” Mme a akofa a amogela pono ya gagwe, a ba a mo sala morago mo tseleng." 
Mark11:1 E rile ba setse ba atametse Jerusalema, ba le kwa Bethefage le Bethania, fa Thoteng ya Lotlhware, a roma barutwa ba gagwe ba le babedi." 
Mark11:2 A ba raya a re: “Yang mo motsaneng o lo lebaganyeng nao; lo tlaa re lo tsena mo go one lo akofe lo fitlhele eselana e golegilwe, e e iseng e ke e palangwe ke ope; lo e golole, lo e lere kwano." 
Mark11:3 Mme e re fa mongwe a lo raya a re: ‘Lo dirang jaana?’ Lo re: ‘Morena o a e batla, mme o tlaa ba a akofa a e busetsa kwano.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Ba tsamaya ba ya ba fitlhela eselana e golegilwe fa mojako, ka fa ntle, mo mmileng o o paa fela; mme ba e golola." 
Mark11:5 Bangwe ba batho ba ba emeng teng, ba ba raya ba re: “Lo dirang lo golola eselana?”" 
Mark11:6 Ba bua nabo fela jaaka Jesu a ne a buile, mme ba ba lesa ba tsamaya." 
Mark11:7 Mme ba isa eselana kwa go Jesu, ba baya diaparo tsa bone mo go yone, mme a e palama." 
Mark11:8 Batho ba le bantsi ba ala diaparo tsa bone mo tseleng, ba bangwe ba ala dikala tse ba tswang go di kgaola mo nageng." 
Mark11:9 Ba ba eteletseng pele, le ba ba setseng morago, ba thela lošalaba, ba re: “Hosana, go bakwe yo o tlang ka leina la Morena;" 
Mark11:10 a go bakwe bogosi jo bo tlang, bogosi jwa ga rraetsho Dafite; Hosana mo bogodimodimong.”" 
Mark11:11 Mme a tsena mo Jerusalema, mo tempeleng; mme a re a sena go kobakoba dilo tsotlhe, ka go setse go le maitseboa thata, a tswa a ya kwa Bethania a na le ba ba 12." 
Mark11:12 Ya re ka moso, ba sena go tswa mo Bethania, a bolawa ke tlala." 
Mark11:13 Ya re a bonela mofeige kgakala, o na le makakaba, a ya kwa go one, a re e tlaa re gongwe a bone sengwe mo go one, mme a re a fitlha fa go one a se ka a fitlhela sepe fa e se makakaba fela, gonne e ne e ise e nne lobaka lwa difeige." 
Mark11:14 Mme a o raya a re: “Motho ope a se ka a tlhola a ja loungo mo go wena gope.” Barutwa ba gagwe ba mo utlwa. 
Mark11:15 Mme ba fitlha mo Jerusalema; mme a tsena mo tempeleng, a simolola go kgoromeletsa kwa ntle ba ba rekisang, le ba ba rekang mo tempeleng, a pitikolola dimati tsa ba ba ananyang madi, le ditulo tsa ba ba rekisang maphoi;" 
Mark11:16 a se ka a leseletsa motho ope go ralala tempele a tshotse sejana. 
Mark11:17 Mme a ruta, a ba raya a re: “A ga go a kwalwa ga twe: ‘Ntlo ya me e tlaa bidiwa Ntlo ya thapelelo ya merafe yotlhe’? Mme lona lo e ntshitse mongobo wa dinokwane.”" 
Mark11:18 Ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bakwadi ba go utlwa, mme ba senka ka fa ba ka mo senyang ka teng, gonne ba mmoifa, ka batho botlhe ba gakgamaletse thuto ya gagwe." 
Mark11:19 E ne e tle e re go le maitseboa a tswe mo motseng. 
Mark11:20 Ya re ka moso ba feta, ba fitlhela mofeige o omeletse go ya le kwa meding." 
Mark11:21 Mme Petere ka a gakologelwa, a mo raya a re: “Moruti bona, mofeige o o letseng o o hutsitse o bile o omeletse.”" 
Mark11:22 Mme Jesu a ba raya a re: “Nnang le tumelo mo Modimong. 
Mark11:23 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, le yo o tlaa rayang thaba e, a re: ‘Manologa o thabuegele mo lewatleng;’ fa a sa belaele mo pelong ya gagwe, a dumela fa se o se buang se tlaa dirala; o tlaa se bona." 
Mark11:24 Ke gone ke lo rayang ke re, dilo tsotlhe tse lo di rapelelang lo di lopa, lo dumela fa lo di amogetse, mme lo tlaa di bona." 
Mark11:25 E tle e ne e re lo ema lo rapela, fa mongwe a le molato le lona lo mo itshwarele; gore Rraeno yo o kwa legodimong le ene a lo itshwarele ditlolo tsa lona. (" 
Mark11:26 Fa lona lo sa itshwarele, le gone Rraeno yo o kwa legodimong ga a ketla a lo itshwarela ditlolo tsa lona.)”" 
Mark11:27 Mme ba ba ba tla gape mo Jerusalema; ya re a tsamayatsamaya mo tempeleng ga tla kwa go ene ditlhogo tsa baperesiti, le bakwadi, le bagolwane;" 
Mark11:28 ba mo raya ba re: “Dilo tse o di dira ka taolo efe? Le yo o go neileng taolo ya go dira dilo tse ke mang?” 
Mark11:29 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ke tlaa lo botsa potso nngwe, lo mphetole, mme ke tlaa lo bolelela taolo e ke dirang dilo tse ka yone." 
Mark11:30 Kana kolobetso ya ga Johane, a e ne e tswa legodimong kgotsa mo bathong? Mphetolang.”" 
Mark11:31 Ba tseisanya kgang ba re: “E tlaa re fa re re: ‘E tswa legodimong,’ ene a re reye a re: ‘Mme lo ne lo sa mo dumeleleng?’" 
Mark11:32 Fa re ka re: ‘E tswa mo bathong’ ” – ba ne ba boifa batho; gonne ruri batho botlhe ba kaya Johane fa e ne e le moperofeti. 
Mark11:33 Mme ba fetola Jesu ba re: “Ga re itse.” Jesu a ba raya a re: “Le nna ga ke lo bolelele taolo e ke dirang dilo tse ka yone.” 
Mark12:1 A simolola go bua nabo ka ditshwantsho. A re: “Monna mongwe o kile a tlhoma tshimo ya mafine, a e beela logora, a epa lesudu la kgatisetso ya bojalwa jwa mofine, a aga sefata, mme a e neela badira masimo ba e thapa ka tuelo, mme a etela kwa lefatsheng le sele." 
Mark12:2 E rile motlha o fitlha, a roma motlhanka kwa go bone badira masimo, gore a amogele maungo a tshimo mo go bone." 
Mark12:3 Mme ba mo tshwara, ba mmetsa, ba mo leleka a iphotlhere fela." 
Mark12:4 A ba a roma motlhanka yo mongwe kwa go bone gape; ene ba mo ntsha dintho mo tlhogong, ba mo gagautla mo go tlhabisang ditlhong." 
Mark12:5 A roma yo mongwe; ene ba mmolaya; le ba bangwe ba le bantsi; bangwe ba ba betsa, ba bangwe ba ba bolaya." 
Mark12:6 O ne a sa ntse a na le mongwe, e bong morwawe yo o rategang; lwa bofelo a roma ene kwa go bone, a re: ‘Ba tlaa sisimoga morwaake.’" 
Mark12:7 Badira tshimo bao ba raana ba re: ‘Yo ke moruaboswa; tlang, re mmolayeng mme boswa e tlaa nna jwa rona.’" 
Mark12:8 Mme ba mo tshwara ba mmolaya, ba mo latlhela kwa ntle ga tshimo ya mafine." 
Mark12:9 “Jaana morena wa tshimo ya mafine o tlaa dirang? O tlaa tla a senya badira tshimo, mme tshimo o tlaa e neela ba sele." 
Mark12:10 A le fa e le lefoko le ga lo ise lo le bale la go re: ‘Lentswe le baagi ba le ganneng ke lone le le dirilweng tlhogo ya kgokgotsho. 
Mark12:11 Selo se, sa tswa mo go Morena, mme se a gakgamatsa mo matlhong a rona’?”" 
Mark12:12 Mme ba batla go mo tshwara; mme ba boifa batho ba bantsi, gonne ba lemoga fa a bua setshwantsho se ka ga bone; mme ba mo tlogela ba tsamaya." 
Mark12:13 Ba roma Bafarisai bangwe le Baherote kwa go ene, gore ba mo tshware mo puong." 
Mark12:14 Ya re ba sena go fitlha ba mo raya ba re: “Moruti, re a itse fa o le boammaaruri, o sa re ope sepe; gonne ga o tlhokomele bomangmang jwa batho, mme o bolela tsela ya Modimo ka bommaanete; a go letleletswe go kgethela Kaesare kgotsa nnyaa?" 
Mark12:15 A ke re ntshe lekgetho kgotsa re se ka ra le ntsha?” Ene, ka a itse boitimokanyo jwa bone, a ba raya a re: “Lo nthaelelang? Nteretseng thušeleng gore ke e bone.” Ba e lere." 
Mark12:16 A ba raya a re: “Setshwano se le sekwalo, ke tsa ga mang?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Tsa ga Kaesare.”" 
Mark12:17 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ke gone ntshetsang Kaesare dilo tse e leng tsa ga Kaesare, le Modimo tse e leng tsa Modimo.” Mme ba mo gakgamalela thata." 
Mark12:18 Ga tla kwa go ene Basadukai ba ba reng ga go na tsogo ya baswi; 
Mark12:19 ba mmotsa ba re: “Moruti, Moše o re kwaletse a re, fa morwa rramotho a swa, a tlogela mosadi, mme a sa tlogele ngwana, morwa rraagwe a tseye mosadi wa gagwe, a tsosetse morwa rraagwe losika." 
Mark12:20 Go kile ga ne go le bomorwa monna ba supa; wa ntlha a tsaya mosadi, mme a swa, a sa tlogele losika;" 
Mark12:21 wa bobedi a tsaya mosadi yoo, mme a swa, a sa tlogele losika; le mo go wa boraro ga nna jalo." 
Mark12:22 Le ka bosupa jwa bone ba se ka ba tlogela losika. Morago ga bone botlhe mosadi le ene a swa. 
Mark12:23 Ana e tlaa re mo go tsogeng ga baswi, e tlaa nna mosadi wa ga mang mo go bone, gonne ba ne ba mo nyetse boo basupa?”" 
Mark12:24 Jesu a ba raya a re: “A ga se gone ka fa lo timelang ka teng, ka lo sa itse dikwalo, le fa e le nonofo ya Modimo?" 
Mark12:25 Gonne e tlaa re ba tsoga mo baswing boo ba sa nyale, le fa e le go neelwa nyalong; mme ba bo ba ntse jaaka baengele kwa legodimong." 
Mark12:26 Mme ka ga baswi, fa ba tsosiwa; a ga lo a bala mo lokwalong lwa ga Moše, fa go bolelwang ka ga setlhare teng, ka fa Modimo o buileng nae ka teng wa re: ‘Ke nna Modimo wa ga Aberahame, wa ga Isake le wa ga Jakobe’?" 
Mark12:27 One ga se Modimo wa baswi, mme ke wa batshedi; lo timela fela thata.”" 
Mark12:28 Mongwe wa bakwadi a tla, mme a utlwa ka fa ba botsanyang ka teng, mme ka a itse fa a ba fetotse sentle, a mmotsa a re: “Taolo e e leng tlhogo ya tsone tsotlhe ke efe?”" 
Mark12:29 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Ya tlhogo ke e: ‘Utlwa wena Iseraele. Morena Modimo wa rona, o mongwe fela;" 
Mark12:30 gape, o rate Morena Modimo wa gago ka pelo yotlhe ya gago, le ka mowa otlhe wa gago, le ka tlhaloganyo yotlhe ya gago, le ka thata yotlhe ya gago.’" 
Mark12:31 Ya bobedi ke e: ‘O rate mongwe ka wena jaaka o ithata.’ Ga go na taolo epe e e fetang tsone tse.” 
Mark12:32 Mme mokwadi a mo raya a re: “Ka mmaanete, Moruti, o buile sentle, jaaka o re: O mongwe fela, le gone: Ga go ope o sele fa e se ene." 
Mark12:33 Le go mo rata ka pelo yotlhe, le ka tlhaloganyo yotlhe, le ka thata yotlhe, le motho go rata mongwe ka ene jaaka a ithata, ke mo go gaisang ditshupelo tse di fisiwang di le boleka, le ditlhabelo tsotlhe.”" 
Mark12:34 Ya re Jesu a bona fa a fetotse ka tlhaloganyo, a mo raya a re: “Ga o kgakala le bogosi jwa Modimo.” Morago ga mo ga se ka ga tlhola go le ope yo o pelokgale ya go mmotsa potso epe." 
Mark12:35 Jesu ya re a ruta mo tempeleng a bua a re: “Bakwadi ba bua jang ba re: ‘Keresete ke morwa Dafite’? 
Mark12:36 Dafite ka esi a bua ka Mowa o o Boitshepo a re: ‘Morena o reile Morena wa me a re: Dula ka fa tsogong la me le legolo, ke be ke tle ke dire baba ba gago sebeo sa dinao tsa gago.’" 
Mark12:37 Dafite ka esi o mmitsa Morena; mme o ntse morwawe jang?” Ba e leng batho fela ba mo utlwa ka boitumelo. 
Mark12:38 Mo go ruteng ga gagwe a re: “Lo itise mo bakwading ba ba eletsang go tsamaya ka dikobo tse di kgokgothang, le go dumedisiwa mo marekelong," 
Mark12:39 le ditulo tse di kwa pele mo matlong a thuto, le manno a a kwa pele mo medirong." 
Mark12:40 Bone ba ba supuletsang basadi ba batlholagadi matlo a bone, ba golole merapelo go nna seipato; bao ba tlaa bona tshekiso e kgolo bogolo.”" 
Mark12:41 Mme a ya a dula bolebana le letlole la madi a tempele, a bona ka fa batho ba bantsi ba tsenyang madi mo letloleng ka teng; ba ba humileng ba le bantsi ba tsenya a magolo." 
Mark12:42 Mme ga tla mosadi wa motlholagadi wa sehumanegi, a tsenya madinyana a le mabedi a e a reng a kopanye e be e le bontlhanngwe jwa peni fela." 
Mark12:43 A ipiletsa barutwa ba gagwe, a ba raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, Motlholagadi yo, wa sehumanegi, o tsentse bogolo go botlhe ba ba tsenyang mo letloleng la madi." 
Mark12:44 Gonne bone botlhe ba tsentse ga letlotlo la bone; mme ene o tsentse ga lehuma la gagwe, a tsenya gotlhe mo o nang nago, e bong gotlhe mo o tshelang ka gone.”" 
Mark13:1 E rile a tswa mo tempeleng, mongwe wa barutwa ba gagwe a mo raya a re: “Moruti, bona maje a, ka fa a ntseng ka teng, le dikago tse ka fa di ntseng ka teng.”" 
Mark13:2 Jesu a mo raya a re: “A o a di bona dikago tse dikgolo tse? Ga go ketla go tlogelwa fa lentswe lepe le tlhatlaganye le le lengwe, le le se ketlang le dingwa.”" 
Mark13:3 Ya re a dutse mo Thoteng ya Lotlhware, bolebana le tempele, bo Petere le Jakobe le Johane le Anterea ba mmoletsa kwa thoko ba re:" 
Mark13:4 “Re bolelele gore dilo tse di tlaa dirafala leng, le sesupo e tlaa nna eng sa fa dilo tsotlhe tse di tloga di dirafala?”" 
Mark13:5 Jesu a simolola go ba raya a re: “Lo itise gore motho ope a se ka a lo timetsa. 
Mark13:6 Bantsi ba ba tlaa tlang ka leina la me, ba ikaya ba re: ‘Ke nna ene;’ mme ba tlaa timetsa batho ba le bantsi." 
Mark13:7 Mme lo tlaa re lo utlwela dintwa, le medumo ya dintwa, lo ise ka lwa fuduega; dilo tse di na le go dirafala fela; mme e tlaa bo e ise e nne bokhutlo." 
Mark13:8 Gonne morafe o tlaa tsogologela morafe, le bogosi bogosi; go tlaa nna dithoromo tsa lefatshe mo mafelong mangwe le mangwe; go tlaa nna meswele; mme dilo tse e be e le tshimologo ya metlotsedi." 
Mark13:9 “Lo itise, gonne ba tlaa lo neela mo makgotleng; lo tlaa bediwa mo matlong a thuto; lo tlaa ema fa pele ga balaodi le dikgosi ka ntlha ya me, go nna tshupo mo go bone." 
Mark13:10 Mme Mafoko a a Molemo a na le go rerelwa merafe yotlhe pele. 
Mark13:11 Mme e tlaa re ba lo gogela kwa ditshekong, ba lo neela balaodi, lo se ka lwa tlhobaelela pele se lo tlaa se buang; fela se lo tlaa se newang mo nakong eo, lo bue sone fela, gonne e tlaa bo e se lona ba lo buang, e tlaa bo e le Mowa o o Boitshepo." 
Mark13:12 Mme morwa rramotho o tlaa neela morwa rraagwe go bolawa, le rra motho ngwana wa gagwe; le bana ba tlaa tsogolegela batsadi ba bone, ba dira gore ba bolawe." 
Mark13:13 Lo tlaa ilwa ke batho botlhe ka ntlha ya leina la me; mme yo o itshokelang bokhutlong, yoo o tlaa bolokwa." 
Mark13:14 “E tlaa re lo bona yo o makgapha a a swafatsang a eme fa o sa tshwanelang go ema teng, yo o balang a a tlhaloganye, foo ba ba mo Jutea ba tshabele kwa dithabeng;" 
Mark13:15 le ene yo o fa godimo ga ntlo a se fologe, le fa e le go tsena mo teng, go tsaya sengwe mo ntlong ya gagwe;" 
Mark13:16 mme yo o kwa nageng a se ka a boela kobo ya gagwe. 
Mark13:17 Go tlaa bo go latlhega bone ba ba baimana, le ba ba amusang mo metlheng eo!" 
Mark13:18 Mme lo rapele gore go se ka ga nna go le mariga. 
Mark13:19 Gonne metlha eo e tlaa nna ya pitlagano, jaaka go ise go ke go bonwe gope, e sa le ka tshimologo ya tlholego e Modimo o e tlhodileng, le gompieno le gone ga go ketla go tlhola go bonwa gope." 
Mark13:20 Mme fa Morena a ko a se ka a khutshwafatsa metlha eo, e ka bo ne ne fano motho ope a se nka a bolokwa; mme a khutshwafatsa metlha ka ntlha ya baitshenkedwi ba o ba itshenketseng." 
Mark13:21 “Foo fa motho mongwe a ka lo raya a re: ‘Bonang, Keresete ke yo;’ kgotsa, ‘Bonang, o fale;’ lo se ka lwa dumela." 
Mark13:22 Gonne go tlaa tsoga boKeresete ba e seng bone, le baperofeti ba e seng bone, mme ba tlaa ntsha ditshupo le dikgakgamatso, gore ba tle ba timetse baitshenkedwi fa go ka nna jalo." 
Mark13:23 Mme lona lo itise; bonang, ke lo boleletse dilo tsotlhe go sa le gale." 
Mark13:24 “E tlaa re mo metlheng eo, morago ga pitlagano eo, letsatsi le tlaa fifala, kgwedi le yone ga e ketla e ntsha lesedi la yone;" 
Mark13:25 le dinaledi di tlaa bo di wa kwa legodimong, le dinonofo tse di mo magodimong di tlaa reketlisiwa." 
Mark13:26 Ke gone ba tlaa bonang Morwa Motho a tla mo marung ka nonofo e kgolo le kgalalelo. 
Mark13:27 Foo o tlaa roma baengele ba gagwe, mme ba tlaa phutha baitshenkedwi ba gagwe kwa diphefong tsoo nne, go tswa bofelelong jwa lefatshe go ya bofelelong jwa legodimo." 
Mark13:28 “Jaana ithuteng ka setlhare sa mofeige setshwantsho sa sone; e re fa kala ya sone e setse e le nana, mme e kukunya makakaba, lo a itse fa selemo se atametse." 
Mark13:29 Le lona fela jalo, e tlaa re lo bona dilo tse di dirafala, lo bo lo itse fa a le gaufi, a le fela fa mejakong." 
Mark13:30 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, losika lo ga lo ketla lo feta, go tle go tsamaye dilo tsotlhe tse, di dirafale pele." 
Mark13:31 Legodimo le tlaa feta le lefatshe; mme mafoko a me ga a ketla a feta. 
Mark13:32 “Mme ka ga letsatsi leo kgotsa nako eo, ga go itse ope, le fa e le baengele ba ba kwa legodimong, le fa e le Morwa, fa e se Rara fela." 
Mark13:33 Itiseng, lo lebelele lo rapele, gonne ga lo itse lobaka gore ke lofe." 
Mark13:34 Go tshwana jaaka fa monna a ile go jaka kwa lefatsheng le sele, e re ka a tlogetse ntlo ya gagwe, a bile a neetse batlhanka ba gagwe thata, le mongwe le mongwe tiro ya gagwe, le gone a laola molebedi wa kgoro gore a lebelele." 
Mark13:35 Ke gone, lebelelang, gonne ga lo itse gore morena wa ntlo o tlaa tla leng, kgotsa ka maabanyane, kgotsa bosigogare, kgotsa ka makuku, kgotsa a ka bosigo boo sa;" 
Mark13:36 e se re kgotsa fa a ka tla ka tshoganetso a lo fitlhela lo robetse. 
Mark13:37 Mme se ke se rayang lona, ke se raya botlhe fela ka re: ‘Lebelelang.’ ”" 
Mark14:1 Jaana morago ga malatsi a le mabedi, ga bo go le modiro wa Tlolaganyo, le wa senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang; mme ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bakwadi ba batla ka fa ba ka mo tshwarang ka teng ka bolotsana, go mmolaya," 
Mark14:2 gonne ba re: “E seng go le modiro, e ka tla ya re gongwe ga nna pheretlhego mo bathong.”" 
Mark14:3 Mme e rile a le kwa Bethania, mo ntlong ya ga Simone wa molepero, mme a dutse a ja, ga tla mosadi, a tshotse sedibelwana sa alebesetara se na le setlolo sa nareto, se se thata bobe go rekwa, mme a se thela mo tlhogong ya gagwe." 
Mark14:4 Mme ga bo go le bangwe teng ba ba gaketseng, ba re: “Ana setlolo se fa se sentswe jaana ke go reng?" 
Mark14:5 Gonne setlolo se ne se ka rekisiwa, sa bona bogolo go diponto di le 30, mme tsa newa bahumanegi.” Mme ba mo ngongoregela." 
Mark14:6 Mme Jesu a re: “Mo leseng, lo mo tshwenyetsang? O dirile tiro e e molemo mo go nna," 
Mark14:7 gonne bahumanegi lo na nabo ka metlha yotlhe, lo ka ba direla molemo ka metlha yotlhe ka fa lo ratang ka teng; mme nna ga ke nne le lona ka metlha yotlhe." 
Mark14:8 O dirile ka fa o nonofileng ka teng: mmele wa me o o tloleditse phitlho go sa le gale. 
Mark14:9 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, gongwe le gongwe kwa Mafoko a a Molemo a tlaa rerwang teng mo lefatsheng lotlhe fela, le sone se mosadi yo o se dirileng, se tlaa bolelwa teng, gore e nne segopodiso ka ga gagwe.”" 
Mark14:10 Mme Jutase Isekariote, yo e neng e le mongwe wa ba ba 12, a tsamaya a ya ditlhogong tsa baperesiti, gore a tle a ba mo neele." 
Mark14:11 Bone ya re ba utlwa ba itumela, ba mo solofetsa gore ba tlaa mo naya madi. Mme a batla ka fa o ka ba mo neelang ka teng go se na kgoreletso." 
Mark14:12 E rile ka letsatsi la ntlha la senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang, fa ba isa setlhabelo sa Tlolaganyo, barutwa ba gagwe ba mo raya ba re: “O rata ra ya go baakanya kae, gore o jele Tlolaganyo teng?”" 
Mark14:13 Mme a roma barutwa ba gagwe ba le babedi, a ba raya a re: “Yang mo motseng, mme lo tlaa rakana le monna mongwe a rwele nkgwana ya metsi; lo sale ene morago;" 
Mark14:14 kwa o tsenang teng lo tle lo reye mong wa ntlo lo re: ‘Moruti a re: Ntlwana ya me e kae (ya bojelo jwa baeng,) kwa ke tlaa jelang Tlolaganyo teng le barutwa ba me?’" 
Mark14:15 Ene ka esi o tlaa lo bontsha ntlwana e kgolo e e fa godimo, e tsentswe dilwana, e baakantswe; mme lo re baakanyetse teng.”" 
Mark14:16 Barutwa ba tswa ba ya ba tsena mo motseng, ba fitlhela go ntse jaaka a ba boleletse; mme ba baakanya Tlolaganyo." 
Mark14:17 Ya re go le ka maabanyane a tla le ba ba 12. 
Mark14:18 Ya re ba dutse ba a ja, Jesu a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, mongwe wa lona o tlaa nkoka, e bong ene yo ke jang nae.”" 
Mark14:19 Mme ba simolola go hutsafala, le go mo raya mongwe le mongwe go re: “A ke nna?”" 
Mark14:20 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ke mongwe wa ba ba 12 yo o inang le nna mo sejaneng. 
Mark14:21 Gonne Morwa Motho o a tsamaya, fela jaaka go kwadilwe ka ga gagwe; mme go bo go latlhega monna yo o okang Morwa Motho! Go ka bo go le molemo mo monneng yoo fa a ka bo a se ka a tsalwa.”" 
Mark14:22 Ya re ba sa ja, a tsaya senkgwe, ya re a sena go se segofatsa, a se ngathoganya, a se ba naya a re: “Tsayang; se ke mmele wa me.”" 
Mark14:23 A ba a tsaya senwelo, mme ya re a sena go leboga, a se ba naya; mme ba nwa botlhe ga sone." 
Mark14:24 A ba raya a re: “Se ke madi a me a kgolagano, a a tshololelwang batho ba le bantsi." 
Mark14:25 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, ga nketla ke tlhola ke nwa loungo lwa mofine, go tsamaye letsatsi leo le tle, le ke tlaa lo nwang lo le loša mo bogosing jwa Modimo ka lone.”" 
Mark14:26 Mme e rile ba sena go opela sefela, ba tswa ba ya kwa Thoteng ya Lotlhware." 
Mark14:27 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Lo tlaa kgotšwa lotlhe, gonne go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘Ke tlaa itaya modisa, mme dinku di tlaa falalediwa koo.’" 
Mark14:28 Le fa go ntse jalo e tlaa re ke sena go tsosiwa, ke tlaa lo etelela pele ke ya kwa Galilea.”" 
Mark14:29 Petere a mo raya a re: “Le fa botlhe ba ka kgotšwa, nna nnyaa.”" 
Mark14:30 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke a go raya ka re, wena gompieno, e bong sigong jono, e tlaa re koko e tona e ise e be e lele gabedi, o tlaa bo o intatotse gararo.”" 
Mark14:31 Mme a tlerebetsa ka thata a re: “Le fa nka bo ke na le go swa nao, ga nketla ke go itatola.” Ba bua jalo botlhe fela." 
Mark14:32 Ba tla felong fa go bidiwang Gethesemane; mme a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Lona lo dule fa, ka ke sa ntse ke rapele.”" 
Mark14:33 A tsaya Petere, Jakobe le Johane, a ya nabo, mme a simolola go tseana thata, le go fuduega mo go botlhoko." 
Mark14:34 A ba raya a re: “Mowa wa me o hutsafetse thata, e le mo go isang losong fela; lo nne fa, lo lebelele.”" 
Mark14:35 A ya fa pelenyana, a wela fa fatshe, a rapela gore, fa go ka nna jalo, nako eo e mo fete." 
Mark14:36 A re: “Ntata, Rra, dilo tsotlhe di ka dirafala mo go wena; tlosa senwelo se mo go nna; le fa go ntse jalo e seng ka fa go rateng ga me, e leng ka fa go rateng ga gago.”" 
Mark14:37 Mme a tla, a ba fitlhela ba robetse, a raya Petere a re: “Simone, a o robetse? A o ne o sa ka ke wa lebelela ka lobakanyana fela?" 
Mark14:38 Lebelelang lo rapele, gore lo se tsene mo thaelong; mowa one o tlhaga, mme nama e bokoa.”" 
Mark14:39 A ba a tsamaya gape, a rapela, a fela a ntse a bua mafoko ao fela." 
Mark14:40 Mme a ba a tla gape, a ba fitlhela ba robetse; gonne matlho a bone a ne a bokaletse thata, ba bile ba sa itse ka fa ba ka mo fetolang ka teng." 
Mark14:41 A ba a tla lwa boraro, a ba raya a re: “Jaanong lo nne lo robale, lo ikhutse; go lekanye; nako e fitlhile; bonang, Morwa Motho o oketswe mo diatleng tsa baleofi." 
Mark14:42 Nanogang, re tsamayeng; bonang, yo o nkokang o gaufi!”" 
Mark14:43 Mme ya re ka bonako, a sa ntse a bua, ga tla Jutase, mongwe wa ba ba 12, a na le bontsi jwa batho, ba tshotse ditšhaka le melamu, ba tswa ditlhogong tsa baperesiti le bakwadi le bagolwane." 
Mark14:44 Jaana yo o mo okang o ne a ba neetse sekao sa go re: “Le fa e le mang yo ke tlaa mo atlang, ke ene; lo tshware ene, lo mo gogele koo ka tiiso.”" 
Mark14:45 Ya re a sena go fitlha, a siamela kwa go ene a re: “Moruti,” mme a mo atla." 
Mark14:46 Mme ba mo tsenya diatla, ba mo tshwara." 
Mark14:47 Mme mongwe wa ba ba emeng fa, a somola tšhaka, a rema motlhanka wa moperesiti yo mogolo, a mo kgaola tsebe." 
Mark14:48 Mme Jesu a bua a re: “A ke gore lo tshologetse legodu, ka lo tsile go ntshwara lo tshotse ditšhaka le melamu?" 
Mark14:49 Ke ntse ka nna le lona ka malatsi otlhe mo tempeleng, ke ruta, mme lo se ka lwa ntshwara; mme mo, go dirwa gore mafoko a dikwalo a dirafale.”" 
Mark14:50 Mme ba mo tlogela botlhe, ba tshaba." 
Mark14:51 Lekau lengwe la bo le mo setse morago, a itshopere bosaikategang jwa gagwe ka letsela la leloba; mme ba mo tshwara;" 
Mark14:52 mme a tlogela letsela la leloba, a tshaba a sa ikatega." 
Mark14:53 Mme ba gogela Jesu kwa moperesiting yo mogolo; mme ga phuthega nae ditlhogo tsotlhe tsa baperesiti le bagolwane le bakwadi. 
Mark14:54 Petere le ene o ne a latetse Jesu a le kgakala nae, a ba a tsenela kwa teng ga lolwapa lwa moperesiti yo mogolo; mme a bo a dutse le maotlana, a ikomosa mo leseding la molelo." 
Mark14:55 Jaana ditlhogo tsa baperesiti, le botlhe ba lekgotla ba batla tshupo ka ga Jesu, gore ba tle ba mmolaye; mme ba se ka ba e bona." 
Mark14:56 Gonne batho ba le bantsi ba ne ba supa ditshupo tsa kako ka ga Jesu; ditshupo tsa bone tsa bo di sa supele gongwe. 
Mark14:57 Ga ema bangwe, ba mo pateletsa ba re:" 
Mark14:58 “Re mo utlwile a re: ‘Ke tlaa senya tempele e, e e dirilweng ka diatla, mme e tlaa re ka malatsi a le mararo ke be ke age e sele, e e sa dirwang ka diatla.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Le fa e le jalo, le e leng ditshupo tsa bone ga di a ka tsa supela gongwe." 
Mark14:60 Mme moperesiti yo mogolo a ema fa gare, a botsa Jesu a re: “A ga o fetole sepe? Ke eng se batho ba ba se supang ka ga gago?”" 
Mark14:61 Mme ene a didimala fela, a se ka a fetola ka sepe. Gape moperesiti yo mogolo a mmotsa a re: “A o Keresete, Morwa Yo o Bakwang?”" 
Mark14:62 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ke nna; mme lo tlaa bona Morwa Motho a dutse ka fa letsogong le legolo la nonofo, a tla ka maru a legodimo.”" 
Mark14:63 Moperesiti yo mogolo a ikgagola diaparo a re: “Re sa dirang ka basupi? 
Mark14:64 Lo e utlwile tlhapatso eo; lo gopola jang?” Mme ba mo sekisa botlhe fela ba re: “O tshwanetse go swa.” 
Mark14:65 Bangwe ba simolola go mo kgwela mathe, le go mmipa sefatlhogo, go mo tlhanya, le go mo raya ba re: “Perofesa;” le maotlana a mo tshola ka go mo phaila ka diatla." 
Mark14:66 Ya re Petere a le kwa tlase mo lwapeng, ga tla lengwe la malata a moperesiti yo mogolo;" 
Mark14:67 ya re le bona Petere a ikomosa, la mo leba la re: “Le wena o ne o na le Monasaretha yo, e bong Jesu.”" 
Mark14:68 Mme a itatola a re: “Ga ke mo itse, le fa e le go tlhaloganya se o se buang;” mme a tswela kwa mathuding; mme koko e tona ya lela." 
Mark14:69 Lelata la mmona gape, la simolola go raya ba ba emeng teng, la re: “Yo ke mongwe wa bone.”" 
Mark14:70 Mme a ba a latola gape. Mme ya re kgantele ba ba emeng teng ba raya Petere gape ba re: “Ruri o mongwe wa bone, gonne o Mogalilea.”" 
Mark14:71 Mme a simolola go rogaka, le go ikana a re: “Ga ke mo itse, monna yo lo buang ka ga gagwe.”" 
Mark14:72 Mme koko e tona ya akofa ya lela lwa bobedi. Mme Petere a gakologelwa lefoko la ka fa Jesu o buileng nae ka teng, a re: “E tlaa re koko e tona e ise e lele gabedi, o bo o intatotse gararo.” Mme a re a akanya mo, a lela." 
Mark15:1 E rile bosigo boo sa, ditlhogo tsa baperesiti di na le bagolwane le bakwadi, le botlhe ba lekgotla, ba epa pitso, mme ba golega Jesu, ba mo tlosa, ba ya go mo neela Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Mme Pilato a mmotsa a re: “A o kgosi ya Bajuta?” Mme a mo fetola a re: “O a bolela.” 
Mark15:3 Ditlhogo tsa baperesiti tsa mo naya melato ya dilo di le dintsi. 
Mark15:4 Pilato a ba a mmotsa gape a re: “A ga o fetole ka lepe? Bona dilo tse dintsi tse ba go nayang melato ka ga tsone.” 
Mark15:5 Jesu a se ka a tlhola a fetola ka lepe; Pilato a ba a gakgamala. 
Mark15:6 Jaana e ne e tle e re ka lobaka lwa modiro a ba gololele mogolegwi mongwe, yo ba mo mo lopang." 
Mark15:7 Ga bo go le mongwe yo go tweng Barabase, a golegilwe le ba ba dirileng pheretlho mo motseng, e le banna ba e rileng mo pheretlhong ba bolaya batho." 
Mark15:8 Mme bontsi jwa batho jwa atamela, jwa simolola go mo lopa gore a dire jaaka a ne a tle a ba direle." 
Mark15:9 Pilato a ba fetola a re: “A lo rata ka lo gololela Kgosi ya Bajuta?” 
Mark15:10 Ka go bo a lemoga fa ditlhogo tsa baperesiti di mo neetse mo tshekong ka khufano. 
Mark15:11 Mme ditlhogo tsa baperesiti tsa tlhotlheletsa batho gore bogolo a ba gololele Barabase. 
Mark15:12 Pilato a ba fetola gape a re: “Jaana yo lo mmitsang Kgosi ya Bajuta ke tlaa mo reng?” 
Mark15:13 Ba thela lošalaba gape ba re: “Mmapole.” 
Mark15:14 Pilato a ba raya a re: “Ka ntlha yang? O dirile bosula bofe?” Ba thela lošalaba ka thata e kgolo ba re: “Mmapole.” 
Mark15:15 E rile ka Pilato a rata go thethebatsa batho dipelo, a ba gololela Barabase, mme ya re a sena go seola Jesu, a mo neela go bapolwa." 
Mark15:16 Foo batlhabani ba tsaya Jesu ba mo gogela mo teng ga lolwapa, kwa go leng ntlo ya bogosi teng, mme ba phutha mophato otlhe fela." 
Mark15:17 Mme ba mo apesa bohibidu jo bo mokgona, ba loga serwalo sa mitlwa ba se mo rwesa;" 
Mark15:18 mme ba simolola go mo dumedisa ba re: “Dumela kgosi ya Bajuta!” 
Mark15:19 Ba mmetsa mo tlhogong ka lotlhaka, ba mo kgwela mathe, ba wa ka mangole ba mo obamela." 
Mark15:20 Ya re ba sena go mo sotla, ba mo apola bohibidu jo bo mokgona, ba mo apesa diaparo tsa gagwe. Ba mo gogela kwa ntle ba ya go mmapola." 
Mark15:21 Ga bo go le mongwe, go twe Simone wa Kurene, rraabo bo Alekesantere le Rufuse, a bo a feta a tswa kwa nageng, mme ba mo tshwara ba mo patikela go ya nabo, gore a sikare mokgoro wa gagwe." 
Mark15:22 Ba mo fitlhisa kwa felong fa go tweng Golegotha, ke go re, “Felo ga logata”, fa go phuthololwa." 
Mark15:23 Ba re ba mo nosa bojalwa jwa mofine jo bo tlhakantswe le mura; mme a se ka a bo amogela. 
Mark15:24 Mme ba mmapola; le diaparo tsa gagwe ba di kgaogana, ba laolela mongwe le mongwe se o se tsayang ka go thela bola." 
Mark15:25 Ya bo e le nako ya boraro, fa ba mmapola." 
Mark15:26 Lokwalo lwa molato wa gagwe lwa bo lo kwadilwe fa godimo lo re: “KGOSI YA BAJUTA.” 
Mark15:27 Mme ba bapola dinokwane di le pedi nae, sengwe ka fa letsogong la gagwe le legolo, se sengwe ka fa go la molema." 
Mark15:28 (Lokwalo lwa dirafala lo lo reng: “A balelwa le batlodi.”) 
Mark15:29 Ba ba fetang ba mo kgala, ba tshikinya ditlhogo ba re: “Ahe, wena yo o senyang tempele o ba o e aga ka malatsi a le mararo." 
Mark15:30 Ipoloke, o fologe mo mokgorong.”" 
Mark15:31 Fela jalo ditlhogo tsa baperesiti di na le bakwadi, ba ne ba na le tshotlo ka ga gagwe ba re: “O ne a boloka ba bangwe; ene ka esi ga a ka ke a ipoloka." 
Mark15:32 A ene Keresete, Kgosi ya Iseraele, a ke a fologe jaana mo mokgorong gore re bone, re dumele.” Le ba ba bapotsweng nae ba mo kgoba." 
Mark15:33 E rile go le nako ya borataro ya motshegare o mogolo, ga nna lefifi mo lefatsheng lotlhe, go ya go fitlha mo nakong ya 9 ya motshegare wa maitseboa." 
Mark15:34 Ya re go le nako ya 9 Jesu a goa ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakathani,” ke go re: “Modimo wa me, Modimo wa me, o ntatlhetseng?”" 
Mark15:35 Bangwe ba ba emeng teng ba re ba utlwa, ba re: “Bonang, o bitsa Elija.”" 
Mark15:36 Mme mongwe a taboga, a ina ngami mo bojalweng jo bo botšarara, a e tlhomela ka lotlhaka, a mo nosa a re: “Lesang; mmang re boneng boo Elija o tlaa tla go mo pagolola.”" 
Mark15:37 Jesu a goa ka lentswe le legolo, mme a neela mowa." 
Mark15:38 Mme sesiro sa tempele sa garoga ka bogare, go tswa kwa godimo go ya kwa tlase." 
Mark15:39 Molaodi wa mophato yo o emeng foo a lebaganye nae, ya re a bona fa a neetse mowa jalo, a re: “Ruri monna yo, e ne e le Morwa Modimo.”" 
Mark15:40 Le gone ga bo go le basadi teng ba lebile ba le kwa kgakala; mo go bone ga bo go le Maria Magetalene, le Maria mma Jakobe yo mmotlana le Josese, le Salome;" 
Mark15:41 ba e rileng a sa ntse a le kwa Galilea, ba mo sala morago, ba mo direla; le basadi ba bangwe ba le bantsi ba ba tsileng nae mo Jerusalema." 
Mark15:42 E rile go setse go le maitseboa jaanong, ka e le letsatsi la Iketleetso, ke go re, letsatsi la go tsoga go le Sabata," 
Mark15:43 ga tla Josefe wa Arimathea, e le mongwe yo o tlotlegang wa lekgotla, yo o bileng ka esi a lebeletse bogosi jwa Modimo; a ya ka pelokgale kwa go Pilato, a lopa setoto sa ga Jesu." 
Mark15:44 Mme Pilato a belaela gore a jaana o sule; mme a bitsa molaodi wa mophato, a mmotsa fa e setse e le sebaka a sena go swa." 
Mark15:45 Ya re a sena go utlwa mo molaoding wa mophato, a neela Josefe setoto." 
Mark15:46 A reka letsela la leloba, a mo pagolola, a mo tshophelela ka letsela leo la leloba, a mmaya mo phupung e e neng e gabilwe mo lefikeng, mme a pitikela lentswe fa molomong wa phupu." 
Mark15:47 Maria Magetalene, le Maria mma Josese ba bona fa o beilweng teng." 
Mark16:1 E rile Sabata o sena go feta, boMaria Magetalene, le Maria mma Jakobe, le Salome, ba reka ditlhatshana tsa malao gore ba ye go mo tlotsa." 
Mark16:2 Ya re ka letsatsi la ntlha la beke, go le ka maphakela a magolo, ba tla ba fitlha fa phupung letsatsi le sena go tlhaba." 
Mark16:3 Ba bo ba ntse ba raana ba re: “Mang yo o tlaa re tlosetsang lentswe fa molomong wa phupu?” 
Mark16:4 Mme ya re ba tsholetsa matlho ba bona fa lentswe le setse le fidikolotswe, gonne le ne le le legolo thata." 
Mark16:5 Mme ya re ba tsena mo phupung, ba bona motho wa lekau a dutse ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo, a apere kobo e tshweu; mme ba tseana." 
Mark16:6 A ba raya a re: “Se tseaneng; lo batla Jesu wa Monasaretha yo o neng a bapotswe, o tsogile, ga a yo fa, bonang felo fa ba ne ba mmeile teng!" 
Mark16:7 Yang lo bolelele barutwa ba gagwe, le Petere, lo re, o lo etelela pele a ya Galilea; lo tlaa mmona teng jaaka a kile a lo bolelela.”" 
Mark16:8 Mme ba tswa mo phupung, ba tshaba, gonne go roroma le go gakgamala go ne go ba tshwere; mme ba se ka ba bua le ope sepe ka ba boifa." 
Mark16:9 Jaana e rile a sena go tsoga go le ka maphakela ka letsatsi la ntlha la beke, a bonala pele kwa go Maria Magetalene, yo o kileng a kgoromeletsa ntle mewa e e maswe e e supang mo go ene." 
Mark16:10 Ene a ya a bolelela bone ba ba kileng ba ne ba na nae, mme ba bo ba hutsafetse ba lela." 
Mark16:11 Ya re ba utlwa fa a tshedile, a bile a bonywe ke ene, ba se ka ba dumela." 
Mark16:12 Morago ga dilo tse a senogela bangwe ba le babedi ka tshwano e sele, ba le mo tseleng, ba tsamaela golo gongwe mo nageng." 
Mark16:13 Le bone ba ya ba bolelela ba bangwe; le bone bao, ba se ka ba ba dumela." 
Mark16:14 Morago a senogela ba ba 11 ba dutse ba ja; mme a ba kgoba ka go tlhoka go dumela ga bone, le ka bothata jwa dipelo tsa bone, ka ba ganne go dumela ba ba mmonyeng a sena go tsoga." 
Mark16:15 A ba raya a re: “Yang mo lefatsheng lotlhe, lo rerele lobopo lotlhe Mafoko a a Molemo." 
Mark16:16 Yo o dumelang a ba a kolobediwa, o tlaa bolokwa; yo o ganang go dumela o tlaa sekisiwa." 
Mark16:17 Ditshupo tse, di tlaa dirana le ba ba dumelang: ba tlaa kgoromeletsa ntle mewa e e maswe ka leina la me; ba tlaa bua dipuo tse dintšha;" 
Mark16:18 ba tlaa tsholetsa dinoga, mme fa ba ka nwa se se bolayang, ga se ketla se ba utlwisa botlhoko gope; ba tlaa baya diatla mo balwetseng, mme ba tlaa fola.”" 
Mark16:19 Jalo, e rile Morena Jesu a sena go bua nabo, a tsholelediwa kwa legodimong, mme a dula ka fa letsogong le legolo la Modimo." 
Mark16:20 Mme bone ba tswa, ba rera Mafoko a a Molemo mo ntlheng tsotlhe, Morena a ntse a dira nabo, a tlhomamisa lefoko ka ditshupo tse di diranang najo. Amen." 
Luke1:1 Go Motlotlegi Theofila: E re ka batho ba le bantsi ba ineetse go kwala ka thulaganyo polelo ya dilo tse di nang le tlhomamo ruri mo go rona," 
Luke1:2 fela jaaka re di neilwe ke ba ba di bonyeng ka matlho, le ba e neng e le badiredi ba lefoko mo tshimologong;" 
Luke1:3 le nna, ka ke tlhotlhomisitse ruri dilo tsotlhe le tsa tshimologo, ke ntse ke ikaeletse fa go ka nna molemo go go kwalela ka thulaganyo," 
Luke1:4 gore o itse tlhomamo ya dilo tse o rutilweng mo go tsone. 
Luke1:5 E rile mo metlheng ya ga Herote kgosi ya Jutea, ga bo go le moperesiti mongwe go twe Sakaria, wa lekoko la phapaano ya ga Abija; mosadi wa gagwe le ene a bo a le wa bomorwadia Arone, leina la gagwe e le Elisabethe." 
Luke1:6 Ba bo ba le tshiamo fa pele ga Modimo ka bobedi jwa bone, ba tsamaya mo ditaolong tsotlhe le mo ditaong tsa Morena ba se na molato." 
Luke1:7 Ba bo ba se na ngwana, ka Elisabethe a le moopa, ba bile ba setse ba tsofetse thata boo babedi." 
Luke1:8 Jaana ga dirala ya re a dira tiro ya gagwe ya boperesiti fa pele ga Modimo ka fa phapaanong ya lekoko la gagwe," 
Luke1:9 ka fa tlwaelong ya boperesiti, ga bo go tla letsatsi la gagwe la go tsena mo tempeleng ya Modimo ka lone, a ya go fisa maswalo." 
Luke1:10 Bontsi jotlhe jwa batho ba bo ba rapela ba le ka fa ntle ka lobaka lwa go fisa maswalo. 
Luke1:11 Mme ga bonala kwa go ene moengele wa Morena, a eme ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le le siameng la sebeso sa maswalo." 
Luke1:12 Ya re Sakaria a mmona a fuduega, le poifo ya mo wela." 
Luke1:13 Mme moengele a mo raya a re: “Sakaria, o se ka wa boifa gonne thapelo ya gago e utlwilwe; mme mosadi wa gago Elisabethe o tlaa bona ngwana wa mosimane nao; mme o tlaa mo raya leina o re, Johane." 
Luke1:14 O tlaa nna le boitumelo le boipelo; le batho ba le bantsi ba tlaa itumelela go tsalwa ga gagwe. 
Luke1:15 Gonne o tlaa nna mogolo mo ponong ya Morena; ga a ketla a nwa bojalwa jwa mofine, le fa e le bojalwa jo bo loileng; mme o tlaa tlala Mowa o o Boitshepo le a sa tswa sebopelong sa ga mmaagwe." 
Luke1:16 Bana ba le bantsi ba Iseraele o tlaa ba sokololela mo go Morena Modimo wa bone. 
Luke1:17 O tlaa mo etelela pele ka mowa le ka nonofo ya ga Elija, go sokololela dipelo tsa borara mo baneng, le ba ba sa utlweng go sepela mo botlhaleng jwa basiami; go baakanyetsa Morena sešaba se o se etleeleditsweng.”" 
Luke1:18 Jalo Sakaria a raya moengele a re: “Golo mo ke tlaa go itse ka eng, ka ke le monnamogolo le mosadi wa me a tsofetse thata?”" 
Luke1:19 Moengele a mo fetola a re: “Ke nna Gaberiele, yo ke emang fa pele ga Modimo; ke romilwe go tla ke bua nao, le go go bolelela mafoko a, a boitumelo." 
Luke1:20 Bona, o tlaa nna semumu, o retelelwe ke go bua, go tle go tsamaye letsatsi le tle, le dilo tse di tlaa dirafalang ka lone, ka o sa dumele mafoko a me, a a tlaa dirafalang mo lobakeng lwa one.”" 
Luke1:21 Mme batho ba bo ba lebeletse Sakaria; mme ba gakgamalela tiego ya gagwe e e kalo mo tempeleng. 
Luke1:22 Mme ya re a tswa, a retelewa ke go bua nabo; mme ba lemoga fa a bonye ponatshegelo mo tempeleng; mme a nna a ba gwetlha, mme a fela a ntse semumu fela." 
Luke1:23 Ga dirala, ya re malatsi a tirelo ya gagwe a sena go feta, a tsamaya a ya kwa ga gagwe." 
Luke1:24 E rile morago ga malatsi ao, Elisabethe mosadi wa gagwe a nna moimana, mme a iphitlha ka dikgwedi di le tlhano, a re:" 
Luke1:25 “Morena o ntiretse jalo mo metlheng e o ntebileng ka yone go ntlosa kgobo mo bathong.” 
Luke1:26 Jaana e rile ka kgwedi ya borataro, moengele Gaberiele a rongwa ke Modimo kwa motseng wa Galilea, o o bidiwang Nasaretha." 
Luke1:27 A ya kwa kgarebaneng e e beeletsweng ke monna yo o bidiwang Josefe, wa ntlo ya ga Dafite; leina la kgarebane e ne e le Maria." 
Luke1:28 Moengele a tsena kwa go ene, a mo raya a re: “Dumela wena yo o sego thata, Morena o na nao: (O sego mo basading).”" 
Luke1:29 Maria a fuduiwa thata ke lefoko la gagwe, mme a akanya tumediso e, gore e ka ne e le e e ntseng jang."
