Luke1:30 Moengele a mo raya a re: “O se ka wa boifa Maria; gonne o bonye lesego mo Modimong. 
Luke1:31 Bona, o tlaa nna moimana, mme o tlaa bona ngwana wa mosimane, o tlaa mo raya leina o re, Jesu." 
Luke1:32 O tlaa nna mogolo, mme o tlaa bidiwa Morwa Mogodimodimo; Morena Modimo o tlaa mo naya setulo sa bogosi sa ga Dafite rraagwe." 
Luke1:33 O tlaa busa ntlo ya ga Jakobe ka bosakhutleng; bogosi jwa gagwe ga bo ketla bo nna le bokhutlo.” 
Luke1:34 Mme Maria a raya moengele a re: “Mo go tlaa nna jang, ka ke sa itse monna?”" 
Luke1:35 Mme moengele a mo fetola a re: “Morwa o o Boitshepo o tlaa tla mo go wena, le nonofo ya Mogodimodimo e tlaa go tshutifalela; ke gone le sone seo se se boitshepo se o tlaa se belegang, se tlaa bidiwa boitshepo, Morwa Modimo." 
Luke1:36 Bona, Elisabethe wa losika lwa gago, le ene o ithwele ngwana wa mosimane mo botsofeng jwa gagwe; mme e, ke yone kgwedi ya borataro mo go ene yo o neng a bidiwa moopa." 
Luke1:37 Gonne ga go na lefoko lepe le le tswang Modimong le le ka tlhokang nonofo.” 
Luke1:38 Mme Maria a re: “Bona, lelata la Morena; a go ntirafalele jaaka lefoko la gago.” Mme moengele a mo tlogela." 
Luke1:39 E rile mo metlheng eo Maria a tloga, a itlhaganelela kwa lefatsheng la makgabana, kwa motseng mongwe wa Juta." 
Luke1:40 Mme a tsena mo ntlong ya ga Sakaria, a dumedisa Elisabethe." 
Luke1:41 Ga dirala ya re Elisabethe a utlwa tumediso ya ga Maria, ngwana a tlola mo sebopelong sa gagwe; Elisabethe a tlala Mowa o o Boitshepo;" 
Luke1:42 mme a bua ka lentswe le legolo a re: “O sego mo basading, go bile go sego loungo lwa sebopelo sa gago." 
Luke1:43 Mme mo, go ntswela kae, fa e bo jaana mma Morena wa me a ka tla mo go nna jaana?" 
Luke1:44 Gonne bona, e re lentswe la tumediso ya gago le tsena fela mo ditsebeng tsa me, ngwana a bo a tlola ka boitumelo mo sebopelong sa me." 
Luke1:45 Go sego ene mosadi, yo o dumetseng; gonne dilo tse o di boleletsweng ke Morena di tlaa dirafala.”" 
Luke1:46 Foo Maria a re: “Mowa wa me o godisa Morena," 
Luke1:47 mowa wa me o bile o itumetse mo Modimong Mmoloki wa me. 
Luke1:48 Gonne o lebile bobotlanyana jwa lelata la one; gonne bona, jaana ditshika tsotlhe di tlaa mpitsa mosegofadiwa." 
Luke1:49 Gonne one o o leng thata o ntiretse dilo tse dikgolo; mme leina la one le boitshepo. 
Luke1:50 Boutlwelobotlhoko jwa one bo mo go ba ba o boifang, mo tshikatshikeng." 
Luke1:51 O supile nonofo ka letsogo la one; o faladitse ba ba pelompe mo ditlhatlhanyong tsa dipelo tsa bone. 
Luke1:52 O digile dikgosana mo ditulong tsa tsone tsa bogosi; mme o godisitse ba ba leng babotlana fela. 
Luke1:53 Ba ba bolawang ke tlala o ba kgorisitse ka dilo tse di molemo; bahumi o ba tsamaisitse ba iphotlhere fela. 
Luke1:54 O thusitse Iseraele motlhanka wa one, gore a gakologelwe boutlwelobotlhoko jwa one." 
Luke1:55 Jaaka o buile le borraetsho, ka ga Aberahame le losika lwa gagwe ka bosakhutleng.”" 
Luke1:56 Maria a nna nae e ka ne e le ka dikgwedi di le tharo, a ba a boela kwa ga gagwe." 
Luke1:57 Jaana lobaka lwa ga Elisabethe lwa fitlha, lo o tlaa belegang ka lone; mme a bona mosimane." 
Luke1:58 Bankane le ba ga gabo ba utlwa jaaka Morena a mo godiseditse boutlwelobotlhoko jo bogolo; ba itumela nae. 
Luke1:59 Ga dirala ya re ka letsatsi la bo 8 ba tla go rupisa ngwana, ba bo ba re ba mo raya leina, ba re, Sakaria, leina la ga rraagwe." 
Luke1:60 Mme mmaagwe a ba fetola, a re: “Nnyaa, ga go a nna jalo; o tlaa bidiwa Johane.”" 
Luke1:61 Ba mo raya ba re: “Ga go na ope wa losika lwa gago yo o bidiwang ka leina leo.” 
Luke1:62 Jalo ba gwetlha rraagwe, go itse ka fa o ratang a bidiwa ka teng." 
Luke1:63 Mme a lopa sematla se se kwalelang, mme a kwala a re: “Leina la gagwe ke Johane.” Ba gakgamala botlhe." 
Luke1:64 Molomo wa gagwe wa momologa ka bonako, le loleme lwa gagwe lwa hunologa, mme a bua, a baka Modimo." 
Luke1:65 Poifo ya wela botlhe ba ba agileng mo tikologong ya bone; dipolelo tse tsotlhe, tsa bolelwa thata mo lefatsheng lotlhe la makgabana la Jutea." 
Luke1:66 Botlhe ba ba utlwang, dilo tse, ba di tsaya ka pelo ba re: “Kana ngwana yo, e tlaa nna yo o ntseng jang!” Gonne seatla sa Morena sa bo se nna nae." 
Luke1:67 Foo Sakaria, rraagwe, a tlala Mowa o o Boitshepo, mme a perofesa, a re:" 
Luke1:68 “A go bakwe Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, gonne o lekotse batho ba one, o bile o ba diretse thekololo." 
Luke1:69 O re emiseditse lonaka lwa poloka mo ntlong ya ga Dafite motlhanka wa one. 
Luke1:70 Jaaka o buile ka melomo ya baperofeti ba one ba ba boitshepo, ba ba ntseng ba le yo e sa le ka tshimologo ya lefatshe;" 
Luke1:71 gore re gololwe mo babeng ba rona, le mo diatleng tsa botlhe ba ba re ilang;" 
Luke1:72 gore o dirafaletse borraetsho boutlwelobotlhoko, le gore o gakologelwe kgolagano e e boitshepo ya one;" 
Luke1:73 le maikano a o ikanetseng rraetsho Aberahame ka one. 
Luke1:74 Fa o tlaa re naya gore e tle e re re golotswe mo diatleng tsa baba ba rona, re o direle re se na poifo," 
Luke1:75 mo boitshepong le mo tshiamong fa pele ga one, ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa rona." 
Luke1:76 Ee, le wena ngwana, o tlaa bidiwa moperofeti wa Mogodimodimo; gonne o tlaa tsamaya fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa Morena go baakanya ditsela tsa gagwe;" 
Luke1:77 go naya batho ba gagwe kitso ya poloko ka boitshwarelo jwa dibe tsa bone. 
Luke1:78 Ka ntlha ya boutlwelobotlhoko jo bonana jwa Modimo wa rona; jo bophepa jwa moso jo bo tswang godimong bo re lekotseng ka jone," 
Luke1:79 go phatsimela ba ba dutseng mo lefifing le mo moriting wa loso, go siamisetsa dinao tsa rona mo tseleng ya kagiso.”" 
Luke1:80 Jalo ngwana a gola, a nonofa mo moweng; mme a nna mo dinageng go ya go fitlha mo lobakeng lwa go itshupa ga gagwe mo go Iseraele." 
Luke2:1 Jaana e rile mo metlheng eo ga tswa taolo kwa go Kaesare Aguseto, gore lefatshe lotlhe le kwalwe." 
Luke2:2 Go kwalwa mo ga ntlha, ke mo go dirilweng ka Kuirinio a le molaodi wa Siria." 
Luke2:3 Mme botlhe ba ya go kwalwa, mongwe le mongwe a ya kwa motseng wa ga gabo." 
Luke2:4 Josefe le ene a tlhatloga kwa Galilea, a tswa motseng wa Nasaretha, a ya kwa Jutea kwa motseng wa ga Dafite, o o bidiwang Bethelehema; ka a le wa kgotla le wa losika lwa ga Dafite;" 
Luke2:5 a ya go kwalwa le Maria, mosadi yo o mmeeleditseng, a bile a le moimana." 
Luke2:6 Ga dirala ya re ba sa le gone, ga fitlha malatsi a o tlaa belegang ka one." 
Luke2:7 Mme a bona ngwana wa mosimane wa ntlha wa gagwe, mme a mo phuthela ka matsela, a mmaya mo bojelong jwa dipitse; gonne go ne go se na bonno mo ntlong ya baeti." 
Luke2:8 Jaana ga bo go le badisa mo nageng, mo lefatsheng leo, ba disitse letsomane la bone bosigo." 
Luke2:9 Mme moengele wa Morena a ema fa go bone, le kgalalelo ya Morena ya phatsima ntlheng tsotlhe tsa bone; mme ba boifa ka poifo e kgolo." 
Luke2:10 Moengele a ba raya a re: “Se boifeng, gonne bonang, ke lo lereditse mafoko a a molemo, a boitumelo jo bogolo, jo bo tlaa dirafalelang batho botlhe." 
Luke2:11 Gonne gompieno mo motseng wa ga Dafite lo tsaletswe Mmoloki, yo e leng Keresete Morena." 
Luke2:12 Mme se, e tlaa nna sesupo mo go lona; lo tlaa fitlhela ngwanyana a phuthetswe ka matsela, a letse mo bojelong jwa dipitse.”" 
Luke2:13 Mme ba tshogana ka moengele a bile a na le bontsintsi jwa lesomosomo la legodimo, ba baka Modimo ba re:" 
Luke2:14 “Kgalalelo e nne go Modimo kwa bogodimodimong, le kagiso e nne mo lefatsheng, mo batho ba o kgatlhegang thata mo go bone.”" 
Luke2:15 Ga dirala e rile baengele ba sena go ba tlogela ba ya legodimong, badisa ba raana ba re: “A re yeng fela jaana kwa Bethelehema, re bone selo se, se se dirafetseng se Morena o se re itsisitseng.”" 
Luke2:16 Jalo ba tla ka potlako; ba fitlhela Maria le Josefe, le ngwanyana a letse mo bojelong jwa dipitse." 
Luke2:17 Ya re ba sena go bona, ba itsise mo ntlheng tsotlhe lefoko le ba le boleletsweng ka ga ngwana yo." 
Luke2:18 Mme botlhe ba ba utlwang ba gakgamadiwa ke dilo tse badisa ba di ba bolelelang. 
Luke2:19 Mme Maria a boloka dipolelo tsotlhe tse, a di akanya mo pelong ya gagwe." 
Luke2:20 Badisa ba boa ba galaletsa Modimo, ba o baka ka ntlha ya dilo tsotlhe tse ba di utlwileng le tse ba di bonyeng, fela jaaka ba boleletswe." 
Luke2:21 E rile malatsi a a 8 a go rupisa ngwanyana a sena go feta, ya bo leina la gagwe le bidiwa JESU, le o le reilweng ke moengele gale a ise a ingwe mo sebopelong." 
Luke2:22 E rile malatsi a bontlafatso jwa bone a sena go feta, ka fa molaong wa ga Moše, ba mo isa kwa Jerusalema go mo neela Morena;" 
Luke2:23 jaaka go kwadilwe mo molaong wa Morena ga twe: “Mosimane mongwe le mongwe wa ntlha o tlaa bidiwa boitshepelo Morena;” 
Luke2:24 le gore ba ise setlhabelo sa maphoi a le mabedi, le fa e le sa maebana a le mabedi, jaaka go builwe mo molaong wa Morena." 
Luke2:25 Ga bo go le monna mongwe mo Jerusalema, leina la gagwe go twe, Simeone; monna yo a bo a siame, a le morapedi wa Modimo, a lebeletse kgomotso ya Iseraele; mme Mowa o o Boitshepo wa bo o le mo go ene." 
Luke2:26 O ne a senoletswe ke Mowa o o Boitshepo fa a se ketla a swa a ise a bone Keresete wa Morena pele. 
Luke2:27 Mme a tla ka Mowa mo tempeleng; ya re batsadi ba lere ngwana Jesu go mo direla ka fa temalong ya molao," 
Luke2:28 foo a mo tshola ka mabogo a gagwe, a baka Modimo a re:" 
Luke2:29 “Morena, jaana o ka mma motlhanka wa gago a tsamaya ka kagiso jaaka lefoko la gago;" 
Luke2:30 gonne matlho a me a bonye poloka ya gago," 
Luke2:31 e o e baakantseng fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa ditšhaba tsotlhe; 
Luke2:32 lesedi le le bonesang Baditšhaba, le kgalalelo ya Iseraele batho ba gago.”" 
Luke2:33 Rraagwe le mmaagwe ba bo ba gakgamalela dilo tse di builweng ka ga gagwe; 
Luke2:34 mme Simeone a ba segofatsa, a raya Maria mmaagwe a re: “Bona, ngwana yo o beetswe go wa le go tsoga gape ga batho ba le bantsi mo go Iseraele; le gore a nne sesupo se se tlaa ganediwang;" 
Luke2:35 ee, le tšhaka e tlaa phololela le one mowa wa gago, gore megopolo ya dipelo di le dintsi e senolwe.”" 
Luke2:36 Ga bo go le mongwe go twe, Ana, moperofeti wa sesadi, morwadia Fanuele wa lotso lwa Ašere, a bo a tsofetse thata, mme a kile a nna le monna ka dinyaga di supa go tloga mo bokgarebaneng jwa gagwe." 
Luke2:37 A bo a ntse botlholagadi ka dinyaga e ka ne e le di le 84, yo o sa tlogeleng tempele, a direla Modimo ka go ikitsa go ja le ka mekokotlelo bosigo le motshegare." 
Luke2:38 A tla fela ka lobaka loo, a leboga Modimo, a bua ka ga gagwe le batho botlhe ba ba lebeletseng thekololo ya Jerusalema." 
Luke2:39 Ya re ba sena go dira dilo tsotlhe ka fa molaong wa Morena ba boela kwa Galilea, kwa Nasaretha, motse wa ga bone." 
Luke2:40 Ngwana a gola, a nonofa a tlala botlhale; le tshegofatso ya Modimo ya nna mo go ene." 
Luke2:41 Jaana, batsadi ba gagwe ba ne ba tle ba ya Jerusalema ka dinyaga tsotlhe, ba ya modirong wa Tlolaganyo." 
Luke2:42 E rile a le dinyaga di le 12 ba tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema jaaka temalo ya modiro. 
Luke2:43 Ya re ba sena go swetsa malatsi, ba boa, mme mosimane Jesu a sala mo Jerusalema, mme batsadi ba gagwe ba bo ba sa itse." 
Luke2:44 Bone ya re ka ba gopotse gore o mo lekokong la bone, ba tsamaya fela ka letsatsi le le lengwe fela; mme ba mmatla mo go ba ga bone, le mo go ba ba itsanyeng nabo." 
Luke2:45 Ya re ba sa mmone ba boela gape kwa Jerusalema ba ntse ba mmatla. 
Luke2:46 Ga dirala ya re malatsi a le mararo a sena go feta, ba mo fitlhela mo tempeleng, a dutse fa gare ga baruti, a ba utlwa, a ba a ba botsa dipotso." 
Luke2:47 Botlhe ba ba mo utlwang ba gakgamadiwa ke tlhaloganyo ya gagwe, le diphetolo tsa gagwe." 
Luke2:48 Mme ya re ba mmona, ba gakgamala; mmaagwe a mo raya a re: “Morwaaka, o ne o re direlelang jalo? Bona, rraago le nna re go batlile ka bohutsana.”" 
Luke2:49 Ene a ba raya a re: “Lo ne lo mpatlelang? A lo ne lo sa itse fa ke tshwanetse go nna mo go tse e leng tsa ga Rre?” 
Luke2:50 Mme ba se ka ba tlhaloganya lefoko le o le buang nabo. 
Luke2:51 Mme a fologa nabo, a fitlha mo Nasaretha, mme a nna a ba utlwa, mme mmaagwe ene a boloka dipolelo tsotlhe tse mo pelong ya gagwe." 
Luke2:52 Jesu a tswelela mo botlhaleng le mo go goleng, le mo go ratweng ke Modimo le batho." 
Luke3:1 Jaana e rile ka ngwaga wa 15 wa puso ya ga Kaesare Tiberio, ka Ponto Pilato a le molaodi wa Jutea, le Herote a le kgosana ya Galilea, le Filipo monnawe a le kgosana ya Iturea le ya lefatshe la Terakoniti, le Lesaniase a le kgosana ya Abilene," 
Luke3:2 le Anase le Kaiafase ba le baperesiti ba bagolo, lefoko la Modimo la tla kwa go Johane morwa Sakaria, a le mo nageng." 
Luke3:3 Mme a tla mo lefatsheng lotlhe le le mo tikologong ya Joretane, a rera kolobetso ya boikwatlhao jo bo bonang boitshwarelo jwa dibe;" 
Luke3:4 jaaka go kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa mafoko a moperofeti Isaia, a re: “Lentswe la yo o goang kwa nageng a re: Baakanyang mmila wa Morena, siamisang ditsela tsa gagwe." 
Luke3:5 Megogoro yotlhe e tlaa katelwa, le dithaba tsotlhe, le marota a tlaa papanwa; le tse di sokameng di tlaa lolamisiwa, le ditsela tse di magwata di tlaa rethefadiwa;" 
Luke3:6 le nama yotlhe e tlaa bona poloka ya Modimo.” 
Luke3:7 Foo a raya batho ba bantsintsi ba ba ileng go kolobediwa ke ene a re: “Lotsalo lwa dinoga ke lona, lo tlhagisitswe e mang go tshaba bogale jo bo tlang?" 
Luke3:8 Ke gone ungwang maungo a a tshwanetseng boikwatlhao; mme lo se ka lwa simolola go ithaya lo re: ‘Re na le Aberahame rraetsho;’ gonne ke a lo raya, Modimo o nonofile go tsosetsa Aberahame bana ka maje a." 
Luke3:9 Le jaana selepe se tsepilwe mo metsweng ya ditlhare; ke gone setlhare sengwe le sengwe se se sa ungweng loungo lo lo molemo se a rengwa, se latlhelwe mo molelong.”" 
Luke3:10 Matshutitshuti a batho a mmotsa a re: “Mme re tlaa dirang?” 
Luke3:11 A ba fetola a re: “Yo o nang le dikobo di le pedi, a a abele yo o se nang sepe; le yo o nang le dijo, a a dire jalo.”" 
Luke3:12 Ga tla bakgethisi le bone go kolobediwa, ba mo raya ba re: “Moruti, rona re tlaa dirang?”" 
Luke3:13 A ba raya a re: “Se kgethiseng ka thata go fetisa mo lo go laoletsweng.” 
Luke3:14 Le batlhabani le bone ba mmotsa ba re: “Mme rona re tlaa dirang?” A ba raya a re: “Se bogiseng ope, le gone se tseeleng ope sepe ka patiko, mme lo itumelele tuelo ya lona.”" 
Luke3:15 Ya re ka batho ba le mo tebelelong, mme botlhe ba akanya mo dipelong tsa bone ka ga Johane, gore a jaana ga e ka ne e le ene Keresete;" 
Luke3:16 Johane a fetola, a ba raya botlhe a re: “Nna le gale, ke lo kolobetsa ka metsi; mme go tla yo o thata bogolo go nna, yo kgole ya ditlhako tsa gagwe ke sa tshwanelang go e hunolola; ene o tlaa lo kolobetsa ka Mowa o o Boitshepo, le ka molelo;" 
Luke3:17 yo loselo lwa gagwe o lo tshotseng ka seatla; mme o tlaa olosetsa ruri mo segotlong sa gagwe, a ba a phuthela mabele mo ntlong ya polokelo; o tlaa tshuba mmoko ka molelo o o sa timeng.”" 
Luke3:18 A nna a rerela batho mafoko a a molemo ka dikgakololo di le dintsi di sele; 
Luke3:19 mme kgosana Herote ene, ka a omantswe ke ene ka ntlha ya ga Herodiase mosadi wa ga Filipo monnawe, le ka ntlha ya dilo tsotlhe tse di bosula tse Herote o di dirileng," 
Luke3:20 a fela a oketsa dilo tsotlhe tse ka go tswalela Johane mo ntlong ya kgolegelo. 
Luke3:21 Jaana e rile batho botlhe ba sena go kolobediwa, ya re Jesu le ene a kolobediwa, a rapela, legodimo la atlhamologa." 
Luke3:22 Mowa o o Boitshepo wa fologela mo go ene o na le popego e kete ya lephoi, mme ga tswa lentswe mo legodimong, le le reng: “O morwaake yo o rategang; ke itumetse thata mo go wena.”" 
Luke3:23 Jesu ka esi o rile a simolola go ruta, a bo a le e ka ne e le dinyaga di le 30 mme, jaaka go ne go gopolwa, ya bo e le morwa Josefe, morwa Heli," 
Luke3:24 morwa Mathate, morwa Lefi, morwa Meleki, morwa Janai, morwa Josefe," 
Luke3:25 morwa Matathie, morwa Amose, morwa Nahume, morwa Eseli, morwa Nagai," 
Luke3:26 morwa Maathe, morwa Matathiase, morwa Semeine, morwa Joseke, morwa Jote," 
Luke3:27 morwa Joanane, morwa Rese, morwa Serubabele, morwa Shealetiele, morwa Neri," 
Luke3:28 morwa Meleki, morwa Adi, morwa Kosame, morwa Elematame, morwa Ere," 
Luke3:29 morwa Jesua, morwa Eliesere, morwa Jorime, morwa Mathate, morwa Lefi," 
Luke3:30 morwa Simeone, morwa Jutase, morwa Josefe, morwa Joname, morwa Eliakime," 
Luke3:31 morwa Melea, morwa Menne, morwa Matathe, morwa Nathane, morwa Dafite," 
Luke3:32 morwa Jese, morwa Obete, morwa Boase, morwa Salamone, morwa Našone," 
Luke3:33 morwa Aminatabe, morwa Arani, morwa Heserone, morwa Perese, morwa Juta," 
Luke3:34 morwa Jakobe, morwa Isake, morwa Aberahame, morwa Tera, morwa Nahore," 
Luke3:35 morwa Saruge, morwa Reu, morwa Pelege, morwa Ebere, morwa Shela," 
Luke3:36 morwa Kainane, morwa Arefekesate, morwa Sheme, morwa Noa, morwa Lameke," 
Luke3:37 morwa Methusela, morwa Enoke, morwa Jarete, morwa Mahalalele, morwa Kainane," 
Luke3:38 morwa Enose, morwa Sethe, morwa Atame, morwa Modimo." 
Luke4:1 Jesu a ntse a tletse Mowa o o Boitshepo, a boa kwa Joretane, a nna a tsamaisiwa ke Mowa mo gare ga naga," 
Luke4:2 a ntse a raelwa ke diabolo ka malatsi a 40. A se ka a ja sepe mo malatsing ao; mme a sena go feta, morago a bolawa ke tlala." 
Luke4:3 Mme diabolo a mo raya a re: “E re fa o le Morwa Modimo, raya lentswe le, gore le fetoge senkgwe.”" 
Luke4:4 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘Motho ga a ketla a tshela ka senkgwe se le sosi.’ ” 
Luke4:5 Diabolo a mo tlhatlosa, a mmontsha magosi otlhe a lefatshe ka ponyo ya leitlho." 
Luke4:6 Diabolo a mo raya a re: “Ke tlaa go naya thata yotlhe e, le kgalalelo ya magosi a, gonne mo go neetswe nna, mme ke ka go naya yo ke ratang go go mo naya." 
Luke4:7 Ke gone fa o ka nkobamela, gotlhe e tlaa nna ga gago.”" 
Luke4:8 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘O obamele Morena Modimo wa gago, mme o direle one o le osi fela.’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Foo a mo isa kwa Jerusalema, a mmaya mo setlhoeng sa tempele, a mo raya a re: “E re fa o le Morwa Modimo, o le fano o itigele kwa tlase;" 
Luke4:10 gonne go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘O tlaa laya baengele ba one ka ga gago gore ba go dibele; 
Luke4:11 ba tlaa go legelela ka diatla gore e se re kgotsa motlhamongwe lonao lwa gago lwa sugakanngwa ke lentswe.’ ” 
Luke4:12 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Go tulwe: ‘O se ka wa leka Morena Modimo wa gago.’ ” 
Luke4:13 E rile diabolo a sena go swetsa thaelo yotlhe, a mo tlogela ka lobaka." 
Luke4:14 Jesu a boela kwa Galilea ka thata ya Mowa; mme tumo ka ga gagwe ya tswela mo tikologong yotlhe ya lefatshe. 
Luke4:15 A ruta mo matlong a bone a thuto, a galalediwa ke botlhe fela." 
Luke4:16 Mme a fitlha mo Nasaretha kwa o goletseng teng; mme a tsena mo ntlong ya thuto ka letsatsi la Sabata jaaka a tlwaetse, a ema gore a bale." 
Luke4:17 Mme a neelwa lokwalo lwa moperofeti Isaia. A re a sena go menolola lokwalo, a bona felo fa go kwadilweng teng ga twe:" 
Luke4:18 “Mowa wa Morena o mo go nna, gonne o ntloleditse go rerela bahumanegi Mafoko a a Molemo; o nthomile (go fodisa ba ba pelo di phatlogileng), go rerela bagolegwi kgololo, le phoufologo ya ba ba foufetseng, go golola ba ba teketilweng," 
Luke4:19 go bolela ngwaga o o lebosegang wa Morena.” 
Luke4:20 Mme a mena lokwalo, a ba a lo neela motlhanka, mme a dula. Matlho a botlhe ba ba mo ntlong ya thuto a bo a tlhomilwe mo go ene." 
Luke4:21 A simolola go ba raya a re: “Gompieno, lokwalo lo, lo dirafetse, mo ditsebeng tsa lona.”" 
Luke4:22 Mme botlhe ba supa ka ga gagwe, ba gakgamalela mafoko a a monate a a tswang mo molomong wa gagwe. Ba re: “Yo, a ga se morwa Josefe?”" 
Luke4:23 A ba raya a re: “Ruri, lo a bo lo tlaa mpolelela setshwantsho se, lo re: ‘Ngaka, iphodise; tsotlhe tse re di utwileng di dirilwe kwa Kaperenaume, o di dire le mono lefatsheng la gaeno.’ ”" 
Luke4:24 A re: “Ruri ke o lo raya, ga go moperofeti ope yo o lebosegang mo lefatsheng la ga gabo." 
Luke4:25 “Ke lo bolelela boammaruri ka re, go ne go le basadi ba batlholagadi ba le bantsi mo go Iseraele, mo metlheng ya ga Elija, jale, ka legodimo le tswadilwe ka dinyaga di le tharo le dikgwedi di le thataro, mme ga nna leuba le legolo mo lefatsheng lotlhe;" 
Luke4:26 Elija ga a ka a rongwa kwa go ope wa bone, fa e se kwa Sarepete mo lefatsheng la Sitone, kwa mosading yo e neng e le motlholagadi." 
Luke4:27 Gape go ne go le balepero ba le bantsi mo Iseraele mo metlheng ya moperofeti Eliša; mme ope wa bone a se ka a ntlafadiwa fa e se Naamane wa Mosiria.” 
Luke4:28 Botlhe ba ba mo ntlong ya thuto ba re ba utlwa dilo tse, ba tlala bogale." 
Luke4:29 Ba nanoga ba mo kgoromeletsa kwa ntle ga motse, ba mo gogela kwa tlhoreng ya thota e motse wa bone o agilweng mo go yone, gore ba mo piriganyetse ka kwa tlase." 
Luke4:30 Mme ene a ba ralala, a tswa a itsamaela fela." 
Luke4:31 A fitlha kwa Kaperenaume, motse wa Galilea. A bo a ba ruta ka letsatsi la Sabata." 
Luke4:32 Mme ba gakgamalela thuto ya gagwe; ka gonne lefoko la gagwe le ne le na le thata. 
Luke4:33 Mo ntlong ya thuto ga bo go le motho yo o nang le mowa o o maswe, mme a goa ka lentswe le legolo." 
Luke4:34 A re: “Hee! Re go dirang wena Jesu wa Nasaretha? A o tsile go re senya? Ke a go itse yo o leng ene; o Moitshepi wa Modimo.” 
Luke4:35 Mme Jesu a o kgalemela a re: “Didimala, o tswe mo go ene,” ya re mowa o o maswe o sena go mo piriganya fa gare ga bone, wa tswa mo go ene, mme wa se ka wa mo utlwisa botlhoko." 
Luke4:36 Botlhe ba welwa ke kgakgamalo, ba raana ba re: “Ana lefoko le ke la eng? Gonne o laola mewa e e maswe ka thata le ka nonofo, mme e tswe.”" 
Luke4:37 Tumedi ka ga gagwe ya tswela kwa mafelong otlhe mo tikologong ya lefatshe. 
Luke4:38 Mme a ema a tswa mo ntlong ya thuto, a ba a tsena mo ntlong ya ga Simone. Mme mogwagadia Simone wa mosadi a bo a tshwerwe ke bolwetse jo bogolo jwa letshoroma; mme ba mo mo rapelela." 
Luke4:39 Mme a ya a mo okama, a kgalemela bolwetse jwa letshoroma; mme jwa mo tlogela; mme a akofa a ema, a ba direla." 
Luke4:40 Jaana e rile letsatsi le kotlomela, botlhe ba ba nang le ba ba bobolang malwetse mangwe le mangwe, ba ba isa kwa go ene; mme a baya diatla mo go mongwe le mongwe wa bone, a ba fodisa." 
Luke4:41 Le mewa e e maswe le yone ya tswa mo bathong ba le bantsi, ya goa ya re: “O Morwa Modimo.” Mme a e kgalemela, a se ka a e leseletsa go bua; ka e mo itse fa e le ene Keresete." 
Luke4:42 E rile bosigo bo sena go sa a tsamaya a ya kwa gare ga naga fela; mme batho ba mmatla, ba fitlha kwa go ene, ba re ba a mo kganela gore a se ba tlogele." 
Luke4:43 A ba raya a re: “Ke na le go rerela le metse e mengwe Mafoko a a Molemo a bogosi jwa Modimo, gonne ke romilwe go dira jalo.”" 
Luke4:44 Mme a nna a rera mo matlong a thuto a Galilea. 
Luke5:1 Ga dirala ya re ka batho ba bantsi ba mo pitlaganya, ba utlwa lefoko la Modimo, a bo a eme fa bodibeng jwa Geneserete." 
Luke5:2 Foo a bona mekoro e le mebedi e eme fa bodibeng, mme batshwari ba ditlhapi ba bo ba dule mo go yone, ba tlhatswa ditloa tsa bone." 
Luke5:3 A tsena mo go mongwe wa mekoro, e le wa ga Simone, a mo lopa gore a ke a katoge lefatshe go le gonnye. Mme a dula, a ruta batho a le mo mokorong." 
Luke5:4 Jaana e rile a sena go khutla go bua, a raya Simone a re: “Sutelang kwa go boteng, mme lo digele ditloa tsa lona go tshwara.”" 
Luke5:5 Simone a mo fetola a re: “Morena, re letse re leka bosigo jotlhe, ra se ka ra tshwara sepe, le fa go ntse jalo ke tlaa digela ditloa ka lefoko la gago.”" 
Luke5:6 Ya re ba sena go dira jalo ba sobokanya bontsi jo bogolo jwa ditlhapi, ditloa tsa bone tsa ba tsa kgaoga." 
Luke5:7 Mme ba gwetlha balekane ba bone ba ba mo mokorong o mongwe, gore ba tle go ba thusa. Ba tla; mme ba tlatsa mekoro yoo mebedi ya ba ya tla ya simolola go nwela." 
Luke5:8 Simone Petere ya re a bona jalo, a wela fa mangoleng a ga Jesu a re: “Ntlogela Morena, gonne ke motho wa boleo.”" 
Luke5:9 Gonne go le ene, le botlhe ba o nang nabo, ba bo ba gakgamaletse tshwaro ya ditlhapi tse ba di tshwereng;" 
Luke5:10 le bone boJakobe jalo le Johane, bomorwa Sebete, e le balekane ba ga Simone. Jesu a raya Simone a re: “O se ka wa boifa; go simolola ka leno o tlaa tshwara batho.”" 
Luke5:11 Ya re ba sena go fitlhisa mekoro ya bone kwa lefatsheng, ba tlogela gotlhe, ba mo sala morago." 
Luke5:12 Ga dirala e rile le mo motseng mongwe, bonang, monna yo o tletseng lepero; yo e rileng a bona Jesu a wela fa fatshe ka sefatlhogo, a mo rapela, a re: “Morena, fa o rata, o na le thata go nntlafatsa.”" 
Luke5:13 Mme a otlolola seatla, a mo ama a re: “Ke a rata, o ntlafale.” Mme fela ka bonako lepero la mo tlogela." 
Luke5:14 Mme a mo laya gore a se ka a bolelela ope; mme a re: “Tsamaya o itshupetse moperesiti, o ntshetse bontlafatso jwa gago ka fa Moše o laotseng ka teng, gore e nne tshupo mo go bone.”" 
Luke5:15 Tumedi ka ga gagwe ya tota bogolo bogolo; mme matshutitshuti a batho a phuthegela mmogo go utlwa, le go fodisiwa malwetse a bone." 
Luke5:16 Mme ene a ngongwaelela a tswa a ya kwa gare ga naga go rapela. 
Luke5:17 Ga dirala ya re ka letsatsi lengwe la malatsi ao, ka a ruta, ga bo go le Bafarisai le baruti ba molao ba dutse teng, ba ba tswang mo metseng yotlhe ya Galilea le Jutea, le Jerusalema; mme thata ya Morena ya nna nae go ba fodisa." 
Luke5:18 Mme bonang, banna bangwe ba lere motho yo o tshwerweng ke go tetesela, ba mo tshotse ka bolao, ba batla ka fa ba ka mo isang mo teng ka teng, le go mmaya fa pele ga gagwe." 
Luke5:19 E rile ka ba sa bone ka fa ba ka mo isang mo ntlong ka teng, ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa batho, ba tlhatlogela kwa godimo ga ntlo, ba mo folosa ka bolao jwa gagwe ka fa borulelong, ba mmaya fa gare, fa pele ga Jesu." 
Luke5:20 Ya re a bona tumelo ya bone, a mo raya a re: “Monna, dibe tsa gago o di itshwaretswe.”" 
Luke5:21 Bakwadi le Bafarisai ba simolola go akanya go re: “E mang yo, yo o buang ditlhapatso? E mang yo o ka itshwarelang dibe fa e se Modimo osi fela?”" 
Luke5:22 Ya re Jesu a lemoga megopolo ya bone, a ba raya a re: “Lo akanya eng mo pelong tsa lona?" 
Luke5:23 Mo go bofefo ke gofe, a ke go re: ‘Dibe tsa gago di itshwaretswe;’ le fa e le go re: ‘Tsoga o tsamaye?’" 
Luke5:24 Mme gore lo tle lo itse fa Morwa Motho a na le thata mo lefatsheng, ya go itshwarela dibe,” a raya ene yo o teteselang a re: “Ke a go raya, ‘Tsoga o tseye bolao jwa gago, o ye kwa ntlong ya gago.’ ”" 
Luke5:25 Fela ka bonako a tsoga fa pele ga bone, a tsaya se o neng a letse mo go sone, a ya kwa ntlong ya gagwe, a ntse a galaletsa Modimo." 
Luke5:26 Kgakgamalo ya ba tshwara botlhe, mme ba galaletsa Modimo; ba ba ba tlala poifo ba re: “Re bonye dilo di sele gompieno.”" 
Luke5:27 Morago ga dilo tse a tswela kwa ntle, mme a fitlhela mokgethisi mongwe yo o bidiwang Lefi, a dutse fa go kgethelwang teng; a mo raya a re: “Ntshala morago.”" 
Luke5:28 A tlogela gotlhe, a ema a mo sala morago." 
Luke5:29 Lefi a mo direla modiro o mogolo mo ntlong ya gagwe; mme ga bo go le lesomo le legolo la bakgethisi, le la ba bangwe ba ba dutseng ba ja nabo." 
Luke5:30 Bafarisai le bakwadi ba ba mo go bone, ba ngongoregela barutwa ba gagwe ba re: “Lo jelang lo nwa le bakgethisi le baleofi?”" 
Luke5:31 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ba ba itekanetseng ga ba dire ngaka sepe; fa e se ba ba lwalang fela. 
Luke5:32 Ga ke a tla go bitsa basiami, fa e se baleofi fela, gore ba tle boikwatlhaong.”" 
Luke5:33 Ba mo raya ba re: “Ana barutwa ba ga Johane ba ikiletsang go ja gantsi, ba dira mekokotlelo, le ba Bafarisai jalo; mme ba gago ba a ja ba nwa fela?”" 
Luke5:34 Jesu a ba raya a re: “A lo ka kgona bagwe go ikitsa go ja fa monyadi a sa ntse a na nabo? 
Luke5:35 Metlha e tlaa tla; e tlaa re monyadi a sena go tlosiwa mo go bone, e dire gone ba tlaa ikitsang go ja mo metlheng eo.”" 
Luke5:36 Le gone a bua setshwantsho nabo a re: “Ga go ope yo o gagolang seaparo se seša, a tsaya sebata a bitiela seaparo se se onetseng ka sone; fa a dira jalo, sebata se seša se tlaa gagola se se onetseng, le gone sebata se seša se a bo se sa dumalane le se se onetseng." 
Luke5:37 Le gone ga go ope yo o tshelang bojalwa jwa mofine jo boša bo mo mefalong e e onetseng; fa a dira jalo, bojalwa jwa mofine jo boša bo tlaa phanya mefalo, mme e tshologe le mefalo e senyege." 
Luke5:38 Bojalwa jwa mofine jo boša bo tshwanetse go tshelwa mo mefalong e meša. 
Luke5:39 Le gone ga go ope yo e reng a sena go nwa bojalwa jwa mofine yo bo gologolo a eletse jo boša; ka a tlaa a re: ‘Jo bogologolo bo molemo bogolo.’ ” 
Luke6:1 Jaana ga dirala e rile ka Sabata o mongwe a ralala masimo a mabele; mme barutwa ba gagwe ba roba diako tsa mabele, ba di ja ka go di sosorela mo diatleng." 
Luke6:2 Mme bangwe ba Bafarisai ba ba raya ba re: “Lo direlang se se sa letlelelwang go dirwa ka malatsi a Sabata?” 
Luke6:3 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “A ga lo ise lo bale, ka ga se Dafite o se dirileng jale, ka a bolailwe ke tlala, ene le ba o neng a na nabo;" 
Luke6:4 ka fa o neng a tsena mo ntlong ya Modimo ka teng, a tsaya dinkgwe tsa tshupelo, a di ja, a ba a di naya le ba o nang nabo; e le tse di sa letlelelwang go jewa ke ope, fa e se ke baperesiti ba le bosi fela?”" 
Luke6:5 A ba raya a re: “Morwa Motho ke Morena wa Sabata.” 
Luke6:6 Ga dirala ya re ka Sabata o mongwe, a tsena mo ntlong ya thuto, a ruta; ga bo go le monna teng, yo seatla sa gagwe se segolo se omeletseng." 
Luke6:7 Bakwadi le Bafarisai ba mo lepa gore a o tlaa fodisa ka letsatsi la Sabata; gore ba bone ka fa ba ka mo nayang molato ka teng. 
Luke6:8 Mme a itse megopolo ya bone, mme a raya monna yo o seatla se omeletseng a re: “Nanoga, a eme fa gare.” A nanoga a ema fa gare." 
Luke6:9 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ke a lo botsa ka re, a go letleletswe go dira molemo ka malatsi a Sabata, kgotsa go dira bosula, go boloka botshelo kgotsa go bo senya?”" 
Luke6:10 A ba koba botlhe, a raya monna yoo a re: “Otlolola seatla sa gago.” A dira jalo; mme seatla sa gagwe sa fola sa nna jaaka se sengwe." 
Luke6:11 Ba tlala botsenwa; mme ba gakololana ka ga se ba ka se dirang Jesu. 
Luke6:12 Mme ya re mo metlheng eo ga dirala gore a tswa a ya kwa thabeng, a ya go rapela; mme a lala a rapela Modimo bosigo jotlhe." 
Luke6:13 Ya re bosigo bo sena go sa, a bitsa barutwa ba gagwe; mme mo go bone a itshenkela ba le 12, ba o bileng a ba raya leina a re, Baaposetole:" 
Luke6:14 Simone, yo o bileng a mo raya leina a re, Petere, le Anterea monnawe, Jakobe le Johane, Filipo le Baretholomea," 
Luke6:15 Mathaio le Thomase, Jakobe morwa Alefaio, le Simone yo o bidiwang Selote," 
Luke6:16 le Jutase oo rra Jakobe, le Jutase Isekariote yo o tlogileng a nna mooki." 
Luke6:17 Mme a fologa nabo, a ema mo lobaleng, a na le bontsi jo bogolo jwa barutwa ba gagwe, le batho ba le bantsintsi ba ba tswang mo Jutea yotlhe, le Jerusalema, le kwa lefatsheng le le okameng lewatle la Ture le Sitone, ba tsile go mo utlwa, le go fodisiwa malwetse a bone;" 
Luke6:18 le ba ba tshwenngwang ke mewa e e maswe, mme ba fodisiwa." 
Luke6:19 Mme bontsi jotlhe jwa senka go mo ama, ka gonne nonofo e ne e tswa mo go ene, a ba fodisa botlhe." 
Luke6:20 A tsholeletsa matlho a gagwe barutweng ba gagwe, a re: “Lo sego lona bahumanegi, gonne bogosi jwa Modimo ke jwa lona." 
Luke6:21 Lo sego lona ba lo bolawang ke tlala jaana; gonne lo tlaa kgorisiwa. Lo sego lona ba lo lelang jaana; gonne lo tlaa tshega. 
Luke6:22 Lo sego, mogang batho ba lo ilang, ba ikgaoganya le lona, ba lo kgoba, ba latlha leina la lona jaaka se se bosula, ka ntlha ya Morwa Motho." 
Luke6:23 “Lo itumele mo motlheng oo, lo bo lo ipele, gonne bonang, tuelo ya lona e kgolo kwa legodimong; gonne borraabo ba diretse baperofeti jalo." 
Luke6:24 Go bo go latlhega lona ba lo humileng! Gonne lo amogetse kgomotso ya lona. 
Luke6:25 A bo go latlhega lona ba lo kgotsheng jaana! Gonne lo tlaa bolawa ke tlala. Go latlhega lona ba lo tshegang jaana! Gonne lo tlaa hutsafala lo lela. 
Luke6:26 “Go latlhega lona, mogang batho botlhe ba buang sentle ka ga lona, gonne borraabo ba diretse baperofeti ba tsietso fela jalo!" 
Luke6:27 “Ke raya lona ba lo utlwang ke re, ratang baba ba lona, ba ba lo ilang lo ba direle molemo." 
Luke6:28 Lo segofatse ba ba lo hutsang, lo rapelele ba ba lo gobololang." 
Luke6:29 Ene yo o go fapholang mo lesameng lengwe, mo neele le le lengwe; le yo o go tseelang kobo, le kojana o se ka wa gana ka yone." 
Luke6:30 Naya mongwe le mongwe yo o go lopang, le yo o go tseelang dilwana tsa gago, o se ka wa ba wa di mo lopa." 
Luke6:31 Fela jaaka lo rata batho ba lo direla, le lona lo ba direle fela jalo." 
Luke6:32 “Fa lo rata ba ba lo ratang, lo bo lo na le tebogo efe, gonne baleofi le bone ba rata ba ba ba ratang?" 
Luke6:33 Fa lo direla bone molemo ba ba lo direlang molemo, lo bo lo na le tebogo efe, gonne baleofi le bone ba dira fela jalo?" 
Luke6:34 Fa lo adima bone ba lo solofetseng go amogela mo go bone, lo bo lo na le tebogo efe? Gonne baleofi le bone ba tle ba adime baleofi, gore ba amogele mo go kalo gape." 
Luke6:35 Mme lona, ratang baba ba lona, ba direleng molemo, adimang fela, lo sa tlhoboge gope; mme tuelo ya lona e tlaa nna kgolo, mme lo tlaa nna bana ba Mogodimodimo; gonne ene o pelonomi mo go ba ba sa lebogeng, le mo go ba ba bosula." 
Luke6:36 Ke gone lona lo nne kutlwelobotlhoko fela, jaaka Rraalona le ene a le kutlwelobotlhoko." 
Luke6:37 “Le gone lo se ka lwa sekisa, mme ga lo ketla lo sekisiwa; se boneng batho molato, mme ga lo ketla lo bonwa molato; rebolang, mme lo tlaa rebolwa;" 
Luke6:38 nayang, mme lo tlaa newa, selekanyo se se molemo, se se katetsweng, se se tsikitleditsweng, se se penologang, batho ba tlaa se lo naya mo dihubeng tsa lona. Gonne ka selekanyo se lo lekanyang ka sone lo tlaa ba lo lekanyediwa ka sone fela." 
Luke6:39 “Le gone a bua setshwantsho nabo a re: A sefofu se ka goga sefofu? A ga di ketla di wela mmogo mo kgatamping? 
Luke6:40 Morutwa ga a mogolo go feta moruti wa gagwe; mongwe le mongwe mogang o itekanelang o tlaa nna jaaka moruti wa gagwe. 
Luke6:41 “O bonelang selabe se se mo leitlhong la wa gaeno, mme o sa tlhokomele mosipuri o o mo leitlhong le e leng la gago?" 
Luke6:42 Kgotsa, o tlaa raya wa gaeno jang o re: ‘Mothoetsho, mma ke ntshe selabe se se mo leitlhong la gago,’ le mororo o sa bone mosipuri o o mo leitlhong le e leng la gago? Moitimokanyi ke wena, ntsha mosipuri o o mo leitlhong la gago pele, e dire gone o tlaa bonang sentle go ntsha selabe se se mo leitlhong la wa gaeno." 
Luke6:43 “Gonne ga go na setlhare sepe se se molemo, se se tleng se ungwe loungo lo lo bosula; le gone ga go setlhare se se bosula, se se tleng se ungwe loungo lo lo molemo." 
Luke6:44 Gonne setlhare sengwe le sengwe se itsiwe ka loungo lwa sone. Gonne batho ga ba ke ba hula difeige mo ditlhareng tse di mitlwa, le fa e le loungo lwa mofine mo monganeng." 
Luke6:45 Motho yo o molemo o ntsha se se molemo mo lohumong lo lo molemo lwa pelo ya gagwe; le motho yo o bosula, o ntsha se se bosula mo lohumong lo lo bosula (lwa pelo ya gagwe); gonne go bua ga molomo wa gagwe go tle go tswe mo go se se tletseng mo pelong." 
Luke6:46 “Lo mpiletsang Morena, Morena, mme lo sa dire tse ke reng lo di dire?" 
Luke6:47 Mongwe le mongwe yo o tlang mo go nna, a utlwa mafoko a me a ba a a dira, ke tlaa lo supetsa gore o tshwana le mang." 
Luke6:48 O tshwana le monna yo o kileng a aga ntlo, a epela kwa teng, a thaya motheo mo lefikeng; mme ya re morwalela wa metsi o tla, noka ya itaaka ntlo eo thata, mme ya retelelwa ke go e tshikinya; ka e ne e agilwe sentle." 
Luke6:49 Mme yo o utlwang, a sa dire, o tshwana le monna yo o kileng a aga ntlo fela, e se na motheo, mme noka ya itaaka ntlo eo thata, mme ya akofa ya wa, mme go senyega ga ntlo eo ga nna gogolo.”" 
Luke7:1 Jaana e rile a sena go swetsa mafoko otlhe a gagwe mo ditsebeng tsa batho, a tsena mo Kaperenaume." 
Luke7:2 Ga bo go le molaodi wa mophato, a na le motlhanka, mme a mo rata thata, a bo a lwala a le gaufi le go swa." 
Luke7:3 O rile a utlwa ka ga Jesu, a roma bagolwane ba Bajuta kwa go ene, ba mo rapela gore a tle go fodisa motlhanka wa gagwe." 
Luke7:4 Bone, ya re ba fitlha kwa go Jesu, ba mo rapela thata ba re: “Ke motho yo o tshwanetseng fa o ka mo direla jalo;" 
Luke7:5 gonne o rata morafe wa rona, e bile ene ka esi o re agetse ntlo ya thuto.”" 
Luke7:6 Foo Jesu a ya nabo. Ya re jaana a setse a se kgakala le ntlo, molaodi wa mophato a roma ditsala kwa go ene, tsa ya go mo raya tsa re: “Morena, o se ka wa itapisa, ka gobo ga ke a tshwanela fa o ka tsena kwano tlase ga ditlhomeso tsa me." 
Luke7:7 Ke gone ke ikaileng le gone fa ke sa tshwanela go ya koo go wena; mme bua lefoko fela, mme motlhanka wa me o tlaa fodisiwa." 
Luke7:8 Gonne le nna ke monna yo ke beilweng mo taolong, ke bile ke na le batlhabani ba mo taolong ya me; mme ke reye mongwe ke re: ‘Tsamaya,’ mme a tsamaya; ke reye yo mongwe ke re: ‘Ntlo,’ mme a tle; le motlhanka wa me: ‘Dira se,’ mme a se dire.”" 
Luke7:9 Jesu ya re a utlwa dilo tse a mo gakgamalela, mme a retologa a raya batho ba bantsi ba ba mo setseng morago a re: “Ke a lo raya, ga ke ise nke ke bone tumelo e kgolo jaana, nnyaa, le fa e le mo Iseraele.”" 
Luke7:10 Ba ba romilweng, ya re ba boela kwa ntlong, ba fitlhela motlhanka (yo o neng a ntse a lwala) a fodile." 
Luke7:11 Ga dirala ya re ka moso, a ya kwa motseng o o bidiwang, Naine; le barutwa ba gagwe ba le bantsi ba ya nae, le bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho." 
Luke7:12 Jaana ya re a atamela kgoro ya motse, bonang, ga bo go rwelwe moswi, a isiwa kwa ntle; ya bo e le morwa mmaagwe yo o esi, mme ene mmaagwe ya bo e le motlholagadi; le batho ba le bantsi ba motse ba bo ba na le mosadi." 
Luke7:13 Ya re Morena a mmona, a mo tlhomogela pelo, a mo raya a re: “Se lele.”" 
Luke7:14 Mme a atamela a ama setsholo; ba ba mo rweleng ba ema. Mme a re: “Lekau, ke a go raya, tsoga.”" 
Luke7:15 Yo o neng a sule a rapamologa, mme a simolola go bua. Mme a mo neela mmaagwe." 
Luke7:16 Poifo ya ba tshwara botlhe; mme ba galaletsa Modimo ba re: “Go tsogile moperofeti yo mogolo gare ga rona; Modimo o lekotse batho ba one.” 
Luke7:17 Tumedi e ka ga gagwe, ya tswela mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Jutea, le mo tikologong yotlhe ya teng." 
Luke7:18 Barutwa ba ga Johane ba mmolelela dilo tsotlhe tse. 
Luke7:19 Johane a ipiletsa barutwa ba gagwe ba le babedi a ba roma kwa go Jesu, ba ya go re: “A ke wena yo o tlang, kgotsa a re lebelele o sele?”" 
Luke7:20 Ya re banna bao ba sena go fitlha kwa go ene ba re: “Re romilwe ke Johane Mokolobetsi kwano go wena, a re: ‘A ke wena yo o tlang, kgotsa a re lebelele o sele?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Ya re e sa ntse e le nako eo a fodisa batho ba le bantsi malwetse le dipobolo, le mewa e e bosula; le difofu di le dintsi a di naya go bona." 
Luke7:22 Jesu a bua, a ba raya a re: “Tsamayang, lo ye lo bolelele Johane dilo tse lo di bonyeng, le tse lo di utlwileng, lo re: Difofu di a bona, batlhotsi ba a tsamaya, balepero ba a ntlafadiwa, basusu ba a utlwa, baswi ba a tsosiwa, bahumanegi ba rerelwa Mafoko a a Molemo." 
Luke7:23 Mme go sego ene yo o se ketlang a fitlhela sekgopi sepe mo go nna.” 
Luke7:24 E rile barongwa ba ga Johane ba sena go tsamaya, a simolola go bua le matshutitshuti a batho ka ga Johane a re: “Kana lo ne lo tswela kwa nageng lo ya go bonang? A lo ne lo solofetse go bona lotlhaka lo lo tshikinngwang ke phefo ne?" 
Luke7:25 Kana lo ne lo tswa lo ya go bonang? A lo ne lo re, monna yo o apereng diaparo tse di boleta? Bonang, ba ba apereng dietsela, le ba ba tshelang mo letlepung, ba nna mo malwapeng a dikgosi." 
Luke7:26 Mme kana lo ne lo tswa lo ya go bonang? A lo ne lo re moperofeti? Ee, ke a lo raya e bile ke yo mogolo go feta moperofeti." 
Luke7:27 Yo ke ene go kwadilweng ka ga gagwe ga twe: ‘Bona, ke roma morongwa wa me fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gago, yo o tlaa baakanyang tsela ya gago fa pele ga gago.’" 
Luke7:28 Ke a lo raya ka re, mo go ba ba tsetsweng ke basadi ga go na moperofeti ope yo o mogolo go feta Johane Mokolobetsi; mme ene yo o leng mmotlana mo bogosing jwa Modimo o mogolo go feta ene.”" 
Luke7:29 Batho botlhe ba mo utlwa, le bakgethisi, ba atlholela Modimo tshiamo, ka ba kolobeditswe ka kolobetso ya ga Johane." 
Luke7:30 Mme Bafarisai le ba molao ba tsupuetsa boikaelelo jwa Modimo ka ga bone, ka ba se ka ba kolobediwa ke ene." 
Luke7:31 Morena a ba a re: “Ana batho ba losika lo, ke tlaa ba tshwantsha ka eng? Mme ba tshwana le eng?" 
Luke7:32 Ba tshwana le banyana ba ba dutseng mo mananeng a motse, ba bitsanya ba re: ‘Re lo leleditse diletso, mme ga lo a ka lwa bina; ra kuruetsa, mme ga lo a ka lwa lela.’" 
Luke7:33 Gonne Johane Mokolobetsi o tsile, a sa je senkgwe, a sa nwe bojalwa jwa mofine; mme lwa re: ‘O na le mowa o o bosula.’" 
Luke7:34 Morwa Motho o tsile, a ja, a nwa; mme lwa re: ‘Bonang motho yo o tshikiri, le monwa bojalwa, tsala ya bakgethisi le baleofi!’" 
Luke7:35 Mme botlhale bo atlholetswe tshiamo ke bana botlhe ba jone.” 
Luke7:36 Mongwe wa Bafarisai a mo lopa gore a ye go ja nae. Mme a tsena mo ntlong ya Mofarisai, a dula a ja." 
Luke7:37 Bonang, mosadi mongwe yo o mo motseng, e le moleofi, ya re a tlhaloganya fa Jesu a dutse a ja mo ntlong ya Mofarisai, a lere setlolo ka sedibelwana sa alebasetara." 
Luke7:38 A ema ka fa morago, fa dinaong tsa gagwe, a lela, mme a simolola go kolobetsa dinao tsa gagwe ka dikeledi, a di phimola ka moriri wa tlhogo ya gagwe, a ba a mo atla dinao, a di tlotsa setlolo." 
Luke7:39 Jaana ya re Mofarisai yo o mmiditseng a bona jalo, a ithaya a re: “Monna yo, fa e ka bo e le moperofeti, o ka bo a lemogile mosadi yo o mo amang gore ke mang, le ka fa o ntseng ka teng, ka e le moleofi.”" 
Luke7:40 Mme Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Simone, ke na le sengwe se nka se buang nao.” Ene a re: “Moruti, a ko o bue.”" 
Luke7:41 “Ga bo go le motho yo go tsewang dilo molato mo go ene, a bo a na le batho ba le babedi ba ba molato nae; mongwe a le molato diponto di le 50, yo mongwe a le molato diponto di le tlhano fela." 
Luke7:42 E rile ka ba se na sepe go lefa ka sone, a ba itshwarela boo babedi. Ka re, mpolelela gore yo o tlaa mo ratang bogolo mo go bone ke ofe?”" 
Luke7:43 Simone a mo fetola a re: “Ke a gopola e tlaa nna ene yo o mo itshwaretseng go le gogolo.” A mo raya a re: “O gopotse sentle.” 
Luke7:44 A retologela mosadi, a raya Simone a re: “A o bona mosadi yo? Ke tsile mo ntlong ya gago, ga o a ka wa nnaya metsi a dinao; mme yo o nkolobeditse dinao ka dikeledi, a di phimola ka moriri wa gagwe." 
Luke7:45 Ga o a ka wa nkatla; mme mosadi yo, ke sa le ke tsena, ga a ise a ke a khutle go nkatla dinao." 
Luke7:46 Tlhogo ya me ga o a ka wa e tlotsa lookwane; mme mosadi yo, o ntloditse dinao ka setlolo." 
Luke7:47 Ke gone ke go rayang ke re, dibe tsa gagwe tse di leng dintsi o di itshwaretswe, gonne o ratile go le gogolo; mme yo o itshwaretsweng go le gobotlana, o rata go le gobotlana.”" 
Luke7:48 A raya mosadi a re: “Dibe tsa gago o di itshwaretswe.” 
Luke7:49 Ba ba dutseng nae ba ja, ba simolola go ithaya ba re: “E mang yo, yo o itshwarelang dibe le gone?”" 
Luke7:50 Mme a raya mosadi a re: “Tumelo ya gago e go bolokile; tsamaya ka kagiso.” 
Luke8:1 Ga akofa ga dirala morago ga moo, gore a tsamaye a ye le metse le metsana yotlhe, a rera a bolela Mafoko a a Molemo a bogosi jwa Modimo; le ba ba 12 ba bo ba na nae," 
Luke8:2 le basadi bangwe ba ba fodisitsweng mewa e e bosula le diemera, le Maria yo o bidiwang Magetalene, yo mewa e supa e duleng mo go ene," 
Luke8:3 le Joana mosadi wa ga Tšhusa, molebalebedi ntlo wa ga Herote, le Susana, le ba bangwe ba le bantsi ba ba mo direlang ka dilo tsa bone." 
Luke8:4 E rile bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho ba sena go phuthega, le batho ba ba tswang mo metseng yotlhe ba tsile kwa go ene, a bua ka setshwantsho a re:" 
Luke8:5 “Mojadi o kile a tswa a ya go jala peo ya gagwe; ya re a jala, ditlhaka dingwe tsa wela fa tseleng; mme tsa gatwe ka dinao, le dinonyane tsa loapi tsa di sela tsa di ja." 
Luke8:6 Tse dingwe tsa wela fa go letlapa; ya re fela di sena go tlhaba, tsa ba tsa swaba, ka di tlhokile longola." 
Luke8:7 Tse dingwe tsa wela mo mitlweng; mme mitlwa ya tlhoga natso, ya di hupetsa." 
Luke8:8 Tse dingwe tsa wela mo mmung o o molemo, tsa gola, tsa ungwa loungo lwa nna lekgolo.” Ya re a bua dilo tse, a goa a re: “Yo o nang le ditsebe go utlwa a a utlwe!”" 
Luke8:9 Barutwa ba gagwe ba mmotsa gore setshwantsho se e ka ne e le sa eng? 
Luke8:10 Mme a re: “Lona lo neilwe go itse masaitsiweng a bogosi jwa Modimo; mme ba bangwe ba go newa ka ditshwantsho; gore ka go bona ba se ka ba bona le ka go utlwa ba se ka ba tlhaloganya. 
Luke8:11 “Mme jaana setshwantsho ke se: Peo ke lefoko la Modimo. 
Luke8:12 Ba ba fa tseleng ke ba ba utlwileng; foo go tle diabolo a tlose lefoko mo pelong tsa bone, gore ba se ka ba dumela mme ba bolokwa." 
Luke8:13 Ba ba fa go leng letlapa ke ba e a reng ba utlwile, ba tshole lefoko ka boitumelo; bao, e re ka ba sena modi, ba dumele ka lobakanyana fela; mme mo motlheng wa thaelo ba tenege." 
Luke8:14 Tse di wetseng mo mitlweng, ke ba ba utlwileng, mme ba re ba ntse ba tswelela pele ba hupediwa ke ditlhodiego, le mahumo, le ditlhapelo tsa botshelo jono, ba se ke ba ungwe loungo lope lo lo itekanetseng." 
Luke8:15 Tse di mo mmung o o molemo ke ba e a reng ba sena go utlwa lefoko, ba le tshware thata mo pelong e e siameng, e e molemo, mme ba ungwe loungo ka bopelotelele." 
Luke8:16 “Ga go na motho ope, yo e a reng a tshubile lobone a lo ribegetse ka sejana, le fa e le go lo huhumetsa tlase ga bolao; mme o a tle a lo tlhome ka setlhomo, gore ba ba tsenang ba bone lesedi." 
Luke8:17 “Gonne ga go a fitlhega sepe se se ketlang se bonatshiwa; ga go sepe se se sa itsegeng se se se ketlang se itsiwe, se tswela kwa leseding." 
Luke8:18 “Ke gone, itiseng, ka fa lo utlwang ka teng; gonne le fa e le mang yo o nang le sengwe, ke ene o tlaa newang; mme le fa e le mang yo o se nang sepe, go tlaa tlosiwa mo go ene le se o itlhomang a na naso.”" 
Luke8:19 Ga tla kwa go ene mmaagwe le bomonnawe, mme ba retelelwa ke go fitlha fa go ene ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa batho." 
Luke8:20 A bolelelwa ke bangwe ba re: “Mmaago le bomonnao ba emetse kwa thoko, ba eletsa go go bona.”" 
Luke8:21 A ba fetola a re: “Mme le bonnake ke ba ba utlwang lefoko la Modimo, mme ba le dira.”" 
Luke8:22 Jaana ga dirala ya re ka letsatsi lengwe la malatsi ao, a tsena mo mokorong a na le barutwa ba gagwe, a ba raya a re: “A re tsheleleng kwa moseja ga bodiba.” Ba bolola ka mokoro." 
Luke8:23 Ya re ba ntse ba tsamaya, ene a thulamela; mme ga fologela matsubutsubu a phefo mo bodibeng; mme ba tlalelwa ke metsi, ba nna mo poitshegong." 
Luke8:24 Ba tla mo go ene ba mo tsosa ba re: “Morena, Morena, re a nyelela.” Foo a tsoga, a kgalemela phefo le go suma ga metsi; mme ga khutla, ga nna tuulalo fela." 
Luke8:25 Mme a ba raya a re: “Tumelo ya lona e kae?” Mme e re ka ba boifa, ba gakgamala, ba raana ba re: “Ana motho yo o ntse jang, fa e bo ne ne a laola le tsone diphefo jaana le metsi, mme di mo utlwe?”" 
Luke8:26 Ba fitlha mo lefatsheng la Bagerasa le le lebaganyeng le Galilea. 
Luke8:27 Ya re a tswela mo lefatsheng, a kgatlhana le monna mongwe yo o tswang mo motseng, yo o nang le mowa o o maswe; yo o sa leng a nna fela ka lobaka lo loleele a sa apare sepe, a bile a sa nne mo ntlong epe, fa e se mo diphupung fela." 
Luke8:28 Ya re a bona Jesu, a goa, a wela fa fatshe fa pele ga gagwe, mme ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Ke dirang ka wena, Jesu Morwa Modimo wa Mogodimodimo? Ke a go rapela, o se ka wa ntlhokofatsa.”" 
Luke8:29 Gonne o ne a laotse mowa o o maswe gore o tswe mo monneng yoo. Ka gobo o ne o ntse o mo tshwere gantsi; a disiwa a golegilwe ka dikeetane le mehiri; mme a komoganye dikgolego, a kgweelediwe ke mowa o o maswe kwa gare ga naga." 
Luke8:30 Jesu a mmotsa a re: “Leina la gago e mang?” A re: “Ke Mophato,” gonne go ne go tsenye mewa e e maswe e le mentsi mo go ene." 
Luke8:31 Mme ya mo rapela gore a se e laolele go ya kwa moleteng o o se nang bolekanyetso. 
Luke8:32 Jaana ga bo go le serapa se segolo sa dikolobe teng, se fula mo thabeng; ya mo rapela gore a e leseletse go tsena mo go tsone. Mme a e leseletsa." 
Luke8:33 Mme mowa o o maswe wa tswa mo monneng yoo, wa tsena mo dikolobeng; mme serapa sa kgokologela ka mapawa mo bodibeng, mme sa betwa ke metsi." 
Luke8:34 E rile badisa ba tsone ba bona se se dirafetseng, ba tshaba, ba ya ba bolela mo motseng le mo lefatsheng." 
Luke8:35 Mme ba tswa ba ya go bona se se dirafetseng; ba tla kwa go Jesu, ba fitlhela monna yo mowa o o maswe o duleng mo go ene a dutse fela fa dinaong tsa ga Jesu, a apere, a bile a na le tlhaloganyo e e siameng ya gagwe; mme ba boifa." 
Luke8:36 Le ba ba se bonyeng ba ba bolelela ka fa yo o neng a tsenywe ke mowa o o maswe o fodisitsweng ka gone. 
Luke8:37 Batho botlhe ba lefatshe la Bagerasa le ba tikologo ya gone, ba mo rapela gore a tsamaye a tswe mo go bone, ka ba ne ba tshwerwe ke poifo e kgolo, mme a tsena mo mokorong, a boa." 
Luke8:38 Mme monna yo mowa o o maswe o duleng mo go ene, a mo rapela gore a nne nae; mme Jesu a mo naya tsela a re:" 
Luke8:39 “Boela kwa ntlong ya gago, mme o bolele dilo tse dikgolo tse Modimo o di go diretseng.” Mme a tsamaya, a ya a bolela mo motseng otlhe, a kakanya dilo tse dikgolo tse Jesu o di mo diretseng." 
Luke8:40 Ya re Jesu a boa, batho ba mo tshola sentle; ka ba ne ba mo lebeletse botlhe." 
Luke8:41 Mme bonang, ga tla monna mongwe yo o bidiwang Jairo, ya bo e le molaodi mongwe wa ntlo ya thuto; a wela fa fatshe fa dinaong tsa ga Jesu, a mo rapela gore a ye go tsena mo ntlong ya gagwe;" 
Luke8:42 ka a ne a na le ngwana wa mosetsana yo o esi, yo o ka neng a le dinyaga di le 12; mme a bo a le mo pitlaganong ya loso. Ya re a tsamaya batho ba mo kgotlhaganyetsa." 
Luke8:43 Mosadi mongwe yo o lwetseng botlhoko jwa go tshologa madi ka dinyaga di le 12, a feditse dilo tsotlhe tse o tshelang ka tsone mo dingakeng, mme a retela go fodisiwa ke epe ya tsone," 
Luke8:44 a tla fa morago ga gagwe; a ama makantsa a seaparo sa gagwe; mme fela ka bonako go tshologa ga madi ga khutla mo go ene. 
Luke8:45 Mme Jesu a re: “Ke amilwe ke mang?” Ya re ba itatola botlhe, Petere le ba o nang nabo ba re: “Morena, batho ba go kgotlhaganyeditse ba go pitlagantse.”" 
Luke8:46 Jesu a re: “Mongwe o nkamile; ka ke ikutlwile fa nonofo e dule mo go nna.” 
Luke8:47 Ya re mosadi a bona fa a sa fitlhega, a tla a roroma, a wela fa fatshe fa pele ga gagwe, a mmolelela fa pele ga batho botlhe ka fa o mo amileng ka gone, le ka fa o fodisitsweng ka gone." 
Luke8:48 Mme a mo raya a re: “Morwadiaka, tumelo ya gago e go fodisitse; tsamaya ka kagiso.”" 
Luke8:49 Ya re a sa ntse a bua, ga tla mongwe, a tswa kwa ntlong ya molaodi wa ntlo ya thuto, a mo raya a re: “Morwadio o sule, se lapise Moruti.”" 
Luke8:50 Ya re Jesu a utlwa jalo, a mo fetola a re: “Se boife, dumela fela, mme o tlaa fodisiwa.”" 
Luke8:51 Ya re a fitlha kwa ntlong, a se ka a leseletsa ope go tsena nae, fa e se Petere, le Johane le Jakobe, le rra mosetsana, le mmaagwe ba le bosi." 
Luke8:52 Mme botlhe ba bo ba lela, ba mo lelela; mme ene a re: “Se leleng, gonne ga a a swa, o robetse.”" 
Luke8:53 Ba mo tshega ka tshotlo, ka ba itse fa a sule." 
Luke8:54 A mo tshwara ka seatla, a bitsa a re: “Mosetsana, tsoga.”" 
Luke8:55 Mme mowa wa gagwe wa ba wa boa, mme a tsoga ka bonako; a laola gore a fiwe dijo." 
Luke8:56 Batsadi ba gagwe ba gakgamadiwa thata; mme a ba laya gore ba se bolelele ope se se dirilweng. 
Luke9:1 A phutha ba ba 12, a ba naya thata le taolo go laola mewa e e maswe yotlhe, le go fodisa malwetse." 
Luke9:2 A ba roma gore ba ye go rera bogosi jwa Modimo, le go fodisa ba ba lwalang." 
Luke9:3 A ba raya a re: “Lo se ka lwa tseela loeto lwa lona sepe, le fa e ka nna thobane, le fa e le kuana, le fa e le senkgwe, le fa e le madi; le gone a go se nne ope wa lona yo o tsayang dikobo di le pedi." 
Luke9:4 Ntlo e lo tsenang mo go yone, le fa e ka nna efe, lo nne teng; e be e nne yone e lo tswang mo go yone fa lo tsamaya." 
Luke9:5 Le fa e le bomang ba ba sa lo tsholeng, e re lo tswa mo motseng oo, lo itlhotlhore lorole mo dinaong tsa lona, go nna tshupo ka ga bone.”" 
Luke9:6 Ba tsamaya; ba ralala metsana, ba rera Mafoko a a Molemo, ba ba ba fodisa balwetse mo ntlheng tsotlhe." 
Luke9:7 Jaana kgosana Herote a utlwa ka ga dilo tsotlhe tse di dirilweng ke ene; mme a akabala thata, gonne bangwe ba re: “Johane o tsogile mo losong.”" 
Luke9:8 Ba bangwe ba re: “Elija o bonetse,” mme ba bangwe ba re: “Mongwe wa baperofeti ba bogologolo o bile o tsogile.”" 
Luke9:9 Herote a re: “Johane ke mo kgaotse tlhogo; mme yo ke utlwang dilo tse di ntseng jaana ka ga gagwe, ya bo e le mang?” Mme a eletsa go mmona." 
Luke9:10 E rile baaposetole ba sena go boa, ba mmolelela dilo tse ba di dirileng. A ba tsaya, ba ngongwaelela kwa thoko ba le bosi, kwa motseng o o bidiwang Bethesaita." 
Luke9:11 Ya re batho ba bantsi ba sena go lemoga ba mo latela; a ba tshola a bua nabo ka ga bogosi jwa Modimo, a fodisa ba ba tlhokang phodiso." 
Luke9:12 Ya re letsatsi le simolola go fefa, ba ba 12 ba tla kwa go ene, ba mo raya ba re: “Phatlalatsa bontsi jo, jwa batho, gore ba ye kwa metseng le kwa metsaneng mo ntlheng tsotlhe, ba robale teng, ba bone dijo; gonne fano re mo gare ga naga fela.”" 
Luke9:13 A ba raya a re: “Lona lo ba fe, ba je.” Mme ba re: “Ga re na sepe, fa e se dinkgwe di le tlhano le ditlhapi di le pedi; fa e se fela re ka ya go rekela batho botlhe ba dijo.”" 
Luke9:14 Gonne go ne go le banna e ka ne e le ba le 5 000. A raya barutwa ba gagwe gore ba dudise batho fa fatshe ka masomo, lesomo lengwe le lengwe batho ba nne 50." 
Luke9:15 Ba dira jalo ba ba dudisa botlhe. 
Luke9:16 Mme a tsaya dinkgwe tse tlhano, le ditlhapi tse pedi, a lelalela legodimong a di segofatsa, a di ngathoganya, a di neela barutwa go di baya fa pele ga batho." 
Luke9:17 Ba ja, ba kgora botlhe; mme ga selwa dikabetla tse ba di siileng, diroto di le 12." 
Luke9:18 Ga dirala ya re a rapela a le esi, barutwa ba gagwe ba bo ba na nae; mme a ba botsa a re: “Batho ba tle ba re nna ke mang?”" 
Luke9:19 Ba mo fetola ba re: “Johane Mokolobetsi; bangwe ba re: Elija; ba bangwe ba re: mongwe wa baperofeti ba bogologolo o bile o tsogile.” 
Luke9:20 A ba raya a re: “Lona lwa re ke mang?” Petere a mo fetola a re: “O Keresete wa Modimo.” 
Luke9:21 A ba laya thata, a ba laola gore ba se bolelele ope selo seo;" 
Luke9:22 a re: “Morwa Motho o na le go boga dilo di le dintsi, le go ganwa ke bagolwane le ke ditlhogo tsa baperesiti, le bakwadi, mme o tlaa bolawa, a ba a tsosiwa ka letsatsi la boraro.”" 
Luke9:23 A raya botlhe a re: “Fa motho mongwe a rata go ntshala morago a a iitatole, a tseye mokgoro wa gagwe ka malatsi otlhe, mme a ntshale morago." 
Luke9:24 Gonne le fa e le mang yo o ratang a ka bo a boloka botshelo jwa gagwe bo tlaa mo latlhegela; mme le fa e le mang yo o tlaa latlhegelwang ke botshelo jwa gagwe ka ntlha ya me, yoo o tlaa bo boloka." 
Luke9:25 Gonne motho o a ba a ka thusega eng, fa a fenya lefatshe lotlhe, mme ene ka sebele sa gagwe a itimetsa, kgotsa a itatlha?" 
Luke9:26 Gonne le fa e le mang yo o tlaa ntlhabelwang ke ditlhong, le mafoko a me a a tlhabelwa ke ditlhong, Morwa Motho o tlaa tlhabisiwa ditlhong ke ene, mogang o tlang ka kgalalelo ya gagwe, le ya ga rraagwe, le ya baengele ba ba boitshepo." 
Luke9:27 Ke lo bolelela ruri gore go na le bangwe ba bone ba ba emeng fa, ba ba se ketlang ba utlwa loso, ba ise ba bone bogosi jwa Modimo.”" 
Luke9:28 Ga dirala ya re e ka ne e le malatsi a 8 morago ga mafoko a, a tsaya Petere, le Johane le Jakobe, a tlhatlogela mo thabeng, a ya go rapela." 
Luke9:29 Ya re a sa ntse a rapela, tshwano ya sefatlhogo sa gagwe ya fetoga, le diaparo tsa gagwe tsa sweufala, e le bosweu jo bo fatlhang." 
Luke9:30 Mme bonang, ga bua nae banna ba le babedi, e le Moše le Elija;" 
Luke9:31 ba bonala ba le mo kgalalelong, mme ba bua ka ga go swa ga gagwe mo o tlaa tlogang a go dirafatsa kwa Jerusalema." 
Luke9:32 Jaana Petere le ba o nang nabo ba bo ba fentswe ke boroko; ya re ba sena go tsoga, ba bona kgalalelo ya gagwe, le banna ba babedi ba ba emeng nae." 
Luke9:33 Ga dirala ya re ba kgaogana nae, Petere a raya Jesu a re: “Morena, go molemo go rona go nna fa; o mme re dire metlaagana e le meraro; mongwe e nne wa gago, mongwe e nne wa ga Moše, mongwe e nne wa ga Elija,” ka a sa itse se o se buang." 
Luke9:34 Mme ya re a sa ntse a bua jalo, ga tla leru la ba tshutifalela; mme ya re ba tsena mo lerung ba boifa." 
Luke9:35 Ga tswa lentswe mo lerung la re: “Yo ke Morwaake, (yo o rategang) moitshenkedwi wa me; utlwang ene.”" 
Luke9:36 Mme ya re lentswe le khutla, Jesu a bonwa a le esi. Mme ba didimala fela, ba se ka ba bolelela ope mo malatsing ao sepe sa dilo tse ba di bonyeng." 
Luke9:37 Ga dirala ya re ka moso ba sena go fologa mo thabeng, bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho jwa mo kgatlhantsha." 
Luke9:38 Mme bonang, monna mongwe mo bontsing a goa a re: “Moruti, ke a go rapela, a ko o lebe morwaake; gonne ke ene ngwanake yo o esi." 
Luke9:39 Mme bona, mowa o tlo o mo tseye, mme re tshogane ka a goa, o mo tsibiketse, a phoke masulo, o mo tapete, o mo tlogele ka bothata." 
Luke9:40 Ke rapetse barutwa ba gago gore ba o kgoromeletse ntle; mme ba reteletswe.” 
Luke9:41 Jesu a fetola a re: “Ao, losika lo lo se nang tumelo, lo lo tlhogo e thata! Ke tlaa nna le lona lobaka lo lo kae ke iphapaanya le lona? Lere morwao kwano.”" 
Luke9:42 Ya re a sa ntse a tla kwa go ene, mowa o o maswe wa mo piriganya, wa mo tsibiketsa mo go botlhoko. Jesu a kgalemela mowa o o maswe, a fodisa ngwana, a ba o mo neela rraagwe." 
Luke9:43 Botlhe ba gakgamadiwa ke tlotlomalo e kgolo ya Modimo. Ya re ba sa ntse ba gakgametse botlhe ka ga dilo tsotlhe tse Jesu o di dirileng, a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re:" 
Luke9:44 “A mafoko a, a tsenelele mo ditsebeng tsa lona; gonne Morwa Motho o tlaa neelwa mo diatleng tsa batho.”" 
Luke9:45 Mme ba se ka ba tlhaloganya lefoko le; ba le lobelwa gore ba se ka ba le lemoga; mme ba boifa go mmotsa ka ga lefoko leo. 
Luke9:46 Mme ga tsoga kgang mo go bone ya gore, yo o tlaa nnang mogolo mo go bone ke mang?" 
Luke9:47 Ya re Jesu a bona mogopolo wa dipelo tsa bone, a tsaya ngwanyana, a mmaya fa go ene." 
Luke9:48 A ba raya a re: “Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa tsholang ngwanyana yo ka leina la me, o tshola nna; mme le fa e le mang yo o tlaa ntsholang, o tshola ene yo o nthomileng; gonne yo o leng mmotlana bogolo mo go lona, ke ene yo e leng mogolo.”" 
Luke9:49 Johane a bua a re: “Morena re kile ra bona mongwe a kgoromeletsa mewa e e maswe kwa ntle ka leina la gago; mme ra mo itsa ka a sa go sale morago le rona.” 
Luke9:50 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Lo se ka lwa mo itsa; gonne yo o sa tlhabaneng le rona o ntlheng ya rona.” 
Luke9:51 Ga dirala e rile motlha o setse o atametse o a tlaa tsholediwang ka one, a lebanyetsa ruri sefatlhogo sa gagwe go ya Jerusalema." 
Luke9:52 A roma barongwa fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gagwe; ba ya ba tsena mo motsaneng wa Basamaria go mo etleeletsa teng. 
Luke9:53 Mme ba se ka ba mo tshola, ka sefatlhogo sa gagwe se ntse jaaka e kete o ya Jerusalama." 
Luke9:54 Ya re barutwa ba gagwe, Jakobe le Johane, ba bona jalo ba re: “Morena, a o rata ra laola molelo wa fologa kwa legodimong wa ba laila?”" 
Luke9:55 Mme a retologa, a ba omanya, (a re: “Ga lo ikitse gore lo ba mowa o o ntseng jang." 
Luke9:56 Gonne Morwa Motho ga a a tla go senya botshelo jwa batho fa e se go bo boloka fela.”) Mme ba ya kwa motsaneng o sele. 
Luke9:57 Ya re ba ntse ba tsamaya mo tseleng, monna mongwe a mo raya a re: “Ke tlaa go sala morago gongwe le gongwe kwa o yang teng.”" 
Luke9:58 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Diphokoje di na le mesima, le dinonyane tsa loapi di na le ditlhaga; mme Morwa Motho ene ga a na fa o ka itatsang tlhogo teng.”" 
Luke9:59 A raya yo mongwe a re: “Ntshala morago.” Mme a re: “Morena, ntesa pele ke ye go fitlha rre.”" 
Luke9:60 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Lesa baswi ba fitlhe baswi ba bone; mme wena tsamaya o utlwatse bogosi jwa Modimo.” 
Luke9:61 Yo mongwe le ene a re: “Morena, ke tla go sala morago, ntesa pele ke ye go dumedisa bone ba ba kwa gaetsho.”" 
Luke9:62 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ga go motho ope yo o ka reng a tshwere mogoma ka seatla, mme a šeba kwa morago, yo o ka tshwanelang bogosi jwa Modimo.”" 
Luke10:1 Jaana morago ga dilo tse, Morena a baakanya ba bangwe ba le 70, a ba roma ka bobedi le bobedi fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa gagwe, ba ya mo metseng yotlhe, le gongwe le gongwe kwa le ene o tlogang a ya teng." 
Luke10:2 A ba raya a re: “Thobo e kgolo ruri, mme badiri ba botlana; ke gone rapelang Morena wa thobo, gore a rome badiri mo thobong ya gagwe." 
Luke10:3 Tsamayang; bonang, ke lo roma jaaka dikwanyana gare ga diphiri." 
Luke10:4 Se tsholeng patana ya madi, le fa e le kuana, le fa e le ditlhako; le gone lo se ka lwa dumedisa ope mo tseleng." 
Luke10:5 Ntlo e lo tsenang mo go yone, le fa e ka nna efe, e re pele lo re: ‘A kagiso e nne le ntlo e.’" 
Luke10:6 Fa morwa kagiso a le teng, kagiso ya lona e tlaa nna mo go yone; mme fa a seyo, kagiso ya lona e tlaa ba e boela mo go lona." 
Luke10:7 Lo nne fela mo ntlong eo, lo ja lo nwa dilo tse ba di lo nayang; gonne modiri o tshwanetswe ke tuelo ya gagwe. Lo se ka lwa tsamayatsamaya le matlo fela." 
Luke10:8 Motse o lo tsenang mo go one, le fa e ka nna ofe, mme ba lo tshola, lo je fela tse di bewang fa pele ga lona;" 
Luke10:9 lo fodise ba ba lwalang mo go one; lo bo lo ba reye lo re: ‘Bogosi jwa Modimo bo lo atametse.’ 
Luke10:10 Motse o lo tsenang mo go one, le fa e ka nna ofe, mme ba sa lo tshole, tswelang mo mebileng ya one lo re:" 
Luke10:11 ‘Le e leng lorole lwa motse wa lona lo lo re ngaparetseng dinao, re a lo lo phimolela; le fa go ntse jalo, itseng mo gore bogosi jwa Modimo bo atametse.’" 
Luke10:12 Ke a lo raya, e tlaa re mo letsatsing leo, go tlaa nna botoka ka ga Sotoma bogolo go motse oo." 
Luke10:13 “A bo go latlhega wena Korasine! go latlhega wena Bethesaita! gonne fa ditiro tsa nonofo tse di dirilweng mo go lona di ka bo di dirilwe mo Ture le Sitone, ba ka bo ba sa bolo go ikwatlhaya, ba dutse mo matseleng a dikgetse le mo meloreng." 
Luke10:14 Le fa go ntse jalo, go tlaa nna botoka ka ga Ture le Sitone mo katlholong bogolo go lona." 
Luke10:15 Wena Kaperenaume, a o golelediwa legodimong? O tlaa folosediwa mo Bobipong." 
Luke10:16 Yo o utlwang lona, o utlwa nna; yo o ganang lona, o gana nna; mme yo o ganang nna o gana ene yo o nthomileng.”" 
Luke10:17 Ba ba 70 ba boa ka boitumelo, ba re: “Morena, mewa e e maswe le yone ya re utlwa ka leina la gago.”" 
Luke10:18 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ke bonye Satane a wa jaaka logadima kwa legodimong. 
Luke10:19 Bonang, ke lo neile thata ya go gata dinoga le diphepheng, le mo nonofong yotlhe ya mmaba, ga go sepe se se tlaa lo utlwisang botlhoko ka gope." 
Luke10:20 Le fa go ntse jalo, lo se ka lwa itumelela moo gore mewa e a lo utlwa; lo itumelele gore maina a lona a kwadilwe kwa legodimong.”" 
Luke10:21 Ya re mo lobakeng loo Jesu a itumela ka Mowa o o Boitshepo a re: “Ke a go leboga, Rra, Morena wa legodimo le lefatshe; ka gobo dilo tse o di lobetse ba ba botlhale le ba ba tlhaloganyang, mme o di senoletse banyana ba bannye; ee, Rra, gonne go ne go le kgatlhego mo matlhong a gago gore go nne jalo." 
Luke10:22 “Dilo tsotlhe ke di neetswe ke Rre; mme ga go ope yo o itseng Morwa gore e mang, fa e se Rara; le Rara gore e mang, fa e se Morwa, le mongwe yo Morwa o ratang go mo mo senolela.”" 
Luke10:23 A retologela barutwa, a ba sebela, a re: “Go sego matlho a a bonang tse lo di bonang;" 
Luke10:24 gonne ke a lo raya, baperofeti ba le bantsi ba eleditse, le dikgosi, go bona tse lo di bonang, mme ba se ka ba di bona; le go utlwa tse lo di utlwang, mme ba se ka ba di utlwa.”" 
Luke10:25 Mme bonang, motho mongwe wa molao, a ema a mo lalela a re: “Moruti, ke tlaa dirang gore ke rue botshelo jo bo sa khutleng?”" 
Luke10:26 A mo raya a re: “Go kwadilwe eng mo molaong? O bala jang?” 
Luke10:27 A fetola a re: “Go tulwe, o rate Morena Modimo wa gago ka pelo yotlhe ya gago, le ka mowa otlhe wa gago, le ka thata yotlhe ya gago, le ka tlhaloganyo yotlhe ya gago; le mongwe ka wena jaaka o ithata.”" 
Luke10:28 A mo raya a re: “O fetotse ka tshiamo; dira mo, mme o tlaa tshela.”" 
Luke10:29 Mme ene, ka a rata go itshiamisa, a raya Jesu a re: “Ana mongwe ka nna e be e le mang?”" 
Luke10:30 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Monna mongwe o kile a tswa Jerusalema a fologela kwa Jeriko; mme a wela mo dinokwaneng; tsa mo rutla diaparo, tsa mo itaya, tsa tsamaya tsa mo tlogela a le gaufi le go swa." 
Luke10:31 Mme ga tshoganwa ka moperesiti mongwe a tla ka tsela eo; mme ya re a mmona, a mo fapoga a feta ka fa ntlheng nngwe ya tsela." 
Luke10:32 Fela jalo le molefi ya re a fitlha felong foo, mme a mmona a mo fapoga a feta ka fa ntlheng e nngwe ya tsela." 
Luke10:33 Mme Mosamaria mongwe ya re a etile, a tla fela fa o leng teng; ya re a mmona a mo tlhomogela pelo," 
Luke10:34 a ya mo go ene a fapa dintho tsa gagwe, a di thela lookwane le bojalwa jwa mofine, a mo pega mo peleseng ya gagwe, a mo isa kwa ntlong ya baeti, a mo tlamela." 
Luke10:35 Ka moso a ntsha bošeleng ba le bane, a ba naya mong wa ntlo, a mo raya a re: ‘Mo tlamele sentle; mme se o tlaa se ntshang bogolo go mo, ka ntlha ya gagwe, e tlaa re ke boa ke se go lefele.’" 
Luke10:36 “Jaana, o gopola gore ke mang wa ba bararo ba, yo o itshupileng a le wa ga gabo ene yo o wetseng mo dinokwaneng?”" 
Luke10:37 Mme a re: “Ke yo o mo utlwetseng botlhoko.” Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ya o dire jalo le wena.” 
Luke10:38 Jaana ga dirala ya re ba sa ntse ba tsamaya le tsela, a tsena mo motsaneng mongwe, mme mosadi mongwe yo o bidiwang Maretha a mo tsholela mo ntlong ya gagwe." 
Luke10:39 Mme a bo a na le monnawe yo o bidiwang Maria, yo o bileng a ne a dutse fa dinaong tsa Morena, a utlwa mafoko a gagwe." 
Luke10:40 Maretha a bo a imetswe ke go direla mo gogolo; mme a tla mo go ene a re: “Morena, a ga o re sepe ka nnake a nteseleditse go direla ke le nosi? Ka re mo reye a nthuse.”" 
Luke10:41 Morena a mo fetola a re: “Maretha, Maretha, o a tlhodiega, o itapisa ka dilo di le dintsi;" 
Luke10:42 go batlwa selo se le sengwe fela; gonne Maria o itshenketse kabelo e e molemo, e o se ketlang a e tlosediwa.”" 
Luke11:1 Ga dirala, ya re a rapela felong gongwe, ya re a khutla, mongwe wa barutwa ba gagwe a mo raya a re: “Morena, re rute go rapela, jaaka Johane le ene a ne a ruta barutwa ba gagwe.”" 
Luke11:2 A ba raya a re: “E re fa lo rapela lo re: “ ‘Rra, leina la gago a le itshepisiwe. Bogosi jwa gago a bo tle." 
Luke11:3 Re neye ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe sejo sa letsatsi. 
Luke11:4 O re itshwarele dibe tsa rona; gonne le rona re itshwarela mongwe le mongwe yo o molato le rona. O se re gogele mo thaelong.’ ” 
Luke11:5 A ba raya a re: “Ke ofe wa lona yo o ka reng a na le tsala, mme a ya kwa go ene gare ga bosigo, a mo raya a re: ‘Tsala, nkadima dinkgwe di le tharo;" 
Luke11:6 gonne tsala ya me e nkgorogetse, e tswa loetong, mme ga ke na sepe se nka se mo fang;’" 
Luke11:7 mme yole yo o kwa teng a ka mo fetola a re: ‘Se ntshwenye; go setse go tswetswe, le bana ba me ke na nabo mo bolaong; ga nka ke ka tsoga ka go naya?’" 
Luke11:8 Ke a lo raya, le fa a gana go tsoga a mo naya, ka gobo e le tsala ya gagwe, le fa go ntse jalo, ka ntlha ya kemelelo ya gagwe o tlaa tsoga a mo naya ka fa o tlhokang ka teng." 
Luke11:9 “Ke lo raya ke re: Lopang, mme lo tlaa newa; batlang, mme lo tlaa bona; kgwanyakgwanyang, mme lo tlaa bulelwa." 
Luke11:10 “Gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o lopang, o a amogela; le yo o batlang o a bona; le yo o kgwanyakgwanyang o tlaa bulelwa." 
Luke11:11 Ke ofe wa lona yo o ka reng e le rrabana, mme fa morwawe a mo lopa senkgwe, o ka mo naya lentswe? Kgotsa fa a lopa tlhapi, o ka mo naya noga mo boemong jwa tlhapi?" 
Luke11:12 Gongwe fa a lopa letsae a o ka mo naya phepheng? 
Luke11:13 Ke gone, fa lona lo le bosula, lo itse go naya bana ba lona dineo tse di molemo; bogolo jang Rraeno wa legodimo o tlaa naya ba ba mo lopang Mowa o o Boitshepo.”" 
Luke11:14 Ya re motlha mongwe a bo a kgoromeletsa ntle mewa e e bosula, mme ya bo e le e e dimumu. Ga dirala ya re mowa o o maswe o sena go tswa, motho yo o semumu a bua; mme batho ba gakgamala." 
Luke11:15 Bangwe ba bone ba re: “O kgoromeletsa mewa e e maswe ntle ka Beelesebube kgosana ya mewa e e maswe.” 
Luke11:16 Ba bangwe ba mo raela, ba batla mo go ene sesupo se se tswang legodimong." 
Luke11:17 Mme ene, ka a itse megopolo ya bone, a ba raya a re: “Bogosi bongwe le bongwe jo bo ikgaogantseng bo a swafala; le lolwapa lo lo ikgaoganyang lo a thubega." 
Luke11:18 E ka re fa Satane le ene a ikgaogantse, bogosi jwa gagwe bo tlaa ema jang? Gonne lo re: Ke kgoromeletsa mewa e e maswe ntle ka Beelesebube." 
Luke11:19 Mme fa ke kgoromeletsa mewa e e maswe ntle ka Beelesebube, bomorwaa lona bone ba ba kgoromeletsa ntle ka mang? Ke gone bone ba tlaa nnang baatlhodi ba lona." 
Luke11:20 Fa ke kgoromeletsa mewa e e maswe ntle ka monwana wa Modimo, e tlaa bo jalo bogosi jwa Modimo bo tsile mo go lona." 
Luke11:21 “E a re fa motho yo o thata, yo o tlhometseng dibolao, a disitse lolwapa lwa gagwe, dilo tsa gagwe di nna ka kagiso." 
Luke11:22 Mme e tlaa re fa mongwe yo o thata bogolo go ene a mo tlhasela, a mo fenya, o tlaa mo tseela dibolao tsotlhe tsa gagwe tse o di ikantseng, a ba a aba dithoto tsa gagwe tse di gapilweng." 
Luke11:23 “Yo o sa emang le nna, o tlhabana le nna; le ene yo o sa phutheng le nna o a falatsa." 
Luke11:24 “Mowa o o maswe o a re o dule mo mothong, o tlo o ye o ralale dikaka o batla boikhutso; mme o re o sa bone bope, o itheye o re: ‘Ke tlaa boela kwa ntlong ya me e ke duleng mo go yone.’" 
Luke11:25 O re o fitlha, o fitlhele e feetswe, e baakantswe." 
Luke11:26 Foo o ye o tseye mewa e sele e supa, e e bosula bogolo go one; mme e tsene e age teng; mme bokhutlo jwa motho yo, bo bife bogolo go ga ntlha.”" 
Luke11:27 Ga dirala ya re a sa ntse a bua dilo tse, mosadi mongwe mo bontsing, a tsholetsa lentswe la gagwe, a mo raya a re: “Go sego sebopelo se se go belegeng le mabele a o a amuleng.”" 
Luke11:28 Mme ene a re: “Ee, mme bogolo go sego ba ba utlwang lefoko la Modimo, ba le boloka.”" 
Luke11:29 E rile matshutitshuti a batho a phuthegela kwa go ene, a simolola go re: “Losika lo, ke losika lo lo bosula; lo batla sesupo; mme ga lo ketla lo newa sesupo, fa e se sesupo sa moperofeti Jona." 
Luke11:30 Gonne jaaka Jona a kile a ne a le sesupo mo go Baninefe, Morwa Motho le ene o tlaa nna jalo mo losikeng lo." 
Luke11:31 Mohumagadi, kgosi ya Borwa, o tlaa ema mo tshekong le banna ba losika lo, mme o tlaa ba sekisa; gonne ene o kile a tswa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe, a tla go utlwa botlhale jwa ga Solomone; mme bonang, yo mogolo go feta Solomone o fa." 
Luke11:32 Banna ba Ninefe ba tlaa ema mo tshekong le losika lo, mme ba tlaa lo sekisa; gonne ba ne ba ikwatlhaya ka thero ya ga Jona; mme bonang, yo mogolo go feta Jona o fa." 
Luke11:33 “Ga go ope yo o ka reng fa a tshubile lobone, a lo beye mo go fitlhegileng, le fa e le kwa tlase ga seelo sa mabele, fa e se mo setlhomong fela gore ba ba tsenang ba bone lesedi." 
Luke11:34 Lobone lwa mmele wa gago ke leitlho; ke gone fa leitlho la gago le bona sentle, mmele otlhe wa gago o a bo o tletse lesedi; mme fa le le bosula, mmele wa gago le one o tletse lefifi." 
Luke11:35 Ke gone o ipone, e se re kgotsa lesedi le le mo go wena ya bo e le lefifi." 
Luke11:36 Ke gone ya re mmele wa gago otlhe o tletse lesedi, go se na gope fa go leng lefifi, o tlaa bonesega otlhe fela; fela jaaka go tuka sentle ga lobone go tle go go neye lesedi.”" 
Luke11:37 Jaana ya re a sa ntse a bua, Mofarisai mongwe a mo lopa gore a ye go ja nae motshegare; mme a tsena, a dula a ja." 
Luke11:38 Ya re Mofarisai a go bona, a gakgamala ka a se ka a tlhapa diatla pele go ise go jewe." 
Luke11:39 Morena a mo raya a re: “Aitse jaana lona Bafarisai lo a tle lo tlhatswe bokafantle jwa senwelo le mogotšana, mme bokafateng jwa lona bo tletse bogagapa le bosula fela." 
Luke11:40 Dieleele ke lona, yo o dirileng bokafantle, a ga a a dira bokafateng le jone?" 
Luke11:41 Le fa go ntse jalo, atswang bahumanegi ka dilo tse di mo teng; mme bonang, dilo tsotlhe di tlaa bo di lo ntlafaletse." 
Luke11:42 “Go a bo go latlhega lona Bafarisai! Ka gobo lo ntsha sa bosome sa mosukujwane, le sa rue, le sa merogo yotlhe lekgetho; mme lo tlhokomologa tshiamiso le lorato lwa Modimo; tseno, lo ne lo tshwanetse go di dira, le tse dingwe lo sa di tlogele di sa dirwa." 
Luke11:43 “Go latlhega lona Bafarisai! gonne lo rata ditulo tse di kwa pelepele mo matlong a thuto, le ditumediso mo marekelong." 
Luke11:44 Go latlhega lona bakwadi le Bafarisai, baitimokanyi! Gonne lo tshwana jaaka diphupu tse di sa bonaleng, mme batho ba tsamaya fa godimo ga tsone ba sa itse.”" 
Luke11:45 Ga fetola mongwe wa ba molao, a mo raya a re: “Moruti, fa o bua jaana le rona, o a re kgoba.”" 
Luke11:46 A re: “Le lona, go latlhega lona ba molao, gonne lo belesa batho merwalo e e botlhokotlhoko go rwalwa; mme lona ka losi lo gana go ama merwalo eo le fa e le ka monwana mongwe wa lona." 
Luke11:47 A bo go latlhega lona! Ka lo aga difikantswe tsa baperofeti, mme ke borraeno ba ba ba bolaileng." 
Luke11:48 Jalo lo supa fa lo dumalana le ditiro tsa borraeno; gonne ruri ba ba bolaile, mme lona lo aga difikantswe tsa bone." 
Luke11:49 Ke gone go buileng le jone botlhale jwa Modimo jwa re: ‘Ke tlaa roma baperofeti le baaposetole kwa go bone; mme bangwe ba bone ba tlaa ba bolaya, ba ba bogisa;’" 
Luke11:50 gore madi a baperofeti botlhe, a a tsholotsweng e sa le ka motheo wa lefatshe, a lopiwe mo losikeng lo;" 
Luke11:51 go simolola ka madi a ga Abele, go tla go fitlha mo mading a ga Sakaria, yo o swetseng fa gare ga sebeso le tempele; ee, ke a lo raya, a tlaa lopiwa mo losikeng lo." 
Luke11:52 “Go latlhega lona ba molao, ka lo tlositse sekopololo sa kitso; lona ka losi ga lo a ka lwa tsena, le ba ba rileng ba a tsena, lo ba kgoreleditse.”" 
Luke11:53 E rile a sena go tswa teng, bakwadi le Bafarisai ba simolola go mo tlhotlheletsa ka thata, le go leka go mo gakatsa, gore a bue ka ga dilo di le dintsi;" 
Luke11:54 ba mo lalela, ba batla go tshwara sengwe se se ka tswang mo molomong wa gagwe." 
Luke12:1 Gone foo, fela go sena go phuthega boidiidi jwa batho, ba ba ba tla ba ba katakalana, a simolola go raya barutwa ba gagwe sa ntlha a re: “Lo itise mo sebedisong sa Bafarisai, se e leng boitimokanyo." 
Luke12:2 Ga go ne sepe se se bipilweng, se se se ketlang se senolwa; le fa e le se se fitlhegileng, se se ketlang se itsege." 
Luke12:3 Ke gone tsotlhe tse lo di buileng mo lefifing di tlaa utlwiwa mo leseding; le se lo se sebileng mo matlwaneng a a kwa teng, se tlaa kakanngwa mo ditlhoeng tsa matlo." 
Luke12:4 “Ke a lo raya ditsala tsa me ka re: Se boifeng ba ba bolayang mmele, mme kwa morago ba sa tlhole ba na le se ba ka se dirang." 
Luke12:5 Ke tlaa lo tlhagisa ka ga yo lo tlaa mmoifang; ka re: Boifang ene yo e tlaa reng a sena go bolaya, a bile a na le thata go latlhela mo moleteng, ee, ke a lo raya, boifang ene." 
Luke12:6 “Dithaga di le tlhano, a ga di rekwe ka madinyana a le mabedi? Mme go bo go se epe ya tsone e e lebalwang fa pele ga Modimo." 
Luke12:7 Le meriri ya ditlhogo tsa lona e badilwe yotlhe; ke gone, se boifeng; gonne lo molemo bogolo go dithaga di le dintsi." 
Luke12:8 “Ke a lo raya ka re, le fa e le mang yo o tlaa impolelang fa pele ga batho, Morwa Motho le ene o tlaa mo ipolela fa pele ga baengele ba Modimo;" 
Luke12:9 mme yo o tlaa intatolang fa pele ga batho, o tlaa itatolwa fa pele ga baengele ba Modimo." 
Luke12:10 “Le mongwe le mongwe yo o tlaa buang lefoko le le tswitlang Morwa Motho, o tlaa go itshwarelwa; mme yo o tlhapatsang Mowa o o Boitshepo, ga a ketla a go itshwarelwa." 
Luke12:11 “Mogang ba lo isang fa pele ga ditsheko tsa matlo a thuto, le kwa balaoding, le bathata, lo se ka lwa tlhodiegela gore lo tlaa fetola jang, le fa e le gore lo tlaa reng, gongwe gore lo tlaa buang." 
Luke12:12 Gonne Mowa o o Boitshepo o tlaa lo ruta mo lobakeng loo fela se lo tshwanetseng go se bua.” 
Luke12:13 Mongwe mo bontsing a mo raya a re: “Moruti, bua le mogolole gore a kgaogane boswa le nna.”" 
Luke12:14 Mme a mo raya a re: “Monna, ke dirilwe e mang moatlhodi le moabi mo go lona?”" 
Luke12:15 A ba raya a re: “Tlhokomelang lo bo lo itise mo bopelotshetlheng; gonne botshelo jwa motho ga bo a ema mo letlotlong la dithoto tse o nang natso.” 
Luke12:16 A bua setshwantsho nabo a re: “Lefatshe la mohumi mongwe la ungwisa segolo. 
Luke12:17 Mme a ithaya a re: ‘Ke tlaa dirang ka ke se na mo ke ka bolokelang maungo a me teng?’ 
Luke12:18 A re: ‘Ke tlaa dira jaana: Ke tlaa rutla matlo a me a mabolokelo, ke aga a sele a magolo; mme ke tlaa bolokela mabele a me le dithoto tsa me teng." 
Luke12:19 Ke tlaa raya mowa wa me ke re: Mowa, o na le dithoto di tona, di boloketswe dinyaga di le dintsi; iketle, o je, o nwe, o dire mokete.’" 
Luke12:20 Mme Modimo wa mo raya wa re: ‘Seeleele ke wena, mowa wa gago o lopiwa mo go wena sigong jono; mme dilo tse o di baakantseng di tlaa nna tsa ga mang?’" 
Luke12:21 “Le ene yo o ikhumelang fela a sa humele Modimo, o ntse fela jalo.”" 
Luke12:22 A raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Ke gone ke lo rayang ke re: Se tlhobaeleng ka ga botshelo jwa lona, gore lo tlaa ja eng; le fa e le ka ga mmele gore lo tlaa apara eng;" 
Luke12:23 gonne botshelo bo gaisa dijo, le mmele disparo." 
Luke12:24 Elang mahukubu tlhoko, lo bone fa a sa jale, a sa robe; ga a na letlole le fa e le sebolokelo; mme Modimo o a a jesa; lona lo tlhwatlhwa e kgolo jang go feta dinonyane!" 
Luke12:25 Ke ofe wa lona yo o ikoketsang boleele jwa letsogo, le fa e le le lengwe fela ka go tlhobaela?" 
Luke12:26 E ka re fa lo sa nonofa go dira se sennyennyane, ana lo tlhobaelelang tse dingwe?" 
Luke12:27 Elang dithunya tsa masoma tlhoko, ka fa di golang ka teng; ga di dire, ga di otlhe; le fa go ntse jalo ke a lo raya, le ene Solomone, mo kgalalelong yotlhe ya gagwe, o ne a sa kgabe jaaka sengwe sa tseo." 
Luke12:28 Fa e bo ne ne Modimo o apesa bojang jo bo mo nageng jalo, jo e a reng gompieno bo eme mo nageng, e re ka moso bo latlhelwe mo pesetsong; bogolo jang a ga o ketla o apesa lona, lona ba lo tumelo e potlana?" 
Luke12:29 “Se batleng se lo tlaa se jang, le se lo tlaa se nwang, le gone lo se ka lwa etsaetsega." 
Luke12:30 Gonne dilo tsotlhe tse, di batlwa ke merafe ya lefatshe; mme Rraeno o a itse fa lo tlhoka dilo tse." 
Luke12:31 Bogolo batlang bogosi jwa one, mme dilo tsotlhe tse, lo tlaa di okelediwa." 
Luke12:32 “Letsomanyane, se boifeng, gonne Rraeno o natefelwa ke go lo naya bogosi." 
Luke12:33 Rekisang tse lo nang natso, mme lo ntshe maatso; itireleng dipatana tsa madi tse di sa onaleng, lohumo kwa magodimong lo lo sa tlhaeleng, kwa go sa atameleng legodu lepe teng, le fa e le motoutwana go senya teng." 
Luke12:34 Gonne kwa lohumo lwa lona lo leng teng, dipelo tsa lona le tsone di tlaa nna teng." 
Luke12:35 “A ditheka tsa lona di tlangwe, le dipone tsa lona di tuke;" 
Luke12:36 le lona lo nne jaaka batho ba ba lebeletseng morena wa bone, fa a boa kwa modirong wa nyalo; gore e tle e re a tla a kgwanyakgwanya, ba mmulele ka bofefo." 
Luke12:37 Go sego batlhanka bao, ba e tlaa reng morena wa bone a tla, a ba fitlhele ba lebeletse; ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, o tlaa ikokwaela, a ba dudisa go ja, mme o tlaa tla a ba neela dijo." 
Luke12:38 Fa a ka tla ka tebelo ya bobedi bosigo, le fa a ka tla ka tebelo ya boraro, mme a ba fitlhela jalo, ba bo ba le sego batlhanka bao." 
Luke12:39 Itseng se, gore fa mong wa ntlo a ka bo a itsile nako e legodu le tlaa tlang ka yone, o ka bo a disitse, mme a ko a se ka a leseletsa ntlo ya gagwe ya phunngwa." 
Luke12:40 Le lona etleetsegang; gonne Morwa Motho o tla ka nako e lo sa e gopoleng.” 
Luke12:41 Foo Petere a mo raya a re: “Morena, setshwantsho se, a o se bua le rona, kgotsa o se bua le botlhe fela?”" 
Luke12:42 Morena a re: “Molebalebi yo o ikanyegang, yo o botlhale, e be e le mang, yo morena wa gagwe o tlaa mo laodisang ba ntlo ya gagwe, gore a ba abele dijo mo lobakeng lo e leng lone?" 
Luke12:43 Go sego motlhanka yoo, yo e tlaa reng morena wa gagwe a tla, a mo fitlhele a ntse a dira jalo." 
Luke12:44 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, o tlaa mmaya molaodi wa dilo tsotlhe tse o nang natso." 
Luke12:45 Mme fa motlhanka yo a ka ithaya mo pelong ya gagwe a re: ‘Morena wa me o diegile go tla;’ mme a simolola go betsa batlhanka le malata, le go ja le go nwa, le go tagwa;" 
Luke12:46 morena wa motlhanka yoo o tlaa tla ka letsatsi le o sa mo lebeleleng ka lone, le ka nako e o sa e itseng, mme o tlaa mo kgwathisa thata, a mo laolela kabelo ya gagwe le ba ba se nang boikanngo." 
Luke12:47 “Mme motlhanka yo o itsileng go rata ga morena wa gagwe, mme a se ka a ipaakanya, le fa e le go dira ka fa go rateng ga gagwe, o tlaa bediwa dithupa di le dintsi."
