Luke12:48 Mme yo o se kang a itse, mme a dira dilo tse di tshwanetseng dithupa, o tlaa bediwa dithupa di le dipotlana. Le gone, le fa e le mang yo o neilweng segolo, go tlaa lopiwa segolo mo go ene; le motho yo batho ba mo neetseng go le gotona, ba tlaa lopa mo go fetisang mo go ene." 
Luke12:49 “Ke tsile go latlhela molelo mo lefatsheng; mme ke sa eletsa eng fa jaana o setse o gotsitswe? 
Luke12:50 Ke na le kolobetso e ke nang le go kolobediwa ka yone; mme ke pitlaganye jang go tsamaye go dirafale! 
Luke12:51 A lo itlhoma gore ke tsile go aba kagiso mo lefatsheng? Ke a lo raya, nnyaa; mme bogolo kgaogano." 
Luke12:52 Gonne go tloga fano batho ba le batlhano, ba e leng ba ntlo e le nngwe fela, ba tlaa kgaogana, ba bararo ba ganele le ba babedi, le ba babedi ba ganele le ba bararo." 
Luke12:53 Ba tlaa kgaogana: Rra motho a ganele le morwawe, le morwa a ganele le rraagwe; mma motho a ganele le morwadie, le morwadi a ganele le mmaagwe; matsala a motho a ganele le ngwetsi ya gagwe; ngwetsi le matsalaagwe.”" 
Luke12:54 Le gone a raya matshutitshuti a batho a re: “E a tle e re lo bona leru le tlhatloga kwa bophirimatsatsi, lo re: ‘Go tla mookodi;’ mme go dirafale jalo." 
Luke12:55 E re lo bona phefo ya borwa e foka, lo re: ‘Go tlaa nna mogote o o fisang;’ mme go dirafale." 
Luke12:56 Baitimokanyi ke lona, lo itse go phutholola ponalo ya legodimo le ya lefatshe; mme go ntse jang lo sa itse go phutholola motlha ono?" 
Luke12:57 “Ana, mme go ntse jang, lona ka losi ga lo sekasekeleng se se siameng?" 
Luke12:58 Gonne e a re fa o ya le moganetsi wa gago kwa molaoding, o tlhoafalele gore o re o sa ntse o le mo tseleng, o gololwe mo go ene; gore e se re kgotsa a go gogela fa pele ga moatlhodi, mme moatlhodi a go neela leotlana, mme leotlana le go latlhela mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Luke12:59 “Ke a go bolelela, ga o ketla o tswa teng gope, o ise o bo o lefe ledinyana la bofelo pele.”" 
Luke13:1 Jaana e rile ka lobaka loo ga bo go le bangwe teng, ba molelela ka ga Bagalilea, ba madi a bone Pilato o a tlhakantseng le ditlhabelo tsa bone." 
Luke13:2 Mme Jesu a ba fetola a re: “A lo itlhoma gore Bagalilea bao e ne e le baleofi bogolo go Bagalilea botlhe, ka ba bogile dilo tse?" 
Luke13:3 Ke a lo raya, nnyaa; fa lo sa ikwatlhaye, le lona lotlhe lo tlaa nyelela fela jalo." 
Luke13:4 Kgotsa ba ba 18 bale, ba kago e e godileng e ba wetseng, ya ba bolaya mo Siloame, a lo itlhoma gore e ne e le baleofi go feta batho botlhe ba ba agileng mo Jerusalema?" 
Luke13:5 Ke a lo raya, nnyaa; fa lo sa ikwatlhaye, le lona lotlhe lo tlaa nyelela fela jalo.”" 
Luke13:6 A bua setshwantsho ke se, a re: “Monna mongwe o ne a na le setlhare sa mofeige se tlhomilwe mo tshimong ya gagwe ya mafine; mme a tla go batla loungo mo go sone, mme a se ka a fitlhela sepe." 
Luke13:7 A raya mmaakanyi wa mafine a re: ‘Bona, dinyaga tse tharo tse, ke ntse ke tla go batla loungo mo setlhareng se, sa mofeige, mme ke sa fitlhele sepe; a se rengwe; se bile se emeletseng lefela mo mmung?’" 
Luke13:8 A mo fetola a re: ‘Morena, a ko o se lese le ka ngwaga ono, ke tle ke se lemele, ke se tsenye motshotelo." 
Luke13:9 E tlaa re fa se ungwa go tlaa nna molemo; fa go sa nne jalo, foo o tlaa itse go se rema.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Ya re ka letsatsi la Sabata a bo a ruta mo go nngwe ya matlo a thuto. 
Luke13:11 Bonang, ga bo go le motsadi mongwe yo o sa leng a tsenwa ke mowa wa seemera, ka dinyaga di le 18; mme a bo a hutaganye; a sa ka ke a ikinamolola ka gope." 
Luke13:12 Mme Jesu ya re a mmona, a mmitsa, a mo raya a re: “Mosadi, o golotswe mo seemereng sa gago.”" 
Luke13:13 Mme a baya diatla tsa gagwe mo go ene, mme a siamisiwa fela ka bonako; mme a galaletsa Modimo." 
Luke13:14 Molaodi wa ntlo ya thuto ka a gakaditswe ke Jesu, ka a fodisitse ka letsatsi la Sabata, a raya batho a re: “Go malatsi a le marataro a batho ba tshwanetseng go dira ka one; ke gone tlang lo fodisiwe ka one, e seng ka letsatsi la Sabata.”" 
Luke13:15 Mme Morena a mo fetola a re: “Baitimokanyi ke lona, a le mongwe le mongwe wa lona a e a re go le letsatsi la Sabata a golole kgomo ya gagwe le esela ya gagwe mo ntlong ya yone, a e goge a ye go e nosa?" 
Luke13:16 Mosadi yo e le morwadia Aberahame, yo Satane o sa le a mo golega ka dinyaga di le 18, a ga a a tshwanelwa ke go gololwa mo kgoleng e, ka letsatsi la Sabata?”" 
Luke13:17 Ya re a sena go bua dilo tse, baganetsi botlhe ba gagwe ba tlhabisiwa ditlhong; mme bontsi jotlhe jwa batho jwa itumela, ka ntlha ya dilo tsotlhe tsa kgalalelo tse di dirilweng ke ene." 
Luke13:18 Ke gone o ba reileng a re: “Ana bogosi jwa Modimo bo tshwana le eng? Mme ke tlaa bo tshwantsha ka eng? 
Luke13:19 Bo tshwana le tlhaka ya peo ya mosetara, e motho o ne a e tsaya, a e latlhela mo tshimong ya gagwe; mme ya gola, ya tswa setlhare: dinonyane tsa loapi tsa aga mo dikaleng tsa sone.”" 
Luke13:20 Gape a re: “Ke tlaa tshwantsha bogosi jwa Modimo ka eng? 
Luke13:21 Bo tshwana le sebediso se mosadi o ne a se tsaya, a se tsenya mo dielong di le tharo tsa boupi, ga tsamaya jwa bela jotlhe fela.”" 
Luke13:22 A nna a tsamaya a ralala metse le metsana, a ruta, a ntse a etela kwa Jerusalema." 
Luke13:23 Mongwe a mo raya a re: “Morena, ba ba bolokwang a ba ba botlana?” Mme a ba raya a re:" 
Luke13:24 “Ganelang go tsena ka kgoro e e pitlaganyeng; gonne ke a lo raya, bantsi ba tlaa batla go tsena, mme ba tlaa retelelwa." 
Luke13:25 E tlaa re fa mong wa ntlo a setse a nanogile, mme a tswadile ntlo, mme lo simolola go ema ka fa ntle, lo kgwanyakgwanya setswalo, lo re: ‘Morena, Morena, re bulele;’ mme fa a lo fetola a re: ‘Ga ke lo itse kwa lo tswang teng;’" 
Luke13:26 e dira gone lo tlaa simololang go re: ‘Re kile ra ja ra nwa fa pele ga gago, mme o ne wa ruta mo mebileng ya rona.’" 
Luke13:27 Mme ene o tlaa re: ‘Ke a lo bolelela, ga ke lo itse kwa lo tswang teng; ntlogelang lona lotlhe badiri ba tshiamololo.’" 
Luke13:28 Go tlaa nna selelo le phuranyo ya meno, mogang lo bonang Aberahame le Isake, le Jakobe, le baperofeti botlhe mo bogosing jwa Modimo, mme lona lo kgoromeleditswe kwa ntle." 
Luke13:29 Mme ba tlaa tswa kwa botlhabatsatsi, le kwa bophirimatsatsi, le kwa botsheka le kwa borwa, mme ba tlaa dula mo bogosing jwa Modimo." 
Luke13:30 Bonang, go na le ba morago ba ba tlaa nnang ba pele, go bile go na le ba pele ba ba tlaa nnang ba morago.”" 
Luke13:31 Ya re ka nako eo fela, ga tla bangwe ba Bafarisai, ba mo raya ba re: “Tswa mono o tsamaye, gonne Herote o rata gobo a ka go bolaya.”" 
Luke13:32 Mme a ba raya a re: “Yang lo reye phokoje eo lo re: Bona, ke kgoromeletsa mewa e e maswe ntle, ke fodisa gompieno le ka moso, mme e tlaa re ka letsatsi la boraro ke be ke dirwa boitekanelo." 
Luke13:33 Le fa go ntse jalo ke na le go tswelela pela gompieno le ka moso, le ka moso o mongwe; gonne ga go ka ke ga nna go re moperofeti o ka swela kwa ntle ga Jerusalema." 
Luke13:34 “Jerusalema we! Jerusalema we! Wena yo o bolayang baperofeti, o kgobotletsa ka maje ba ba rongwang kwa go wena; ke ka bo ke phuthile bana ba gago mmogo gantsi jang, jaaka koko e tle e phuthele mamphorwana a yone mo diphukeng tsa yone, mme lo ganne." 
Luke13:35 Bona, ntlo ya lona lo e tlogeletswe e le letlotla fela; ammaaruri ke a lo raya, ga lo ketla lo tlhola lo mpona, go tle go tsamaye lobaka lo tle, lo lo tlaa buang ka lone, lo re: ‘Go bakwe ene yo o tlang mo ineng la Morena.’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Ga dirala e rile go le letsatsi la Sabata, a tsena mo ntlong ya Mofarisai mongwe wa mogolwane, a ya go ja senkgwe, mme ba bo ba mo lepile." 
Luke14:2 Bonang, ga bo go le monna e fa pele ga gagwe a lwala pudulogo ya metsi." 
Luke14:3 Jesu a bua, a raya ba molao le Bafarisai a re: “A go letleletswe go fodisa ka letsatsi la Sabata, kgotsa nnyaa?”" 
Luke14:4 Ba didimala fela. Mme a mo tsaya, a mo fodisa, a mo lesa a tsamaya." 
Luke14:5 A ba raya a re: “Ke ofe wa lona yo e ka reng fa a na le esela, le fa e le kgomo, fa e wetse mo sedibeng, a se ke a akofa a ya go e ntsha fela ka letsatsi la Sabata?”" 
Luke14:6 Ba retelelwa ke go mo fetola mo dilong tse. 
Luke14:7 A bua setshwantsho le ba ba laleditsweng, ka a bona ka fa ba itebalebelang ditulo tse di kwa pele ka teng; a ba raya a re:" 
Luke14:8 “E re fa mongwe a go laleditse modiro wa nyalo, o se ka wa dula mo mannong a a kwa pele, e se re kgotsa mongwe yo o tlotlegang bogolo go wena a ba a laleditswe le ene;" 
Luke14:9 mme yo o go laleditseng nae a tla, a go raya a re: ‘Sutela monna yo;’ foo o simolole go tsaya setulo se se kwa morago ka ditlhong." 
Luke14:10 Mme e re fa o laleditswe, o ye o tseye setulo se se kwa moragorago, gore e tle e re yo o go laleditseng a tla, a go reye a re: ‘Tsala, dulela kwa pele;’ foo o tlaa dirana le tlotlo fa pele ga ba ba dutseng ba a ja nao." 
Luke14:11 Gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o ikgodisang o tlaa ngotlafadiwa; mme yo o ingotlafatsang o tlaa godisiwa.” 
Luke14:12 Le gone a raya yo o mo laleditseng a re: “E re fa o dira modiro wa motshegare le fa e le wa maitseboa, o se ka wa laletsa ditsala tsa gago, le fa e le bana ba ga rraago, le fa e le ba losika lwa gago, le fa e le bagaeno ba ba humileng; e se re kgotsa le bone, ba ba ba go bitsa, mme tuelo e go dirafalele." 
Luke14:13 Mme e re fa o dira modiro, laletsa bahumanegi, digole, batlhotsi le difofu." 
Luke14:14 O tlaa nna sego; gonne bone ga ba na se ba ka go duelang ka sone; gonne o tlaa duelwa mo go tsogeng ga basiami.” 
Luke14:15 E rile mongwe wa ba ba dutseng ba ja nae a utlwa dilo tse, a mo raya a re: “Go sego yo o tlaa jang senkgwe mo bogosing jwa Modimo.”" 
Luke14:16 Mme a mo raya a re: “Monna mongwe o kile a dira modiro o mogolo wa maitseboa, a laletsa batho ba le bantsi." 
Luke14:17 Ya re ka lobaka lwa modiro go jewa, a roma motlhanka wa gagwe a ya go raya ba ba laleditsweng a re: ‘Tlang gonne dilo tsotlhe di baakantswe.’" 
Luke14:18 Mme botlhe fela ba ya seoposengwe, ba simolola go ipata. Wa ntlha a mo raya a re: ‘Ke rekile sebata sa lefatshe, mme ke tshwanetse go ya go se bona; ke a go rapela, a ke itshwarelwe, ke ipoletse.’" 
Luke14:19 Yo mongwe a re: ‘Ke rekile dikgomo tsa bojokwe ba le batlhano, mme ke ya go di leka; ke a go rapela, a ke itshwarelwe, ke ipoletse.’" 
Luke14:20 Yo mongwe a re: ‘Ke nyetse mosadi, ke gone ke sa ka keng ka ya.’" 
Luke14:21 “Motlhanka yoo a boa, a bolelela morena wa gagwe dilo tse. Foo mong wa ntlo, ka a le bogale, a raya motlhanka wa gagwe a re: ‘Tsamaya ka bonako, o tswele kwa mebileng le mo diferwaneng tsa motse, mme o lere kwano mo teng bahumanegi, digole, difofu le batlhotsi.’" 
Luke14:22 Motlhanka a re: ‘Morena, se o se laotseng se dirilwe, mme bonno bo sa le teng.’" 
Luke14:23 Morena a raya motlhanka a re: ‘Tswela kwa ditseleng tse dikgolo, le kwa dikgoreng, mme o ba patelele go tsena gore ntlo ya me e tlale.’" 
Luke14:24 Gonne ke a lo raya, ga go ope wa banna bao ba ba laleditsweng yo o tlaa isang modiro wa me mo ganong.”" 
Luke14:25 Jaana ga bo go tsamaya nae bontsintsi jwa batho; mme a retologa, a ba raya a re:" 
Luke14:26 “Fa motho, le fa e le mang, a tla kwa go nna, mme a sa nthate bogolo go rraagwe, le mmaagwe, le mosadi wa gagwe, le bana, le bana ba ga rraagwe ba basimane, le ba basetsana, ee, le jone botshelo jwa gagwe, ga a ka ke a nna morutwa wa me." 
Luke14:27 Le fa e le mang yo o sa sikareng mokgoro o e leng wa gagwe, mme a ntshala morago, ga a ka ke a nna morutwa wa me." 
Luke14:28 “Gonne ke ofe wa lona yo e ka reng fa a rata go aga kago e e godileng, mme a se ka a dula pele a bala madi a yone, gore a tle a itse fa a na le a a lekanyeng go e swetsa." 
Luke14:29 E se re kgotsa a sena go e thaya a retelelwa ke go e swetsa; mme botlhe ba ba e bonang ba simolole go mo sotla. 
Luke14:30 Ba re: ‘Monna yo o simolotse go aga, mme a bo a sa nonofa go swetsa.’" 
Luke14:31 “Kgotsa kgosi ke efe e e ka reng e ya go tlhabana le kgosi e nngwe, e e se keng e dula pele, e senka kgakololo ya gore a e nonofile, ka e na le ba ba 10 000, go ya go kgatlhantsha e e tlang kwa go yone e na le ba ba 20 000." 
Luke14:32 E tle e re fa go sa nna jalo, e re e nngwe e sa ntse e le kgakala, e rome batho ba ye go lopa mo go ka agisanyang." 
Luke14:33 Go ntse fela jalo, le fa e le mang mo go lona yo o sa tlogeleng dilo tsotlhe tse o nang natso, ga a ka ke a nna morutwa wa me." 
Luke14:34 “Le gale letswai le molemo; mme fa letswai le senyegile molodi, le a bo le ka lokwa ka eng?" 
Luke14:35 Ga le na tiro, le fa e le mo tshimong, le fa e le mo thutubudung; batho ba tle ba le latlhele kwa ntle. Yo o nang le ditsebe go utlwa, a a utlwe.”" 
Luke15:1 Jaana bakgethisi botlhe le baleofi ba bo ba ne ba mo atamela go mo utlwa. 
Luke15:2 Bafarisai ba ngongorega le bakwadi, ba re: “Monna yo, o tshola baleofi, o ja nabo.”" 
Luke15:3 Mme a bua setshwantsho se nabo a re: 
Luke15:4 “Motho ke ofe wa lona yo e ka reng a na le dinku di le lekgolo, mme fa nngwe ya tsone e timela, yo o se keng a tlogela tse di 99 mo nageng, a ye go batla e e timetseng, go tle go tsamaye a e bone?" 
Luke15:5 Mme o tlaa re a sena go e bona, a e beye mo magetleng a gagwe, a itumele." 
Luke15:6 E re a tla mo gae a phuthe ditsala tsa gagwe le ba ga gabo, a ba reye a re: ‘Itumeleng le nna, gonne ke bonye nku etsho e e neng e timetse.’" 
Luke15:7 Ke a lo raya, go tlaa nna boitumelo fela jalo kwa legodimong ka ga moleofi a le mongwe fela yo o ikwatlhayang, bogolo go ka ga ba ba siameng ba le 99, ba ba sa direng boikwatlhao sepe." 
Luke15:8 “Kgotsa, mosadi ke ofe, yo e ka reng a na le madi a le some a selefera, fa a latlhegelwa ke le lengwe, a se ke a tshube lobone, a feela ntlo, a batla ka tlhaofalo go tsamaye a le bone?" 
Luke15:9 O tlaa re a sena go le bona, a phuthe ditsala tsa gagwe le ba ga gabo a re: ‘Itumeleng le nna, gonne ke bonye ledi le le neng le ntatlhegetse.’" 
Luke15:10 Ke a lo raya, go boitumelo fela jalo fa pele ga baengele ba Modimo ka ga moleofi a le mongwe fela yo o ikwatlhayang.”" 
Luke15:11 Mme a re: “Monna mongwe o ne a na le bana ba basimane ba le babedi. 
Luke15:12 Yo mmotlana wa bone a raya rraagwe a re: ‘Rra, nnaya mo e neng e tlaa nna ga me ga boswa.’ Mme a ba kgaoganyetsa dilo tse o tshelang ka tsone." 
Luke15:13 Mme ya re malatsi a ise a fete a le mantsi morago ga moo, ngwana yo mmotlana a phutha gotlhe, a etela kwa lefatsheng le le kgakala, mme a le gone a senya dilo tsa gagwe mo ditlhapelong tsa bofafalele." 
Luke15:14 Ya re a sena go di fedisa tsotlhe fela, ga wela mmopamo o mogolo thata mo lefatsheng leo; mme a simolola go nna mo pitlaganong." 
Luke15:15 Mme a ya a ineela mo go mongwe monni wa lefatshe leo, mme ene a mo isa kwa nageng ya gagwe gore a otlele dikolobe teng." 
Luke15:16 Mme a eletsa a ka bo a ka kgora moroko o o jewang ke dikolobe; mme a se ka a fiwa ke ope. 
Luke15:17 Mme e rile a itharabologelwa a re: ‘Kana batlhanka ba ba thapilweng ba ga rre ba bantsi jang, ba na le dijo tse di lekanyeng di ba di sala, mme nna ke swela fano ka tlala." 
Luke15:18 Ke tlaa nanoga ke ya kwa go rre, ke mo raya ke re: Rra, ke leofetse legodimo, le fa pele ga gago;" 
Luke15:19 ka moo ga ke tlhole ke tshwanela go bidiwa morwao; ntira jaaka mongwe wa batlhanka ba gago ba ba thapilweng.’ 
Luke15:20 “Mme a nanoga, a tla kwa go rraagwe. Ya re a sa ntse a le kgakala, rraagwe a mmona, mme a tlhomolwa ke pelo, a taboga, a ya a wela mo thamong ya gagwe, a mo atla." 
Luke15:21 Mme morwawe a mo raya a re: ‘Rra, ke leofetse legodimo, le fa pele ga gago, ga ke tlhole ke tshwanela go bidiwa morwao.’" 
Luke15:22 Rraagwe a raya batlhanka a re: ‘Ntshang seaparo se sentlentle ka bonako, lo se mo apese; lo mo rwese mohitsana mo letsogong, le ditlhako mo dinaong;" 
Luke15:23 lereng namane e e nonneng, lo e tlhabe; mme a re jeng, re dire mokete o mogolo;" 
Luke15:24 gonne yo morwaake o ne a sule, mme o bile o tshedile; o ne a latlhegile, mme o bonywe.’ Ba simolola go dira mokete." 
Luke15:25 “Jaana morwawe yo mogolo a bo a le kwa nageng; ya re a tla a atamela ntlo, a utlwa kopelo le pino." 
Luke15:26 Mme a bitsa mongwe wa batlhanka, a mmotsa a re: ‘Ke eng se se dirwang jaana?’" 
Luke15:27 A mo raya a re: ‘Monnao o tsile; mme rraago o tlhabile namane e e nonneng, ka gobo a mmonye a itekanetse fela.’" 
Luke15:28 “Mme a nna bogale, a gana go tsena; mme rraagwe a tswela kwa go ene a mo rapela." 
Luke15:29 A fetola rraagwe a re: ‘Bona, ke go diretse ka dinyaga tse dintsi tse, le gone ga ke ise nke ke tlole taolo ya gago gope; le fa go ntse jalo, ga o ise o ko o nneye le fa e le potsane, gore ke dire mokete le ditsala tsa me." 
Luke15:30 Mme morwao yo, yo o supuditseng dilo tsa gago le baakafadi, o rile a sa ntse a tla fela, wa mo tlhabisa namane e e nonneng.’" 
Luke15:31 “A mo raya a re: ‘Morwaaka, ke na nao ka metlha yotlhe, le tsotlhe tse e leng tsa me ke tsa gago." 
Luke15:32 E ne e le tshwanelo fa re ka dira mokete, ra ba ra itumela; gonne yo monnao o ne a sule, mme o bile o tshedile; o ne a latlhegile, mme o bonywe.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Le gone a raya barutwa a re: “Go ne go le monna mongwe e le mohumi, a na le molebedi wa dilo tsa gagwe; ene yo a newa molato kwa go mong wa gagwe, ga twe, o senya dilo tsa gagwe." 
Luke16:2 Mme a mmitsa, a mo raya a re: ‘Eng se ke se utlwang ka ga gago? Bolela ka thulaganyo ka ga tebalebelo ya gago; gonne ga o ka ke wa tlhola o nna molebedi.’" 
Luke16:3 Molebedi a ithaya a re: ‘Ke tlaa dirang, ka e le fa morena wa me a ntlosa mo tebalebelong? Ga nka ke ka lema; mme go kopa go ntlhabisa ditlhong." 
Luke16:4 Ke a itse ka fa ke tlaa dirang ka teng, gore e tle e re ke sena go ntshiwa mo tebalebelong ba tle ba ntsholele mo matlong a bone.’" 
Luke16:5 “Mme a bitsa mongwe le mongwe wa batho ba ba molato le morena wa gagwe, a raya wa ntlha a re: ‘O molato o kae le morena wa me?’" 
Luke16:6 A re: ‘Dithatholelo tsa lookwane di le lekgolo.’ A mo raya a re: ‘Tsaya lokwalo o nne fa fatshe ka bonako, o kwale o re, di 50.’" 
Luke16:7 Foo a raya yo mongwe a re: ‘Wena o molato o kae?’ A re: ‘Dikgetse tsa mabele di le lekgolo.’ A mo raya a re: ‘Tsaya lokwalo lwa gago o kwale o re, di 80.’" 
Luke16:8 “Mme morena wa gagwe a faka molebedi yo o sa siamang, ka a dirile ka botlhale; gonne bana ba lefatshe leno ba tlhalefetse losika lwa bone go gaisa bana ba lesedi." 
Luke16:9 “Ke lo raya ke re: Itireleng ditsala ka mahumo a a sa siamang; gore e tle e re a tlhaela, di lo tsholele mo maagong a a sa khutleng." 
Luke16:10 Yo o ikanyegang mo go se sennye, o okanyega le mo go se segolo; yo o sa siamang mo go se sennye, ga a a siama le mo go se segolo." 
Luke16:11 Ke gone fa lo se ka lwa ikanyega ka ga mahumo a a sa siamang, lo tlaa neelwa e mang dikhumo tsa boammaaruri?" 
Luke16:12 Fa lo se ka lwa ikanyega mo go tsa yo mongwe, lo tlaa newa e mang se e leng sa lona?" 
Luke16:13 “Ga go motlhanka ope yo o ka direlang beng ba le babedi; gonne o tlaa ila mongwe, a rate yo mongwe; kgotsa a ngaparele mongwe, a nyatse yo mongwe. Ga lo ka ke lwa direla Modimo le mahumo.”" 
Luke16:14 Bafarisai le bone, ba e neng e le barati ba khumo ya madi, ba utlwa dilo tsotlhe tse, mme ba mo sotla." 
Luke16:15 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ke lona ba lo itshiamisang fa pele ga batho; mme Modimo o itse dipelo tsa lona; gonne se se tlotlegang thata mo bathong, se bo se le makgapha fa pele ga Modimo." 
Luke16:16 “Molao o ntse o le teng le baperofeti go tla go fitlha mo go Johane; e sa le ka lobaka loo Mafoko a a Molemo a bogosi jwa Modimo a ntse a rerwa, mme mongwe le mongwe o tsena mo go lone ka go ikeka." 
Luke16:17 Go ka nna bofefo legodimo go feta le lefatshe, bogolo go tlhakanyana nngwe ya molao go tlhaela." 
Luke16:18 “Mongwe le mongwe yo o tlhalang mosadi wa gagwe, a nyala o sele, o dira boaka; le yo o nyalang mosadi yo o tlhadilweng ke monna wa gagwe, le ene o dira boaka." 
Luke16:19 “Jaana ga bo go le monna mongwe, a humile, a apere bohibidu le leloba le le boleta, a tshela fela ka malatsi otlhe mo letlepung le mo bontlentleng." 
Luke16:20 Ga bo go le mokopi mongwe yo o bidiwang Lasaro, a beilwe fa kgorong ya gagwe a tletse dintho." 
Luke16:21 A eletsa go otlwa ka matlhotlhora a a wang mo lomating lwa bojelo lwa mohumi; ee, dintša le tsone tsa tla tsa latswa dintho tsa gagwe." 
Luke16:22 “Ga dirala gore mokopi a swa, mme baengele ba mmelegela kwa sehubeng sa ga Aberahame, mohumi le ene a swa, a fitlhwa." 
Luke16:23 O rile a le mo Bobipong, a tsholetsa matlho a gagwe, a le mo ditlhokofatsong tse ditona, mme a bona Aberahame kwa kgakala, le Lasaro a le mo sefubeng sa gagwe." 
Luke16:24 Mme a goa a re: ‘Aberahame, Rra, nkutlwela botlhoko, o rome Lasaro, gore a tle a ine ntlha ya monwana wa gagwe mo metsing, a ntsidifatse loleme, gonne ke tlhokofadiwa mo gogolo mo kgabong e.’" 
Luke16:25 “Aberahame a re: ‘Morwaaka, gopola jaaka e rile mo botshelong jwa gago o ne o amogetse dilo tse di molemo tsa gago, le jaaka Lasaro le ene a ne a na le dilo tse di bosula; mme jaanong, ene o a gomodiwa, mme wena o tlhokofadiwa mo gogolo." 
Luke16:26 Bogolo go tsotlhe tse, fa gare ga rona le lona, go tlhomilwe phatlha e kgolo e e se nang bogato; gore ba ba kwano, ba ba ratang go fetela koo go lona, ba retelelwe; le koo ba ba ratang go tla kwano go rona, ba retelelwe.’" 
Luke16:27 Mme a re: ‘Rra, ke gone ke go rapelang ka re, a ko o mo rome kwa ntlong ya ga rre;" 
Luke16:28 ka ke na le bana ba ga rre ba le batlhano; gore a ye go ba itsise gore e se re kgotsa le bone ba tla felong fano ga tlhokofatso e kgolo.’ 
Luke16:29 “Aberahame a mo raya a re: ‘Ba na le Moše le baperofeti; a ba utlwe bone.’ 
Luke16:30 Mme a re: ‘Nnyaa, Aberahame, Rra; fa mongwe a tswa mo baswing a ya kwa go bone, ba tlaa ikwatlhaya.’" 
Luke16:31 Mme a mo raya a re: ‘Fa ba sa utlwe Moše le baperofeti, le gone ga ba ketla ba rapelesega, le fa mongwe a ka tsoga mo baswing.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 A raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Go retetse gore dikgopiso di se ka tsa tla; mme go latlhega ene yo di tlang ka ene. 
Luke17:2 Go ka bo go le molemo bogolo mo go ene fa lolwala lo ka bo lo gokeletswe mo thamong ya gagwe, mme a thabuediwa mo lewatleng, bogolo go fa a ka bo a kgopisa mongwe wa ba babotlana ba." 
Luke17:3 Itiseng: E re fa wa gaeno a go leofela, o mo omanye; mme fa a ikwatlhaya, o mo itshwarele." 
Luke17:4 Fa a go leofela gasupa ka letsatsi, mme a nna a boela mo go wena gasupa ka letsatsi a re: ‘Ke a ikwatlhaya,’ o mo itshwarele fela.”" 
Luke17:5 Baaposetole ba raya Morena ba re: “Totisa tumelo ya rona.” 
Luke17:6 Morena a re: “Fa lo ne lo na le tumelo, e le kana ka tlhaka ya peo ya mosetara, lo ne lo ka raya setlhare se sa mosekamine lwa re: ‘Khumoga ka medi, o ye go tlhongwa mo lewatleng;’ se ne se tlaa lo utlwa." 
Luke17:7 “Ke mang wa lona yo e ka reng a na le motlhanka yo o lemang, kgotsa a disa dinku, e re a goroga a tswa kwa nageng, a ka mo raya a re: ‘Tla, o dule o je?’" 
Luke17:8 Bogolo a ga a mo reye a re: ‘Baakanya se ke lalelang ka sone, o ikokwaele, o ntirele, ke tle ke tsamaye ke je ke nwe; morago o tlaa itse go ja le go nwa?’" 
Luke17:9 A o tle a leboge motlhanka yoo ka a dirile dilo tse o di laoletsweng? 
Luke17:10 Go ntse jalo le lona, e tlaa re lo sena go dira dilo tsotlhe tse lo di laoletsweng, lo re: ‘Re batlhanka ba re se nang molemo; re dirile se e neng e le tshwanelo ya rona go se dira, fela.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Ga dirala ya re a sa ntse a etela kwa Jerusalema, a ralala fa gare ga Samaria le Galilea." 
Luke17:12 Ya re a tsena mo motsaneng mongwe, a kgatlhana le banna ba le some, e le balepero, ba emetse kwa kgakala;" 
Luke17:13 mme ba tsholetsa mantswe a bone ba re: “Jesu, Morena re utlwele botlhoko!”" 
Luke17:14 Ya re a ba bona, a ba raya a re: “Tsamayang, lo ye go itshupetsa baperesiti.” Ga dirala ya re ba sa tsamaya, ba ntlafala." 
Luke17:15 Mongwe wa bone o rile a ipona fa a fodisitswe a boa, a galaletsa Modimo ka lentswe le legolo." 
Luke17:16 A wela ka sefatlhogo fa fatshe fa dinaong tsa gagwe, a mo leboga; mme ya bo e le Mosamaria." 
Luke17:17 Jesu a bua a re: “A ba ne ba sa ntlafadiwa boo some? Ba ba 9 ba kae? 
Luke17:18 A go ne go sa bonwe ope yo o boang a tla go baka Modimo, fa e se moeng yo?”" 
Luke17:19 Mme a mo raya a re: “Nanoga, o tsamaye; tumelo ya gago e go fodisitse.”" 
Luke17:20 Mme e rile a bodiwa ke Bafarisai, gore bogosi jwa Modimo bo tlaa tla leng, a ba fetola a re: “Bogosi jwa Modimo ga bo tle ka go bonwa." 
Luke17:21 Le gone ga ba ketla ba re: ‘Bonang fano!’ kgotsa; ‘Bonang fale!’ Gonne bonang, bogosi jwa Modimo bo mo teng ga lona.”" 
Luke17:22 A raya barutwa a re: “Metlha e tlaa tla e lo tlaa eletsang go bona letsatsi lengwe la malatsi a Morwa Motho ka yone, mme ga lo ketla lo le bona." 
Luke17:23 Ba tlaa lo raya ba re: ‘Bonang fale!’ kgotsa, ‘Bonang fano!’ Se tsamayeng, le fa e le go ba sala morago." 
Luke17:24 Gonne jaaka e a re fa logadima lo gadima ntlheng nngwe tlase ga legodimo, lo phatsimele kwa ntlheng e nngwe tlase ga legodimo; Morwa motho le ene o tlaa nna jalo mo motlheng wa gagwe." 
Luke17:25 Pele o na le go boga dilo di le dintsi, le go ganwa ke losika lo." 
Luke17:26 Jaaka go kile ga dirala mo metlheng ya ga Noa, go tlaa nna fela jalo le mo metlheng ya Morwa Motho." 
Luke17:27 Ba ne ba ja, ba nwa, ba nyala, ba neelwa nyalong, ga tsamaya ga tla letsatsi le Noa o tsenang mo ntlong e e kokobalang ka lone, mme morwalela wa tla wa ba senya botlhe fela." 
Luke17:28 Le jaaka go diretse mo metlheng ya ga Lote: Ba ne ba ja, ba nwa, ba reka, ba rekisa, ba tlhoma, ba aga;" 
Luke17:29 mme ka letsatsi leo fela, le Lote o duleng mo Sotoma ka lone, ga nna molelo le sulefura mo go tswang legodimong, ga ba laila botlhe fela." 
Luke17:30 Go tlaa nna fela jalo mo motlheng o Morwa Motho o tlaa senolwang ka one. 
Luke17:31 “A e re mo letsatsing leo yo o mo godimo ga ntlo, mme dilo tsa gagwe di le mo ntlong, a se ka a fologa a ya go di tlosa; jalo le ene yo o kwa nageng, a se ka a boela kwa morago." 
Luke17:32 Gakologelwang mosadi wa ga Lote. 
Luke17:33 Le fa e le mang yo o tlaa batlang go boloka botshelo jwa gagwe, bo tlaa mo latlhegela; mme le fa e le mang yo o tlaa latlhegelwang ke botshelo jwa gagwe, o tlaa bo boloka." 
Luke17:34 Ke a lo bolelela ka re, e tlaa re mo bosigong joo, go tlaa bo go le batho ba le babedi ba tlhakanetse phate; mme mongwe o tlaa tsewa, yo mongwe a tlogelwe." 
Luke17:35 Basadi ba le babedi ba tlaa bo ba sila mmogo; mongwe o tlaa tsewa, yo mongwe a tlogelwe." 
Luke17:36 (Banna ba le babedi ba tlaa bo ba le mo nageng; mongwe o tlaa tsewa, yo mongwe a tlogelwe.)”" 
Luke17:37 Mme ba mo fetola, ba mo raya ba re: “Kae, Morena?” A ba raya a re: “Kwa setoto se leng teng, manong le one a tlaa phuthegela teng.”" 
Luke18:1 A bua setshwantsho nabo, sa gore batho ba tshwanetse go rapela ka metlha yotlhe, ba sa ngosele." 
Luke18:2 A re: “E kile ya re mo motseng mongwe, ga bo go le moatlhodi yo o sa boifeng Modimo, le motho, a sena sepe nae." 
Luke18:3 Ga bo go le mosadi wa motlholagadi mo motseng oo; a nna a ya kwa go ene gantsi a re: ‘Ntsheka mo go yo o mpatikang.’ 
Luke18:4 Mme a nna a gana ka lobaka; mme ya re kwa morago a ithaya a re: ‘Le fa ke sa boife Modimo, le motho ke sa mo re sepe;" 
Luke18:5 le fa go ntse jalo, e re ka motlholagadi yo a ntshwenya, ke tlaa mo sekela, gore a se ka a mphatlola tlhogo ka go boaboa ga gagwe.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Morena a re: “Utlwang se moatlhodi yo o sa siamang o se buang. 
Luke18:7 Mme Modimo one, a ga o ketla o sekela ba e leng baitshenkedwi ba one, ba ba goelang kwa go one motshegare le bosigo, mme o bile o pelotelele ka ga bone." 
Luke18:8 Ke a lo bolelela, o tlaa ba sekela ka bonako. Le fa go ntse jalo e tlaa re Morwa Motho a tla, a o tlaa fitlhela tumelo mo lefatsheng?”" 
Luke18:9 Setshwantsho ke se, a se bua le bangwe ba ba ikayang fa e le bone basiami, ba nyatsa ba bangwe botlhe, a re:" 
Luke18:10 “Banna ba le babedi ba kile ba ya tempeleng, ba ya go rapela; mongwe e le Mofarisai yo mongwe e le mokgethisi." 
Luke18:11 “Mofarisai a ema a ithapelelela jaana a re: ‘Modimo, ke a go leboga ka gobo ke sa nna jaaka batho ba bangwe, ba le baikgagapeledi, le basiamolodi le ba boaka, kgotsa jaaka mokgethisi yo." 
Luke18:12 Ke tle ke ikitse go ja gabedi ka beke nngwe le nngwe; le sa bosome sa tsotlhe tse ke di bapalang ke se ntshe.’ 
Luke18:13 “Mme mokgethisi ene, a emela kwa kgakala, le e leng matlho a se ka a a lelaletsa legodimong, a ititaya sehuba a re: ‘Modimo, nkutlwela botlhoko, nna yo ke leng moleofi.’" 
Luke18:14 Ke a lo bolelela, monna yo o fologetse kwa ntlong ya gagwe a siamisitswe bogolo go yo mongwe, gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o ikgodisang o tlaa ngotlafadiwa; mme yo o ingotlafatsang o tlaa godisiwa.”" 
Luke18:15 Le gone ba lere kwa go ene banyana ba bone ba bannyennyane, gore a ba ame. Ya re barutwa ba bona jalo, ba ba kgalemela." 
Luke18:16 Mme Jesu a ba bitsa gore ba ye kwa go ene, a re: “Lesang banyana, ba tle mo go nna; lo se ka lwa ba itsa; gonne bogosi jwa legodimo ke jwa ba ba ntseng jalo." 
Luke18:17 Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, le fa e le mang yo o se ketlang a tshola bogosi jwa Modimo jaaka ngwanyana, ga a ketla a tsena mo go jone ka gope.”" 
Luke18:18 Molaodi mongwe a mmotsa a re: “Moruti yo o molemo, ke tlaa dirang gore ke rue botshelo jo bo sa khutleng?”" 
Luke18:19 Jesu a mo raya a re: “O mpiletsang molemo? Ga go ope yo o molemo, fa e se yo mongwe fela, e bong Modimo." 
Luke18:20 Ditaolo o a di itse, di a re: “ ‘O se ka wa dira boaka, o se ka wa bolaya motho, o se ka wa utswa, o se ka wa supa tshupo ya kako, tlotla rraago le mmaago.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Mme a re: “Tsotlhe tse ke sa le ke di tshegetsa le mo bokaung jwa me, nako ke eno.”" 
Luke18:22 Ya re Jesu a utlwa, a mo raya a re: “O sa ntse o tlhoka sengwe: Rekisa tsotlhe tse o nang natso, o abele bahumanegi; mme o tlaa nna le lohumo kwa legodimong; mme o tle o ntshale morago.”" 
Luke18:23 Ya re a utlwa jalo, a hutsafala thata; ka a ne a humile thata." 
Luke18:24 Jesu ya re a mmona (fa a hutsafetse thata) a re: “Ana go thata jang mo go ba ba nang le mahumo go tsena mo bogosing jwa Modimo! 
Luke18:25 Gonne go ka nna bofefo kamela go tsena ka letshofa la lomao, bogolo go mohumi go tsena mo bogosing jwa Modimo.”" 
Luke18:26 Ba ba utlwang jalo ba re: “Fa e le jalo go a bo go ka bolokwa mang?” 
Luke18:27 Ene a re: “Dilo tse di retetseng mo bathong, di ka dirafala mo Modimong.”" 
Luke18:28 Petere a re: “Bona, rona re tlogetse magarona, re go setse morago.”" 
Luke18:29 A ba raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, ga go ope yo o tlogetseng ntlo, kgotsa mosadi, kgotsa bana ba ga rraagwe, kgotsa batsadi, kgotsa bana, ka ntlha ya bogosi jwa Modimo," 
Luke18:30 yo o se ketlang a bona bogolo jo bo feteletseng mo motlheng ono, le botshelo jo bo sa khutleng mo lefatsheng le le tlang.”" 
Luke18:31 A tsaya ba ba some le bobedi, a ba raya a re: “Bonang, re ya kwa Jerusalema, mme dilo tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng ke baperofeti di tlaa dirafalela Morwa Motho." 
Luke18:32 Gonne o tlaa neelwa Baditšhaba, mme o tlaa sotlwa, a gagautlwa ka mo go tlhabisang ditlhong, a ba a kgwelwa mathe." 
Luke18:33 Ba tlaa mo seola, ba mmolaya; mme o tlaa ba a tsoga ka letsatsi la boraro.”" 
Luke18:34 Mme ba se ka ba tlhaloganya sepe sa dilo tse; polelo e, ya bo e ba subegetse; ba se ka ba lemoga dilo tse di buiwang." 
Luke18:35 Ga dirafala, e rile a setse a atametse Jeriko, monna mongwe wa sefofu a bo a dutse fa tseleng, a kopa." 
Luke18:36 Ya re a utlwa go feta ga bontsi jwa batho, a botsa a re: “Selo se ke eng?”" 
Luke18:37 Ba mmolelela ba re: “Jesu wa Nasaretha o a feta.” 
Luke18:38 Mme a goa a re: “Jesu Morwa Dafite, nkutlwela botlhoko!”" 
Luke18:39 Ba ba eteletseng pele ba mo kgalemela ba re a didimale, mme a nna a goa segolo bogolo a re: “Morwa Dafite, nkutlwela botlhoko!”" 
Luke18:40 Jesu a ema, a laola gore a tlisiwe fa go ene; ya re a sena go mo atamela, a mmotsa a re:" 
Luke18:41 “O rata ka go direlang?” Mme a re: “Morena, a ke foufologe.”" 
Luke18:42 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Foufologa; tumelo ya gago e go fodisitse.” 
Luke18:43 Mme a foufologa fela ka bonako, mme a mo sala morago, a galaletsa Modimo; batho botlhe ba re ba bona jalo ba baka Modimo." 
Luke19:1 Mme a tsena, a ralala Jeriko." 
Luke19:2 Bonang, ga bo go le monna yo o bidiwang Sakaio; ya bo e le mokgethisi yo mogolo, a humile." 
Luke19:3 A batla go bona Jesu gore e mang; mme a retelelwa ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa batho, ka gobo a le mokhutshwane." 
Luke19:4 Mme a tabogela kwa pele, a palama setlhare sa mosekamore gore a tle a mmone; ka a tlaa feta ka tsela eo." 
Luke19:5 Ya re Jesu a fitlha felong foo, a lelala, a mo raya a re: “Sakaio, akofa o fologe, gonne ke na le go tlhola kwa ntlong ya gago gompieno.”" 
Luke19:6 A akofa a fologa, mme a mo tshola ka boitumelo." 
Luke19:7 Ya re batho ba bona jalo, ba ngongorega botlhe ba re: “O ile go tlhola kwa goo rra monna yo e leng moleofi.”" 
Luke19:8 Sakaio a ema, a raya Morena a re: “Bona, Morena bontlhanngwe jwa dilo tsa me ke bo naya bahumanegi; mme fa ke tseetse mongwe selo sengwe ka patiko, ke mo rebolela di le nne.”" 
Luke19:9 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Gompieno poloko e tsile mo ntlong e, gonne le ene ke morwa Aberahame." 
Luke19:10 Gonne Morwa Motho o tsile go batla le go boloka se se neng se latlhegile.” 
Luke19:11 Ya re ba sa ntse ba reeditse dilo tse, a oketsa, a bua setshwantsho ka gobo a le gaufi le Jerusalema, le gone ka ba itlhoma bogosi jwa Modimo bo tlaa akofa bo bonala." 
Luke19:12 Ke gone a re: “Mogolwane mongwe o kile a etela kwa lefatsheng le le kgakala, a ya go ikamogelela bogosi, le go ba a boa." 
Luke19:13 A bitsa batlhanka ba gagwe ba ba some, a ba neela diponto di le some; a ba raya a re: ‘Bapalang ka tsone, go tsamaye ke be ke tle.’" 
Luke19:14 Ba motse wa ga gabo ba bo ba mo tlhoile, mme ba roma batho ba ya go mo latela ba re: ‘Ga re rate monna yo a re busa.’" 
Luke19:15 “Ga dirala e rile a sena go boa, bogosi jone a bo amogetse, a laola gore batlhanka bao ba bilediwe kwa go ene, e bong ba o ba neetseng madi, gore a tle a itse ka fa ba bapetseng ka teng." 
Luke19:16 Wa ntlha a tla fa pele ga gagwe a re: ‘Morena, ponto ya gago e bapetse diponto di le some kwa ntle.’" 
Luke19:17 Mme a mo raya a re: ‘O dirile sentle motlhanka yo o molemo; e re ka o ne o ikanyega mo go se sennye, amogela thata ya go laola metse e le some.’" 
Luke19:18 Wa bobedi, a tla a re: ‘Morena, ponto ya gago e bapetse diponto di le tlhano kwa ntle.’" 
Luke19:19 Le ene a mo raya a re: ‘Le wena o laole metse e le metlhano.’ 
Luke19:20 “Yo mongwe a tla a re: ‘Morena, bona, ponto ya gago ke e; ke e bolokile ka go e bofelela ka letsela." 
Luke19:21 Gonne ke go boifile, ka o le monna yo o se nang mafoko; o tsaya se o sa se bayang; o robe se o sa se jalang.’" 
Luke19:22 A mo raya a re: ‘Ke tlaa go sekisa ka molomo wa gago, motlhanka yo o bosula ke wena. O itsile fa ke le monna yo ke se nang mafoko, ke tsaya se ke sa se bayang, ke robe se ke sa se jalang;" 
Luke19:23 ke gone, o ne o sa tsenyetseng madi a me mo polokelong ya baatisi ba one? E ne e tlaa re ke tla, ke be ke a batle le kokeletso ya one?’" 
Luke19:24 “A raya ba ba emeng teng a re: ‘Mo tseeleng ponto eo, lo e neye yo o nang le lesome la diponto.’" 
Luke19:25 Ba mo raya ba re: ‘Morena, o na le diponto di le some.’" 
Luke19:26 Ke a lo raya ka re: ‘Mongwe le mongwe yo o nang le sengwe, o tlaa newa; mme yo o se nang sepe, go tlaa tsewa mo go ene le se o nang naso.’" 
Luke19:27 Le fa go ntse jalo baba bao ba me, ba ba ganneng, ba re, ke se ka ka ba busa, ba lereng kwano, lo ba bolaele fa pele ga me.”" 
Luke19:28 E rile a sena go bua jalo, a fetela kwa pele, a tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema." 
Luke19:29 Ga dirala e rile a atamela Bethefage le Bethania, fa thoteng e e bidiwang ya Lotlhware, a roma barutwa ba gagwe ba le babedi." 
Luke19:30 A re: “Yang mo motsaneng o lo lebaganyeng nao; o e tlaa reng lo tsena mo go one lo fitlhele eselana e golegilwe, e e iseng e ke e pagangwe ke ope; e gololeng lo tle nayo." 
Luke19:31 Mme fa mongwe a lo botsa a re: ‘Lo e gololelang?’ Lo mo reye lo re: ‘Morena o a e batla.’ ” 
Luke19:32 Ba ba romilweng ba ya, mme ba fitlhela fela jaaka a ba boleletse." 
Luke19:33 Ya re ba sa golola eselana, beng ba yone ba ba raya ba re: “Lo gololelang eselana?”" 
Luke19:34 Mme ba re: “Morena o a e batla.” 
Luke19:35 Ba e isa kwa go Jesu; ba latlhela diaparo tsa bone mo eselaneng, ba palamisa Jesu mo go yone." 
Luke19:36 Ya re a tsamaya, ba ala diaparo tsa bone mo tseleng." 
Luke19:37 Ya re jaana a atamela, a le fela fa phologong ya Thota ya Lotlhware, bontsi jotlhe jwa barutwa jwa simolola go duduetsa, le go baka Modimo ka lentswe le legolo, ka ntlha ya ditiro tsotlhe tsa nonofo tse ba di bonyeng;" 
Luke19:38 ba re: “Go bakwe Kgosi e e tlang ka leina la Morena; kagiso kwa legodimong le kgalalelo kwa bogodimodimong.” 
Luke19:39 Bafarisai bangwe ba ba mo bontsing jwa batho, ba mo raya ba re: “Moruti, kgalemela barutwa ba gago.”" 
Luke19:40 Mme a ba fetola a re: “Ke a lo bolelela gore fa ba, ba ka didimala, maje a tlaa akofa a goa.”" 
Luke19:41 Ya re a atamela, a bona motse, a o lelela a re:" 
Luke19:42 “Ao! O ka bo o itsile, ee, e leng wena, mo tsatsing leno le la gago, o ka bo o itsile dilo tse e leng tsa kagiso! Mme jaanong di subetswe matlho a gago." 
Luke19:43 Gonne metlha e tlaa tla mo go wena ya gore baba ba gago ba tlaa tlhatlosa lomota tikologong ya gago, ba tlaa go dika, ba go kganelela ka ntlha tsotlhe." 
Luke19:44 Ba tlaa go piriganyetsa fa fatshe le bana ba gago ba le mo teng ga gago; mme ga ba ketla ba tlogela mo go wena lentswe lepe le tlhatlaganye le le lengwe; gonne o ne o sa itse motlha wa go lekolwa ga gago.” 
Luke19:45 A tsena mo tempeleng; a simolola go kgoromeletsa ntle ba ba rekisang; 
Luke19:46 a ba raya a re: “Go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘Ntlo ya me e tlaa bidiwa ntlo ya borapelelo,’ mme lona lo e ntshitse mongobo wa dinokwane.”" 
Luke19:47 A ruta ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe mo tempeleng. Mme ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bakwadi, le bagolwane ba batho, ba senka go mmolaya;" 
Luke19:48 ba bo ba sa ka ke ba bona ka fa ba ka dirang ka teng, gonne batho botlhe ba mo kgomareletse go mo reetsa." 
Luke20:1 Ga dirala ka letsatsi lengwe la malatsi ao, ka a ruta mo tempeleng, a rera Mafoko a a Molemo, a tshogana ka a kgatlhantshiwa ke ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bakwadi, ba na le bagolwane;" 
Luke20:2 ba bua nae ba re: “Re bolelele gore o dira dilo tse ka taolo efe? Kgotsa yo o go neileng taolo e e mang?” 
Luke20:3 A ba fetola a re: “Le nna ke tlaa lo botsa potso nngwe; lo e mpolelele: 
Luke20:4 Kolobetso ya ga Johane a e ne e tswa kwa legodimong, kgotsa mo bathong?”" 
Luke20:5 Mme ba gakololana ba re: “E tlaa re fa re re: ‘E ne e tswa kwa legodimong,’ ene o tlaa re: ‘Lo ne lo sa mo dumeleleng?’" 
Luke20:6 Fa re re: ‘E ne e tswa mo bathong,’ batho botlhe ba tlaa re kgobotletsa ka maje; ka ba dumetse ruri fa Johane e ne e le moperofeti.”" 
Luke20:7 Mme ba mo fetola ka go re: “Ga re itse kwa e ne e tswa teng.” 
Luke20:8 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Le nna ga ke lo bolelele taolo e ke dirang dilo tse ka yone.” 
Luke20:9 A simolola go bua le batho ka setshwantsho, ke se, a re: “Monna mongwe a tlhoma tshimo ya mafine, mme a e neela badiri ba masimo, ba e thapa ka tuelo, mme a tloga a ya go nna mo lefatsheng le sele ka lobaka lo loleele." 
Luke20:10 Ya re ka lobaka lwa loungo, a roma motlhanka kwa badiring ba tshimo, gore ba mo neye ntlhanngwe ya loungo lwa tshimo ya mafine; mme badira tshimo ba mmetsa, ba mo leleka a iphotlere fela." 
Luke20:11 A ba a roma motlhanka yo mongwe; le ene ba mmetsa, ba mo gagautla ka mo go tlhabisang ditlhong, ba mo leleka a iphotlhere fela." 
Luke20:12 A fela a roma wa boraro; mme le ene ba mo ntsha dintho, ba mo latlhela kwa ntle." 
Luke20:13 Morena wa tshimo ya mafine a re: ‘Ke tla dirang? Ke tlaa roma morwaake yo o rategang; e tlaa re kgotsa ene ba mo sisimoge.’ 
Luke20:14 Mme ya re badiri ba tshimo ba mmona, ba gakololana ba re: ‘Yo ke ene moruaboswa; ntlhong, re mmolayeng, gore boswa e nne jwa rona.’" 
Luke20:15 Mme ba mo latlhela kwa ntle ga tshimo ya mafine, ba mmolaya. Ke gone, morena wa tshimo ya mafine o tlaa ba dirang?" 
Luke20:16 O tlaa tla a senya badiri bao ba tshimo; mme tshimo ya mafine o tlaa e neela ba sele.” Ba re ba utlwa jalo ba re: “A go se nne jalo.” 
Luke20:17 A ba leba a re: “Se se kwadilweng e be e le eng fa go twe: ‘Lentswe le baagi ba le latlhileng, e bile ke lone le le dirilweng la tlhogo ya kgokgotsho?’" 
Luke20:18 Mongwe le mongwe yo o welang mo lentsweng leo o tlaa thubaganngwa; mme yo le tlaa mo welang le tlaa mo gasagasa jaaka lorole fela.” 
Luke20:19 Bakwadi le ditlhogo tsa baperesiti ba senka go mo tsenya diatla ka nako eo fela; mme ba boifa batho; gonne ba lemoga fa a buile setshwantsho se ka ga bone. 
Luke20:20 Ba mo lepa, ba ntsha ditlhola tse di itshemang basiami, gore di ye go tshwara mafoko a gagwe, gore ba tle ba mo neele mo thateng le mo taolong ya molaodi wa motse." 
Luke20:21 Ba mmotsa ba re: “Moruti, re a itse fa o bua, o ruta ka tshiamo, o sa tlhokomele bomangmang jwa ope, mme o ruta tsela ya Modimo ka boammaaruri;" 
Luke20:22 a re letleletswe go kgethela Kaesare kgotsa nnyaa?” 
Luke20:23 A lemoga bolotsana jwa bone, mme a ba raya a re:" 
Luke20:24 “Ntshupetsang thušeleng. O na le setshwantsho le sekwalo sa ga mang?” Ba re: “Sa ga Kaesare.” 
Luke20:25 A ba raya a re: “Fa e le jalo, ntshetsang Kaesare, dilo tse e leng tsa ga Kaesare, le Modimo tse e leng tsa Modimo.”" 
Luke20:26 Ba retelelwa ke go tshwara lefoko le fa pele ga batho; ba gakgamalela phetolo ya gagwe, mme ba didimala fela." 
Luke20:27 Foo ga tla kwa go ene bangwe ba Basadukai, ba ba latolang go tsoga ga baswi; ba mmotsa ba re:" 
Luke20:28 “Moruti, Moše o re kwaletse a re, fa morwa rraamotho a swa, a na le mosadi, mme fa a se na ngwana, morwa rraagwe yo mongwe a tseye mosadi wa gagwe, go tsosetsa morwa rraagwe yo o suleng losika." 
Luke20:29 Jaana go kile ga ne go le bomorwa motho ba supa; wa ntlha a tsaya mosadi, mme a swa a se na ngwana;" 
Luke20:30 le wa bobedi a tsaya mosadi yoo," 
Luke20:31 le wa boraro a mo tsaya; le boo ba supa, ga nna fela jalo; ba swa fela ba sa tlogele ngwana ope." 
Luke20:32 Mme morago mosadi le ene a swa. 
Luke20:33 Ke gone, e tlaa re mo go tsogeng ga baswi, e tlaa nna mosadi wa ga mang mo go bone? Gonne ba ne ba mo nyetse botlhe ka bosupa jwa bone.”" 
Luke20:34 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Bana ba lefatshe leno ba a nyala, ba neelwa nyalong;" 
Luke20:35 mme ba ba kaiwang ba tshwanetse go bona lefatshe lele, le go tsoga ga baswi, ga ba nyale, le gone ga ba neelwe nyalong;" 
Luke20:36 le gone ga ba ka ke ba tlhola ba swa, ka ba tshwana le baengele; mme ke bana ba Modimo, ka e le bana ba go tsoga ga baswi." 
Luke20:37 Moše le ene o supile fa go kwadilweng ka ga setlhare, fa baswi ba tsosiwa, ka a bitsa Morena, Modimo wa ga Aberahame, le Modimo wa ga Isake, le Modimo wa ga Jakobe." 
Luke20:38 Aitse ga se Modimo wa baswi, fa e se wa batshedi fela; gonne botlhe ba tshelela one.”" 
Luke20:39 Mme bangwe ba bakwadi ba fetola ba re: “Moruti, o buile sentle.”" 
Luke20:40 Gonne morago ga mo ba tshaba go tlhola ba mmotsa sepe. 
Luke20:41 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ba bua jang fa ba re: ‘Keresete ke morwa Dafite?’ 
Luke20:42 Gonne Dafite ka esi a bua mo lokwalong lwa Dipesalema a re: ‘Morena o reile Morena wa me a re: Dula ka fa letsogong la me le le siameng," 
Luke20:43 go tle go tsamaye ke dire baba ba gago sebeo sa dinao tsa gago.’ 
Luke20:44 Jalo Dafite o mmitsa Morena, mme o bile o ntse morwawe jang?”" 
Luke20:45 A bua le barutwa ba gagwe mo kutlong ya batho botlhe a re: 
Luke20:46 “Itiseng mo bakwading, ba ba eletsang go tsamaya ba apere dikobo tse di kgokgothang, ba rata ditumediso mo marekelong, le ditulo tse di kwa pelepele mo matlong a thuto; le manno a a kwa pele mo medirong;" 
Luke20:47 e le ba ba suputsang matlo a basadi ba batlholagadi, mme ba ipate ka go dira merapelo e melele. Bao ba tlaa bona tshekiso e kgolo e e feteletseng.”" 
Luke21:1 A tsholetsa matlho, a bona bahumi ba latlhela dineo tsa bone mo letloleng la dikhumo." 
Luke21:2 Mme a bona mosadi mongwe wa motlholagadi, e le mohumanegi, a latlhela gone madinyana a le mannye a le mabedi." 
Luke21:3 Mme a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, motlholagadi yo wa mohumanegi, o latlhetse segolo go feta bone botlhe;" 
Luke21:4 gonne bao botlhe ba latlhetse ga letlotlo la bone mo dineong; mme ene o latlhetse ga khumanego ya gagwe gotlhe mo o tshelang ka gone.” 
Luke21:5 Ya re bangwe ba ntse ba bua ka ga tempele, jaaka e kgabisitswe ka maje a mantle, le ka dineo, a re:" 
Luke21:6 “Ka ga dilo tse lo di bonang, metlha e tlaa tla e go se ketlang go tlogelwa lentswe lepe fa, le tlhatlaganye le le lengwe, le le se ketlang le digwa.”" 
Luke21:7 Ba mmotsa ba re: “Moruti ana dilo tse di tlaa dirafala leng? Le sesupo e tlaa nna sefe sa fa dilo tse di tloga di dirafala?” 
Luke21:8 Mme a re: “Itiseng gore lo se timediwe; gonne batho ba le bantsi ba tlaa tla ka leina la me, ba ikaya ba re: ‘Ke nna ene;’ ba ba ba re: ‘Motlha o atametse.’ Ka re: Lo se ka lwa ba sala morago." 
Luke21:9 Mogang lo utlwang ka ga dintwa le dikudumedi tsa batho, lo se ka lwa rerega, gonne dilo tse di tshwanetse go dirala pele; mme bokhutlo bo bo bo ise bo nne gaufi.”" 
Luke21:10 Foo a ba raya a re: “Morafe o tlaa tsogologela morafe, le bogosi bo tsogologele bogosi;" 
Luke21:11 mme go tlaa nna dithoromo tse dikgolo tsa lefatshe, le mo mafelong mangwe le mangwe go nne mebopamo, le dikgogodi tsa bolwetse; go tlaa nna dilo tse di rerisang fa di bonwa, le ditshupo tse di tswang legodimong." 
Luke21:12 E tlaa re pele ga dilo tsotlhe tse, ba tlaa lo tsenya diatla, ba tlaa lo bogisa, ba tlaa lo isa tshekong mo matlong a thuto, ba lo tsenya mo matlong a kgolegelo, ba lo isa fa pele ga dikgosi le balaodi, ka ntlha ya leina la me." 
Luke21:13 Mo go tlaa lo dirafalela gore lo itshupe. 
Luke21:14 Ke gone lo itlhomamise mo dipelong tsa lona fa lo se ketla lo akanya pele ka fa lo tlaa fetolang ka teng. 
Luke21:15 Gonne ke tlaa lo naya molomo, le botlhale jo baba botlhe ba lona ba se ketlang ba nonofa go bo ganetsa, le fa e le go emalana najo." 
Luke21:16 Lo tlaa okwa le ke batsadi ba lona, le ke bana ba borraalona, le ba losika lwa lona, le ditsala, mme bangwe ba lona ba tlaa bolawa ka bone." 
Luke21:17 Lo tlaa tlhoiwa ke botlhe ka ntlha ya leina la me. 
Luke21:18 Le fa e le moriri mongwe fela wa ditlhogo tsa lona ga o ketla o nyelela. 
Luke21:19 Lo tlaa ipoloka mewa ya lona ka bopelotelele jwa lona. 
Luke21:20 “E tlaa re lo bona Jerusalema o dikilwe ke dintwa, lo bo lo itse fa tshwafalo ya one e le gaufi." 
Luke21:21 Foo, ba ba mo Jutea a ba tshabele kwa dithabeng; le ba ba mo gare ga one a ba tswe; le ba ba kwa nageng, a ba se ye go tsena mo go one." 
Luke21:22 Gonne metlha eo ke ya pusoloso, gore dilo tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng di dirafale." 
Luke21:23 A bo go tla latlhega bone ba ba baimana le ba ba amusang mo metlheng eo! Gonne go tlaa nna pitlagano e kgolo mo lefatsheng, le bogale jo bogolo mo sešabeng se." 
Luke21:24 Ba tlaa wa ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ba tlaa isiwa e le ditshwarwa mo merafeng yotlhe; Jerusalema o tlaa katakwa ke Baditšhaba, go tle go tsamaye metlha ya Baditšhaba e dirafale." 
Luke21:25 “Mme go tlaa nna ditshupo mo letsatsing, le mo kgweding, le mo dinaleding; le mo lefatsheng pitlagano ya merafe, e raraanngwa ke lewatle le dintelo go suma ka kgwaso e kgolo;" 
Luke21:26 le batho ba idibadiwa ke poifo le tebelelo ya dilo tse di tlang mo lefatsheng; gonne dinonofo tsa legodimo di tlaa reketlisiwa. 
Luke21:27 E dira gone ba tlaa bonang Morwa Motho a tla ka leru, ka nonofo le ka kgalalelo e kgolo." 
Luke21:28 E tlaa re dilo tse di simologa go dirala, foo lo lelale, lo tsholetse ditlhogo tsa lona; gonne thekololo ya lona e tlaa bo e atamela.”" 
Luke21:29 A bua nabo setshwantsho a re: “Bonang setlhare sa mofeige, le ditlhare tsotlhe;" 
Luke21:30 e re fa jaanong di tlhoga, lo a se bona, mme lo a itse ka losi fa letlhabula le setse le atametse." 
Luke21:31 Fela jalo le lona, fa lo bona dilo tse di dirafala, itseng fa bogosi jwa Modimo bo atametse." 
Luke21:32 “Ammaaruri ke a lo raya, losika lo, ga lo ketla lo feta go tsamaye dilo tsotlhe di dirafale pele." 
Luke21:33 Go tlaa feta legodimo le lefatshe; mme mafoko a me ga a ketla a feta. 
Luke21:34 “Lo itlhokomele, gore e se re kgotsa dipelo tsa lona tsa imelelwa ke go kgora bobe, le go tagwa, le ke ditlhodiego tsa botshelo jono, mme letsatsi leo la lo wela ka tshoganetso jaaka seru;" 
Luke21:35 gonne le tlaa wela jalo botlhe ba ba agileng mo lefatsheng lotlhe fela. 
Luke21:36 Lona lebelelang ka metlha yotlhe, lo rapele gore lo kaiwe fa lo tshwanetse go falola mo dilong tse tsotlhe tse di tlaa diralang, le go ema fa pele ga Morwa Motho.”" 
Luke21:37 Mme e ne e tle e re go le motshegare a tlhole a ruta mo tempeleng; e re bosigo a tswe a ye kwa thoteng e e bidiwang ya Lotlhware. 
Luke21:38 E re ka moso batho botlhe ba phakelele kwa go ene mo tempeleng, ba ye go mo utlwa." 
Luke22:1 Jaana modiro wa senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang, o o bidiwang Tlolaganyo, wa bo o atamela." 
Luke22:2 Mme ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bakwadi ba senka ka fa ba ka mmolayang ka teng; gonne ba boifa batho. 
Luke22:3 Satane a tsena mo go Jutase yo o bidiwang Isekariote, e le mongwe wa ba ba 12." 
Luke22:4 A ya a loganya le ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le dikgosana, ka fa o ka mo ba neelang ka teng." 
Luke22:5 Mme ba itumela; ba golagana nae gore ba tlaa mo naya madi. 
Luke22:6 A dumalana nabo; mme a batla lobaka lo o tlaa mo ba neelang ka lone, kwa bontsing jwa batho bo tlaa bong bo seyo teng." 
Luke22:7 Ga fitlha letsatsi la senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang, le Tlolaganyo e nang le go tlhajwa ka lone." 
Luke22:8 Mme a roma Petere le Johane a re: “Yang, lo re baakanyetse Tlolaganyo gore re e je.”" 
Luke22:9 Ba mo raya ba re: “O rata ra e baakanya kae?” 
Luke22:10 A ba raya a re: “Bonang, e tlaa re lo sena go tsena mo motseng, lo tlaa kgatlhana le monna a rwele nkgwana ya metsi; lo mo sale morago, lo ye nae mo ntlong e o tsenang mo go yone." 
Luke22:11 Lo reye mong wa ntlo, lo re: ‘Moruti o a go botsa a re: Ntlo ya bojelo ya baeng e kae e ke tlaa jelang Tlolaganyo mo go yone le barutwa ba me?’" 
Luke22:12 O tlaa lo supetsa ntlwana e kgolwane e e kwa godimo, e e adilweng, lo baakanye teng.”" 
Luke22:13 Mme ba ya ba fitlhela go ntse jaaka a ba boleletse; mme ba baakanya Tlolaganyo. 
Luke22:14 E rile nako e sena go fitlha, a dula le baaposetole ba ba 12 ba na nae." 
Luke22:15 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ke tlhologeletswe ka tlhologelelo go ja Tlolaganyo e le lona ke ise ke swe. 
Luke22:16 Gonne ke a lo raya, ga nketla ke tlhola ke e ja go tle go tsamaye e dirafale mo bogosing jwa Modimo.”" 
Luke22:17 Mme a tsaya senwelo, ya re a sena go leboga, a re: “Tsholang se, lo se hupalane;" 
Luke22:18 gonne ke a lo raya, ga nketla ke tlhola ke nwa loungo lwa mofine, go tle go tsamaye bogosi jwa Modimo bo tle pele.”" 
Luke22:19 A tsaya senkgwe, mme ya re a sena go leboga, a se ngathoganya, a se ba naya a re: “Se ke mmele wa me o o ntshediwang lona; dirang mo, lo nkgopole ka gone.”" 
Luke22:20 Senwelo le sone, a se tsaya jalo, morago ga go sena go jewa, a re: “Senwelo se, ke kgolagano e ntšha mo mading a me, e bong a a tshololelwang lona." 
Luke22:21 “Mme, bonang, seatla sa yo o nkokang se na le nna mo lomating lwa bojelo." 
Luke22:22 Gonne ruri Morwa Motho o tsamaya jaaka go ikaeletswe; mme go latlhega monna yo o okwang ke ene!” 
Luke22:23 Ba simolola go botsanya gore, e ka nna ofe wa bone yo o ka dirang selo se." 
Luke22:24 Le gone ga tsoga kgang mo go bone ya gore, ke ofe wa bone yo o kaiwang yo mogolo." 
Luke22:25 Mme a ba raya a re: “Dikgosi tsa Baditšhaba di dira ka bogoma mo go bone, le ba ba ba busang ba bidiwa Badiramolemo." 
Luke22:26 Mme lona, ga lo a nna jalo; ene yo e leng yo mogolo mo go lona, a a nne jaaka yo mmotlana; le yo e leng tlhogo, a a nne jaaka yo o direlang." 
Luke22:27 Gonne yo mogolo ke ofe? A ke yo o dutseng a ja, kgotsa ke yo o direlang? A ga se yo o dutseng a ja? Mme nna, ke ntse mo go lona jaaka yo o direlang." 
Luke22:28 “Mme lona, ke lona ba ke ntseng ke na le lona mo ditekong tsa me;" 
Luke22:29 ke lo baya bogosi jaaka Rre a bo mpeile. 
Luke22:30 Gore lo je lo nwe fa lomating lwa me lwa bojelo, mo bogosing jwa me; mme lo tlaa dula mo ditulong tsa bogosi, lo atlhola ditso tse 12 tsa Iseraele." 
Luke22:31 “Simone, Simone, bona, Satane o lopile gore lo mo neelwe, gore a tle a lo fefere jaaka mabele;" 
Luke22:32 mme ke go rapeletse gore tumelo ya gago e se tlhaele; le wena o re o sena go sokologa, o tle o thatafatse bakaulengwe ba gago.”" 
Luke22:33 Mme a mo raya a re: “Morena, fa ke na nao ke iketleeditse go ya ntlong ya kgolegelo, le mo losong.”" 
Luke22:34 Mme a re: “Ke a go bolelela Petere, koko e tona ga e ketla e lela gompieno o ise o intatole gararo, o re ga o nkitse.”" 
Luke22:35 Mme a ba raya a re: “E rile ke lo roma jale, lo se na patana ya madi, le fa e le kuana, le fa e le ditlhako, a lo ile lwa tlhoka sengwe?” Ba re: “Nnyaa.”" 
Luke22:36 A ba raya a re: “Mme jaanong, yo o nang le patana ya madi, a e tseye, le yone kuana; le yo o se nang tšhaka, a a rekise kobo ya gagwe, a reke nngwe." 
Luke22:37 Gonne ke a lo raya, selo se, se se kwadilweng, se na le go dirafala mo go nna, jaaka go twe: ‘O baletswe le batlodi;’ gonne dilo tse di kwadilweng ka ga me, di a dirafala.”" 
Luke22:38 Mme ba re: “Morena, bona, ditšhaka ke tse, di pedi.” Mme a ba raya a re: “Go lekanye.”" 
Luke22:39 A tswa, a ya kwa Thoteng ya Lotlhware jaaka a tlwaetse; barutwa ba gagwe le bone ba mo sala morago." 
Luke22:40 Ya re a fitlha teng, a ba raya a re: “Rapelang, gore lo se tsene mo thaelong.”" 
Luke22:41 Mme a katogana nabo, e ka ne e le jaaka kwa lentswe le ka konopelwang teng; mme a khubama, a rapela" 
Luke22:42 a re: “Rra, fa e le go rata ga gago, tlosa senwelo se mo go nna; le fa go ntse jalo, e seng go rata ga me, mme a go rata ga gago go dirale.”" 
Luke22:43 Mme ga bonala moengele kwa go ene, a tswa legodimong, a mo thatafatsa." 
Luke22:44 Mme ka a le mo tlalelong e e mahehe, a rapela ka tlhoafalo e kgolo; mme mofufutso wa gagwe wa nna jaaka marothodi a magolo a madi, a rothela fa fatshe." 
Luke22:45 Ya re a khubamologa mo morapelong wa gagwe, a tla barutweng ba gagwe, mme a ba fitlhela ba robaditswe ke bohutsana," 
Luke22:46 mme a ba raya a re: “Lo robaletseng? Tsogang, lo rapele gore lo se tsene mo thaelong.”" 
Luke22:47 Mme a re a sa ntse a bua, bonang, bontsi jwa batho, ba eteletswe pele ke mongwe yo o bidiwang Jutase, e le wa ba ba 12, a atamela Jesu go mo atla." 
Luke22:48 Mme Jesu a mo raya a re: “Jutase, a o oka Morwa Motho ka katlo?”" 
Luke22:49 Ya re ba o nang nabo ba bona se se tlaa dirafalang, ba mo raya ba re: “Morena, a ke re reme ka tšhaka?”" 
Luke22:50 Mme mongwe wa bone a rema motlhanka wa moperesiti yo mogolo, a mo kgaola tsebe ya ka fa letsogong le legolo." 
Luke22:51 Jesu a bua a re: “Iketleng! Go ntse!” Mme a ama tsebe ya gagwe, a e fodisa." 
Luke22:52 Jesu a raya ditlhogo tsa baperesiti, le dikgosana tsa tempele, le bagolwane ba ba mo tshologetseng, a re: “A lo tsile ka ditšhaka le melamu jaaka e kete lo tshologetse senokwane?" 
Luke22:53 E ne ya re ke sa ntse ke na le lona ka malatsi otlhe mo tempeleng, ga lo a ka lwa nkotlololela mabogo; mme lono ke lobaka lwa lona, le thata ya lefifi.”" 
Luke22:54 Ba mo tshwara, ba mo goga, ba mo isa kwa ntlong ya moperesiti yo mogolo. Petere a mo latela ka go mo gwalalela." 
Luke22:55 Ya re ba sena go gotsa molelo fa gare ga lolwapa, ba dutse mmogo, Petere a dula fa gare ga bone." 
Luke22:56 Mme lelata lengwe ya re le mmona a dutse fa molelong, a mo leba thata a re: “Monna yo le ene o ne a nna nae.”" 
Luke22:57 Mme a itatola a re: “Mosadi, ga ke mo itse.”" 
Luke22:58 Ga feta lobakanyana, mme yo mongwe le ene a mmona a re: “Le wena o mongwe wa bone.” Mme Petere a re: “Monna, ga se nna.”" 
Luke22:59 Ga feta lobaka e ka ne e le lwa nako e le nngwe fela, mme yo mongwe a tlhomamisa thata a re: “Ammaaruri, monna yo le ene o ne a nna nae; ka e le Mogalilea.”" 
Luke22:60 Petere a re: “Monna, ga ke itse se o se buang.” Fela ka bonako a sa ntse a bua, koko e tona ya lela." 
Luke22:61 Mme Morena a retologa, a leba Petere. Mme Petere a gakologelwa lefoko la Morena, jaaka a mo reile a re: “E tlaa re koko e tona e ise e lele gompieno, o tlaa bo o intatotse gararo.”" 
Luke22:62 Mme Petere a tswela kwa ntle, a lela mo go botlhoko." 
Luke22:63 Banna ba ba tshwereng Jesu, ba mo sotla, ba mo itaaka." 
Luke22:64 Ba mo fapa matlho ba re: “Bolela, e mang yo o go tlhantseng?”" 
Luke22:65 Le dilo tse dingwe di le dintsi ba di bua ka ga gagwe, ba mo kgala ka tsone." 
Luke22:66 E rile bosa bo sena go sa, bagolwane ba batho, le ditlhogo tsa baperesiti, le bakwadi, ba phuthega, ba mo goga ba mo isa mo tshekong ya bone, ba re:" 
Luke22:67 “Fa o le ene Keresete re bolelele.” Mme a ba raya a re: “Fa ke lo bolelela ga lo ketla lo dumela; 
Luke22:68 le gone fa ke lo botsa ga lo ketla lo mphetola. 
Luke22:69 Go tloga fano jaana, Morwa Motho o tlaa dula ka fa letsogong le legolo la nonofo ya Modimo.”" 
Luke22:70 Ba bua botlhe ba re: “A o Morwa Modimo?” A ba raya a re: “Lona lwa re, ke nna ene.”" 
Luke22:71 Mme ba re: “Re sa ntse re dirang ka tshupo? Ka re mo ikutlwetse a bua ka molomo wa gagwe.” 
Luke23:1 Lekoko lotlhe la bone la ema, mme ba mo isa fa pele ga Pilato." 
Luke23:2 Ba simolola go mmaya molato ba re: “Re fitlhetse monna yo, a sokamisa morafe, a itsa gore Kaesare a se ka a newa lekgetho, a re le ene ka esi ke Keresete, Kgosi.”" 
Luke23:3 Pilato a mmotsa a re: “A ke wena Kgosi ya Bajuta?” A mo fetola a re: “O a bolela.” 
Luke23:4 Pilato a raya ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le matshutitshuti a batho a re: “Ga ke bone molato mo monneng yo.” 
Luke23:5 Mme bone ba gakala bogolo ba re: “O fudua setšhaba, o simolotse kwa Galilea, a ruta mo Jutea yotlhe go tla go fitlha fano.”" 
Luke23:6 Ya re Pilato a utlwa ka ga Galilea, a botsa fa monna yo e le Mogalilea." 
Luke23:7 Ya re a sena go tlhaloganya fa a le wa puso ya ga Herote, a mo isa kwa go ene Herote, yo le ene ka esi o neng a le mo Jerusalema ka lobaka loo." 
Luke23:8 Jaana e rile Herote a bona Jesu, a itumela thata; ka a sa bolo go eletsa go mmona, ka a bile a utlwile dilo di le dintsi ka ga gagwe; le gone a solofela fa a tlaa bona tiro nngwe e e gakgamatsang e dirwa ke ene." 
Luke23:9 Mme a mmotsa ka mafoko a le mantsi; mme ene a se ka a mo fetola ka lepe. 
Luke23:10 Ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bakwadi, ba ema ba mmaya molato, ba gaketse thata." 
Luke23:11 Le Herote le batlhabani ba gagwe ba mo nyatsa, ba mo sotla, ba mo apesa seaparo se se manyedinyedi, ba mmusetsa gape kwa go Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Herote le Pilato ba tloga ba tsalana fela ka letsatsi leo; ka e rile pele ba bo ba tlhoanye. 
Luke23:13 Pilato a phutha ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le balaodi, le batho, a ba raya a re:" 
Luke23:14 “Lo tlisitse monna yo kwa go nna, jaaka mongwe yo o sokamisang setšhaba, bonang, ke mmoditse fa pele ga lona, mme ke se ka ka bona molato ope mo monneng yo, ka ga dilo tse lo reng o molato ka ga tsone;" 
Luke23:15 nnyaa, le fa e le ene Herote; gonne o mmuseditse kwano go rona; mme bonang, ga go na sepe se o se dirileng se se tshwanetseng loso." 
Luke23:16 Ke gone ke tlaa mo kgwathisa, ke mo golole.”" 
Luke23:17 (Le gale o ne a tshwanetse go ba gololela mongwe ka lobaka lwa modiro.) 
Luke23:18 Mme ba goeleletsa gongwe ba re: “Monna yo, a a tlosiwe, re gololelwe Barabase;”" 
Luke23:19 e le motho yo o rileng ka ntlha ya pheretlho e o e dirileng mo motseng, le go bolaya batho, a bo a tsentswe mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Luke23:20 Pilato ka a eletsa go golola Jesu, a ba a bua nabo gape;" 
Luke23:21 mme ba thela lošalaba ba re: “A a bapolwe, a a bapolwe.”" 
Luke23:22 A ba a bua nabo lwa boraro a re: “Ka ntlha yang? Monna yo o dirile bosula bofe? Ga ke a bona molato ope o o tshwanetseng loso mo go ene; ke gone ke tlaa mo kgwathisang, ke itse go mo golola.”" 
Luke23:23 Ba mo kgaupetsa ka mantswe a magolo, ba lopa gore a bapolwe. Mme mantswe a bone a fenya." 
Luke23:24 Mme Pilato a atlhola ka go re, go dirwe ka fa topong ya bone." 
Luke23:25 A golola ene yo o tsenyeditsweng pheretlho le polao ya batho mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, ene yo ba mo eleditseng; mme Jesu ene a mo neela mo go rateng ga bone." 
Luke23:26 Ya re ba mo gogela koo, ba tshwara mongwe yo go tweng Simone wa Kurene, a tswa kwa nageng, mme ba baya mokgoro mo go ene, gore a o sikare fa morago ga Jesu." 
Luke23:27 A salwa morago ke bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho, le jwa basadi, ba ba bileng ba gala, ba mo lelela." 
Luke23:28 Jesu a retologela kwa go bone a re: “Bomorwadia Jerusalema, se nteleleng, lo itelele, lo bo lo lelele bana ba lona." 
Luke23:29 Gonne bonang, metlha e etla, e ba tlaa buang mo go yone ba re: ‘Go sego meopa le dipopelo tse di iseng di ke di belege, le mabele a a iseng a ke a amuse.’" 
Luke23:30 Foo ba tlaa simolola go raya dithaba ba re: ‘Re weleng godimo;’ le makgabana ba re: ‘Re khurumetseng!’ 
Luke23:31 Gonne fa ba dira dilo tse mo setlhareng se setala, go tlaa dirwa eng mo go se se omeletseng?”" 
Luke23:32 Le gone ga bo go le ba bangwe ba le babedi, e le basenyi, ba gogwa nae ba ya go bolawa." 
Luke23:33 E rile ba sena go fitlha felong fa go bidiwang Logata, ba mmapolela teng, le basenyi, mongwe ka fa letsogong le le siameng, yo mongwe ka fa go la molema." 
Luke23:34 Mme Jesu a re: “Rra, ba itshwarele; gonne ga ba itse se ba se dirang.” Mme ba kgaogana diaparo tsa gagwe, ba di laola ka bola." 
Luke23:35 Batho ba ema ba leba. Le balaodi le bone ba mo gobolola ba re: “O ne a boloka ba bangwe; a jaana a ipoloke, fa e le ene Keresete wa Modimo, moitshenkedwi wa one.”" 
Luke23:36 Batlhabani le bone ba tla fa go ene, ba mo sotla, ba re ba mo nosa bojalwa jo bo botšarara," 
Luke23:37 ba re: “Fa e le wena Kgosi ya Bajuta, ipoloke.”" 
Luke23:38 Le gone ga bo go le sekwalo fa godimo ga gagwe se se reng: “YO, KE KGOSI YA BAJUTA”." 
Luke23:39 Mme mongwe wa basenyi ba ba pegilweng nae a mo kgala, a re: “A ga o ene Keresete? Ipoloke le rona o re boloke.”" 
Luke23:40 Yo mongwe a mo fetola, a mo kgalemela a re: “A le Modimo ga o o boife, e tswa le wena o le mo tshekisong e ka yosi?" 
Luke23:41 Mme rona ruri, e re tshwanetse; ka re bona tuelo e e tshwanetseng ditiro tsa rona; mme monna yo, ga a a dira sepe se se sokameng.”" 
Luke23:42 Mme a re: “Jesu, a ko o nkgopole mogang o tlang mo bogosing jwa gago.”" 
Luke23:43 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ammaaruri, ke a go raya, o tlaa nna le nna kwa Parataise gompieno.”" 
Luke23:44 Ya bo e setse e ka ne e le nako ya borataro ya motshegare o mogolo; mme ga nna lefifi mo lefatsheng lotlhe, go ya go fitlha mo nakong ya 9." 
Luke23:45 Lesedi la letsatsi le ntse le fifala; mme sesiro sa tempele sa fatoga ka bogare. 
Luke23:46 E rile Jesu a sena go goa ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Rra, ke neela mowa wa me mo diatleng tsa gago;” mme a re a sena go bua jalo a neela mowa." 
Luke23:47 E rile molaodi wa mophato a bona se se dirafetseng a galaletsa Modimo a re: “Ruri motho yo e ne e le mosiami.” 
Luke23:48 Matshutitshuti otlhe a batho ba ba phuthegetseng pono e, ba re ba bona dilo tse di dirafetseng, ba boa ba ititaya dihuba." 
Luke23:49 Botlhe ba ba itsanyeng nae, le basadi ba ba mo setseng morago ba tswa Galilea, ba emela kgakala, ba bona dilo tse." 
Luke23:50 Mme bonang, monna yo o bidiwang Josefe wa lekgotla, e le monna yo o molemo le tshiamo;" 
Luke23:51 ene yo, ga a ka a dumalana le kgakololo le tiro ya bone, e le motho wa Arimathea, motse wa Bajuta, yo o bileng a ne a lebeletse bogosi jwa Modimo." 
Luke23:52 Monna yo, a ya kwa go Pilato a lopa setoto sa ga Jesu." 
Luke23:53 A se pagolola, a se phutha ka letsela la leloba, mme a se baya mo phupung e e gabilweng mo lefikeng, e go iseng go ko go bewe motho ope mo go yone." 
Luke23:54 Mme ya bo e le letsatsi la Iketleetso, mme Sabata o ne a atamela." 
Luke23:55 Le basadi, ba ba duleng nae kwa Galilea, ba mo sala morago, ba bona phupu, le ka fa setoto se bewang ka teng." 
Luke23:56 Mme ba boa, ba baakanya malao le ditlotso; mme ba ikhutsa ka letsatsi la Sabata, ka fa taolong." 
Luke24:1 E rile ka letsatsi la ntlha la beke, go le ka maphakela, ba ya kwa phupung, ba tshotse malao a ba a baakantseng." 
Luke24:2 Ba fitlhela lentswe le pitikolotswe le tlositswe fa phupung. 
Luke24:3 Mme ba tsena mo teng, mme ba se ka ba fitlhela mmele wa Morena Jesu." 
Luke24:4 Ga dirala, ya re ba sa ntse ba akabetse thata ka ga gone, bonang, banna ba le babedi ba ema fa go bone, ba apere diaparo tse di tsabakelang;" 
Luke24:5 ka ba boifa, ba ikobela ditlhogo fa fatshe, ba ba raya ba re: “Lo batlelang motshedi mo baswing?" 
Luke24:6 Ga a yo fa; o tsogile; gakologelwang ka fa o buileng le lona ka teng, a sa ntse a le kwa Galilea." 
Luke24:7 A re: ‘Morwa Motho o na le go neelwa mo diatleng tsa batho ba boleo, le go bapolwa, le go ba a tsoga ka letsatsi la boraro.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Ba gakologelwa mafoko a gagwe. 
Luke24:9 Ba boa kwa phupung, ba ya ba bolelela ba ba 11, le ba bangwe botlhe dilo tse tsotlhe fela." 
Luke24:10 Jaana e ne e le Maria Magetalene, le Johana, le Maria mma Jakobe; le basadi ba bangwe ba na nabo ba bolelela baaposetole dilo tse." 
Luke24:11 Mafoko a, a nna jaaka ditlhamane fela mo go bone, ba se ka ba a dumela." 
Luke24:12 Petere a nanoga a sianela kwa phupung; mme a inama, a okomela mo teng, a bona matsela a leloba a beilwe a le osi, mme a tsamaya a gakgamaletse se se dirafetseng." 
Luke24:13 Bonang, ya re ka letsatsi leo fela, ba le babedi ba bone ba bo ba ya kwa motsaneng o o bidiwang Emao; bokgakala jwa teng go tswa Jerusalema, e ka ne e le dikilometara di le 11." 
Luke24:14 Ba bua mmogo ka ga dilo tsotlhe tse di dirafetseng. 
Luke24:15 Ga dirala ya re ba ntse ba bua mmogo ba botsanya, Jesu ka esi a atamela, a tsamaya nabo." 
Luke24:16 Matlho a bone a bo a siregile, gore ba tle ba se ka ba mo itse." 
Luke24:17 Mme a ba raya a re: “Dipolelano tse, ke dife tse lo di bolelanang fa lo ntse lo tsamaya?” Ba ema ba tlhontse difatlhogo." 
Luke24:18 Yo mongwe wa bone, yo leina la gagwe e leng Keleopase, a mo fetola a re: “A ke wena wesi o tlhotsetlhotseng mo Jerusalema o sa itse dilo tse di dirafetseng teng mo malatsing ano?”" 
Luke24:19 A ba raya a re: “Dilo dife?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Dilo tsa ka ga Jesu wa Nasaretha, yo e neng e le moperofeti yo o nonofileng mo tirong le mo mafokong, fa pele ga Modimo le batho notlhe." 
Luke24:20 Le jaaka ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le balaodi ba rona ba mo neetsa go sekisediwa losong, mme ba bile mmapotse." 
Luke24:21 Re ne re solofetse fa e tlaa bo e le ene yo o tlaa rekololang Iseraele. Bogolo go tsotlhe tse, gompieno ke letsatsi la boraro dilo tse di sena go dirafala." 
Luke24:22 Gape basadi bangwe ba lesomo la rona, le bone ba re gakgamaditse, ka ba ne ba ile ka maphakela kwa phupung;" 
Luke24:23 mme e rile ba sa fitlhele mmele wa gagwe, ba tla ba re, ba bile ba bonye ponatshegelo ya baengele ba ba rileng, o tshedile." 
Luke24:24 Bangwe ba bone ba re neng re na nabo ba ya kwa phupung, ba fitlhela go ntse fela jaaka basadi ba boletse; mme ene ba se ka ba mmona.”" 
Luke24:25 Mme a ba raya a re: “A batho ba ba se nang tlhaloganyo ke lona, ba lo pelo di bonya go dumela tsotlhe tse baperofeti ba di buileng!" 
Luke24:26 A ga e ne e le tshwanelo gore Keresete a boge dilo tse, le go tsena mo kgalalelong ya gagwe?”" 
Luke24:27 Mme a simolola ka Moše, le ka baperofeti botlhe, a ba phuthololela mo dikwalong tsotlhe, dilo tse di kwadilweng ka ga gagwe." 
Luke24:28 Ba atamela motsana o ba yang kwa go one; mme ene a dira jaaka e kete o fetela pele. 
Luke24:29 Mme ba mo patelela ba re: “Nna le rona; gonne go maitseboa, le letsatsi le ngotlegile thata.” A tsena a ya go nna nabo." 
Luke24:30 Ga dirala ya re a dutse a ja nabo, a tsaya senkgwe, a se segofatsa, a se ngathoganya, a se ba naya." 
Luke24:31 Mme matlho a bone a sirologa, mme ba mo itse; mme a nyelela a tswa mo ponong ya bone." 
Luke24:32 Ba raana ba re: “A dipelo tsa rona, a ga di a ka tsa tuka mo teng ga rona, fa a ntse a bua le rona mo tseleng, le fa a re rarabololela dikwalo?”" 
Luke24:33 Ba nanoga ka nako eo fela, ba boela kwa Jerusalema, mme ba fitlhela ba ba 11 ba phuthegile mmogo, le ba ba nang nabo," 
Luke24:34 ba re: “Ruri Morena o tsogile, mme o bonywe ke Simone.”" 
Luke24:35 Mme ba bolela dilo tse di dirafetseng mo tseleng, le ka fa ba mo lemogileng ka teng ka go ngathoganngwa ga senkgwe." 
Luke24:36 Ya re ba sa ntse ba bua dilo tse, ene ka esi a ema fa gare ga bone a ba raya a re: “Kagiso e nne le lona.”" 
Luke24:37 Ba rerega, ba tshoga, ba itlhoma ba bona mowa." 
Luke24:38 A ba raya a re: “Lo huduegelang, le dikabakanyo di tsogelang mo dipelong tsa lona?" 
Luke24:39 Lebang diatla tsa me, le dinao tsa me, fa e le nna ka nosi; nkapaapang, lo bone; gonne mowa ga o na nama le marapo, jaaka lo mpona ke na le one.”" 
Luke24:40 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a ba bontsha diatla tsa gagwe le dinao tsa gagwe." 
Luke24:41 Ya re ba sa ntse ba belaetse ka boitumelo, mme ba gakgametse, a ba raya a re: “A lo na le se se jewang fano?”" 
Luke24:42 Ba mo naya sebeka sa tlhapi e e besitsweng. 
Luke24:43 A se tshola, a se ja fa pele ga bone." 
Luke24:44 A ba raya a re: “Mafoko a, ke one a nkileng ka a bua le lona fa ke sa na le lona, fa dilo tsotlhe di na le go dirafala, e bong tse di kwadilweng mo molaong wa ga Moše, le mo baperofeting, le mo dipesalemeng, ka ga me.”" 
Luke24:45 Foo a rarabolola tlhaloganyo ya bone gore ba tlhaloganye dikwalo; 
Luke24:46 a ba raya a re: “Go kwadilwe jaana, fa ene Keresete a tlaa swa jalo, mme a ba a tsoge mo baswing ka letsatsi la boraro;" 
Luke24:47 le gore go rerelwe merafe yotlhe boikwatlhao, le boitshwarelo jwa dibe ka leina la gagwe, go simolola mo Jerusalema." 
Luke24:48 Lona lo basupi ba dilo tse. 
Luke24:49 Bonang, ke tlisa polelo ya tsholofetso ya ga Rre mo go lona; lo name lo sa diegile mo motseng wa Jerusalema, go tle go tsamaye lo apesiwe nonofo e e tswang kwa godimo.”" 
Luke24:50 Mme a ba gogela kwa ntle, ba ya go fitlha go lebagana le Bethania; mme a tsholetsa mabogo a gagwe, a ba segofatsa." 
Luke24:51 Ga dirala, ya re a sa ntse a ba segofatsa, a kgaogana nabo, a isiwa kwa legodimong." 
Luke24:52 Mme ba mo obamela; ba boela kwa Jerusalema ka boitumelo jo bogolo; 
Luke24:53 ba tlhola ba ntse ba le mo tempeleng ka gale, ba baka Modimo." 
John1:1 E rile mo tshimologong Lefoko a bo a ntse a le yo, mme Lefoko a bo a ntse a na le Modimo, mme Lefoko ya bo e le ene Modimo." 
John1:2 Ene yoo o ne a le yo mo tshimologong a ntse le Modimo. 
John1:3 Dilo tsotlhe di dirilwe ke ene; mme kwa ntle ga gagwe ga se ka ga dirwa sepe sa tse di dirilweng. 
John1:4 Mo go ene go ne go le botshelo; mme botshelo jo, e ne e le jone lesedi la batho." 
John1:5 Lesedi le phatsima mo lefifing; mme lefifi le se ka la amogalana nalo. 
John1:6 Ga tla monna a romilwe ke Modimo, leina la gagwe go twe, Johane." 
John1:7 Ene yoo, a tla go supa, gore a supe ka ga lesedi, gore botlhe ba dumele ka ene." 
John1:8 E ne e se ene lesedi, mme a tla go supa ka ga lesedi." 
John1:9 Ga bo go le lesedi la ammaaruri, e bong lesedi le le bonesang motho mongwe le mongwe, mme la bo le tla mo lefatsheng." 
John1:10 O ne a le mo lefatsheng, lefatshe le ne le dirilwe ke ene, mme lefatshe la se ka la mo itse." 
John1:11 O ne a tla mo ga gabo, mme ba e neng e le ba ga gabo ba se ka ba mo tshola." 
John1:12 Mme botlhe ba ba mo tshotseng, a ba naya tshiamelo ya go nna bana ba Modimo, e bong bone ba ba dumetseng mo ineng la gagwe," 
John1:13 e le ba ba se kang ba tsalwa ke madi, le fa e le ke go rata ga nama, le fa e le ke go rata ga motho, fa e se ke Modimo." 
John1:14 Mme Lefoko a tla a nna nama, mme a aga mo go rona, mme ra bona kgalalelo ya gagwe, e kete kgalalelo ya yo o tsetsweng a le esi a tswa kwa go Rara, a tletse tshegofatso le boammaaruri." 
John1:15 Johane o supa ka ga gagwe, o kua a re: “Ke ene yo ke buileng ka ga gagwe ka re: ‘Yo o tlang morago ga me, o bile o ntse pele ga me; gonne o ne a leyo pele ga me.’ ”" 
John1:16 Gonne rotlhe re amogetse se se tswang botlalong jwa gagwe, le tshegofatso mo godimo ga tshegofatso." 
John1:17 Gonne molao o beilwe ka Moše; mme tshegofatso le boammaaruri di tsile ka Jesu Keresete. 
John1:18 Ga go motho ope yo o kileng a bona Modimo ka motlha ope; Morwa wa one yo o tsetsweng a le esi, yo o mo sehubeng sa ga Rara, ke ene yo o o boletseng." 
John1:19 E ke yone tshupo ya ga Johane jale ka Bajuta ba roma baperesiti le Balefi kwa go ene, ba tswa Jerusalema, ba ya go mmotsa go re: “O mang?”" 
John1:20 Mme a ipolela, mme a se ka a itoba; a ipolela fela a re: “Ga ke Keresete.”" 
John1:21 Ba mmotsa ba re: “Mme o eng ne? A o Elija?” A re: “Nnyaa.” “A o ene moperofeti yo?” A fetola a re: “Nnyaa.” 
John1:22 Ke gone ba mo raya ba re: “O mang? Gore re tle re fetole ba ba re romileng. O a reng ka ga gago?” 
John1:23 A re: “Nna ke lentswe la mongwe yo o kuang mo nageng a re: ‘Siamisang tsela ya Morena,’ jaaka moperofeti Isaia a kile a bua.”" 
John1:24 Ba ba romilweng ba bo ba tswa mo Bafarisaing. 
John1:25 Ba mmotsa, ba mo raya ba re: “Mme o kolobeletsang, fa o se Keresete, le fa e le Elija, le fa e le ene moperofeti?”" 
John1:26 Johane a ba fetola a re: “Ke kolobetsa ka metsi, mme mo gare ga lona go eme mongwe yo lo sa mo itseng." 
John1:27 E bong ene yo o tlang morago ga me, yo kgole ya setlhako sa gagwe ke sa tshwanelang go e hunolola.”" 
John1:28 Dilo tse di dirilwe kwa Bethania o o kwa moseja ga Joretane, kwa Johane o neng a kolobetsa teng." 
John1:29 Ya re ka moso a bona Jesu a tla kwa go ene, mme a re: “Bonang, Kwana wa Modimo, yo o tlosang boleo jwa lefatshe!" 
John1:30 Ke ene yo ke buileng ka ga gagwe ka re: ‘Morago ga me go tla monna yo o bileng a ntse pele ga me; gonne o ne a le yo pele ga me.’ 
John1:31 Mme ka bo ke sa mo itse; ke tsile ke kolobetsa ka metsi gore a tle a senolelwe Iseraele.” 
John1:32 Johane a supa a re: “Ke bonye Mowa o fologa jaaka lephoi, o tswa legodimong; wa nna mo go ene." 
John1:33 Mme ka bo ke sa mo itse; ke ene yo o nthomileng gore ke tle go kolobetsa ka metsi, ke ene yo o ntheileng a re: ‘Yo o bonang Mowa o fologela mo go ene, o nna go ene, ke ene yo o kolobetsang ka Mowa o o Boitshepo.’" 
John1:34 Ke bonye, ka ba ka supa fa yo e le Morwa Modimo.”" 
John1:35 Gape ya re ka moso o mongwe, Johane a bo a eme a na le barutwa ba gagwe ba le babedi;" 
John1:36 mme a leba Jesu jaaka a tsamaya, mme a re: “Bonang, Kwana wa Modimo!”" 
John1:37 Barutwa ba babedi ba mo utlwa a bua, mme ba sala Jesu morago;" 
John1:38 Jesu a retologa, a ba bona ba mo setse morago, a ba raya a re: “Lo batlang?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Rabi,” - ke go re, Moruti, fa go phuthololwa, “o nna kae?”" 
John1:39 A ba raya a re: “A re tsamayeng, mme lo tlaa bona.” Ba ya ba bona kwa o nnang teng; mme ba tlholatlhola nae ka tsatsi leo; ya bo e le nako ya lesome." 
John1:40 Mongwe wa ba babedi ba ba utlwileng Johane a bua, mme a sala Jesu morago, e ne e le Anterea mogoloa Simone Petere." 
John1:41 Ya re pele a ya a bona Simone monnawe, a mo raya a re: “Re bonye Mesia,” - ke go re Keresete, fa go phuthololwa." 
John1:42 A mo isa kwa go Jesu. Jesu a mo leba a re: “O Simone morwa Jona, o tlaa bidiwa Kefase,” - ke go re, Petere, (le fa e le Lefika), fa go phuthololwa." 
John1:43 Ya re ka moso a gopola go tswela kwa Galilea, mme a ya a bona Filipo; mme Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ntshala morago.”" 
John1:44 Jaana Filipo ya bo e le motho wa Bethesaita, motse wa ga gabo Anterea le Petere." 
John1:45 Filipo a ya a bona Nathanaele, a mo raya a re: “Re bonye ene yo Moše o kwadileng ka ga gagwe mo molaong, le bone baperofeti, e bong Jesu wa Nasaretha, morwa Josefe.”" 
John1:46 Nathanaele a mo raya a re: “A sengwe se se molemo se ka tswa Nasaretha?” Filipo a mo raya a re: “A re tsamaye, o ye go bona.”" 
John1:47 Jesu a bona Nathanaele a tla kwa go ene, mme a bua ka ga gagwe a re: “Bonang Moiseraele wa ammarruri, yo go se nang boferefere bope mo go ene!”" 
John1:48 Nathanaele a mo raya a re: “O nkitsile jang?” Jesu a mo fetola a re: “E rile o le fa tlase ga mofeige, Filipo a ise a go bitse, nna ka go bona.”" 
John1:49 Nathanaele a mo fetola, a re: “Rabi, o Morwa Modimo; o kgosi ya Iseraele.”" 
John1:50 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “A o dumela ka gobo ke go reile ka re: ‘Ke go bonye o le fa tlase ga mofeige’? O tlaa bona dilo tse dikgolo bogolo go tse.” 
John1:51 A mo raya a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri ke a lo raya, lo tlaa bona legodimo le atlhamologile, le baengele ba Modimo ba tlhatloga, ba ba ba fologela mo go Morwa Motho.”" 
John2:1 E rile ka tsatsi la boraro, ga bo go le nyalo kwa Kana wa Galilea; mme mma Jesu a bo a le teng;" 
John2:2 Jesu le ene a lalelediwa nyalong, le barutwa ba gagwe." 
John2:3 Ya re bojalwa jwa mofine bo tlhaela, mma Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ga ba na bojalwa jwa mofine.”" 
John2:4 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Mosadi, ke dirang ka wena? Lobaka lwa me ga lo ise lo tle.”" 
John2:5 Mmaagwe a raya batlhanka a re: “Se o se lo rayang lo se dire fela.” 
John2:6 Ga bo go le ditsaga tsa lentswe di le thataro, di beilwe teng ka fa mokgweng wa Bajuta wa bontlafatso, nngwe le nngwe e lekanye diemere di supa, kgotsa di some." 
John2:7 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Thelang metsi mo ditsageng, di tlale.” Ba di thela tsa tlalela ruri." 
John2:8 A ba raya a re: “Gang jaana, lo ise kwa molebalebing wa modiro.” Mme ba a isa." 
John2:9 Ya re molebalebi wa modiro a leka metsi mo ganong, a jaanong a fetogileng bojalwa jwa mofine, a sa itse kwa a tswang teng, mme batlhanka ba ba gileng metsi ba bo ba itse, molebalebi wa modiro a bitsa monyadi." 
John2:10 A mo raya a re: “Batho botlhe ba tle ba beye bojalwa jwa mofine jo bo monate pele; e re batho ba sena go nwa thata, foo ba beye jo bo seng monate; mme wena, bojalwa jwa mofine jo bo monate o bo boloketse lobaka lono.”" 
John2:11 Tshimologo e ya ditshupo tsa gagwe, Jesu o e dirile mo Kana wa Galilea, a bonatsa kgalalelo ya gagwe; mme barutwa ba gagwe ba dumela mo go ene." 
John2:12 Morago ga moo a fologela kwa Kaperenaume, ene le mmaagwe, le bomonnawe, le barutwa ba gagwe; mme ba tlhola teng malatsi a se mantsi." 
John2:13 Tlolaganyo ya Bajuta ya bo e le gaufi, mme Jesu a tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema." 
John2:14 A ya mo tempeleng a fithlela ba ba rekisang dikgomo, le dinku le maphoi, le ba ba ananyang madi ba dutse teng." 
John2:15 A tshopha senteo sa megala, a di lelekela tsotlhe kwa ntle ga tempele, dinku le dikgomo; le madi a ba ba a ananyang a a goromeletsa fa fatshe, le dimati tsa bone a di pitikolola;" 
John2:16 ba ba rekisang maphoi a ba raya a re: “Tlosang dilo tse fa; se ntsheng ntlo ya ga Rre ntlo ya thekelo.” 
John2:17 Barutwa ba gagwe ba gakologelwa fa go kwadilwe ga twe: “Tlhoafalelo ya ntlo ya gago e tlaa nja.” 
John2:18 Ke gone Bajuta ba mo fetola ba re: “O re supetsa sesupo sefe ka e le fa o dira dilo tse?” 
John2:19 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Digang tempele e, mme ke tlaa e tsosa ka malatsi a le mararo.”" 
John2:20 Foo Bajuta ba re: “Tempele e e jele dinyaga di le 46 mo go agiweng, a o tlaa e tsosa ka malatsi a le mararo?”" 
John2:21 Mme ene a bo a bua ka ga tempele ya mmele wa gagwe. 
John2:22 Ke gone e rileng a sena go tsosiwa mo baswing, barutwa ba gagwe ba gakologelwa fa a kile a bua jalo; ba dumela dikwalo le lefoko le Jesu o le buileng." 
John2:23 Jaana e rile a ile Tlolaganyong kwa Jerusalema, e le ka lobaka lwa modiro, batho ba le bantsi ba dumela mo ineng la gagwe, ka ba bona ditshupo tsa gagwe tse o di dirang." 
John2:24 Jesu a se ka a ba ikanya go ba ineela, gonne a itse batho botlhe;" 
John2:25 gape o ne a sa tlhoke gore ope a supe ka ga motho; gonne ene ka esi a itse se se mo mothong. 
John3:1 Jaana ga bo go le motho wa Bafarisai go twe Nikotemo, molaodi mongwe wa Bajuta." 
John3:2 A tla kwa go Jesu go le bosigo, a mo raya a re: “Rabi, re a itse fa o le moruti yo o tswang kwa Modimong, gonne ga go motho ope yo o ka dirang ditshupo tse o di dirang fa Modimo o se na nae.”" 
John3:3 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri ke a go raya, fa motho a sa tsalwe seša, ga a ka ke a bona bogosi jwa Modimo.”" 
John3:4 Nikotemo a mo raya a re: “Motho o ka tsalwa jang a tsofetse? A o ka ba a tsena lwa bobedi mo sebopelong sa ga mmaagwe, mme a tsalwa?”" 
John3:5 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a go raya, fa motho a sa tsalwe ka metsi le Mowa, ga a ka ke a tsena mo bogosing jwa Modimo." 
John3:6 Se se tsetsweng ke nama ke nama; mme se se tsetsweng ke Mowa ke mowa. 
John3:7 O se gakgamale ka gobo ke go reile ka re, lo na le go tsalwa seša." 
John3:8 Phefo e fokela kwa e go ratang, mme o utlwa go suma ga yone, mme ga o itse kwa e tswang le kwa e yang teng; mme mongwe le mongwe yo o tsetsweng ke Mowa o ntse jalo.”" 
John3:9 Nikotemo a mo fetola a re: “Dilo tse di ka nna jalo jang?”
