John3:10 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “A o moruti wa Iseraele, mme o sa tlhaloganye dilo tse?" 
John3:11 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a go raya, rona re bua se re se itseng, re supa se re se bonyeng; mme lona ga lo tshole tshupo ya rona." 
John3:12 Fa ke lo bolelela dilo tsa selefatshe lo sa dumele, lo tlaa dumela jang, fa ke lo bolelela dilo tsa selegodimo?" 
John3:13 Ga go a tlhatlogela ope kwa legodimong, fa e se ene yo o fologileng kwa legodimong, e bong Morwa Motho yo o kwa legodimong." 
John3:14 “Mme jaaka Moše a kile a tlhatlosa noga kwa gare ga naga, Morwa Motho o na le go tlhatlosiwa fela jalo;" 
John3:15 gore le fa e le mang yo o dumelang a bone botshelo jo bo sa khutleng mo go ene. 
John3:16 Gonne Modimo o ratile lefatshe mo go kalokalo, wa ntsha Morwa one yo o tsetsweng a le esi, gore le fa e le mang yo o dumelang mo go ene a se ka a nyelela, mme a bone botshelo jo bo sa khutleng." 
John3:17 Gonne Modimo ga o a ka wa roma Morwa one mo lefatsheng go sekisa lefatshe, mme e le gore lefatshe le bolokwe ka ene." 
John3:18 “Yo o dumelang mo go ene ga a sekisiwe; yo o sa dumeleng o sekisitswe le gompieno, ka a se ka a dumela mo ineng la Morwa Modimo yo o tsetsweng a le esi." 
John3:19 Tshekiso ke e, gore lesedi le tsile mo lefatsheng, mme batho ba ratile lefifi bogolo go lesedi; gonne ditiro tsa bone di ne di le bosula." 
John3:20 Gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o dirang bosula o ila lesedi, o a ba a sa tle leseding, e tle e re kgotsa ditiro tsa gagwe di kgalemelwe." 
John3:21 Yo o dirang boammaaruri o tla leseding, gore ditiro tsa gagwe di senolwe, fa di dirilwe mo Modimong.”" 
John3:22 E rile morago ga dilo tse, Jesu a tla mo lefatsheng la Jutea, a na le barutwa ba gagwe; mme a diega nabo gone a kolobetsa." 
John3:23 Johane le ene a bo a kolobetsa mo Ainone, gaufi le Salime, gonne metsi a ne a le magolo teng; mme ba tla ba kolobediwa," 
John3:24 gonne Johane o ne a ise a tsenngwe mo ntlong ya kgolegelo. 
John3:25 Ke gone ka moo potso e ne ya tsoga, barutwa ba ga Johane ba botsanya le Mojuta mongwe ka ga bontlafatso." 
John3:26 Mme ba ya kwa go Johane, ba mo raya ba re: “Rabi, yo o ne o na nae kwa moseja ga Joretane, yo o supileng ka ga gagwe, bona o a kolobetsa, mme batho botlhe ba ya kwa go ene.”" 
John3:27 Johane a ba fetola a re: “Motho ga a ka ke a amogela sepe, fa a se ka a se newa se tswa kwa legodimong." 
John3:28 Le lona ka losi lo basupi ba me, fa ke rile, ga ke Keresete, fa e se gore ke romilwe pele ga gagwe fela." 
John3:29 Yo o nang le monyadwi ke monyadi; mme tsala ya monyadi, yo o emeng a mo utlwa, o itumelela lentswe la monyadi thata; ke gone boitumelo jo jwa me bo diretse." 
John3:30 Ene o na le go gola, mme nna ke na le go ngotlafala." 
John3:31 “Yo o tswang kwa godimo o godimo ga botlhe; yo o leng wa lefatshe ke wa lefatshe, o bua ga lefatshe; yo o tswang legodimong o godimo ga botlhe." 
John3:32 Se o se bonyeng a se utlwa, ke sone se o se supang; ga go ope yo o amogelang tshupo ya gagwe." 
John3:33 Yo o amogetseng tshupo ya gagwe, o ikwadile a baya sekano sa gagwe sa gore, Modimo o boammaaruri." 
John3:34 Gonne yo Modimo o mo romileng o bua mafoko a Modimo; gonne ga o abe Mowa ka selekanyo. 
John3:35 Rara o rata Morwa, mme o tsentse dilo tsotlhe mo seatleng sa gagwe." 
John3:36 Yo o dumelang mo go Morwa Modimo o na le botshelo jo bo sa khutleng, mme yo o ganang go utlwa Morwa Modimo, ga a ketla a bona botshelo, mme bogale jwa Modimo bo ntse mo go ene.”" 
John4:1 Ke gone e rileng Morena a itse jaaka Bafarisai ba utlwile fa Jesu a dira a ba a kolobetsa barutwa ba le bantsi bogolo go Johane 
John4:2 – le mororo Jesu ka esi a sa kolobetse, mme e le barutwa ba gagwe –" 
John4:3 a tloga mo Jutea, a boela kwa Galilea." 
John4:4 Mme a bo a na le go ralala Samaria. 
John4:5 Jalo a fitlha kwa motseng mongwe wa Samaria, go twe, Sikare, gaufi le sebata sa lefatshe se Jakobe o se neileng Josefe morwawe." 
John4:6 Sediba sa ga Jakobe sa bo se le teng foo. E re ka Jesu a ne a tsenywe ke letsapa la loeto, a dula fa sedibeng. Ya bo e le mo lobakeng lwa nako ya sethoboloko." 
John4:7 Ga tla mosadi mongwe wa Samaria go ga metsi; Jesu a mo raya a re: “A ko o nnose metsi,”" 
John4:8 gonne barutwa ba gagwe ba ne ba ile mo motseng go reka dijo. 
John4:9 Foo mosadi wa Samaria a mo raya a re: “Go ntse jang, wena o le Mojuta, o lopa go nwa mo go nna ke le mosadi wa Samaria? Ga ke re Bajuta ga ba etalane le Basamaria?”" 
John4:10 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Fa o ka bo o ne o itse neo ya Modimo, le yo o go rayang a re: ‘A ko o nnose;’ o ka bo o lopile ene, mme o ka bo a go nositse metsi a a tshedileng.”" 
John4:11 Mosadi a mo raya a re: “Morena, ga o na se o gang ka sone, mme sediba se boteng, mme metsi a a tshedileng ao, o a tsere kae?" 
John4:12 A o mogolo go feta rraetsho Jakobe, yo o re neileng sediba se, le ene a nwa mo go sone, le bomorwawe, le dikgomo tsa gagwe?”" 
John4:13 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Mongwe le mongwe yo o nwang metsi a, o tlaa ba a nyorwa gape;" 
John4:14 mme le fa e le mang yo o tlaa nwang metsi a ke tlaa a mo nosang, ga a ketla a tlhola a nyorwa gope; metsi a ke tlaa a mo nosang a tlaa tswa motswedi wa metsi mo go ene, a a tswelelang botshelong jo bo sa khutleng.”" 
John4:15 Mosadi a mo raya a re: “Morena, a ko o nnose metsi ao, gore ke se ka ka tlhola ke nyorwa, le fa e le go tsamaya mosepele o molele wa go tla kwano go ga.”" 
John4:16 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ya o bitse monna wa gago, mme o tle kwano.”" 
John4:17 Mosadi a mo fetola a re: “Ga ke na monna.” Jesu a mo raya a re: “O buile sentle, wa re ga o na monna;" 
John4:18 gonne o kile wa ne o na le banna ba le batlhano; mme yo o nang nae gompieno ga se monna wa gago; moo o boletse ka boammaaruri.” 
John4:19 Mosadi a mo raya a re: “Morena, ke a lemoga fa o le moperofeti." 
John4:20 Borraetsho ba ne ba obama mo thabeng e; mme lona lwa re, Jerusalema ke gone kwa batho ba tshwanetseng go obama teng.”" 
John4:21 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Mosadi, ntumela, lobaka lo etla lo lo se ketlang lo obamela Rara ka lone mo thabeng e, le fa e le mo Jerusalema." 
John4:22 Lona lo obamela se lo sa se itseng; rona re obamela se re se itseng; gonne poloko e tswa mo Bajuteng. 
John4:23 Lobaka lo etla, le gompieno lo fitlhile, lo baobamedi ba ammaaruri ba tlaa obamelang Rara ka lone, ka Mowa le ka boammaaruri; gonne Rara o batla ba ba ntseng jalo go nna baobamedi ba gagwe." 
John4:24 Modimo ke Mowa; mme ba ba o obamelang ba na le go o obamela ka mowa le ka boammaaruri.” 
John4:25 Mosadi a mo raya a re: “Ke a itse fa Mesia a tla, yo o bidiwang Keresete; e tlaa re ene a tsile o tlaa re bolelela dilo tsotlhe.”" 
John4:26 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Nna yo ke buang nao, ke nna ene.”" 
John4:27 Foo barutwa ba gagwe ba tla; ba gakgamala ka a bua le mosadi; le fa go ntse jalo ope a se ka a re: “O batlang?” kgotsa: “O buelang nae?” 
John4:28 Jalo mosadi a tlogela nkgwana ya gagwe; a ya mo motseng, a raya batho a re:" 
John4:29 “Tlaang lo bone monna yo o mpoleletseng dilo tsotlhe tse ke ntseng ka nna ka di dira le bogologolo. A e ka nna ene Keresete?” 
John4:30 Ba tswa mo motseng, mme ba ya kwa go ene." 
John4:31 Ya re mo bakeng loo barutwa ba mo rapela ba re: “Rabi, a ko o je.”" 
John4:32 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ke na le sejo se ke se jang, se lo sa se itseng.”" 
John4:33 Foo barutwa ba raana ba re: “A mongwe o tsile a mo tsholetse dijo go ja?” 
John4:34 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Sejo sa me ke go dira go rata ga yo o nthomileng, le go wetsa tiro ya gagwe." 
John4:35 A ga lo re: ‘Go setse dikgwedi di le nne pele ga thobo ya mabele’? Bonang, ke a lo raya: Lebang, lo bone masimo, fa a setse a le masweu a go rojwa." 
John4:36 Yo o robang o tshola tuelo, a phuthele botshelo jo bo sa khutleng loungo; gore yo o jalang le yo o robang ba itumele mmogo." 
John4:37 Gonne lefoko le, le boammaaruri ka gone mo, jaaka go twe: ‘Mongwe o a jala, mme o sele a robe.’" 
John4:38 Ke lo romile lwa ya go roba mo lo se kang lwa go direla; ba sele ba dirile, mme lona lo tsenye mo tirong ya bone.”" 
John4:39 Basamaria ba le bantsi ba motse o, ba mo dumela ka ntlha ya lefoko la mosadi, yo o supileng a re: “O mpoleletse dilo tsotlhe tse ke ntseng ka nna ka di dira le bogologolo.”" 
John4:40 Jalo e rile Basamaria ba sena go fitlha kwa go ene, ba mo rapela gore a tlhole nabo; mme a tlhola teng malatsi a le mabedi." 
John4:41 Mme ga dumela batho ba le bantsi gape ka lefoko la gagwe; 
John4:42 ba raya mosadi ba re: “Jaanong re a dumela, e seng ka ntlha ya go bolela ga gago fela; gonne ka rosi re mo ikutlwetse, mme re a itse fa ruri motho yo e le Mmoloki wa lefatshe.”" 
John4:43 E rile malatsi a mabedi ao a sena go feta, a tswa teng a ya Galilea," 
John4:44 gonne Jesu ka esi a supa fa moperofeti a se na tlotlo mo lefatsheng la ga gabo. 
John4:45 Jalo e rile a fitlha mo Galilea, Bagalilea ba mo tshola, ka ba bonye dilo tsotlhe tse o di dirileng kwa Jerusalema ka lobaka lwa modiro; gonne le bone ba ne ba ile modirong." 
John4:46 Mme a tloga a ya gape kwa Kana wa Galilea, kwa o fetotseng metsi bojalwa jwa mofine teng. Ga bo go le motho mongwe wa kgosana, yo morwawe o lwalang kwa Kaperenaume." 
John4:47 Ya re a utlwa fa Jesu a dule kwa Jutea a tsile mo Galilea, a ya kwa go ene, a mo rapela gore a fologe, a ye go fodisa morwawe; gonne o ne a le gaufi le go swa." 
John4:48 Foo Jesu a mo raya a re: “Fa lo sa bone ditshupo le dikgakgamatso, ga lo ketla lo dumela gope.”" 
John4:49 Motho wa kgosana a mo raya a re: “Morena, a ko o fologe ngwanake a ise a swe.”" 
John4:50 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Tsamaya fela, morwao o tshedile.” Monna yo a dumela lefoko le Jesu o le buileng nae, mme a tsamaya." 
John4:51 Ya re a sa ntse a fologa, batlhanka ba gagwe ba mo kgatlhantsha, ba bolela fa morwawe a tshedile." 
John4:52 Jalo a ba botsa nako e o simolotseng go fola ka yone. Mme ba mo raya ba re: “E rile maabane ka nako ya bongwe ka tshokologo letshoroma la mo tlogela.” 
John4:53 Jalo rraagwe a itse fa e ne e le ka nako e Jesu o mo reileng ka yone a re: “Morwao o tshedile;” mme go le ene le ba ntlo ya gagwe, ba dumela botlhe fela." 
John4:54 E bile ke sone sesupo sa bobedi se Jesu o se dirileng, a sena go tla mo Galilea a tswa kwa Jutea." 
John5:1 Morago ga dilo tse ga bo go le modiro mongwe wa Bajuta; mme Jesu a tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema. 
John5:2 Jaana go na le lekadiba mo Jerusalema, fa kgorong ya dinku, le le bidiwang Betheseta mo puong ya Sehebere, le na le diobo di le tlhano." 
John5:3 Mo diobong tse ga bo go le bontsi jwa balwetse, difofu, le batlhotsi le ba ba omeletseng, ba lebeletse kgobero ya metsi." 
John5:4 (Gonne moengele o ne a tle a fologele mo lekadibeng motlha mongwe, mme a kgobere metsi; ke gone yo e leng wa ntlha go tsena, metsi a sena go kgoberwa, a fole, le fa e ka ne e le pobolo efe e e mo tshwereng.)" 
John5:5 Mme ga bo go le monna mongwe teng yo o tshwerweng ke seemera ka dinyaga di le 38. 
John5:6 E rile Jesu a mmona a namaletse fa fatshe, a itse fa a sa bolo go nna mo popegong e e ntseng jalo, a mo raya a re: “A o rata go fola?”" 
John5:7 Molwetse a mo fetola a re: “Morena, ga ke na motho ope yo e a reng metsi a kgoberwa a ntsenye mo lekadibeng; e a tle e re ke sa ntse ke tla mongwe a fologele pele ga me.”" 
John5:8 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Namologa, o tseye bolao jwa gago, o tsamaye.”" 
John5:9 Monna yo a fola fela ka bonako, a tsaya bolao jwa gagwe, a tsamaya. Jaana letsatsi leo ya bo e le la Sabata." 
John5:10 Jalo Bajuta ba raya yo o fodisitsweng ba re: “Go Sabata, ga go a letlelelwa gore o ka tsaya bolao jwa gago.”" 
John5:11 A ba fetola a re: “Yo o mphodisitseng ke ene yo o ntheileng a re: ‘Tsaya bolao jwa gago o tsamaye.’ ” 
John5:12 Ba mmotsa ba re: “E mang monna yo o go reileng a re: ‘Tsaya bolao jwa gago o tsamaye’?” 
John5:13 Mme ene yo o fodisitsweng a bo a sa itse gore e ne e le mang; gonne Jesu o na a itsamaetse fela, ka go ne go le bontsi jwa batho mo felong foo." 
John5:14 Ya re morago ga moo, Jesu a mo fitlhela mo tempeleng, a mo raya a re: “Bona, o fodisitswe; o se ka wa tlhola o leofa, e se re kgotsa se se bosula bogolo sa go wela.”" 
John5:15 Monna yo a tsamaya, a ya a bolelela Bajuta fa e le Jesu yo o mo fodisitseng." 
John5:16 Bajuta ba tloga ba bogisa Jesu ka ntlha ya gone moo, ba batla go mmolaya, ka a dira dilo tse ka Sabata." 
John5:17 Mme Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Rre o ntse a dira le gompieno, le nna ke a dira.”" 
John5:18 Bajuta ba gakalela bogolo go mmolaya ka moo, ka gobo ga se gore o tlola Sabata go le gosi, mme le gone a re Modimo ke Rraagwe tota, a itekanya le Modimo." 
John5:19 Foo Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, Morwa ga a na go dira sepe ka esi, fa e se se o bonang Rara a se dira; gonne dilo tse o di dirang, Morwa le ene o di dira fela jalo." 
John5:20 Gonne Rara o rata Morwa, mme o mo supetsa tsotlhe tse o di dirang, mme o tlaa mo supetsa ditiro tse dikgolo bogolo go tse, gore lo gakgamale." 
John5:21 Gonne jaaka Rara a tsosa baswi, a ba rudise, go ntse fela jalo, Morwa le ene o rudisa ba o ratang go ba rudisa." 
John5:22 Rara ga a atlhole motho ope, mme katlholo yotlhe o e neetse Morwa;" 
John5:23 gore botlhe ba tlotle Morwa fela jaaka ba tlotla Rara. Yo o sa tlotleng Morwa ga a tlotle Rara yo o mo romileng. 
John5:24 “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, yo o utlwang lefoko la me, mme a dumela yo o nthomileng, o na le botshelo jo bo sa khutleng, mme ga a tle mo tshekisong; o dule mo losong o fetetse mo botshelong." 
John5:25 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, lobaka lo etla, le gompieno lo fitlhile, lo baswi ba tlaa utlwang lentswe la Morwa Modimo ka lone; mme ba ba utlwang ba tlaa tshela." 
John5:26 Gonne jaaka Rara a na le botshelo mo go ene ka esi, o neetse Morwa le ene jalo, gore a nne le botshelo mo go ene ka esi." 
John5:27 O mo neetse thata ya go dira katlholo, ka e le Morwa Motho." 
John5:28 Se gakgamaleleng mo, gonne lobaka lo etla, lo botlhe ba ba mo diphupung ba tlaa utlwang lentswe la gagwe ka lone." 
John5:29 Mme ba tlaa tswa; ba ba dirileng molemo ba tswele tsogelong ya botshelo; mme ba ba dirileng bosula ba tswele tsogelong ya tshekiso. 
John5:30 “Ga ke na go dira sepe ke le nosi; ke atlhola jaaka ke utlwa; mme katlholo ya me e siame; ka gobo ke sa batle go rata ga me, fa e se go rata ga yo o nthomileng." 
John5:31 “Fa ke supa ka ga me, tshupo ya me e be e se ya ammaaruri." 
John5:32 Ke o sele yo o supang ka ga me; mme ke a itse fa tshupo e o e supang ka ga me e le ya ammaaruri. 
John5:33 Lo romile kwa go Johane, mme o supile ka ga boammaaruri." 
John5:34 Tshupo e ke e amogelang ga e tswe mo mothong; le fa go ntse jalo dilo tse ke di bua gore lo bolokwe. 
John5:35 Ene e ne e le lobone lo lo tukang, lo lo phatsimang; mme lwa rata go itumela ka lobaka mo leseding la gagwe." 
John5:36 Tshupo e ke nang nayo e kgolo go feta ya ga Johane; gonne ditiro tse Rara o di nneetseng go di wetsa, e bong tsone ditiro tse ke di dirang, di supa ka ga me, fa Rara a nthomile." 
John5:37 Le Rara yo o nthomileng o supile ka ga me, lona ga lo ise lo ko lo utlwe lentswe la gagwe gope, le fa e le go bona popego ya gagwe." 
John5:38 Le lefoko la gagwe ga le a nna mo go lona; gonne ene yo o mo romileng ga lo mo dumele. 
John5:39 Lo a tle lo fukutse dikwalo, ka lo itlhoma lo na le botshelo jo bo sa khutleng mo go tsone; tseo ke tsone tse di supang ka ga me;" 
John5:40 lo gana go tla mo go nna gore lo bone botshelo. 
John5:41 “Ga ke amogele tlotlo mo bathong. 
John5:42 Lona ke a lo itse fa lo se na lorato lwa Modimo mo go lona ka losi. 
John5:43 Ke tsile ka leina la ga Rre, mme ga lo ntshole; fa o sele a tla ka leina la gagwe ka esi, ene lo tlaa mo tshola." 
John5:44 Ana lo ka dumela jang, lona ba lo amogalanang tlotlo, mme tlotlo e e tswang mo go o e leng Modimo o o osi, lo sa e batle?" 
John5:45 Lo se ka lwa gopola gore ke tlaa lo baya molato kwa go Rara; go na le mongwe yo o lo bayang molato, e bong Moše yo lo tlhomileng tsholofelo ya lona mo go ene." 
John5:46 Gonne fa lo ka bo lo dumetse Moše le nna lo ka bo lo ntumetse; gonne o kwadile ka ga me. 
John5:47 Fa lo sa dumele dikwalo tsa gagwe, ana mafoko a me a molomo lo tlaa a dumela jang?”" 
John6:1 E rile morago ga dilo tse, Jesu a tsamaya a tshelela kwa moseja ga lewatle la Galilea, le e leng lewatle la Tiberia." 
John6:2 Bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho jwa mo latela, ka ba bonye ditshupo tse o di dirileng mo go ba ba lwalang." 
John6:3 Mme Jesu a tlhatlogela mo thabeng, a dula gone le barutwa ba gagwe." 
John6:4 Jaana Tlolaganyo, modiro wa Bajuta, ya bo e le gaufi." 
John6:5 Foo ka Jesu a tsholetsa matlho, a bona fa bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho bo tla mo go ene, a raya Filipo a re: “Re tlaa reka kae dinkgwe, gore batho ba, ba je?”" 
John6:6 Mo a go bua go mo leka, gonne ene ka esi o na a itse se o tlaa se dirang." 
John6:7 Filipo a mo fetola a re: “Dinkgwe tse di ka rekwang ka diponto di le 20 ga di ka ke tsa ba lekana, le fa mongwe le mongwe a fiwa go le gobotlana.”" 
John6:8 Mongwe wa barutwa ba gagwe, e bong Anterea, mogoloa Simone Petere, a mo raya a re:" 
John6:9 “Go na le mosimane fa, yo o tshotseng dinkgwe di le tlhano tsa barele, le ditlhapi di le pedi; mme tseo e tlaa bo e le eng mo bontsing jo bo kanakana?”" 
John6:10 Jesu a re: “Rayang batho ba dule fa fatshe.” Jaana bojang bo ne bo le bogolo gone foo. Batho ba dula fa fatshe, palo ya bone e ka ne e le 5 000." 
John6:11 Foo Jesu a tsaya dinkgwe; ya re a sena go leboga, a di abela batho ba ba dutseng; le tsone ditlhapi a di dira jalo, ka fa ba ratang ka teng." 
John6:12 Mme ya re ba sena go kgora, a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Selang dikabetla tse di setseng, gore go se ka ga latlhega sepe.”" 
John6:13 Ba di sela, ba tlatsa diroto di le 12 ka dikabetla tsa dinkgwe tsa barele tse di siilweng ke ba ba jeleng." 
John6:14 E rile batho ba bona sesupo se o se dirileng, ba re: “Ammaaruri, yo, ke ene moperofeti yo o tlang mo lefatsheng.”" 
John6:15 Mme Jesu, ka a lemoga fa ba tlaa tloga ba tla go mo tsaya ka thata go mo dira kgosi, a ngongwaelela kwa thabeng a le esi." 
John6:16 E rile go le maabanyane, barutwa ba gagwe ba fologela kwa lewatleng;" 
John6:17 ba tsena mo mokorong, ba tshela lewatle ba ya Kaperenaume. Ga bo go setse go le lefifi jaanong, Jesu a bo a ise a tle kwa go bone." 
John6:18 Lewatle la bo le rwalelesega ka ntlha ya phefo e kgolo e e fokang. 
John6:19 Ke gone e rileng ba sena go tsamaisa mokoro sebaka sa dikilometara di magareng a botlhano le borataro, ba bona Jesu a tsamaya mo godimo ga lewatle, a atamela fa mokorong; mme ba boifa." 
John6:20 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ke nna; se boifeng.” 
John6:21 Foo ba itumela go mo tsholela mo mokorong; mokoro wa akofa wa tshwara lefatshe le ba yang kwa go lone. 
John6:22 Ya re ka moso bontsi jo bo emeng kwa moseja ga lewatle ba fitlhela fa go se na mokoro ope o sele teng, fa e se o le mongwe fela, mme ba itse fa Jesu a se ka a tsena mo mokorong le barutwa ba gagwe, barutwa ba gagwe ba ne ba tsamaile ba le bosi fela." 
John6:23 Le fa go ntse jalo ga tla mekoro mengwe e tswa kwa Tiberia, kwa gaufi le felo fa ba jetseng senkgwe teng, Morena a sena go leboga." 
John6:24 Ke gone, e rile batho ba bantsi ba fitlhela fa Jesu a seyo teng, le fa e le barutwa ba gagwe, le bao ka bosi ba tsena mo mekorong, ba ya go fitlha kwa Kaperenaume, ba batla Jesu." 
John6:25 Mme ya re ba mmona kwa moseja ga lewatle, ba mo raya ba re: “Rabi, o tsile leng kwano?”" 
John6:26 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, lo a mpatla, e seng ka gobo lo bonye ditshupo, mme e le ka gobo lo jele dinkgwe, lwa kgora." 
John6:27 Se direleng dijo tse di nyelelang, direlang dijo tse di nnelang go ya go fitlha botshelong jo bo sa khutleng, tse Morwa Motho o tlaa di lo nayang; gonne ke ene yo Rara, e bong Modimo, o mmeileng lotshwao.”" 
John6:28 Foo ba mo raya ba re: “Re na le go dirang, gore re dire ditiro tsa Modimo?”" 
John6:29 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Tiro ya Modimo ke e, gore lo dumele mo go ene yo o mo romileng.”" 
John6:30 Foo ba mo raya ba re: “O dirang fela se e leng sesupo, gore re bone, re be re dumele mo go wena? O dirang?" 
John6:31 Borraetsho ba ne ba ja mana mo nageng; jaaka go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘O ba neile senkgwe se se tswang legodimong go se ja.’ ” 
John6:32 Foo Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, e ne e se Moše yo o lo neileng senkgwe se se tswang legodimong; mme Rre o lo naya senkgwe sa ammaaruri se se tswang legodimong;" 
John6:33 gonne senkgwe sa Modimo ke se se fologang se tswa legodimong, mme se naya lefatshe botshelo.”" 
John6:34 Foo ba mo raya ba re: “Morena, re neye senkgwe seo ka metlha yotlhe.”" 
John6:35 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ke nna senkgwe sa botshelo; yo o tlang mo go nna, ga a ketla a bolawa ke tlala, le yo o dumelang mo go nna, ga a ketla a nyorwa gope." 
John6:36 Ke lo reile ka re, lo mponye, le fa go ntse jalo ga lo dumele." 
John6:37 Botlhe ba Rara o ba nnayang ba tlaa tla mo go nna; mme yo o tlang mo go nna, ga nketla ke mo kgoromeletsa ntle gope." 
John6:38 Gonne ke fologile kwa legodimong, ke sa tle go dira go rata ga me, fa e se go rata ga yo o nthomileng." 
John6:39 Go rata ga yo o nthomileng, ke gore, gotlhe mo o go nneileng ke se ka ka latlhegelwa ke sepe, fa e se gore ke tle ke se tsose mo letsatsing la bofelo." 
John6:40 Gonne go rata ga Rre ke mo, gore mongwe le mongwe yo o bonang Morwa Modimo, a mo dumela, a bone botshelo jo bo sa khutleng; mme ke tlaa mo tsosa mo letsatsing la bofelo.”" 
John6:41 Foo Bajuta ba ngongorega ka ga gagwe, ka gobo a rile: “Ke nna senkgwe se se fologileng se tswa legodimong.”" 
John6:42 Ba re: “Yo, a ga se Jesu morwa Josefe, yo borraagwe le mmaagwe re ba itseng? O bua jang gompieno, a re: ‘Ke fologile ke tswa legodimong’?”" 
John6:43 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Se ngongoregeng mo go lona. 
John6:44 Ga go motho ope yo o ka tlang mo go nna, fa Rara yo o nthomileng a sa mo goge, mme ke tlaa mo tsosa mo letsatsing la bofelo." 
John6:45 Go kwadilwe mo baperofeting ga twe: ‘Ba tlaa rutwa ke Modimo botlhe fela.’ Mongwe le mongwe yo o utlwileng mo go Rara, mme a ithutile, o tla mo go nna." 
John6:46 Ga se gore mongwe o kile a bona Rara, fa e se yo o tswang kwa Modimong, ke ene yo o bonyeng Rara." 
John6:47 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya: Yo o dumelang mo go nna o na le botshelo jo bo sa khutleng." 
John6:48 Ke nna senkgwe sa botshelo. 
John6:49 Borraeno ba kile ba ja mana mo nageng, mme ba sule." 
John6:50 Se ke sone senkgwe se se fologang se tswa legodimong, gore motho a se je, mme a se ka a swa." 
John6:51 Ke nna senkgwe se se tshedileng se se fologileng se tswa legodimong; fa motho le fa e le mang a ja senkgwe se, o tlaa tshela ka bosakhutleng; ee, le gone senkgwe se ke tlaa se ntshang ke nama ya me, gore e nne botshelo jwa lefatshe.”" 
John6:52 Foo Bajuta ba nna kgang ba re: “Ana motho yo, o ka re naya nama ya gagwe jang go e ja?”" 
John6:53 Foo Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, fa lo sa je nama ya Morwa Motho, fa lo sa nwe madi a gagwe, ga go na botshelo mo go lona." 
John6:54 Yo o jang nama ya me, a ba a a nwa madi a me, o na le botshelo jo bo sa khutleng; mme ke tlaa mo tsosa mo letsatsing la bofelo." 
John6:55 Gonne nama ya me ke sejo ruri, le madi a me ke seno ruri." 
John6:56 Yo o jang nama ya me, a ba a a nwa madi a me, o ntse mo go nna, le nna mo go ene." 
John6:57 Jaaka Rara yo o tshedileng a nthomile, mme ke tshela ka ntlha ya ga Rara; jalo le ene yo o njang, o tlaa tshela ka ntlha ya me." 
John6:58 Se ke sone senkgwe se se fologileng se tswa legodimong, ga se mo go etsang jaaka borara ba kile ba ja, mme ba sule; yo o jang senkgwe se, o tlaa tshela ka bosakhutleng.”" 
John6:59 Dilo tse a di bua mo ntlong ya thuto, ka a ruta mo Kaperenaume." 
John6:60 Barutwa ba gagwe ba le bantsi, ba re ba utlwa jalo, ba re: “Lefoko le ke lefoko le le thata; e mang yo o ka le utlwang?”" 
John6:61 Mme Jesu, ka a itse ka esi fa barutwa ba gagwe ba ngongoregetse mo, a ba raya a re: “A golo mo go a lo kgopisa?" 
John6:62 Ana lo ne lo tlaa reng fa lo bona Morwa Motho a tlhatlogela kwa o ne a le teng pele? 
John6:63 Mowa ke one o rudisang; nama ga e thuse sepe; mafoko a ke a buileng le lona, ke one a a leng mowa, e bile a botshelo." 
John6:64 Mme go na le bangwe ba lona ba ba sa dumeleng.” Gonne Jesu o ne a itse, le ka tshimologo, ba e leng bone ba ba sa dumeleng, le yo o tlaa mo okang." 
John6:65 Mme a re: “Ke gone ke lo reileng ka re, ga go motho ope yo o ka tlang mo go nna, fa a se ka a go newa ke Rara.”" 
John6:66 Ya re ka moo barutwa ba gagwe ba le bantsi ba tenega, ba se ka ba tlhola ba tsamaya nae." 
John6:67 Ke gone Jesu a raya ba ba 12 a re: “A le lona lo rata go tsamaya?” 
John6:68 Simone Petere a mo raya a re: “Morena, ana re ka ya kwa go mang? Wena o na le mafoko a botshelo jo bo sa khutleng." 
John6:69 Re dumetse, re bile re a itse fa e le wena Moitshepi wa Modimo.”" 
John6:70 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “A ga ke a lo itshenkela, lona ba ba 12, mme mongwe wa lona ke diabolo?”" 
John6:71 Mme a bo a bua ka ga Jutase morwa Simone Isekariote, gonne e le ene yo o tlaa mo okang, e le mongwe wa ba 12." 
John7:1 Morago ga dilo tse Jesu a sala a ntse a tsamaya mo Galilea, gonne a gana go tsamaya mo Jutea, ka Bajuta ba senka go mmolaya." 
John7:2 Jaana modiro wa Bajuta, e bong modiro wa Metlaagana, wa bo o le gaufi." 
John7:3 Foo bomonnawe ba mo raya ba re: “Tloga mono, o ye kwa Jutea, gore barutwa ba gago le bone ba bone ditiro tsa gago tse o di dirang." 
John7:4 Gonne ga go motho ope yo o dirang sengwe mo sephiring, mme ene ka esi a senka go itsiwe mo ponalong. Fa o dira dilo tse, iponaletse lefatshe.”" 
John7:5 Gonne le e leng bone bomonnawe ba ne ba sa dumele mo go ene. 
John7:6 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Lobaka lwa me ga lo ise lo tle; mme lobaka lwa lona lo a bo lo ntse lo etleetsegile gale. 
John7:7 Lefatshe ga le ka ke la ila lona; mme nna le a nkila, ka gobo ke supa ka ga lone, fa ditiro tsa lone di le bosula." 
John7:8 A go ye lona kwa modirong; nna ke tlaa nama ke ise ke ye kwa modirong o, ka lobaka lwa me ga lo ise lo dirale.”" 
John7:9 Ya re a sena go bua dilo tse nabo, a nama a sa tlhotse mo Galilea." 
John7:10 E rile bomonnawe ba sena go ya kwa modirong le ene a sala a ya, e seng mo ponalong, ya ne e kete ka go iphitlha." 
John7:11 Ke gone Bajuta ba mmatla mo modirong ba re: “O kae?” 
John7:12 Ga nna ngongorego e kgolo mo matshutitshuting a batho ka ga gagwe; bangwe ba re: “Ke motho yo o molemo,” ba bangwe ba re: “Nnyaa, o timetsa batho.”" 
John7:13 Le fa go ntse jalo ga bo go se na motho ope yo o buang ka ga gagwe mo ponong, ka go boifa Bajuta." 
John7:14 E rile jaana go setse go le fa gare ga modiro, Jesu a tlhatlogela kwa tempeleng, mme a ruta." 
John7:15 Foo Bajuta ba gakgamala ba re: “Ana motho yo o itse jang dikwalo, ka a se ka a ithuta gope?”" 
John7:16 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Thuto ya me, ga se ya me; ke ya yo o nthomileng." 
John7:17 Fa motho le fa e le mang a rata go dira go rata ga gagwe, o tlaa itse ka ga thuto, gore a e tswa mo Modimong, kgotsa ke ipuisa fela." 
John7:18 Yo o ipuisang fela, o senka go ikgalaletsa, mme yo o senkang go galaletsa yo o mo romileng, mme ke ene wa boammaaruri, ga go na tshiamololo epe mo go ene." 
John7:19 A Moše ga a a lo naya molao, le fa go ntse jalo go bo go se ope wa lona yo o dirang molao? Lo senkelang go mpolaya?”" 
John7:20 Batho ba bantsi ba mo fetola ba re: “O na le diabolo; e mang yo o senkang go go bolaya?” 
John7:21 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ke dirile tiro nngwe, mme lwa gakgamala lotlhe." 
John7:22 Moše o lo neile bogwera ka ntlha ya gone mo – e se gore bo tswa mo go Moše, mme bo tswa mo go borara – mme lo tle lo rupise motho go le Sabata." 
John7:23 Mme fa motho a rupisiwa go le Sabata, gore molao wa ga Moše o se ka wa tlolwa; a lo bogale le nna, ka gobo motho ke mo fodiseditse ruri go le Sabata?" 
John7:24 Se atlholeng ka fa ponong ya matlho, mme atlholang ka katlholo e e siameng.”" 
John7:25 Ke gone bangwe ba Jerusalema ba re: “A ga se ene yo ba mo senkang go mmolaya? 
John7:26 Bonang, o bua mo ponong, mme ga ba mo reye sepe. A ruri balaodi ba a itse fa yo e le Keresete?" 
John7:27 Le fa go ntse jalo monna yo re a mo itse kwa o tswang teng; mogang Keresete o tlang, go tlaa bo go sa itse ope kwa o tswang teng.”" 
John7:28 Foo Jesu a buela godimo mo tempeleng, a ruta a re: “Go le nna lo a nkitse, le kwa ke tswang teng, lo a go itse; mme ga ke a itere, mme yo o nthomileng o ammaaruri, yo lo sa mo itseng." 
John7:29 Nna ke a mo itse; gonne ke tswa kwa go ene, mme o nthomile.”" 
John7:30 Foo ba senka go mo tshwara; mme go se ka ga dira le ope yo o mo tsenyang diatla, ka lobaka lwa gagwe lo ne lo ise lo tle." 
John7:31 Mme mo bontsing jwa batho ba le bantsi, ba mo dumela; ba re: “Mogang Keresete o tlang, a o tlaa dira ditshupo tse di fetang tse monna yo o di dirileng?”" 
John7:32 Bafarisai ba utlwa jaaka batho ba bantsi ba sebetsanya dilo tse ka ga gagwe; mme ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le Bafarisai ba roma maotlana, gore ba ye go mo tshwara." 
John7:33 Foo Jesu a re: “Ke sa na le lona ka lobakanyana, mme ke tloga ke ya kwa go yo o ntlhomileng." 
John7:34 Lo tlaa mpatla, mme ga lo ketla lo mphitlhela; le kwa ke teng, ga lo ka ke lwa ya go fitlha teng.”" 
John7:35 Foo Bajuta ba raana ba re: “Ana monna yo o tlaa ya kae kwa re se ketlang re mo fitlhela teng? A o tlaa ya kwa Phalading e e kwa Bagerikeng, a ya go ruta Bagerika?" 
John7:36 Ana lefoko le ke eng, le o le buileng, a re: ‘Lo tlaa mpatla, mme ga lo ketla lo mphitlhela; le kwa ke teng, ga lo ka ke lwa ya go fitlha teng’?”" 
John7:37 Jaana ya re ka letsatsi la bofelo, e bong letsatsi le legolo la modiro, Jesu a ema, a buela godimo a re: “Fa mongwe a nyorilwe, a a tle mo go nna, a nwe." 
John7:38 Yo o dumelang mo go nna, dinoka tsa metsi a a tshedileng di tlaa ela di tswa mo mpeng ya gagwe, jaaka dikwalo di buile.”" 
John7:39 Golo mo, a go bua ka ga Mowa, o ba ba dumetseng mo go ene ba ne ba tlaa o amogela, gonne Mowa o ne o ise a abiwe, ka Jesu a ise a galalediwe." 
John7:40 Bangwe mo bontsing jwa batho ya re ba utlwa mafoko, a, ba re: “Ammaaruri, yo ke ene moperofeti.”" 
John7:41 Ba bangwe, ba re: “Yo ke Keresete.” Bangwe ba re: “Ao! A Keresete o tswa kwa Galilea?" 
John7:42 A dikwalo ga di a re: Keresete o tswa mo losikeng lwa ga Dafite, le kwa Bethelehema, motsana o Dafite o neng a nna mo go one?”" 
John7:43 Jalo ga tsoga kgaogano mo bontsing jwa batho ka ga gagwe. 
John7:44 Bangwe ba rata go mo tshwara; mme go se ka ga nna ope yo o mo tsenyang diatla. 
John7:45 Foo maotlana a boela kwa ditlhogong tsa baperesiti le kwa Bafarisaing; mme ba ba raya ba re: “Lo ne lo sa tleleng nae?” 
John7:46 Maotlana a ba fetola a re: “Ga go ise go ko go bue motho ope jaaka ene.” 
John7:47 Foo Bafarisai ba a fetola ba re: “A le lona lo timeditswe? 
John7:48 A bangwe ba balaodi, kgotsa ba Bafarisai, ba dumetse mo go ene?" 
John7:49 Batho ba ba bantsi ba ba sa itseng molao, ba hutsegile.”" 
John7:50 Nikotemo – e bong ene yo o ne a ile kwa go Jesu gale, e le mongwe wa bone – a ba raya a re:" 
John7:51 “A molao wa rona o tle o sekise motho o ise o utlwe mo go ene pele, mme o itse se o se dirang.”" 
John7:52 Ba mo fetola ba re: “A le wena o wa Galilea? Botsisa, mme o bone fa go sa tswe moperofeti ope mo Galilea.”" 
John7:53 Mme mongwe le mongwe a ya kwa ga gagwe. 
John8:1 Jesu a tswela kwa Thoteng ya Lotlhware. 
John8:2 Ya re ka moso, ka maphakela, a ba a tla gape mo tempeleng, mme batho botlhe ba tla kwa go ene; mme a dula, a ba ruta." 
John8:3 Mme bakwadi le Bafarisai ba tlisa mosadi yo o tshwerweng mo boakeng; ya re ba sena go mmaya fa gare," 
John8:4 ba mo raya ba re: “Moruti, mosadi yo, o tshwerwe mo boakeng, fela mo go jone." 
John8:5 Jaana Moše o re laotse mo molaong, gore re kgobotletse yo o ntseng jalo ka maje, mme wena wa reng ka ga gagwe?”" 
John8:6 Mo ba go bua go mo leka gore ba bone ka fa ba ka mo nayang molato ka gone. Mme Jesu a inama, a kwala ka monwana mo mmung." 
John8:7 Mme ya re ka ba fela ba ntse ba mmotsa, a inamologa, a ba raya a re: “Yo o se nang boleo mo go lona, a a mo kolope ka lentswe pele.”" 
John8:8 A ba a inama gape a kwala ka monwana mo mmung. 
John8:9 Mme bone, ya re ba sena go utlwa jalo, ba tswa ka monokela, go simolola ka yo mogolo, go ya kwa go wa bofelo; mme Jesu a tlogelwa a le esi, le mosadi a ntse fa o neng a ntse teng fa gare." 
John8:10 Jesu a inamologa a mo raya a re: “Mosadi, ba kae? A ga o a ka wa sekisiwa ke ope?”" 
John8:11 A re: “Ga go ope, Morena.” Jesu a re: “Le nna ga ke go sekise; tsamaya fela, mme o se ka wa tlhola o leofa.”" 
John8:12 Jesu a ba a bua nabo a re: “Ke nna lesedi la lefatshe; yo o ntshalang morago ga a ketla a tsamaya mo lefifing, mme o tlaa nna le lesedi la botshelo.”" 
John8:13 Bafarisai ba mo raya ba re: “O supa ka ga gago; tshupo ya gago ga e ammaaruri.” 
John8:14 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Le fa ke supa ka ga me, tshupo ya me e ammaaruri; gonne ke a itse kwa ke tswang le kwa ke yang teng; lona ga lo itse kwa ke tswang le kwa ke yang teng." 
John8:15 Lona lo atlhola ka fa nameng; nna ga ke atlhole ope. 
John8:16 Ee, mme le fa ke atlhola, katlholo ya me e ammaaruri; gonne ga ke nosi, mme ke nna le Rara yo o nthomileng." 
John8:17 Ee, le mo molaong wa lona go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘Tshupo ya batho ba le babedi e ammaaruri.’" 
John8:18 Ke nna ke supang ka ga me, mme le Rara yo o nthomileng o a ntshupa.”" 
John8:19 Ba mo raya ba re: “Rraago o kae?” Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Go le nna ga lo nkitse, le Rre ga lo mo itse; fa lo ka bo lo nkitse, Rre le ene lo ne lo tlaa mo itse.”" 
John8:20 Mafoko a, a a bua a le mo ntlong ya dikhumo, ka a ruta mo tempeleng; mme go se ka ga dira le motho ope yo o mo tshwarang, ka lobaka lwa gagwe lo no lo ise lo tle." 
John8:21 Ke gone a ba a bua nabo gape a re: “Ke a tsamaya, mme lo tlaa mpatla, mme lo tlaa swela mo boleong jwa lona; kwa ke yang teng, ga lo ka ke lwa ya go fitlha teng.”" 
John8:22 Bajuta ba re: “A o tlaa ipolaya, ka e le fa a re: ‘Kwa ke yang teng, ga lo ka ke lwa ya go fitlha teng’?”" 
John8:23 A ba raya a re: “Lona lo tswa kwa tlase; nna ke tswa kwa godimo; lona lo ba lefatshe leno; nna ga ke wa lefatshe leno. 
John8:24 Ke gone ke lo reileng ka re: ‘Lo tlaa swela mo dibeng tsa lona;’ gonne fa lo sa dumele fa ke le ene, lo tlaa swela mo dibeng tsa lona.”" 
John8:25 Ba mo raya ba re: “O mang?” Jesu a ba raya a re: “Fela se ke sa leng ke se lo bolelela le mo tshimologong. 
John8:26 Ke na le dilo di le dintsi go di bua, le go di atlhola ka ga lona; le fa go ntse jalo, yo o nthomileng o ammaaruri; mme dilo tse ke di utlwileng mo go ene, ke tsone tse ke di buang le lefatshe.”" 
John8:27 Ga ba a ka ba lemoga fa a bua nabo ka ga Rara. 
John8:28 Foo Jesu a re: “E tlaa re lo sena go tlhatlosa Morwa Motho, ke gone lo tlaa itseng fa ke le ene; le gone lo tlaa itse fa ke sa dire sepe ka nosi, mme ke bua dilo tse fela jaaka Rara a nthutile." 
John8:29 Yo o nthomileng ke nna nae; ga a a ntlogela ke le nosi; gonne ke dira ka metlha yotlhe dilo tse di mo kgatlhang.” 
John8:30 Mme ya re a bua dilo tse fela, batho ba le bantsi ba dumela mo go ene." 
John8:31 Jesu a raya Bajuta bao ba ba dumetseng mo go ene, a re: “Fa lo nna mo lefokong la me, foo lo bo lo le barutwa ba me ruri;" 
John8:32 lo tlaa itse boammaaruri, mme boammaaruri bo tlaa lo golola.”" 
John8:33 Ba mo fetola ba re: “Re losika lwa ga Aberahame, mme ga re ise re ke re nne mo botlhankeng jwa ga ope gope; o bua jang, wa re: ‘Lo tlaa gololwa’?”" 
John8:34 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, mongwe le mongwe yo o leofang ke motlhanka wa boleo." 
John8:35 Motlhanka ga a nne mo ntlong ka bosakhutleng; Morwa ene, o nna ka bosakhutleng." 
John8:36 Ke gone fa Morwa a tlaa lo golola, lo tlaa gololesegela ruri." 
John8:37 Ke a itse fa lo le losika lwa ga Aberahame; le fa go ntse jalo lo senka go mpolaya, ka gobo lefoko la me le sa bone kgoro mo go lona." 
John8:38 Ke bua dilo tse ke di bonyeng mo go Rre; le lona lo dira dilo tse lo di utlwileng mo go rraeno.” 
John8:39 Ba mo fetola ba re: “Rraetsho ke Aberahame.” Jesu a ba raya a re: “Fa lo ne lo le bana ba ga Aberahame, lo ka bo lo dira ditiro tsa ga Aberahame." 
John8:40 Jaanong lo senka go mpolaya, ke le motho yo ke lo boleletseng boammaaruri, jo ke bo utlwileng mo Modimong; golo mo Aberahame ga a ka a go dira." 
John8:41 Lo dira ditiro tsa Rraeno.” Ba mo raya ba re: “Ga re a tsalelwa mo dikgoreng; Rraetsho o mongwe fela, e bong Modimo.”" 
John8:42 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Fa Modimo e ka bo e le Rraeno, lo ka bo lo nthata; gonne ke tsile ke tswa kwa Modimong; gonne le gone ga ke a tla ka ga me, mme one o nthomile." 
John8:43 Ana ga lo tlhaloganyetseng puo ya me? Ke ka gobo lo sa ka ke lwa utlwa lefoko la me. 
John8:44 Lo ba ga rraeno diabolo, le dithato tsa ga rraeno ke tsone tse lo ratang go di dira. Ene o sa le a nna mmolai le mo tshimologong, mme a se ka a ema mo boammaaruring, ka go ne go se na boammaaruri mo go ene. E re fa a bua maaka, o bua mo e leng ga gagwe, gonne ke moaki, le rra one maaka." 
John8:45 Ga lo ntumele ka gobo ke bolela boammaaruri. 
John8:46 Ke ofe wa lona yo o ka tlhomamisang boleo mo go nna? Fa ke bolela boammaaruri, ga lo ntumeleleng?" 
John8:47 Yo e leng wa Modimo o utlwa mafoko a Modimo; ke gone ka fa lo sa a utlweng ka gone, ka gobo lo se ba Modimo.”" 
John8:48 Bajuta ba mo fetola ba re: “A ga re bue sentle, fa re re: ‘O Mosamaria, mme o na le diabolo’?”" 
John8:49 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ga ke na diabolo, mme ke tlotla Rre; lona lo a ntlontlolola." 
John8:50 Ga ke senke go ikgalaletsa; go na le mongwe yo o senkang, le yo o atlholang." 
John8:51 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, fa motho a tshegetsa lefoko la me, ga a ketla a bona loso gope.”" 
John8:52 Bajuta ba mo raya ba re: “Jaanong re a itse fa o na le diabolo. Aberahame o sule le baperofeti; mme wena wa re: ‘Fa motho a tshegetsa lefoko la me ga a ketla a utlwa loso gope.’ 
John8:53 A o mogolo go feta rraetsho Aberahame yo o suleng? Le baperofeti ba sule; o itira mang?” 
John8:54 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Fa ke ikgalaletsa, kgalalelo ya me e bo e se sepe. Rre ke ene yo o nkgalaletsang; yo lona lo reng ke Modimo wa lona." 
John8:55 Lona ga lo mo itse, mme nna ke a mo itse; fa nka bo ke re, ga ke mo itse, nka bo ke tshwana le lona, ka nna moaki, mme ke a mo itse, ke bile ke tshegeditse lefoko la gagwe." 
John8:56 Rraeno Aberahame o ne a itumela go bona letsatsi la me; mme a le bona a leboga.” 
John8:57 Bajuta ba mo raya ba re: “Ga o ise o nne dinyaga di le 50, mme a o bonye Aberahame?”" 
John8:58 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, pele Aberahame a ise a nne, nna ka bo ke ntse ke leyo.”" 
John8:59 Ba tsaya maje go mo kolopa ka one; mme Jesu a iphitlha, a tswa mo tempeleng (a ba ralala fa gare, mme a feta fela jalo)." 
John9:1 Ya re a feta, a bona motho yo o sa leng a tsalwa a foufetse." 
John9:2 Barutwa ba gagwe ba mmotsa ba re: “Rabi, go ne go leofile mang, a monna yo, kgotsa batsadi ba gagwe, fa e bo ne ne a tsetswe a foufetse?”" 
John9:3 Jesu a ba fetola, a re: “Go ne go sa leofa monna yo, le fa e le batsadi ba gagwe; e ne e le gore ditiro tsa Modimo di tle di bonadiwe mo go ene." 
John9:4 Re na le go dira ditiro tsa yo o nthomileng go sa ntse go le motshegare; bosigo bo etla, jo go se nang ope yo o ka dirang mo go jone." 
John9:5 E re fa ke sa ntse ke le mo lefatsheng, ke be ke le lesedi la lefatshe.”" 
John9:6 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a kgwela mathe fa fatshe, a duba seretse ka mathe, mme a mo tshasa seretse mo matlhong," 
John9:7 a mo raya a re: “Ya o tlhape mo lekadibeng la Siloame,” - ke go re, Romilwe, fa go phuthololwa. Mme a tloga a tsamaya, a ya a tlhapa, mme a tla a bona." 
John9:8 Foo ba ga gabo le ba ba mmonyeng gale fa e le mokopi, ba re: “Yo, a ga se ene yo o ne a tle a nnele go kopa?”" 
John9:9 Ba bangwe ba re: “Ke ene.” Ba bangwe ba re: “Nnyaa, o tshwana nae.” Mme ene a re: “Ke nna.”" 
John9:10 Ba mo raya ba re: “Fa e le jalo, matlho a gago a foufolotswe jang?”" 
John9:11 A ba fetola a re: “Monna yo go tweng Jesu, a duba seretse, a se ntshasa mo matlhong, a nthaya a re: ‘Ya mo Siloame, o tlhape,’ mme ka tsamaya, ka ya ka tlhapa, mme ka foufologa.”" 
John9:12 Ba mo raya ba re: “Ene o kae?” A re: “Ga ke itse.” 
John9:13 Ba mo isa kwa Bafarisaing, ene yo e rileng gale a bo a foufetse." 
John9:14 Jaana ga bo go le Sabata mo tsatsing leo Jesu a dubileng seretse, a mo foufolola matlho ka lone." 
John9:15 Bafarisai ba ba ba mmotsa gape ka fa o foufologileng ka teng. A ba raya a re: “O mpeile seretse mo matlhong, mme ka tlhapa, mme ke a bona.”" 
John9:16 Bafarisai bangwe ba re: “Monna yoo ga a a tswa Modimong, gonne ga a ilele Sabata.” Ba bangwe ba re: “Motho yo e leng moleofi o ka dira ditshupo tse di ntseng jalo jang?” Ga nna kgaogano mo go bone." 
John9:17 Ba ba ba raya monna wa sefofu gape ba re: “Wena wa reng ka ga gagwe, ka e le fa a foufolotse matlho a gago?” A re: “Nna ka re, ke moperofeti.”" 
John9:18 Bajuta ba belaela ka ga gagwe, gore a jaana o kile a ne a foufetse, a ba a foufologa, ba ba ba tla ba bitsa batsadi ba yo o foufologileng." 
John9:19 Ba ba botsa ba re: “A yo ke ene ngwana wa lona yo lo reng o tsetswe a foufetse? Mme o bona jang gompieno?” 
John9:20 Batsadi ba gagwe ba ba fetola ba re: “Re a itse fa yo e le ngwana wa rona, a bile a ne a tsetswe a foufetse;" 
John9:21 mme ga re itse ka fa o bonang ka teng gompieno; le yo o mo foufolotseng matlho ga re mo itse. Botsang ene, o godile, o tlaa ikarabela.”" 
John9:22 Batsadi ba gagwe ba bua dilo tse ka go boifa Bajuta; gonne Bajuta ba ne ba dumalanye gale, gore, fa mongwe a ka mo ipolela fa e le Keresete, ba tlaa mo kgaola mo ntlong ya thuto." 
John9:23 Ke gone batsadi ba gagwe ba reng: “O godile, botsang ene.”" 
John9:24 Jalo monna yo o neng a foufetse ba mmitsa lwa bobedi, ba mo raya ba re: “Naya Modimo kgalalelo; re a itse fa monna yo e le moleofi.”" 
John9:25 Foo a ba fetola a re: “Kgotsa a o moleofi, ga ke itse; sengwe ke a se itse, ka re, ke ne ke foufetse, mme gompieno ke a bona.”" 
John9:26 Ba mo raya ba re: “O go dirileng? O go foufolotse matlho jang?” 
John9:27 A ba fetola a re: “Ke lo boleletse gompieno jaana, mme ga lo a ka lwa utlwa; lo ratelang go ba lo go utlwa? A le lona lo rata go tswa barutwa ba gagwe?”" 
John9:28 Ba mo gobolola ba re: “Wena o morutwa wa gagwe; rona re barutwa ba ga Moše. 
John9:29 Re a itse fa Modimo a buile le Moše; mme ka ga monna yoo, ga re itse kwa o tswang teng.”" 
John9:30 Monna a ba fetola a re: “Ana golo mo go gakgamatsa jang! Ka lo sa itse kwa o tswang gone, le fa go ntse jalo, nna o mphoufolotse matlho." 
John9:31 Re a itse fa Modimo o sa utlwe baleofi; mme fa motho le fa e le mang e le moobamedi wa Modimo, a ba a dira go rata ga one, yoo o a mo utlwa." 
John9:32 E sa le ka tlholego ya lefatshe ga go ise go ke go utlwiwe fa mongwe a kile a foufolola matlho a motho yo o tsetsweng a foufetse. 
John9:33 Fa motho yo a sa tswe Modimong, o ne a sa ka ke a dira sepe.”" 
John9:34 Ba mo fetola ba re: “O tsaletswe fela mo dibeng, mme a o a re ruta?” Mme ba mo kgaolela ntle." 
John9:35 Jesu a utlwa fa ba mo kgaotse; ya re a mo fitlhela, a mo raya a re: “A o dumela mo go Morwa Modimo?”" 
John9:36 A fetola a re: “Ene ke mang, Morena, gore ke dumele mo go ene?”" 
John9:37 Jesu a mo raya a re: “O mmonye, e bile ke ene yo o buang nao.”" 
John9:38 A re: “Morena ke a dumela.” Mme a mo obamela. 
John9:39 Jesu a re: “Ke tletse katlholo mo lefatsheng leno, gore ba ba sa boneng ba bone; le gore ba ba bonang ba foufale.”" 
John9:40 Bafarisai ba ba neng ba na nae ba utlwa dilo tse, mme ba mo raya ba re: “A le rona re foufetse?”" 
John9:41 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Fa lo ka bo lo ne lo foufetse lo ka bo lo se na boleo; mme ke fa, lwa re, lo a bona; boleo jwa lona bo sa le teng." 
John10:1 “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, yo o sa tseneng ka kgoro mo sakeng la dinku, mme a pagama ka go sele, ke ene legodu le senokwane." 
John10:2 Mme yo o tsenang ka kgoro, ke modisa wa dinku." 
John10:3 Ene molebedi wa kgoro o a tle a mmulele; mme dinku di utlwe lentswe la gagwe; a bitse tse e leng dinku tsa gagwe ka maina, a di bolotse." 
John10:4 E re a sena go bolotsa tse e leng tsa gagwe tsotlhe, a di etelele pele, dinku di mo sale morago; gonne di itse lentswe la gagwe." 
John10:5 Mme moeng ene, ga di ketla di mo sala morago, mme di tlaa mo tshaba; gonne ga di itse lentswe la baeng.”" 
John10:6 Setshwantsho se Jesu a se bua nabo; mme ba se ka ba tlhaloganya dilo tse o di buang nabo, gore ke dife." 
John10:7 Jesu a ba a ba raya gape a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, ke nna kgoro ya dinku." 
John10:8 Botlhe ba ba tsileng ba nkema pele ke magodu le dinokwane; mme dinku ga di a ka tsa ba utlwa. 
John10:9 Ke nna kgoro, fa motho le fa e le mang a tsena ka nna, o tlaa bolokwa, o tlaa tsena a ba a tswa, mme o tlaa bona bofulo." 
John10:10 Legodu ga le tle, fa e se gore le utswe, le go bolaya, le go senya; nna ke tsile gore di bone botshelo, mme di bo bone ka letlolo." 
John10:11 “Ke nna modisa yo o molemo; modisa yo o molemo o beela dinku botshelo jwa gagwe. 
John10:12 Yo o thapilweng ka tuelo, e se modisa, yo dinku e seng tsa gagwe, o bona phiri e tla, a tlogele dinku, a tshabe; mme phiri e di tshware, e di falatse." 
John10:13 O tshaba ka gobo e le mothapiwa ka tuelo fela, a sa re sepe ka dinku." 
John10:14 Ke nna modisa yo o molemo; tse e leng tsa me ke a di itse, le tse e leng tsa me di a nkitse," 
John10:15 fela jaaka Rara a nkitse, le nna ke itse Rara; mme ke beela dinku botshelo jwa me." 
John10:16 Ke bile ke na le dinku di sele, tse e seng tsa saka le; le tsone ke na le go di lere, mme di tlaa utlwa lentswe la me; mme di tlaa nna letsomane le le lengwe fela, le modisa a le mongwe fela." 
John10:17 “Ke gone Rara o nthatang, ka gobo ke baya botshelo jwa me, gore ke be ke bo tshole gape." 
John10:18 Ga go ope yo o bo ntseelang, ke bo ipeisa fela. Ke na le thata go bo baya, ke bile ke na le thata go ba ke bo tshola. Taolo e, ke e amogetse mo go Rre.”" 
John10:19 Ga ba ga tsoga kgaogano gape mo Bajuteng ka ntlha ya mafoko a. 
John10:20 Bantsi ba bone ba re: “O na le mewa e e maswe, o a tsenwa, lo mo reeletsang?”" 
John10:21 Ba bangwe ba re: “Tse ga se dipolelo tsa yo o tsenyweng ke mewa e e maswe. A mewa e e maswe e ka foufolola matlho a difofu?” 
John10:22 Ga bo go le modiro wa bošafatso mo Jerusalema; mme ga bo go le mariga. 
John10:23 Jesu a bo a tsamayatsamaya mo tempeleng, mo mathuding a ga Solomone." 
John10:24 Foo Bajuta ba mo phuthegela, ba mo raya ba re: “O tlaa re akgaakga mo pelaelong ka lobaka lo lokae? Fa o le ene Keresete, re bolelele ka thanolo.”" 
John10:25 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ke lo boleletse, mme ga lo dumele; ditiro tse ke di dirang ka leina la ga Rre, tsone di supa ka ga me." 
John10:26 Ga lo dumele, ka gobo lo se ba dinku tsa me." 
John10:27 Dinku tsa me di utlwa lentswe la me, ke a di itse, mme di ntshale morago;" 
John10:28 ke di naya botshelo jo bo sa khutleng; ga di ketla di nyelela gope, e bile ga go ope yo o tlaa di phamolang mo seatleng sa me." 
John10:29 Rre yo o di nneileng, o mogolo go botlhe; ga go ope yo o nonofileng go di phamola mo seatleng sa ga Rara." 
John10:30 Nna le Rara re mongwe fela.” 
John10:31 Bajuta ba ba ba tsaya maje go mo kgobotletsa ka one. 
John10:32 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ke lo bontshitse ditiro di le dintsi tse di molemo tsa ga Rara; lo nkgobotleletsa tiro efe ya tsone?” 
John10:33 Bajuta ba mo fetola ba re: “Ga re go kgobotleletse tiro e e molemo, fa e se tlhapatso, le ka ntlha ya gobo o re o le motho, o itira Modimo.”" 
John10:34 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “A ga go a kwalwa mo molaong wa lona ga twe: ‘Ke rile, lo medimo’?" 
John10:35 Fa a biditse bone medimo ba lefoko la Modimo le tsileng kwa go bone – mme lokwalo ga lo ka ke lwa tlolwa – 
John10:36 a lo raya ene yo Rara o mo itshepisitseng, a mo roma mo lefatsheng, lwa re: ‘O a tlhapatsa,’ ka gobo ke rile, ke Morwa Modimo?" 
John10:37 Fa ke sa dire ditiro tsa ga Rre, lo se ka lwa ntumela." 
John10:38 Fa ke dira tsone, le fa lo sa dumele nna, dumelang ditiro; gore lo itse, lo bo lo tlhaloganye, fa Rara a le mo go nna, le nna mo go Rara.”" 
John10:39 Ba ba ba senka gape go mo tshwara; mme a tswa mo diatleng tsa bone a tsamaya. 
John10:40 A ba a tsamaya gape a ya kwa moseja ga Joretane, kwa Johane o ne a ntse a kolobetsa teng pele; mme a nna gone." 
John10:41 Batho ba le bantsi ba ya kwa go ene ba re: “Le gale Johane ga a ka a dira sesupo sepe; mme dilo tsotlhe fela tse Johane o di buileng ka ga monna yo, e ne e le boammaaruri.”" 
John10:42 Mme batho ba le bantsi ba dumela mo go ene teng. 
John11:1 Jaana ga bo go lwala monna mongwe go twe Lasaro wa Bethania, motsana wa ga gabo Maria le Maretha mogoloe." 
John11:2 Maria yo ya bo e le ene yo o kileng a tlotsa Morena setlolo, a mo phimola dinao ka moriri wa gagwe, yo Lasaro kgaitsadie o lwalang." 
John11:3 Ke gone bokgaitsadie ba roma kwa go Jesu ba re: “Morena, bona, yo o mo ratang o a lwala.”" 
John11:4 Ya re Jesu a utlwa, a re: “Bolwetse jo ga se jwa loso, mme ke jwa kgalaletso ya Modimo, gore Morwa Modimo a galalediwe ka jone.”" 
John11:5 Jaana Jesu a bo a rata Maretha le monnawe, le Lasaro." 
John11:6 Ke gone ya re a utlwa fa a lwala, a nama a sa tlhotse malatsi a le mabedi mo felong fa o neng a le teng ka lobaka loo." 
John11:7 Morago ga moo a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “A re be re yeng gape kwa Jutea.” 
John11:8 Barutwa ba mo raya ba re: “Rabi, aitse Bajuta ba ne ba senka go go kgobotletsa ka maje jaanong fela jaana, mme a o bile o ya teng gape?”" 
John11:9 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “A dinako tsa motshegare ga di 12? Fa motho a tsamaya go le motshegare, ga a ke a kgotšwa, ka a bona lesedi la lefatshe leno." 
John11:10 Mme fa motho a tsamaya bosigo, o a tle a kgotšwe, ka lesedi le seyo mo go ene.”" 
John11:11 Dilo tse a di bua; mme morago ga mo a ba raya a re: “Lasaro, tsala ya rona, e robetse; mme ke a ya gore ke mo tsose mo borokong.”" 
John11:12 Barutwa ba mo raya ba re: “Morena, fa a robetse, o tlaa fola.”" 
John11:13 Jaana Jesu o ne a bua ka ga loso lwa gagwe; bone ba gopola fa a raya go ikhutsa ga boroko. 
John11:14 Jesu a ba bolelela ka thanolo a re: “Lasaro o sule. 
John11:15 Mme ka ga lona ke a itumela ka ke ne ke se teng, gore lo tle lo dumele; le fa go ntse jalo a re yeng kwa go ene.”" 
John11:16 Thomase yo o bidiwang Didimo, a raya barutwa ka ene a re: “Le rona a re tsamayeng, re tle re swe nae.”" 
John11:17 Jalo ya re Jesu a tla, a fitlhela a bile a setse a ntse malatsi a le mane mo phupung." 
John11:18 Jaana Bethania wa bo o le gaufi le Jerusalema, e ka ne e le sebaka sa dikilometara di ka nna tharo go tswa teng." 
John11:19 Bajuta ba le bantsi ba ne ba tsile matshedisong, mo go Maretha le Maria go ba gomotsa ka ga kgaitsadia bone." 
John11:20 Foo Maretha, ya re a utlwa fa Jesu a tla, a ya go mo kgatlhantsha; mme Maria a sala a dutse mo ntlong." 
John11:21 Maretha a raya Jesu a re: “Morena, fa o ka bo o ne o le fa, kgaitsadiake o ko a se ka a swa." 
John11:22 Le jaana ke a itse, gore le fa e le eng se o se lopang Modimo, Modimo o tlaa se go naya.”" 
John11:23 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Kgaitsadio o tlaa ba a tsoga.” 
John11:24 Maretha a mo raya a re: “Ke a itse fa a tlaa ba a tsoga mo go tsogeng ka letsatsi la bofelo.” 
John11:25 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ke nna tsogo le botshelo; yo o dumelang mo go nna, le fa a a swa, le fa go ntse jalo o tlaa tshela;" 
John11:26 le fa e le mang yo o tshelang, a ba a dumela mo go nna, ga a ketla a swa gope. A mo o a go dumela?”" 
John11:27 A mo raya a re: “Ee, Morena; ke dumetse fa o le Keresete, Morwa Modimo, e bong ene yo o tlang mo lefatsheng.”" 
John11:28 Ya re a sena go bua jalo a tsamaya, a ya go bitsa Maria monnawe ka go iphitlha, a re: “Moruti o fa, mme o a go bitsa.”" 
John11:29 Ene ya re a utlwa a nanoga ka bonako, a ya kwa go ene." 
John11:30 Jaana Jesu o ne a ise a fitlhe mo motsaneng, a sa ntse a le mo felong fa Maretha o kgatlhanyeng nae teng." 
John11:31 Foo Bajuta ba ba nang nae mo ntlong ba mo gomotsa, ya re ba bona fa Maria a nanoga ka bonako a tswela kwa ntle ba mo sala morago, ba gopola gore o ya kwa phupung, a ya go lelela teng." 
John11:32 Foo Maria a re a fitlha fa Jesu o leng teng, a mmona, a wela fa dinaong tsa gagwe, a mo raya a re: “Morena, fa o ka bo o ne o le fa, kgaitsadiake o ko a se ka a swa.”" 
John11:33 Ya re Jesu a mmona a lela, le Bajuta ba ba tsileng nae ba lela, a gogomoga mo moweng, a fuduega," 
John11:34 a re: “Lo mmeile kae?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Morena, tla o bone.”" 
John11:35 Jesu a lela. 
John11:36 Foo Bajuta ba re: “Bonang jaaka a ne a mo rata!” 
John11:37 Bangwe ba bone ba re: “A monna yo, yo o foufolotseng matlho a yo o neng a foufetse, a o ne a sa ka ke a dira le gone gore monna yo a se ka a swa?”" 
John11:38 Foo Jesu a ba a gogoma pelo gape, a fitlha fa phupung. Ya bo e le logaga, mme letlapa la bo le aegetswe mo go lone." 
John11:39 Jesu a re: “Tlosang letlapa.” Maretha, kgaitsadia yo o suleng, a mo raya a re: “Morena, gompieno o setse a nkga, gonne o tlhotse malatsi a le mane a sule.”" 
John11:40 Jesu a mo raya a re: “A ga ke a go raya ka re, fa o ne o dumela, o tlaa bona kgalalelo ya Modimo?”" 
John11:41 Jalo ba tlosa letlapa. Mme Jesu a lelala a re: “Rara, ke a go leboga ka o nkutlwile." 
John11:42 Ke ne ke itse fa o nkutlwa gale; mme ka bo ke buisiwa ke bontsi jwa batho jo bo emeng fa ba ntikanyeditse, ka re ba tle ba dumele fa o nthomile.”" 
John11:43 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a goa ka lentswe le le godileng a re: “Lasaro, tswa!”" 
John11:44 Yo o neng a sule a tswa, a sa fapilwe mabogo le maoto ka matsela a phitlho; sefatlhogo sa gagwe le sone se fapilwe ka letsela, Jesu a ba raya a re: “Mo fapololeng lo mo lese a tsamaye.”" 
John11:45 Foo bontsi jwa Bajuta ba ba tsileng mo go Maria, ba bona dilo tse Jesu o di dirileng, mme ba dumela mo go ene." 
John11:46 Bangwe ba bone ba tloga ba ya kwa Bafarisaing, ba ba bolelela dilo tse Jesu o di dirileng." 
John11:47 Foo ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le Bafarisai ba epa pitso, ba re: “Re dirang, gonne monna yo o dira ditshupo di le dintsi?" 
John11:48 Fa re mo lesa fela jaana, batho botlhe ba tlaa dumela mo go ene; Baroma ba tlaa tla ba tlosa bonno jwa rona le morafe wa rona.”" 
John11:49 Mongwe wa bone, go twe Kaiafase, e le moperesiti yo mogolo ka ngwaga oo, a ba raya a re: “Ga lo itse sepe." 
John11:50 Le gone ga lo tlhokomele fa go ka nna molemo mo go lona gore motho a le mongwe fela a swele sešaba, e seng morafe otlhe go nyelela.”" 
John11:51 Jaana golo mo a bo a sa go bue fela ka esi; mme ya re ka a le moperesiti yo mogolo ka ngwaga oo, a bo a bolelelapele fa Jesu a tlaa swela morafe." 
John11:52 E seng morafe oo o le osi, mme le gone e le gore a tle a phuthele gongwe bana ba Modimo ba ba faletseng." 
John11:53 Jalo go simolola fela ka letsatsi leo ba gakololana gore ba mmolaye. 
John11:54 Ke gone Jesu ga a ka a tlhola a tsamaya mo ponong mo Bajuteng, mme a tswa teng a ya kwa lefatsheng le le tshwaraganyeng le naga fela, kwa motseng o o bidiwang Eferaime; a ya a tlholatlhola teng le barutwa ba gagwe." 
John11:55 Jaana Tlolaganyo ya Bajuta e ne e le gaufi; batho ba le bantsi ba ba tswang mo lefatsheng ba tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema pele ga Tlolaganyo, ba ya go iitshekisa." 
John11:56 Ke gone ba batla Jesu, mme ba bua mmogo ba eme mo tempeleng, ba re: “Lo gopolang? A ke gore ga a ketla a tla mo modirong?”" 
John11:57 Jaana ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le Bafarisai ba bo ba laotse gore fa mongwe a itse kwa o leng teng, a go supe, gore ba mo tshware." 
John12:1 Ke gone e rileng malatsi a le marataro pele ga Tlolaganyo, Jesu a tla mo Bethania, kwa Lasaro o leng teng, yo Jesu o mo tsositseng mo baswing." 
John12:2 Jalo ba mo direla modiro wa maitseboa teng; Maretha a bo a emetse go ba tsholela dijo; Lasaro e le mongwe wa ba ba dutseng ba ja nae. 
John12:3 Foo Maria a tsaya setlolo sa nareto, e le se se tlhokegang thata, se le selekanyo sa bogare jwa litara, a tlotsa dinao tsa ga Jesu ka sone, a ba a mo phimola dinao ka moriri wa gagwe; mme ntlo ya tlala monko wa setlolo." 
John12:4 Jutase Isekariota mongwe wa barutwa ba gagwe, yo e leng ene yo o tlaa mo okang, a re:" 
John12:5 “Ana setlolo se se ne se sa rekisediweng sa bona diponto di le 30, mme ga abelwa bahumanegi?”" 
John12:6 Mo o go buile e seng ka gobo a gopotse bahumanegi; mme e re ka gobo a le legodu; mme e re ka a tshotse kgetsana ya madi, a itseele mo go tsenngwang mo go yone." 
John12:7 Foo Jesu a re: “Lo mme a se bolokele letsatsi la phitlho ya me. 
John12:8 Gonne bahumanegi lo na nabo ka metlha yotlhe, mme nna ga ke nne le lona ka metlha yotlhe.”" 
John12:9 Foo ba e leng batho fela ba Bajuta ba tlhaloganya fa a le teng; mme ba tla e seng ka ntlha ya ga Jesu a le esi, mme e le gore ba bone le ene Lasaro, yo o mo tsositseng mo baswing." 
John12:10 Ba e leng ditlhogo tsa baperesiti ba gakololana gore ba bolaye le ene Lasaro; 
John12:11 ka gobo e le ka ntlha ya gagwe fa Bajuta ba le bantsi ba tsamaile, mme ba dumela mo go Jesu." 
John12:12 Ya re ka moso bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho ba ba tsileng mo modirong, ka ba utlwa fa Jesu a tla Jerusalema," 
John12:13 ba tsaya dikala tsa makolane, ba tswa ba ya go mo kgatlhantsha, mme ba thela lošalaba ba re: “Hosana, go bakwe yo o tlang mo ineng la Morena, e bong Kgosi ya Iseraele.”" 
John12:14 Jesu e rile a bonye eselana, a e pagama, jaaka go kwadilwe ga twe:" 
John12:15 “O se ka wa boifa, wena morwadia Sione; bona, Kgosi ya gago e etla, e pagame eselana ya esele.”" 
John12:16 E rile pele barutwa ba gagwe ba se ka ba tlhaloganya dilo tse; mme ya re Jesu a sena go galalediwa, ba gakologelwa fa dilo tse di ne di kwadilwe ka ga gagwe, le gone fa ba kile ba mo direla dilo tse." 
John12:17 Batho ba bantsi ba e rileng a bitsa Lasaro go tswa mo phupung, a mo tsosa mo losong ba bo ba le teng, mme ba go supa." 
John12:18 Le bontsi jo bo ileng go mo kgatlhantsha, ba ya ka ntlha ya gone mo, ka ba utlwile fa a dirile sesupo se." 
John12:19 Foo Bafarisai ba raana ba re: “Bonang, jaaka lo sa fenye gope; aitsane lefatshe le ile go mo sala morago.”" 
John12:20 Jaana ga bo go le Bagerika bangwe mo go bone ba ba ileng go obama mo modirong; 
John12:21 bao ba ya kwa go Filipo, yo o leng wa Bethesaita wa Galilea, ba mo lopa ba re: “Morena, re rata ra bona Jesu.”" 
John12:22 Filipo a ya a bolelela Anterea, mme Anterea a tla a nna le Filipo, mme ba bolelela Jesu." 
John12:23 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Lobaka lo tsile, lo Morwa Motho o tlaa galalediwang ka lone." 
John12:24 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, fa tlhaka ya mabele e sa wele mo mmung, ya swa, e tle e nne yosi fela; mme fa e swa, e ungwe loungo lo logolo." 
John12:25 Yo o ratang botshelo jwa gagwe, bo a mo latlhegela; mme yo o ilang botshelo jwa gagwe mo lefatsheng leno, o tlaa bo bolokela botshelong jo bo sa khutleng." 
John12:26 Fa motho le fa e le mang a ntirela, a a ntshale morago; mme kwa ke teng motlhanka wa me le ene o tlaa nna teng; fa mongwe le fa e le mang a ntirela, Rara o tlaa mo tlotla." 
John12:27 “Jaanong mowa wa me o huduegile; mme ke tlaa reng? A ke tlaa re: ‘Rara, nkgolola mo lobakeng lo’? Mme ke tsile go fitlha mo lobakeng lo ka ntlha ya gone mo." 
John12:28 ‘Rara, galaletsa leina la gago.’ ” Mme ga tla lentswe le tswa legodimong la re: “Ke le galaleditse, mme ke tlaa ba ke le galaletsa gape.”" 
John12:29 Foo batho ba bantsi ba ba emeng teng, ba le utlwa, mme ba re: “Go ne go duma maru.” Ba bangwe ba re: “Moengele o buile nae.”" 
John12:30 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Lentswe le ga le a tla ka ntlha ya me, mme ke ka ntlha ya lona." 
John12:31 Jaanong go tshekiso ya lefatshe leno; jaanong kgosana ya lefatshe leno e tlaa kgoromelediwa kwa ntle. 
John12:32 Mme nna, fa ke tlhatlosiwa mo lefatsheng, ke tlaa gogela batho botlhe kwa go nna.”" 
John12:33 Mo a go bua go kaya mokgwa wa loso lo o tlaa lo swang. 
John12:34 Foo batho ba bantsi ba mo fetola ba re: “Re utlwile mo molaong fa Keresete a nnela ruri ka bosakhutleng; o bua jang, wa re, Morwa Motho o na le go tlhatlosiwa? Morwa Motho yo ke mang?”" 
John12:35 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Lesedi le sa ntse le le mo go lona ka lobakanyana. Sepelang lo sa ntse lo na le lesedi, gore lefifi le se lo tshware; e bile yo o sepelang mo lefifing ga a itse kwa o yang teng." 
John12:36 E re lo sa ntse lo na le lesedi, dumelang mo leseding, gore lo tle lo nne bana ba lesedi.” Dilo tse Jesu a di bua, mme a tsamaya, a ba iphitlhela." 
John12:37 Mme le fa a ne a dirile ditshupo tse dintsi tse fa pele ga bone, ga ba a ka ba dumela mo go ene;" 
John12:38 gore lefoko la ga Isaia moperofeti le dirale, le o le buileng a re: “Morena, mang yo o dumetseng polelo ya rona? Le letsogo la Morena le senoletswe mang?”" 
John12:39 Ba ne ba retelelwa ke go dumela ka ntlha ya gone mo, gonne Isaia o bile a re:" 
John12:40 “O ba foufaditse matlho, a thatafatsa pelo tsa bone; e se re kgotsa ba bona ka matlho, ba lemoga ka pelo, ba boa, mme ka ba fodisa.”" 
John12:41 Isaia a bua dilo tse, ka gobo a bona kgalalelo ya gagwe, mme a bua ka ga gagwe." 
John12:42 Le fa go ntse jalo, le mo balaoding, ba le bantsi ba dumela mo go ene; mme ba se ka ba mo ipolela ka ntlha ya Bafarisai, e se re kgotsa ba kgaolwa mo ntlong ya thuto." 
John12:43 Gonne ba ne ba rata kgalaletso ya batho bogolo go kgalaletso ya Modimo. 
John12:44 Jesu a buela godimo a re: “Yo o dumelang mo go nna, ga a dumele mo go nna, fa e se mo go yo o nthomileng." 
John12:45 Mme yo o mponang, o bona yo o nthomileng." 
John12:46 Ke tsile mo lefatsheng ke le lesedi, gore le fa e le mang yo o dumelang mo go nna a se ka a nna mo lefifing." 
John12:47 Fa mongwe le fa e le mang a utlwa mafoko a me, mme a sa a tshegetse, ga ke mo sekise, gonne ga ke a tla go sekisa lefatshe, fa e se go boloka lefatshe." 
John12:48 Yo o nkganang, mme a sa amogele mafoko a me, o na le mongwe yo o mo sekisang; lefoko le ke le buileng, ke lone le le tlaa mo sekisang mo letsatsing la bofelo." 
John12:49 Gonne ga ke a ipuisa fela; mme Rara yo o nthomileng ke ene yo o nneileng taolo ya se ke tlaa se bolelang, le ya se ke tlaa se buang." 
John12:50 Ke a itse fa taolo ya gagwe e le botshelo jo bo sa khutleng; ke gone dilo tse ke di buang, ke di bua fela jaaka Rara a di mpoleletse.”" 
John13:1 Jaana e rile pele ga modiro wa Tlolaganyo, Jesu ka a itse fa lobaka lwa gagwe lo fitlhile, lwa go tswa mo lefatsheng leno a ya go Rara, e re ka a ratile ba gagwe ba ba mo lefatsheng, a ba ratela ruri go ya bokhutlong." 
John13:2 Ya re ka lobaka lwa go jewa selalelo, diabolo a setse a tlhotlheleditse pelo ya ga Jutase Isekariote, morwa Simone, gore a mo oke," 
John13:3 Jesu, ka a itse fa Rara a mo neetse dilo tsotlhe mo diatleng, le jaaka a ne a tswa Modimong, a bile a ya Modimong," 
John13:4 a ema ka dinao mo selalelong, a baya diaparo tsa gagwe tsa ka fa godimo, mme a tsaya sephimolo, a ikgatlha ka sone." 
John13:5 Foo a thela metsi mo mogotswaneng, a simolola go tlhapisa dinao tsa barutwa, a di phimola ka sephimolo se o ikgatlhileng ka sone." 
John13:6 Jalo a tla mo go Simone Petere. Mme ene a mo raya a re: “Morena, a ke wena o ka ntlhapisang dinao?”" 
John13:7 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Se ke se dirang ga o se itse gompieno; mme o tlaa nama o se tlhaloganya.” 
John13:8 Petere a mo raya a re: “Ga o ketla o ntlhapisa dinao gope.” Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Fa ke sa go tlhapise, ga o na kabalano le nna.”" 
John13:9 Simone Petere a mo raya a re: “Morena, e seng dinao tsa me tsosi, mme le diatla tsa me le tlhogo ya me.”" 
John13:10 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Yo o sapileng ga a tlhoke go tlhapa fa e se mo dinaong fela, mme o ba a le montle gotlhe fela; le lona lo bantle, mme e seng lotlhe.”" 
John13:11 Gonne o ne a itse yo o tlaa mo okang; ke gone o rileng: “Ga lo bantle lotlhe.” 
John13:12 Jalo e rile a sena go ba tlhapisa dinao, le go tsaya diaparo tsa gagwe, a ba a dula, a ba raya a re: “A lo a itse se ke se lo diretseng?" 
John13:13 Lo tle lo mpitse Moruti le Morena, mme lo bo lo bua sentle, gonne ke ntse jalo." 
John13:14 Ke gone, fa nna yo ke leng Morena le Moruti, ke tlhapisitse dinao tsa lona, le lona lo tshwanetse go tlhapisanya dinao." 
John13:15 Gonne ke lo beetse sekao, gore le lona lo dire jaaka ke lo diretse." 
John13:16 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, motlhanka ga a mogolo go feta morena wa gagwe; le yo o romilweng ga a mogolo go feta yo o mo romileng." 
John13:17 Fa lo itse dilo tse, lo sego fa lo di dira." 
John13:18 “Ga ke bue ka ga lona lotlhe, ke a ba itse ba ke ba itshenketseng, mme ke gore lokwalo lo dirale lo lo reng: ‘Yo o jang senkgwe sa me, o ntsholeleditse serethe sa gagwe.’" 
John13:19 Jaanong ke lo bolelela go sa le gale, go ise go dirafale, gore e tle e re go dirafala, lo bo lo dumele fa ke le ene." 
John13:20 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, yo o tsholang yo ke mo romang o tshola nna; mme yo o tsholang nna o tshola ene yo nthomileng.”" 
John13:21 E rile Jesu a sena go bua jalo, a fuduega mo moweng, mme a supa a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, mongwe wa lona o tlaa nkoka.”" 
John13:22 Barutwa ba kobana, ba akabala gore o raya mang." 
John13:23 Mme fa lomating lwa bojelo, ga bo go le mongwe wa barutwa ba gagwe yo Jesu o mo ratang, a ikaegile fa sehubeng sa ga Jesu." 
John13:24 Foo Simone Petere a mo gwetlha, a mo raya a re: “Re bolelele yo Morena o buang ka ga gagwe.”" 
John13:25 Mme yoo, ya re jaaka a ikaegile fa sehubeng sa ga Jesu, a mo raya a re: “Morena, ke mang?”" 
John13:26 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Ke yo ke tlaa mo inelang thathana, ke e mo naya.” Jalo ya re a sena go ina thathana, a e naya Jutase morwa Simone Isekariote." 
John13:27 Ya re morago ga thathana, Satane a tsena mo go ene. Foo Jesu a mo raya a re: “Se o se dirang o se dire ka bonako.”" 
John13:28 Mme ga bo go se ope fa lomating lwa bojelo yo o itseng ka fa o buang lefoko le nae ka gone. 
John13:29 Gonne ya re ka Jutase a tshotse kgetsana ya madi, bangwe ba gopola gore Jesu o mo raya gore, a ye go rekela modiro dilo tse ba di tlhokang; kgotsa a abele bahumanegi sengwe." 
John13:30 Ke gone e rileng a sena go amogela thathana a akofa a tswela kwa ntle; mme ga bo go le bosigo. 
John13:31 Ke gone e rileng a sena go tswa, Jesu a re: “Jaanong Morwa Motho o galaleditswe, le Modimo o galaleditswe mo go ene;" 
John13:32 Modimo o tlaa mo galaleletsa mo go one ka osi, o tlaa akofa o mo galaletsa." 
John13:33 Banyana, ke sa ntse ke na le lona ka lobakanyana. Lo tlaa mpatla; mme jaaka ke reile Bajuta ka re: Kwa ke yang teng, ga lo ka ke lwa ya go fitlha teng; le gompieno ke bua jalo le lona." 
John13:34 Ke lo naya taolo e ntšha, ya go re, lo ratane; fela jaaka ke lo ratile go re, le lona lo ratane." 
John13:35 Batho botlhe ba tlaa itse fa lo le barutwa ba me ka mo, fa lo ratana.”" 
John13:36 Simone Petere a mo raya a re: “Morena, o ya kae?” Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Kwa ke yang teng ga o ka ke wa ntshala morago gompieno; mme o tlaa nama o ntatela.”" 
John13:37 Petere a mo raya a re: “Morena, ke bo ke sa ka ke ka go sala morago le fa e le gompieno, go bo go dirile jang? Aitse ke tlaa go beela botshelo jwa me.”" 
John13:38 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “A o a bo o tlaa mpeela botshelo jwa gago? Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a go raya, koko e tona ga e ketla e lela, o ise o bo o intatole gararo." 
John14:1 “A dipelo tsa lona di se huduege; lo dumela mo Modimong, dumelang le mo go nna." 
John14:2 Mo ntlong ya ga Rre, go na le manno a le mantsi; fa go ne go sa nna jalo, nka bo ke le boleletse; gonne ke ya go lo baakanyetsa bonno." 
John14:3 Mme fa ke ya go lo baakanyetsa bonno, ke tlaa tla gape, mme ke tlaa lo itsholela; gore kwa ke leng teng le lona lo nne teng." 
John14:4 Kwa ke yang teng lo itse tsela ya teng.” 
John14:5 Thomase a mo raya a re: “Morena, ga re itse kwa o yang teng; kana tsela re e itse jang?”" 
John14:6 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ke nna tsela, le boammaaruri, le botshelo; ga go tle ope mo go Rara fa e se ka nna." 
John14:7 Fa lo ne lo nkitsile, lo ka bo lo itsile le ene Rre; mme go tloga fano lo a mo itse, mme lo mmonye.”" 
John14:8 Filipo a mo raya a re: “Morena, re bontshe Rara, mme go tlaa bo go re lekanye.”" 
John14:9 Jesu a mo raya a re: “A ke gore ke ntse le lona lobaka lo lo kanakana, ga o ise o nkitse, Filipo? Yo o mponyeng o bonye Rara; o bua jang, wa re: ‘Re bontshe Rara’?" 
John14:10 A ga o dumele fa ke le mo go Rara, le Rara mo go nna? Mafoko a ke a buang le lona ga ke a ipuise ka nosi; mme Rara, ka a ntse mo go nna, o dira ditiro tsa gagwe." 
John14:11 Ntumelang fa ke le mo go Rara, le Rara a le mo go nna; fa go sa nna jalo, ntumelang ka ntlha ya ditiro fela ka tsosi." 
John14:12 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, yo o dumelang mo go nna, ditiro tse ke di dirang, le ene o tlaa di dira; o tlaa dira ditiro tse dikgolo go feta tse; gonne ke ya kwa go Rara." 
John14:13 Mme se lo tlaa se lopang, le fa e ka nna eng, ka leina la me, sone ke tlaa se dira, gore Rara a galalediwe mo go Morwawe." 
John14:14 Fa lo ntopa sengwe fela ka leina la me, sone ke tlaa se dira." 
John14:15 “Fa lo nthata lo tlaa tshegetsa ditaolo tsa me. 
John14:16 Mme ke tlaa rapela Rara, mme o tlaa lo naya Mogomotsi o sele, gore a nne le lona ka bosakhutleng," 
John14:17 e bong Mowa wa boammaaruri, o lefatshe le sa ka keng la o tshola; gonne ga le o bone, ga le o itse; lona lo a o itse; gonne o ntse le lona, mme o tlaa nna mo go lona." 
John14:18 “Ga nketla ke lo tlogela lo le masiela fela; ke tlaa tla kwa go lona. 
John14:19 E tlaa re kwa pelenyana, lefatshe le bo le sa tlhole le mpona; mme lona lo bo lo ntse lo mpona; e re ka ke tshedile, le lona lo tlaa tshela." 
John14:20 E tlaa re mo letsatsing leo lo tlaa itse fa ke le mo go Rre, le lona mo go nna, le nna mo go lona." 
John14:21 “Yo o nang le ditaolo tsa me, a di tshegetsa, ke ene yo o nthatang; mme yo o nthatang, o tlaa ratwa ke Rre, le nna ke tlaa mo rata, mme ke tlaa mo ipontsha.”" 
John14:22 Jutase – e seng Isekariote – a mo raya a re: “Morena, go dirile jang ka o tlaa ipontsha rona, mme e seng lefatshe?”" 
John14:23 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Fa motho a nthata, o tlaa tshegetsa lefoko la me; mme Rre o tlaa mo rata, mme re tlaa tla mo go ene, re dira bonno jwa rona mo go ene." 
John14:24 Yo o sa nthateng, ga a tshegetse mafoko a me; mme lefoko le lo le utlwang, ga se la me, ke la Rara yo o nthomileng." 
John14:25 “Dilo tse ke di buile le lona, ke sa ntse ke ntse le lona." 
John14:26 Mme Mogomotsi, e bong Mowa o o Boitshepo, yo Rara o tlaa mo romang ka leina la me, ene o tlaa lo ruta dilo tsotlhe; o tlaa lo gakolola tsotlhe tse ke di buileng le lona." 
John14:27 “Kagiso ke e tlogela le lona; kagiso ya me ke a e lo naya; ga ke lo neye jaaka lefatshe le tle le neye batho. A dipelo tsa lona di se fuduege, le gone a di se boife." 
John14:28 Lo utlwile jaaka ke lo reile ka re, ke a tsamaya, mme ke tlaa tla kwa go lona. Fa lo ne lo nthata lo ne lo tlaa itumela, ka gobo ke ya kwa go Rara; gonne Rara o mogolo bogolo go nna." 
John14:29 Jaana ke lo boleletse go sa le gale, go ise go dirafale, gore e tle e re go diretse lo bo lo dumele." 
John14:30 Ga nketla ke tlhola ke bua segolo le lona, gonne kgosana ya lefatshe e etla, mme ga e na sepe mo go nna;" 
John14:31 ke raya gore lefatshe le itse fa ke rata Rara, le jaaka Rara a nneile taolo, ke dira fela jalo. Nanogang, re tsweng mono." 
John15:1 “Ke nna mofine wa ammaaruri, Rre ke ene Mmaakanyi wa tshimo." 
John15:2 Kala nngwe le nngwe e e mo go nna, e e sa ungweng, o a e tlosa; mme kala nngwe le nngwe e e ungwang, o a e ntlafatsa, gore e ungwe bogolo." 
John15:3 Lona lo setse lo le bantle le jaana, ka ntlha ya lefoko le ke le buileng le lona." 
John15:4 Nnang mo go nna, le nna mo go lona. Jaaka kala e sa ka ke ya ungwa ka yosi, fa e sa nne mo mofineng; go ntse jalo le lona, fa lo sa nne mo go nna." 
John15:5 “Ke nna mofine, lona lo dikala; yo o nnang mo go nna, le nna mo go ene, ke ene yo o ungwang segolo, gonne kwa ntle ga me ga lo ka ke lwa dira sepe." 
John15:6 Fa motho a sa nne mo go nna, o latlhelwa kwa ntle jaaka kala, mme e omelele; batho ba di kgobokanye, ba di latlhele mo molelong, mme di jewe ke molelo." 
John15:7 Fa lo nna mo go nna, le mafoko a me a nna mo go lona, lopang se lo se ratang, mme lo tlaa se direlwa." 
John15:8 Rre o galalediwa ke mo, ke go re, fa lo ungwa segolo; jalo lo tlaa nna barutwa ba me." 
John15:9 Fela jaaka Rara a nthatile, le nna ke lo ratile; nnang mo loratong lwa me." 
John15:10 Fa lo tshegetsa ditaolo tsa me, lo tlaa nna mo loratong lwa me; fela jaaka ke tshegeditse ditaolo tsa ga Rre, mme ke ntse mo loratong lwa gagwe." 
John15:11 “Dilo tse ke di buile le lona, gore boitumelo jwa me bo nne mo go lona, le gore boitumelo jwa lona bo dirafale." 
John15:12 Taolo ya me ke e, gore lo ratane, fela jaaka le nna ke lo ratile." 
John15:13 Ga go ope yo o nang le lorato lo lo fetang lo, fa motho a ka beela ditsala tsa gagwe botshelo jwa gagwe." 
John15:14 Lona lo ditsala tsa me, fa lo dira dilo tse ke di lo laolelang." 
John15:15 Ga ke tlhole ke lo bitsa batlhanka; gonne motlhanka ga a itse se morena wa gagwe o se dirang; mme ke lo biditse ditsala; gonne dilo tsotlhe tse ke di utlwile mo go Rre, ke di lo itsisitse." 
John15:16 Ga lo a ka lwa intshenkela; ke nna ke itshenketseng lona, mme ka lo laolela go ya go ungwa, le gore loungo lwa lona lo tlhomame; gore e tle e re se lo se lopang Rara, le fa e ka nna eng, ka leina la me, a se lo neye." 
John15:17 Dilo tse ke a di lo laolela, gore lo ratane." 
John15:18 “Fa lefatshe le lo ila, lo a itse fa le nkidile pele, le ise le lo ile." 
John15:19 Fa lo ne lo le ba lefatshe, le ne le tlaa rata ba e leng ba lone; mme e re ka lo se ba lefatshe, mme ke lo itshenketse mo lefatsheng, ke gone lefatshe le lo ilang." 
John15:20 Gakologelwang lefoko le ke le buileng le lona, ka re: ‘Motlhanka ga a mogolo go feta morena wa gagwe.’ Fa ba mpogisitse, le lona ba tlaa lo bogisa; fa ba tshegeditse lefoko la me, le la lona ba tlaa le tshegetsa." 
John15:21 Dilo tsotlhe tse, ba tlaa di lo direla ka ntlha ya leina la me, ka gobo ba sa itse yo o nthomileng." 
John15:22 Fa ke ka bo ke se ka ka tla ka bua le bone, ba ka bo ba se na boleo; jaanong ga ba na seipato mo boleong jwa bone." 
John15:23 Yo o nkilang, o ila le ene Rre." 
John15:24 Fa ke ka bo ke se ka ka dira mo go bone ditiro tse ope o sele o se kang a di dira, ba ka bo ba se na boleo; mme jaanong ba mponye, ba bile ba idile nna le Rre." 
John15:25 Mo go a dirafala, gore lefoko le tlhomamisiwe, le le kwadilweng mo molaong wa bone, ga twe: ‘Ba nkidile ka bomo fela.’" 
John15:26 “E tlaa re fa Mogomotsi a tsile, yo ke tlaa mo romang mo go lona, a tswa kwa go Rara, e bong Mowa wa boammaaruri, o o tswang mo go Rara, ene o tlaa supa ka ga me;" 
John15:27 mme le lona lo a supa, gonne lo ntse lo na le nna go tswa kwa tshimologong." 
John16:1 “Dilo tse ke di buile le lona gore lo se ka lwa kgopisiwa ke batho. 
John16:2 Ba tlaa lo kgaola mo matlong a thuto. Ee, motlha o etla, o mongwe le mongwe yo o lo bolayang ka one, o tlaa gopola gore o direla Modimo." 
John16:3 Dilo tse ba tlaa di dira, ka gobo ba ntse ba sa itse Rara, le fa e le nna." 
John16:4 Dilo tse ke di buile le lona, gore e tle e re motlha wa tsone o tla, lo bo lo di gakologelwe ka fa ke lo boleletseng ka gone. “Dilo tse ga ke a ka ka di bua le lona mo tshimologong, ka gobo ke ne ke na le lona." 
John16:5 Jaanong ke ya kwa go ene yo o nthomileng; mme ga go ope wa lona yo o mpotsang, go re: ‘O ya kae?’" 
John16:6 Bohutsana bo tletsa ka dipelo tsa lona, ka gobo ke lo boleletse dilo tse." 
John16:7 Le fa go ntse jalo ke lo bolelela boammaaruri; go ka nna molemo ka ga lona fa ke tsamaya, gonne fa ke sa tsamaye, Mogomotsi ga a ketla a tla mo go lona; mme fa ke tsamaya, ke tlaa mo roma mo go lona." 
John16:8 Mme ene o tlaa re a tsile, o tlaa senolela lefatshe molato ka ga boleo, le ka ga tshiamo, le ka ga katlholo;" 
John16:9 ka ga boleo, ka gobo ba sa dumele mo go nna;" 
John16:10 ka ga tshiamo, ka gobo ke ya kwa go Rara, mme lo sa tlhole lo mpona;" 
John16:11 ka ga katlholo ka gobo kgosana ya lefatshe leno e atlhotswe. 
John16:12 “Ke sa na le dilo di le dintsi go di bua le lona, mme ga lo ka ke lwa di itshokela gompieno." 
John16:13 Le fa go ntse jalo, mogang one Mowa wa boammaaruri o tsileng, o tlaa lo gogela mo boammaaruri o tsileng, o tlaa lo gogela mo boammaaruring jotlhe; gonne ga o ketla o ipuisa ka osi; mme dilo tse o di utlwang le fa e ka nna dife, ke tsone tse o di buang; mme o tlaa lo bolelela dilo tse di tlaa tlang." 
John16:14 O tlaa nkgalaletsa; gonne o tlaa tsaya ga mo e leng ga me, o go lo bolelele." 
John16:15 Dilo tsotlhe fela tse Rara o nang natso ke tsa me; ke gone ke rileng, o tsaya ga mo e leng ga me, mme o tlaa go lo bolelela." 
John16:16 “E tlaa re ka lobakanyana, lo bo lo sa tlhole lo mpona; mme gape ka lobakanyana, lo tlaa mpona.”" 
John16:17 Foo bangwe ba barutwa ba gagwe ba raana ba re: “Mo o go buang le rona ke go reng, a re: ‘E tlaa re ka lobakanyana, lo bo lo sa mpone; mme gape, ka lobakanyana, lo tlaa mpona,’ gape, a re: ‘Ka gobo ke ya kwa go Rara’?”" 
John16:18 Ke gone ba reng: “Se o se buang ke eng, a re: ‘Ka lobakanyana’? Ga re itse se o se buang.”" 
John16:19 Jesu a lemoga fa ba rata go mmotsa, mme a ba raya a re: “A lo botsanya ka ga le, fa ke re: ‘E tlaa re ka lobakanyana lo bo lo sa mpone, mme gape ka lobakanyana, lo tlaa mpona’?" 
John16:20 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, lona lo tlaa lela, lo hutsafala mme lefatshe le tlaa itumela; lo tlaa nna le bohutsana, mme bohutsana jwa lona bo tlaa fetoga boitumelo." 
John16:21 Mosadi o na le bohutsana a le mo go belegeng, ka gobo lobaka lwa gagwe lo tsile; mme e a re a sena go belega ngwana, o a ba a sa tlhole a gakologelwa botlhoko, ka boitumelo jwa gore motho o tsaletswe mo lefatsheng." 
John16:22 Ke gone le lona lo na le bohutsana gompieno; mme ke tlaa ba ke lo bona, dipelo tsa lona di tlaa itumela, mme ga go ope yo o tlaa lo tlosetsang boitumelo jwa lona." 
John16:23 “Mo letsatsing leo ga lo ketla lo mpotsa sepe. Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a lo raya, fa lo lopa Rara sengwe, o tlaa se lo naya ka leina la me." 
John16:24 Ga lo ise lo ko lo lope sepe ka leina la me le gompieno; lopang, mme lo tlaa amogela, gore boitumelo jwa lona bo dirafale." 
John16:25 “Dilo tse ke di buile le lona ka diane; motlha o etla o ke se ketlang ke tlhola ke bua le lona ka diane ka one, mme ke tlaa lo bolelela ka thanolo ka ga Rara." 
John16:26 Mo tsatsing leo lo tlaa lopa ka leina la me; mme ga ke lo reye go re, ke tlaa lo rapelela Rara;" 
John16:27 gonne Rara ka esi o a lo rata, gonne lo nthatile, lo bile lo dumetse fa ke tswa kwa go Rara." 
John16:28 Ka tswa kwa go Rara, mme ke tsile mo lefatsheng; gape, ke tlogela lefatshe, ke ya kwa go Rara.”" 
John16:29 Barutwa ba gagwe ba re: “Bona, jaanong o bua ka thanolo, ga o bue seane." 
John16:30 Jaanong re a itse fa o itse dilo tsotlhe, mme o sa tlhoke gore motho ope a go botse; re a dumela ka mo fa o no o tswa Modimong.”" 
John16:31 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “A gompieno lo a dumela? 
John16:32 Bonang lobaka lo etla, ee, lo setse lo fitlhile, lo lo tlaa faladiwang ka lone, mongwe le mongwe a ya ga gabo, lo ntlogela ke le nosi, le fa go ntse jalo ga ke nosi, ka ke na le Rara." 
John16:33 Dilo tse ke di buile le lona, gore lo nne le kagiso mo go nna. Mo lefatsheng lo na le pitlagano; mme nametsegang; ke fentse lefatshe.”" 
John17:1 Jesu a bua dilo tse; mme a lelalela legodimong a re: “Rara, lobaka lo fitlhile; galaletsa Morwao gore Morwao a go galaletse;" 
John17:2 fela jaaka o mo neile taolo mo nameng yotlhe, e tle e re bone ba o ba mo neileng le fa e ka ne e le mang, a ba neye botshelo jo bo sa khutleng." 
John17:3 Botshelo jo bo sa khutleng ke jo, gore ba go itse, wena, Modimo o o osi, o o boammaaruri, le ene yo o mo romileng, e bong Jesu Keresete." 
John17:4 Ke go galaleditse mo lefatsheng, ka ke weditse tiro e o e nneetseng go e dira." 
John17:5 Mme jaana, Rara, a ko o nkgalaletse nao, ka kgalalelo e ke neng ke ntse ke na nayo nao pele lefatshe le ise le nne." 
John17:6 “Leina la gago ke le bontshitse batho ba o ba lomolotseng mo lefatsheng wa ba nnaya; e ne e le ba gago, mme wa ba nnaya, mme ba tshegeditse lefoko la gago." 
John17:7 Jaanong ba a itse fa dilo tsotlhe fela tse o di nneileng di tswa kwa go wena; 
John17:8 gonne mafoko a o a nneileng ke a neile bone; ba a tshotse, mme ba itsile fa ruri ke tswa kwa go wena, ba bile ba dumetse fa o nthomile." 
John17:9 Ke a ba rapelela; ga ke rapelele lefatshe, fa e se bone ba o ba nneileng, gonne ke ba gago;" 
John17:10 dilo tsotlhe tse e leng tsa me ke tsa gago, le tsa gago ke tsa me; mme ke galalediwa mo go tsone."
