John17:11 Ga ke tlhole ke le mo lefatsheng, mme bone ba mo lefatsheng, mme ke ya koo go wena. Rara yo o boitshepo, ba boloke ka leina la gago le o le nneileng, gore ba nne bangwe fela, jaaka rona." 
John17:12 Ke rile ke sa ntse ke nna nabo, ka ba boloka ka leina la gago le o le nneileng; ka ba femela, mme go se ka ga latlhega ope wa bone, fa e se ngwana wa tatlhego fela; gore lokwalo lo dirafale." 
John17:13 Jaana ke ya koo go wena; mme dilo tse, ke di bua mo lefatsheng, gore boitumelo jwa me bo dirale mo go bone ka bosi." 
John17:14 Ke ba neile lefoko la gago; mme lefatshe la ba ila, ka gobo ba se ba lefatshe, fela jaaka nna ke se wa lefatshe." 
John17:15 Ga ke rapele gore o ba ntshe mo lefatsheng, fa e se gore o ba dibele mo go yo o bosula." 
John17:16 Bone ga se ba lefatshe, fela jaaka nna ke se wa lefatshe." 
John17:17 Ba itshepise mo boammaaruring; lefoko la gago ke boammaaruri. 
John17:18 Jaaka o nthomile mo lefatsheng, le nna ke romile bone jalo mo lefatsheng." 
John17:19 Ke a iitshepisa ka ntlha ya bone, gore le bone ka bosi ba itshepisiwe mo boammaaruring." 
John17:20 “Le gone ga ke rapelele bone bosi, mme ke rapelela le ba ba dumelang mo go nna ka lefoko la bone;" 
John17:21 gore ba nne bangwe fela botlhe; fela jaaka wena Rara o le mo go nna, le nna mo go wena, gore le bone ba nne mo go rona, gore lefatshe le dumele fa o nthomile." 
John17:22 Le kgalalelo e o e nneileng, ke e neile bone, gore ba nne bangwe fela, jaaka rona re le mongwe fela." 
John17:23 Nna mo go bone, le wena mo go nna, gore ba dirwe boitekanelo mo bongwefeleng; gore lefatshe le itse fa o nthomile, le gore o rata bone, fela jaaka o ratile nna." 
John17:24 “Rara, ba o ba nneileng, ke rata gore kwa ke teng, le bone ka bo ke na nabo; gore ba bone kgalalelo ya me, e o e nneileng; gonne o nthatile pele ga tlholego ya lefatshe." 
John17:25 Rara yo o tshiamo, lefatshe ga le a ka la go itse, mme nna ke go itsile; le ba, ba itsile fa o nthomile." 
John17:26 Ke ba itsisitse leina la gago, mme ke tlaa nna ke le ba itsise; gore lorato lo o nthatileng ka lone lo nne mo go bone, le nna ke nne mo go bone.”" 
John18:1 E rile Jesu a sena go bua mafoko a, a tswa le barutwa ba gagwe, ba kgabaganya molatswana wa Kiterone, ba ya kwa go nang le tshimo teng, mme a tsena mo go yone, ene ka esi le barutwa ba gagwe." 
John18:2 Jaana Jutase, yo o mo okang, le ene a bo a itse felo foo, gonne Jesu o na a tle a ye teng gantsi le barutwa ba gagwe." 
John18:3 Foo Jutase, ka a bonye mophato wa batlhabani, le maotlana a a tswang kwa ditlhogong tsa baperesiti le Bafarisai, a tla teng a tshotse dipone, le ditime, le dibolao." 
John18:4 Ke gone Jesu, ka a itse dilo tsotlhe tse di tlaa mo tlelang, a ya go ba kgatlhantsha, a ba raya a re: “Lo batla mang?”" 
John18:5 Ba mo fetola ba re: “Jesu wa Nasaretha.” Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ke nna.” Mme Jutase yo o mo okang, le ene a bo a eme nabo." 
John18:6 Ke gone, e rileng a ba raya a re: “Ke nna,” ba kata ka morago, ba wela fa fatshe." 
John18:7 Foo a ba botsa gape, a re: “Lo batla mang?” Ba re: “Jesu wa Nasaretha.”" 
John18:8 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ke lo boleletse fa e le nna; mme ka re, fa lo batla nna, lesang ba ba tsamaye.”" 
John18:9 Gore lefoko le dirafale le o le buileng, a re: “Mo go ba o ba nneileng, ga ke a latlhegelwa ke ope.”" 
John18:10 Foo Simone Petere, ka a tshotse tšhaka, a e somola, a rema motlhanka wa moperesiti yo mogolo, a mo kgaola tsebe ya ka fa tsogong le legolo. Leina la motlhanka yoo, e ne e le Maleko." 
John18:11 Foo Jesu a raya Petere a re: “Somela tšhaka mo kgatleng; senwelo se Rara o se nneileng, a ga nketla ke se nwa?”" 
John18:12 Jalo mophato, o na le mong wa mophato, le maotlana a Bajuta, ba tshwara Jesu, ba mo golega." 
John18:13 Ba mo gogela kwa go Anase pele; ka gobo ene e le mogwagadia Kaiafase, yo e neng e le moperesiti yo mogolo ka ngwaga oo." 
John18:14 Aitse Kaiafase ke ene o gakolotseng Bajuta, gore go ka nna molemo motho a le mongwe fela a swela sešaba." 
John18:15 Simone Petere a latela Jesu, le morutwa yo mongwe a dira jalo. Jaana morutwa yo mongwe, yoo a bo a itsiwe ke moperesiti yo mogolo, mme a tsena le Jesu mo lwapeng lwa moperesiti yo mogolo;" 
John18:16 Petere o na a eme fa kgorong ka fa ntle. Foo morutwa yo mongwe, yo o itsiweng ke moperesiti yo mogolo, a tswela kwa ntle, a ya go bua le mosadi yo o disitseng kgoro, mme a isa Petere mo teng." 
John18:17 Foo lelata le le disitseng kgoro la raya Petere la re: “A le wena o mongwe wa barutwa ba monna yo?” A re: “Nnyaa.” 
John18:18 Jaana batlhanka le maotlana ba bo ba eme teng, ba gotsitse molelo o o magala; gonne go ne go le tsididi; ba bo ba ikomosa; Petere le ene a nna nabo, a eme a ikomosa." 
John18:19 Moperesiti yo mogolo a botsa Jesu ka ga barutwa ba gagwe, le ka ga thuto ya gagwe." 
John18:20 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Ke buile le lefatshe ka ponalo; gale ke ntse ke ruta mo matlong a thuto le mo tempeleng, kwa Bajuta botlhe ba phuthegelang teng; ga ke a buela sepe mo sephiring." 
John18:21 O mpoletsang? Botsa ba ba nkutlwileng, se ke se buileng nabo; bona bao ba itse dilo tse ke di buileng.”" 
John18:22 Ya re a sena go bua lefoko le, mongwe wa maotlana a a emeng teng a gatla Jesu ka thobane, a re: “A o fetola moperesiti yo mogolo jalo?”" 
John18:23 Jesu a mo fetlola a re: “Fa ke buile bosula, supa ka ga bosula, mme fa ke buile sentle, o nkgalelang?”" 
John18:24 Foo Anase a mo isa a golegilwe kwa go Kaiafase moperesiti yo mogolo. 
John18:25 Jaana Simone Petere a bo a eme a ikomosa. Mme ba mo raya ba re: “A le wena o mongwe wa barutwa ba gagwe?” A itatola a re: “Nnyaa.” 
John18:26 Mongwe wa batlhanka ba moperesiti yo mogolo, e le tsala ya yo Petere o mo kgaotseng tsebe, a re: “A ga ke a go bona o na nae kwa tshimong?”" 
John18:27 Foo Petere a ba a itatola gape; mme koko e tona ya akofa ya lela. 
John18:28 Ba tlosa Jesu fa go Kaiafase ba mo isa kwa ntlong ya tshekelo, mme ga bo go le ka maphakela; mme bone ka bosi ba se ka ba tsena mo ntlong ya tshekelo, gore ba se ka ba itshekololwa, e le gore ba je Tlolaganyo." 
John18:29 Foo Pilato a tswela kwa go bone a re: “Lo supa molato ofe mo monneng yo?” 
John18:30 Ba mo fetola ba re: “Fa monna yo e ka bo e se modira bosula, re ka bo re se ka ra mo go neela.”" 
John18:31 Foo Pilato a ba raya a re: “Mo itseeleng, lo mo sekise ka fa molaong wa lona.” Bajuta ba mo raya ba re: “Ga re a letlelelwa go bolaya motho ope,”" 
John18:32 e le gore lefoko la ga Jesu le dirafale, le o kileng a le bua ka a kaya mokgwa wa loso lo o tlaa lo swang." 
John18:33 Foo Pilato a tloga a boela mo ntlong ya tshekelo, mme a bitsa Jesu, a mo raya a re: “A ke wena Kgosi ya Bajuta?”" 
John18:34 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “A o bua lefoko le ka wesi, gongwe ba bangwe ba le go boleletse ka ga me?”" 
John18:35 Pilato a mo fetola, a re: “A ke Mojuta? Aitse morafe wa ga eno, le ditlhogo tsa baperesiti, ke bone ba ba go nneetseng. O dirileng?”" 
John18:36 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Bogosi jwa me ga se jwa lefatshe leno; fa bogosi jwa me e ka bo e le jwa lefatshe leno, batlhanka ba me ba ko ba tlhabana, gore ke se ka ka neelwa Bajuta; mme jaana bogosi jwa me ga se jwa mono.”" 
John18:37 Foo Pilato a mo raya a re: “Mme a o kgosi?” Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Wena wa re ke kgosi. Ke tsaletswe gone moo, mme ke tletse gone moo mo lefatsheng, gore ke supe ka ga boammaaruri. Mongwe le mongwe yo o leng wa boammaaruri o utlwa lentswe la me.”" 
John18:38 Pilato a mo raya a re: “Boammaaruri ke eng?” Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a ba a tswela gape kwa Bajuteng, a ba raya a re: “Ga ke bone molato mo go ene." 
John18:39 Mme lona e ne e re go le Tlolaganyo, lo na le temalo ya gore ke lo gololele mongwe, ke gone a lo rata ka lo gololela Kgosi ya Bajuta?”" 
John18:40 Foo ba goa ka thata gape ba re: “E seng monna yo, mme a e nne Barabase.” Mme Barabase ya bo e le senokwane." 
John19:1 Foo Pilato a tsaya Jesu, a mo seola." 
John19:2 Mme batlhanka ba loga serwalo sa mitlwa, ba se mo rwesa mo tlhogong, ba mo apesa kobo e e bohibidu jo bo mokgona." 
John19:3 Ba tla fa go ene ba re: “Dumela Kgosi ya Bajuta!” Mme ba mo gatla ka dithobane. 
John19:4 Mme Pilato a ba a tswa gape, a ba raya a re: “Bonang, ke mo ntshetsa kwano go lona, gore lo itse fa ke sa bone molato ope mo go ene.”" 
John19:5 Foo Jesu a tswa, a rwele serwalo sa mitlwa, a apere kobo e e bohibidu jo bo mokgona. Mme Pilato a ba raya a re: “Bonang, monna ke yo!”" 
John19:6 E rile ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le maotlana ba mmona, ba goa ka thata ba re: “Mmapole, mmapole!” Pilato a ba raya a re: “Mo itseeleng, lo mmapole, gonne nna ga ke bone molato ope mo go ene.”" 
John19:7 Bajuta ba mo fetola ba re: “Re na le molao, mme ka fa molaong oo, o tshwanetse go swa, ka gobo a itirile Morwa Modimo.”" 
John19:8 Ya re Pilato a utlwa lefoko leo, a boifa bogolo;" 
John19:9 a ba a tsena mo ntlong ya tshekelo gape, a raya Jesu a re: “O tswa kae?” mme Jesu ga a a ka a mo fetola." 
John19:10 Foo Pilato a mo raya a re: “A ga o bue le nna? A ga o itse fa ke na le thata ya go go golola, ke bile ke na le thata ya go go bapola?”" 
John19:11 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “O ka bo o se na thata epe mo go nna, fa o ne o sa e newa e tswa kwa godimo; ke gone yo o ntsentseng mo seatleng sa gago o na le boleo bogolo.”" 
John19:12 Foo Pilato a senka go mo golola, mme Bajuta ba goa ka thata, ba re: “Fa o golola monna yo, ga o tsala ya ga Kaesare; mongwe le mongwe yo o itirang kgosi o tlhabana le Kaesare.”" 
John19:13 E rile Pilato a utlwa mafoko a, a ntshetsa Jesu kwa ntle, mme a dula mo setulong sa tshekelo, mo felong fa go tweng, Bophaphato jwa Matlapa, mme mo puong ja Sehebere, go twe Gabatha." 
John19:14 Ya bo e le Iketleetso ya Tlolaganyo; e le nako ya sethoboloko. Mme a raya Bajuta a re: “Bonang kgosi ya lona!” 
John19:15 Foo ba goa ka thata ba re: “A a ye koo, a a ye koo, mmapole!” Pilato a ba raya a re: “A ke tlaa bapola kgosi ya lona?” Ditlhogo tsa baperesiti tsa mo fetola tsa re: “Ga re na kgosi epe fa e se Kaesare.”" 
John19:16 Foo a mo ba neela gore a bapolwe. 
John19:17 Foo ba tsaya Jesu, mme a tswela kwa ntle, a itshikaretse mokgoro, a ya felong fa go bidiwang, “Felo ga logata”, ka Sehebere, ga twe: Golegotha." 
John19:18 Ba mmapolela teng le ba bangwe ba le babedi nae, mongwe a le ka fa ntlheng nngwe, yo mongwe a le ka fa ntlheng e nngwe ya gagwe, Jesu a le fa gare." 
John19:19 Le gone Pilato a kwala lokwalo, a lo baya mo mokgorong. Mme ga bo go kwadilwe, go twe: “JESU WA NASARETHA KGOSI YA BAJUTA.”" 
John19:20 Foo Bajuta ba le bantsi ba bala lokwalo lo, gonne felo fa Jesu o bapoletsweng teng go ne go le gaufi le motse, mme ga bo go kwadilwe ka Sehebere, le Seroma, le Segerika." 
John19:21 Foo ditlhogo tsa baperesiti ba Bajuta tsa raya Pilato tsa re: “Se kwale go re: ‘Kgosi ya Bajuta’, mme o re: ‘Ene o rile: Ke kgosi ya Bajuta’.”" 
John19:22 Pilato a ba fetola a re: “Se ke se kwadileng ke se kwadile.” 
John19:23 Foo batlhabani e rile ba sena go bapola Jesu, ba tsaya diaparo tsa gagwe, ba di kgaoganya sene, motlhabani mongwe le mongwe a bona go le gongwe, le hempe ya gagwe jalo; hempe yone ya bo e se na moroko, e logilwe gotlhe fela." 
John19:24 Foo ba raana ba re: “A re se e gagole, a re e laoleng ka bola, gore re bone bo e tlaa nna ya ga mang.” E ne e le gore lokwalo lo dirafale, lo lo reng: “Diaparo tsa me ba di kgaogana, hempe ya me ba e laola ka bola.” Ke gone batlhabani ba dira dilo tse jalo." 
John19:25 Fa mokgorong wa ga Jesu ga bo go eme mmaagwe, le monnaa mmaagwe, e bong Maria mogatsa Keleopase, le Maria Magetalene." 
John19:26 Ya re Jesu a bona mmaagwe, le morutwa yo o mo ratang a eme teng, a raya mmaagwe a re: “Mosadi bona morwao!”" 
John19:27 Foo a raya morutwa yoo a re: “Bona mmaago!” Mme e sa le ka lobaka loo morutwa yoo a mo tshola, a ya go nna kwa ga gagwe." 
John19:28 Morago ga moo, ka Jesu a itse fa jaanong dilo tsotlhe di setse di weditswe, mme gore lokwalo lo dirafale, a re: “Ke nyorilwe.”" 
John19:29 Mme ga bo go beilwe teng nkgwana e tletse bojalwa jo bo botšarara; foo ba ina ngami mo botšarareng, ba e tlhomela ka thupa ya mosiama, ba e isa kwa molomong wa gagwe." 
John19:30 Ya re Jesu a sena go amogela botšarara, a re: “Go weditswe!” mme a oba tlhogo, a neela mowa." 
John19:31 Mme e re ka e le lobaka lwa Iketleetso, Bajuta ba lopa Pilato gore maoto a bone a rojwe, mme ba tlosiwe, gore ditoto tsa bone di se ka tsa nna mo mekgorong ka Sabata, gonne letsatsi leo la Sabata e ne e le letsatsi le legolo." 
John19:32 Foo batlhabani ba fitlha ba roba maoto a wa ntlha, le a yo mongwe, yo o bapotsweng nae;" 
John19:33 mme ba re ba tla mo go Jesu, ba fitlhela a setse a sule, ba se ka ba mo roba maoto." 
John19:34 Le fa go ntse jalo mongwe wa batlhabani a tlhaba lotlhakore lwa gagwe ka lerumo, mme ka bonako ga tswa madi le metsi." 
John19:35 Mme yo o bonyeng o supile, mme tshupo ya gagwe e ammaaruri; o bile o itse fa a bolelela ruri, gore le lona lo dumele." 
John19:36 Gonne dilo tse di diretse, gore lokwalo lo dirale lo lo reng: “Ga go ketla go rojwa lesapo lepe la gagwe.”" 
John19:37 Gape lokwalo lo longwe lwa re: “Ba tlaa leba ene yo ba mo tlhabileng.” 
John19:38 Morago ga dilo tse, Josefe wa Arimathea, e le morutwa wa ga Jesu, mme a itobile ka go boifa Bajuta, a lopa Pilato gore a mo lese a tlose setoto sa ga Jesu; mme Pilato a mo dumelela. Foo a tlosa setoto sa gagwe." 
John19:39 Ga ba ga tla Nikotemo le ene, yo e rileng pele a ya kwa go ene go le bosigo, a tla a tshotse tao ya mura e tlhakanye le mokgopha, e ka ne e le bokete jwa dikilokerame di le 30." 
John19:40 Jalo ba tsaya setoto sa ga Jesu, ba se phuthela mo letseleng la leloba, le ka malao jaaka e le tlwaelo ya phitlho ya Bajuta." 
John19:41 Jaana ga bo go le tshimo felong fa o bapoletsweng teng; mme mo tshimong eo ga bo go le phupu e ntšha, e go iseng go ke go bewe ope mo go yone." 
John19:42 Ya re ka phupu e le fa gaufi, ba baya Jesu mo go yone, ka ntlha ya gobo e le lobaka lwa Iketleetso ya Bajuta." 
John20:1 Jaana e rile ka letsatsi la ntlha la beke, Maria Magetalene a ya kwa phupung go le ka maphakela, go sa ntse go le lefifi, mme a fitlhela lentswe le tlositswe fa phupung." 
John20:2 Foo a taboga a ya kwa go Simone Petere, le morutwa yo mongwe yo Jesu o mo ratang, mme a ba raya a re: “Ba tlositse Morena mo phupung, mme ga re itse kwa ba mmeileng teng.”" 
John20:3 Foo Petere a tswa, a na le morutwa yo mongwe, ba tsamaela kwa phupung." 
John20:4 Ba taboga mmogo; mme morutwa yo mongwe a sia Petere, a fitlha pele fa phupung." 
John20:5 Mme ya re a inama a okomela mo teng, a bona matsela a leloba a ntse fela; le fa go ntse jalo a se ka a tsena mo teng." 
John20:6 Foo Simone Petere le ene a tla a mo setse morago, a tsena mo phupung; a bona matsela a leloba jaaka a ntse fela." 
John20:7 Letsela le le neng le mo fapile tlhogo, jaaka le sa nna le matsela a leloba, le phuthetswe le le losi fa thoko." 
John20:8 Foo ga tsena le ene morutwa yo mongwe, yo o fitlheleng pele fa phupung, mme a bona, a ba a dumela." 
John20:9 Gonne ka lobaka loo ba ne ba ise ba itse lokwalo, fa a tshwanetse go ba a tsoga mo baswing." 
John20:10 Jalo barutwa ba tloga ba boela kwa ga bone. 
John20:11 Maria a bo a eme ka fa ntle ga phupu a lela; mme ya re a ntse a lela, a inama, a okomela mo phupung;" 
John20:12 a bona baengele ba le babedi ba ba apereng bosweu, ba dutse fa setoto sa ga Jesu se neng se le teng, mongwe a le fa tlhogong, yo mongwe fa dinaong." 
John20:13 Ba mo raya ba re: “Mosadi, o lelelang?” A ba raya a re: “Ke ka gobo ba tlositse Morena wa me, mme ga ke itse kwa ba mmeileng teng.”" 
John20:14 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a retologa, mme a bona Jesu a eme, mme a sa itse fa e le Jesu." 
John20:15 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Mosadi o lelelang? O batla mang?” Mme ene ka a gopotse gore ke mmaakanyi wa tshimo, a mo raya a re: “Morena, fa o mo tlositse, mpolelela kwa o mmeileng teng, mme ke tlaa mo tlosa.”" 
John20:16 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Maria!” A ithetolola, a mo raya ka Sehebere, a re: “Raboni,” ke go re: “Moruti.”" 
John20:17 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Se nkame; gonne ga ke ise ke tlhatlogele kwa go Rara; mme o ye kwa go bana ba ga Rre, o ba reye o re, ke tlhatlogela kwa go Rre, le Rraeno, le kwa go Modimo wa me, le Modimo wa lona.”" 
John20:18 Maria Magetalene, a fitlha a bolelela barutwa a re: “Ke bonye Morena;” le jaaka a buile dilo tse nae." 
John20:19 Jaana ya re go sa le letsatsi leo, e le letsatsi la ntlha la beke, go le maabanyane, go bile go tswetswe fa barutwa ba leng teng, ka ntlha ya go boifa Bajuta, Jesu a fitlha a ema fa gare ga bone, a ba raya a re: “Kagiso e nne le lona.”" 
John20:20 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a ba supetsa diatla tsa gagwe le lotlhakore lwa gagwe. Foo barutwa ba itumela, ka ba bona Morena." 
John20:21 Foo Jesu a ba a ba raya gape, a re: “Kagiso e nne le lona. Jaaka Rara a nthomile, le nna ke roma lona jalo.”" 
John20:22 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a ba budulela mowa, a ba raya a re: “Amogelang Mowa o o Boitshepo;" 
John20:23 le fa e le bomang ba dibe tsa bone lo di itshwarelang, ba di itshwaretswe; mme ba dibe tsa bone lo di emisang, di eme.”" 
John20:24 Mme Thomase, mongwe wa ba ba 12, yo o bidiwang Didimo, e rile Jesu a tla, ene a bo a seyo mo go bone." 
John20:25 Barutwa ba bangwe ba mo raya ba re: “Rona re bonye Morena.” Mme a ba raya a re: “Fa ke sa bone dintho tsa dimapo mo diatleng tsa gagwe, ka tsenya monwana wa me mo dinthong tsa dimapo, ka ba ka tsenya seatla sa me mo lotlhakoreng lwa gagwe, ga nketla ke dumela.”" 
John20:26 E rile malatsi a a 8 a sena go feta, barutwa ba gagwe ba bo ba bile ba le mo teng, le ene Thomase a na nabo. Jesu a tla go tswetswe, a ema fa gare ga bone, a re: “Kagiso e nne le lona.”" 
John20:27 Foo a raya Thomase a re: “Ntshetsa kwano monwana, o bone diatla tsa me; ntshetsa kwano seatla, o se tsenye mo lotlhakoreng lwa me; se nne pelaelo mme o dumele.”" 
John20:28 Thomase a mo fetola a re: “Morena wa me, le Modimo wa me.”" 
John20:29 Jesu a mo raya a re: “O dumetse ka gobo o mponye; go sego ba ba sa bonang, le fa go ntse jalo ba dumetse.”" 
John20:30 Jesu a dira ditshupo di le dintsi di sele fa pele ga barutwa ba gagwe, tse di sa kwalwang mo lokwalong lo;" 
John20:31 mme tse, di kwadilwe gore lo dumele fa Jesu e le Keresete, Morwa Modimo; le gore lo bone botshelo mo ineng la gagwe ka go dumela." 
John21:1 E rile morago ga dilo tse, Jesu a ba a ipontsha barutwa ba gagwe gape kwa lewatleng la Tiberia, mme a iponatsa ka mokgwa o o ntseng jaana:" 
John21:2 Ga bo go le mmogo Simone Petere, Thomase yo o bidiwang Didimo, le Nathanaele wa Kana wa Galilea, le bomorwa Sebete, le barutwa ba gagwe ba bangwe ba le babedi." 
John21:3 Simone Petere a ba raya a re: “Ke ya go tshwara ditlhapi.” Ba mo raya ba re: “Le rona re ya nao.” Ba bolola ba tsena mo mokorong; mme ba se ka ba lala ba tshwere sepe sigong joo. 
John21:4 Ya re bosigo boo sa, Jesu a ema fa mošaweng; le fa go ntse jalo barutwa ba bo ba sa itse fa e le Jesu." 
John21:5 Foo Jesu a ba raya a re: “Bana, a lo na le sengwe se se jewang?” Ba mo fetola ba re: “Nnyaa.”" 
John21:6 A ba raya a re: “Digelang lotloa ka fa ntlheng ya letsogo le legolo ga mokoro, mme lo tlaa tshwara.” Foo ba lo digela, mme ba retelelwa ke go lo goga ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa ditlhapi." 
John21:7 Foo morutwa yo Jesu o mo ratang, a raya Petere a re: “Ke Morena.” Ya re Petere a utlwa fa e le Morena, a ikgatlhelela kobo ya gagwe, gonne o ne a sa apara sepe, mme a ithabuetsa mo lewatleng." 
John21:8 Barutwa ba bangwe ba tla ka mokorwana, gonne ba ne ba se kgakala le lefatshe, e ka ne e le sebaka sa mabogo a 200, boo ba tla ba goga lotloa lo tletse ditlhapi." 
John21:9 Jalo ya re ba tswela fa lefatsheng, ba bona molelo o o magala teng, o na le ditlhapi di besitswe mo go one, le senkgwe." 
John21:10 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Lereng ditlhapi dingwe tsa tse lo di tshwereng gompieno.” 
John21:11 Foo Simone Petere a pagama, a gogela lotloa kwa lefatsheng, lo tletse ditlhapi tse ditona, di le 153; mme le fa di le bontsi jo bo kalo, lotloa ga lo a ka lwa kgaoga." 
John21:12 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Tlang lo fitlhole.” Mme go se ka ga dira le ope wa barutwa yo o ka lekang go mmotsa go re: “O mang?” ka ba itse fa e le Morena. 
John21:13 Jesu a fitlha a tsaya senkgwe, a se ba naya le tsone ditlhapi jalo." 
John21:14 Ya bo e le lone lwa boraro fa Jesu a ipontsha barutwa, a sena go tsoga mo baswing." 
John21:15 Jalo e rile ba sena go fitlhola, Jesu a raya Simone Petere a re: “Simone, morwa Johane, a o a nthata bogolo go ba?” A mo raya a re: “Ee, Morena; o a itse fa ke go rata.” A mo raya a re: “Fudisa dikwanyana tsa me.”" 
John21:16 A ba a mo raya gape lwa bobedi a re: “Simone, morwa Johane, a o a nthata?” A mo raya a re: “Ee, Morena o a itse fa ke go rata.” A mo raya a re: “Disa dinku tsa me.”" 
John21:17 A mo raya lwa boraro a re: “Simone, morwa Johane, a o a nthata?” Petere a hutsafala ka gobo a mo reile lwa boraro a re: “A o a nthata?” Mme a mo raya a re: “Morena, o itse dilo tsotlhe; o itse fa ke go rata.” Jesu a mo raya a re: “Fudisa dinku tsa me." 
John21:18 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri, ke a go raya, e rile o sa le lekau, wa nna wa itlama fela, wa itsamaela kwa o go ratang; mme o tlaa re o tsofetse, o tlaa otlolola mabogo, mme o sele o tlaa go tlama, a go isa kwa o sa go rateng.”" 
John21:19 Mme jaana, golo mo, a go bua, a kaya loso lo o tlaa galaletsang Modimo ka lone, ka fa lo tlaa nnang ka gone. Mme ya re a sena go bua jalo, a mo raya a re: “Ntshala morago.”" 
John21:20 Petere a retologa, a bona morutwa yo Jesu o mo ratang a ba setse morago; e bong ene yo o neng a ikaega mo sehubeng sa gagwe, jale ka go jewa selalelo, a ba a bua a re: “Morena yo o go okang e mang?”" 
John21:21 Petere ya re a mmona a raya Jesu a re: “Morena, mme motho yo, o tlaa dirang?”" 
John21:22 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Fa ke rata a diega go tle go tsamaye ke tle, e be e le eng go wena? Wena o ntshale morago fela.”" 
John21:23 Polelo eo ya anamela mo bakaulengweng, gore morutwa yoo, ga a ketla a swa; le fa go ntse jalo Jesu ga a ka a re ga a ketla a swa; fa e se go re: “Fa ke rata a diega go tle go tsamaye ke tle, e be e le eng go wena?”" 
John21:24 Yo, ke ene morutwa yo o supang dilo tse, a ba a kwala dilo tse; mme re a itse fa tshupo ya gagwe e le ammaaruri." 
John21:25 Go bile go na le dilo di le dintsi di sele tse Jesu o di dirileng, tse e ka reng fa di ne di ka kwalwa tsotlhe, ke a gopola gore le e leng lefatshe le ne le sa ka ke la bonela dikwalo tse di neng di ka kwalwa sebaka sa go di tshola." 
Acts1:1 Motlotlegi Theofilo: Lokwalo lwa pele ke lo kwadile ka ga tsotlhe tse Jesu o simolotseng go di dira le go ruta ka tsone," 
Acts1:2 go tla go fitlha mo tsatsing le o tlhatlositsweng ka lone, a sena go naya baaposetole ba o neng a ba itshenketse taolo, ka Mowa o o Boitshepo;" 
Acts1:3 ba o bileng a ba ipontsha a tshedile, morago ga loso lwa gagwe, ka ditshupo di le dintsi, a bonala mo go bone ka lobaka lwa malatsi a a 40, a bua dilo tse e leng tsa bogosi jwa Modimo;" 
Acts1:4 e rile ba phuthegile nae a ba laya a re, ba se ka ba tloga mo Jerusalema, mme ba lebelele polelo ya tsholofetso ya Rara, e o reng lo e utlwile mo go nna:" 
Acts1:5 Gonne le gale Johane o ne a kolobetsa ka metsi; mme e tlaa re malatsi a ise a nne mantsi, lona lo tlaa kolobediwa ka Mowa o o Boitshepo." 
Acts1:6 Ke gone e rileng ba phuthegile, ba mmotsa ba re: “Morena, a o busetsa Iseraele bogosi ka baka lono?”" 
Acts1:7 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ga se ga lona go itse metlha kgotsa dipaka, tse Rara o di ipeetseng mo thateng ya gagwe." 
Acts1:8 Mme e tlaa re Mowa o o Boitshepo o sena go tla mo go lona, lo tlaa bona nonofo; lo tlaa nna basupi ba me mo Jerusalema, le mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Jutea le la Samaria, go ya fela kwa sekhutlong sa lefatshe.”" 
Acts1:9 E rile a sena go bua dilo tse, ba ntse ba lebile, a tlhatlosiwa; leru la mo tshola mo ponong ya bone." 
Acts1:10 Ya re ba sa ntse ba lebile thata kwa loaping jaaka a tsamaya, bonang, banna ba le babedi ba ema fa go bone, ba apere diaparo tse ditshweu;" 
Acts1:11 ba ba bileng ba bua ba re: “Lona banna ba Galilea, lo emetseng lo lebile kwa loaping? Jesu yo, yo o tsholeleditsweng kwa legodimong a tswa mo go lona, o tlaa tla jalo fela jaaka lo mmonye a ya kwa legodimong.”" 
Acts1:12 Foo ba boela Jerusalema ba tswa mo thoteng e go tweng Lotlhware, e e leng gaufi le Jerusalema, e bong mo go kanang ka loeto lwa letsatsi la Sabata." 
Acts1:13 E rile ba sena go goroga, ba tlhatlogela kwa ntlong e e kwa godimo, kwa ba ne ba nna teng; e bong Petere, Johane, Jakobe, Anterea, Filipo, Thomase, Baretholomea, Mathaio, Jakobe morwa Alefaio, Simone wa Moselote le Jutase morwa Jakobe." 
Acts1:14 Botlhe ba, ba nnela ruri ka bongwe fela jwa pelo mo thapelong, ba na le basadi, le Maria mma Jesu, le bomonnawe Jesu." 
Acts1:15 Ya re mo malatsing ao, Petere a ema fa gare ga bakaulengwe, mme ga bo go phuthegile bontsi jwa batho, e ka ne e le 120, mme a re:" 
Acts1:16 “Bakaulengwe, go ne go tshwanetse gore lokwalo lo dirafale, lo Mowa o o Boitshepo o buileng ka lone gale ka molomo wa ga Dafite, wa bua ka ga Jutase, yo e neng e le mogogi wa ba ba tshwereng Jesu." 
Acts1:17 Gonne o ne a baletswe le rona, a ba a amogela kabelo ya gagwe mo tirelong e.”" 
Acts1:18 Jaana motho yoo a bapala sebata sa naga ka tuelo ya boikepo jwa gagwe; mme o rile a thubanyetsega, a phanyega ka bogare, mala a gagwe a gorometsega otlhe." 
Acts1:19 Mo ga tla ga itsiwe ke botlhe ba ba agileng mo Jerusalema; le sebata seo sa bidiwa mo puong ya bone, ga twe, Akeledama, ke go re: “Naga ya madi a motho”." 
Acts1:20 “Gonne go kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa Dipesalema ga twe: “ ‘A boago jwa gagwe bo swafadiwe, a go se nne motho ope yo o agang teng; a motho o sele a tseye tiro ya gagwe ya tebelo.’" 
Acts1:21 “Ke gone mo bathong ba re ntseng ra nna nabo ka lobaka lotlhe, lo Morena Jesu o ntseng a nna a tsamaya mo go rona ka lone," 
Acts1:22 go simolola ka kolobetso ya ga Johane, go tla go fitlha mo tsatsing le o tlhatlositsweng mo go rona ka lone, ka re, mo bathong bao, a go dire le mongwe yo o tlaa nnang mosupi le rona wa go tsoga ga gagwe.”" 
Acts1:23 Mme ba emisa ba le babedi, e bong Josefe yo o bidiwang Baresabase, yo o ne a okelediwa leina la Juseto, a na le Matiase." 
Acts1:24 Ba rapela ba re: “Morena yo o itseng dipelo tsa batho botlhe, supa yo o mo itshenketseng mo go ba babedi ba." 
Acts1:25 Gore a tle a tseye boemo jwa boaposetole mo tirelong e, jo Jutase o oleng mo go jone gore a ye kwa bonnong jwa gagwe.”" 
Acts1:26 Ba ba laola ka bola; mme bola jwa supa Matiase; mme a balelwa mo baaposetoleng ba ba 11. 
Acts2:1 E rile letsatsi la Pentekoste le setse le fitlhile, ba bo ba le mmogo botlhe fela mo felong go le gongwe fela." 
Acts2:2 Ka tshoganetso ga tswa mosumo kwa legodimong, e kete wa sefefo se segolo se se tsubutlang, wa tlala ka ntlo e ba dutseng mo go yone." 
Acts2:3 Ga bonala mo go bone diteme tse di patologanang, e kete tsa molelo; mme wa nna mo go mongwe le mongwe wa bone." 
Acts2:4 Mme botlhe ba tladiwa Mowa o o Boitshepo, ba simolola go bua ka dipuo di sele, ka fa Mowa o ba neelang molomo ka teng." 
Acts2:5 Jaana ga bo go agile Bajuta mo Jerusalema, e le banna ba ba rapelang Modimo, ba tswa mo merafeng yotlhe fa tlase ga legodimo." 
Acts2:6 E rile mosumo o o utlwala, ga phuthega bontsi jwa batho, mme ba dimokana ditlhogo, ka mongwe le mongwe a utlwa ba bua ka puo ya ga gabo." 
Acts2:7 Ba tseana botlhe, ba gakgamala ba re: “Bonang, ba ba buang ba, a ga se Bagalilea botlhe?" 
Acts2:8 Re utlwa jang mongwe le mongwe a bua ka puo ya ga rona e re tsaletsweng mo go yone? 
Acts2:9 Baparetia le Bamete le Baelame, le ba ba agileng mo Mesopotamia le mo Jutea, le mo Kapatokia, le mo Ponto, le mo Asia." 
Acts2:10 Le mo Ferugia, le mo Pamfilia, le mo Egepeto, le kwa dintlheng tsa Libia mo tikologong ya Kurene, le baeng ba ba tswang kwa Roma, e le Bajuta le baditšhaba ba ba ineetseng mo Sejuteng," 
Acts2:11 Bakerete, le Baarabia, re ba utlwa ba bua ditiro tse dikgolo tsa Modimo ka dipuo tsa garona.”" 
Acts2:12 Ba tseana botlhe ba akabala, ba raana ba re: “Kana mo go kayang?”" 
Acts2:13 Ba bangwe ba sotla ba re: “Ba kgotshe bojalwa jo bo serobo.” 
Acts2:14 Mme Petere a ema le ba ba 11, a tlhatlosa lentswe la gagwe a bua nabo a re: “Lona banna ba Jutea, le lona lotlhe ba lo agileng mo Jerusalema, a selo se se itsiwe ke lona, lo tlhwaele mafoko a me tsebe." 
Acts2:15 Gonne batho ba, ga ba a tagwa jaaka lo gopotse; ka e sa ntse e le nako ya 9 mo mosong;" 
Acts2:16 selo se, ke sone se se builweng ke moperofeti Joele, a re:" 
Acts2:17 “ ‘Go tlaa dirala mo metlheng ya bofelo, go bua Modimo, wa re: Ke tlaa gorometsa Mowa wa me mo nameng yotlhe, bomorwaa lona le bomorwadia lona ba tlaa perofesa, le makau a lona a tlaa bona diponatshegelo, le bannabagolo ba lona ba tlaa lora ditoro;" 
Acts2:18 ee, le mo batlhankeng ba me, le mo malateng a me, ke tlaa gorometsa Mowa wa me mo metlheng eo; mme ba tlaa perofesa." 
Acts2:19 Ke tlaa baya dikgakgamatso kwa legodimong kwa godimo, le ditshupo mo lefatsheng kwa tlase; madi le molelo le looto lwa mosi:" 
Acts2:20 Letsatsi le tlaa fetolwa lefifi, le kgwedi madi, letsatsi la Morena le ise le tle, e bong lone letsatsi le legolo, le le itsegeng." 
Acts2:21 Go tlaa dirala gore le fa e le mang yo o tlaa bitsang leina la Morena o tlaa bolokwa.’ 
Acts2:22 “Lona banna ba Iseraele, utlwang mafoko a: Jesu wa Nasaretha, e le monna yo Modimo o lo supeditseng go itumela ga one mo go ene, ka ditiro tsa nonofo le dikgakgamatso, le ditshupo tse Modimo o di dirileng ka ene mo gare ga lona, jaaka le lona lo itse;" 
Acts2:23 ene yoo, ka a ne a ntshitswe gale ka boikaelelo le kitsetsopele ya Modimo, lona lo mmapotse, lwa mmolaya ka diatla tsa batho ba ba ipheferileng mo molaong." 
Acts2:24 Yo Modimo o mo tsositseng, o sena go hunolola dithapo tsa loso, gonne go ne go retetse fa a ka tshegediwa ke lone." 
Acts2:25 Gonne Dafite o bua ka ga gagwe a re: “ ‘Ke ntse ka bona Morena fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa me ka metlha yotlhe; gonne o ka fa tsogong la me le legolo, gore ke se ka ka tshikinyega:" 
Acts2:26 Ke gone pelo ya me e ne ya itumela, le loleme lwa me lwa ipela; le gone nama ya me le yone e tlaa nna mo tsholofelong." 
Acts2:27 Gonne ga o ketla o tlogela mowa wa me mo Bobipong le gone ga o ketla o neela Moitshepi wa gago a bona go bola. 
Acts2:28 O nkitsisitse ditsela tsa botshelo; o tlaa ntlatsa boitumelo ka sefatlhogo sa gago.’ 
Acts2:29 “Bakaulengwe, nka bua le lona ke se na kotlomano ka ga Dafite, tlhogo ya lotso, gore o ne a swa a ba a fitlhwa, le sefikantswe sa gagwe re na naso le gompieno." 
Acts2:30 Ke gone e rileng ka e le moperofeti, a itse fa Modimo o kile wa mo ikanela gore o tlaa baya mongwe yo e leng wa loungo lwa mankopa a gagwe mo setulong sa gagwe sa bogosi;" 
Acts2:31 ene o rile ka selo se a se bonela pele, a bua ka ga go tsoga ga Keresete a re, ga a a tlogelwa mo Bobipong, le nama ya gagwe ga e a bona go bola." 
Acts2:32 Jesu yo, Modimo o mo tsositse, mme rotlhe re basupi ba gone." 
Acts2:33 E re ka a goleditswe ke Modimo go nna ka fa tsogong le legolo la one, mme a amogetse mo go Rara lefoko la tsholofetso ka ga Mowa o o Boitshepo, o goromeditse selo se, se lo se bonang lo se utlwang." 
Acts2:34 Gonne Dafite ga a ka a tlhatlogela magodimong; mme ene ka esi a re: “ ‘Morena o reile Morena wa me a re: Dula ka fa tsogong la me le legolo," 
Acts2:35 ke tle ke tsamaye ke dire baba ba gago sebeo sa dinao tsa gago.’ 
Acts2:36 “Ke gone a botlhe ba ntlo ya Iseraele ba itsetse ruri, fa Modimo o mo dirile Morena le Keresete, e bong ene Jesu yo lo mmapotseng.”" 
Acts2:37 Jaana e rile ba utlwa ba tlhabega mo pelong, ba raya Petere le baaposetole ba bangwe ba re: “Bakaulengwe, re tlaa dirang?”" 
Acts2:38 Petere a ba raya a re: “Ikwatlhaeng, mongwe le mongwe wa lona a kolobelediwe boitshwarelo jwa dibe tsa lona, mo ineng la ga Jesu Keresete; mme lo tlaa amogela neo ya Mowa o o Boitshepo." 
Acts2:39 Gonne lefoko la tsholofetso le raya lona le bana ba lona, le botlhe ba ba kwa kgakala, e bong botlhe ba Morena Modimo wa rona o tlaa ba ipiletsang.”" 
Acts2:40 A supa a ba a ba laya ka mafoko a mangwe a le mantsi a re: “Ipolokeng mo losikeng lo, lo lo sokameng.”" 
Acts2:41 Foo ba ba amogetseng lefoko la gagwe ba kolobediwa, ba okediwa ka tsatsi leo, e ka ne e le ka batho ba le 3 000." 
Acts2:42 Ba nnela ruri mo thutong le mo bongwefeleng le baaposetole, le mo go ngathoganyeng senkgwe, le mo merapelong." 
Acts2:43 Mme poifo ya wela mewa yotlhe; dikgakgamatso le ditshupo di le dintsi tsa dirwa ke baaposetole. 
Acts2:44 Botlhe ba ba dumetseng ba nna mmogo, ba tlhakanela dilo tsotlhe;" 
Acts2:45 ba rekisa dithuo tsa bone le dilwana, ba abela botlhe ka fa mongwe le mongwe o tlhokang ka teng." 
Acts2:46 Ba tlhomaganya malatsi ba nnetse ruri ka bongwefela jwa pelo mo tempeleng, le mo go ngathoganyeng senkgwe, mo magabone, ba ja dijo tsa bone ka boitumelo le ka pelo e e tlhophegileng." 
Acts2:47 Ba baka Modimo, ba bona botsalano mo bathong botlhe. Morena a ba oketsa ka go tlhomagana ga malatsi ka ba ba bolokwang." 
Acts3:1 Jaana Petere le Johane ba tlhatlogela kwa tempeleng, ka lobaka lwa thapelo e e leng nako ya boraro ya maitseboa." 
Acts3:2 Mme monna mongwe yo o sa leng a nnana a sa tswa mo sebopelong sa ga mmaagwe, a bo a rwelwe, yo ba ne ba tle ba mmeye ka malatsi otlhe fa kgorong ya tempele e go tweng Bontle, gore a nne a kope ba ba tsenang mo tempeleng;" 
Acts3:3 ya re a bona Petere le Johane, fa ba tlaa tsena mo tempeleng, a ba kopa." 
Acts3:4 Mme Petere a mo tlhoma matlho, a na le Johane, mme a re: “Re lebe.”" 
Acts3:5 A ba tsepega matlho, a solofela gore o tlaa bona sengwe mo go bone." 
Acts3:6 Mme Petoro a re: “Selefera le gouta ga ke na natso; mme se ke nang naso sone ke a se go naya. Ka re: Mo ineng la ga Jesu Keresete wa Nasaretha, tsamaya ka dinao.”" 
Acts3:7 A mo tshwara ka seatla se segolo a mo emisa; ka bonako dinao tsa gagwe le magwejana a gagwe tsa thatafala. 
Acts3:8 A tsapoga a ema, a simolola go tsamaya; mme a tsena nabo mo tempeleng a tsamaya, a tlolaka, a baka Modimo." 
Acts3:9 Batho botlhe ba mmona a tsamaya ka dinao, a baka Modimo." 
Acts3:10 Ba mo lemoga fa e le ene yo o ne a tle a nnele go kopa fa kgorong ya tempele e go tweng Bontle; mme ba tlala kgakgamalo le tseano ka ga se se mo dirafaletseng. 
Acts3:11 E rile jaaka a ngaparetse Petere le Johane, batho botlhe ba taboga ba ba kgobokanela mo mathuding a go tweng a ga Solomone, ba gakgametse thata." 
Acts3:12 E rile Petere a bona jalo, a raya batho a re: “Lona banna ba Iseraele lo gakgamaletseng ka ga monna yo? Lo tlhometseng matlho mo go rona jaaka e kete re mo tsamaisitse ka thata e e leng ya rona, kgotsa ka boitshepo jwa rona?" 
Acts3:13 Modimo wa ga Aberahame, wa ga Isake le wa ga Jakobe, Modimo wa borraetsho, o galaleditse Jesu Motlhanka wa one; yo lona lo mo neetseng batho, lwa mo itatola fa pele ga sefatlhogo sa ga Pilato; jale jaaka a ne a ikaeletse go mo golola." 
Acts3:14 Mme lwa itatola Moitshepi le Mosiami, lwa lopa mmolai wa batho gore lo mo neelwe;" 
Acts3:15 lwa bolaya Kgosana ya botshelo, yo Modimo o mo tsositseng mo losong; mo re leng basupi ba gone." 
Acts3:16 Ke ka go dumela mo ineng la gagwe, leina la gagwe le thatafaditse monna yo, yo lo mmonang lo mo itseng; ee, tumelo e e tlang ka ene e mo neile boitekanelo jo bo fedileng jo, fa pele ga lona lotlhe." 
Acts3:17 “Jaana, bakaulengwe, ke a itse fa lo dirile jalo ka go tlhoka go itse, jaaka le bone balaodi ba lona ba dirile." 
Acts3:18 Dilo tse Modimo o di supileng gale ka molomo wa baperofeti botlhe, e bong gore, Keresete wa one o tlaa bolawa, ka re, o di dirafaditse jalo." 
Acts3:19 Ke gone, ikwatlhayeng, lo sokologe, gore dibe tsa lona di phimolwe, gore go tlo go tle metlha ya thudiso jalo, e e tswang fa pele ga Morena;" 
Acts3:20 le gore a rome ene Keresete yo o lo laoletsweng e bong Jesu," 
Acts3:21 yo legodimo le nang le go mo tshola go bo go tle go fitlha le metlha ya tsosoloso ya dilo tsotlhe, e Modimo o buileng ka ga yone ka molomo wa baperofeti ba one ba ba boitshepo, ba ba sa leng ba le yo le kwa tshimologong ya lefatshe." 
Acts3:22 Moše le ene o rile: ‘Morena Modimo o tlaa lo tsosetsa moperofeti, a tswa bakaulengweng ba lona, jaaka a tsositse nna; ene lo tlaa mo reetsa mo dilong tsotlhe fela tse o tlaa di buang le lona." 
Acts3:23 Go tlaa nna gore, motho mongwe le mongwe yo o se ketlang a reetsa moperofeti yo, o tlaa senyediwa ruri mo bathong.’" 
Acts3:24 Ee, le baperofeti botlhe, go simolola ka Samuele, le ba ba tsileng morago, e bong botlhe ba ba buileng, le bone ba boletse ka ga metlha e." 
Acts3:25 Lona lo bomorwa baperofeti, le ba kgolagano e Modimo o e dirileng le borraeno, wa raya Aberahame wa re: ‘Ditšhaba tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tlaa segofala ka losika lwa gago.’" 
Acts3:26 E rile Modimo o sena go tsosa Motlhanka wa one, wa mo roma kwa go lona pele go lo segofatsa, ka go sokolola mongwe le mongwe wa lona mo maikepong a gagwe.”" 
Acts4:1 Ya re ba sa ntse ba bua le batho, baperesiti le molaodi wa tempele le Basadukai ba ba kgomogela," 
Acts4:2 ba betilwe ke pelo, ka gobo ba ruta batho, ba bolela go tsoga ga baswi ka Jesu." 
Acts4:3 Ba ba tsenya diatla, ba ba latsa mo kgolegong; gonne go ne go setse go le maitseboa." 
Acts4:4 Mme ba bantsi ba bone ba ba utlwileng lefoko ba dumela; palo ya banna ya tloga ya nna e ka ne e le 5 000. 
Acts4:5 Ga dirala ya re ka moso, balaodi ba bone le bagolwane, le bakwadi ba phuthega mo Jerusalema;" 
Acts4:6 le Anase moperesiti yo mogolo a le teng, le Kaiafase, le Johane le Alekesantere, le botlhe ba losika lwa moperesiti yo mogolo." 
Acts4:7 Ya re ba sena go ba emisa fa gare, ba ba botsa ba re: “Golo mo, lo go dirile ka thata efe, kgotsa ka leina lefe?”" 
Acts4:8 Petere ka a tletse Mowa o o Boitshepo, a ba raya a re: “Lona balaodi ba batho, le bagolwane," 
Acts4:9 fa re bodiwa gompieno ka ga tiro e e molemo e e diretsweng monnani, ke go re, monna yo, o fodisitswe ka mokgwa o o ntseng jang;" 
Acts4:10 a go itsiwe ke lona lotlhe le batho botlhe ba Iseraele, fa e le ka leina la ga Jesu Keresete wa Nasaretha, yo lo mmapotseng, yo Modimo o mo tsositseng mo losong; ka re, monna yo, o eme fa, fa pele ga lona a fodile, e le ka ene." 
Acts4:11 Ke ene lentswe le le nyaditsweng ke lona baagi, le le bileng le dirilwe la tlhogo ya kgokgotsho." 
Acts4:12 Ga go na poloka mo go ope o sele; le gone ga go na leina lepe le sele fa tlase ga legodimo, le batho ba le neilweng, le re nang le go bolokwa mo go lone.”" 
Acts4:13 Jaana ya re ba bona bopelokgale jwa ga Petere le Johane, mme ba lemogile fa ba sa rutega, e le batho fela, ba gakgamala; ba ba lemoga fa ba kile ba ne ba nna le Jesu." 
Acts4:14 Mme e re ka ba bona motho yo o fodisitsweng a eme nabo, ba tlhoka se ba ka se buang ka ga gone." 
Acts4:15 Ya re ba sena go ba laola gore ba tswele kwa thoko ga phuthego, ba sala ba gakololana." 
Acts4:16 Ba re: “Banna ba, re tlaa ba dirang? Gonne le gale go a bonala mo bathong botlhe ba ba agileng mo Jerusalema, fa tiro e e gakgamatsang e e tumo kgolo e dirilwe ke bone; ga re ka ke ra go latola." 
Acts4:17 A re ba kgalemeleng gore ba se tlhole ba bua le motho ope mo ineng le, gore selo se, se se anamele mo bathong.”" 
Acts4:18 Ba ba bitsa, ba ba laya gore ba se ka ba bua gope, le fa e le go ruta mo ineng la ga Jesu." 
Acts4:19 Petere le Johane ba ba fetola ba re: “E re fa go siame mo matlhong a Modimo go reetsa lona bogolo go go reetsa Modimo, a go atlhole lona;" 
Acts4:20 gonne rona ga re na sepe fa e se go bua fela dilo tse re di bonyeng le tse re di utlwileng.” 
Acts4:21 Bone ya re ba sena go ba ba ba kgala, ba ba lesa, ka ba sa bone sepe sa ka fa ba ka ba betsang ka gone ka ntlha ya batho; gonne batho botlhe ba galaletsa Modimo ka ga se se dirilweng." 
Acts4:22 Gonne motho yo tiro e e gakgamatsang ya phodiso e dirilweng mo go ene, dinyaga tsa gagwe di ne di fetile 40." 
Acts4:23 Ya re ba sena go lesiwa ba tla kwa lesomong la bone, ba bolela tsotlhe tse ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bagolwane ba di buileng nabo." 
Acts4:24 Bone ya re ba utlwa, ba tlhatloseletsa mantswe a bone gongwe kwa Modimong, ba re: “Morena, wena yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe le lewatle, le tsotlhe tse di mo go one;" 
Acts4:25 yo o kileng wa bua ka Mowa o o Boitshepo, ka molomo wa ga rraetsho Dafite motlhanka wa gago, wa re: “ ‘Ana Baditšhaba ba ne ba šakgalelang, le merafe e ne e tlhatlhanyetsang dilo tsa boithamako?" 
Acts4:26 Dikgosi tsa lefatshe tsa ipaakanya, le balaodi ba phuthega, e le go tlhabana le Morena le Motlodiwa wa gagwe.’" 
Acts4:27 “Gonne ammaaruri, Herote le Ponto Pilato, ba na le Baditšhaba le batho ba Iseraele, ba le mo motseng o, ba ne ba phuthegetse Jesu Motlhanka wa gago yo o boitshepo, yo o ne o mo tloditse," 
Acts4:28 go tla ba dira sengwe le sengwe se seatla sa gago le go rata ga gago go se laotseng gale gore se dirafale. 
Acts4:29 Jaana Morena, bona dipopo tsa bone; mme o neye batlhanka ba gago go bua lefoko la gago ka pelokgale yotlhe fela;" 
Acts4:30 le wena o ntse o otlolola letsogo la gago go fodisa; o mme ditshupo le dikgakgamatso di dirwe ka leina la ga Jesu Motlhanka wa gago yo o boitshepo.” 
Acts4:31 E rile ba sena go rapela, felo fa ba phuthegetseng teng ga reketla; mme botlhe ba tlala Mowa o o Boitshepo, mme ba nna ba bua lefoko la Modimo ka pelokgale." 
Acts4:32 Bontsi jwa ba ba dumetseng ba bo ba le pelo nngwe fela le mowa mongwe fela; ga bo go se ope wa bone yo o reng sepe sa dilo tse o nang natso ke sa gagwe; mme dilo tsotlhe ba ne ba di tlhakanetse. 
Acts4:33 Baaposetole ba supa ka ga go tsoga ga Morena Jesu, ka nonofo e kgolo; mme tshegofatso e kgolo ya nna mo go bone botlhe." 
Acts4:34 Le gone ga bo go se ope mo go bone yo o tlhokang, gonne botlhe ba ba nang le masimo kgotsa matlo, ba a rekisa, mme ba tlisa madi a dilo tse di rekisitsweng." 
Acts4:35 Ba a baya fa dinaong tsa baaposetole; mme ga abelwa mongwe le mongwe ka fa o tlhokang ka gone. 
Acts4:36 Mme Josefe, yo o retilweng ke baaposetole ba re Barenabase, ke go re, Morwa kgomotso, fa go phuthololwa, e le Molefi, e le motho wa lefatshe la Kupero ka go tsalwa," 
Acts4:37 a bo a na le tshimo, mme a e rekisa, a tlisa madi, a a baya fa dinaong tsa baaposetole." 
Acts5:1 Mme monna mongwe, go twe Ananiase, a na le Safira mosadi wa gagwe, a rekisa boswa bongwe." 
Acts5:2 Mme a sadisa madi bontlhanngwe, mosadi le ene a itse jalo; mme a tlisa bontlhanngwe a bo baya fa dinaong tsa baaposetole." 
Acts5:3 Mme Petere a re: “Ananiase, ana Satane o tlaleditseng pelo ya gago gore o aketse Mowa o o Boitshepo, le go sadisa bontlhanngwe jwa madi a tshimo?" 
Acts5:4 A e rile e sa ntse e le teng, a e ne e ntse e se ya gago? Le e sena go rekisiwa, a e ne e ntse e se mo thateng ya gago? Go ntse jang ka o gakologetswe selo se mo pelong ya gago? Ga o a aketsa batho, o akeditse Modimo.”" 
Acts5:5 Ananiase ya re a utlwa mafoko a, a wela fa fatshe, a swa; mme poifo e kgolo ya tlela botlhe ba ba utlwileng." 
Acts5:6 Makau a tloga a mo phutha, a mo rwalela kwa ntle, a mo fitlha." 
Acts5:7 E ka ne e le lobaka lwa dinako di le tharo morago ga moo, mosadi wa gagwe a tsena, a sa itse se se dirafetseng." 
Acts5:8 Petere a mmotsa a re: “Mpolelela fa tshimo lo e rekisitse ka go le kalo.” Mme a re: “Ee, ka go le kalo.”" 
Acts5:9 Petere a mo raya a re: “Go ntse jang ka lo dumalanye mmogo go leka Mowa wa Morena? Bona dinao tsa ba ba fitlhileng monna wa gago di fa mojako, mme ba tlaa go rwalela kwa ntle.”" 
Acts5:10 Ka bonako fela a wela fa dinaong tsa gagwe, a swa; mme makau a tsena, a mo fitlhela a sule, a mo rwalela kwa ntle, a mo fitlha fa monneng wa gagwe." 
Acts5:11 Mme poifo e kgolo ya tlela phuthego yotlhe, le botlhe ba ba utlwileng dilo tse." 
Acts5:12 Ditshupo le dikgakgamatso di le dintsi tsa dirwa mo bathong ka diatla tsa baaposetole; mme ba nna mmogo botlhe mo mathuding a ga Solomone ka bongwefela jwa pelo. 
Acts5:13 Mme mo go ba bangwe ga bo go se motho ope yo o lekang go ikopanya nabo; le fa go ntse jalo batho bone ba ba tlotla; 
Acts5:14 badumedi ba oketsegela Morena bogolo, bontsi jwa banna le basadi." 
Acts5:15 Ba ba ba tla ba ntshetsa balwetse mo mebileng, ba ba baya mo malaong le mo masekamelong, e tle e re Petere a feta, le fa e ka bo e le moriti wa gagwe, o tshutifalele mongwe wa bone." 
Acts5:16 Le gone ga phuthega bontsi jo bo tswang mo metseng e e mo tikologong ya Jerusalema, ba tlisa balwetsi le ba ba tshwenngwang ke mewa e e maswe; mme ba fodisiwa botlhe." 
Acts5:17 Moperesiti yo mogolo a ema le botlhe ba o nang nabo, ba e leng lekoko la Basadukai, mme ba tlala lefufa," 
Acts5:18 ba tsenya baaposetole diatla, ba ba tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo ya motse." 
Acts5:19 Mme moengele mongwe wa Morena a bula ntlo ya kgolegelo bosigo, a ba ntshetsa kwa ntle, a re:" 
Acts5:20 “Tsamayang, lo ye go ema lo bue le batho mo tempeleng mafoko otlhe a Botshelo jo.”" 
Acts5:21 Ya re ba utlwa, ba tsena mo tempeleng bosigo boo sa, mme ba ruta. Moperesiti yo mogolo a tla le ba o nang nabo, ba phutha ba lekgotla le ditlhogo tsa bana ba Iseraele, mme ba roma kwa ntlong ya kgolegelo gore ba ye go tlisiwa." 
Acts5:22 Mme maotlana a a ileng a se ka a ba fitlhela mo ntlong ya kgolegelo; a boa, a bolela a re:" 
Acts5:23 “Re fitlhetse ntlo ya kgolegelo e tswetswe ka tlhomamo yotlhe, le badisa ba eme fa mejakong; mme e rile re sena go bula, ra se ka ra fitlhela motho ope mo teng.”" 
Acts5:24 Jaana ya re molaodi wa tempele le ditlhogo tsa baperesiti ba utlwa mafoko a, ba akabala thata ka ga bone gore selo se se tlaa felela kae." 
Acts5:25 Ga tla mongwe a ba bolelela a re: “Bonang, banna ba lo ba tsentseng mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, ba eme mo tempeleng ba ruta batho.”" 
Acts5:26 Foo molaodi a tsamaya le maotlana, ba ba tlisa, e seng ka kgolo; gonne ba boifa batho, e se re kgotsa ba kgobotlediwa." 
Acts5:27 E rile ba sena go ba tlisa, ba ba baya fa pele ga lekgotla. Moperesiti yo mogolo a ba botsa a re:" 
Acts5:28 “Re lo laile thata re re: Lo se ka lwa ruta mo ineng le; bonang, lo tladitse Jerusalema ka thuto ya lona, lo ikaeletse go baya molato wa madi a motho yo mo go rona.”" 
Acts5:29 Petere le baaposetole ba fetola ba re: “Re na le go utlwa Modimo bogolo go batho. 
Acts5:30 Modimo wa borraetsho o tsositse Jesu, yo lona lo mmolaileng, ka go mo pega mo setlhareng." 
Acts5:31 Ene yoo, Modimo o mo goleditse ka seatla sa one se segolo, gore a nne Kgosana le Mmoloki, gore a neye Iseraele boikwatlhao le boitshwarelo jwa dibe." 
Acts5:32 Rona re basupi ba dilo tse; le one Mowa o o Boitshepo o ntse jalo, o Modimo o o neileng bone ba ba o utlwang.”" 
Acts5:33 Mme bone, ya re ba utlwa jalo, ba segega mo pelong, mme ba rata go ba bolaya." 
Acts5:34 Mme ga ema Mofarisai mongwe mo lekgotleng, go twe, Gamaliele, moruti wa molao, e le motho yo o tlotlwang ke batho botlhe, mme a laola gore baaposetole ba name ba ntsheditswe kwa ntle." 
Acts5:35 A sala a ba raya a re: “Lona banna ba Iseraele, lo itise ka ga batho ba, mo go se lo reng lo tloga lo se dira." 
Acts5:36 Gonne e rile motlha mongwe ga tsoga Theutase, a ikgantsha, a re ke motho mongwe; mme, batho bangwe e ka ne e le ba ba 400, ba ikopanya nae; mme a bolawa; le botlhe ba ba ineetseng mo go ene ba phatlaladiwa, ba nyelela." 
Acts5:37 Morago ga motho yo, ga tsoga Jutase wa Galilea mo motlheng wa go kwalwa maina, a itatedisa batho bangwe; le ene a swa; le batho ba ba ineetseng mo go ene ba falalediwa koo." 
Acts5:38 Jaana, ke a lo raya ka re: Lo ithibe mo bathong ba, lo ba lese; gonne fa kgakologelo e, kgotsa tiro e, e le ya batho, e tlaa senyega;" 
Acts5:39 mme fa e le ya Modimo, go tlaa lo retelela go ba fenya; e ka tla ya re kgotsa lwa fitlhelwa lo bile lo tlhabana le Modimo.”" 
Acts5:40 Ba dumalana nae; ya re ba sena go bitsa baaposetole, ba ba betsa, ba ba laya gore ba se ka ba bua mo ineng la ga Jesu, ba ba lesa ba tsamaya." 
Acts5:41 Foo ba tswa fa pele ga lekgotla, ba itumela ka ba kailwe tshwanelo ya go tlotlololwa ka ntlha ya Leina." 
Acts5:42 Ka malatsi otlhe, mo tempeleng le mo magabone, ba se ka ba bakela go ruta le go rera Jesu, fa e le Keresete." 
Acts6:1 Jaana e rile mo metlheng eo, ka palo ya barutwa e ntsifala, ga tsoga ngongorego mo go Bajuta ba Segerika, ka ga Bahebere, ka batlholagadi ba bone ba tlhokomologwa mo mphong ya malatsi otlhe." 
Acts6:2 Mme ba ba 12 ba bitsa bontsi jwa barutwa, ba re: “Ga go a tshwanela fa re ka tlogela lefoko la Modimo, ra ya go aba dijo." 
Acts6:3 Ra re: Bakaulengwe, itebalebeleng banna ba supa mo go lona, ba ba bolelwang ka molemo, ba ba tletseng Mowa le botlhale, ba re ka ba tlhomelang tiro e." 
Acts6:4 Rona re tlaa nnela ruri mo thapelong, le mo tirelong ya thuto ya lefoko.”" 
Acts6:5 Lefoko le la kgatlha bontsi jotlhe, mme ba tlhaola Setefane, e le monna yo o tletseng tumelo le Mowa o o Boitshepo, a na le Filipo, le Perokoro, le Nikanore, le Timone, le Paremenase, le Nikolao, motho wa Antioke yo o ineetseng mo Sejuteng." 
Acts6:6 Ba ba baya fa pele ga baaposetole; ya re ba sena go rapela ba ba baya diatla. 
Acts6:7 Mme lefoko la Modimo la tota; le palo ya barutwa ya ntsifala mo gogolo thata mo Jerusalema; lesomo le legolo la baperesiti la ineela mo tumelong. 
Acts6:8 Setefane, ka a tletse bopelontle le nonofo, a dira dikgakgamatso tse dikgolo le ditshupo mo bathong." 
Acts6:9 Mme ga tsoga bangwe ba lesomo le go tweng la Bagololwa le Bakurinia, le Baalekesanteria, le Bakilikia, le Baasia, ba ganela le Setefane." 
Acts6:10 Mme ba retelelwa ke go emelelana le botlhale le Mowa o o buang ka one. 
Acts6:11 Foo ba kuketsa batho ba ba reng: “Re mo utlwile a bua mafoko a tlhapatso ka ga Moše le ka ga Modimo.” 
Acts6:12 Mme ba tlhotlheletsa batho, le bagolwane, le bakwadi, mme ba tla mo go ene ba mo tshwara, ba mo isa mo lekgotleng." 
Acts6:13 Ba emisa bapateletsi ba ba reng: “Motho yo, ga a khutle go bua mafoko a tlhapatso ka ga felo fa, fa go boitshepo, le ka ga molao;" 
Acts6:14 gonne re mo utlwile a re, Jesu yo wa Nasaretha, o tlaa senya felo fa, a ba a fetola mekgwa e Moše o e re neetseng.”" 
Acts6:15 Mme botlhe ba ba dutseng mo lekgotleng, ka ba tsepile matlho a bone mo go ene, ba bona sefatlhogo sa gagwe e kete sefatlhogo sa moengele." 
Acts7:1 Moperesiti yo mogolo a re: “A dilo tse di ntse jalo?” 
Acts7:2 Ene a re: “Bana ba ga rra le borra, reetsang, Modimo wa kgalalelo o kile wa bonala kwa go rraetsho Aberahame, a le kwa Mesopotamia, a ise a ye kwa Harane," 
Acts7:3 wa mo raya, wa re: ‘Tloga mo lefatsheng la ga eno, le mo ditsaleng tsa gago, o ye kwa lefatsheng le ke tlaa le go bontshang.’" 
Acts7:4 Foo a tswa mo lefatsheng la Bakalatea, a aga mo Harane. E rile rraagwe a sena go swa, Modimo wa mo hudusa teng, wa mo hudusetsa mo lefatsheng leno, le lo agileng mo go lone gompieno." 
Acts7:5 Mme wa se ka wa mo naya boswa bope mo go lone, le fa e le mo go kanang ka fa o ka tlhomang lonao lwa gagwe teng; mme wa mo solofetsa gore o tlaa le mo naya boswa, le losika lwa gagwe, go le rua morago ga gagwe; le mororo o ne a ise a ka a dirane le ngwana." 
Acts7:6 Modimo wa bua jaana gore losika lwa gagwe lo tlaa ya go jaka mo lefatsheng la seeng, mme ba tlaa ba ntsha batlhanka, ba ba direla maswe ka dinyaga di le 400." 
Acts7:7 ‘Mme morafe o ba tlaa nnang batlhanka ba one, ke tlaa o sekisa,’ go bua Modimo; ‘morago ga moo ba tlaa tswa, mme ba tlaa ntirela mo felong fa.’" 
Acts7:8 Wa mo naya kgolagano ya bogwera; jalo Aberahame a tsala Isake, mme a mo rupisa ka letsatsi la bo 8; Isake a tsala Jakobe, Jakobe a tsala ditlhogo tsa ditso tse 12." 
Acts7:9 “E rile ka ditlhogo tse tsa ditso di tlhotlhelediwa ke lefufa ka ga Josefe, tsa mo rekisa, mme a isiwa Egepeto: mme Modimo wa nna nae," 
Acts7:10 wa mo golola mo dipitlaganong tsotlhe tsa gagwe, wa mo naya letlhogonolo le botlhale fa pele ga Faro kgosi ya Egepeto; a mmaya molaodi mo Egepeto le mo ntlong yotlhe ya gagwe." 
Acts7:11 Jaana ga tla leuba mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Egepeto le la Kanana, le pitlagano e kgolo; mme borraetsho ba se ka ba bona diotlo dipe." 
Acts7:12 E rile Jakobe a utlwa fa go na le mabele kwa Egepeto, a roma borraetsho teng lwa ntlha." 
Acts7:13 Ya re ba ile lwa bobedi, Josefe a itsisiwe bana ba ga rraagwe; mme losika lwa ga Josefe lwa senogela Faro." 
Acts7:14 Josefe a roma a ya go bitsa rraagwe le losika lotlhe lwa gagwe, e le batho ba ba 75." 
Acts7:15 Jakobe a fologela kwa Egepeto; mme a swa, ene le borraetsho." 
Acts7:16 Ba rwalelwa kwa Shekeme, ba bewa mo phupung e Aberahame o ne a e rekile mo Shekeme mo go bomorwa Hamore, ka tlhwatlhwa ya selefera." 
Acts7:17 “E rile motlha o atamela wa lefoko la tsholofetso le Modimo o le neileng Aberahame, sešaba sa gola sa ata mo Egepeto," 
Acts7:18 ga ba ga tla ga tsoga kgosi e sele ya Egepeto, e e sa itseng Josefe." 
Acts7:19 Ene a direla losika lwa rona ka boferefere, a patika borraetsho ka mo go botlhoko, e bong gore ba latlhe banyana ba bone, gore ba se ka ba tshela." 
Acts7:20 Mme ya re ka lobaka loo, Moše a tsalwa, mme a bo a le montle thata; a otlwa ka dikgwedi di le tharo mo ntlong ya ga rraagwe." 
Acts7:21 Ya re a sena go latlhwa, morwadia Faro a mo thwala, a mo ikotlela gore a nne ngwana wa gagwe." 
Acts7:22 Moše a rutwa botlhale jotlhe jwa Baegepeto; a nonofa mo puong le mo ditirong. 
Acts7:23 “E rile a setse a le gaufi le go nna dinyaga di le 40, a tshogana ka pelo ya gagwe e rata go ya go lekola bana ba ga rraagwe, e bong bana ba Iseraele." 
Acts7:24 Mme ya re a fitlhela mongwe wa bone a patikwa, a mo femela, a busolosetsa yo o patikwang, a bolaya Moegepeto." 
Acts7:25 A itlhoma ba ga gabo ba tlhalogantse fa Modimo o ba direla kgololo ka seatla sa gagwe; mme ga ba a ka ba tlhaloganya. 
Acts7:26 Ya re ka moso a bonala mo go bone ba lwa, a rata go ba letlanya a re: ‘Banna, lo bana ba monna; ana lo patikanelang?’" 
Acts7:27 Mme yo o patikang mongwe ka ene, a mo kgorometsa a re: ‘E mang yo o go beileng molaodi le moatlhodi mo go rona?" 
Acts7:28 A o rata go mpolaya, jaaka o letse o bolaile Moegepeto maabane?’" 
Acts7:29 Moše a tshaba ka lefoko le, a feta a nna mojaki fela mo lefatsheng la Midiane, kwa o bonyeng bana ba basimane ba le babedi teng." 
Acts7:30 “E rile dinyaga di sena go feta di le 40, moengele a bonala kwa go ene ka kgabo ya molelo mo setlhareng, a le mo nageng ya thaba ya Sinai." 
Acts7:31 E rile Moše a bona, a gakgamalela se o se bonang; ya re a atamela a ya go bona, ga tla lentswe la ga Jehofa la re:" 
Acts7:32 ‘Ke nna Modimo wa borraeno, Modimo wa ga Aberahame, wa ga Isake, le wa ga Jakobe.’ Moše a roroma, mme a sa ka ke a leka go leba." 
Acts7:33 Mme Jehofa a mo raya a re: ‘Rola ditlhako mo dinaong tsa gago, gonne felo fa o emeng teng ke mmu o o itshepileng." 
Acts7:34 Ruri ke bonye pitlagano ya batho ba me ba ba kwa Egepeto, ke utlwile go fegelwa ga bone, ke fologile ke tsile go ba golola, mme jaana ntlo, ke tlaa go roma kwa Egepeto.’" 
Acts7:35 “Moše yo, yo ba mo ganneng ba re: ‘E mang yo o go beileng molaodi le moatlhodi?’ Ke ene yo Modimo o mo romileng, a ya go nna molaodi le mogolodi, ka seatla sa moengele yo o bonetseng kwa go ene mo setlhareng." 
Acts7:36 Monna yo a ya a ba ntsha a sena go dira dikgakgamatso, le ditshupo mo Egepeto, le mo Lewatleng le Lehibidu, le mo nageng ka nyaga di le 40." 
Acts7:37 Moše yo, ke ene yo o reileng bana ba Iseraele a re: ‘Modimo o tlaa lo tsosetsa moperofeti wa bana ba rraeno, jaaka o tsositse nna.’" 
Acts7:38 Yo, ke ene yo o ne a le mo phuthegong mo nageng, a na le moengele yo o buileng nae mo thabeng ya Sinai, a ba a bua le borraetsho, ke ene yo o amogetseng mantswe a a tshedileng go tla a a re naya." 
Acts7:39 “Yo borraetsho ba ganneng go mo ineela, ba mo kgorometsa mo go bone, mme mo pelong tsa bone ba boela kwa Egepeto." 
Acts7:40 Ba raya Arone ba re: ‘Re direle medimo e e tlaa re etelelang pele; gonne yo, Moše, yo o re ntshitseng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, ga re itse kwa o ileng teng.’" 
Acts7:41 Ba dira namane mo metlheng eo, ba isetsa setshwantsho seo setlhabelo, ba itumelela ditiro tsa diatla tsa bone." 
Acts7:42 Mme Modimo wa retologa, wa ba leseletsa ba direla lesomosomo la dilo tsa legodimo; jaaka go kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa baperofeti ga twe: “ ‘A lo ne lwa nkisetsa ditshupelo tsa dikgomo tse di tlhabilweng, le ditlhabelo ka dinyaga di le 40 mo nageng, lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele?" 
Acts7:43 Lwa ngaparela motlaagana wa ga Moloke le naledi ya modimo o go tweng Refane, e le ditshwantsho tse lo di dirileng go tla lo di obamela; mme ke tlaa lo tlosa ke lo fetisa Babilone.’" 
Acts7:44 “Borraetsho ba ne ba na le motlaagana wa tshupo mo nageng, fela jaaka go laotse ene yo o buileng le Moše, gore a o dire ka fa setshwantshong se o kileng a se bona." 
Acts7:45 E bile e le one o borraetsho le bone ba o gorositseng ba na le Jošua, jale ka ba tsena mo bosweng jwa ditšhaba tse Modimo o ntseng wa nna wa di leleka fa pele ga matlho a borraetsho, go tla go fitlha mo motlheng wa ga Dafite;" 
Acts7:46 yo o bonyeng letlhogonolo mo matlhong a Modimo, mme a lopa gore a bonele Modimo wa ga Jakobe bonno," 
Acts7:47 mme Solomone a o agela ntlo. 
Acts7:48 “Le fa go ntse jalo, Mogodimodimo ga a age mo matlong a a agilweng ke diatla; jaaka go bua moperofeti" 
Acts7:49 a re: “ ‘Legodimo ke setulo sa me sa bogosi, mme lefatshe ke sebeo sa dinao tsa me. Ana lo tlaa nkagela ntlo e e ntseng jang, go bua Morena, kgotsa felo ga me ga boikhutso ke gofe?" 
Acts7:50 A seatla sa me ga se a dira dilo tse tsotlhe fela?’ 
Acts7:51 “Lona ba lo thamo di thata, ba lo sa rupang mo dipelong le mo ditsebeng, lo a bo lo ntse lo ganela le Mowa o o Boitshepo. Jaaka borraeno ba kile ba nna ba dira, le lona lo dira jalo." 
Acts7:52 Ana ke ofe wa baperofeti yo borraeno ba se kang ba mmogisa? Ba bolaile ba ba supileng gale ka ga go tla ga Mosiami; yo lona gompieno lo duleng baoki le babolai ba gagwe; 
Acts7:53 e bong lona ba lo amogetseng molao, o ntse fela jaaka o sa le o tlhongwa ke baengele, mme lwa se ka lwa o boloka.”" 
Acts7:54 Jaana e rile ba utlwa dilo tse, ba segega mo pelong, ba mo šenela meno." 
Acts7:55 Mme ene ka a tletse Mowa o o Boitshepo, a nna a lelalela legodimong fela, mme a bona kgalalelo ya Modimo, le Jesu a eme ka fa letsogong le legolo la Modimo," 
Acts7:56 a re: “Bonang, ke bona magodimo a atlhamologile, le Morwa Motho a eme ka fa letsogong le legolo la Modimo.”" 
Acts7:57 Mme ba goa ka lentswe le legolo, ba ithiba ditsebe, ba mo seogelela gongwe," 
Acts7:58 ba ya ba mo latlhela kwa ntle ga motse, ba mo kgobotletsa ka maje; mme basupi ba baya diaparo tsa bone fa dinaong tsa lekau lengwe le le bidiwang Saule." 
Acts7:59 Ba kgobotletsa Setefane ka maje, a ntse a bitsa Morena a re: “Morena Jesu, amogela mowa wa me.”" 
Acts7:60 Mme a khubama, a bua ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Morena, o se ka wa ba balela boleo jo.” Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a robala." 
Acts8:1 Mme Saule a bo a dumelela polao ya gagwe. Ya re ka letsatsi leo fela, phuthego e e mo Jerusalema ya tsogelwa ke pogiso e kgolo, botlhe ba falalela mo mafatsheng a Jutea le Samaria, fa e se baaposetole ba le bosi fela." 
Acts8:2 Mme banna bangwe ba badumedi ba fitlha Setefane, mme ba mo direla selelo se segolo." 
Acts8:3 Saule a nna a senya phuthego, a tsena mo matlong otlhe, a swatola banna le basadi, a ba tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Acts8:4 Ya re ka mo ba ba faletseng ba tsamayatsamaya, ba eta ba rera lefoko." 
Acts8:5 Filipo a fologela kwa motseng wa Samaria, a ba bolelela Keresete." 
Acts8:6 Mme matshutitshuti a batho a ela dilo tse di bolelwang ke Filipo tlhoko ka bongwe fela jwa pelo, ba sena go utlwa le go bona ditshupo tse o di dirang." 
Acts8:7 Gonne mewa e e maswe ya tswa mo bathong ba le bantsi ba ba nang nayo, e goa ka mantswe a magolo; le ba bantsi ba ba teteselang le ba ba golafetseng, ba fodisiwa." 
Acts8:8 Ga nna boitumelo jo bogolo mo motseng oo. 
Acts8:9 Ga bo go le monna mongwe go twe Simone, yo e rileng gale a bo a dira boloi mo motseng, a tseanya batho ba Samaria, a ikgantsha, a re ene ke mongwe yo mogolo." 
Acts8:10 Botlhe ba mo ela tlhoko, bannye le bagolo, ba re: “Monna yo ke ene nonofo ya Modimo e go tweng Kgolo.”" 
Acts8:11 Ba mo ela tlhoko ka gobo o sa le a ba tseanya ka ditoo tsa gagwe ka lobaka lo loleele. 
Acts8:12 Mme e rile ba dumela Filipo, jaaka a ba rerela Mafoko a a Molemo, ka ga bogosi jwa Modimo, le ka ga leina la ga Jesu Keresete, ba kolobediwa, banna le basadi." 
Acts8:13 Simone le ene a dumela, mme e rile a sena go kolobediwa, a nna kwa go Filipo. O rile ka a bona ditshupo le dikgakgamatso di dirwa, a tseana thata." 
Acts8:14 Jaana e rile baaposetole ba ba kwa Jerusalema ba utlwa fa ba Samaria ba amogetse lefoko la Modimo, ba roma Petere le Johane kwa go bone;" 
Acts8:15 ba e rileng ba fitlha ba ba rapelela gore ba amogele Mowa o o Boitshepo; 
Acts8:16 gonne o ne o ise o wele mo go ope wa bone, ba ne ba kolobeditswe mo ineng la Morena Jesu fela." 
Acts8:17 Foo ba ba baya diatla, mme ba amogela Mowa o o Boitshepo." 
Acts8:18 Jaana ya re Simone a bona fa Mowa o o Boitshepo o newa ka peo ya diatla tsa baaposetole, a ntsha madi," 
Acts8:19 a re: “Le nna lo nneye nonofo e, e tle e re yo ke mmayang diatla, a amogele Mowa o o Boitshepo.”" 
Acts8:20 Mme Petere a mo raya a re: “A selefera sa gago se nyelele nao, ka gobo o gopotse fa o tlaa bona neo ya Modimo ka madi." 
Acts8:21 Ga o na kabelo le fa e le boswa mo tirong e, gonne pelo ya gago ga e a siama fa pele ga Modimo." 
Acts8:22 Ke gone, o ikwatlhaele boikepo jo, o rapele Morena, e tle e re kgotsa kgakologelo ya pelo ya gago o e itshwarelwe." 
Acts8:23 Gonne ke a bona fa o sa ntse o le mo santlhokweng sa botlhoko, le mo kgoleng ya boikepo.”" 
Acts8:24 Simone a fetola a re: “Nthapelelang Morena, gore ke se ka ka tlelwa ke sepe sa dilo tse lo di buileng.”" 
Acts8:25 Ke gone e rileng ba sena go supa le go bolela lefoko la Morena, ba boela Jerusalema, ba rera Mafoko a a Molemo mo metsaneng e le mentsi ya Basamaria." 
Acts8:26 Moengele wa Morena a bua le Filipo a re: “Tloga o ye kwa ntlheng ya borwa, kwa tseleng e e tswang Jerusalema e ya Gasa;” foo ke naga fela." 
Acts8:27 Mme a tloga a tsamaya. Mme bonang, monna mongwe wa Ethiopia, moopafadiwa, yo o taolo kgolo mo go Kantase mohumagadi kgosi ya Baethiopia, e le yo o laolang mahumo otlhe a gagwe; mme a bo a ne a ile Jerusalema go obamela Modimo teng;" 
Acts8:28 a bile a boa, a dutse mo kareng ya gagwe, a bala mo go Isaia moperofeti." 
Acts8:29 Mme Mowa wa raya Filipo wa re: “Atamela o ye o kopane le kara ele.” 
Acts8:30 Filipo a tabogela kwa go ene, a mo utlwa a bala mo go Isaia moperofeti, mme a re: “A o tlhaloganya se o se balang?”" 
Acts8:31 A re: “Nka tlhaloganya jang, fa mongwe a sa nkgoge?” A rapela Filipo gore a pagame a nne nae." 
Acts8:32 Jaana fa o ne a bala teng mo lokwalong, ke fa go reng: “O ne a gogelwa jaaka nku tlhabong; le jaaka kwanyana e didimetse fela fa pele ga mmeodi wa yone, le ene ga a tswe molomo jalo:" 
Acts8:33 Tshiamiso ya gagwe o e tloseditswe mo go kgobaladiweng ga gagwe. Losika lwa gagwe e mang yo o tlaa lo bolelang? Gonne botshelo jwa gagwe bo tlosiwa mo lefatsheng.” 
Acts8:34 Moopafidiwa a raya Filipo a re: “Tswe, moperofeti o bua mo ka ga mang? A ka ga gagwe, kgotsa ka ga mongwe o sele?”" 
Acts8:35 Filipo a tswa molomo, a simolola ka lokwalo lo, a mo rerela Jesu." 
Acts8:36 Ya re ba sa tswelela pele mo tseleng, ba fitlha fa metsing mangwe; mme moopafadiwa a re: “Bona, metsi ke a; ke kgorelediwa ke eng gore ke se kolobediwe?”" 
Acts8:37 (Filipo a re: “Fa o dumela ka pelo yotlhe ya gago go ka nna jalo.” A mo fetola a re: “Ke a dumela fa Jesu Keresete e le Morwa Modimo.”) 
Acts8:38 Mme a laola gore kara e eme, mme ba fologela mo metsing boo babedi, ene Filipo le moopafadiwa; mme a mo kolobetsa." 
Acts8:39 Ya re ba tlhatloga mo metsing, Mowa wa Morena wa tlosa Filipo; mme moopafadiwa a se ka a tlhola a mmona, gonne a tswelela mo tseleng ya gagwe a itumetse." 
Acts8:40 Mme Filipo a fitlhelwa kwa Ašetote, ya re a ntse a ralala, a eta a rera Mafoko a a Molemo mo metseng yotlhe, a tsamaya a ya go fitlha kwa Kaesarea." 
Acts9:1 Saulo ka a ntse a ubugela barutwa ba Morena popo le polao, a ya kwa moperesiting yo mogolo," 
Acts9:2 a mo lopa dikwalo tse o tlaa yang ka tsone kwa matlong a thuto a a kwa Damaseko, gore e tle e re fa a ka fitlhela bangwe ba e leng ba yone Tsela, e le banna, kgotsa basadi, a ba golege, a ba tlise Jerusalema." 
Acts9:3 Ya re a etile, ga dirala a atamela Damaseko, mme a tshogana ka lesedi le le tswang legodimong le phatsima mo tikologong ya gagwe." 
Acts9:4 A wela fa fatshe, a ba a utlwa lentswe le mo raya le re: “Saule, Saule, o mpogisetsang?”" 
Acts9:5 Mme a re: “O mang Morena?” Mme a re: “Ke nna Jesu yo o mmogisang; 
Acts9:6 mme nanoga o ye o tsene mo motseng, mme o tlaa bolelelwa se o nang le go se dira.”" 
Acts9:7 Banna ba o etileng nabo, ba ema ba tuuletse fela, ba utlwa lentswe, mme ba sa bone motho ope." 
Acts9:8 Saule a tsoga fa fatshe; mme ya re a buduloga matlho a bo a sa bone; ba mo goga ka letsogo, ba mo isa mo Damaseko." 
Acts9:9 A tlhola malatsi a le mararo a sa bone, a bile a sa je, le fa e le go nwa." 
Acts9:10 Jaana ga bo go le morutwa mongwe mo Damaseko, yo go tweng Ananiase. Morena a bua nae ka ponatshegelo a re: “Ananiase.” Mme a re: “Bona, ke fano Morena.”" 
Acts9:11 Morena a mo raya a re: “Tloga o ye kwa mmileng o go tweng Tolamo, kwa ntlong ya ga Jutase. O botse go re a mongwe o teng yo o bidiwang Saule, monna wa Tareso; gonne bona, o a rapela." 
Acts9:12 O bonye monna yo go tweng Ananiase a tsena, a mmaya diatla gore a foufologe.”" 
Acts9:13 Mme Ananiase a fetola a re: “Morena, ke utlwile ka ga monna yo, ka batho ba le bantsi, bosula jo bo kanakana jo o bo diretseng baitshepi ba gago kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts9:14 Le mono o na le taolo e e tswang ditlhogong tsa baperesiti, gore a golege botlhe ba ba bitsang leina la gago.”" 
Acts9:15 Mme Morena a mo raya a re: “Tsamaya, gonne ene ke sejana sa me se se tlhaotsweng, gore a rwalele leina la me fa pele ga Baditšhaba, le dikgosi, le bana ba Iseraele;" 
Acts9:16 gonne ke tlaa mo supetsa bontsi jwa dilo tse o tlaa di bogelang leina la me.” 
Acts9:17 Ananiase a tsamaya, a ya a tsena mo ntlong; ya re a sena go mmaya diatla a re: “Mokaulengwe Saule, Morena, e bong Jesu, yo o bonetseng go wena mo tseleng e o tsileng ka yone, o nthomile, gore o tle o foufologe, le gore o tladiwe Mowa o o Boitshepo.”" 
Acts9:18 Ka bonako ga wa dilo e kete makape mo matlhong a gagwe, mme a foufologa; a nanoga a kolobediwa;" 
Acts9:19 a ya a thatafala. A tlhola malatsi mangwe le barutwa ba ba mo Damaseko. 
Acts9:20 A akofa a bolela Jesu mo matlong a thuto a re: “Ke ene Morwa Modimo.” 
Acts9:21 Botlhe ba ba mo utlwang ba gakgamala ba re: “Yo, a ga se ene yo o rileng kwa Jerusalema a senyaka ba ba bitsang leina le? O ne a bile a tsile mono ka gone moo, gore a ba golege a ba ise fa pele ga ditlhogo tsa baperesiti.”" 
Acts9:22 Saule a tota bogolo mo nonofong, a silofatsa Bajuta ba ba agileng mo Damaseko, a tlhomamisa fa yo e le Keresete." 
Acts9:23 E rile malatsi a sena go feta a le mantsi, Bajuta ba gakololana gore ba mmolaye." 
Acts9:24 Morero wa bone wa tla wa itsiwe ke Saule. Le gone ba disa dikgoro tsa motse motshegare le bosigo gore ba mmolaye; 
Acts9:25 mme barutwa ba gagwe ba mo tsaya bosigo, ba mo folosa ka fa lorakong, ba mo lepeletsa ka seroto." 
Acts9:26 O rile a fitlha kwa Jerusalema, a leka go ikopanya le barutwa; mme ba mmoifa botlhe, ba sa dumele fa e le morutwa." 
Acts9:27 Barenabase a mo tsaya a mo isa kwa baaposetoleng, a ba bolelela ka fa o bonyeng Morena mo tseleng ka teng, a ba a bua nae, le ka fa o rerileng ka pelokgale ka teng mo ineng la ga Jesu kwa Damaseko." 
Acts9:28 Mme a nna a tsamayatsamaya nabo mo Jerusalema, a rera ka pelokgale mo ineng la Morena," 
Acts9:29 a bua, a ba a ganela le Bajuta ba Segerika. Bone ba tsamayatsamaya ba senka go mmolaya." 
Acts9:30 E rile bakaulengwe ba lemoga, ba mo falosetsa kwa Kaesarea, mme ba mo isa kwa Tareso." 
Acts9:31 Jalo phuthego yotlhe e e mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Jutea, le Galilea, le Samaria, ya bona kagiso, ka go tshosolosiwa; mme e re ka e sepela mo poifong ya Morena, le mo kgomotsong ya Mowa o o Boitshepo, ya kokotlegela." 
Acts9:32 Ga dirala ya re Petere a ntse a ralala ntlheng tsotlhe, a fologela le kwa baitsheping ba ba agileng kwa Lita." 
Acts9:33 Foo a fitlhela monna mongwe yo go tweng, Enease, yo o sa leng a nna mo bolaong ka dinyaga tse di 8; gonne a tshwerwe ke teteselo." 
Acts9:34 Petere a mo raya a re: “Enease, Jesu Keresete o a go fodisa; tsoga o baakanye bolao jwa gago.” Ka bonako a tsoga." 
Acts9:35 Botlhe ba ba agileng mo Lita le mo Sharone ba mmona, mme ba sokologela mo Moreneng." 
Acts9:36 Jaana ga bo go le morutwa mongwe kwa Jopa go twe, Tabitha; ke go re fa go phuthololwa, Dorekase; mosadi yo, o ne a tletse ditiro tse di molemo, le dikatso tse o di dirang." 
Acts9:37 Ga dirala ya re ka malatsi ao, a tsogelwa ke bolwetsi, mme a swa; ba re ba sena go mo tlhapisa, ba mmaya mo ntlonyaneng e e kwa godimo." 
Acts9:38 Mme e re ka Lita o le gaufi le Jopa, ba utlwa fa Petere a leng teng, barutwa ba roma banna ba le babedi, ba ya go mo rapela go re: “O se ka wa re nyafalela go tla.”" 
Acts9:39 Petere a nanoga a ya nabo. E rile a fitlhile, ba mo isa mo ntlonyaneng e e kwa godimo. Basadi ba batlholagadi botlhe ba bo ba eme fa go ene, ba lela, ba supa dikobo le diaparo tse Dorekase o di dirileng a sa ntse a na nabo." 
Acts9:40 Petere a ba ntshetsa kwa ntle botlhe, a sala, a khubama, a rapela; mme a retologela kwa setotong, a re: “Tabitha, tsoga.” Mme a budulola matlho; ya re a bona Petere a rapamologa." 
Acts9:41 A mo neela seatla, a mo kakatlolola; ya re a sena go bitsa baitshepi le batlholagadi, a ba mo neela a tshedile." 
Acts9:42 Mme ga itsiwe mo motseng otlhe wa Jopa; mme batho ba le bantsi ba dumela mo Moreneng. 
Acts9:43 Ga dirala a tlhola malatsi a le mantsi mo Jopa, mo go mongwe go twe Simone, mosugi wa matlalo." 
Acts10:1 Jaana ga bo go le monna mongwe mo Kaesarea, leina la gagwe go twe Korenelio, e le molaodi wa mophato o go tweng wa Itale." 
Acts10:2 E le motho yo o dumelang, le yo o boifang Modimo, le ka botlhe ba ntlo ya gagwe, yo o bileng a fa batho thata, a rapela Modimo ka metlha yotlhe." 
Acts10:3 E rile ka lobaka lo e ka neng e le lwa nako ya boraro, ya motshegare wa maitseboa, a bona sentle ka ponatshegelo moengele wa Modimo a tsena kwa go ene, a mo raya a re: “Korenelio.”" 
Acts10:4 Ene ya re a tsepega matlho mo go ene, ka a boifa a re: “Ke eng, Morena?” A mo raya a re: “Merapelo ya gago, le dikatso tsa gago di tlhatlogile, di ile go nna segopotso fa pele ga Modimo." 
Acts10:5 Jaana, roma batho kwa Jopa, ba ye go lere mongwe yo go tweng Simone, yo o okeleditsweng leina la Petere." 
Acts10:6 O nna mo goo rra Simone, mosugi wa matlalo, yo ntlo ya gagwe e fa lewatleng.”" 
Acts10:7 E rile moengele yo o buileng nae a sena go tsamaya, a bitsa batlhanka ba gagwe ba le babedi, ba na le motlhabani yo o dumelang, e le wa ba ba tleng ba mo direle ka gale;" 
Acts10:8 ya re a sena go ba bolelela gotlhe, a ba roma kwa Jopa." 
Acts10:9 Jaana ya re ka moso, bone ba mo loetong lwa bone, ba atametse motse, Petere a tlhatlogela kwa godimo ga ntlo a ya go rapela, e ka ne e le ka lobaka lwa nako ya 12 ya motshegare o mogolo." 
Acts10:10 Mme a bolawa ke tlala, a eletsa ga ja; ya re ba sa ntse ba baakanya, ya ne e kete o welwa ke tsitego ya pelo." 
Acts10:11 A bona legodimo le atlhamologa, le setsholo sengwe se fologa e kete letsela le legolo, le lepeleditswe ka dinaka tsoo nne, le fitlha fa fatshe." 
Acts10:12 Mo go lone ga bo go le dingwe tsa ditshedi tsotlhe tse di maoto mane, le dilo tse di gagabang tsa lefatshe, le dinonyane tsa loapi." 
Acts10:13 Mme ga tla lentswe kwa go ene la re: “Tsoga Petere; tlhaba o je.” 
Acts10:14 Mme Petere a re: “A go se nne jalo Morena; gonne ga ise nke ke je gope se e leng selo fela, le fa e le se se sa itshekang.”" 
Acts10:15 Mme lentswe la ba la tla kwa go ene lwa bobedi la re: “Se Modimo o se ntlafaditseng, o se ka wa se kaya selo fela.”" 
Acts10:16 Mme mo ga dirwa gararo, setsholo seo sa tloga sa tsholelwa kwa legodimong." 
Acts10:17 Ya re Petere a ntse a akabetse thata, gore ponatshegelo e o e bonyeng e ka ne e kayang, bonang banna ba ba romilweng ke Korenelio, ka ba boditse ntlo ya ga Simone, ba bo ba eme fa mojakong." 
Acts10:18 Ba bitsa, ba botsa gore a Simone, yo o okeleditsweng leina la Petere, a o ntse teng?" 
Acts10:19 E rile Petere a sa ntse a akanya ponatshegelo, Mowa wa mo raya wa re: “Bona, banna ba le bararo ba a go batla." 
Acts10:20 Nanoga o fologe, o ye nabo o sa belaele sepe; gonne ke ba romile.”" 
Acts10:21 Petere a fologela kwa banneng, a re: “Bonang, ke nna yo lo mmatlang; ke eng se lo se tletseng?”" 
Acts10:22 Ba re: “Korenelio, molaodi wa mophato, e le motho yo o siameng, yo o boifang Modimo, yo o bolelwang ka molemo ke morafe wa Bajuta, o ne a tlhagisiwa ke Modimo ka moengele yo o boitshepo, gore a rome a go biletse kwa ntlong ya gagwe, gore a utlwe mafoko mo go wena.”" 
Acts10:23 Jalo a ba raya a re, ba tsene mo teng, mme a ba latsa teng. Ya re ka moso a tsoga a bolola nabo, le bangwe ba bakaulengwe ba ba mo Jopa ba ya nae." 
Acts10:24 Ya re ka moso o mongwe ba tsena mo Kaesarea. Mme Korenelio a bo a ba lebeletse, a bile a phuthile ba ga gabo le ditsala tsa gagwe tse dikgolo." 
Acts10:25 Ga dirala ya re Petere a tsena, Korenelio a mo kgatlhantsha, a wela fa dinaong tsa gagwe, a mo obamela." 
Acts10:26 Mme Petere a mo kakatlolola, a re: “Ema, le nna ka nosi ke motho.”" 
Acts10:27 Ya re a ntse a bua nae, a tsena, mme a fitlhela batho ba le bantsi ba phuthegile." 
Acts10:28 A ba raya a re: “Le lona ka losi lo a itse, jaaka e le mo go sa letlelelwang motho yo e leng Mojuta, fa a ka ikopanya le mongwe wa morafe o sele, le fa e le go tsena kwa go ene; le fa go ntse jalo Modimo o nkaetse gore ke se ka ka raya ope ka re, motho fela, kgotsa ka re, ga a a itsheka." 
Acts10:29 Ke gone e rileng ke ile go bidiwa, ka tla fela ke se na kgang. Ke a botsa ka re, lo mpileditse eng?”" 
Acts10:30 Mme Korenelio a re: “E rile maloba ka bo ke dira thapelo ya nako ya boraro maitseboa mo ntlong ya me; mme bonang, motho a ema fa pele ga me, a le diaparo tse di galalelang." 
Acts10:31 A re: ‘Korenelio, thapelo ya gago e utlwilwe, le dikatso tsa gago di a gakologelwa fa pele ga Modimo." 
Acts10:32 Ke gone, roma kwa Jopa, o ye go bitsa Simone, yo o okeleditsweng leina la Petere; o nna mo ntlong ya ga Simone mosugi wa matlalo, fa lewatleng.’" 
Acts10:33 Mme ka akofa ka roma kwa go wena; mme o jahile o tle. Ka re, re fano rotlhe fa pele ga Modimo, gore re utlwe dilo tsotlhe tse o di laoletsweng ke Morena.”" 
Acts10:34 Petere a tswa molomo a bua a re: “Ammaaruri ke a lemoga fa Modimo e se motlhaodi wa batho; 
Acts10:35 mo merafeng yotlhe, yo o boifang one, a ba a dira tshiamo, o a lebosega mo go one." 
Acts10:36 Lefoko le o le rometseng bana ba Iseraele, o bolela Mafoko a a Molemo a kagiso ka Jesu Keresete – ke ene Morena wa botlhe –" 
Acts10:37 ka re lefoko leo, le lona lo a le itse, le le boletsweng mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Jutea, go simolola kwa Galilea, morago ga kolobetso e Johane o e rerileng;" 
Acts10:38 ke raya Jesu wa Nasaretha, jaaka Modimo o mo tloditse ka Mowa o o Boitshepo le ka nonofo, yo o ne a nna a dikologa a dira molemo, a fodisa botlhe ba ba patikwang ke diabolo; gonne Modimo o ne a na nae." 
Acts10:39 Re basupi ba dilo tsotlhe tse o di dirileng mo lefatsheng la Bajuta le mo Jerusalema; yo ba bileng ba mmolaile ka go mo pega mo setlhareng. 
Acts10:40 Ene Modimo o mo tsositse ka letsatsi la boraro, mme wa mo naya gore a bonadiwe;" 
Acts10:41 e seng mo bathong botlhe, fa e se mo basuping ba ba itshenketsweng gale ke Modimo, e bong mo go rona ba re jeleng, ra nwa nae a sena go tsoga mo baswing." 
Acts10:42 Mme a re laya gore re rerele batho, re supe fa yo e le ene yo o laotsweng ke Modimo, gore a nne moatlhodi wa batshedi le baswi." 
Acts10:43 Ke ene yo baperofeti botlhe ba supang ka ga gagwe, fa mongwe le mongwe yo o dumelang mo go ene a tlaa bona boitshwarelo jwa dibe ka leina la gagwe.”" 
Acts10:44 Ya re Petere a sa ntse a bua mafoko a, Mowa o o Boitshepo wa wela botlhe ba ba utlwang lefoko." 
Acts10:45 Ba bogwera ba ba dumetseng, ba gakgamala thata, e bong ba ba tsileng le Petere, ka gobo neo ya Mowa o o Boitshepo e gorometditswe le mo go Baditšhaba." 
Acts10:46 Gonne ba ba utlwa ba bua ka dipuo di sele, ba baka Modimo." 
Acts10:47 Foo Petere a bua a re: “A mongwe o ka itsa metsi, gore batho ba ba se kolobediwe, ba ba amogetseng Mowa o o Boitshepo jaaka rona?”" 
Acts10:48 Mme a laola gore ba kolobediwe mo ineng la ga Jesu Keresete. Ba mo rapela gore a tlhole malatsi mangwe teng. 
Acts11:1 Jaana baaposetole le bakaulengwe ba ba mo Jutea, ba utlwa fa Baditšhaba le bone ba amogetse lefoko la Modimo." 
Acts11:2 Mme e rile Petere a sena go tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema, ba e leng ba bogwera ba ganela nae, ba re:" 
Acts11:3 “O ile wa tsena mo banneng ba ba sa rupang, wa ja nabo.”" 
Acts11:4 Mme Petere a simolola a ba phuthololela tiro e ka thulaganyo: 
Acts11:5 A re: “Ke ne ke le mo motseng wa Jopa ke rapela; mme ya re ke le mo tsitegong ya pelo ka bona ponatshegelo; setsholo sengwe sa fologa e kete letsela le legolo, le lepeleditswe mo legodimong ka dinaka tsoo nne; la tla fela fa go nna." 
Acts11:6 Le re rileng ke sena go le tsepega matlho, ka akanya, ka bona ditshedi tse di maoto mane tsa lefatshe, le ditshedi tsa naga, le tse di gagabang, le dinonyane tsa loapi." 
Acts11:7 Le gone ka utlwa lentswe le nthaya le re: ‘Tsoga Petere; tlhaba o je.’ 
Acts11:8 Ka re: ‘A go se nne jalo, Morena; gonne ga go ise go ke go tsene sepe se e leng selo fela, le se se sa itshekang mo ganong la me gope.’" 
Acts11:9 Mme lentswe la mphetola lwa bobedi le tswa legodimong, la re: ‘Se Modimo o se ntlafaditseng, o se ka wa se kaya selo fela.’" 
Acts11:10 Golo mo, ga dirwa gararo; mme gotlhe ga ba ga gogelwa kwa legodimong." 
Acts11:11 Bonang, ka bonako ga ema banna ba le bararo fa pele ga ntlo e re mo go yone, ba romilwe kwa go nna ba tswa kwa Kaesarea." 
Acts11:12 Mowa wa nthaya wa re, ke ye nabo, ke sa tlhaole ope. Le bakaulengwe ba barataro ba, ba mpata, mme ra ya ra tsena mo ntlong ya monna yo." 
Acts11:13 Mme a re bolelela ka fa o bonyeng moengele a eme mo ntlong ya gagwe ka teng, a mo raya a re: ‘Roma kwa Jopa, o ye go lere Simone, yo o bidiwang Petere;" 
Acts11:14 yo o tlaa buang nao mafoko a o tlaa bolokwang ka one, wena le botlhe ba ntlo ya gago.’" 
Acts11:15 E rile ke simolola go bua fela, Mowa o o Boitshepo wa ba wela fela jaaka rona mo tshimologong." 
Acts11:16 Mme ka gakologelwa lefoko la Morena, jaaka a rile: ‘Le gale Johane o kolobeditse ka metsi; mme lona lo tlaa kolobediwa ka Mowa o o Boitshepo.’" 
Acts11:17 Ke gone e re fa Modimo o ba neile neo e e etsang e o e re neileng le rona, jale ka re dumela mo go Morena Jesu Keresete, ka bo ke le mang, fa nka ganela le Modimo?”" 
Acts11:18 Ya re ba utlwa dilo tse, ba didimala fela, mme ba baka Modimo, ba re: “Jalo Baditšhaba le bone Modimo o ba neile boikwatlhao jwa go bona botshelo.”" 
Acts11:19 Ba ba faladitsweng jale ka pitlagano e e tsogileng ka ga Setefane, ba ya ba fitlha kwa Fenikia, kwa Kupero, le kwa Antioke, ba sa bue le ope lefoko fa e se Bajuta ba le bosi fela." 
Acts11:20 Mme ga bo go le bangwe ba bone, e le banna ba Kupero le Kurene, ba e rileng ba tsile mo Antioke, ba bua le Bagerika le bone, ba ba rerela Morena Jesu." 
Acts11:21 Mme seatla sa Morena sa nna nabo, mme batho ba le bantsi thata ba ba dumetseng ba sokologela mo Moreneng." 
Acts11:22 Tumedi ya bone ya fitlha ya utlwala mo phuthegong e e kwa Jerusalema, mme ba ntsha Barenabase ba mo roma kwa Antioke," 
Acts11:23 yo e rileng a fitlha, mme a bona tshegofatso ya Modimo, a itumela; mme a ba gakolola botlhe, gore ba ngaparele Morena ka tlhomamo ya pelo;" 
Acts11:24 gonne e ne e le monna yo o molemo, a tletse Mowa o o Boitshepo le tumelo. Mme batho ba le bantsi ba oketsegela Morena." 
Acts11:25 Mme a tswelela kwa Tareso, a ya go batla Saule;" 
Acts11:26 ya re a sena go mmona, a tla nae mo Antioke. Ga dirala gore ga feta ngwaga o o tletseng ba ntse ba phuthegile le phuthego; mme ba ruta batho ba le bantsi; le gone barutwa ba simologile ba bidiwa Bakeresete lwa ntlha mo Antioke." 
Acts11:27 Ya re mo metlheng eo ga tswa baperofeti kwa Jerusalema ba tla mo Antioke. 
Acts11:28 Ga ema mongwe wa bone, go twe Agabuse, mme a kaya ka Mowa fa go tlaa nna leuba le legolo mo lefatsheng lotlhe; le le bileng la dirafala mo motlheng wa ga Kelaudio." 
Acts11:29 Barutwa, mongwe le mongwe ka fa nonofong ya gagwe, ba ikaelela gore go isiwe thuso kwa bakaulengweng ba ba agileng kwa Jutea;"
