Acts11:30 mo ba bileng ba go dira, ba e isa kwa bagolwaneng ka diatla tsa ga Barenabase le Saule." 
Acts12:1 Jaana e rile ka lobaka loo, kgosi Herote a ntshetsa bangwe ba phuthego mabogo a gagwe go ba utlwisa botlhoko." 
Acts12:2 A bolaya Jakobe mogoloa Johane ka tšhaka. 
Acts12:3 Ya re a bona fa go kgatlhile Bajuta, a tswelela pele, a tshwara le ene Petere. Mme malatsi ao ya bo e le a senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang." 
Acts12:4 Ya re a sena go mo tshwara, a mo tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, a mo laolela ditlhophana di le nne tsa batlhabani, tse di batho ba le bane gore ba mo dise; a ikaeletse gore e tlaa re Tlolaganyo e sena go feta a mo ntshetse mo bathong." 
Acts12:5 Petere a tswalelwa jalo mo ntlong ya kgolegelo; mme a direlwa thapelo ke phuthego ka tlhaofalo fa pele ga Modimo. 
Acts12:6 E rile fa Herote a tlaa tloga a mo ntsha, Petere a bo a robetse fa gare ga batlhabani ba le babedi sigong joo, a golegilwe ka diketane di le pedi, balebedi le bone ba le fa mojakong, ba disitse ntlo ya kgolegelo." 
Acts12:7 Mme bonang, moengele wa Morena a ema fa go ene, le lesedi la phatsima mo ntlong ya kgolegelo; a batola Petere fa lotlhakoreng, a mo tsosa, a re: “Tsoga ka bonako.” Diketane tsa wa mo mabogong a gagwe." 
Acts12:8 Moengele a mo raya a re: “Itlame, o rwale ditlhako.” Mme a dira jalo. A mo raya a re: “Apara kobo ya gago o ntshale morago.”" 
Acts12:9 A tswela kwa ntle, a mo sala morago; mme a bo a sa itse fa e le ammaaruri mo go dirilweng ke moengele, a itlhoma a bona ponatshegelo fela." 
Acts12:10 Ya re ba sena go feta ba tebelo ya ntlha le ya bobedi, ba fitlha fa setswalong sa tshipi sa mojako o o tswelang mo motseng; mme sa ba ipulela fela ka sosi; ba tswela kwa ntle, ba feta ka mmila o mongwe, mme moengele a itse go kgaogana nae." 
Acts12:11 E rile Petere a sena go itharabologelwa, a re: “Jaana ke a itse fa ruri Morena a romile moengele wa gagwe go tla go nkgolola mo seatleng sa ga Herote, le mo tebelelong yotlhe ya batho ba Bajuta.”" 
Acts12:12 Ya re a sena go akanya selo se, a ya kwa ntlong ya ga Maria, mma Johane, yo o bidiwang Mareko; mme batho ba le bantsi ba bo ba phuthegetse teng, ba rapela." 
Acts12:13 Ya re a kgwanyakgwanya setswalo sa kgoro, lelata lengwe, yo go tweng Rota a ya go reetsa." 
Acts12:14 Ya re a lemoga lentswe la ga Petere, a se ka a bula ka ntlha ya boitumelo, a tabogela mo teng, a bolela fa Petere a ema fa kgorong." 
Acts12:15 Mme ba mo raya ba re: “O a tsenwa.” Mme ene a tlhomamisa thata fa go ntse fela jalo. Ba re: “E tlaa bo e le moengele wa gagwe.” 
Acts12:16 Mme Petere a nna a kgwanyakgwanya; ya re ba sena go bula, ba mmona, ba gakgamala." 
Acts12:17 Ene, e rile a sena go ba gwetlha ka seatla, gore ba didimale, a ba bolelela ka fa Morena o mo ntshitseng mo ntlong ya kgolegelo ka gone. A ba raya a re: “Lo bolelele Jakobe le bakaulengwe.” Foo a tsamaya, a ya felong go sele." 
Acts12:18 Jaana, ya re bosa boo sa, ga nna kwalanyo e kgolo mo batlhabaning, ya go re Petere o ile kae." 
Acts12:19 E rile Herote a sena go mmatla, mme a sa mmone, a kolotisa balebedi, mme a laola gore ba bolawe. Mme ene a tloga mo Jutea a fologela kwa Kaesarea, a ya a diega teng." 
Acts12:20 Jaana o ne a kgopilwe thata ke ba Ture le Sitone; mme ba tla mo go ene ka bongwe fela jwa pelo; mme e re ka ba ntshitse Belaseto molebalebedi wa kgosi tsala ya bone, ba lopa kagiso, ka lefatshe la bone le otlwa ke lefatshe la kgosi." 
Acts12:21 Ya re ka letsatsi lengwe le le laotsweng, Herote a ikgabisa ka diaparo tsa segosi, mme a dula mo setulong sa bogosi, a laya batho ka puo e kgolo." 
Acts12:22 Batho ba thela lošalaba ba re: “Ke lentswe la modimo mongwe, ga se la motho.”" 
Acts12:23 Ka bonako moengele wa Morena a mo itaya, ka a sa neye Modimo tlotlo; mme a jewa ke diboko, a swa." 
Acts12:24 Mme lefoko la Modimo la tota, la ata." 
Acts12:25 Barenabase le Saule ba boa kwa Jerusalema, ba sena go wetsa tirelo ya bone, ba tla le Johane yo o bileng a bidiwa Mareko." 
Acts13:1 Jaana ga bo go le baperofeti le baruti mo Antioke, mo phuthegong ya teng, e bong Barenabase, le Simone yo o bidiwang Nigere, le Lukio wa Kurene, le Manaene yo o otletsweng gongwe le Herote wa kgosana, le Saule." 
Acts13:2 E ne ya re ba ntse ba direla Morena, mme ba ikitsa go ja, Mowa o o Boitshepo wa re: “Ntomololelang Barenabase le Saule, gore ba ye tirong e ke e ba bileditseng.”" 
Acts13:3 Foo e rile ba sena go dira go ithiba mo dijong, le go rapela, le go ba baya diatla, ba ba naya tsela." 
Acts13:4 Jalo bone, ka ba bolodiwa ke Mowa o o Boitshepo, ba fologela kwa Seleukia; mme ba tswa teng ba ya kwa Kupero ka sekepe." 
Acts13:5 Ya re ba le kwa Salamise, ba bolela lefoko la Modimo mo matlong a thuto a Bajuta. Ba bo ba bile ba patilwe ke Johane, e le mothusi." 
Acts13:6 E rile ba sena go ralala setlhake sotlhe ba se wetsa, ba fitlha mo Pafose, mme ba fitlhela moloi mongwe teng, moperofeti wa tsietso, a le Mojuta, a bidiwa Bare-Jesu." 
Acts13:7 Yo o ne a ntse le molaodisiwa Seregio Paulo, yo e leng motho wa tlhaloganyo. Mme yoo a bitsa Barenabase le Saule, mme a eletsa go utlwa lefoko la Modimo." 
Acts13:8 Elemase wa moloi – gonne leina la gagwe le kaya jalo fa le phuthololwa – a ganela nabo, a leka go faposa molaodisiwa mo tumelong." 
Acts13:9 Mme Saule, yo o bileng a bidiwa Paulo, a tletse Mowa o o Boitshepo, a tsepega matlho mo go ene, a re:" 
Acts13:10 “Wena yo o tletseng boferefere jotlhe, le bolotsana jotlhe, wena ngwana wa diabolo, mmaba wa tshiamo yotlhe, a ga o nka a bakela go sokamisa ditsela tse di siameng tsa Morena?" 
Acts13:11 Jaana bona, seatla sa Morena se mo go wena, o tlaa foufala, o sa bone letsatsi ka lobaka.” Mme ka bonako ga wela mo go ene looto le lefifi; mme a nna a dikologadikologa, a batla mongwe yo o ka mo gogang ka letsogo." 
Acts13:12 Foo, e rile molaodisiwa a bona se se dirilweng, a dumela, a gakgamaditswe ke thuto ya Morena." 
Acts13:13 Paulo le lesomo la gagwe ba tloga mo Pafose ka sekepe, ba fitlha mo Perega wa Pamfilia; Johane a kgaogana nabo a boela Jerusalema." 
Acts13:14 Bone ba ralala Perega, ba ya go fitlha mo Antioke wa Pisidia; ba tsena mo ntlong ya thuto ka letsatsi la Sabata, mme ba dula." 
Acts13:15 E rile go sena go balwa molao le baperofeti, balaodi ba ntlo ya thuto ba roma kwa go bone, ba re: “Bakaulengwe, e re fa lo tshotse lefoko lengwe la go laya batho, a ko lo le bueng fela.”" 
Acts13:16 Paulo a ema, a ba gwetlha ka seatla, a re: “Banna ba Iseraele, le lona ba lo boifang Modimo, reetsang." 
Acts13:17 Modimo wa batho ba Baiseraele, o itshenketse borraetsho, wa godisa batho jale ka ba agile mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, wa ba goga, wa ba ntsha teng ka letsogo le le tsholetsegileng." 
Acts13:18 Wa iphapaanya le mekgwa ya bone mo nageng, e ka ne e le ka lobaka lwa dinyaga di le 40." 
Acts13:19 E rile o sena go senya merafe e supa mo lefatsheng le Kanana, wa ba naya lefatshe la one go nna boswa, e ka ne e le ka lobaka lwa dinyaga di le 450." 
Acts13:20 Morago ga dilo tse wa ba naya baatlhodi, go tla go fitlha mo lobakeng, lwa ga Samuele moperofeti." 
Acts13:21 Kwa morago ba lopa kgosi; mme Modimo wa ba naya Saule morwa Kiše, monna wa lotso lwa Benjamine, ka lobaka lwa dinyaga di le 40." 
Acts13:22 E rile o sena go mo tlosa, wa emisa Dafite, gore a nne kgosi ya bone; mme wa supa ka ga gagwe, wa re: ‘Ke bonye Dafite morwa Jese, monna yo o ka fa pelong ya me, yo o tla dirang go rata ga me gotlhe fela.’" 
Acts13:23 Modimo o lereditse Iseraele Mmoloki; e bong Jesu, a le losika lwa monna yo, ka fa lefokong la tsholofetso;" 
Acts13:24 jale jaaka Johane a sena go rera kolobetso ya boikwatlhao mo bathong botlhe ba Iseraele, a ise a tle." 
Acts13:25 E ne ya re Johane a wetsa tiro ya gagwe, a re: ‘Ana lo a bo lo gopola go re, nna ke eng? Ga ke ene. Mme bonang, go tla mongwe morago ga me, yo ditlhako tsa gagwe ke sa tshwanelang go di hunolola.’" 
Acts13:26 “Bakaulengwe, bana ba losika lwa ga Aberahame, le ba ba boifang Modimo mo go lona, lefoko la poloko e, le tliseditswe rona." 
Acts13:27 Gonne ba ba agileng mo Jerusalema, le balaodi ba bone, e re ka ba sa itse ene le fa e le mantswe a baperofeti a a balwang ka Sabata mongwe le mongwe, ba a dirafaditse ka go mo sekisa." 
Acts13:28 Mme le fa ba se ka ba fitlhela mo go ene molato ope o o tshwanetseng go o bolaelwa, le fa go ntse jalo ba lopa Pilato gore a bolawe fela." 
Acts13:29 E rile ba sena go dirafatsa tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng ka ga gagwe, ba mo pagolola mo setlhareng, ba mmaya mo phupung." 
Acts13:30 Modimo wa mo tsosa mo baswing; 
Acts13:31 a bonwa ka malatsi a le mantsi ke ba ba duleng nae kwa Galilea, ba tla mo Jerusalema, ba e leng bone basupi ba gagwe mo bathong gompieno." 
Acts13:32 Re lo lereditse mafoko a a molemo a tsholofetso e e sa leng e solofetswa borara gale," 
Acts13:33 jaaka Modimo o dirafaditse one ao mo baneng ba rona, ka o tsositse Jesu; jaaka go bile go kwadilwe mo Pesalemeng ya bobedi, ga twe: ‘O morwaake, ke go tsetse gompieno.’" 
Acts13:34 Mme ka ga go tsosa Jesu mo baswing ga one, mo go se nang go tlhola a boela mo go boleng, o buile jaana wa re: ‘Ke tlaa lo naya masego a ga Dafite a a itshepileng le a a tlhomameng.’" 
Acts13:35 Gonne o bile o bua mo pesalemeng e nngwe wa re: ‘Ga o ketla o lesa Moitshepi wa gago a bona go bola.’ 
Acts13:36 Gonne Dafite, e rile a sena go direla kgakololo ya Modimo mo motlheng wa gagwe, a robala, a bewa le borraagwe, mme a bona go bola." 
Acts13:37 Ene yo Modimo o mo tsositseng, ga a a ka a bona go bola gope." 
Acts13:38 Ke gone a go itsiwe ke lona, bakaulengwe, fa lo bolelelwa boitshwarelo jwa dibe ka monna yo." 
Acts13:39 Mongwe le mongwe yo o dumelang, o siamisiwa ka ene ka ga dilo tsotlhe, tse lo ne lo sa ka ke lwa siamisiwa ka ga tsone ka molao wa ga Moše." 
Acts13:40 Ke gone lo itise, e se re kgotsa se se builweng mo baperofeting sa tla mo go lona, jaaka go twe:" 
Acts13:41 ‘Bonang, banyatsi ke lona, mme lo gakgamale, lo nyelele, gonne ke dira tiro mo motlheng wa lona, e le tiro e lo se ketlang lo e dumela gope, fa mongwe a e lo bolelela.’ ”" 
Acts13:42 Ya re ba tswa, ba rapela gore mafoko ao a buiwe le ka Sabata o mongwe." 
Acts13:43 E rile ba ntlo ya thuto ba phatlalala, ba le bantsi ba Bajuta le ba ba ineetseng mo Sejuteng, ba ba rapelang Modimo, ba sala Paulo le Barenabase morago; mme bao ba bua nabo, ba ba sosueletsa thata gore ba nnele ruri mo tshegofatsong ya Modimo." 
Acts13:44 Mme ya re ka Sabata o mongwe, motse otlhe wa batla go phuthega, ba tla go utlwa lefoko la Modimo." 
Acts13:45 Mme ya re Bajuta ba bona matshutitshuti a batho, ba tlala lefufa, ba ganetsa dilo tse di builweng ke Paulo, ba tlhapatsa." 
Acts13:46 Paulo le Barenabase ba bua ka pelokgale ba re: “Go ne go tshwanetse fa lefoko la Modimo le ka bolelelwa lona pele. Mme e re ka lo le kgorometsa mo go lona, lo ikatlhola fa lo sa tshwanela botshelo jo bo sa khutleng, bonang, re sokologela kwa go Baditšhaba." 
Acts13:47 Gonne Morena o re laotse jalo a re: ‘Ke go beile lesedi la Baditšhaba, gore o nne poloka le kwa sekhutlong sa lefatshe.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Ya re Baditšhaba ba utlwa mo, ba itumela, ba galaletsa lefoko la Modimo; botlhe ba ba laoletsweng botshelo jo bo sa khutleng ba dumela." 
Acts13:49 Lefoko la Morena la anamisediwa mo lefatsheng lotlhe leo. 
Acts13:50 Bajuta ba tlhotlheletsa bahumagadi ba ba rapelang Modimo, le magosana a motse, mme ba tsosetsa Paulo le Barenabase pogiso, ba ba leleka mo melelwaneng ya bone." 
Acts13:51 Mme bone, ba ba tlhotlhorela lorole lo lo mo dinaong tsa bone, ba fetela kwa Ikonio." 
Acts13:52 Barutwa ba tlala boitumelo le Mowa o o Boitshepo. 
Acts14:1 Ga dirala ya re mo Ikonio, ba tsena mmogo mo ntlong ya thuto ya Bajuta, mme ba bua thata, ga ba ga tla ga dumela bontsi jo bogolo jwa Bajuta le jwa Bagerika." 
Acts14:2 Bajuta ba ba ganang go utlwa ba hudua dipelo tsa Baditšhaba, ba ba tlhoisa bakaulengwe." 
Acts14:3 Mme ba diega ka lobaka lo loleele teng, ba bua ka pelokgale mo Moreneng, Morena a supa ka ga lefoko la tshegofatso ya gagwe, a ba naya gore ditshupo le dikgakgamatso di dirwe ka diatla tsa bone." 
Acts14:4 Batho ba bantsi ba motse ba ne ba kgaoganye; bangwe ba tshaba le Bajuta, ba bangwe le baaposetole." 
Acts14:5 Ya re ba tsogelwa ke ntwa ya Baditšhaba le Bajuta, ba na le balaodi ba bone, ba re ba ya go ba gagautla mo go tlhabisang ditlhong, le go ba kgobotletsa ka maje," 
Acts14:6 ba ba tlhalefa, ba tshabela kwa metseng ya Lukaonia, e bong kwa Lusetera le Derebe, le kwa lefatsheng mo tikologong ya metse eo;" 
Acts14:7 ba rera Mafoko a a Molemo teng. 
Acts14:8 Mo Lusetera ga bo go dutse monna mongwe yo o palelwang ke dinao, o sa le a nnana a sa tswa sebopelong sa ga maagwe, yo o iseng a ke a tsamaye gope ka dinao." 
Acts14:9 Ene yo, a utlwa Paulo a bua; yo e rile a tsepega matlho mo go ene, a fitlhela a na le tumelo ya go fodisiwa." 
Acts14:10 A bua ka lentswe le le godileng a re: “Ema ka dinao, o thokgame!” Mme a tsapoga a tsamaya ka dinao." 
Acts14:11 E rile matshutitshuti a batho a bona se Paulo o se dirileng, ba tlhatlosa mantswe, ba bua ka puo ya Selukaonia, ba re: “Medimo e fologetse mo go rona ka setshwano sa batho.”" 
Acts14:12 Ba raya Barenabase leina ba re, Jupitere, Paulo ba re, Merekurio, ka e le ene mmui yo mogolo." 
Acts14:13 Moperesiti wa ga Jupitere, yo tempele ya gagwe e leng fa pele ga motse, a lere dikgomo le mekgabo ya ditšheše fa dikgorong tsa motse, mme a rata go isa setlhabelo le matshutitshuti a batho." 
Acts14:14 E rile baaposetole, Barenabase le Paulo, ba utlwa jalo, ba ikgagola diaparo, ba tlolela mo bontsing ba goa," 
Acts14:15 ba re: “Banna, lo direlang dilo tse? Le rona re batho ba re nang le maikutlo a a etsang a lona, re lo leretse Mafoko a a Molemo a go re, lo tlogele dilo tse tsa boithamako, lo sokologele mo Modimong o o tshedileng, o o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe le lewatle, le tsotlhe tse di mo go tsone;" 
Acts14:16 o e rileng mo metlheng ya ditshika tse di fetileng wa lesa ditšhaba tsa sepela mo ditseleng tse e leng tsa tsone fela. 
Acts14:17 Le fa go ntse jalo wa se ka wa nna fela o se na sesupo, ka o ne o ntse o dira molemo, wa lo nesetsa dipula tse di tswang mo legodimong, wa lo naya metlha ya maungo, wa tlatsa pelo tsa lona ka dijo le boitumelo.”" 
Acts14:18 Mme le fa ba bua mafoko a a ntseng jaana, go batlile go retela go thiba batho ba bantsi, gore ba se ba isetse setlhabelo." 
Acts14:19 Ga goroga Bajuta ba ba tswang Antioke le Ikonio; e rile ba sena go kgona matshutitshuti a batho, ba kgobotletsa Paulo ka maje, ba mo gogela kwa ntle ga motse, ba ithaya ba re o sule." 
Acts14:20 Ya re barutwa ba sa ntse ba mo dikanyeditse a tsoga, a tsena mo motseng; ya re ka moso a tswa a ya le Barenabase kwa Derebe." 
Acts14:21 Ya re ba sena go rera Mafoko a a Molemo mo motseng oo, mme ba dirile barutwa ba le bantsi, ba boela kwa Lusetera, le kwa Ikonio le kwa Antioke." 
Acts14:22 Ba nitimisa mewa ya barutwa, ba ba laya, gore ba nnele ruri mo tumelong, ba re: “Re na le go tsena mo bogosing jwa Modimo ka dipitlagano di le dintsi.”" 
Acts14:23 E rile ba sena go ba laolela bagolwane mo phuthegong nngwe le nngwe, le go rapela, ba ithibile mo dijong, ba ba neela Morena yo ba dumetseng mo go ene." 
Acts14:24 Ba ralala Pisidia, ba tla ba fitlha mo Pamfilia." 
Acts14:25 Ya re ba sena go bolela lefoko mo Perega, ba fologela kwa Atalia;" 
Acts14:26 mme ba tswa teng ka sekepe ba ya kwa Antioke, kwa ba kileng ba neelwa mo tshegofatsong ya Modimo teng, gore ba ye tirong e jaana ba e weditseng." 
Acts14:27 E rile ba sena go fitlha, ba phuthile phuthego, ba bolela dilo tsotlhe tse Modimo o di dirileng nabo, le ka fa o phunyeditseng Baditšhaba kgoro ya tumelo ka teng." 
Acts14:28 Mme ba diega ka lobaka lo loleele le barutwa. 
Acts15:1 Banna bangwe ba fologa kwa Jutea, ba fitlha ba ruta bakaulengwe, ba re: “Fa lo sa rupa ka fa mokgweng wa ga Moše, ga lo ka ke lwa bolokwa.”" 
Acts15:2 E rile Paulo le Barenabase ba ganela, ba botsanya nabo thata, bakaulengwe ba laola gore Paulo le Barenabase, le ba bangwe ba bone, ba tlhatlogele kwa Jerusalema kwa baaposetoleng le kwa bagolwaneng ka ga kgang e." 
Acts15:3 Ba buledisiwa ke phuthego; ba feta ba ralala Finikia le Samaria, ba eta ba bolela tlhabologo ya Baditšhaba; ba itumedisa bakaulengwe botlhe ka boitumelo jo bogolo." 
Acts15:4 Ya re ba sena go fitlha mo Jerusalema, ba tsholwa ke phuthego le baaposetole le bagolwane, ba bolela dilo tsotlhe tse Modimo o di dirileng nabo." 
Acts15:5 Mme ga tsoga bangwe ba lekoko la Bafarisai ba ba dumelang, ba re: “Ke tshwanelo go ba rupisa, le go ba laya gore ba tshegetse molao wa ga Moše.”" 
Acts15:6 Baaposetole le bagolwane ba phuthegela kgang e go e bua. 
Acts15:7 E rile go sena go dirala kgang e kgolo, Petere a ema, a ba raya a re: “Bakaulengwe, lo a itse ka fa e rileng mo motlheng ole Modimo wa itebalebela mo go lona ka teng, gore Baditšhaba ba utlwe lefoko la Mafoko a a Molemo ka molomo wa me, mme ba dumele." 
Acts15:8 Modimo o o itseng pelo ya motho, wa supa ka ga bone ka go ba naya Mowa o o Boitshepo, fela jaaka o o neile rona;" 
Acts15:9 mme ga o a ka wa farologanya mo go rona le bone, mme wa ntlafatsa dipelo tsa bone ka tumelo." 
Acts15:10 Ke gone, lo lekelang Modimo, fa e bo ne ne lo baya mo thamong tsa barutwa jokwe e e reteletseng borraetsho le rona go e rwala?" 
Acts15:11 Re a dumela fa re tlaa bolokwa ka tshegofatso ya Morena Jesu, fela jaaka bone.”" 
Acts15:12 Mme batho ba bantsi botlhe ba didimala; ba reetsa Barenabase le Paulo ka ba bolela ditshupo le dikgakgamatso tse Modimo o di dirileng mo go Baditšhaba ka bone. 
Acts15:13 E rile ba sena go khutla go bua, Jakobe a fetola a re: “Bakaulengwe, ntheetsang:" 
Acts15:14 Simone o boletse ka fa e rileng pele Modimo wa lekola Baditšhaba ka teng, gore o tlhaolele leina la one batho mo go bone." 
Acts15:15 Le mafoko a baperofeti a dumalanye le gone; jaaka go kwadilwe ga twe: 
Acts15:16 “ ‘Morago ga dilo tse ke tlaa boa, mme ke tlaa ba ke aga motlaagana wa ga Dafite o o oleng; ke tlaa ba ke aga marope a one, ke ba ke o emisa;" 
Acts15:17 gore masalela a batho a batle Morena, le Baditšhaba botlhe ba leina la me le bidiwang mo go bone." 
Acts15:18 Go bua Morena, yo o sa leng a senola dilo tse mo tshimologong ya lefatshe.’" 
Acts15:19 “Ke gone, katlholo ya me ke e, ka re: A re se tshwenyeng ba ba tswang mo go Baditšhaba ba sokologela mo Modimong;" 
Acts15:20 mme a re ba kwaleleng, gore ba ithibe mo go tse di leswefatsang tsa medimo ya disetwa, le mo boakeng, le mo go se se betilweng, le mo mading a dilo tse di tlhabilweng." 
Acts15:21 Gonne e sa le ka metlha ya bogologolo, Moše o ntse a na le ba ba mo rerang gale mo motseng mongwe le mongwe, ka a balwa mo matlong a thuto ka boSabata botlhe fela.”" 
Acts15:22 Foo baaposetole le bagolwane, ba na le phuthego yotlhe, ba fitlhela go ka nna molemo go itshenkela banna bangwe ba lesomo la bone, le go ba roma kwa Antioke, ba ya le Paulo le Barenabase; e bong Jutase, yo o bidiwang Baresabase, le Silase, e le batho ba bagolo mo bakaulengweng." 
Acts15:23 Mme ba kwala ka bone jaana, ba re: “Baaposetole le bakaulengwe ba bagolwane ba dumedisa bakaulengwe ba bone ba Baditšhaba, ba ba kwa Antioke le kwa Siria, le kwa Kilikia; ra re:" 
Acts15:24 E re ka re utlwile fa bangwe ba ba duleng mo go rona, ba lo tshwentse ka mafoko, ba fudua mewa ya lona; mme e le ba re sa ba nayang taolo epe;" 
Acts15:25 e re ka re dumalanye, re fitlhetse go ka nna molemo go itshenkela banna bangwe, le go ba roma kwa go lona, ba ya le Barenabase le Paulo, baratwa ba rona," 
Acts15:26 e le banna ba ba beetseng leina la Morena Jesu Keresete matshelo a bone. 
Acts15:27 Ra re, re romile Jutase le Silase, ba le bone ba tlaa lo bolelelang dilo tse, ka puo ya molomo." 
Acts15:28 Gonne, go le Mowa o o Boitshepo, go le rona, re fitlhetse go le molemo gore re se ka ra lo baya morwalo ope go fetisa dilo tse di tshwanetseng tse;" 
Acts15:29 e bong gore lo ithibe mo dilong tse di isediwang medimo ya disetwa ditlhabelo, le mo mading a dilo tse di tlhabilweng, le mo dilong tse di betilweng, le mo boakeng; tse e tlaa reng fa lo ithibile mo go tsone, go bo go tlaa nna molemo mo go lona. Dumelang.”" 
Acts15:30 Jalo e rile ba sena go newa tsela, ba ya ba fitlha kwa Antioke; mme ya re ba sena go phutha batho ba le bantsi, ba ba naya lokwalo." 
Acts15:31 Ya re ba sena go lo bala, ba itumelela kgomotso." 
Acts15:32 Jutase le Silase, ka le bone e le baperofeti, ba laya bakaulengwe ka mafoko a le mantsi, ba ba nitamisa." 
Acts15:33 E rile ba sena go fetisa lobaka teng, ba newa tsela ka kagiso go tswa mo bakaulengweng, le go boela kwa go ba ba ba romileng. (" 
Acts15:34 Mme ga kgatlha Silase go nna teng.) 
Acts15:35 Paulo le Barenabase ba diega mo Antioke, ba ruta, ba rera lefoko la Morena, ba na le ba bangwe ba le bantsi." 
Acts15:36 E rile malatsi mangwe a sena go feta, Paulo a raya Barenabase a re: “Jaanong a re boe, re ye go tlhola bakaulengwe mo motseng mongwe le mongwe o re boletseng lefoko la Morena mo go one, re bone ka fa ba tshelang ka teng.”" 
Acts15:37 Mme Barenabase a bo a rata gore le ene Johane, yo o bidiwang Mareko, a ye nabo." 
Acts15:38 Mme Paulo a se ka a fitlhela go ka nna molemo fa ba ka ya le motho yo o ikgaogantseng nabo kwa Pamfilia, mme a se ka a ya nabo tirong." 
Acts15:39 Mme ga tsoga kgang e e botlhoko, ba ba ba tla ba kgaogana; Barenabase a tsaya Mareko, a ya kwa Kupero ka sekepe;" 
Acts15:40 mme Paulo a tsaya Silase, a bolola, bakaulengwe ba sena go mo rapelela tshegofatso ya Morena." 
Acts15:41 A ya a ralala Siria le Kilikia, a ntse a nitamisa diphuthego." 
Acts16:1 A ya go fitlha le kwa Derebe le Lusetera; mme bonang, ga bo go le morutwa mongwe teng, yo o bidiwang Timotheo, morwa mosadi wa Sejuta wa modumedi; rraagwe e le Mogerika." 
Acts16:2 Ene yoo a bo a bolelwa ka molemo ke bakaulengwe ba ba mo Lusetera le mo Ikonio. 
Acts16:3 Paulo a rata a ka bo a tsamaya nae; mme a mo tsaya a mo rupisa, ka ntlha ya Bajuta ba ba mo mafatsheng ao, gonne ba itse botlhe fa rraagwe e le Mogerika." 
Acts16:4 Ya re ba ntse ba eta ba tsena ka metse, ba ba neela melao go e tshegetsa, e bong e e tlhomilweng ke baaposetole le bagolwane ba ba kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts16:5 Diphuthego tsa kgothala mo tumelong, tsa ntsifala mo palong ka malatsi otlhe." 
Acts16:6 Ba ya ba ralala lefatshe la Ferugia le la Galatia, ka ba iditswe ke Mowa o o Boitshepo go bolela lefoko mo Asia;" 
Acts16:7 e rile ba sena go fitlha bolebana le Musia, ba leka go ya go tsena kwa Bithunia; mme Mowa wa ga Jesu wa se ka wa ba leseletsa;" 
Acts16:8 ba feta Musia, ba fologela kwa Teroase." 
Acts16:9 Mme Paulo a bona ponatshegelo bosigo; ga bo go eme monna wa Maketonia a mo rapela, a re: “Kgabaganyetsa kwano Maketonia, o tle go re thusa.”" 
Acts16:10 Ya re a sena go bona ponatshegelo e, ra akofa ra senka go tswela kwa Maketonia, re ithaya, re re Modimo o re biditse, gore re ye go ba rerela Mafoko a a Molemo." 
Acts16:11 Ke gone ra tswa mo Teroase ka sekepe, ra siamela kwa Samotherake, mme ya re ka moso ra fitlha kwa Neapolise." 
Acts16:12 Ra tswa gone ra ya kwa Filipi, o e leng motse wa Maketonia, e bile e le one o mogolo wa kgaolo eo ya lefatshe, e bile e le kolone ya Seroma; mme ra tlhola malatsi mangwe mo motseng oo." 
Acts16:13 Ya re ka letsatsi la Sabata re tswela kwa ntle ga kgoro ya motse, fa nokeng nngwe, kwa re rileng go na le felo ga thapelelo teng, mme ra dula, ra bua le basadi ba ba phuthegetseng teng." 
Acts16:14 Mosadi mongwe, yo go tweng Lidia, morekisi wa dikhai tse di bohibidu jo bo mokgona, wa motse wa Thiatira, e le yo o obamelang Modimo, ene a re utlwa, mme Morena a bula pelo ya gagwe, gore a tlhokomele dilo tse di buiwang ke Paulo." 
Acts16:15 E rile a sena go kolobediwa, le ba ntlo ya gagwe, a re rapela a re: “Fa lo nkaile ke le boikanngo mo Moreneng, lo tle mo ntlong ya me, mme lo nne teng.” Mme a re patelela." 
Acts16:16 Ga dirala e rile re ya kwa felong ga thapelelo, morweetsana mongwe yo o tsenyweng ke mowa wa too, a re kgatlhantsha, e le yo o bapalelang beng ba gagwe ka go bolela dilo tsa boitseanape." 
Acts16:17 A sala Paulo le rona morago, a tlhomeletsa, a re: “Banna ba ke batlhanka ba Modimo wa Mogodimodimo, ba ba lo bolelelang tsela ya poloko.”" 
Acts16:18 A nna a dira jalo ka malatsi a le mantsi. Mme Paulo ka a tshwenyega thata, a retologa, a raya mowa a re: “Ke a go laola ka leina la ga Jesu Keresete, tswa mo go ene.” Mme wa tswa fela ka lobaka loo." 
Acts16:19 E rile beng ba gagwe ba bona fa tsholofelo ya bone ya papadi e ile, ba tshwara Paulo le Silase, ba ba gogela kwa patlelong ya motse ya borekelo, fa pele ga balaodi." 
Acts16:20 Ya re ba sena go ba fitlhisa fa baatlhoding, ba re: “Banna ba e re e le Bajuta, ba tshwenya motse wa rona thata." 
Acts16:21 Ba simolola mekgwa e re sa letlelelwang go e amogela, le fa e le go e dira, ka re le Baroma.”" 
Acts16:22 Bontsi jwa batho jwa ba kgwelogela mmogo; mme baatlhodi ba ba rutla dikobo, ba laola gore ba itewe ka dithupa." 
Acts16:23 Ya re ba sena go ba baya dithupa di le dintsi, ba ba latlhela mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, ba laya modisa wa ntlo gore a ba tshware thata." 
Acts16:24 Mme ene o rile a sena go laiwa jalo, a ba latlhela mo kgolegelong e e kwa teng, mme a somela dinao tsa bone mo disaneng." 
Acts16:25 Mme ya re bosigogare, Paulo le Silase ba bo ba rapela, ba opelela Modimo difela, mme bagolegwi ba bangwe ba ntse ba reeditse;" 
Acts16:26 ba tshogana ka go nna thoromo e kgolo ya lefatshe, metheo ya ntlo ya kgolegelo ya ba ya tla ya reketla, le mejako yotlhe ya bulega ka bonako, le dikgole tsa botlhe tsa hunologa." 
Acts16:27 Modisa wa ntlo ya kgolegelo, ya re a tsosiwa mo borokong a fitlhela mejako ya ntlo ya kgolegelo e bulegile, a somola tšhaka, a re o a ipolaya, a itlhoma bagolegwi ba thobile." 
Acts16:28 Mme Paulo a goa ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Se ipolaye; gonne re fano rotlhe!” 
Acts16:29 Foo modisa wa ntlo ya kgolegelo a re dipone di tle, mme a tlolela mo teng, a wela fa pele ga Paulo le Silase, a roroma ka poifo," 
Acts16:30 a ba ntshetsa kwa ntle, a re: “Barena, ke tlaa dirang gore ke bolokwe?”" 
Acts16:31 Ba re: “Dumela mo go Morena Jesu, mme o tlaa bolokwa, wena le ba ntlo ya gago.”" 
Acts16:32 Ba bua lefoko la Morena nae le botlhe ba ba mo ntlong ya gagwe. 
Acts16:33 A ba tsaya ka lobaka loo lwa bosigo, a tlhatswa dintho tsa bone; mme a akofa a kolobediwa, ene le ba gagwe botlhe fela." 
Acts16:34 A ba ise mo ntlong ya gagwe, a ba fa dijo, a itumela thata, le botlhe ba ntlo ya gagwe, ka ba dumetse mo Modimong." 
Acts16:35 E rile bosa bo sele, baatlhodi ba roma maotlana ba re: “Yang lo golole batho bao.”" 
Acts16:36 Modisa wa ntlo ya kgolegelo a bolelela Paulo mafoko a bone a re: “Baatlhodi ba romile gore lo gololwe; mme ke gone, tswang lo tsamaye ka kagiso.”" 
Acts16:37 Mme Paulo a ba raya a re: “Ba re iteetse mo ponatshegelong, re sa bone tsheko, re le banna ba re leng Baroma, ba bile ba re latlhetse mo ntlong ya kgolegelo; mme gompieno a ba re naya naga fela ka go sa itsiweng? Le bogologolo! A go tle bone ka bosi, ba re ntshetse kwa ntle.”" 
Acts16:38 Maotlana a ya a bolelela baatlhodi mafoko a; mme ya re ba utlwa fa e le Baroma ba boifa; 
Acts16:39 mme ba tla ba ba rapela; e rile ba sena go ba ntshetsa kwa ntle, ba ba lopa gore ba tswe mo motseng, ba tsamaye." 
Acts16:40 Mme ba tswa mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, ba ya ba tsena mo ntlong ya ga Lidia; ya re ba sena go bona bakaulengwe, ba ba gomotsa, ba itse go tsamaya." 
Acts17:1 Jaana e rile ba sena go ralala Amfipolise le Apolonia, ba fitlha mo Thesalonika, kwa go nang le ntlo ya thuto ya Bajuta teng." 
Acts17:2 Paulo a tsena mo go bone jaaka tlwaelo ya gagwe, a nna a fetolana nabo ka dikwalo, ka boSabata ba le bararo." 
Acts17:3 A ranola, a ba rulaganyetsa gore, go ne go tshwanetse fa Keresete a tlaa swa, le go ba a tsoga mo losong, a ba a re: “Jesu yo ke mo lo bolelelang, ke ene Keresete.”" 
Acts17:4 Bangwe ba bone ba utlwa, mme ba ikopanya le Paulo le Silase; le bontsi jo bogolo jwa Bagerika ba ba rapelang Modimo, le bahumagadi ba le bantsinyana." 
Acts17:5 Mme Bajuta, ka ba tlhotlhelediwa ke lefufa, ba itseela banna bangwe ba difephe, mo go ba e leng babodufadi ba ba senang molemo ope; e rile ba sena go kgobokanya batho, ba feretlha motse, ba tlhasela ntlo ya ga Jasone, ba leka go ba ntshetsha mo bathong." 
Acts17:6 E rile ba sa ba fitlhele, ba swabolela Jasone le bakaulengwe bangwe kwa pele ga bolaodi ba motse, ba goa ka thata ba re: “Batho ba, ba ba tshelepantseng lefatshe, le mono ba tsile." 
Acts17:7 Jasone o ba amogetse; mme batho ba botlhe ba tlola melao ya ga Kaesare, ka ba re go na le kgosi e nngwe ga twe, Jesu.”" 
Acts17:8 Ya re batho le balaodi ba motse ba utlwa dilo tse, ba fuduega." 
Acts17:9 Ya re ba sena go lefisa Jasone le ba bangwe, ba ba lesa ba tsamaya." 
Acts17:10 Bakaulengwe ba akofa ba tshabisa Paulo le Silase bosigo, ba ya kwa Berea; ya re ba fitlha teng, ba tsena mo ntlong ya thuto ya Bajuta." 
Acts17:11 Bone ba ne ba tsalegile bogolo go ba ba kwa Thesalonika, ka ba amogetse lefoko ka pelo e e etleetsegileng, ba lotolotsa mo dikwalong ka malatsi otlhe, fa dilo tse di ntse jalo." 
Acts17:12 Ke gone ba le bantsi ba bone ba dumela; le bahumagadi ba ba tlotlegang ba Bagerika, le banna ba le bantsinyana." 
Acts17:13 E rile Bajuta ba Thesalonika ba tlhaloganya fa lefoko la Modimo le bolelwa ke Paulo le mo Berea, le gone ba ya teng, ba feretlha, ba fudua bontsintsi jwa batho." 
Acts17:14 Foo bakaulengwe ba akofa ba tshabisa Paulo, ba re ba mo isa kwa lewatleng; mme Silase le Timotheo ba nama ba sa setse teng." 
Acts17:15 Ba ba tsamaisitseng Paulo ba ya ba mo fitlhisa kwa Athene; ya re ba sena go laelediwa kwa go Silase le Timotheo, gore ba tle kwa go ene ka bonako, ba tsamaya." 
Acts17:16 E rile ka Paulo a sa ntse a ba nnetse mo Athene, mowa wa gagwe wa tlhotlheletsega mo teng ga gagwe, ka a bona motse o tletse medimo ya disetwa." 
Acts17:17 Jalo a nna a fetolana le Bajuta le batho ba ba rapelang Modimo, ba le mo ntlong ya thuto, le mo patlelong ya motse ya borekelo ka malatsi otlhe, a fetolana le ba o rakanang nabo." 
Acts17:18 Batlhale bangwe ba Baepikuria le Basetoike le bone ba ganetsanya nae. Mme bangwe ba re: “O ba a rata go buang mmalabadi yo?” Ba bangwe ba re: “E kete e ka nna mmoledi wa medimo e sele,” ka gobo a bolela Jesu le go tsoga ga baswi." 
Acts17:19 Mme ba mo tshwara, ba mo isa kwa Areopago, ba re: “Tswee, a ga re ka ke ra itse thuto e ntšha e, e o e bolelang, gore ke eng?" 
Acts17:20 Gonne o lere dilo dingwe di sele mo ditsebeng tsa rona; mme ra re, re rata go itse dilo tse kwa di kaelang teng.”" 
Acts17:21 Jaana Baathene botlhe le baeng ba ba jakileng teng, ba ne ba tle ba fetise lobaka lwa bone ba sa dire sepe sa bobedi, fa e se go bolela le fa e le go utlwa sengwe se seša fela." 
Acts17:22 Paulo a ema fa gare ga Areopago a re: “Lona banna ba Athene, ke a lemoga fa e kete lo na le tshisimogo mo dilong tsotlhe." 
Acts17:23 Gonne e rile ke feta, ke leba dilo tse lo di obamelang, ka fitlhela le sone sebeso sengwe, se na le sekwalo sa go re: SA MODIMO MONGWE O O SA ITSIWENG. Ke gone, se lona le se obamelang ka go tlhoka go itse, ke sone se ke se lo ranolelang." 
Acts17:24 Modimo o o dirileng lefatshe le dilo tsotlhe tse di mo go lone, one, ka o le Morena wa legodimo, le lefatshe, ga o nne mo ditempeleng tse di agiwang ka diatla;" 
Acts17:25 le gone ga o direlwe ke diatla tsa batho, jaaka e kete o tlhoka selo sengwe, e tswa one ka osi o naya botlhe botshelo, le mowa le dilo tsotlhe;" 
Acts17:26 o dirile ditšhaba tsotlhe tsa batho, ba tswa mothong a le mongwe fela, go tla ba aga mo lefatsheng lotlhe, ka o tlhomamisitse metlha ya bone e e laotsweng, le melelwane ya maago a bone;" 
Acts17:27 gore ba batle Modimo, e tle e re kgotsa ba o apaape, ba o bone, le fa o se kgakala le mongwe le mongwe wa rona;" 
Acts17:28 gonne mo go one re a tshela, mo go one re a tshikinyega, re leyo ka one; jaaka le bangwe bantshi ba dipina ba lona ba buile ba re: ‘Gonne le rona re losika lwa one.’" 
Acts17:29 Ke gone e re ka re le lotsalo lwa Modimo, ga re a tshwanela go gopola fa o e leng Modimo tota o ka tshwana le gouta, le fa e le selefera, le fa e le lentswe le le setilweng ka botswerere le maano a motho." 
Acts17:30 Ke gone, metlha ya botlhoka kitso, Modimo o ne wa e tlhokomologa; mme gompieno o laola gore batho botlhe ba ikwatlhaye ka ntlha tsotlhe," 
Acts17:31 ka o tlhomile letsatsi le o tlaa atlholang lefatshe ka lone ka tshiamo, ka monna yo o mo laotseng; mo, o go tlhomamiseditse batho botlhe ka o mo tsositse mo baswing.”" 
Acts17:32 Jaana ya re ba utlwa ka ga go tsoga ga baswi, bangwe ba sotla; ba bangwe ba re: “Re tlaa ba re go utlwa gape ka ga moo.”" 
Acts17:33 Paulo a tswa mo go bone jalo. 
Acts17:34 Banna bangwe ba mo ngaparela, ba dumela; Dionisio wa Moareopago le ene a le mo go bone, le mosadi mongwe yo o bidiwang Damarise, le ba bangwe nabo." 
Acts18:1 Morago ga dilo tse Paulo a tswa mo Athene, a ya a fitlha kwa Korinthe." 
Acts18:2 A fitlhela Mojuta mongwe, yo go tweng Akwila, e le motho wa kwa Ponto ka fa losikeng, yo e leng gone o tswang kwa Itale, a na le Perisila mosadi wa gagwe, ka gobo Kelaudio a ne a laotse gore Bajuta botlhe ba tswe mo Roma; mme Paulo a ya kwa go bone;" 
Acts18:3 ya re ka a le tiro nngwe fela nabo, a nna nabo, mme ba dira, gonne e ne e le badiri ba megope ya dikhai." 
Acts18:4 Ka Sabata mongwe le mongwe, a fetolana le batho mo ntlong ya thuto, a leka go kgona Bajuta le Bagerika." 
Acts18:5 E rile Silase le Timotheo ba tswa kwa Maketonia, Paulo a patelelwa ke lefoko, a supetsa Bajuta fa Jesu e le ene Keresete." 
Acts18:6 Mme ya re ba ikganetsa, ba kgala, a ikudubatsa kobo, a ba raya a re: “A madi a lona a nne mo ditlhogong tsa lona! Nna ke tlhapile, jaanong ke tloga ke ya kwa go Baditšhaba.”" 
Acts18:7 A tswa teng, a ya mo ntlong ya monna mongwe go twe Tito Juseto, e le motho yo o obamelang Modimo, yo ntlo ya gagwe e tshwaraganyeng le ntlo ya thuto." 
Acts18:8 Mme Kerisepo, molaodi wa ntlo ya thuto, a dumela mo Moreneng, le botlhe ba ntlo ya gagwe; le Bakorinthe ba le bantsi, ya re ba utlwa, ba dumela, mme ba kolobediwa." 
Acts18:9 Morena a bua le Paulo bosigo ka ponatshegelo a re: “O se ka wa boifa, bua fela, o se ka wa didimala;" 
Acts18:10 gonne ke na nao, ga go ope yo o tlaa go tlhaselang go go utlwisa botlhoko; gonne ke na le batho ba le bantsi mo motseng o.”" 
Acts18:11 A nna teng ngwaga le dikgwedi di le thataro, a ba ruta lefoko la Modimo." 
Acts18:12 E rile Galio a le molaodisiwa wa Akaia, Bajuta ba tsogologela Paulo gongwe, ba mo isa kwa sennong sa tshekelo," 
Acts18:13 ba re: “Monna yo, o khukhela batho gore ba obamele Modimo ka fa mokgweng o o tlhabanang le molao.”" 
Acts18:14 Mme ya re Paulo a itlhoma gore o a bua, Galio a raya Bajuta a re: “Bajuta ke lona, le gale fa e ka bo e le sengwe sa molato, le fa e le sa bolotsana, ke ne ke ka fitlhela ke tshwanetse go iphapaanya le lona;" 
Acts18:15 mme fa e le dikgang tsa mafoko le maina le molao o e leng wa lona ka losi, a go iponele lona koo; nna ga ke na go nna moatlhodi wa dilo tseo.”" 
Acts18:16 Mme a ba leleka mo tshekelong. 
Acts18:17 Botlhe ba tshwara Sosethenese, molaodi wa ntlo ya thuto, ba mmeletsa fa pele ga senno sa tshekelo. Mme Galio a se ka a re sepe ka dilo tse." 
Acts18:18 Paulo, o rile a sena go tlhola malatsi a le mantsi morago ga dilo tse, a sadisa bakaulengwe sentle, a tswa teng ka sekepe, a ya kwa Siria, a na le Perisila le Akwila; a bile a ipeotse tlhogo mo Kenkerea; gonne o ne a na le ikano." 
Acts18:19 Ba fitlha kwa Efeso, mme a ba tlogela teng; ene a tsena mo ntlong ya thuto, a nna a fetolana le Bajuta." 
Acts18:20 Ya re ba mo lopa gore a name a sa ntse nabo, a se ka a dumela;" 
Acts18:21 mme ya re a sena go ba sadisa sentle, a tswa mo Efeso ka sekepe, a ba reile a re: “Fa e le go rata ga Modimo, ke tlaa ba ke boela kwano go lona.”" 
Acts18:22 O rile kwa Kaesarea a tswa mo sekepeng a tlhatloga a ya go dumedisa phuthego, mme a itse go fologela kwa Antioke." 
Acts18:23 E rile a sena go fetisa lobaka teng, a tloga a tsamaya, a ya a ralala lefatshe la Galatia le la Ferugia ka thulaganyo, a kgothatsa barutwa botlhe." 
Acts18:24 Jaana Mojuta mongwe a tla mo Efeso, yo go tweng Apolose, e le Moalekesanteria ka fa botsalong, e le motho yo o seleta mo puong; a bile a nonofile mo dikwalong." 
Acts18:25 Monna yo, o kile a nna a rutwa mo tseleng ya Morena; mme ka a ne a le motho yo o mowa o tlhoafetseng, a bua a ba a ruta batho dilo tse e leng ka ga Jesu ka kelelelo, a itse kolobetso ya ga Johane e le yosi fela." 
Acts18:26 A simolola go bua ka pelokgale mo ntlong ya thuto. Ya re Perisila le Akwila ba mo utlwa, ba mo itseela kwa ga bone, ba mo phuthololela tsela ya Modimo ka kelelelo bogolo." 
Acts18:27 O rile a na le keletso ya go tlolaganyetsa kwa Akaia, bakaulengwe ba mo nametsa pelo, ba ba ba kwalela barutwa, gore ba mo tshole sentle; ya re a fitlha a thusa thata ba ba dumetseng ka tshegofatso;" 
Acts18:28 gonne a ganetsa Bajuta, a ba sita thata, e bile e le mo ponatshegong, a supa ka dikwalo fa Jesu e le ene Keresete." 
Acts19:1 Ya re Apolose a sa ntse a le kwa Korinthe, ga dirala ya bo Paulo a fitlha mo Efeso, a raletse lefatshe ntlheng ya godimo, a fitlhela barutwa bangwe teng." 
Acts19:2 A ba raya a re: “A e rile lo dumela a lo ne lwa amogela Mowa o o Boitshepo?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Nnyaa, le fa e le go utlwa, ga re a ka ra ba ra utlwa fa Mowa o o Botshepo o neilwe bangwe.”" 
Acts19:3 A re: “Ana lo kolobeleditswe eng?” Ba re: “Kolobetso ya ga Johane.” 
Acts19:4 Paulo a re: “Johane o kolobeditse ka kolobetso ya boikwatlhao, a raya batho a re ba dumele mo go ene yo o tlaa tlang morago ga gagwe, e bong mo go Jesu.”" 
Acts19:5 E rile ba sena go utlwa jalo, ba kolobediwa mo ineng la Morena Jesu." 
Acts19:6 Ya re Paulo a sena go ba baya diatla, Mowa o o Botshepo wa tla mo go bone; mme ba bua ka dipuo di sele, ba ba ba perofesa." 
Acts19:7 Ba bo ba le e ka ne e le banna ba le 12 fa ba le mmogo. 
Acts19:8 A tsena mo ntlong ya thuto, a bua ka pelokgale ka lobaka lwa dikgwedi di le tharo, a fetolana nabo, a leka go ba kgona ka ga dilo tsa bogosi jwa Modimo." 
Acts19:9 E rile bangwe ba ikgwaralatsa dipelo, ba gana go utlwa, ba bua bosula ka ga Tsela fa pele ga batho, a ba tlogela, mme a lomolola barutwa, a fetolana le batho ka malatsi otlhe mo sekoleng sa ga Turano." 
Acts19:10 Mo ga tswelela ka lobaka lwa dinyaga di le pedi; ga tsamaya botlhe ba ba agileng mo lefatsheng la Asia ba utlwa lefoko la Modimo, Bajuta le Bagerika." 
Acts19:11 Mme Modimo wa dira dikgakgamatso dingwe tse di feteletseng, ka diatla tsa ga Paulo," 
Acts19:12 ga tsamaya ga isediwa balwetsi matsela, le fa e le dikhiba tse di amileng mmele wa gagwe, mme malwetsi a ba tlogela, le mewa e e maswe ya tswa." 
Acts19:13 Bapholethi bangwe ba Bajuta, ba ba reng ba ka ntsha mewa e e maswe, ba simolola go bitsa leina la Morena Jesu mo godimo ga ba ba nang le mewa e e maswe, ba re: “Ke a go laola ka Jesu yo Paulo o mo rerang.”" 
Acts19:14 Ga bo go le banna ba supa, e le bomorwa Sekefa, Mojuta le tlhogo mo baperesiting ba ba dirileng jalo." 
Acts19:15 Mme mowa o o maswe wa ba fetola wa re: “Jesu ke a mo itse, le Paulo ke a mo itse; mme lona lo bomang?”" 
Acts19:16 Mme monna yo mowa o o maswe o mo go ene a ba tlolela, a ba betelela boo babedi, a ba fenya, mme ba tswa mo ntlong eo ba tshaba ba sa ikatega, ba bile ba le dintho." 
Acts19:17 Golo mo, ga tla ga itsiwe ke botlhe ba ba agileng mo Efeso, Bajuta le Bagerika; mme poifo ya ba wela botlhe, le leina la Morena Jesu la godisiwa." 
Acts19:18 Le gone ba le bantsi ba bone ba ba dumetseng ba tla, ba ipolela, ba kakanya ditiro tsa bone." 
Acts19:19 Le ba le bantsi ba bone ba ba dirang ditiro tsa tseanyo, tse di forang, ba kgobokanya dikwalo tsa bone, ba di fisa ka molelo fa pele ga batho botlhe, mme ba bala madi a tsone, ba fitlhela a le diponto di le 5 000." 
Acts19:20 Lefoko la Modimo la tota la fenya ka nonofo e e kalo. 
Acts19:21 Jaana e rile dilo tse di sena go fela, Paulo a ikaelela mo moweng wa gagwe, gore e tlaa re a sena go ralala Maketonia le Akaia, a ye Jerusalema; a re: “Ke tlaa re ke sena go ya teng, ke bo ke na le go ya go bona le one Roma.”" 
Acts19:22 Ya re a sena go roma kwa Maketonia batho ba le babedi ba bone ba ba mo direlang, e bong Timotheo le Eraseto, ene a nama a sa setse mo lefatsheng la Asia ka lobakanyana." 
Acts19:23 E rile ka lobaka loo ga tsoga pheretlho e kgolo ka ga Tsela. 
Acts19:24 Gonne go ne go le monna mongwe, go twe Demeterio, mothudi wa selefera, yo o dirang ditempelana tsa selefera tsa ga Diana, mme badiri ba tiro e, a ba bapadise thata;" 
Acts19:25 mme a phutha bone bao, le badiri ba tiro e e ntseng jalo, a re: “Banna, lo a itse fa re bona khumo ya rona ka tiro e." 
Acts19:26 Lo a bona, lo a utlwa, fa motho yo Paulo a kgonne, a bile a sokolotse batho ba le bantsi, e seng mo Efeso go le gosi, mme e leng le mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Asia, a re medimo e e dirwang ka diatla, ga se medimo epe." 
Acts19:27 Ga se gore, go ka boifiwa fa tiro ya rona e tlaa nyatsega go le gosi; le gone go ka boifiwa fa tempele ya ga Diana, modimo o mogolo wa sesadi, e tlaa kaiwa e se sepe, le ene a tlosediwe kgalalelo ya gagwe, yo Asia le lefatshe lotlhe le mo obamelang.”" 
Acts19:28 Ya re ba utlwa jalo ba tlala bogale, ba thela lošalaba, ba re: “Go mogolo Diana wa Baefesia!”" 
Acts19:29 Motse wa tlala pheretlhego, mme ya re ba sena go tshwara Gaio le Arisetareko, e le banna ba Maketonia ba ba patileng Paulo mo loetong, ba phomegelela gongwe kwa kagong ya botshamekelo." 
Acts19:30 E rile Paulo a eletsa go tsena kwa bathong, barutwa ba se ka ba mo leseletsa." 
Acts19:31 Le bangwe ba bagolwane ba lefatshe la Asia, e le ditsala tsa gagwe, ba roma kwa go ene, ba mo rapela gore a se ka a leka go tsena mo kagong ya botshamekelo." 
Acts19:32 Ke gone bangwe ba bua se, ba bangwe ba bua se sele; gonne phuthego e ne e feretlhegile, mme bogolo jwa bone ba sa itse se ba se phuthegetseng." 
Acts19:33 Ba swabola Alekesantere mo bontsing jwa batho, Bajuta e le bone ba ba mo suteletsang fa pele. Alekesantere a gwetlha ka seatla, mme a rata go ikarabela batho." 
Acts19:34 Ya re ba lemoga fa e le Mojuta, ba thela lošalaba ka lobaka lwa dinako di le pedi, ba re: “Go mogolo Diana wa Baefesia!”" 
Acts19:35 E rile mokwaledi wa motse a sena go kgaodisa batho, a re: “Lona banna ba Efeso, ana go na le motho ofe yo o sa itseng fa motse wa Baefesia e le modisa wa tempele ya ga Diana yo mogolo, le wa setshwantsho se se oleng kwa go Jupitere?" 
Acts19:36 Jaana, e re ka dilo tse di sa ka ke tsa ganediwa, lo tshwanetse go didimala fela; e seng go dira sepe ka kgakgabuelo." 
Acts19:37 Gonne banna ba lo ba lerileng fano, ga se ba ba utswang mo ditempeleng, e bile ga se batlhapatsi ba modimo wa rona wa sesadi." 
Acts19:38 Ke gone, fa Demeterio le badiri ba o nang nabo, ba na le sengwe se ba se sekang le motho mongwe, ntlo ya tshekelo ga e a tswalwa, le baatlhodi ba gone; a ba ye go naana molato." 
Acts19:39 Fa lo batla sengwe ka ga dilo tse dingwe, se tlaa baakanngwa mo go e e leng phuthego e e laotsweng ke molao." 
Acts19:40 Gonne ruri re na le go boifa, gore re tlaa newa molato wa tlhapeo e, ya gompieno, gonne ga e na ka fa e ka ipatelwang ka teng; mme re tlaa retelelwa ke ka fa re tlaa kayang phuthego e ka teng, ka ntlha ya yone tlhapeo.”" 
Acts19:41 Ya re a sena go bua jaana, a phatlalatsa phuthego." 
Acts20:1 E rile magawegawe a sena go khutla, Paulo a bitsa barutwa, a ba laya, a ba sadisa sentle, mme a bolola a ya kwa Maketonia." 
Acts20:2 Ya re a sena go ralala mafatshe ao, le go ba laya thata, a ya a fitlha kwa lefatsheng la Gerika." 
Acts20:3 Ya re a sena go nna dikgwedi di le tharo teng, mme e re ka Bajuta ba mo rera ka ditogamaano, jaaka a tlaa tloga a ya Siria ka sekepe, foo a bona mogopolo o sele wa go boa ka tsela ya Maketonia." 
Acts20:4 Go ya go fitlha kwa Asia, a patwa ke Sopatere wa Berea, morwa Pureho; le Arisetareko le Sekunto e le Bathesalonika; le Gaio wa Derebe, le Timotheo; le Tukiko le Terofimo e le ba Asia." 
Acts20:5 Ba, ba ne ba fetetse kwa pele, mme ba bo ba re letile kwa Teroase," 
Acts20:6 mme ra tswa mo Filipi ka sekepe morago ga malatsi a senkgwe se se sa bedisiwang, ra ya go fitlha kwa go bone kwa Teroase ka go tsamaya malatsi a le matlhano; mme ra tlhola teng malatsi a supa." 
Acts20:7 Ya re ka letsatsi la ntlha la beke, ka re phuthegetse go ngathoganya senkgwe, Paulo a nna a bua nabo, a ikaeletse go tsoga a tsamaya ka moso; a gololela puo ya gagwe go ya bosigogare." 
Acts20:8 Ga bo go le dipone di le dintsi mo ntlong e e fa godimo, e re phuthegetseng mo go yone." 
Acts20:9 Ga bo go dutse mo seiponeng lekau lengwe go twe Eutiko, a fentswe ke boroko jo bogolo; mme ya re ka Paulo a sa ntse a buele pele, ka a fentswe ke boroko, a wela fa fatshe a tswa kwa ntlong ya boraro e e kwa godimo, mme a tsholediwa a sule." 
Acts20:10 Mme Paulo a fologa, a mo wela godimo, a mo tlamparela, a re: “Lo se ka lwa tsosa modumo; gonne mowa wa gagwe o mo go ene.”" 
Acts20:11 Ya re a sena go tlhatloga, mme a ngatlhogantse senkgwe, e bile a jele, a bile a buile nabo ka boleele, bosigo jwa ba jwa tla jwa sa, jalo a tloga a tsamaya." 
Acts20:12 Mme ba tlisa mosimane a tshedile, mme ba gomotsega thata." 
Acts20:13 Rona, e re ka re ne re fetetse pele kwa sekepeng, ra ya kwa Asoso ka sekepe, re ikaeletse gore re tlaa tsaya Paulo teng; gonne o ne a laotse jalo, ka ene a ikaeletse go tla a potologa le tsela ya lefatshe." 
Acts20:14 E rile re rakana nae kwa Asoso, ra mo tsholela mo sekepeng, mme ra ya go fitlha kwa Mitulene." 
Acts20:15 Ra tswa foo ka sekepe, mme ka moso ra fitlha bolebana le Kiose; ka moso o mongwe ra ama Samose, ka moso o mongwe gape ra fitlha kwa Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Gonne Paulo a ne a laotse gore re fete Efeso ka sekepe, gore a tle a se ka a bona tiego mo lefatsheng la Asia; ka a itlhaganela, e tle e re kgotsa a bone go nna kwa Jerusalema ka tsatsi la Pentekoste, fa go ka nna jalo." 
Acts20:17 A le kwa Mileto a roma kwa Efeso, a ya go bitsa bagolwane ba phuthego." 
Acts20:18 E rile ba sena go fitlha kwa go ene, a ba raya a re: “Lona ka losi lo a itse ka fa ke ntseng ka nna mo go lona ka teng ka metlha yotlhe, go simolola ka letsatsi la ntlha le ke gorogileng ka lone mo lefatsheng la Asia." 
Acts20:19 Ke direla Morena ka boikokobetso jotlhe jwa pelo, le ka dikeledi, le ka diteko tse di nkwetseng ka ditogamaano tsa Bajuta;" 
Acts20:20 ka fa ke se kang ka boifa ka teng go lo bolelela sengwe le sengwe se se molemo, ke ruta mo ponong, le ka go nna ke tsamaya le matlo." 
Acts20:21 Ke supetsa Bajuta le Bagerika tlhabologelo Modimong, le tumelo mo go Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete." 
Acts20:22 Jaana bonang, ke etela kwa Jerusalema, ke pitlaganye mo moweng, ke sa itse dilo tse di tlaa nkwelang teng;" 
Acts20:23 fa e se gore, Mowa o o Boitshepo o nkaela mo motseng mongwe le mongwe gore dikgole le dipitlagano di ntuletse." 
Acts20:24 Mme botshelo jwa me ga ke bo kaye sepe, gore e kete ke bo rata thata, e le gore ke tle ke wetse sebaka sa me sa tshiamelo, le tirelo e ke e amogetseng mo go Morena Jesu, ya go supa Mafoko a a Molemo a tshegofatsho ya Modimo." 
Acts20:25 “Jaana bonang, ke a itse gore lona lotlhe ba ke ntseng ka nna ka tsamaya mo go lona ke rera bogosi, ga lo ketla lo tlhola lo bona sefatlhogo sa me gope." 
Acts20:26 Ke gone, ke supa mo go lona gompieno ka ga batho botlhe, fa ke se na molato mo mading a bone." 
Acts20:27 Gonne ga ke a ka ka boifa go lo bolelela kgakololo yotlhe ya Modimo. 
Acts20:28 Lo itise, lo bo lo dise letsomane lotlhe, le Mowa o o Boitshepo o lo dirileng baokami ba lone, gore lo otle phuthego ya Modimo e o e rekileng ka madi a one." 
Acts20:29 Ke a itse fa e tlaa re ke sena go tsamaya, go tlaa tsena mo go lona diphiri tse di setlhogo, tse di sa rekegeleng letsomane;" 
Acts20:30 le mo go lona ka losi, go tlaa tsoga banna ba ba buang dilo tse di sokameng, go tla ba itshadisa barutwa morago." 
Acts20:31 Ke gone disang, lo ntse lo gakologelwa fa e kile ya re ka lobaka lwa dinyaga di le tharo, ka nna ka lo gakolola lotlhe ka dikeledi, bosigo le motshegare." 
Acts20:32 “Jaana ke lo neela Modimo, ke lo neela lefoko la tshegofatso ya one, le le nonofileng go lo agelela, le go lo naya boswa mo go botlhe ba ba itshepisitsweng." 
Acts20:33 Ga ke a ka ka eletsa selefera sa ope, le fa e le gouta, le fa e le diaparo." 
Acts20:34 Lona ka losi lo a itse fa diatla tse di diretse go tlhoka ga me, le go tlhoka ga ba ke ne ke na nabo." 
Acts20:35 Ka lo beela sekao mo dilong tsotlhe, sa ka fa lo tshwanetseng go thusa ba ba bokoa ka teng, ka go dira mo go ntseng jalo, le go gakologelwa mafoko a Morena Jesu, ka fa ene ka esi o buileng ka teng a re: ‘Ga aba go lesego bogolo go go amogela.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 E rile a sena go bua jalo, a khubama, a rapela nabo botlhe." 
Acts20:37 Mme ba lela botlhe mo go botlhoko, ba wela mo thamong ya ga Paulo, ba mo atla." 
Acts20:38 Ba hutsafadiwa bogolo ke lefoko le o le buileng a re, ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba mmona sefatlhogo gope. Mme ba mmuledisa ba mo fitlhisa kwa sekepeng." 
Acts21:1 Ga dirala, ya re re sena go kgaogana nabo ra tsamaya ka sekepe, ra tlhamalalela fela kwa Kose, mme ya re ka moso ra fitlha kwa Rotese, ra tswa foo ra ya kwa Patara." 
Acts21:2 Ya re ka re fitlhela sekepe se se tlolaganyetsang kwa Fenikia, ra tsena mo go sone, mme ra tswelela." 
Acts21:3 Ya re re sena go fitlha fa Kupero o bonalang teng, ra o ntela kwa ntlheng ya la molema, ra ya go fitlha kwa Siria, ra tswa mo sekepeng kwa Ture; gonne ke teng fa sekepe se tlaa olololelwang teng." 
Acts21:4 E re ka re fitlhetse barutwa, ra tlhola malatsi a supa teng, mme ba tlhagisa Paulo ka Mowa ba re a se ka a ya go gata mo Jerusalema." 
Acts21:5 Ga dirala, ya re re sena go wetsa malatsi ao, ra tsamaya, ra tswelela mo loetong lwa rona; mme bone botlhe, ka basadi le bana, ba re buledisa, ba re ntsha mo motseng; mme ra khubamela fa mošaweng wa lewatle, ra rapela." 
Acts21:6 Ra dumedisa; rona ra tsena mo sekepeng, mme bone ba ba ba boela kwa gae." 
Acts21:7 E rile re sena go wetsa loeto lwa ka sekepe go tswa kwa Ture, ra fitlha mo Petolemaia; mme ra dumedisa bakaulengwe, ra tlhola nabo letsatsi le le lengwe fela." 
Acts21:8 Ya re ka moso ra tsamaya, ra fitlha kwa Kaesarea, mme ra tsena mo ntlong ya ga Filipo mmoledi wa Mafoko a a Molemo, yo e ne e le mongwe wa bale ba ba supa, mme ra nna nae." 
Acts21:9 Monna yoo o ne a na le bana ba basetsana ba le bane, ba ba perofesang, e le makgarebane." 
Acts21:10 Ya re re ntse re tlhotse teng malatsi a le mantsi, ga fologa moperofeti mongwe a tswa Jutea, go twe Agabuse." 
Acts21:11 Ya re a fitlha mo go rona, a tsaya moitlamo wa ga Paulo, a ipofa maoto le mabogo ka one, a re: “Mowa o o Boitshepo o bua jaana wa re: ‘Bajuta ba ba kwa Jerusalema ba tlaa bofa jalo monna yo e leng ene mong wa moitlamo o, ba tlaa mo tsenya mo diatleng tsa Baditšhaba!’ ”" 
Acts21:12 Ya re re utlwa dilo tse, go le rona, go le bone ba felo foo, ra mo rapela, gore a se ka a tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts21:13 Foo Paulo a ba fetola a re: “Lo dirang, ka lo lela lo mphatlola pelo? Gonne ke iketleditse, e seng go golegwa go le gosi, mme le gone go swela leina la Morena Jesu kwa Jerusalema.”" 
Acts21:14 Ya re a gana go rapelesega, ra khutla, ra re: “A go rata ga Morena go dirafale.”" 
Acts21:15 Ya re morago ga malatsi ao, ra baakanya makokoma a rona, ra tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts21:16 Ra tsamaya le bangwe ba Kaesarea, ba na le mongwe go twe, Menasone wa Kupero, e le morutwa wa bogologolo, yo re yang go nna mo ntlong ya gagwe." 
Acts21:17 E rile re sena go fitlha mo Jerusalema, bakaulengwe ba re tshola ka boitumelo." 
Acts21:18 Ka moso ra tsena le Paulo kwa go Jakobe; mme bagolwane botlhe ba bo ba le teng. 
Acts21:19 Ya re a sena go ba dumedisa, a ba tlhatlologanyetsa dilo tse Modimo o di dirileng mo go Baditšhaba ka tirelo ya gagwe." 
Acts21:20 Bone ya re ba utlwa, ba galaletsa Modimo; ba mo raya ba re: “O a bona mokaulengwe, go na le batho ba le bantsintsi ba Bajuta, ba ba dumetseng; botlhe ke ba ba tlhoafaletseng molao," 
Acts21:21 ba boleletswe ka ga gago, fa o ruta Bajuta botlhe ba ba mo go Baditšhaba, gore ba tlhoboge Moše, o ba raya gore ba se rupise bana ba bone, le fa e le go tsamaya ka fa mekgweng." 
Acts21:22 Mme gone go ka tweng? Le gale ba tlaa utlwa fa o gorogile. 
Acts21:23 Ra re, dira se re se go rayang: Re na le banna ba le bane ba ba nang le ikano;" 
Acts21:24 ba tseye, o ye go itshekisiwa nabo, o ba duelele, gore ba tle ba beolwe ditlhogo; mme botlhe ba tlaa itse fa go se na mabolelelaruri mo dilong tse ba di boleletsweng ka ga gago; mme ba fitlhele le wena o tsamaya ka molemo, o tshegeditse molao." 
Acts21:25 Mme ka ga Baditšhaba ba ba dumetseng, re kile ra kwala, ra atlhola gore ba ithibe mo dilong tse di isediwang medimo ya disetwa ditlhabelo, le mo mading a dilo tse di tlhabilweng, le mo se se betilweng, le mo boakeng.”" 
Acts21:26 Foo Paulo a tsaya banna bao, ya re ka moso a itshekisiwa nabo, mme a tsena mo tempeleng, a supa fa malatsi a go itshekisiwa a dirafetse, a ba a nna teng ga tsamaya tshupelo ya isediwa mongwe le mongwe wa bone." 
Acts21:27 E rile malatsi a supa a setse a batlile go feta, Bajuta ba ba tswang kwa Asia, ya re ba mmona mo tempeleng, ba feretlha bontsi jotlhe jwa batho, mme ba mo tsenya diatla." 
Acts21:28 Ba goa ba re: “Banna ba Iseraele, thusang! Monna yo ke ene yo o rutang batho botlhe mo ntlheng tsotlhe, gore ba tlhoboge batho, le molao, le felo fa; gape o lerile le Bagerika mo tempeleng, mme o itshekolotse felo fa, fa go boitshepo.”" 
Acts21:29 Gonne ba kile ba mmona mo motseng a na le Terofimo wa Moefesia, yo ba itlhomileng gore Paulo o mo isitse mo tempeleng." 
Acts21:30 Motse otlhe wa tsebeega, batho ba kgobokana, mme ba tshwara Paulo, ba mo swabolela kwa ntle ga tempele; mme ga akofa ga tswalwa." 
Acts21:31 Ya re ba ntse ba senka go mmolaya, ga bolelelwa mong wa mophato wa batlhabani gore motse otlhe wa Jerusalema o feretlhegile." 
Acts21:32 Mme a akofa a tsaya batlhabani, le balaodi ba mephato, a ba tshologela; mme bone ya re ba bona mong wa mephato le batlhabani, ba khutla go betsa Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Foo mong wa mephato a atamela, a mo tshwara, a laola gore a golegwe ka diketane di le pedi; mme a botsa gore ke mang, le se o se dirileng." 
Acts21:34 Mme mo bontsing, bangwe ba goa se, ba bangwe ba goa se sele; e rile a retelelwa ke go itse tlhomamo ka ntlha ya magawegawe, a laola gore a isiwe mo kagong ya batlhabani." 
Acts21:35 O rile a fitlha fa mapalamong, a bo a setse a rwelwe fela ke batlhabani, ka ntlha ya bogale jwa batho;" 
Acts21:36 gonne bontsintsi jwa batho jwa ba sala morago, ba goa ba re: “A a bolawe!”" 
Acts21:37 Ya re fa Paulo a tlaa isiwa mo kagong ya batlhabani, a raya mong wa mephato a re: “Tswee a nka bua selo sengwe nao?” Mme a re: “A o itse Segerika?" 
Acts21:38 E ntse jaana a ga se wena Moegepeto yole, yo e rileng mo metlheng ele a ikepa bogosi, a ba a gogela babolai bale ba ba 4 000 kwa nageng?”" 
Acts21:39 Mme Paulo a re: “Ke Mojuta wa Tareso wa Kilikia, ke motho wa motse o o seng mmotlana; mme ke a go rapela, o mme ke bue le batho ba.”" 
Acts21:40 Ya re a sena go mo leseletsa, Paulo a ema mo mapalamong, a gwetlha batho ka seatla; e rile go sena go nna tidimalo e kgolo, a bua nabo ka puo ya Sehebere a re:" 
Acts22:1 “Bagaetsho le borara, utlwang phetolo ya me, e ke e lo direlang jaana.”" 
Acts22:2 E rile ba utlwa fa a bua nabo ka puo ya Sehebere, ga nna tuulalo e kgolo. Mme a re:" 
Acts22:3 “Ke Mojuta, ke tsaletswe mo Tareso wa Kilikia, ka godisiwa mo motseng ono, fa dinaong tsa ga Gamaliele, ka rutwa ka fa mokgweng o o gagametseng wa borraetsho, ke le tlhoafalo ka ga Modimo, fela jaaka lona lotlhe gompieno." 
Acts22:4 Ka bogisetsa Tsela e, le kwa losong, ke golega banna le basadi, ke ba isa mo matlong a kgolegelo," 
Acts22:5 jaaka le ene moperesiti yo mogolo a ka supa ka ga me, le lesomo lotlhe la bagolwane, ba ke bileng ka tshola mo go bone dikwalo tse ke yang ka tsone kwa bakaulengweng; ka etela kwa Damaseko, ke ya go lere ba ba teng, ke ba tlisa Jerusalema ba golegilwe, gore ba sekisiwe." 
Acts22:6 “Ya re ke etile, mme ke atamela Damaseko, go le motshegare, ka tshoga ka lesedi le legolo, le le tswang legodimong, le phatsima mo tikologong ya me." 
Acts22:7 Ka wela fa fatshe, ka utlwa lentswe le nthaya le re: ‘Saule, Saule, ana o mpogisetsang?’" 
Acts22:8 Mme ka fetola ka re: ‘O mang Morena?’ Mme a nthaya a re: ‘Ke Jesu wa Nasaretha, yo o mmogisang.’" 
Acts22:9 Le gale ba ke ne ke na nabo ba bona lesedi, mme ba se ka ba utlwa lentswe la yo o mpuisang." 
Acts22:10 Mme ka re: ‘Ke tlaa dirang, Morena?’ Mme Morena a nthaya a re: ‘Nanoga, o ye o tsene mo Damaseko; o tlaa bolelelwa teng ka ga dilo tsotlhe tse o di laoletsweng go di dira.’" 
Acts22:11 E rile ke retelelwa ke go bona, ka ntlha ya kgalalelo ya lesedi leo, ka gogwa ka seatla ke ba ke nang nabo, mme ka fitlha mo Damaseko." 
Acts22:12 “Mongwe go twe Ananiase, e le motho yo o rapelang Modimo ka fa molaong, a bolelwa ka molemo ke Bajuta botlhe ba ba agileng teng," 
Acts22:13 a tla kwa go nna; mme ya re a eme fa go nna, a nthaya a re: ‘Mokaulengwe Saule, foufologa.’ Mme ka mo leba fela ka matlho ka lone lobaka loo." 
Acts22:14 Mme a re: ‘Modimo wa borraetsho o go laotse gore o itse go rata ga one, le gore o bone Mosiami, le go utlwa lentswe le le tswang mo molomong wa gagwe." 
Acts22:15 Gonne o tlaa nna mosupi wa gagwe mo bathong botlhe, wa se o se bonyeng, le se o se utlwileng." 
Acts22:16 Jaana o diegelang? Nanoga, o kolobediwe, o itlhapise dibe, ka go bitsa leina la gagwe.’" 
Acts22:17 “Ga dirala, e rile ke boetse Jerusalema, ke sa ntse ke rapela mo tempeleng, ya ne e kete ke wela mo tsitegong ya pelo;" 
Acts22:18 mme ka mmona a nthaya a re: ‘Itlhaganele, o tswe mo Jerusalema ka bonako, gonne ga ba ketla ba tshola tshupo ka ga me mo go wena.’" 
Acts22:19 Ka re: ‘Morena, le bone ka bosi ba a itse fa ke ba tsentse mo kgolegelong, ka ba ka ba betsa mo matlong a thuto otlhe fela; e bong bone ba ba dumetseng mo go wena." 
Acts22:20 E rile madi a ga Setefane, mosupi wa gago, a tshololwa, le nna ka bo ke eme teng ke dumalanye nabo, ke bile ke tshotse dikobo tsa bone ba ba mmolaileng.’" 
Acts22:21 A nthaya a re: ‘Tloga o tsamaye; gonne ke tlaa go romela kgakala kwa go Baditšhaba.’ ” 
Acts22:22 Mme ba nna ba mo reetsa go tla go fitlha mo lefokong le; foo ba tlhatlosa mantswe ba re: “A motho yo o ntseng jaana a tlosiwe mo lefatsheng, gonne ga go a tshwanela fa a ka tshela!”" 
Acts22:23 Ya re ba thela lošalaba, ba apola dikobo, ba kubuela lorole." 
Acts22:24 Mong wa mephato a laola gore a isiwe mo kagong ya batlhabani, a re a lotolodiwe ka titeo, gore a tle a itse ka fa ba mo thomeleletsang jalo ka teng." 
Acts22:25 E rile ba sena go mo golega ka dikgole, Paulo a raya molaodi wa mophato yo o emeng fa go ene a re: “A go letleletswe go seola motho yo e leng Moroma, a bile a ise a bone tsheko?”" 
Acts22:26 E rile molaodi wa mophato a utlwa jalo, a ya kwa go mong wa mephato, a mmolelela a re: “O a bo o re o dirang? Gonne motho yo ke Moroma.”" 
Acts22:27 Mong wa mephato a tla, mme a mo raya a re: “Mpolelela, a o Moroma?” Mme a re: “Ee.”" 
Acts22:28 Mong wa mephato a mo fetola a re: “Boemo joo jwa bongwana jwa motse, ke bo rekile ka madi a magolo.” Paulo a re: “Nna, ke tsetswe ke le Moroma.”" 
Acts22:29 Foo ba ba reng ba mo lotolotsa, ba akofa ba kgaogana nae; le ene mong wa mephato a boifa, a sena go itse fa e le Moroma, le ka go bo a ne a mo golegile." 
Acts22:30 E rile ka moso, ka a rata go itse tlhomamo ya ka fa o bewang molato ke Bajuta ka teng, a mo golola, a laola gore ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le ba lekgotla botlhe ba phuthege, mme a folosa Paulo, a mmaya fa pele ga bone." 
Acts23:1 Paulo a tsepega matlho mo go ba lekgotla a re: “Bagaetsho, ke ntse ka nna ka tshela ka pelo e e molemo fa pele ga Modimo, nako e sa ntse e le eno.”" 
Acts23:2 Ananiase moperesiti yo mogolo a laola ba ba emeng fa go ene, gore ba mo iteye fa molomong." 
Acts23:3 Foo Paulo a mo raya a re: “Modimo o tlaa go itaya, wena yo o leng lomota lo lo takilweng! Wena yo o reng o nnetse go nkatlhola ka fa molaong, a o bile o tlola molao ka go laola gore ke itewe?”" 
Acts23:4 Ba ba emeng teng ba re: “A o kgala moperesiti yo mogolo wa Modimo?” 
Acts23:5 Paulo a re: “Bagaetsho, ke ne ke sa itse fa e le moperesiti yo mogolo; gonne go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘O se ka wa bua bosula ka ga molaodi wa batho ba gago.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 E rile ka Paulo a lemoga fa bontlhanngwe jwa bone e le Basadukai, mme bontlha e nngwe e le Bafarisai, a buela godimo mo lekgotleng a re: “Bagaetsho, ke Mofarisai, ke ngwana wa Bafarisai, ke sekisiwa ka ga tsholofelo le go tsoga ga baswi.”" 
Acts23:7 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, ga tsoga kgang gare ga Bafarisai le Basadukai, mme phuthego ya kgaogana." 
Acts23:8 Gonne Basadukai ba re, ga go na go tsoga ga baswi, ga go na moengele le fa e le mowa, mme Bafarisai ba dumetse fa dilo tse tsotlhe di le teng." 
Acts23:9 Ga tsoga kgang e kgolo, bakwadi ba lekoko la Bafarisai ba ema, ba ganela ba re: “Ga re bone bosula bope mo mothong yo; fa mowa mongwe o buile nae, kgotsa moengele, re tlaa reng?”" 
Acts23:10 E rile go tsoga lekabakaba le legolo, mongwe wa mephato a boifa gore Paulo o tlaa gagolwa ke bone, mme a laola gore batlhabani ba fologe, ba ye go mo tlosa ka thata mo go bone, ba mo lere mo kagong ya batlhabani." 
Acts23:11 Ya re mo bosigong jwa letsatsi leo, Morena a ema fa go ene, a re: “Nametsega; gonne jaaka o supile ka ga me mo Jerusalema, o na le go supa jalo le kwa Roma.”" 
Acts23:12 E rile bosa bo sele, Bajuta ba ikgolaganya mmogo, ba ba ba ikgolega ka khutsakano gore ga ba ketla ba ja le fa e le go nwa ba ise ba bolaye Paulo pele." 
Acts23:13 Ba ba dirileng morero oo, ba bo ba feta 40." 
Acts23:14 Mme ba ya kwa ditlhogong tsa baperesiti le bagolwane, ba re: “Re ikgolagantse ka khutsakano e kgolo gore ga re ketla re isa sepe mo ganong re ise re bolaye Paulo pele." 
Acts23:15 Jaana, ra re, lona, le ba lekgotla, a ko lo reye mong wa mephato lo re, a mo folosetse kwa go lona, jaaka e kete lo rata go tlhotlhomisa thata bogolo mo tirong ya gagwe; mme rona re iketleeditse go mmolaya a ise a ba a tle fa gaufi.”" 
Acts23:16 Mme ngwana wa ga kgaitsadia Paulo a utlwa ka ga talelo ya bone, mme a feta a tsena mo kagong ya batlhabani, a bolelela Paulo." 
Acts23:17 Paulo a bitsa mongwe wa balaodi ba mephato, a re: “Isa lekau le kwa go mong wa mephato; gonne o na le sengwe go se mmolelela.”" 
Acts23:18 Jalo a mo tsaya, a mo isa kwa go mong wa mephato a re: “Paulo wa mogolegwi o mpiditse a ntopa gore ke lere lekau le kwano go wena, a re o na le sengwe go se go bolelela.”" 
Acts23:19 Mong wa mephato a mo tsaya ka seatla, a ya fa thoko, a mmotsa mo sephiring, a re: “Ke eng se o nang le go se mpolelela?”" 
Acts23:20 Mme a re: “Bajuta ba dumalanye go go lopa gore, e tle e re ka moso o folosetse Paulo kwa lekgotleng, jaaka e kete o rata go tlhotlhomisa bogolo ka ga gagwe." 
Acts23:21 Ke gone o se ka wa ba dumela, gonne go na le batho ba bone ba ba fetang 40, ba ba mo laletseng, e le ba ba ikgolagantseng ka khutsakano gore ga ba ketla ba ja le fa e le go nwa ba ise ba mmolaye pele; le gompieno ba iketleeditse, ba lebeletse lefoko la tlhomamiso mo go wena.”" 
Acts23:22 Jalo mong wa mephato a lesa lekau la tsamaya, a le laya a re: “O se ka wa bolelela ope fa o ntshebeditse dilo tse.”" 
Acts23:23 Mme a bitsa baolaodi ba le babedi ba mephato, a ba raya a re: “Baakanyang batlhabani ba le 200, le bapagami ba dipitse ba le 70, le ba marumo ba le 200, gore ba ye Kaesarea ka nako ya 9 ya bosigo.”" 
Acts23:24 A laola gore ba baakanye tse di pagangwang, tse Paulo o tlaa pagamisiwang mo go tsone, gore ba mo ise sentle kwa go molaodi Felekise." 
Acts23:25 A kwala lokwalo lo lo ntseng jaana a re: 
Acts23:26 “Ke nna Kelaodi Lusiase; ke dumedisa Felekise molaodi yo o tlotlegang segolo, ka re:" 
Acts23:27 Monna yo, o ne a tshwerwe ke Bajuta, mme a batla go bolawa ke bone; mme ka ya mo go bone ke na le batlhabani, ka mo falodisa, ka ke utlwile fa e le Moroma." 
Acts23:28 E re ka ke ne ke rata go itse ka fa ba mmayang molato ka teng, ka mo folosetsa kwa lekgotleng la bone;" 
Acts23:29 mme ka fitlhela a bewa molato ka ga mafoko mangwe a molao wa bone, mme a sa bewe molato wa sepe se se tshwanetseng loso, le fa e le kgolego." 
Acts23:30 E rile ke sena go bolelelwa fa go tlaa nna morero ka ga monna yo, ka akofa ka mo romela koo go wena; ka ba ka laola ba ba mmayang molato, gore ba ye go bua ka ga gagwe fa pele ga gago.”" 
Acts23:31 Jalo batlhabani ba dira jaaka ba laotswe, ba tsaya Paulo, ba mo isa kwa Antipateri go le bosigo." 
Acts23:32 Ya re ka moso ba tlogela bapagami ba dipitse gore ba sale ba mo isa, mme ba boela kwa kagong ya batlhabani." 
Acts23:33 Bone, ya re ba sena go fitlha kwa Kaesarea, ba naya molaodi lokwalo, ba baya le ene Paulo fa pele ga gagwe." 
Acts23:34 Ya re a sena go lo bala, a botsa gore ke wa kgaolo efe ya lefatshe; ya re a sena go tlhaloganya fa e le wa Kilikia," 
Acts23:35 a re: “Ke tlaa utlwa mafoko a gago, ba ba go bayang molato le bone ba sena go tla.” Mme a laola gore a disiwe a le mo ntlong ya bogosi, ya ga Herote." 
Acts24:1 E rile malatsi a le matlhano a sena go feta, Ananiase moperesiti yo mogolo a tla, a na le bagolwane bangwe, a bile a na le mmueledi mongwe, yo go tweng Teretulo; mme ba bolelela molaodi ka ga Paulo." 
Acts24:2 Ya re a sena go bidiwa, Teretulo a simolola go mmaya molato, a re: “E re ka re bona kagiso e kgolo ka wena kgosi, le dilo tse di bosula di tlosediwa morafe ono ka tlamelo ya gago," 
Acts24:3 re a go amogela ka mekgwa yotlhe le mo mafelong otlhe ka tebogo e kgolo, Felekise Motlotlegi yo mogolo." 
Acts24:4 Mme gore ke se ka ka tlhola ke go lapisa, ka re, ke a go rapela gore o utlwe mafokonyana mangwe a rona, ka bopelonomi jwa gago." 
Acts24:5 Gonne re fitlhetse monna yo e le letshwenyo, le serukhutlhi mo Bajuteng botlhe mo lefatsheng lotlhe, e bile e le tlhogo ya lekoko la Banasaretha;" 
Acts24:6 yo o bileng a leka go itshepolola tempele; yo re bileng ra mo tshwara; (mme ra rata re ka bo re mo sekisitse ka fa molaong wa rona. 
Acts24:7 Mme mong wa mephato, e bong Lusiase a tla, a mo phamola ka thata mo diatleng tsa rona." 
Acts24:8 A laola balatofatsi ba gagwe gore ba tle fa pele ga gago;) yo e tlaa reng fa o mo lotolotsa ka wesi, o bo o tlaa tlhaloganya dilo tse tsotlhe tse re mmayang molato ka ga tsone.”" 
Acts24:9 Bajuta le bone ba dumalana nae mo mafokong ao, ba tlhomamisa gore dilo tseo di ntse jalo." 
Acts24:10 E rile molaodi a sena go mo gwetlha gore a bue, Paulo a fetola a re: “E re ka ke itse fa o ntse o le moatlhodi wa morafe o ka dinyaga di le dintsi, ke a ikarabela ka boitumelo." 
Acts24:11 Ka kgosi e ka tlhaloganya ka ga lobaka lo ke simolotseng go ya go obama kwa Jerusalema ka lone, fa letsatsi la gompieno e le la 12 fela." 
Acts24:12 Ga ba ise ba bo ba fitlhele ke ganela le ope mo tempeleng, le fa e le go tlhotlheletsa batho mo matlong a dithuto, le fa e le mo motseng." 
Acts24:13 Ga ba ka ke ba go tlhomamisetsa dilo tse ba mpayang molato ka ga tsone gompieno. 
Acts24:14 Se, ke a se go ipolela, gore, Modimo wa borraetsho, ke o direla ka fa Tseleng e bone ba e bitsang lekoko, ke ntse ke dumela dilo tsotlhe tse di ka fa molaong, le tse di kwadilweng mo baperofeting." 
Acts24:15 Ke na le tsholofelo mo Modimong, e le bone ba e lebeletseng, ya gore go tlaa nna tsogo ya basiami le ya basiamolodi." 
Acts24:16 Ke bile ke a itlwaetsa, gore ke tle ke nne le pelo e e se nang sekgopi mo Modimong le mo bathong, ka metlha yotlhe." 
Acts24:17 “Jaana e rile dinyaga di sena go feta di le dintsi, ka tla ke tsholetse morafe wa gaetsho dikatso le dineo." 
Acts24:18 Ya re mo gare ga dilo tse, ba mphitlhela mo tempeleng ke iitshekisitse, ke se mo bontsing, ke bile ke sa tsose modumo, mme ga bo go le Bajuta bangwe ba ba tswang kwa Asia teng," 
Acts24:19 ba ba neng ba tshwanetse ya bo ne ne ba le fa pele ga gago fa, gore ba supe molato, fa ba na le sengwe se ba nnyatsang ka sone." 
Acts24:20 Le fa e le banna ba, a ba bolele tshiamololo e ba e bonyeng jale, jaaka ke ne ke eme fa pele ga lekgotla," 
Acts24:21 fa e se lentswe le le lengwe fela, le ke le buetseng godimo ke eme mo go bone, ka re: ‘Ke sekisiwa fa pele ga lona gompieno ka ga go tsoga ba baswi.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Mme Felekise ka a na le kitso e e tletseng, bogolo ka ga Tsela, a ba beisa pelo, a re: “E tlaa re fa Lusiase mong wa mephato a tsile, ke tlaa atlhola kgang ya lona.”" 
Acts24:23 Mme a laola molaodi wa mophato gore a disiwe, le gore a direlwe ka pelonomi; le gore a se ka a itsa ditsala tsa gagwe go tla go mo direla." 
Acts24:24 E rile malatsi mangwe a sena go feta, Felekise a tla a na le Durusila mogatse, yo e leng mosadi wa Sejuta, mme a bitsa Paulo, a mo utlwa ka ga tumelo mo go Keresete Jesu." 
Acts24:25 Ya re a ntse a mo ranolela ka ga tshiamo, le boikgapo, le tsheko e e tlang, Felekise a boifa thata, mme a mo fetola a re: “Gompieno o ka tsamaya, mme ke tlaa re fa ke bonye lobaka lo lo siameng ke go bitse.”" 
Acts24:26 Le gone a solofetse gore o tlaa newa madi ke Paulo; mme a nna a mmitsa gantsi ka ntlha ya gone moo, mme a bua nae." 
Acts24:27 E rile dinyaga di le pedi di sena go feta, Porekio Feseto a tsena mo boemong jwa ga Felekise; mme e re ka a ne a rata go kgatlha Bajuta, Felekise a tlogela Paulo a golegilwe." 
Acts25:1 Ke gone, e rileng Feseto a sena go tla mo kgaolong eo ya lefatshe, mme malatsi a le mararo a sena go feta, a tswa Kaesarea a tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts25:2 Mme ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le ditlhogo tsa Bajuta, ba mmolelela ka ga Paulo;" 
Acts25:3 ba mo rapela, ba lopa ka ga Paulo gore a mo romele go mo lere mo Jerusalema; e le gore ba mo lalele ba mmolaye mo tseleng." 
Acts25:4 Mme le fa go ntse jalo Feseto a ba fetola a re: “Paulo o mo tisong kwa Kaesarea;” a ba a ikaya fa le ene a tlaa tloga a ya teng. 
Acts25:5 A re: “Ba e leng ba ba nang le thata mo go lona, a ba fologe le nna; mme fa go na le tshokamo nngwe mo go ene monna yo, a ba mmeye molato.”" 
Acts25:6 E rile a sena go tlhola nabo malatsi e ka ne e le a 8, kgotsa a le some, a fologela kwa Kaesarea; ya re ka moso a feta a dula mo tshekelong, a laola gore Paulo a ye go tlisiwa." 
Acts25:7 Ya re a sena go tla, Bajuta, ba ba fologileng kwa Jerusalema, ba ema ba mo dikanyeditse, ba mmaya melato e le mentsi, le e e utlwisang botlhoko, e ba sa ka keng ba e tlhomamisa." 
Acts25:8 Mme Paulo ya re a ikarabela a re: “Go le molao wa Bajuta ga ke a o leofela gope, le fa e le tempele, le fa e le Kaesare.”" 
Acts25:9 Feseto ene, e re ka a rata go ithatisa Bajuta, a fetola Paulo a re: “A o rata go tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema, o ya go atlholwa fa pele ga me teng ka ga dilo tse?”" 
Acts25:10 Mme Paulo a re: “Ke eme fa pele ga tshekelo ya ga Kaesare, fa ke tshwanetseng go atlholwa teng; Bajuta ga ke a ba siamololela, jaaka le wena o itse sentle." 
Acts25:11 Ke gone, fa ke le mosiamolodi, mme fa ke dirile sengwe se se tshwanetseng loso, ga ke gane go swa; mme fa go se na sepe se se leng boammaaruri, sa dilo tse batho ba ba mpayang molato ka ga tsone, ga go na motho ope yo o ka ntsenyang mo diatleng tsa bone. Ke ipiletsa Kaesare.”" 
Acts25:12 E rile Feseto a sena go gakololana le ba lekgotla, a mo fetola a re: “O ipileditse Kaesare; o tlaa ya kwa go Kaesare.”" 
Acts25:13 Jaana e rile malatsi mangwe a sena go feta, Ageripa kgosi a goroga mo Kaesarea, a na le Berenise, mme ba fitlha ba dumedisa Feseto." 
Acts25:14 Ya re ka ba tlhotse teng malatsi a le mantsi, Feseto a bolelela kgosi kgang ya ka ga Paulo a re: “Go na le monna mongwe yo o tlogetsweng ke Felekise a golegilwe;" 
Acts25:15 yo e rileng ke le kwa Jerusalema, ditlhogo tsa baperesiti le bagolwane ba mpolelela ka ga gagwe, mme ba lopa gore ke mo sekise." 
Acts25:16 Ka ba fetola ka re, ga se mokgwa wa Baroma go neela motho ope petsong, a ise a kopane le ba ba mmayang molato, mme a bona lobaka go ikarabela ka ga molato o o tshwerweng ka ga one." 
Acts25:17 Ke gone, e rile ba sena go phuthega mono, ga ke a ka ka diega; ya re ka moso ka dula mo sennong sa tshekelo, ka laola gore monna yo a ye go tlisiwa." 
Acts25:18 Yo e rileng ba ba mmayang molato ba ema, ba se ka ba supa molato ope wa dilo tse di bosula tse ke ne ke di gopotse;" 
Acts25:19 mme ba bo ba mo nyaletsa dikgang dingwe tsa tumelo ya bone, le tsa mongwe yo go tweng Jesu, yo o suleng, yo Paulo o tlhomamisang gore o tshedile." 
Acts25:20 Nna, e rile ka ke akabadiwa ka fa ke ka tsenang mo dilong tse ka gone, ka mmotsa fa a ka ya Jerusalema, a ya go atlholwa gone ka ga dikgang tse." 
Acts25:21 Mme e rile Paulo a sena go rapela gore a letisiwe katlholo ya kgosi e kgolo Aguseto, ka laola gore a disiwe, ke tle ke tsamaye ke mo ise kwa go Kaesare.”" 
Acts25:22 Mme Ageripa a raya Feseto a re: “Le nna ke ne nka rata go mo ikutlwela monna yo.” Mme a re: “O tlaa mo utlwa ka moso.” 
Acts25:23 Jalo ya re ka moso, Ageripa a sena go tla, a na le Berenise, ka boitlotlomatso jo bogolo, ba isiwa mo felong ga kutlwelo, ba na le beng ba mephato, le ditlhogo tsa motse. Mme Paulo a tlisiwa ka taolo ya ga Feseto." 
Acts25:24 Mme Feseto a re: “Kgosi Ageripa, le lona batho botlhe ba re nang le lona fa, lo bona monna yo, yo bontsi jotlhe jwa Bajuta ba nthapetseng ka ga gagwe, kwa Jerusalema le mono, ba bua ka thata, ba re, ga a tshwanela go tlhola a tshela." 
Acts25:25 Mme nna ka fitlhela a sa dira sepe se se tshwanetseng loso; mme e re ka ene a na a ipiletsa Aguseto, ka laola gore ke tlaa mo isa kwa go ene." 
Acts25:26 Mme ga ke na sepe sa tlhomamo se ke se kwalelang morena wa me ka ga gagwe. Ke gone ka fa ke mo tlisitseng fa pele ga lona ka gone, mme bogolo fa pele ga gago kgosi Ageripa, gore e tle e re kgotsa, morago ga totolotso, ke bo ke na le sengwe se ke ka se kwalang." 
Acts25:27 Ka gonne e kete ga go a siama, fa e ka re mogolegwi a isiwa, go bo go sa bolelwe le yone melato ya gagwe.”" 
Acts26:1 Ageripa a raya Paulo a re: “O leseleditswe go ipuelela.” Foo Paulo a otlolola letsogo, a ikarabela a re:" 
Acts26:2 “Ke ipona fa ke le sego, kgosi Ageripa, ka ke na le go ikarabela fa pele ga gago gompieno, ka ga dilo tsotlhe tse ke beilweng molato ka tsone ke Bajuta," 
Acts26:3 bogolo ka kgosi e na le kitso ka ga mekgwa yotlhe le dikgang tsa Bajuta; ke gone ke a go rapela ka re, o ntheetse ka pelotelele." 
Acts26:4 “Ka re, mokgwa wa go tshela ga me, le mo bokaung jwa me, o ke sa leng ke o simolola ke le mo morafeng wa gaetsho le mo Jerusalema, Bajuta botlhe ba a o itse;" 
Acts26:5 ka ba sa le ba nkitse ka tshimologo, fa ba ne ba rata, ba ka supa fa ke ne ke le Mofarisai yo ke tshelang ka fa mokgweng wa lefoko la tumelo ya rona, le e leng lone le nang le melao e e gagametseng thata." 
Acts26:6 Gompieno ke eme fa, gore ke sekisiwe ka ga lefoko la tsholofetso le le sa leng le newa borraetsho ke Modimo," 
Acts26:7 e e leng lone ditso tsa rona tse di 12 di solofelang go e fitlhela, ka go direla Modimo ka tlhoafalo bosigo le motshegare. Kgosi, ke bewa molato ke Bajuta ka ga tsholofelo eo!" 
Acts26:8 Ana go ntse jang, fa go kaiwa ke lona fa e le mo go sa dumelesegeng, fa Modimo o tsosa baswi?" 
Acts26:9 “Ruri ke itheile ka re ke tshwanetse go dira dilo di le dintsi tse di tlhabanang le leina la ga Jesu wa Nasaretha. 
Acts26:10 Mo, ke bile ka go dira mo Jerusalema; ka tswalela baitshepi ba le bantsi mo matlong a kgolegelo, ke sena go newa taolo ke ditlhogo tsa baperesiti, mme e ne e re ba bolawa, le nna ke ntshe lefoko la me la go dumalana nago." 
Acts26:11 Ka ba betsa gantsi mo matlong a thuto otlhe, ke leka gore ba tlhapatse; ya re ka ke ba gakaletse thata, ka ba bogisetsa le kwa metseng ya mafatshe a sele." 
Acts26:12 “E rile ke etela kwa Damaseko ka tiro e e ntseng jalo, ke bile ke tshotse thata le taolelo mo ditlhogong tsa baperesiti," 
Acts26:13 ya re motshegare, kgosi, ke le mo tseleng, ka bona lesedi le le tswang legodimong, le gaisa phatsimo ya letsatsi, le phatsima mo tikologong ya me le ya ba ke etileng nabo." 
Acts26:14 E rile re wetse rotlhe fa fatshe, ka utlwa lentswe le nthaya ka puo ya Sehebere, la re: ‘Saule, Saule, o mpogisetsang? Go thata mo go wena go raga setlhabi.’" 
Acts26:15 Ka re: ‘O mang, Morena?’ Morena a re: ‘Ke nna Jesu yo o mmogisang." 
Acts26:16 Tsoga, o eme ka dinao; gonne ke go bonaletse gone moo, gore ke go dire modiredi le mosupi wa dilo tse o mponyeng mo go tsone, le wa dilo tse ke tlaa bonalang kwa go wena ka tsone;" 
Acts26:17 ke go golola mo bathong, le mo go Baditšhaba, ba ke go romang kwa go bone." 
Acts26:18 O ya go ba budulola matlho, gore ba tswe mo lefifing, ba sokologele mo leseding, ba tswe mo thateng ya ga Satane, ba sokologele mo Modimong, gore ba bone boitshwarelo jwa dibe, le boswa mo go ba ba itshepisitsweng ka go dumela mo go nna.’" 
Acts26:19 “Ke gone kgosi Ageripa, ga ke a ka ka nna bokaka ka ga ponatshegelo e ya selegodimo," 
Acts26:20 mme ka bolela mo go ba Damaseko pele, le kwa Jerusalema, le mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Jutea, le mo go Baditšhaba ka re, ba tshwanetse go ikwatlhaya le go sokologela mo Modimong, ba dira ditiro tse di tshwanetseng boikwatlhao." 
Acts26:21 Mme Bajuta ba ntshwara mo tempeleng ka ntlha ya gone moo, mme ba leka go mpolaya." 
Acts26:22 E re ka ke bonye thuso e e tswang mo Modimong, ke ntse ke eme le gompieno, ke supetsa bannye le bagolo, ke sa bue sepe fa e se se baperofeti le Moše ba rileng se tlaa tla:" 
Acts26:23 e bong gore, Keresete o na le go swa, le gore ke ene wa pele yo o tlaa bolelang lesedi mo bathong, le mo go Baditšhaba, ka go tsoga mo baswing.”" 
Acts26:24 Ya re a ntse a ikarabela jalo, Feseto a bua ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Paulo o a tsenwa; go rutega thata ga gago go a go tsentsha.”" 
Acts26:25 Paulo a re: “Ga ke tsenwe, Motlotlegi Feseto; ke bua mafoko a boammaaruri le a boitekanelo." 
Acts26:26 Gonne kgosi e itse dilo tse, e ke bileng ke bua ke phuthologile fa pele ga yone; gonne ke a dumela fa go se na sepe sa dilo tse se se fitlhegetseng kgosi; gonne mo ga go a ka ga direlwa mo kgokgotshong." 
Acts26:27 Kgosi Ageripa, a o dumela baperofeti? Ke a itse fa o dumela.”" 
Acts26:28 Mme Ageripa a raya Paulo a re: “O a bo o rata go nkgona go nna Mokeresete ka go mpuisa go le gonnye fela.” 
Acts26:29 Paulo a re: “Le fa e ka bo e le ka bonnye le fa e le ka bogolo, Modimo o ka ka wa mma, gore e seng wena wesi, e leng botlhe ba ba nkutlwang gompieno, ba nne jaaka nna, ke sa reye dikgole tse.”" 
Acts26:30 Mme kgosi ya nanoga, le molaodi, le Berenise, le ba ba dutseng nabo;" 
Acts26:31 ya re ba ile fa thoko, ba bua mmogo ba re: “Monna yo, ga a a dira sepe se se tshwanetseng loso le fa e le dikgole.”" 
Acts26:32 Mme Ageripa a raya Feseto a re: “Monna yo o ka bo a golotswe, fa a ne a se ka a ipiletsa Kaesare.”" 
Acts27:1 E rile go sena go laolwa fa re tlaa ya kwa Itale ka sekepe, ba tsenya Paulo le bagolegwi bangwe ba sele mo seatleng sa mongwe go twe Julio, e le molaodi wa mophato o go tweng wa ga Aguseto." 
Acts27:2 Ra tsena mo sekepeng sengwe sa Ateramutiume, se se tlaa tlogang se leba kwa metseng ya Asia e e ikamileng lewatle; ra ineela mo lewatleng, re na le Arisetareko, e le Momaketonia wa Thesalonika." 
Acts27:3 Ya re ka moso ra tsena kwa Sitone; mme Julio a direla Paulo ka pelonomi, a mo lesa a ya kwa ditsaleng tsa gagwe, gore di mmabalele." 
Acts27:4 E rile re tloga teng, ra tsamaya re ikamile Kupero, ka ntlha ya gobo diphefo di tlhabaganye le rona." 
Acts27:5 E rile re sena go ralala lewatle le le lebaganyeng le Kilikia le Pamfilia, ra fitlha kwa Mira, motse wa Lukia." 
Acts27:6 Foo molaodi wa mophato a fitlhela sekepe sa Alekesantere se se yang kwa Itale; mme a re tsenya mo go sone. 
Acts27:7 E rile re sena go nna re tsamaya ka bonya ka malatsi a le mantsi, ra fitlha ka bothata bolebana le Kinito; mme e re ka phefo e sa tlhole e re leseletsa go tswelela pele, ra tsamaya re ikamile Kerete, bolebana le Salamone;" 
Acts27:8 ya re re ntse re tsamaya re tshwere bothata re o ikamile, ra fitlha golo go twe, Dinwane Dintlhe; motse wa Lasea wa bo o le gaufi nago." 
Acts27:9 E rile go fetile lobaka lo lo loleele, le go eta ka sekepe go setse go boitshega; mme e re ka lobaka lwa go ithiba mo dijong lo fetile, Paulo a ba gakolola, a ba raya," 
Acts27:10 a re: “Banna, ke a bona fa loeto lo lwa sekepe lo tlaa dirana le molato le tshenyego, e seng mo dilwaneng le mo sekepeng go le gosi, mme le e leng mo matshelong a rona.”" 
Acts27:11 Mme molaodi wa mophato a reetsa molaodi le mong wa sekepe bogolo go dilo tse di builweng ke Paulo.
