Colossians2:19 a sa ngaparele yo e leng Tlhogo, yo mmele otlhe o golang ka kgolo ya Modimo ka ene, ka go logaganngwa ka malokololo le mesifa ya one mmele." 
Colossians2:20 Fa lo ne lo sule le Keresete ka ga ditlhaka tsa kitso ya lefatshe, ke ka ntlha yang fa e bo ne ne lo ineela mo melaong, jaaka e kete lo sa ntse lo tshedile mo lefatsheng, jaaka go twe:" 
Colossians2:21 “Se tshwareng se ka diatla, se lekeng se ka molomo, se ameng sele!”" 
Colossians2:22 ka fa ditaolong le dithutong tsa batho, mme go rewa dilo tse di nang le go senyega tsotlhe mo go tshwarweng." 
Colossians2:23 Le gale, ke dilo tse di nang le setshwantsho sa botlhale mo kobamelong e e itaolelwang ke motho, le mo boikokobetsong, le mo go tlhokeng go rekegela mmele; mme ga di na thuso go thiba kgatlhego ya nama." 
Colossians3:1 Ke gone, a e re fa lo tsositswe mmogo le Keresete, batlang dilo tse di kwa godimo, kwa Keresete o ntseng teng, a dutse ka fa letsogong le legolo la Modimo." 
Colossians3:2 Tlhomang mogopolo wa lona mo dilong tse di kwa godimo, e seng mo dilong tse di mo lefatsheng." 
Colossians3:3 Gonne lo kile lwa swa, mme botshelo jwa lona bo fitlhilwe le Keresete mo Modimong." 
Colossians3:4 Mogang Keresete, yo e leng botshelo jwa rona, o tlaa bonalang, foo le lona lo tlaa bonala nae mo kgalalelong." 
Colossians3:5 Ke gone, bolayang ditokololo tsa lona tse di ganelelang mo lefatsheng; ke raya boaka, le bomaswe, le dithato, le keletso e e bosula le pelotshetlha, tse e leng tirelo ya medimo ya disetwa;" 
Colossians3:6 e le dilo tse bogale jwa Modimo bo tlang mo baneng ba ba kgopo ka ntlha ya tsone; 
Colossians3:7 tse le lona lo kileng lwa tsamaya mo go tsone jale, ka lo tshelela mo go tsone dilo tseo." 
Colossians3:8 Mme jaanong, le lona lo latlhe dilo tse tsotlhe fela; e bong bogale, kgakalo, le kilo, le kgalo le dipuo tsa botlhabisa ditlhong; lo di tlose mo melomong ya lona." 
Colossians3:9 Se akalaneng; ka lo apotse motho wa bogologolo le ditiro tsa gagwe; 
Colossians3:10 mme lo apere motho yo moša, yo o ntseng a šafalediwa mo kitsong ka fa setshwanong sa yo o mo tlhodileng;" 
Colossians3:11 mo go sa ka keng ga dira le Bogerika le Bojuta gone, bogwera le bokgola, botho seeng le Bosethia, botlhanka le bongwana jwa motse; mme Keresete ke ene bojotlhe, o bile o mo go botlhe fela." 
Colossians3:12 Ke gone, jaaka ba ba itshenketsweng ke Modimo, jaaka ba ba itshepileng le ba ba rategang, lo apare pelotlhomogi, le pelonomi, le boikokobetso, le bonolo le bopelotelele." 
Colossians3:13 Lo iphapaanye mongwe le yo mongwe; lo itshwarelane, fa motho mongwe a na le ngongorego ka ga yo mongwe; fela jaaka Morena a lo itshwaretse, le lona lo dire fela jalo." 
Colossians3:14 Mme mo godimo ga dilo tsotlhe tse lo apare lorato, lo e leng lone sebofo sa boitekanelo." 
Colossians3:15 A kagiso ya ga Keresete e laole mo pelong tsa lona, e lo bileng lo bileditswe yone mo mmeleng o le mongwe fela; mme lo nne lo leboge." 
Colossians3:16 A lefoko la ga Keresete le age mo go lona ka botlalo mo botlhaleng jotlhe; lo ntse lo rutana, lo laana ka dipesalema, ka difela le ka dipina tsa semowa, lo opelela Modimo ka tshegofatso mo pelong tsa lona." 
Colossians3:17 Le fa e ka bo e le eng se lo se dirang mo puong le mo tirong, dirang gotlhe mo ineng la Morena Jesu, lo ntse lo leboga Modimo Rara ka ene." 
Colossians3:18 Basadi ba lo nyetsweng, ineeleng mo banneng ba lona, jaaka go tshwanetse mo Moreneng." 
Colossians3:19 Banna, ratang basadi ba lona, mme lo se ka lwa ba ngangalela." 
Colossians3:20 Bana, utlwang batsadi ba lona mo dilong tsotlhe, gonne mo e be e le mo go kgatlhang Morena." 
Colossians3:21 Borrabana, se tshwenyeng bana ba lona, gore ba se ka ba sulafala pelo." 
Colossians3:22 Batlhanka, utlwang mo dilong tsotlhe ba e leng beng ba lona ka fa nameng; e seng ka go ba bona matlho jaaka bakgatlhi ba batho, fa e se ka bongwefela jwa pelo, ka go boifa Morena." 
Colossians3:23 Le fa e ka bo e le eng se lo se dirang, lo se dire ka pelo yotlhe, jaaka e ka bo e le go direla Morena, e seng batho;" 
Colossians3:24 lo ntse lo itse fa tuelo ya boswa lo tlaa e amogela mo Moreneng, aitse lo direla Morena Keresete." 
Colossians3:25 Gonne yo o dirang tshokamo o tlaa ba a bona ka fa tshokamong e o e dirileng; mme ga go na tlhaolo ya batho. 
Colossians4:1 Beng ba batho, direlang batlhanka ba lona ka se e leng tshiamo le tekanyo, lo ntse lo itse fa le lona lo na le Mong kwa legodimong." 
Colossians4:2 Tswelelang ka tlhomamo mo thapelong, lo ntse lo lebeletse mo go yone ka go ntsha malebogo." 
Colossians4:3 Le rona lo bo lo ntse lo re rapelela gore Modimo o ke o re bulele kgoro ya lefoko, gore re bue bosaitsiweng jwa ga Keresete, jo ke bileng, ke le mo dikgoleng ka ga jone;" 
Colossians4:4 gore ke tle ke bo bonatse, jaaka ke tshwanetse go bua." 
Colossians4:5 Ba ba kwa ntle lo ba tsamaele ka botlhale, lo ntse lo swela lobaka molemo." 
Colossians4:6 A puo ya lona e nne ntle ka metlha yotlhe, e lokilwe ka letswai, gore lo tle lo itse ka fa lo tshwanetseng go fetola mongwe le mongwe ka teng." 
Colossians4:7 Go tshela ga me gotlhe lo tlaa go itsisiwe ke Tukiko, yo e leng mokaulengwe yo o rategang, le modiredi yo o ikanyegang, le motlhanka ka nna mo Moreneng." 
Colossians4:8 Ke mo romile koo go lona ka gone moo, gore lo itse ka fa re ntseng ka teng, le gore a gomotse dipelo tsa lona." 
Colossians4:9 O na le Onesimo wa mokaulengwe yo o ikanyegang, yo o rategang, yo e leng mongwe wa lona. Ba tla lo itsise dilo tsotlhe tse di dirwang mono." 
Colossians4:10 Arisetareko mogolegwa ka nna, o a lo dumedisa, le Mareko ntsalae Barenabase, yo lo bonyeng ditaetso ka ga gagwe; fa a fitlha koo go lona, lo mo amogele." 
Colossians4:11 Le Jesu, yo o bidiwang Juseto, ba e leng ba bogwera; ke bone bosi badiri ka nna mo bogosing jwa Modimo, e le banna ba ba ntseng ba le kgomotso mo go nna." 
Colossians4:12 Epaferase yo e leng mongwe wa lona, e bile e le motlhanka wa ga Keresete Jesu, o a lo dumedisa, a ntse a lo tlhoafaletse ka metlha yotlhe mo merapelong ya gagwe, gore lo ke lo eme lo itekanetse, lo nne tlhomamo e e tletseng mo go rateng gotlhe ga Modimo." 
Colossians4:13 Gonne ke supa ka ga gagwe fa a na le thekisego e kgolo ka ga lona, le ka ga ba Laodikea, le ka ga ba Hierapolise." 
Colossians4:14 Luke, ngaka e e rategang, le Demase, ba a lo dumedisa." 
Colossians4:14 Luke, ngaka e e rategang, le Demase, ba a lo dumedisa." 
Colossians4:15 Dumedisang bakaulengwe ba ba kwa Laodikea, le boNimefase, le phuthego e e mo ntlong ya bone." 
Colossians4:16 E tlaa re lokwalo lo, lo sena go balwa mo go lona, lo dire gore lo balwe le mo phuthegong ya Balaodikea; le gore lona lo bale lokwalo lo lo tswang Laodikea." 
Colossians4:17 Lo reye Arekipo lo re: “O tlhokomele tirelo e o e amogetseng mo Moreneng, gore o tle o e dirafatse.”" 
Colossians4:18 Tumediso ya me Paulo e kwadilwe ka seatla sa me. Gopolang dikgolego tsa me. Tshegofatso e nne le lona. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Ke nna Paulo, ke na le Silefano le Timotheo, re kwalela phuthego ya Bathesalonika e e mo go Modimo Rara, le mo go Morena Jesu Keresete: A tshegofatso e nne le lona le kagiso." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Re ntshetsa Modimo malebogo ka metlha yotlhe ka ga lona lotlhe, re ntse re lo umaka mo merapelong ya rona." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Ga re khutle go gopola tiro ya lona ya tumelo, le madiriso a lorato, le bopelotelele jwa tsholofelo, mo go Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete, fa pele ga Modimo le Rra wa rona;" 
1Thessalonians1:4 ka re itse go itshenkelwa ga lona, bagaetsho ba ba rategang mo Modimong." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Jaaka Mafoko a a Molemo a rona a se ka a tla mo go lona ka puo fela, mme a tla le ka nonofo, le ka Mowa o o Boitshepo, le ka botlalo jo bogolo; fela jaaka lo itse ka fa re itshupileng mo go lona ka teng gore re batho ba ba ntseng jang ka ntlha ya lona." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Lo tlogile lwa nna baetsi ba rona le ba Morena, ka lo amogetse lefoko mo pogisong e kgolo, mmogo le boitumelo jwa Mowa o o Boitshepo;" 
1Thessalonians1:7 lwa ba lwa tswa sekao, sa botlhe ba ba dumelang mo Maketonia le mo Akaia." 
1Thessalonians1:8 Gonne lefoko la Morena la tswa mo go lona la tumela, e seng kwa Maketonia le Akaia go le gosi, mme tumelo ya lona ntlheng ya Modimo e tswetse ntlheng tsotlhe; jalo re bo re sa tlhole re na le go bua sepe." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Gonne le bone ka bosi ba bolela ka ga rona, go tsena ga rona mo go lona, ka fa go ne go ntse ka teng; le ka fa lo kgaoganyeng le medimo ya disetwa ka teng, lwa sokologela mo Modimong, go direla Modimo o o tshedileng le o o boammaaruri;" 
1Thessalonians1:10 le go lebelela Morwa one go tswa legodimong, yo Modimo o mo tsositseng mo baswing, e bong Jesu, yo o re gololang mo bogaleng jo bo tlang." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Gonne lona ka losi bagaetsho, lo a itse go tsena ga rona mo go lona, fa go fitlhetswe e se lefela:" 
1Thessalonians2:2 Mme e rile ka re ne re utlwile botlhoko gale, ra ba ra dirwa dilo tsa botlhabisa ditlhong kwa Filipi, jaaka lo itse, ra sosologela pele mo Modimong wa rona go bua le lona Mafoko a a Molemo a Modimo, re le mo ntweng e kgolo." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Gonne go laya ga rona ga go tswe mo go timeleng, le fa e le mo lesweng, le fa e le mo bolotsaneng;" 
1Thessalonians2:4 mme fela jaaka re kailwe boikanngo ke Modimo go neelwa Mafoko a a Molemo, re bua jalo; e seng gore re kgatlha batho, fa e se Modimo fela o o lekang dipelo tsa rona." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Gonne le gone ga re ise re ke re fitlhelwe gope re bua mafoko a a borethe, jaaka lo itse, le fa e le go itirela seipato sa go ikhumisa; Modimo ke mosupi;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 le fa e le go batla tlotlo mo bathong, le fa e le mo go lona, le fa e le mo go ba bangwe, le mororo go ne go re lekanye fela go lo rwesa bokete, ka re le baaposetole ba ga Keresete." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Re ne re le bonolo mo gare ga lona, jaaka fa moamusi a ngomaela bana ba e leng ba gagwe;" 
1Thessalonians2:8 fela jalo, e re ka re ne re lo tlhoafaletse ka lorato, ra bo re itumela go lo naya, e seng Mafoko a a Molemo a Modimo a le osi, le e leng mewa ya rona, ka lo ne lo setse lo ratwa ke rona thata." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Gonne lo a gakologelwa, bagaetsho, mofufutso wa rona le thekisego, e ne ya re re ntse re dira bosigo le motshegare, gore re tle re se ka ra imela ope wa lona, ra lo rerela Mafoko a a Molemo a Modimo." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Lo basupi, le one Modimo, ka fa re ne re ntse ka teng mo go lona ba lo dumelang, ka boitshepo, le tshiamo, le ka mo go se nang molato," 
1Thessalonians2:11 jaaka lo itse ka fa re diretseng mongwe le mongwe wa lona ka teng, jaaka rrabana a tle a direle bana ba gagwe, ra lo laya, ra lo nametsa, ra supa," 
1Thessalonians2:12 gore lo tsamaye mo go tshwanetseng Modimo, o o lo biletsang mo bogosing jo e leng jwa one le mo kgalalelong ya one." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Ke gone ka ntlha ya moo re bileng re sa khutle go ntshetsa Modimo malebogo, ka gobo e rile lo tshola lefoko la taetso mo go rona, e bong lefoko la Modimo, lwa le amogela e seng jaaka lefoko la batho, fa e se jaaka lefoko la Modimo fela, jaaka e le lone ruri, le le bileng le dira mo go lona ba lo dumelang." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Gonne lona, bagaetsho, lo tlogile lwa nna baetsi ba diphuthego tsa Modimo tse di mo Jutea mo go Keresete Jesu; gonne le lona lo bogisitswe dilo tse bone ba di utlwisitsweng botlhoko ke Bajuta;" 
1Thessalonians2:15 ba ba bolaileng Morena Jesu le baperofeti, le rona ba re leleka, ba sa kgatlhe Modimo, ba le kgang le batho botlhe;" 
1Thessalonians2:16 ba re itsa go bua le Baditšhaba gore ba bolokwe; e le gore ba tle ba nne ba tlatse dibe tsa bone, mme bogale jo bo feteletseng bo tsile mo go bone." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Mme rona, bagaetsho, ka re kgaogantswe le lona ka lobakanyana, mo mmeleng, e seng mo pelong, ra leka mo gogolo thata go lo bona difatlhogo ka tlhologelelo e kgolo." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Ka re ratile re ka bo re ile koo go lona, e bong nna Paulo, gangwe le gape; mme Satane a re kgoreletsa." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Gonne tsholofelo ya rona e be e le eng, kgotsa boitumelo jwa rona, le fa e le serwalo sa boipelafatso? A ga se lona fela, fa pele ga Morena wa rona Jesu, mo go tleng ga gagwe?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Gonne ke lona kgalalelo ya rona, le boitumelo jwa rona." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Ke gone ka moo, e rile re retelelwa ke go tlhola re itshokile, ra kaya fa go ka nna molemo go tlogelwa mo Athene re le rosi;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 mme ra roma Timotheo mokaulengwe wa rona, le modiredi wa Modimo mo Mafokong a a Molemo a ga Keresete, gore a ye go lo tlhomamisa, le go lo gomotsa ka ga tumelo ya lona;" 
1Thessalonians3:3 gore ope a se ka a tshikinngwa ke dipitlagano tse; gonne lona ka losi lo a itse fa re laoletswe gone moo. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Gonne le gale, e rile re sa na le lona ra lo bolelela gale fa re na le go boga pitlagano, fela jaaka go dirafetse, e bile le lona lo a itse." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ka ntlha ya moo, le nna, e rile ke retelelwa ke go tlhola ke itshokile, ka roma gore ke itse tumelo ya lona, e se re kgotsa moraedi a ba a bile a lo raetse, le tiro ya rona ya nna lefela." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Mme e rile Timotheo a sena go tla fela, jaana a re tswela koo go lona, mme a re leretse mafoko a a itumedisang a tumelo ya lona le lorato, le gore lo sa ntse lo re gakologetswe ka molemo ka metlha yotlhe, lo ntse lo tlhologeletswe go re bona, fela jaaka le rona re tlhologeletswe go bona lona." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Ka ntlha ya gone moo, bagaetsho, ra gomotsega ka ga lona mo tlalelong ya rona yotlhe le pitlagano, ka tumelo ya lona," 
1Thessalonians3:8 gonne jaana re a tshela, fa lona lo eme lo tiile mo Moreneng." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Gonne tebogo e ka nna efe e re ka bong re e ntshetsa Modimo, ka ntlha ya boitumelo jotlhe jo re itumelang ka jone ka ga lona fa pele ga Modimo?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Re ntse re rapela segolo thata bosigo le motshegare, gore re ke re lo bone difatlhogo, re swetse mo go sa ntseng go tlhaetse ga tumelo ya lona." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Jaana Modimo le Rra wa rona ka esi, le Morena wa rona Jesu, o ka ka a re siamisetsa tsela go ya koo go lona." 
1Thessalonians3:12 A Morena a dire mo go lona gore lo gole, lo totafale mo go rataneng, le mo go rateng batho botlhe, fela jaaka le rona re ntse ka ga lona;" 
1Thessalonians3:13 gore a tle a tlhomamise dipelo tsa lona mo go senang molato, mo boitshepong fa pele ga Modimo le Rra wa rona, mo go tleng ga Morena wa rona Jesu, a tla le baitshepi botlhe ba gagwe." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Jaana, sa bofelo, bagaetsho, ra re re a lo rapela, re lo laya mo go Morena Jesu, gore jaaka lo amogetse mo go rona ka fa lo tshwanetseng go tsamaya le go kgatlha Modimo ka teng, fela jaaka lo ntse lo tsamaya, ra re: Lo nne lo tote segolo bogolo." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Gonne lo a itse ka fa re lo laileng ka teng, ka Morena Jesu." 
1Thessalonians4:3 Gonne mo ke go rata ga Modimo, e bong boitshepiso jwa lona, ke gore, lo ithibe mo boakeng;" 
1Thessalonians4:4 gore mongwe le mongwe wa lona a itse go ikgapa mmele, gore o nne mo boitshepong le mo tlotlong." 
1Thessalonians4:5 E seng mo dithatong tse di maswe, fela jaaka Baditšhaba ba ba sa itseng Modimo." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Gore ope motho a se ka a tlola, mme a ferekanela wa ga gabo mo selong se, gonne Morena ke ene mmusolosi mo dilong tsotlhe tse, jaaka re kile ra lo tlhagisa gale, ra ba ra supa." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Gonne Modimo ga o a re biletsa bomaswe; o re bileditse mo boitshepisong fela. 
1Thessalonians4:8 Ke gone yo o ganang, ga a gane motho, fa e se Modimo, o o lo nayang Mowa wa one o o Boitshepo." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ka ga go rata bakaulengwe, ga go batlwe gore motho a lo kwalele, gonne lona ka losi lo rutilwe ke Modimo go ratana;" 
1Thessalonians4:10 gonne ruri lo a bo lo ntse lo go direla bakaulengwe botlhe ba ba mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Maketonia. Re lo laya, bagaetsho, gore lo tote bogolo bogolo;" 
1Thessalonians4:11 le gore lo leke go nna mo tidimalong, le go dira e e leng tiro ya lona, le go dira ka diatla tsa lona, fela jaaka re lo laotse;" 
1Thessalonians4:12 gore lo tsamaye ka go tlhoka maitsoketso mo go ba ba kwa ntle, le gore lo se tlhoke sepe." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Ga re rate lwa tlhoka go itse, bagaetsho, ka ga ba ba robalang; gore lo se hutsafale, jaaka ba bangwe ba ba se nang tsholofelo." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Gonne fa re dumela gore Jesu o ne a sule mme a ba a tsoga, fela jalo ba ba swetseng mo go Jesu, Modimo o tlaa ba lere nae." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Gonne se, re se bua le lona ka lefoko la Morena, gore rona ba re tlaa bong re tshedile, ba e tlaa reng mo go tleng ga Morena re fitlhelwa re setse, ga re ketla re etelela ba ba suleng pele." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Gonne Morena ka esi o tlaa fologa kwa legodimong, ka lošalaba, le ka lentswe la moengele yo mogolo, le ka go galaotega ga lonaka lwa Modimo; mme baswi ba ba swetseng mo go Keresete ba tlaa tsoga pele:" 
1Thessalonians4:17 Foo rona ba re tlaa bong re tshedile re tlogetswe, re tlaa tsholediwa mmogo nabo mo marung, re ya go kgatlhantsha Morena mo loaping; jalo re tlaa nnela ruri le Morena." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Ke gone, gomotsanyang ka mafoko a." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Ka ga metlha le dipaka, bagaetsho, ga go batlwe gore lo ka kwalelwa sengwe." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Gonne le lona ka losi lo itse sentle fa letsatsi la Morena le tlaa tla fela jaaka legodu bosigo. 
1Thessalonians5:3 E tle e re ba ntse ba re: “Kagiso le thagamo,” foo tshenyego ya tshoganetso e ba wele, jaaka pelegi e tle e tlele mosadi yo o moimana; mme ga ba ketla ba falola gope." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Mme lona bagaetsho, ga lo mo lefifing, fa letsatsi leo le ne le ka lo fitlhela jaaka legodu;" 
1Thessalonians5:5 gonne lona lotlhe lo bana ba lesedi, lo bana ba motshegare; ga re ba bosigo le fa e le ba lefifi." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Jalo a re se robaleng, jaaka ba bangwe ba tle ba dire, a re lebeleleng, re nneng boitekanelo." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Gonne ba ba robalang ba tle ba robale bosigo; le ba ba tagwang ba tle ba tagwe bosigo. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Mme rona, ka re le ba motshegare, a re nneng boitekanelo, re apere letlatla la sehuba la tumelo le lorato; mme a tsholofelo ya poloka e nne yone tlhoro ya phemelo." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Gonne Modimo ga o a re laolela bogale, fa e se gore re bone poloko ka Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Yo o re swetseng gore le fa re sa ntse re itisitse, le fa re robetse re be re tshela mmogo nae." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Ke gone, laanang, mme lo agelelane, fela jaaka lo ntse lo dira." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Re a lo rapela, bagaetsho, gore lo itse ba ba dirang mo go lona, ba ba lo busang mo Moreneng, mme ba lo tlhagisa;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 le gore lo ba tlotle thatathata mo loratong ka ntlha ya tiro ya bone. Lo nne kagisanyo. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Re a lo laya, bagaetsho, ra re tlhagisang ba ba fuduang, nametsang ba ba lapang pelo, pepetletsang ba ba bokoa, lo nne pelotelele mo go botlhe." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Lo bone gore ope a se ka a lefetsa bosula jwa ga ope ka bosula; lo nne lo lekele kwa go direlaneng molemo, mongwe le yo mongwe, le mo go botlhe." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Itumeleng ka metlha yotlhe; 
1Thessalonians5:17 lo rapeleng ka go bisa go khutla; 
1Thessalonians5:18 lebogang mo dilong tsotlhe; gonne mo ke go rata ga Modimo mo go Keresete Jesu ka ga lona. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Se timeng Mowa; 
1Thessalonians5:20 lo se ka lwa nyatsa dithuto; 
1Thessalonians5:21 mme lekang dilo tsotlhe; sone se se molemo lo se tshware thata; 
1Thessalonians5:22 lo ithibe mo go sengwe le sengwe se se mo tshwanong ya bosula. 
1Thessalonians5:23 A Modimo wa kagiso ka osi o lo itshepise gotlhe fela; go le mewa ya lona, le dipelo tsa lona, le mebele ya lona, a go bolokwe go le mmogo, le ka go tlhoka molato mo go tleng ga Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Go boikanngo ene yo o lo bitsang, yo o bileng a tla go dira." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Bagaetsho, lo re rapelele." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Dumedisang bakaulengwe botlhe ka katlo e e boitshepo. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ke a lo ikanisa ka Morena, gore lokwalo lo, lo balelwe bakaulengwe botlhe." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Tshegofatso ya Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete e nne le lona. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Ke nna Paulo, ke na le Silefano le Timotheo; re kwalela phuthego ya Bathesalonika e e mo Modimong Rraetsho, le mo go Morena Jesu Keresete." 
2Thessalonians1:2 A tshegofatso e nne le lona, le kagiso e e tswang Modimong Rara le Morena Jesu Keresete." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Re na le go leboga Modimo ka metlha yotlhe ka ga lona, bagaetsho, fela jaaka go tshwanetse, ka gobo tumelo ya lona e ntse e gola thata, le go ratana ga lona lotlhe go totile thata;" 
2Thessalonians1:4 e bile le rona ka rosi re belafala ka lona mo diphuthegong tsa Modimo, ka bopelotelele jwa lona le tumelo, lo le mo dipogisong tsotlhe tsa lona, le mo dipitlaganong tse lo di itshoketseng." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Dilo tse ke sesupo se se bonalang sa katlholo e e siameng ya Modimo, sa gore lo kaiwe lo tshwanetse bogosi jwa Modimo, jo lo bileng lo bo bogelang botlhoko." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Ke raya fa e le mo go siameng mo Modimong go lefetsa pitlagano ya ba ba lo pitlaganyang; 
2Thessalonians1:7 le go naya lona ba lo pitlaganngwang tapologo le rona, mo motlheng wa tshenolo ya Morena Jesu fa a tla a tswa legodimong, a na le baengele ba thata ya gagwe," 
2Thessalonians1:8 a le mo molelong o o tutumang, a itefetsa mo go ba ba sa itseng Modimo, le mo go ba ba sa ineeleng go utlwa Mafoko a a Molemo a Morena wa rona Jesu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 E le ba ba tlaa utlwang thupa, e bong tshenyego e e sa khutleng, ya go tlogela ruri mo sefatlhogong sa Morena, le mo kgalalelong ya nonofo ya gagwe." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Mogang o tlang go galalediwa mo baitsheping ba gagwe, le go gakgamalelwa mo tsatsing leo ke botlhe ba ba dumetseng, gonne tshupo ya rona mo go lona e ne ya dumelwa." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Le rona re ntse re lo rapelela ka gone moo, gore Modimo wa rona o lo kaye go tshwanela pitso ya lona, o bo o dirafatse keletso nngwe le nngwe ya molemo, le tiro nngwe le nngwe ya tumelo, ka thata;" 
2Thessalonians1:12 gore leina la Morena wa rona Jesu le galalediwe mo go lona, le lona mo go ene, ka fa tshegofatsong ya Modimo wa rona le Morena Jesu Keresete." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Jaana re a lo rapela, bagaetsho, ka ga go tla ga Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete, le go phuthegela ga rona kwa go ene;" 
2Thessalonians2:2 ra re, lo se ka lwa ba lwa tshikinngwa mogopolo, le fa e le go fuduiwa ke mowa mongwe, le fa e le ke puo, le fa e le ke lokwalo lo go ka tweng lo tswa kwano go rona, go etsa jaaka e kete letsatsi la Morena le setse le le fa." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Ope motho a se ka a lo fora ka mokgwa ope; gonne ga go ketla go dirafala, fa tenego e sa tle pele, le fa monna wa boleo a sa senolwe, yo e leng morwa tatlhego." 
2Thessalonians2:4 E bong yo o ikgantshang, a ikgodisa, a tlhabana le gotlhe mo go bidiwang modimo, kgotsa mo go obamelwang; a ba a tle a dule mo tempeleng ya Modimo, a ikaye gore ke ene Modimo." 
2Thessalonians2:5 A ga lo gakologelwe fa e rile ke sa ntse ke na le lona, ka lo bolelela dilo tse?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Jaanong lo a itse se se kganetseng, gore a tle a senolwe mo motlheng o e leng wa gagwe." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Gonne bosaitsiweng jwa boikepo bo setse bo dira; go na le mongwe yo o kganetseng gompieno, go tsamaya a tlosiwa." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Foo moikepi o tlaa senolwa, yo Morena Jesu o tlaa mmolayang ka mowa wa molomo wa gagwe, a mo nyeletsa ka ponatshego ya go tla ga gagwe." 
2Thessalonians2:9 E bong ene yo go tla ga gagwe go leng ka fa go direng ga Satane ka thata yotlhe le ka ditshupo, le ka dikgakgamatso tsa maaka," 
2Thessalonians2:10 le ka tsietso yotlhe ya tshiamololo mo go bone ba ba nyelelang; ka ba se ka ba amogela lorato lwa go rata boammaruri, gore ba bolokwe." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ka ntlha ya gone moo, Modimo wa roma tiro e e timetsang kwa go bone, gore ba tle ba dumele maaka:" 
2Thessalonians2:12 Gore ba sekisiwe botlhe ba ba se kang ba dumela boammaaruri, mme ba natefelwa ke tshiamololo." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Lona bagaetsho, baratwa ba Morena, re na le go leboga Modimo ka metlha yotlhe ka ga lona, ka Modimo o sa le o lo itshenkela mo tshimologong, gore lo bolokwe ka go itshepisiwa ke Mowa, le ka go dumela boammaaruri." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Mo o lo go bileditseng ka Mafoko a a Molemo a rona, gore lo bone kgalalelo ya Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Ke gone jalo bagaetsho, ka re, emang lo tiile, lo tshegetse dipolelo tse lo di rutilweng, le fa e ka bo e le ka lefoko la molomo, kgotsa ka lokwalo lwa rona." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Jaana a Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete ka esi, le Modimo Rraetsho yo o re ratileng a ba a re naya kgomotso e e sa khutleng, le tsholofelo e e molemo ka tshegofatso," 
2Thessalonians2:17 a gomotse dipelo tsa lona, a lo tlhomamise mo tirong le mo puong nngwe le nngwe e e molemo." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Sa bofelo, bagaetsho, lo re rapelele, gore lefoko la Morena le siane, le galalediwe, fela jaaka le ntse mo go lona," 
2Thessalonians3:2 le gore re gololwe mo bathong ba ba se nang megopolo, le ba ba bosula, gonne batho ga ba na tumelo botlhe." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Morena o boikanngo, yo o tlaa lo tlhomamisang, a ba a lo dibela mo go yo o bosula." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Re ikantse mo Moreneng ka ga lona, gore lo ntse lo a dira, le gone lo tlaa nna lo dira dilo tse re di laolang." 
2Thessalonians3:5 A Morena a gogele dipelo tsa lona mo loratong lwa Modimo, le mo bopeloteleleng jwa ga Keresete." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Jaana re a lo laola, bagaetsho, mo ineng la Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete, gore lo ikgoge mo go mokaulengwe mongwe le mongwe yo o tsamayang ka go tlhokomologa molao, a sa tsamaye ka fa dipolelong tse ba di amogetseng mo go rona." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Gonne lo a itse ka losi ka fa lo tshwanetseng go etsa rona ka teng, gonne ga re a ka ra dira ka go tlhokomologa molao mo go lona;" 
2Thessalonians3:8 le gone ga re a ka ra jela motho ope dijo ka lefela, fa e se ka mofufutso le thekisego, re dira bosigo le motshegare, gore re se ka ra imela ope wa lona." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Ga se go re, ga re na tshiamelo ya gone, e le go re re itire sekao mo go lona, gore lo etse rona." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Gonne le e rile re le mo go lona, ra lo laola jalo ra re: Fa mongwe a gana go dira, le gone a se ka a ja." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Gonne re utlwa ka ga bangwe ba ba tsamayang ka go tlhokomologa molao mo go lona, ba ba se keng ba dira gope, mme e le balotlhanyi fela." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Jaana ba ba ntseng jalo re a ba laola, re ba re ba laya mo ineng la Morena Jesu Keresete, gore ba dire ka tidimalo, ba je dijo tse e leng tsa bone." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Mme lona, bagaetsho, lo se ka lwa lapa mo go direng molemo." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Fa motho mongwe a sa utlwe lefoko la rona ka lokwalo lo, lo ele motho yoo tlhoko, gore lo se nne bokopano nae, gore a tlhajwe ke ditlhong." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Le fa go ntse jalo lo se ka lwa mo kaya mmaba, mme lo mo tlhagise jaaka mokaulengwe." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Jaana a Morena wa kagiso ka esi a lo neye kagiso ka metlha yotlhe, ka mekgwa yotlhe. A Morena a nne le lona lotlhe." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Tumediso ya me ke le Paulo e kwadilwe ka seatla sa me, se e leng sone sesupo mo lokwalong longwe le longwe, ke kwala fela jalo." 
2Thessalonians3:18 A tshegofatso ya Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete e nne le lona lotlhe. 
1Timothy1:1 Ke nna Paulo, moaposetole wa ga Keresete Jesu ka fa taolong ya Modimo Moreboloki, le Keresete Jesu tsholofelo ya rona." 
1Timothy1:2 Ke kwalela Timotheo, ngwanake ruri mo tumelong, ka re: A go nne tshegofatso, le kutlwelobotlhoko, le kagiso, tse di tswang Modimong Rara le Keresete Jesu Morena wa rona." 
1Timothy1:3 Jaaka ke go laile, ka re, o tle o sale mo Efeso, jale ka ke ya Maketonia, gore o tle o laye batho bangwe, gore ba se ka ba ruta ka thuto e sele." 
1Timothy1:4 Le fa e le go tlhokomela mainane le dipalo tse di senang bokhutlo tsa ditshika, e le mo go tlhotlheletsang dikgang fela, bogolo go go tlhotlheletsa tirelo ya Modimo e e emeng mo tumelong; ke sa ntse ke bua jalo le gompieno." 
1Timothy1:5 Bofelelo jwa tao eo ke lorato lo lo tswang mo pelong e e itshekileng, le segakolodi se se molemo, le tumelo e e se nang boitimokanyo." 
1Timothy1:6 E le dilo tse bangwe ba e rileng ba sena go di fosa ba fapogela kwa go bueng boithamako. 
1Timothy1:7 Ba eletsa go nna baruti ba molao, le mororo ba sa tlhaloganye se ba se buang, le fa e le se ba tlhomamisang ka ga sone." 
1Timothy1:8 Mme re a itse fa molao o le molemo, fa motho a dira ka one ka fa go laotsweng ka teng," 
1Timothy1:9 a ntse a itse gore molao ga o a beelwa motho yo o siameng, fa e se ba ba ipheferang mo molaong, le ba ba ganang taolo, le ba ba sa boifeng Modimo, le baleofi, le ba ba sa itshepang, le ba ba matlhapa, le babolaya borraabo, le babolaya bommaabo, le babolai ba batho," 
1Timothy1:10 le bagokafadi, le basotoma, le bautswa batho, le baaki, le ba ba buang maaka ka go ikana, le fa go ka bo go na le selo se sele se se tlhabanang le thuto e e itekanetseng;" 
1Timothy1:11 ka fa Mafokong a a Molemo a kgalalelo ya Modimo o o bakwang, a ke a neetsweng." 
1Timothy1:12 Ke leboga ene yo o nneileng nonofo, e bong Keresete Jesu Morena wa rona ka a nkaile boikanngo, a ntaolela tirelo ya gagwe;" 
1Timothy1:13 le fa gale ke ne ke le mokgadi, le mmogisi le mosenyi, le fa go ntse jalo ka bona boutlwelobotlhoko ka ke go dirile ka go tlhoka go itse, ke sa dumela;" 
1Timothy1:14 mme tshegofatso ya Morena wa rona ya tota thata ka tumelo le lorato lo lo mo go Keresete Jesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Go boikanngo lefoko le, le bile le tshwanetse kamogelo yotlhe, le le reng, Keresete Jesu o ne a tla mo lefatsheng go boloka baleofi; ba ke leng tlhogo mo go bone." 
1Timothy1:16 Le fa go ntse jalo ka bona boutlwelobotlhoko ka ntlha ya gore Jesu Keresete a bonatse bopelotelele jwa gagwe jotlhe mo go nna, ke le wa tlhogo, gore e nne sekao sa ba ba tlaa namang ba dumela mo go ene, go tla ba bona botshelo jo bo sa khutleng." 
1Timothy1:17 Jaana a Kgosi e e ntseng fela e se na tshimologo, le fa e le bokhutlo e e se keng e swa, e e se keng e bonwa, e e leng Modimo o o osi, e newe tlotlo le kgalalelo ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Taelo e ke a e go neela ngwanaka Timotheo, ka fa diperofesong tse di kileng tsa go etelela pele, gore o tle o tlhabane ntwa e e molemo ka tsone;" 
1Timothy1:19 o ntse o tshegeditse tumelo le segakolodi se se molemo; se bangwe ba e rileng ba sena go se kgoromeletsa koo, ba sala ba senyega ka ga tumelo," 
1Timothy1:20 ba Humenaio le Alekesantere e leng ba bone; ba ke ne ke ba neela Satane, gore ba rutwe go lesa go tlhapatsa Modimo." 
1Timothy2:1 Ke gone, sa ntlha ke laya gore, a mekokotlelo, le merapelo, le merapelelo, le malebogo, a direlwe batho botlhe." 
1Timothy2:2 A a direlwe dikgosi le botlhe ba ba leng bagolo; gore re ke re tshele mo boiketlong le mo tidimalong ka poifomodimo yotlhe le ka tshisimogo. 
1Timothy2:3 Golo mo go molemo, go bile go a lebosega mo matlhong a Modimo Moreboloki;" 
1Timothy2:4 o o ratang gore batho botlhe ba ke ba bolokwe, mme ba fitlhe mo kitsong ya boammaaruri." 
1Timothy2:5 Gonne go Modimo o le mongwe fela, go bile go motsereganyi le ene a le mongwe fela fa gare ga Modimo le batho, motho ka esi," 
1Timothy2:6 e bong Keresete Jesu, yo o intshitseng go nna thekololo ya botlhe; e le tshupo e e tlaa supiwang mo metlheng ya yone;" 
1Timothy2:7 e ke laoletsweng go nna moreri le moaposetole wa yone, moruti wa Baditšhaba mo tumelong le mo boammaaruring – ke bua boammaaruri, ga ke ake." 
1Timothy2:8 Ke gone, ke eletsa gore banna ba rapele mo felong gongwe le gongwe ba tsholeditse mabogo a a itshepileng, ka mo go se nang bogale le kgang." 
1Timothy2:9 Le gone fela jalo, gore basadi ba ikgabise ka diaparo tse di seng maphatsiphatsi, ba le bori le tekano; ba se ka ba ikgabisa ka go iphora moriri loetse, kgotsa ka gouta, kgotsa ka diperela, kgotsa ka diaparo tse di tlhwatlhwa kgolo;" 
1Timothy2:10 mme a e nne ka ditiro tse di molemo – e le mo go tshwanetseng basadi ba ba ipalang ka poifomodimo. 
1Timothy2:11 A mosadi a ithute mo tidimalong ka boineelo jotlhe. 
1Timothy2:12 Ga ke leseletse mosadi go ruta, le fa e le go dira le taolo mo monneng, fa e se go nna mo tidimalong fela." 
1Timothy2:13 Gonne Atame o bopilwe pele, mme Efa kwa morago;" 
1Timothy2:14 Atame ga a ka a tsiediwa, mme mosadi e rile ka a tsieditswe a wela mo tlolong;" 
1Timothy2:15 mme o tlaa bolokwa ka pelego, fa ba tswelela mo tumelong, le mo loratong, le mo boitshepisong ka boikgapo." 
1Timothy3:1 Go boikanngo polelo ya go re: Fa motho a senka boemo jwa mookami wa phuthego o eletsa tiro e e molemo. 
1Timothy3:2 Ke gone mookami wa phuthego o na le go nna motho yo o se nang molato, e le monna yo o mosadi mongwe fela, a ikgapile, a le mogopolo o o lekalekanyeng, a le mokgwa montle, e le yo o tsholang batho sentle, a itse go ruta;" 
1Timothy3:3 a se borumolang, a se moitei, a le bonolo, a se segagapa, a se morati wa go huma madi." 
1Timothy3:4 A itse go laola ntlo ya gagwe sentle, bana ba gagwe ba mo utlwa ka tshisimogo yotlhe;" 
1Timothy3:5 ka e a re fa motho a sa itse go laola ntlo ya gagwe tota, o tlaa babalela jang phuthego ya Modimo?" 
1Timothy3:6 A se moša, e se re gongwe a ikgogomosa mme a wela mo tshekisong ya diabolo." 
1Timothy3:7 Gape o tshwanetse go bolelwa ka molemo ke ba ba kwa ntle; e se re kgotsa a wela mo kgobong le mo serung sa diabolo. 
1Timothy3:8 Bagolwane ba phuthego le bone ba tshwanetse go nna batho ba ba masisi, ba se diteme pedi, ba sa lemalele bojalwa, ba sa bolaelwe khumo e e maswe ke pelo;" 
1Timothy3:9 ba tshegeditse boteng jwa tumelo ka segakolodi se se itshekileng. 
1Timothy3:10 Le bone bao, a ba lekwe pele; foo a ba direle e le bagolwane ba phuthego, fa ba se na molato." 
1Timothy3:11 Basadi ba e leng bagolwane le bone ba tshwanetse go nna batho ba ba masisi jalo, ba se bapateletsi, ba le mogopolo o o lekalekanyeng, ba le boikanngo mo dilong tsotlhe." 
1Timothy3:12 A bagolwane ba phuthego e nne banna ba ba mosadi a le mongwe fela, ba laole bana ba bone le matlo a bone sentle." 
1Timothy3:13 Gonne ba ba dirileng sentle e le bagolwane ba phuthego, ba iponela boemo jo bo molemo, le tshosologo e kgolo mo tumelong e e mo go Keresete Jesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Dilo tse ke a di go kwalela, ke solofetse go akofa ke ya koo go wena;" 
1Timothy3:15 e tle e re fa ke ka diega thata, o bo o itse ka fa batho ba tshwanetseng go dira ka teng mo ntlong ya Modimo, e e leng phuthego ya Modimo o tshedileng, lekotwana le setshegetso sa boammaaruri." 
1Timothy3:16 Kwa ntle ga kgang, boteng jwa bosaitseweng jwa poifo Modimo bo bogolo; ke go re: Ene yo o bonaditsweng mo nameng, a siamisiwa ke Mowa, a bonwa ke baengele, a rerwa mo merafeng, a dumelwa mo lefatsheng, a tsholelediwa kwa kgalalelong." 
1Timothy4:1 Mowa o bua ka thanolo gore, mo metlheng ya morago bangwe, ba tlaa tenega mo tumelong, ba tlhokomela mewa e e timetseng, le dithuto tsa badimo." 
1Timothy4:2 Ka boitimokanyo jwa batho ba ba buang maaka, e le ba digakolodi tsa bone di ntseng jaaka e kete di fisitswe ka tshipi e e molelo;" 
1Timothy4:3 ba itsa batho go nyala, ba laola gore go ilwe dijo tse Modimo o di tlhophetseng go amogelwa ka tebogo ke ba ba dumelang le ba ba itseng boammaaruri." 
1Timothy4:4 Gonne sebopiwa sengwe le sengwe sa Modimo se molemo, ga go sepe se se nang le go ganwa, fa se amogelwa ka tebogo;" 
1Timothy4:5 gonne se a bo se itshepisiwa ka lefoko la Modimo le ka thapelo. 
1Timothy4:6 Fa o gakolola bakaulengwe ka ga dilo tse, o tlaa bo o le modiredi yo o molemo wa ga Keresete Jesu, yo o otlwang ka mafoko a tumelo, le a thuto e e molemo, e o ntseng o e setse morago le gompieno." 
1Timothy4:7 Mme o gane ditlhamane tse di bosula le tsa sesadi segolo. O itshikinye mo poifomodimong: 
1Timothy4:8 Gonne go tshikinya mmele go molemo mokhutshwane; mme poifomodimo e molemo ka ga dilo tsotlhe, ka e na le tsholofetso ka ga botshelo jwa gompieno, le ka ga jone jo bo tlaa tlang." 
1Timothy4:9 Go boikanngo polelo e, e bile e tshwanetswe ke kamogelo yotlhe." 
1Timothy4:10 Gonne re a dira e bile re a leka ka ntlha ya gone mo, ka gonne re na le tsholofelo ya rona, e tlhomilwe mo Modimong, o o tshedileng, o e leng Mmoloki wa batho botlhe, bogolo wa bone ba ba dumelang." 
1Timothy4:11 Dilo tse, o di ba laolele o di ba rute." 
1Timothy4:12 Ope a se ka a nyatsa bokau jwa gago; o nne sekao sa ba ba dumelang, mo puong le mo mokgweng wa go tshela, mo loratong, mo tumelong le mo boitshekong." 
1Timothy4:13 O tlhokomele go bala, le go laya, le go ruta, ke tle ke tsamaye ke tle." 
1Timothy4:14 O se ka wa tlhokomologa neo e e mo go wena, e o neilweng ka perofeso e pataganye le peo ya diatla tsa bagolwane." 
1Timothy4:15 O tle o tlhoafale mo dilong tse; o ineele mo go tsone ka bojotlhe jwa gago; gore botswelelopele jwa gago bo bonatshege mo go botlhe. 
1Timothy4:16 O ipone o bo o bone le go ruta ga gago. O nnele ruri mo dilong tse, gonne ka go dira jalo o tlaa bo o ipoloka o ba o boloka ba ba go utlwang." 
1Timothy5:1 O se ka wa kgalemela mogolwane; mme o mo laye jaaka fa e ka bo e le rraago; le makau jaaka bomonnao. 
1Timothy5:2 Basadi ba ba godileng o ba laye jaaka fa e ka bo e le bommaago; le barweetsana jaaka bokgaitsadio, ka boitsheko jotlhe." 
1Timothy5:3 Tlotla basadi ba batlholagadi ba e leng batlholagadi ruri. 
1Timothy5:4 Fa mosadi mongwe wa motlholagadi a na le bana, kgotsa ditlogolo, a bao ba ithute pele go itshupa bopelonomi mo go ba ga bone, le go leboga batsadi ba bone; gonne mo, go lebosega mo matlhong a Modimo." 
1Timothy5:5 Aitse mosadi yo e leng motlholagadi ruri, a bile a tlogetswe a le mo paeng fela, tsholofelo ya gagwe e tlhomilwe mo Modimong, o tle a tswelele mo mekokotlelong le mo merapelong bosigo le motshegare." 
1Timothy5:6 Mme mosadi wa motlholagadi yo o ineelang mo dikgatlhegong, o sule a sa ntse a tshedile." 
1Timothy5:7 Le tsone dilo tse o di ba laolele, gore ba tle ba nne ba se na mokgobo." 
1Timothy5:8 Fa mongwe a sa tlamele ba ga gabo, bogolo ba e leng ba ntlo ya gagwe, o latotse tumelo, mme o bosula go gaisa yo o sa dumeleng." 
1Timothy5:9 Mosadi ope a se ka a kwalwa e le motlholagadi a ise a nne dinyaga di le 60, e le yo o kileng a nyalwa ke monna a le mongwe fela." 
1Timothy5:10 A bolelwa sentle ke ditiro tse di molemo; fa a godisitse bana, fa a bolokile baeng, fa a tlhapisitse baitshepi dinao, fa a thusitse ba ba mo pitlaganong, fa a tsweletse pele ka tlhoafalo mo tirong nngwe le nngwe e e molemo." 
1Timothy5:11 O gane basadi ba batlholagadi ba ba sa ntseng ba le meroba; gonne e tlaa re ba babalelwa ke taolo ya ga Keresete, ba rate go nyalwa;" 
1Timothy5:12 mme ba bone tshekiso, ka gobo ba latlhile ikano ya bone ya ntlha." 
1Timothy5:13 Le gone ba ithute botshwakga, ba nne ba dikologe le matlo; mme ga se go re ba ditshwakga fela, e bile ke babalabadi le balotlhanyi, ba bue dilo tse ba sa tshwanelang go di bua." 
1Timothy5:14 Ke gone, ke rata gore batlholagadi ba ba sa ntseng ba le meroba ba nyalwe, ba bone bana, ba laole ntlo, ba tlhoke le go naya mmaba lobaka lope lwa go kgala;" 
1Timothy5:15 gonne le jaana bangwe ba setse ba fapogile ba ile le Satane. 
1Timothy5:16 Fa mosadi mongwe yo o dumelang a na le basadi ba batlholagadi, e le ba ga gabo, a a ba thuse, mme phuthego e se imediwe; gore e tle e thuse ba e leng batlholagadi ruri." 
1Timothy5:17 Bagolwane ba ba laolang sentle a ba kaiwe go tshwanela tlotlo sebedi, bogolo ba ba dirang mo lefokong le mo go ruteng." 
1Timothy5:18 Gonne lokwalo lwa re: “O se ka wa bofa kgomo molomo fa e photha mabele,” gape lwa re: “Modiri o tshwanetswe ke maduo a gagwe.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Fa mogolwane a bewa molato, o se ka wa dumela, fa e se ka molomo wa basupi ba le babedi, kgotsa ba le bararo." 
1Timothy5:20 Ba ba leofang o ba kgalemele mo ponong ya botlhe, gore ba bangwe le bone ba nne mo poifong." 
1Timothy5:21 Ke go laya mo ponong ya Modimo le ya ga Keresete Jesu, le ya baengele ba ba itshenketsweng, gore o tlhokomele dilo tse ka mo go se nang tlhaolo, o sa dire sepe ka mokgwa wa go rata mongwe." 
1Timothy5:22 O se ka wa beela motho ope diatla ka potlako, le gone o se ka wa tlhakanela le batho ba bangwe dibe tsa bone; o itshegetse o le mo boitshekong." 
1Timothy5:23 O se tlhole o le monwi wa metsi, o nne o nwe bojalwanyana jwa mofine ka ntlha ya mala a gago, le makoa a gago a mantsi." 
1Timothy5:24 Dibe tsa batho ba bangwe di a bonala, di fetela pele di ya tshekisong; tsa batho ba bangwe le bone di ba sale morago." 
1Timothy5:25 Go ntse fela jalo, go na le ditiro tse di molemo tse di bonalang fela; le tse di sa nnang jalo ga di ka ke tsa fitlhega." 
1Timothy6:1 Botlhe ba e leng batlhanka ba ba mo jokweng, a ba kaye beng ba bone go tshwanelwa ke tlotlo yotlhe, gore leina la Modimo le se ka la tlhapadiwa, le thuto." 
1Timothy6:2 Le ba ba nang le beng ba ba dumelang a ba se tlhoke go ba tlotla, ka gobo e le ba ga bone mo tumelong; bogolo ba ba direle, ka gobo bone ba ba direlwang e le badumedi le baratwi. O rute, o bo o laye ka dilo tse." 
1Timothy6:3 Fa motho mongwe a ruta ka thuto e sele, a sa dumalane le mafoko a a tshedileng, e bong mafoko a Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete, le thuto e e leng ka fa poifomodimong;" 
1Timothy6:4 o ikgogomositse, a sa itse sepe, o kgweleantswe ke dipotso le dikganetsanyo tsa mafoko, tse go tswang bopelotshetlha mo go tsone, le kgang le dikgalo le dipateletso," 
1Timothy6:5 le ditatalalano tsa batho ba ba bodileng mogopolo, le ba ba latlhegetsweng ke boammaaruri, ba ba itlhomang poifomodimo e le mokgwa wa papadi." 
1Timothy6:6 Poifomodimo e e nang le pelo e e ritibetseng ke papadi e kgolo; 
1Timothy6:7 gonne ga re a ka ra tla le sepe mo lefatsheng, le gone ga re ka ke ra tswa le sepe;" 
1Timothy6:8 e re fa re na le dijo le diaparo, re tlaa ritibatsa pelo mo go tsone." 
1Timothy6:9 Ba ba eletsang go huma ba tle ba wele mo thaelong, le mo serung le mo dithatong di le dintsi tsa bosilo, le tse di senyang, tse di nwetseng batho mo tshenyegong le mo tatlhegong." 
1Timothy6:10 Gonne go rata madi ke modi wa masula mangwe le mangwe otlhe, ke mo e rileng bangwe ba go gwalalela, ba timelwa ke tumelo, mme ba iphololeditse ka mahutsana a le mantsi." 
1Timothy6:11 Wena monna wa Modimo tshaba dilo tse; o latele tshiamo; le poifomodimo le tumelo, le lorato, le bopelotelele le bopelonolo." 
1Timothy6:12 Tlhabana ntwa e e molemo ya tumelo, o tshware botshelo jo bo sa khutleng, jo o bo bileditsweng, wa ipolela ka boipolelo jo bo molemo mo ponong ya basupi ba le bantsi." 
1Timothy6:13 Ke a go laya mo ponong ya Modimo o o tshedisang dilo tsotlhe, le ya ga Keresete Jesu, yo e rileng a le fa pele ga Ponto Pilato a supa boipolelo jo bo molemo." 
1Timothy6:14 Ka re, o tshegetse taolo e ka mo go se nang selabe, le ka mo go se nang mokgobo, go ya go fitlha mo go bonatshegeng ga Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete;" 
1Timothy6:15 mo o tlaa go bonatsang mo metlheng ya gone, e bong ene yo e leng Mothata yo o bakwang le yo o esi, Kgosi ya dikgosi le Morena wa barena;" 
1Timothy6:16 yo o nang le bosasweng a le esi, a bile a agile mo leseding le le sa ka keng la atamelwa; yo go seng motho ope yo o kileng a mmona, le gone ope a sa ka ke a mmona; yo tlotlo le thata tse di sa yeng kae di ka kang, tsa nna kwa go ene. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 O laye ba ba humileng mo motlheng ono, gore ba se ka ba ipegela godimo, le fa e le go solofela mo bosenang tlhomamo jwa khumo, fa e se mo Modimong fela, o o re nayang dilo tsotlhe ka letlotlo, gore re di je monate." 
1Timothy6:18 O bo o ba laye gore ba dire molemo, ba hume ditiro tse di molemo, ba iketleeletse go aba, ba itumelele go abalana;" 
1Timothy6:19 ba ntse ba ipeelela motlha o o tlang motheo o o molemo, gore ba tle ba tshware botshelo jo e leng botshelo ruri." 
1Timothy6:20 Timotheo, a ko o dibele sone se o se neetsweng, o ntse o tlhokomologile dipalabalo tsa boithamako, le dikganetsanyo tsa e e bidiwang kitso, mme e se yone;" 
1Timothy6:21 tse bangwe ba e rileng ka ba di dumetse ba fositse ka ga tumelo. Tshegofatso e nne le lona. 
2Timothy1:1 Ke nna Paulo, moaposetole wa ga Keresete Jesu ka go rata ga Modimo, ka fa polelong ya tsholofetso ya botshelo jo bo leng mo go Keresete Jesu." 
2Timothy1:2 Ke kwalela Timotheo, ngwanake yo o rategang: Tshegofatso, le kutlwelobotlhoko, le kagiso, tse di tswang Modimong Rara le Keresete Jesu Morena wa rona." 
2Timothy1:3 Ke leboga Modimo o ke sa leng ke o direla le mo go borraetsho ka segakolodi se se itshekileng, jaaka go go gopola ga me go sa khutle mo mekokotlelong ya me, bosigo le motshegare ke ntse ke tlhologeletswe go go bona," 
2Timothy1:4 gore ke tladiwe boitumelo, ka ke ntse ke gakologetswe dikeledi tsa gago." 
2Timothy1:5 Ke gakolotswe tumelo e e se nang boitimokanyo e e mo go wena; e e rileng pele ya bo e ne e agile mo go mmaagomogolo Loise, le mo go mmaago Eunike; e ke bileng ke tlhomamisa gore le mo go wena e teng." 
2Timothy1:6 Ka ntlha ya gone moo, ke a go gakolola, gore o tle o tlhotlheletse neo ya Modimo e e mo go wena, ka peo ya diatla tsa me." 
2Timothy1:7 Gonne Modimo ga o a ka wa re naya mowa wa bogatlapa, fa e se wa nonofo le wa lorato le wa mogopolo o o tlhomameng fela." 
2Timothy1:8 Ke gone, o se ka wa tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka ga tshupo ya Morena wa rona, le fa e le ka ga me ke le mogolegwi wa gagwe, mme o itshokele bothata o na le Mafoko a a Molemo ka fa thateng ya Modimo;" 
2Timothy1:9 o o re bolokileng, wa re bitsa ka pitso e e boitshepo, e seng ka fa ditirong tsa rona, fa e se ka fa boikaelelong jwa one le tshegofatso, e re sa leng re e newa mo go Keresete Jesu pele ga metlha e e se nang tshimologo." 
2Timothy1:10 Jaanong go senotswe ke go bonala ga Mmoloki wa rona Keresete Jesu, yo o nyeleditseng loso, a baya botshelo le bosaboleng mo leseding ka Mafoko a a Molemo," 
2Timothy1:11 a ke beilweng moreri wa one, le moaposetole, le moruti." 
2Timothy1:12 Ke ka gone moo ke bileng ke boga dilo tse; le fa go ntse jalo, ga ke tlhajwe ke ditlhong; gonne ke itse ene yo ke mo dumetseng, ke a tlhomamisa fa a nonofile go dibela se ke se mo neetseng go ya go fitlha mo tsatsing leo." 
2Timothy1:13 Tshegetsa sekao sa mafoko a a tshedileng, se o se utlwileng mo go nna, mo tumelong le mo loratong lo lo mo go Keresete Jesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Se se molemo seo, se o se neetsweng, o se dibele ka Mowa o o Boitshepo o o agileng mo go rona." 
2Timothy1:15 Mo o a go itse, gore botlhe ba ba mo lefatsheng la Asia ba kgaoganye le nna, ba Fugelo le Heremogenese e leng ba bone." 
2Timothy1:16 A Morena a utlwele ba ntlo ya ga Onesiforo botlhoko, gonne o nthusitse gantsi, mme a se ka a tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka ga keetane ya me;" 
2Timothy1:17 mme o rile a le mo Roma a mpatla ka tlhoafalo, mme a mpona." 
2Timothy1:18 A Morena a mme a bone kutlwelobotlhoko mo Moreneng mo tsatsing leo – mme dilo tse dintsi tse o diretseng phuthego ka tsone kwa Efeso o a di itse sentle. 
2Timothy2:1 Ke gone ngwanaka, ka re, o thatafadiwe mo tshegofatsong e e mo go Keresete Jesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Dilo tse o di utlwileng mo go nna mo gare ga basupi ba le bantsi, tsone tseo o di neele batho ba ba ikanyegang, ba ba tlaa nonofang le go di ruta ba bangwe." 
2Timothy2:3 O tlhakanele bothata le nna, jaaka motlhabani yo o molemo wa ga Keresete Jesu." 
2Timothy2:4 Ga go motlhabani ope yo o reng a le mo ntweng a be a itlhakatlhakantse le dilo tsa botshelo jono; e be e le gore a kgatlhe ene yo o mo kwadileng motlhabani. 
2Timothy2:5 Le gone fa motho a tsena a leka mo ditshamekong, ga a ke a rwesiwa, fa a se ka a leka ka fa molaong." 
2Timothy2:6 Molemi yo o dirang, ke ene o tshwanetseng go nna wa ntlha go ja maungo." 
2Timothy2:7 O akanye se ke se buang; gonne Morena o tlaa go naya tlhaloganyo mo dilong tsotlhe. 
2Timothy2:8 Gakologelwa Jesu Keresete fa a tsogile mo baswing, e le wa losika lwa ga Dafite, ka fa Mafokong a a Molemo a me," 
2Timothy2:9 a ke tshwereng bothata mo go one, ke ba ke tsena mo dikgoleng jaaka modiradibe; mme lefoko la Modimo lone ga le a golegwa." 
2Timothy2:10 Ke gone, ke itshokelang dilo tsotlhe ka ntlha ya ba ba itshenketsweng, gore le bone ba amogele poloko e e mo go Keresete Jesu, le kgalalelo e e sa khutleng." 
2Timothy2:11 Go boikanngo polelo e e reng: “Gonne fa re kile ra swa nae, le gone re tlaa tshela nae;" 
2Timothy2:12 fa re itshoka nae, le gone re tlaa busa nae; fa re mo itatola, le ene o tlaa re itatola;" 
2Timothy2:13 fa rona re sa ikanyege, ene o ntse o boikanngo fela, gonne ga a ka ke a iitatola.”" 
2Timothy2:14 O ba gakolole dilo tse, o ntse o ba laya mo ponong ya Morena, gore ba se ka ba ganela ka ga mafoko fela, mo go se nang thuso, e le mo go timetsang fela ba ba utlwang." 
2Timothy2:15 O tlhoafalele go itshupa o le molebosegi mo Modimong, o le modiri yo o se nang go tlhajwa ke ditlhong, o bua lefoko la boammaaruri ka tshiamo." 
2Timothy2:16 O tshabe tse e leng dipalabalo tse di bosula; gonne ba ba di tlwaelang ba tlaa tswelela kwa pele mo boikepong. 
2Timothy2:17 Lefoko la bone le tlaa ja jaaka ntho e e kekelang; ba Humenaio le Fileto e leng ba bone; 
2Timothy2:18 e le batho ba ba fositseng boammaaruri, ba re: “Tsogo ya baswi e setse e fetile,” mme ba ribegetse tumelo ya bangwe." 
2Timothy2:19 Le fa go ntse jalo motheo o o nitameng wa Modimo o eme fela, ka o na le sekano se, go re: “Morena o itse ba e leng ba gagwe:” Le go re: “A mongwe le mongwe yo o umakang leina la Morena a kgaogane le tshiamololo.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Jaana mo ntlong e kgolo go bo go se dijana tsa gouta le tsa selefera di le tsosi; le gone go na le tsa logong le tsa letsopa; dingwe ke tsa tlotlo, tse dingwe ke dijana fela." 
2Timothy2:21 Ke gone fa motho a itlhapisa mo dilong tsele, o tlaa bo a le sejana sa tlotlo se se itshepisitsweng, se se tshwanetseng go jela ka mong, se se baakanyeditsweng tiro nngwe le nngwe e e molemo." 
2Timothy2:22 O tshabe dithato tsa bokau, o latele tshiamo, le tumelo, le lorato, le kagiso, o na le ba ba bitsang Morena ka pelo e e itshekileng." 
2Timothy2:23 O gane dipotso tsa bonyana le tse di se nang kitso, o ntse o itse fa di tsosa dikgang fela." 
2Timothy2:24 Motlhanka wa Morena ga a a tshwanela go lwa, fa e se go nna bonolo fela mo go botlhe, a le setswerere go ruta, a le boiphapaanyo;" 
2Timothy2:25 a le boikokobetso, a sokolola ba ba ikgantshang; e tle e re kgotsa Modimo wa ba naya boikwatlhao jwa go fitlha mo kitsong ya boammaaruri." 
2Timothy2:26 Ba itse go itshomola mo serung sa diabolo, ka ba gapetswe go rata ga Modimo ke motlhanka wa Morena." 
2Timothy3:1 Itse selo se, gore mo metlheng ya bofelo go tlaa tla dipaka tse di tlhokofatsang." 
2Timothy3:2 Gonne batho ba tlaa nna baithati, le barati ba madi, le babelafadi, le baipegi, le bakgadi, le ba ba sa utlweng batsadi ba bone, le ba ba sa lebogeng, le ba ba sa itshepang." 
2Timothy3:3 Ba se na lorato lwa tlholego, e le ba ba sa itshwareleng, e le bapateletsi, ba se na boithibo, ba le bogale, e se barati ba molemo gope;" 
2Timothy3:4 e le baoki, e le ba ba tlhogoethata, e le ba ba ikgogomosang, e le barati ba dikgatlhego, bogolo go go nna barati ba Modimo;" 
2Timothy3:5 e le ba ba tshotseng setshwantsho fela sa poifomodimo, mme thata ya yone ba e latotse; le bone bao o kgaogane nabo." 
2Timothy3:6 Gonne ba ga bone bao ke ba ba kukunelang mo matlong, ba ya go gapa basadi ba dieleele ba ba tletseng dibe, ba gogwa ke dithato dingwe le dingwe," 
2Timothy3:7 e le ba ba ntseng ba ithuta, ba sa nonofa gope go fitlha mo kitsong ya boammaaruri." 
2Timothy3:8 Jaaka Janese le Jamberese ba kile ba ganetsa Moše, le bone bao ba ganetsa boammaaruri jalo; e le batho ba ba bodileng megopolo, e le ditlhobogwa ka ga tumelo." 
2Timothy3:9 Mme ga ba ketla ba tlhola ba tswelela kwa pele; gonne bosilo jwa bone bo tlaa bonalela batho botlhe, jaaka le jwa bone bale bo dule mme jwa bonala." 
2Timothy3:10 Mme wena o latetse thuto ya me le mokgwa, le boikaelelo, le tumelo le bopelotelele, le lorato, le boitshoko," 
2Timothy3:11 le dipogiso, le dibotlhoko; e bong dilo tse di nkwetseng mo Antioke le mo Ikonio, le mo Lusetera; e bong dipogiso tse ke di bogileng; Morena o nkgolotse mo go tsone tsotlhe fela." 
2Timothy3:12 Ee, le botlhe ba ba ratang go tshela ka poifomodimo mo go Keresete Jesu ba tlaa bona pogiso." 
2Timothy3:13 Mme batho ba ba bosula le batsietsi ba tlaa nna ba sulafalela pele fela ba tsietsa, ba bile ba tsiediwa." 
2Timothy3:14 Mme wena o nnele ruri mo dilong tse o di ithutileng le tse o di tlhomamiseditsweng, ka o itse ba o di ithutileng mo go bone;" 
2Timothy3:15 le jaaka dikwalo tse di boitshepo o sale o di itse mo bonyaneng jwa gago, e le tse di nonofileng go go tlhalefisetsa polokong, ka tumelo e e mo go Keresete Jesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Lokwalo longwe le longwe lo lo kwadilweng ka tlhotlheletso ya Modimo, lo bile lo molemo go ruta, le go kgalemela le go sokolola, le go kaela ka tshiamo," 
2Timothy3:17 gore motho wa Modimo a tle a nne boitekanelo, a iketleeletse ruri tiro nngwe le nngwe e e molemo." 
2Timothy4:1 Ke a go laya mo ponong ya Modimo, le ya ga Keresete Jesu, yo o tlaa atlholang batshedi le baswi le ka go bonatshega ga gagwe, le ka bogosi jwa gagwe, ka re:" 
2Timothy4:2 Rera lefoko, o tlhoafale go le lobaka le go se lobaka; o tlhotlhomise, o kgalemele, o laye ka bopelotelele jotlhe le ka go ruta." 
2Timothy4:3 Gonne motlha o tlaa tla o ba se ketlang ba iteseletsa go utlwa thuto e e itekanetseng ka one; mme e re ka ba le ditsebe tse di babanyegang, ba tlaa ikgobokanyetsa baruti ba ba ka fa dikgatlhegong tsa bone." 
2Timothy4:4 Ba tlaa itsubula mo boammaaruring, ba fapogela kwa mainaneng." 
2Timothy4:5 Mme wena o nne tekano mo dilong tsotlhe, o itshokele bothata, o dire tiro ya motsamaisa Mafoko a a Molemo, o swetse tirelo ya gago." 
2Timothy4:6 Gonne nna ke setse ke isiwa tshupelo le jaana, le lobaka lwa go tloga ga me lo fitlhile." 
2Timothy4:7 Ke tlhabanye ntwa e e molemo, ke digetse sebaka sa tshiano, ke bolokile tumelo." 
2Timothy4:8 Go tloga fano ke setse ke beetswe serwalo sa tshiamo, sa Morena, moatlhodi wa tshiamo, o tlaa se nnanyang mo tsatsing leo; mme e seng nna ke le nosi, e leng le bone botlhe ba ba ratileng go bonatshega ga gagwe." 
2Timothy4:9 O tle o leke go akofa o tla kwa go nna; 
2Timothy4:10 gonne Demase o ntatlhile, ka a ratile lefatshe leno, o ile Thesalonika; Keresense o ile Galatia; Tito o ile Dalematia." 
2Timothy4:11 Ke na le Luke a le esi. Tsaya Mareko o tle nae, gonne o molemo mo go nna mo go direleng." 
2Timothy4:11 Ke na le Luke a le esi. Tsaya Mareko o tle nae, gonne o molemo mo go nna mo go direleng." 
2Timothy4:12 Ke romile Tukiko kwa Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Kobo e ke e tlogetseng mo go Karepo kwa Teroase, o re o tla o tle nayo, le dikwalo, bogolo tsa matlalo." 
2Timothy4:14 Alekesantere mothudi wa kgotlho o ntiretse bosula jo bogolo; Morena o tlaa mo direla ka fa tirong tsa gagwe. 
2Timothy4:15 Le wena o mo tlhalefe; gonne o ganeditse mafoko a rona thata. 
2Timothy4:16 E rile mo go ikarabeleng ga me ga ntlha, ga go a ka ga dira le ope yo o mpatang, mme botlhe ba ntatlha fela. A ba ke ba se ka ba bewa molato wa gone." 
2Timothy4:17 Mme Morena o ne a ema fa go nna, a ba a nnaya thata; e le gore taetso e tle e bolelwe ka botlalo ka nna, le gore Baditšhaba botlhe ba utlwe; ka gololwa mo molomong wa tau." 
2Timothy4:18 Morena o tlaa nkgolola mo tirong nngwe le nngwe e e bosula, o tlaa mpolokela go nkisa bogosing jwa gagwe jwa selegodimo; yo kgalalelo e ka kang ya nna go ene ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Dumedisa Perisila le Akwila, le ntlo ya ga Onesiforo." 
2Timothy4:20 Eraseto o fitlhile a nna mo Korinthe, mme Terofimo ke mo tlogetse kwa Mileto a lwala." 
2Timothy4:21 O tlo o leke thata go raka mariga ka go tla. Eubulo o a go dumedisa, le Putense, le Lino, le Kelaudia, le bakaulengwe botlhe." 
2Timothy4:22 A Morena a nne le mowa wa gago. A tshegofatso e nne le lona. 
Titus1:1 Ke nna Paulo, motlhanka wa Modimo, le moaposetole wa ga Jesu Keresete, ka fa tumelong ya baitshenkedwi ba Modimo, le ka fa kitsong ya boammaaruri e e ka fa poifongmodimo," 
Titus1:2 mo tsholofelong ya botshelo jo bo sa khutleng, jo Modimo, o o sa ka keng wa aka, o bo solofeditseng batho pele ga metlha e e se nang tshimologo;" 
Titus1:3 mme wa bonatsa lefoko la one mo metlheng e e leng yone, ka taetso e ke e neetsweng ka fa taolong ya Modimo Mmoloki wa rona." 
Titus1:4 Ke kwalela Tito, ngwanake ruri ka fa tumelong e re e tlhakanetseng: Tshegofatso le kagiso, tse di tswang Modimong Rara le Keresete Jesu Moreboloki." 
Titus1:5 Ke ne ka go tlogela kwa Kerete ka gone moo, gore o tle o rulaganye dilo tse di neng di tlhaela, le gore o tlhome bagolwane mo motseng mongwe le mongwe jaaka ke go laile;" 
Titus1:6 ke raya fa o fitlhela monna e le yo o se nang molato, e le monna yo o mosadi mongwe fela, a na le bana ba ba dumelang, ba ba sa bolelweng ka molato wa tlhapelo, kgotsa e le ba ba ganang taolo." 
Titus1:7 Gonne mookami wa phuthego o tshwanetse go nna motho yo o se nang molato, jaaka molebalebedi wa Modimo; e se yo o ikgantshang, e se yo o bonako go galefa, e se yo o losiwang ke bojalwa, e se moitei, e se yo o bolaelwang ke khumo e e maswe pelo;" 
Titus1:8 mme e le yo o tlwaetseng go tshola batho, e le morati wa se se molemo, e le yo o mogopolo o o lekalekanyeng, a le tshiamo, a le boitshepo, a na le go ikgapa;" 
Titus1:9 a ngaparetse lefoko le le ikanyegang, le le leng ka fa thutong, gore a tle a nonofe go laya ka thuto e e itekanetseng, le go fenya baganetsi." 
Titus1:10 Gonne go na le batho ba le bantsi ba ba ganang taolo, e le babui ba ba ithamakang fela, le batsietsi mme bogolo bone ba bogwera," 
Titus1:11 ba melomo ya bone e tshwanetseng go thijwa; e le batho ba ba ribigetsang ba matlo ba le mmogo, ba ruta batho dilo tse di sa tshwanelang, e le gore ba tle ba bone khumo." 
Titus1:12 Mongwe wa bone, e le mokaedi mongwe wa bone, o rile: “Bakerete ke baaki ka gale le ka gale, ba sefolofolo se se maswe, ke dijabele tse di bobodu fela.”" 
Titus1:13 Tshupo eo ke boammaaruri. O ba kgalemele thata ka ntlha ya gone moo, gore ba tle ba itekanele mo tumelong." 
Titus1:14 Ba sa tlhokomele mainane a Sejuta, le ditaolo tsa batho ba ba fapogang boammaaruri." 
Titus1:15 Mo go ba ba itshekileng, dilo tsotlhe di itshekile; mme mo go ba ba leswe, le ba ba sa dumeleng, ga go sepe se se itshekileng; mme go le tlhaloganyo ya bone e leswe, le segakolodi sa bone se leswe." 
Titus1:16 Ba re ba itse Modimo; mme ba o itatole ka ditiro tsa bone, ka ba le makgapha, ba le kgopo, ba tlhobosegile ka ga tiro nngwe le nngwe e e molemo." 
Titus2:1 Mme wena o tle o bue dilo tse di tshwanetseng thuto e e itekanetseng. 
Titus2:2 Ke go re, a bannabagolo ba itse go ikgapa, ba nne masisi, ba nne mogopolo o o lekalekanyeng, e nne ba ba itekanetseng mo tumelong, le mo loratong, le mo bopeloteleleng;" 
Titus2:3 le gore basadibagolo le bone ba nne masisi mo mokgweng wa bone, e se bapateletsi, ba sa lemalela bojalwa, e le ba ba rutang batho se se molemo;" 
Titus2:4 gore ba rute basadi ba meroba go rata banna ba bone, le go rata bana ba bone." 
Titus2:5 Le go nna mogopolo o o lekalekanyeng, ba le boitsheko, e le ba ba itirelang mo gae, ba le pelonomi, ba le kutlo mo banneng ba bone, gore lefoko la Modimo le se tlhapadiwe." 
Titus2:6 Le makau, o ba laye gore ba nne mogopolo o o lekalekanyeng;" 
Titus2:7 o ntse o itshupa mo dilong tsotlhe o le sekao sa ditiro tse di molemo; le mo thutong ya gago o itshupe o le pelontle, o le masisi," 
Titus2:8 o le puo ya tlhomamo, e e sa kakeng ya nyadiwa; e tle e re yo o ganetsang a tlhajwe ke ditlhong, a tlhokile sa bosula se o se buang ka ga rona." 
Titus2:9 Laya batlhanka gore ba ineele go utlwa ba e leng beng ba bone, ba ba kgatlhe mo dilong tsotlhe; ba sa buse lerumo;" 
Titus2:10 ba sa ngobetse, mme ba itshupe boikanngo jotlhe jo bo molemo, gore ba kgabise thuto ya Modimo Moreboloki mo dilong tsotlhe." 
Titus2:11 Gonne tshegofatso ya Modimo e bonetse, e tlela batho botlhe poloko." 
Titus2:12 E re ruta gore e tle e re re ntse re ikgaogantse le boikepo, le dithato tsa lefatshe, re bo re tshela ka go ikgapa, le ka tshiamo, le ka poifomodimo, mo motlheng wa gompieno;" 
Titus2:13 re ntse re lebeletse tsholofelo ya letlhogonolo, le ponatshego ya kgalalelo ya Modimo o mogolo wa rona, le Moreboloki Jesu Keresete;" 
Titus2:14 yo o re intsheditseng gore a re rekolole mo tshiamololong yotlhe, le gore a intlafaletse batho ba ba tlaa nnang boswa jwa gagwe, ba ba tlhoafaletseng ditiro tse di molemo." 
Titus2:15 Bua dilo tse, o bo o laye ka tsone, o bo o kgalemele ka taolo yotlhe. Motho ope a se ka a go nyatsa." 
Titus3:1 O ba gakolole gore ba ineele mo balaoding, le gore ba nne kutlo mo go ba ba neetsweng taolo, ba etleetsegele tiro nngwe le nngwe e e molemo;" 
Titus3:2 ba se ka ba bua bosula ka ga motho ope, ba se nne dikgangkgang, ba nne bonolo, ba le boikokobetso jotlhe mo bathong botlhe." 
Titus3:3 Gonne e rile gale le rona ra bo re le dieleele, re sa utlwe, re tsiediwa, re direla dithato dingwe le dingwe le dikgatlhego, re tshela ka peloetlhoi, le mo bopelotshetlheng, re le ba ba ilegang, re bile re ilana." 
Titus3:4 Mme e rile bopelonomi jwa Modimo Moreboloki bo sena go bonala, le go rata motho ga one," 
Titus3:5 ya se ka ya nna ka ditiro tse di dirilweng, mo tshiamong tse rona ka rosi re di dirileng, mme wa re boloka ka fa kutlwelong botlhoko ya one, ka tlhapiso ya go tsalwa seša, le ka bošafatso jwa Mowa o o Boitshepo," 
Titus3:6 o o o re goromeleditseng ka letlotlo, ka Jesu Keresete Moreboloki;" 
Titus3:7 gore e tle e re re siamisitswe ka tshegofatso ya one, re bo re dirwa baruaboswa, ka fa tsholofelong ya botshelo jo bo sa khutleng." 
Titus3:8 Go ikanyega polelo e, mme ka ga dilo tse, ke rata wa bolela ka tlhomamo, gore ba ba dumetseng Modimo ba tlhoafalele go nna ba dira ditiro tse di molemo. Dilo tse di molemo di na le thuso mo bathong." 
Titus3:9 Mme o tshabe dipotso tsa bonyana, le dipalo tsa ditshika, le dikgang le go lwa ka ga molao; gonne ga di na thuso, di bile di boithamako." 
Titus3:10 Motho yo o itomololang mo go ba bangwe, e re a sena go tlhagisiwa gangwe fela, le fa e le gabedi, o mo gane;" 
Titus3:11 o ntse o itse fa yo o ntseng jalo a fapogile, o a leofa, go bile go itshekisitse ene." 
Titus3:12 E tlaa re ke roma Aretemase kwa go wena, le fa e le Tukiko, o tle o itlhaganele go tla kwa go nna kwa Nikopolise: gonne ke ikaeletse go fetisa mariga teng." 
Titus3:13 O felegetse Senase moruti wa molao, le Apolose, mo loetong lwa bone ka tlhoafalo, gore ba se tlhaelwe ke sepe." 
Titus3:14 Le ba ga rona, ba ithute go nna ba dira ditiro tse di molemo, tse di ka solegang molemo, gore ba se ka ba nna ka botlhoka loungo." 
Titus3:15 Botlhe ba ke nang nabo ba a go dumedisa. Dumedisa bone ba ba re ratang mo tumelong. Tshegofatso e nne le lona lotlhe. 
Philemon1:1 Ke nna Paulo, mogolegwi wa ga Keresete Jesu, ke na le Timotheo mokaulengwe. Ke kwalela Filemone moratwa wa rona, le modiri ka rona." 
Philemon1:2 O na le Apefia kgaitsadia rona, le Arekipo motlhabani ka rona, le phuthego e e mo ntlong ya gago." 
Philemon1:3 Ka re: Tshegofatso e nne le lona le kagiso, e e tswang Modimong Rraetsho le Morena Jesu Keresete." 
Philemon1:4 Ke leboga Modimo wa me ka metlha yotlhe, ke ntse ke go umaka mo merapelong ya me," 
Philemon1:5 ka ke utlwela lorato lwa gago, le tumelo e o e supang ka ga Morena Jesu, le ka ga baitshepi botlhe." 
Philemon1:6 Ke rapela gore bolekane jwa tumelo ya gago nabo bo tle bo nne le tiro, gore ba itse sengwe le sengwe se se molemo, se se mo go rona ntlheng ya ga Keresete;" 
Philemon1:7 gonne ke bonye boitumelo jo bogolo le kgomotso mo loratong lwa gago, ka dipelo tsa baitshepi di rudisitswe ke wena, ngwana a rra." 
Philemon1:8 Ke gone, le fa ke ne ke ka nna le tshosologo mo go Keresete go go laolela se se tshwanetseng," 
Philemon1:9 le fa go ntse jalo, ka ntlha ya lorato bogolo ke go rapela fela, ke le yo o tshwanang le Paulo wa monnamogolo, jaanong ke bile ke le mogolegwi wa ga Keresete Jesu." 
Philemon1:10 Ke go rapelela ngwanake, yo ke mo tsaletseng mo dikgolegong tsa me;" 
Philemon1:11 ke raya Onesimo, yo e rileng gale a bo a se na thuso mo go wena, jaanong o na le thuso mo go wena le mo go nna;" 
Philemon1:12 yo ke mmuseditseng koo go wena ka sebele sa gagwe, ke go re ke busa pelo ya me tota;" 
Philemon1:13 yo ke ne ke rata e ka bo ne ne fano ke sa ntse ke na nae, gore a ntirele mo boemong jwa gago, ke le mo dikgoleng tsa Mafoko a a Molemo." 
Philemon1:14 Mme ga ke na go dira sepe kwa ntle ga mogopolo wa gago; gore molemo wa gago o se ka wa nna jaaka e kete o a o patelediwa, mme gore o nne wa go itatola ga pelo ya gago fela." 
Philemon1:15 Gonne motlha mongwe o ne a kgaogantswe nao ka lobaka, ka ntlha ya gone moo, gore o tle o nne nae ka bosakhutleng;" 
Philemon1:16 e sa tlhole e le motlhanka, mme go gaisa motlhanka; e le mokaulengwe yo o rategang thata mo go nna, bogolo jang mo go wena, mo nameng le mo Moreneng." 
Philemon1:17 Foo, fa o nkaya gore ke monkana wa gago, mo amogele fela jaaka e ka bo e le nna." 
Philemon1:18 Mme fa a go senyeditse ka gongwe, kgotsa fa a le molato nao, o tle o se beye kwa go nna." 
Philemon1:19 Ke nna Paulo ke kwalang ka seatla sa me, ka re, ke tlaa se lefa, ke sa go reye jaaka le wena ka wesi o le molato sebele sa gago mo go nna." 
Philemon1:20 Ee, ngwana a rra, a nke ke bone boitumelo ka ga gago mo Moreneng; rudisa pelo ya me mo go Keresete." 
Philemon1:21 E re ka ke ikantse kutlo ya gago, ke a go kwalela, ke ntse ke itse fa o tlaa dira fela o ba o fetisa mo ke go buang." 
Philemon1:22 O tle o mpaakanyetse bonno; gonne ke solofetse gore ke tlaa lo neelwa ka merapelo ya lona. 
Philemon1:23 Epaferase, mogolegwi ka nna mo go Keresete Jesu, o a go dumedisa." 
Philemon1:24 Le Mareko le Arisetareko, le Demase, le Luke, badiri ka nna ba bua jalo." 
Philemon1:24 Le Mareko le Arisetareko, le Demase, le Luke, badiri ka nna ba bua jalo." 
Philemon1:25 A tshegofatso ya Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete e nne le mewa ya lona. Amen. 
Hebrews1:1 Modimo, o e rileng ka o buile le borara mo metlheng ya bogologolo ka baperofeti, ka mafoko mangwe le mangwe, le ka mekgwa mengwe le mengwe," 
Hebrews1:2 o buile le rona mo bokhutlong jwa metlha eno ka Morwa one, yo o mmeileng morui wa dilo tsotlhe, yo o bileng wa dira dipopo ka ene;" 
Hebrews1:3 yo e reng ka e le ene marang a kgalalelo ya one, le setshwano ka sebele sa Bomodimo jwa one, a bile a tshegeditse dilo tsotlhe ka lefoko la nonofo ya gagwe; ka re, e rile a sena go dira bontlafatso jwa dibe, a dula ka fa letsogong le legolo la Borena kwa godimodimo." 
Hebrews1:4 O diregile mogolo go feta baengele, fela jaaka a ruile leina le le gaisang la bone." 
Hebrews1:5 Gonne o kile wa raya ofe wa baengele ka lobaka longwe wa re: “O Morwaake, ke go tsetse gompieno”? Gape, “Ke tlaa nna Rraagwe, Mme ene o tlaa nna Morwaake”?" 
Hebrews1:6 Gape ya re o tlisa motsalwapele wa one mo lefatsheng wa re: “A baengele botlhe ba Modimo ba mo obamele.” 
Hebrews1:7 Ka ga baengele o buile wa re: “O dira baengele ba one diphefo, le badiredi ba one kgabo ya molelo.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Mme ka ga Morwa one o buile, wa re: “Setulo sa gago sa bogosi, Modimo, se ntse ka bosakhutleng le ka bosaengkae; tsamma ya thokgamo ke yone tsamma ya bogosi jwa gago." 
Hebrews1:9 O ratile tshiamo mme wa ila boikepo; ke gone Modimo, Modimo wa gago, o go tloditseng ka lookwane lwa boitumelo godimo ga bankana ba gago.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Gape: “Wena Morena, e rile mo tshimologong wa thaya motheo wa lefatshe, mme magodimo ke ditiro tsa diatla tsa gago;" 
Hebrews1:11 tsone di tlaa nyelela, mme wena o nnetse ruri; tsone tsotlhe di tlaa onala jaaka seaparo;" 
Hebrews1:12 mme o tlaa di mena jaaka morepo, jaaka seaparo, mme di tlaa fetolwa; mme wena o bo o ntse jaaka o ntse fela, dinyaga tsa gago ga di ketla di fela.”" 
Hebrews1:13 O kile wa bua ka ga ofe wa baengele ka lobaka longwe wa re: “Dula ka fa letsogong la me le legolo, ke tle ke tsamaye ke dire baba ba gago sebeo sa dinao tsa gago”?" 
Hebrews1:14 Bone botlhe a ga se mewa e e direlang, e e rongwang mo tirong ka ntlha ya ba ba tlaa ruang poloko?" 
Hebrews2:1 Ke gone, re tshwanetseng go tlhokomela segolo thata dilo tse di utlwilweng, e se re kgotsa ra di katogelela koo." 
Hebrews2:2 Gonne fa lefoko le le builweng ka baengele le fitlhetswe le le tlhomamo, mme tlolo nngwe le nngwe le go gana go utlwa, ga bona tuelo ya tefiso e e lekalekanyeng;" 
Hebrews2:3 ana rona re tlaa falola jang, fa re tlhokomologa poloko e e kalo? E e rileng e sena go bolelwa pele ka Morena, ra e tlhomamisediwa ke ba ba e utlwileng." 
Hebrews2:4 Modimo le one o ntse o supa nabo ka ditshupo, le dikgakgamatso, le ka dinonofo di le dintsi, le ka dineo tsa Mowa o o Boitshepo, ka fa go rateng ga one." 
Hebrews2:5 Gonne lobopo lo lo tlang, lo re buang ka ga lone, ga o a ka wa lo baya mo taolong ya baengele." 
Hebrews2:6 Mongwe o boletse golo gongwe a re: “Kana motho e be e le eng, fa e bo ne ne o mo gopola, le morwa motho, fa e bo ne ne o mo lekola?" 
Hebrews2:7 Wa mo fokoletsa boemo go le gonnye fela mo baengeleng; wa mo rwesa kgalalelo le tlotlo, wa mo naya taolo mo ditirong tsa diatla tsa gago." 
Hebrews2:8 Wa baya dilo tsotlhe fa tlase ga dinao tsa gagwe, di le mo taolong.” Gonne e re ka o ne o baya dilo tsotlhe mo taolong ya gagwe, ga o a ka wa sadisa sepe se se seng mo taolong ya gagwe. Mme gompieno ga re ise re bone dilo tsotlhe fa di beilwe mo taolong ya gagwe." 
Hebrews2:9 Re bona ene, e bong Jesu, yo o fokoleditsweng boemo go le gonnye mo baengeleng, a rwesitswe kgalalelo le tlotlo, ka ntlha ya gobo a kile a boga loso, gore e tle e re ka tshegofatso ya Modimo a be a lekeleletse motho mongwe le mongwe loso." 
Hebrews2:10 Gonne go ne go tshwanetse one o dilo tsotlhe di leng ka one, le o dilo tsotlhe di nnetseng ka one, fa o isa bana ba le bantsi kgalalelong, gore o dire mosimolodi wa poloko ya bone boitekanelo ka dipogisego." 
Hebrews2:11 Gonne go le yo o itshepisang, le ba ba itshepisiwang, ke ba mongwe fela botlhe. Ke gone o sa tlhajweng ke ditlhong ke go ba bitsa bakaulengwe; a re:" 
Hebrews2:12 “Ke tlaa kakanyetsa bakaulengwe ba me leina la gago, ke tlaa opela pako ya gago mo gare ga phuthego.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Gape a re: “Ke tlaa mo ikanya.” Gape a re: “Bona nna le bana ba Modimo o ba nneileng.” 
Hebrews2:14 E re ka bana ba tlhakanetse nama le madi, le ene ka esi a itlhakanya natso jalo; gore e tle e re ka loso a nyeletse ene yo o ne a na le nonofo ya loso, e bong diabolo;" 
Hebrews2:15 le gore a golole bone botlhe, ba e rileng ka poifo ya loso ba bo ba ntse ba le mo kgolegong, mo botshelong jotlhe jwa bone." 
Hebrews2:16 Gonne ruri ga se baengele ba o ba kakatlololang, mme o kakatlolola losika lwa ga Aberahame." 
Hebrews2:17 Ke gone, go ne go mo tshwanetse go dirwa jaaka bomonnawe mo dilong tsotlhe, gore a nne moperesiti yo mogolo, yo o boutlwelobotlhoko le boikanngo mo dilong tse e leng tsa Modimo, go direla dibe tsa batho tetlano." 
Hebrews2:18 Gonne e re ka ene ka esi a bogisegile ka a raelwa, o nonofile go thusa ba ba raelwang." 
Hebrews3:1 Ke gone bagaetsho ba ba itshepileng, lo le baabedwi ba pitso ya selegodimo, akanyang Moaposetole le Moperesiti yo mogolo wa tumelo ya rona, e bong Jesu;" 
Hebrews3:2 yo o ne a ikanyega mo go one o o mmeileng, jaaka le ene Moše a ne a ntse mo ntlong yotlhe ya one." 
Hebrews3:3 Gonne ene, o kailwe fa a tshwanetse kgalalelo e e fetang ya ga Moše, go etsa jaaka yo o agileng ntlo a tle a bone kgalalelo e e fetang ya yone ntlo." 
Hebrews3:4 Gonne ntlo nngwe le nngwe e tle e agiwe ke motho mongwe; mme yo o agileng dilo tsotlhe ke Modimo. 
Hebrews3:5 Le gale Moše o ne a ikanyega mo ntlong yotlhe ya one, jaaka motlhanka go nna tshupo ka ga dilo tse di ne di tloga di bolelwa;" 
Hebrews3:6 mme Keresete o ne a ikanyega jaaka ngwana mo ntlong ya one; o rona re leng ntlo ya one, fa re tshegetsa botlhokapoifo jwa rona, le boikgantsho jwa tsholofelo ya rona ka tlhomamo, go ya kwa bokhutlong." 
Hebrews3:7 Ke gone fela jaaka Mowa o o Boitshepo o bua o re: “Gompieno fa lo utlwa lentswe la one," 
Hebrews3:8 se kgwaralatseng pelo tsa lona jaaka mo kgakatsong, jaaka mo motlheng wa teko kwa nageng," 
Hebrews3:9 e borraeno ba ntalela ka yone ba nteka, mme ba bona ditiro tsa me ka dinyaga di le masome mane." 
Hebrews3:10 Ke gone ka moo ke ne ka itumologela losika lo, ka ba ka re: ‘Ba timela ka gale le ka gale mo pelong tsa bone; ga ba a ka ba itse ditsela tsa me.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Jaaka ke ikanne mo bogaleng jwa me, ka re: ‘Ga ba ketla ba tsena mo boikhutsong jwa me.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Lo itise, bagaetsho, e se re kgotsa go bo go ka nna le mo go mongwe wa lona pelo e e bosula, e e sa dumeleng, ya go kgaogana le Modimo o o tshedileng." 
Hebrews3:13 Lo laane ka malatsi otlhe, ka go sa ntse go ka twe: “Gompieno,” gore ope wa lona a se ka a kgwaraladiwa ke tsietso ya boleo." 
Hebrews3:14 Gonne re diregile baabedwi le Keresete, fa re tshegetsa tshimologo ya boikanyo jwa rona, go ya ka tlhomamo kwa bokhutlong." 
Hebrews3:15 Ka go sa ntse go twe: “Gompieno, fa lo utlwa lentswe la one, se ikgwaralatseng pelo tsa lona jaaka mo kgakatsong.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Ka gobo ke bomang ba e rileng ba sena go utlwa ba gakatsa? Nnyaa, a ga se bone botlhe ba ba duleng kwa Egepeto ka Moše?" 
Hebrews3:17 Ba o ba itumologetseng ka dinyaga di le 40, e ne e le bomang? A e ne e se ba ba leofileng, ba ditoto tsa bone di wetseng mo nageng?" 
Hebrews3:18 Ba o ba ikanetseng, wa re, ga ba ketla ba tsena mo boikhutsong jwa one, e ne e le bomang, fa e se ba ba neng ba le kgopo?" 
Hebrews3:19 Re a bona fa ba reteletswe ke go tsena, ka ntlha ya go tlhoka go dumela." 
Hebrews4:1 Ke gone, rona a re boifeng, e tlaa re kgotsa polelo ya tsholofetso e ntse e le teng, ya go tsena mo boikhutsong jwa one, mongwe wa lona a ba a nne e kete o e tlhaetse." 
Hebrews4:2 Gonne ammaaruri le rona re ntse ra nna ra rerelwa mafoko mangwe a a molemo, fela jaaka bone; mme lefoko la kutlo ga le a ka la solega molemo mo go bone, ka ba se ka ba tshwaraganngwa ka tumelo le bone ba ba utlwileng." 
Hebrews4:3 Gonne rona ba re dumetseng re tsena mo boikhutsong joo, fela jaaka o rile: “Jaaka ke ikanne mo bogaleng jwa me ka re: ‘Ga ba ketla ba tsena mo boikhutsong jwa me,’ ” le fa ditiro di sa le di wediwa mo tlholegong ya lefatshe." 
Hebrews4:4 Gonne o buile golo gongwe ka ga letsatsi la bosupa, ka mo go ntseng jaana wa re: “Modimo wa ikhutsa ka letsatsi la bosupa mo ditirong tsotlhe tsa one,”" 
Hebrews4:5 gape le mo felong fa, fa go twe: “Ga ba ketla ba tsena mo boikhutsong jwa me.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Ke gone, e re ka go saletse bangwe, gore ba tlaa tsena mo go jone, ba ba reretsweng Mafoko a a Molemo gale ba tlhaetse go tsena ka ntlha ya go gana go utlwa." 
Hebrews4:7 O bile o kaya letsatsi lengwe, ka o bua mo go Dafite, lobaka lo lo kalo lo sena go feta wa re: “Gompieno,” jaaka go builwe gale: “Gompieno fa lo utlwa lentswe la one, se kgwaralatseng dipelo tsa lona.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Gonne fa Jošua a ka bo a ne a ba neile boikhutso, o ka bo o se ka wa bua kwa morago ka ga letsatsi le sele." 
Hebrews4:9 Ke gone boikhutso jwa sesabata bo ntse bo saletse batho ba Modimo; 
Hebrews4:10 gonne yo o tsenyeng mo boikhutsong jwa gagwe, le ene o bile o ikhutsitse mo tirong tsa gagwe, jaaka Modimo mo go tsa one." 
Hebrews4:11 Ke gone, a re tlhoafaleleng go tsena mo boikhutsong jo, gore motho ope a se ka a wela mo go sone sekao seo sa go gana go utlwa." 
Hebrews4:12 Gonne lefoko la Modimo le tshedile, le tlhaga, le bogale go feta ditšhaka tsotlhe tse di magale mabedi, mme le tlhabe le ye go kgaoganya pelo le mowa, ditokololo le moko, le bofefo go lemoga megopolo le maikaelelo a pelo." 
Hebrews4:13 Ga go na sebopiwa sepe se se sa bonatshegeng mo matlhong a one; mme dilo tsotlhe di apogile, di senogile fa pele ga matlho a one o re nang le go dirana nao." 
Hebrews4:14 Ke gone e re ka re na le moperesiti yo mogolo bogolo, yo o raletseng magodimo, e bong Jesu Morwa Modimo, a re tshegetseng boipolelo jwa one ka thata." 
Hebrews4:15 Gonne moperesiti yo mogolo yo re nang nae, ga se yo o sa ka keng a angwa ke go utlwana le rona makoa a rona; mme ke yo o kileng a raelwa mo dilong tsotlhe jaaka rona, le fa go ntse jalo a se na boleo." 
Hebrews4:16 Ke gone rona, a re atameleng setulo sa bogosi sa tshegofatso ka botlhokapoifo, gore re tle re amogele boutlwelobotlhoko, re bone tshegofatso e e tlaa re thusang mo motlheng o go tlhokwang ka one." 
Hebrews5:1 Gonne moperesiti yo mogolo mongwe le mongwe, ka a tsewa mo bathong, o beelwa batho mo dilong tse e leng tsa Modimo, gore a isetse dibe dineo le ditlhabelo." 
Hebrews5:2 E le yo o ka neneketsang ka bonolo ba ba sa itseng, le ba ba timelang, ka le ene ka esi a dikanyeditswe ke bokoa." 
Hebrews5:3 Ka ntlha ya gone moo, o na le go ikisetsa setlhabelo jaaka a tle a isetse dibe tsa batho." 
Hebrews5:4 Ga go motho ope yo o inayang tlotlo e, fa e se mogang o bidiwang ke Modimo, fela jaaka Arone a biditswe." 
Hebrews5:5 Go ntse jalo, Keresete le ene, ga a ka a ikgalaletsa go dirwa moperesiti yo mogolo, mme ke one o o buileng nae wa re: “O Morwaake, ke go tsetse gompieno,”" 
Hebrews5:6 le jaaka a bile a buile mo felong go gongwe a re: “O moperesiti ka bosakhutleng, ka fa mokgweng wa ga Melekiseteke.”" 
Hebrews5:7 (E bong Jesu,) yo e rileng mo metlheng ya gagwe a le mo nameng, a sena go isa merapelo le mekokotlelo e e nang le selelo se setona, le dikeledi, kwa go ene yo o nonofileng go mo golola mo losong; ya re a sena go utlwiwa ka ntlha ya go boifa Modimo ga gagwe;" 
Hebrews5:8 le fa a le ngwana, le fa go ntse jalo, a ithuta kutlo ka dilo tse o di bogileng." 
Hebrews5:9 Mme e rile a sena go dirwa boitekanelo, a tswa mosimolodi wa poloka e e sa khutleng mo go botlhe ba ba mo utlwang," 
Hebrews5:10 a rewa ke Modimo leina go twe, Moperesiti yo mogolo ka fa mokgweng wa ga Melekiseteke." 
Hebrews5:11 Yo re nang le dilo di le dintsi go di bua ka gagwe, le tse di thata go phuthololwa, ka lo setse lo kabetse ditsebe." 
Hebrews5:12 Gonne fa e le ka ga lobaka, lo bo lo tshwanetse lwa bo ne ne fano lo le baruti, mme lo bile lo sa ntse lo tlhoka gore bangwe ba lo rute ditlhaka tsa tshimologo tsa mafoko a Modimo; lo bile gape lo ba ba tshwanetsweng ke maši, e seng ke dijo tse di loileng." 
Hebrews5:13 Gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o fetšwang ka maši ga a na tlwaelano le lefoko la tshiamo; gonne ke ngwanyana fela. 
Hebrews5:14 Dijo tse di loileng ke tsa banna ba ba godileng, e bong bone ba e a reng ka ba ntse ba dira, maikutlo a bone a tlwaediwe go lemoga molemo le bosula." 
Hebrews6:1 Ke gone a re khutleng go tlhola re bua ka ga ditshimologo tsa ntlhantlha tsa ga Keresete, mme a re gagamaleleng kwa boitekanelong; re se ka ra ba ra thaya motheo wa go ikwatlhaela ditiro tse di suleng, le wa tumelo Modimong," 
Hebrews6:2 le wa thuto ya dikolobetso, le wa peo ya diatla, le wa go tsoga ga baswi, le wa tshekiso e e sa khutleng." 
Hebrews6:3 Mo re tlaa go dira, fa Modimo o ka re leseletsa." 
Hebrews6:4 Gonne ka ga bone ba ba kileng ba bonesiwa, ba lekeletsa neo ya selegodimo, mme ba abelwa Mowa o o Boitshepo," 
Hebrews6:5 mme ba lekeletsa lefoko le le molemo la Modimo, le dinonofo tsa motlha o o tlang," 
Hebrews6:6 ka ba tlogile ba tenega; bao, go reteletse ruri go ba šafaletsa gape kwa boikwatlhaong, ka ba ipapolela Morwa Modimo seša, ba mo tlhabisa ditlhong mo ponatshegong." 
Hebrews6:7 Gonne lefatshe le le noleng pula e e ntseng e le na, le ungwa merogo e e tshwanetseng bone ba ba bileng ba le lemelwa; lefatshe leo le tle le bone tshegofatso mo Modimong." 
Hebrews6:8 Mme fa le ungwa mitlwa le setlasitlwane, le tle le gangwe, mme le bo le le gaufi le go hutsiwa; mme bofelelo jwa lone ke go jewa ke molelo." 
Hebrews6:9 Mme baratwa, le fa re bua jaana, re solofetse dilo tse di molemo bogolo go tseo ka ga lona, le dilo tse di pataganyeng le poloko." 
Hebrews6:10 Gonne Modimo ga o tshiamololo ya gore o ka lebala tiro ya lona, le go rata leina la one, mo lo go bonyweng ka lo ntse lo direla baitshepi, mme lo sa ntse lo ba direla le gompieno." 
Hebrews6:11 Re eletsa gore mongwe le mongwe wa lona a ke a bonwe a le tlhoafalo eo, go ya go fitlha mo botlalong jwa tsholofelo, le go fitlha kwa bokhutlong," 
Hebrews6:12 gore lo ke lo se bodufale, lo nne baetsi ba bone ba ba buileng dipolelo tsa tsholofetso ka tumelo le ka bopelotelele." 
Hebrews6:13 Gonne e rile fa Modimo o direla Aberahame polelo ya tsholofetso, e re ka go se na ope yo mogolo yo o ne o ka ikana ka ene, ga ikana one ka osi." 
Hebrews6:14 Wa re: “Ruri ke tlaa go segofatsa, ke ba ke go segofatsa; ke tlaa go atisa ke ba ke go atisa.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Jalo o rile a sena go itshoka ka bopelotelele, a amogela se o ne a se solofeditswe."
